nama: Yéné sem Yesu Kerisoene Ákifafene yétkwén. Yesu témorwén Defidene mérénmén. Deifid témorwén Ebraamene mérénmén.
english: The book of the genealogy of Jesus Christ , the son of David , the son of Abraham.

nama: Ebraam témorwén Aiseke yárefé, Aisek témorwén Jeikofe yárefé, Jeikof témorwén Judase yárefé a yánngnéf,
english: Abraham became the father of Isaac . Isaac became the father of Jacob . Jacob became the father of Judah and his brothers.

nama: Judas témorwén Feres a Jeraye yéferafé a yéfetmé témorwén Tamar, Feres témorwén Esrone yárefé, Esron témorwén Rame yárefé,
english: Judah became the father of Perez and Zerah by Tamar . Perez became the father of Hezron . Hezron became the father of Ram.

nama: Ram témorwén Aminadabe yárefé, Aminadab témorwén Nasone yárefé, Nason témorwén Salmone yárefé,
english: Ram became the father of Amminadab. Amminadab became the father of Nahshon . Nahshon became the father of Salmon .

nama: Salmon témorwén Boase yárefé, yátmé témorwén Raaf, Boas témorwén Obede yárefé, yátmé témorwén Rut, Obed témorwén Jesie yárefé,
english: Salmon became the father of Boaz by Rahab . Boaz became the father of Obed by Ruth . Obed became the father of Jesse .

nama: Jesi warsagh ár Deifide yárefé. Deifid témorwén Solomone yárefé, yátmé efe témorwén Uriane amaf,
english: Jesse became the father of King David . David the king became the father of Solomon by her who had been Uriah ’s wife.

nama: Solomon témorwén Reyoboame yárefé, Reyoboam témorwén Abia yárefé, Abia témorwén Asa yárefé,
english: Solomon became the father of Rehoboam . Rehoboam became the father of Abijah. Abijah became the father of Asa.

nama: Asa témorwén Yeyosafate yárefé, Yeyosafat témorwén Yeyorame yárefé, Yeyoram témorwén Usiya yárefé,
english: Asa became the father of Jehoshaphat . Jehoshaphat became the father of Joram . Joram became the father of Uzziah .

nama: Usiya témorwén Yotame yárefé, Yotam témorwén Aase yárefé, Aas témorwén Esékia yárefé,
english: Uzziah became the father of Jotham . Jotham became the father of Ahaz. Ahaz became the father of Hezekiah .

nama: Esékia témorwén Ménase yárefé, Ménase témorwén Amone yárefé, Amon témorwén Yosia yárefé
english: Hezekiah became the father of Manasseh . Manasseh became the father of Amon. Amon became the father of Josiah .

nama: Yosia témorwén Yekonia yéferafé a yánngnéf. Yéné efghon njam Israil árfene mék téfnáram engwasroyénd Babilonét.
english: Josiah became the father of Jechoniah and his brothers at the time of the exile to Babylon.

nama: Soramé engwasroyénd Babilonét: Yekonia témorwén Sietiele yárefé, Sietiel témorwén Jerubabele yárefé,
english: After the exile to Babylon, Jechoniah became the father of Shealtiel . Shealtiel became the father of Zerubbabel .

nama: Jerubabel témorwén Abiute yárefé, Abiut témorwén Eliakime yárefé, Eliakim témorwén Asore yárefé,
english: Zerubbabel became the father of Abiud. Abiud became the father of Eliakim . Eliakim became the father of Azor.

nama: Asor témorwén Jadoke yárefé, Jadok témorwén Ákime yárefé Ákim témorwén Eliute yárefé,
english: Azor became the father of Zadok . Zadok became the father of Achim. Achim became the father of Eliud .

nama: Eliut témorwén Eliasare yárefé, Eliasar témorwén Matane yárefé, Matan témorwén Jeikofe yárefé,
english: Eliud became the father of Eleazar . Eleazar became the father of Matthan . Matthan became the father of Jacob .

nama: Jeikof témorwén Josefe yárefé, Merie yánjar, a emo Yesu yéráftam efe yémndetat Keriso.
english: Jacob became the father of Joseph , the husband of Mary , from whom was born Jesus , who is called Christ .

nama: Kété tamorwén 14 ár saté kétándmé Ebraam kétán Deifid, kétamé Deifid ámb 14 ár saté njam ewitromboyénd Israil ár kétán Babilonét, a ámb 14 ár saté kétamé engwasroyénd Babilonét kétán Kerisoene áráfégh. Yesu Kerisoene áráféghmén si
english: So all the generations from Abraham to David are fourteen generations ; from David to the exile to Babylon fourteen generations ; and from the carrying away to Babylon to the Christ , fourteen generations .

nama: Méinyotio yéné kufrotawét némat Yuré té korayau Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár kénjúmé, 23 "Yuwagia mérés efe árfé ekmarmén so yém suafé a so náráfte ambum, a yémofem so yétkwén yémndetat Immanwel" Yáne fifi siyém, "Ngánjánafé yénd yéném."
english: Now all this has happened that it might be fulfilled which was spoken by the Lord through the prophet , saying ,

nama: Njam Josef kéméghta nanoyéng, yémon yéné tawafrotau némat Yurane njafar si résagh árém yémndayéng fá a Meri yéngwasroi amafot. 25 Wénde yau ekmarmén kétánotio Meri náráftam ambum. Yémon yaramai yá yétkwén Yesu.
english: Joseph arose from his sleep , and did as the angel of the Lord commanded him , and took his wife to himself;

nama: Soramé Yesu náráftam Betliemén Judia kénjún, njam warsagh ár Erod témorwén, káfeté ár enmormén wer tambén Jerusalemét. 2 Njam fá nufaryénd kété, yémofem ár mogh ewafngoyénd, "Ánde yém ambum árké káráfte efe so yém Ju árfene warsagh ár? Yéndfem yáne kénd yinjongém werta, a nénwanongém yá wáwefnoghét.
english: Now when Jesus was born in Bethlehem of Judea in the days of King Herod , behold , wise men from the east came to Jerusalem , saying,

nama: "Wénde fém, Betliem, Judia mbandan, fém yau némbne tesen ném, ménamén fe tambén limánégh ár so yéném emon so ewambete tane ár Israil ndenanit sif wanjengégh ár."
english: ‘ You Bethlehem, land of Judah , are in no way least among the princes of Judah ; for out of you shall come a governor who shall shepherd my people , Israel .’” + 2:6 Micah 5:2

nama: Féyo Erodém emotayéng káfeté ár kwankwane matot árké efghon kénd té nufaryéng. 8 Yémon ewáfáretayéng Betliemét a emndai, "Kuwanongi a merkéráye yéronjati ambum ánde yém. Njam ténmwinjongi, mat kwiyátongi ménát yénd wéi so wéngém yá wáwefnoghét.
english: Then Herod secretly called the wise men , and learned from them exactly what time the star appeared .

nama: Njam fá néngwanoyénd, Yurane njafar si résagh ár nufaryéng Josefefaf onjoe. Yémon témndangé, "Kano, ambum tané a yátmé kuwanongi Ijifét. Kété fiya emor kétánotio yéndon fém kénémndan, ménamén Erod so kénwanongé ambum ronjaghét yá ngiot."
english: Now when they had departed, behold , an angel of the Lord appeared to Joseph in a dream , saying , “ Arise and take the young child and his mother , and flee into Egypt, and stay there until I tell you , for Herod will seek the young child to destroy him .”

nama: Yénémamén fá nanoi, ambum yanai yátmafé sémbáran nuwanoyénd Ijifét, 15 kété emorangérmén kétánotio Erod kér yémorwén. Efalo si náyátoi némat Yuram korayau Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár kénjúmé, "Ijifta yéndon tane ambum yanmoyén."{a{ ...f* {a{2.15 Osiya 11:1
english: He arose and took the young child and his mother by night and departed into Egypt,

nama: "Kém té náyárayénd Rama méngotuan, ye nende, Amaf árkéméné emormén Reseleta nendat yéfenjo ambummén; fá nakenat wamaroghét, ménamén yéfene ambum kér emormén." Josef a yánjo mérén nénangoyénd Najaretét
english: “ A voice was heard in Ramah , lamentation, weeping and great mourning , Rachel weeping for her children ; she wouldn’ t be comforted , because they are no more .” + 2:18 Jeremiah 31:15

nama: Soramé Erod kér yémormén, Yurane njafar si résagh ár nufaryéng onjoe Josefefaf Ijifén, 20 a témndangé, "Kano, ambum tanang a yátmé kuwanongi Israil yuwot, ménamén emo ambum ngiot térametat kér té tam."
english: But when Herod was dead , behold , an angel of the Lord appeared in a dream to Joseph in Egypt, saying,

nama: Jon tawongérwén kamel séf sáláme ménáyafé wérár ngar belesafé, a yémon tánetau ngumbwainy a fámghár. 5 Ár tangmorwén yáfaf Jerusalemta a méinyotio Judiata a méinyotio Joden yuta. 6 Yéfenjo yaufimén kawafenawét, yémon tawalitotau Joden wanjen.
english: Now John himself wore clothing made of camel ’ s hair with a leather belt around his waist . His food was locusts and wild honey .

nama: Féyo Yesu yénmormén Galili yuta Jonefaf Joden wanjen walitoghét. 14 Wénde Joném yéta fá yémndai, "Yénd kwalito fémon mbarkánd so yém. Fém némamén kéném tafaf?"
english: Then Jesus came from Galilee to the Jordan to John , to be baptized by him .

nama: Yesum yawangoyéng, "So fété nufrote sénonjo. Yéné ende yéndfem ewafrowam méinyotio Ngánjánene ménde." Féyo Jon namyoi.
english: But Jesus , answering, said to him , “Allow it now , for this is the fitting way for us to fulfill all righteousness .” Then he allowed him .

nama: Njam Joném Yesu yalitoi, tekofnar nénwiwoi nuta, táf fété njafar nasawéryéng a yémon yinjoi Ngánján Mbérmbér kénewonau mamunit nafayoi yáne fifiyan. 17 A si yénmormén njafarta, "Yéné siyém tane ambum efe yéndon yuwetan, yénd mindefifi náuwétan yáfaf."
english: Jesus , when he was baptized, went up directly from the water : and behold , the heavens were opened to him . He saw the Spirit of God descending as a dove , and coming on him .

nama: Féyo Yesue Ngánján Mbémbéram yélimai fanfne yuwot ménát Sáifram sái tufotau. 2 Nawafarmai 40 efogh a 40 sémbár yéné soramé Yesu siogh témorwén. 3 Wufogh ár nénwanoi yáfaf a témndangé, "Fém Ngánjánene ambum njam ném, tamndé yéné wím so kawengongi flawat."
english: Then Jesus was led up by the Spirit into the wilderness to be tempted by the devil .

nama: Yesum yawangoyéng, "Buk si noraye, "Ár yau so nakete flawayanro, wénde méinyotio si némé Ngánján noraye."
english: But he answered , “ It is written , ‘ Man shall not live by bread alone , but by every word that proceeds out of God ’s mouth .’”

nama: Yesum yawangoyéng, "Buk si wéi noraye, 'Yau yékmeta Yuré fenjo Ngánján wufoghan.'"
english: Jesus said to him , “ Again , it is written , ‘ You shall not test the Lord , your God .’”

nama: Wéikor, Sáifram yémnjoi mband tunakéf tukét a tauyafotawéng yáyot méinyotio mband marat a yáne minde mer. 9 Yémon yémndai, "Méinyotio yéné kés em yéndon so kémaraman fe, fém njam budme kéyé a kwáwefno tayot."
english: Again , the devil took him to an exceedingly high mountain , and showed him all the kingdoms of the world and their glory .

nama: Yesum yémndai fá, "Kitrémb ta tambén, Sáifér! Ndené Buk si noraye, 'Táwefnongi Yurai féfenjo Ngánjáne a yáyotro násáfotati.'"
english: Then Jesus said to him , “ Get behind me , Satan ! For it is written , ‘ You shall worship the Lord your God , and you shall serve him only .’”

nama: Féyo Sáifram yéfrangoi fá, a njafar si résagh ár enmormén yá wáutárghét. Yesum yérnyai yánjo ásáfogh
english: Then the devil left him , and behold , angels came and served him .

nama: Yesum njam náyárai ndené Jon té yélawayénd kwéfkwéf méngon, fá nangoi Galili yuwot. 13 Yémo yéfrangoi Najaret, fá néwanoi yémorangérmén Káfenamén, árké témorwén arakaf téndon Jebulun a Naftali yuwon. 14 Yéné ufroghan témorwén némat Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár Aisaya norayai efalo náyátoi.
english: Now when Jesus heard that John was delivered up , he withdrew into Galilee .

nama: "Jebulun yu a Naftali yu, end kétán arakafot, Joden téndomé, Galili yu, Téndo árfene yu.
english: “ The land of Zebulun and the land of Naphtali , toward the sea , beyond the Jordan , Galilee of the Gentiles ,

nama: Ár efe emorang kwéfkwéfan té yinjoyénd ndimbal kwayaghé, efe emorang kér mbanmbanan kwayaghé té nátremngo yéfefaf."
english: the people who sat in darkness saw a great light ; to those who sat in the region and shadow of death , to them light has dawned.” + 4:16 Isaiah 9:1-2

nama: Kétándmé Yesum yéngérnyayéng si waitogh, "Yaufita kawengongi ménamén njafar limánégh siyém kaka!" Yesum ewanmoi fronde waitogh ár
english: From that time , Jesus began to preach , and to say , “ Repent ! For the Kingdom of Heaven is at hand .”

nama: Kétándmé néngaflayénd, yémon ewinjeyai sómbio ár yánngnéfé Jems Jefediene ambum a yánngén Jon. Fá tárwén boutan yáferafé Jefedifé, tawamyotawét yéfenjo net. Yesum ewanmeyai fá, 22 táf fété yémofem noreyayénd bout a yéferafé a yáiteyayénd Yesu. Yesum mer yiyátoi enjne téfnár
english: Going on from there , he saw two other brothers, James the son of Zebedee , and John his brother, in the boat with Zebedee their father , mending their nets . He called them .

nama: Njam Yesum ewinjoi ár mérén, fá néngaflai mband tunakfot ánde fá námnjoi. Yáne waitogh árém yarendayénd fá, 2 yémon watamegh yérnyai yéfefaf: Efalo áuwégh
english: Seeing the multitudes , he went up onto the mountain . When he had sat down , his disciples came to him .

nama: "Áuwéghafé fá em efe em mbérmbére yauyau, ménamén yéfeyot njafar limánégh yém!
english: “ Blessed are the poor in spirit , for theirs is the Kingdom of Heaven . + 5:3 Isaiah 57:15; 66:2

nama: Áuwéghafé fá em efe ye nendat, ménamén fá so wamaroghan em!
english: Blessed are those who mourn , for they shall be comforted . + 5:4 Isaiah 61:2; 66:10,13

nama: Áuwéghafé fá em efe yu mwighafé em, ménamén yémofem so tanangi méinyotio mband marat!
english: Blessed are the gentle , for they shall inherit the earth . + 5:5 or, land. + 5:5 Psalms 37:11

nama: Áuwéghafé fá em efe minde ménde em mbarkánd yamot ndené fété njamke a nu ménde yénau em, ménamén fá so taremngongé.
english: Blessed are those who hunger and thirst for righteousness , for they shall be filled .

nama: Áuwéghafé fá em efe ghérghérsisé em ámb árfefaf, ménamén Ngánján so ndenéyameyo ghérghérsisé yém yéfefaf!
english: Blessed are the merciful , for they shall obtain mercy .

nama: Áuwéghafé fá em efe njúnnjúnofnar em tikfan, ménamén yémofem so tinjongi Ngánján!
english: Blessed are the pure in heart , for they shall see God .

nama: Áuwéghafé fá em efe krufrát wafrogh ár em, ménamén fá so emndetat Ngánjánene ambumtértér!
english: Blessed are the peacemakers , for they shall be called children of God .

nama: Áuwéghafé fá em efe ewasérmbotat ménamén mbarkánd yammén, yéfene so yém njafar limánégh!
english: Blessed are those who have been persecuted for righteousness ’ sake , for theirs is the Kingdom of Heaven .

nama: "Áuwégh yém féfeyot njam árém ewasalitat, ewasérmbotat a méinyotio unyégh si ewawafrotat ménamén fém em tane waitogh ár. 12 Náuwetati a nasnetati, ménamén féfene fai sem ndimbal njafaran, ndené ende yémofem ewasérmbotaménd Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár efe fronde enmormén. Fém em ndenanit sol a kwayaghé
english: “ Blessed are you when people reproach you , persecute you , and say all kinds of evil against you falsely , for my sake .

nama: "Fém sol em mband maratoe. Wénde njam solene ménde kefongé, ndernáye so yafarnje solene ménde wéikor? Yau mer yém wanjmengét, ménaro yém sái téngwayangi a árém so kafkafe yétumndat.
english: “ You are the salt of the earth , but if the salt has lost its flavor, with what will it be salted? It is then good for nothing , but to be cast out and trodden under the feet of men .

nama: "Yénémaménnde, njam fene ramégh rokar ersa ghéngén wárogh kitarat a kété kawafarota ndené fe fútarém nékwafé néfande fém, 24 tauro fenjo ramégh rokar kété ghéngén wárogh kitaré sáfrére. Fronde nguwano a ténfrendangend fe fútarfé, féyo kénaf a taram fenjo ramégh rokar.
english: “ If therefore you are offering your gift at the altar , and there remember that your brother has anything against you ,

nama: "Kor nawarawenati yau fémofem ewafrotati meryam ár sáfan ménát yémofem so efandat. Fémofem njam ewafrotati, féfene fai yau so em féfene njafarmén Afata.
english: “ Be careful that you don’ t do your charitable giving before men , to be seen by them , or else you have no reward from your Father who is in heaven .

nama: fene limánégh so yéném, a fene ménde so nufrote yéné mband maratan ndené fété njafaran kés yém.
english: Let your Kingdom come . Let your will be done on earth as it is in heaven .

nama: Ténmaram téfe sénonjo efoghmén njamke.
english: Give us today our daily bread.

nama: Kémawalindangé téfene yaufi, ndenéyameyo yénd té yénmawalinda yéfene yaufi téfefaf.
english: Forgive us our debts , as we also forgive our debtors .

nama: Yau yénd yénlimnda ufogh yamamé, wénde yénmanjana yénd kétándmé yaufi ároe tambén. Fene yém limánégh, wafté a ndimbal kwayaghé tuot. Efalo.' {b{ ...f* {b{6.13 Fene yém limánégh, wafté a ndimbal kwayaghé tuot. Efalo.' Ámb Bukan yéné si fu yau yém.
english: Bring us not into temptation , but deliver us from the evil one . For yours is the Kingdom, the power, and the glory forever . Amen.’ + 6:13 NU omits “For yours is the Kingdom, the power, and the glory forever. Amen.”

nama: "Fém táf tawawalindangé ámb árfene yaufiyam yémofem njam ewafrotat féfefaf, Féferafé njafaran wéi so tawalindangé féfene yaufi. 15 Wénde fém yau njam tawawalindangé árfene yaufiyam, féfene Afé yau so tawalindangé féfene yaufi. Yesum korayau awafarmanéghmén
english: “ For if you forgive men their trespasses , your heavenly Father will also forgive you .

nama: "Ghékéf siyém lambefé yém fifioene. Táf féfene ghékéf njam em mer, féfene méinyo fifi so yém kwayaghanro. 23 Wénde táf féfene ghékéf njam em mámáfi, féfene méinyo fifi so yém kwéfitayanroǃ Njam kwayaghé féfe kénjún kamndangé kwéfité, fém so em minde kwéfitayanǃ
english: “ The lamp of the body is the eye . If therefore your eye is sound, your whole body will be full of light .

nama: "Yau fémofem so eyátotati sómbio yuré. Árkéméné sái méndméndat yéfandati a árkéméné sái yuwetati, o ámb sái eyátotati efaloe a ámb sái yékarotati. Fém yau so násáfotati sómbio yurat Ngánjáne a maniot. Yesum emndai yau mámé mwighé em
english: “ No one can serve two masters , for either he will hate the one and love the other , or else he will be devoted to one and despise the other . You can ’ t serve both God and Mammon .

nama: "Yau ewarametati némé em njúnnjúnofnar ághafet a yau ewawitati féfenjo ndindi kimbafet. Njam fémofem yafrotati, yémofem so esénat yéné rokar yéfene ngángaye a so kawengongi a eftérnat fém karéfkarfot. Kamota, káronja, kautar
english: “Don’ t give that which is holy to the dogs , neither throw your pearls before the pigs , lest perhaps they trample them under their feet , and turn and tear you to pieces .

nama: "Namotati Yurafaf, a yémo so tawaramangé; náronjati a so tinjongi; nautanati, a sésafne so kásáwérngé féfeyot. 8 Ménamén méinyotio ár efe nómnendat yémofem so tawanangi, efe náronjat yémofem so tinjongi, a fá efe nautanat, sésafne so kásáwérngé."
english: “Ask, and it will be given you . Seek , and you will find . Knock , and it will be opened for you .

nama: "Kélawangi némbne sésafnemé. Ménamén sésafne siyém marat a end árkéméné yékém áfrátaye yém fését, a tárfár ár nényawetat yéné kénjúmé. 14 Wénde sésafne siyém némbne a end árké yékém kétán efalo ghérsafaf taikér yém, a mé nambio árémro tinjongi yéné end. Wén a yáne mbwe
english: “ Enter in by the narrow gate ; for the gate is wide and the way is broad that leads to destruction, and there are many who enter in by it .

nama: Njam Yesum si yifoi sómbio méngo ramégh árfenemén, ár mérén tamorwén sélngwél yáne watameghan, 29 ménamén yémon tawatametau muyafé, yau ndené yéfene nák watamegh ár.
english: When Jesus had finished saying these things , the multitudes were astonished at his teaching ,

nama: Yesu njam néneworyéng kétamé mband tunakéf tambén, tárfár ár mérnam yaitoyénd. 2 Yaufi ghénganafé ár sélngwéle yénmormén a budme niyai yáfaf a témndangé, "Yuré, fém ménde njam ném, fémo so mer kwiyáto Ngánjánene ghékfan."
english: When he came down from the mountain , great multitudes followed him .

nama: Táf Yesu njam néngnyawai Káfenam tesenan, Rom fiyarafene sénko téfnár yénmormén yáfaf a yémndai wáutárghét. 6 Yémon témndangé "Yuré, tane faiofnar ásáfogh ár yékmang méngon aknyéghkaf a ndimbal tékrátan yém."
english: When he came into Capernaum , a centurion came to him , asking him for help,

nama: Yesum témndangé fá, "Yénd so wéngém a mer tiyáton."
english: Jesus said to him , “ I will come and heal him .”

nama: Féyo Yesum yémndai Rom fiyarafene sénko ár, "Kuwanoǃ Ndenáye so nufrote ndernáye fémo efalo yiyátote." Féyo yáne faiofnar ásáfogh ár mer namndai mé yéné efghon fété. Yesum tárfár ár mer eyátoi
english: Jesus said to the centurion , “ Go your way . Let it be done for you as you have believed .” His servant was healed in that hour .

nama: Njam Yesu néngnyawai Fitane méngot, yémo yinjoi Fité yánat ausé tékmangérwén kémégh sifayan fifi wafté enjnefe. 15 Yesum yayanjai yáne ngángé, a fifi wafté enjneyam yéfrangoi. A fá nokayoi a njamke yawaflitam Yesue.
english: When Jesus came into Peter ’s house , he saw his wife’s mother lying sick with a fever .

nama: Njam Yesum ewinjoi ár mérén yarendayénd, yémo emndai yánjo waitogh ár, "So yénngém kétán arakaf witmé karfot." 19 Wénde nák watamegh ár yénmormén yáfaf yémndai, "Watamegh ár, yéndon so némaitotan fém árkamé njam niota."
english: Now when Jesus saw great multitudes around him , he gave the order to depart to the other side .

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Ághéághafene té ewam féne, a men kés em yéfene té em njén, wénde Ároene Ambum yáne ámb sifayé yau yém ánde yémo yánjo sénko so téfayongé."
english: Jesus said to him , “ The foxes have holes and the birds of the sky have nests , but the Son of Man has nowhere to lay his head .”

nama: Ámb waitogh árom yémndai fá, "Yuré, fronde so wénngém yényatotan afé."
english: Another of his disciples said to him , “ Lord , allow me first to go and bury my father .”

nama: Wénde Yesum témndangé "Kwénmaito, so kér árém eyatotat ámb kér ár." Yesum yékmboi ndimbal mbormbor
english: But Jesus said to him , “ Follow me , and leave the dead to bury their own dead .”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Féfene ndimbal mwighé siyém némbnar, némamén fém férfér em?" Kétamé fá nokayoi ekmbeyai mbormbor a sóf, féyo nénamndai métar.
english: He said to them , “ Why are you fearful , O you of little faith ?” Then he got up , rebuked the wind and the sea , and there was a great calm .

nama: Méinyotio ár sélngwél emormén a namotayénd, "Némé ár yéné yém? Ménamén mbormbor sóf té yiyárendǃ" Yesum mer eyáteyai sómbio yaufi mbérmbérafé ár
english: The men marveled , saying , “ What kind of man is this , that even the wind and the sea obey him ?”

nama: Kor yau nayu témorwén kétán tárfár kimb mérén ánde kafenetawét. 31 Yaufi mbérmbéram yamnendayénd Yesu, "Fémo njam ténmutor, ténmáfáreta kétán kimb mérénfaf."
english: Now there was a herd of many pigs feeding far away from them .

nama: Fá korayangé yéfefaf, "Kuwanongi!" Féyo fá nétoryénd a néwanoyénd nélawayénd kimbafefaf, a kimb mérén wérseye wékeye kewonawét mband tunkéf néngatnaménd sawét kolitotawét kérotio.
english: He said to them , “ Go !” They came out and went into the herd of pigs ; and behold , the whole herd of pigs rushed down the cliff into the sea and died in the water .

nama: Yéné kimb wanjengégh ár nenngoyénd kétán tesenot, kafrotawét méinyotio yénémamén a wéi ndenáyo yéfenemén efe tamorwén yaufi mbérmbérafé ár. 34 Féyo ár méinyotio tesenmén nénefoyénd ténmanfetawét Yesu; a njam yinjoyénd yémndayénd ménát sái korongai a kuwangai yéfene yuta.
english: Those who fed them fled and went away into the city and told everything , including what happened to those who were possessed with demons.

nama: Yesu nuflai boutan, kétán yánjo tesen, Kafenamét. 2 Ámb árém yénmufaryénd aknyégh ár tékmangérwén yameyan. Njam Yesum ewawinjoi yéfene ndimbal mwighé, yémo témndangé aknyégh ár, "Mámé mwighé yau ném, tane ambum! Fene yaufiyam té wawalinda."
english: He entered into a boat and crossed over , and came into his own city .

nama: Féyo ámb nák watamegh téfnáram korayangi yéfenjo kénjúnro, "Yéné ár korayau fá kar Ngánján yémǃ Yéné siyém wasáligh si."
english: Behold , some of the scribes said to themselves , “ This man blasphemes.”

nama: Fá nokayoi a néwanoi méngot. 8 Njam ár mérnam yinjoyénd yéné yam, fá férféram ewifoi, tuyotawét Ngánján, emon ndené muyé té ewaramete árét. Yesum yémotai Metyu
english: He arose and departed to his house .

nama: Táf Yesu nénuwanoi kétamé, yémo yinjoi ár yétkwén Metyu témorangérwén mani kafégh méngon. Yesum témndangé, "Kwénmaito." Féyo Metyu nokayoi a yaitoi Yesu.
english: As Jesus passed by from there , he saw a man called Matthew sitting at the tax collection office. He said to him , “Follow me .” He got up and followed him .

nama: Soramé, Yesu nuwanoi njamke nénet Metyuene méngot. Tárfár mani kafégh ár a yaufi ár enmormén njamke tánetawét yémafé Yesufé a yáne waitogh ár. 11 Njam Farasi árém yinjoyénd, yémofem emotayénd yáne waitogh ár, "Némamén féfene watamegh árfé enetat yémafé mani kafégh ár a yaufi árfé?"
english: As he sat in the house , behold , many tax collectors and sinners came and sat down with Jesus and his disciples .

nama: Féyo Jon walitogh ároene waitogh ár enmormén yémotayénd Yesu, "Yénd a Farasi ár túmén nawafarmetam, wénde némamén fene waitogh ár yau nawafarmetat?"
english: Then John ’s disciples came to him , saying , “ Why do we and the Pharisees fast often , but your disciples don’ t fast ?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Ndernáye wét so totér awerégh téfnároene fútaréf nendat táf yémafé njam em? Yau. Yéné efogh so kawerangé ánde yéné awerégh téfnár so téngwanangi yéfe tambén, a féyo fá táf so nawafarmetat."
english: Jesus said to them , “ Can the friends of the bridegroom mourn as long as the bridegroom is with them ? But the days will come when the bridegroom will be taken away from them , and then they will fast .

nama: Njam Yesu mé korayau yéné, áumengégh méngo wanjengégh ár yénmormén, budéme niyai yáne sáfrére a korayangé, "Tane mérés mé fété kér tém. Wénde kénaf ngángé téfai yáfaf, fá so táf kanongé." 19 Yesu nokayoi a yéngwaitoyéng, a waitogh árfé néngwanoyénd.
english: While he told these things to them , behold , a ruler came and worshiped him , saying , “ My daughter has just died , but come and lay your hand on her , and she will live .”

nama: Amaf efe férék kertau 12 yunjéf nénaflai Yesue sémta a yiyánjai yáne sáláme fétfét. 21 Amaf fáyo korayangé, "Yéndo njam mé yáne sálámero tiyánjangén, yénd so mer kamndan.
english: Behold , a woman who had a discharge of blood for twelve years came behind him , and touched the fringe of his garment ;

nama: Yesu nawengoi sémta a yinjoi, a norayai, "Mámé mwighé yau ném, tane mérés! Fenjo ndimbal mwighayam mer té niyáto." Amaf táfandio mer fété náyátoi.
english: But Jesus , turning around and seeing her , said , “ Daughter , cheer up ! Your faith has made you well .” And the woman was made well from that hour .

nama: Táf Yesu njam kétamé néngwanoi, sómbio ghékéf kwéfkwéf árém yáiteyayénd kutarwét, "Deifidene ambum, fene ghérghérsisé ayém téfefafǃ"
english: As Jesus passed by from there , two blind men followed him , calling out and saying , “ Have mercy on us , son of David !”

nama: Njam Yesu kényawetau méngot, sómbio ghékéf kwéfkwéf ár enérmén yáfaf, féyo yémo emotangeyai, "Fémofem efalo té yiyátot ndené yéndon yéné so yafrotan?" Yémofem yawangeyayénd, "Néméwét, Yuré."
english: When he had come into the house , the blind men came to him . Jesus said to them , “ Do you believe that I am able to do this ?” They told him , “ Yes , Lord .”

nama: Féyo yémo ewayanjangeyai yéfene ghékéf a norayai, "Féfenjo ndimbal mwighayan féfefaf yéné so nufrote." 30 Féyo yéfene ghékéf násáwéryénd. Yesum emndeyai taikrataye, "Yau táf ámb ároe taufrend yénémamén." 31 Wénde fá néngtoreyayénd a marat yiyáteyayénd yánemén méinyotio yéné yuwon.
english: Then he touched their eyes , saying , “ According to your faith be it done to you .”

nama: Táf fá njam kétorwét, ámb ár yaufi mbérmbérafé a siofnar wéi yénmufaryénd Yesuefaf. 33 Táf yaufi mbérmbér yutoryéng, ár efe babé témorwén norayai. Féyo ár mérén sélngwél emormén a korayangi, "Ámb yau ndené yéfandamém Israil kénjún.
english: As they went out , behold , a mute man who was demon possessed was brought to him .

nama: Wénde Farasi ár korayawét, "Ménaye yaufi mbérmbérafene sénko ároene waftaye, yéné árom eutone ámb yaufi mbérmbér." Ásáfogh téfnár sem tárfárofnar
english: But the Pharisees said , “ By the prince of the demons , he casts out demons .”

nama: "Yau táf tawanangi ámb gol, silfé o kofa mani féfenjo yáfyáfén; 10 álighmén yáf yau tawanangi, o ámb sáláme, o sandol wéi wétu kés, ménamén ásáfogh árét ewamndat njamke.
english: Don’ t take any gold , silver, or brass in your money belts .

nama: "Yéndon engwatembetan ndenanit sifsif yénau munjan ághafene kénjún em. Yénémaménnde mwighé sénté em ndené kamban kés a téfnofnar em ndenanit mamu.
english: “ Behold , I send you out as sheep among wolves . Therefore be wise as serpents and harmless as doves .

nama: "Yénémaménnde yau táf férfér em yéfenemén. Némé átnoghe yém so safét kufarngé, a méinyotio némé kwankwane em so mat náyátotat. 27 Némé yéndon norayan féfefaf kwéfitayan, korayangi efogh kwayaghayan, a némé ewawanjan féfene ténganan, nafrotati méngo séman.
english: Therefore don’t be afraid of them , for there is nothing covered that will not be revealed, or hidden that will not be known .

nama: "Fém yau ndené nemnati ndené yénd wénmormén krufrát yam yénérsamén mbandot! Yénd yau wénmormén yénérsamén krufrát yam, wénde witmafé sénté náifé. 35 Ménát yénd wénmormén sái ewengotan, 'ár yárefé tambén, mérés kétándmé yátmafe tambén, a yáki alé kétándmé yáki amaf tambén.
english: “Don’ t think that I came to send peace on the earth . I didn’ t come to send peace , but a sword .

nama: Ároene mék téfnár so eném kétamé yánjo mérén kénjúta.'
english: A man’s foes will be those of his own household .

nama: "Árké árom njam uweta yárefé o yátmé mindefifi, wénde yáne uwégh siyém némbnar yém tayot, fá féyotarofnar yém ta waitoghét. Árké árom uweta yánjo ambum o mérés mindefifi, wénde yáne uwégh siyém némbnar yém tayot, fá féyotarofnar yém ta waitoghét. 38 Árké árom yau njam yérsa yánjo wafatarégh wén a waitota yénd, fá féyotarofnar yém ta waitoghét. 39 Árké árom njam yarawena yánjo ghérsé so yétarne, a emo njam yétarna yánjo ghérsé tane téfnan so tinjongé. Emofem ewáutánat Yesuene mérén so tawanangi mer fai
english: He who loves father or mother more than me is not worthy of me ; and he who loves son or daughter more than me isn’ t worthy of me .

nama: Soramé njam Yesum té yifoi wawéngsogh si yánjo 12 waitogh árfefaf, fá kétándmé nuwanoi watameghét a waitoghét tesenot Galili yu kénjún.
english: When Jesus had finished directing his twelve disciples , he departed from there to teach and preach in their cities .

nama: Njam Jon náyárai kwéfkwéf méngon némé Kerisom tawafrotau, yémo ewáfáretam yánjo waitogh ár, 3 ménát sái témotangayénd, "Némé fém yéné ném efe so kénmorwén, o yéndfem ámb ár so tanjetawém?
english: Now when John heard in the prison the works of Christ , he sent two of his disciples

nama: "Némayafé yéndon yéné ár saté so etémndan? Fá ndenanit em marat sifayamé ambumtértéram yénau emotat ámb ambumtértér:
english: “ But to what shall I compare this generation ? It is like children sitting in the marketplaces, who call to their companions

nama: 'Yénd té kambnam buraraye féfeyot, a fém yau kerémndati; yéndfem kér téménd wagh taufanam wénde fém yau kendati.'
english: and say , ‘ We played the flute for you , and you didn’t dance . We mourned for you , and you didn’t lament .’

nama: "Ménát yau Jon yénmormén mer njamke a wéri nu nénet, a fá korayawét, 'Fá yaufi mbérmbérafé yém. 19 Ároene Ambum yénmormén njamke a nu nénet, fá korayangi, 'Yéné siyém njamke amanjaréghan a wéri nu néneyan mindefifi; fá yém mani kafégh ár a yaufiyam árfene fútar.' Wénde Ngánjánene káfeté mwighé yuyafote yánjo yam wafroghan." O awengoghofnaye tesen
english: For John came neither eating nor drinking , and they say , ‘ He has a demon .’

nama: "Méinyotio yam té eramai tafaf tane Afam. Efe ámb yau mat yém Ambumoenemén mé Afaro, a efe ámb yau mat yém Afanemén mé Ambumro a ár efe Ambumom ewafene yandio afroghét.
english: All things have been delivered to me by my Father . No one knows the Son , except the Father ; neither does anyone know the Father , except the Son and he to whom the Son desires to reveal him .

nama: Yéné efghon Yesu tiyotawéng ámb flawé ndawamé Safatan. Yáne waitogh ár siogham ewifoi, féyo flawé mbwe férarégh engwafngoyénd a tánetawét. 2 Njam Farasi árém ewinjoyénd yénayan, fá norayayénd Yesuefaf, "Kéreta! Fene waitogh árém kés yafrotat téfene nákam yatne Safatan.
english: At that time , Jesus went on the Sabbath day through the grain fields . His disciples were hungry and began to pluck heads of grain and to eat .

nama: Yesum yéngéfrangoi yéné sifayé a néngwanoi kétán áumengégh méngot. 10 Yéné méngon ngángé aknyégh ár témorwén. Ámb Farasi ár namotayénd Yesuefaf, "Té nákam yumyote ár ménaye sái ár mer eyátotat Safatan?" Fá ménde tamorwén sái Yesu tanangayénd moghét.
english: He departed from there and went into their synagogue .

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Fém njam sifafé em a ámb sif kélawangé yékwét Safatan? So fémofem terangi a ténmurtongi kétamé yékwta? A so fété yafrotati. 12 Ár siyém ndimbalfifi, ndené yau sif kés yém. Féyo yénémamén, yénd téfene nákam yénmumyote ár wáutárghét Safatan."
english: He said to them , “ What man is there among you who has one sheep , and if this one falls into a pit on the Sabbath day , won’ t he grab on to it and lift it out ?

nama: Táf fété yémon norayayéng ngángé aknyégh ároefaf, "Tawalinjo fene ngángé mbarkánde." Yémon ewalinjoi ngángé merafayo, ndené fété ámb ngángé kés tamorwén. 14 Féyo Farasi ár néwanoyénd a mwighé ronjagh ewafngoyénd Yesue ngiot. Ngánjánene waferégh ásáfogh ár
english: Then he told the man, “ Stretch out your hand .” He stretched it out ; and it was restored whole , just like the other .

nama: "Yéné fiyém tane ásáfogh ár, efe yéndon té yaferyén, yéndon efe yuwetan, a endefaf yénd náuwetan. Yéndo so tasurén tane Mbérmbér yáfaf, a yémon so mat eyátote tane moghmén méinyotio yuwomé.
english: “ Behold , my servant whom I have chosen , my beloved in whom my soul is well pleased . I will put my Spirit on him . He will proclaim justice to the nations .

nama: Fá yau so néwit o nutne, o fá yau marate so néngutne endmé.
english: He will not strive , nor shout , neither will anyone hear his voice in the streets .

nama: Yémon yau so ghérnat tékofem eráfne, o yau so umbértoghétro fés tumbértongé. Kétánotio yémon so taindangé moghan yaufi,
english: He won’ t break a bruised reed . He won’ t quench a smoking flax , until he leads justice to victory .

nama: a méinyotio mband maratan ár kamnang so em yáfaf."{e{ ...f* {e{12.21 Aisaya 42:1-4 Yesu a Beljebul
english: In his name , the nations will hope .”

nama: Ámb árém ténérsawét Yesuefaf efe kwéfkwéf ár témorwén babé ár efe yau korayau ménamén fá yaufi mbérmbérafé témorwén. Yesum yéné ár mer yiyátoi, táf fété si nufngoi a néretai. 23 Ár mérén sélngwél emormén a norayayénd, "Fété fá yém Deifidene ambum?"
english: Then one possessed by a demon, blind and mute , was brought to him ; and he healed him , so that the blind and mute man both spoke and saw.

nama: Njam Farasi ár náyárayénd yéné si, a norayayénd, "Yémon ewifne yaufi mbérmbér Beljebulene waftaye, yaufi mbérmbérafene sénko ár."
english: But when the Pharisees heard it , they said , “ This man does not cast out demons except by Beelzebul, the prince of the demons .”

nama: "Efe ár yau so kényawangé ndimbal muyafé ároene méngo kénjún rokar résaghét táfandro yémon njam fronde yumbeta ángéghe ndimbal muyafé ár. Féyo táf yémon so méinyotio rokar tawanangé yáne méngota.
english: Or how can one enter into the house of the strong man and plunder his goods , unless he first bind the strong man ? Then he will plunder his house .

nama: "Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe yénémamén, mogh efghon méinyotio árém so nafrotat némamén fá korayawét méinyotio fifiofnar si. 37 Ngánjánam so emote féfenjo simén, tamndangé mbarkánd o moghan so takmangé." Yémofem yémotayénd Yesu ufarogh yamot
english: I tell you that every idle word that men speak , they will give account of it in the day of judgment .

nama: Ámb nák watamegh ár a ámb Farasi árém norayayénd, "Watamegh ár, yénd ménde yéném sélngwélafé yam tafrota téfe fandaghét."
english: Then certain of the scribes and Pharisees answered , “ Teacher , we want to see a sign from you .”

nama: Yesu mé korayau árfefaf njam yátmé a yánngnéf nufaryénd. Fá nokayoyénd téndota, namotayénd yémafé siot. 47 Ámb árom yaufroi yá, "Kéreta, fene amé a fenngnéf ewakai téndon, a fá ménde em fémafé siot."
english: While he was yet speaking to the multitudes , behold , his mother and his brothers stood outside , seeking to speak to him .

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Efe yém tane amé? Efe em tane nénngnéf?" 49 Féyo yémon táf euyafoi yáne waitogh ár a korayangé, "Kéretangi! Fá em tane amé a tane nénngnéf! 50 Árké árom njam yafrota tane njafarmén Afane ménde, fá fem tane nénngnéf a tane mérés a tane amé."
english: But he answered him who spoke to him , “ Who is my mother ? Who are my brothers?”

nama: Yéné efghonyo Yesum yéfrangoi méngo a néngaflai a námnjoi arakaf téndota watameghét. 2 Tárfár ár mérén náumendaménd a yarendayénd Yesu. Yéné téfnan Yesu naflai a nuflai boutot, a námnjoi kété a ár tawakayongérwén arakaf téndomé. 3 Fá korayau árfefaf tárfár yammén rengerenge sie:
english: On that day Jesus went out of the house and sat by the seaside.

nama: Yáne waitogh ár enmormén Yesuefaf a yémndayénd, "Némamén fém noraye árfefaf rengerenge sie?"
english: The disciples came , and said to him , “ Why do you speak to them in parables ?”

nama: "Aisayane mat yátogh si némé témorwén efalo náyátoi yéfenemén, 'Fém so túmén náyáretati, wénde mat yau so kamndangi, fém so túmén néretati, wénde yau so mat náyátotati.
english: In them the prophecy of Isaiah is fulfilled, which says , ‘ By hearing you will hear, and will in no way understand ; Seeing you will see , and will in no way perceive ;

nama: "Ndau yurane faiofnar ásáfogh ár nénaflayénd yáfaf a témndangé, 'Ndimbal, fémon taite mer mbwe fene ndawan. Árkandmé yéné yaufi yus taném?'
english: The servants of the householder came and said to him , ‘ Sir , didn’ t you sow good seed in your field? Where did these darnel weeds come from ?’

nama: "Yémon ewawangoi, 'Mék téfnárom yéné tafrote.' Faiofnar ásáfogh árém témotangi, 'Fém ménde téném yénd so yénngém yaufi yus rufghét?'
english: “ He said to them , ‘ An enemy has done this .’ “ The servants asked him , ‘ Do you want us to go and gather them up ?’

nama: Yesum tawaufrotau ámb rengerenge si: "Njafar limánégh siyém ndenanit némbne mbwe, árom yénau tiangé yánjo ndawan. 32 Ndemamén némbne mbwe yém, wénde njam tiangé, minde ndimbal ndaumén njamke téfén káyátongé a wén kamndangé, kafe ewatene ánde menam njén erametat."
english: He set another parable before them , saying , “ The Kingdom of Heaven is like a grain of mustard seed which a man took , and sowed in his field,

nama: Yesum ámb rengerenge si tawaufrotau yéfeyot, "Njafar limánégh siyém ndenanit fak flawé minaghmén. Amafom yanai ámb fak a yanjmetam ámbiro ndimbal flawé baikafé kétánotio néminam ndimbal náyátoyéng."
english: He spoke another parable to them . “ The Kingdom of Heaven is like yeast which a woman took and hid in three measures of meal, until it was all leavened .”

nama: Féyo Yesum engéfrangoi ár mérén a néngaflai méngot. Yáne waitogh ár néngaflayénd yáfaf a témndangi, "Ténmawafer téfé rengerenge sioene fifi yaufi yusmén ndau kénjún."
english: Then Jesus sent the multitudes away, and went into the house . His disciples came to him , saying , “ Explain to us the parable of the darnel weeds of the field.”

nama: "Njafar limánégh siyém ndenanit ténogh ngonjél yénau mband kénjún yém. Njam árom tinjongé, yémon wéikor so yiyatote mbandan, a féyo yáne áuwéghan fá so kuwanongé a etérna méinyotio yáne némé em, a tanangé yéné mband.
english: “ Again , the Kingdom of Heaven is like treasure hidden in the field, which a man found and hid . In his joy , he goes and sells all that he has and buys that field.

nama: Wéikor Yesu norayai njafar limánégh siyém ndenanit yém. Térarégh ár yénau kuwanongé tukén faimén ndindi mbwe ronjaghét. 46 Njam tinjongé minde tukén faimén ndindi mbwe, fá so kuwanongé a etérna méinyotio yáne némé em, a tanangé yéné ndindi mbwe. Rengerenge si netmén
english: “ Again , the Kingdom of Heaven is like a man who is a merchant seeking fine pearls ,

nama: Yesum emotai, "Fém mat té namndangi yéné méinyotio yammén?" Yémofem yawangoyénd, "O."
english: Jesus said to them , “ Have you understood all these things ?” They answered him, “ Yes , Lord.”

nama: Fá norayai yéfefaf, "Yéné sioene fifi ndené yém méinyotio nák watamegh ár efe njam kénamndangi waitogh ár njafar limánégh kénjún fá so yém ndenanit méngo yuram yénau eutonat totér rokar a tándáwár rokar wembégh méngota." Yesu yékenayénd Najaretén
english: He said to them , “ Therefore every scribe who has been made a disciple in the Kingdom of Heaven is like a man who is a householder , who brings out of his treasure new and old things .”

nama: Yesum yau tárfár sélngwélafé yam ewafrotam kété ménamén yéfene ndimbal mwighé yau tawamorwén.
english: He didn’ t do many mighty works there because of their unbelief.

nama: Yéné efghon Erod, Galili yu warsagh ár, náyárai Yesuenemén, 2 a Erod norayai yáne ásáfogh árfefaf, "Jon walitogh ár séno yém kérta nénano ghérsat, a yénémamén yáfaf yém yéné waftafé sélngwélafé yam ewafroghét."
english: At that time , Herod the tetrarch heard the report concerning Jesus ,

nama: Erodene áráfégh témndan, Erodiasene mérsom tawawermndau wan téfnárat a Erode sáfrére, a yénémamén Erod káuwetau. 7 Erod sotafé unyéghofnar si norayai mérsoefaf, "Yénd kwamnenda fém némat ménde ném, yéndon so kémaraman feyot!"
english: But when Herod ’s birthday came , the daughter of Herodias danced among them and pleased Herod .

nama: Yátmane sian mérsom yamnendai fá, "Kwaram ta sénonjo Jon walitogh ároene sénko merekinafé!"
english: She , being prompted by her mother , said , “ Give me here on a platter the head of John the Baptizer.”

nama: Férghétro témorwén yáne waitogh ár náflayénd yáfaf a yémndayénd, "Yéné siyém yauyau sifayé a séite té náyáto. Tawafarna kaka méngotuot njamke résaghét manie yéfendio."
english: When evening had come , his disciples came to him , saying , “ This place is deserted , and the hour is already late . Send the multitudes away , that they may go into the villages , and buy themselves food .”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Fá yau so kuwanongi. Némndafi tawaramangi nénet."
english: But Jesus said to them , “ They don’ t need to go away. You give them something to eat .”

nama: Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Téfene yénaro em 5 féskaf flawé a sómbio wagif."
english: They told him , “ We only have here five loaves and two fish .”

nama: Faurghétro témorwén Yesu néngwanoi nu tukmé tiotau. 26 Njam waitogh árém yinjoyénd álighan nu tukmé, fá norayayénd, "Mbérsembérse yém!" a fá kutnawét férfére.
english: In the fourth watch of the night , Jesus came to them , walking on the sea .

nama: Yesu norayai yéfefaf tekofnaye, "Muyé tanangi! Yénd wém. Yau férfér em."
english: But immediately Jesus spoke to them , saying , “Cheer up ! It is I ! Don’t be afraid .”

nama: Fitam yawangoi, "Yuré, fém njam ném, yénd kwénémnde álighét nu tukmé fefaf."
english: Peter answered him and said , “ Lord , if it is you , command me to come to you on the waters .”

nama: Wénde njam yémon mbormbor yinjoi minde fénjaghan, fá férfér nawerai a olitogh nufngoi. Féyo fá nutnayéng, "Yuré, yénd kwanjar!"
english: But when he saw that the wind was strong , he was afraid , and beginning to sink , he cried out , saying , “ Lord , save me !”

nama: Tekofnaye Yesum ngángé ewatembai a yerai a norayai yáfaf, "Némé némbne mwighafé ném! Fém némamén mwighé déudéu ném?"
english: Immediately Jesus stretched out his hand , took hold of him , and said to him , “ You of little faith , why did you doubt ?”

nama: Fá nufleyayénd boutan, a mbormbor nékmboi. 33 Efe tawaflangérwén boutan yémofem yáwefnoyénd Yesue yéné siafé, "Efalo Ngánjánene Ambum fété ném." Yesum mer táyátotau enjne téfnár Genesaretén
english: When they got up into the boat , the wind ceased .

nama: Njam fá sau witmé karfot nurtoyéng Genesaretét. 35 Yéné yu árém njam yáyámngoyénd Yesu, yémofem ghany yatembayénd méinyotio kaka yu árét a yémofem tanérsawét yáfaf méinyotio efe enjnefé tamorwén. 36 Fá yamnendayénd mé sáláme fétfét yanjaghétro a méinyotio enjne árém tiyanjawét merafayo.
english: When they had crossed over , they came to the land of Gennesaret .

nama: Féyo ámb Farasi ár a nák watamegh ár efe enmormén Jerusalemta Yesuefaf a yémotayénd, 2 "Némamén fene waitogh árém eráfnat téfene ákiafene watamegh yam? Yémofem yau fronde ngángé eumbnat a soramé enetat!"
english: Then Pharisees and scribes came to Jesus from Jerusalem , saying ,

nama: "'Yéné árém wutémndat yénd mé mbírmbírero wénde yéfene tikéf em nayu ta tambén.
english: ‘ These people draw near to me with their mouth, and honor me with their lips ; but their heart is far from me .

nama: Yémofem wáwefnotat ta fifiofnar, ménamén yémofem ewatametat ár wafroghmén náke ndenanit kar em tane nák.'{g{ ...f* {g{15.9 Aisaya 29:13 "
english: And they worship me in vain , teaching as doctrine rules made by men.’” + 15:9 Isaiah 29:13

nama: Yesum emotai ár mérén tamndangé, "Káyárangi a mat kamndangi. 11 Némé yéngém ároene sénfneta yéngém fútot yau ár yiyátote njúnnjúnafé, wénde némé kéntorngé yáne sénfnemé yéné yam ár tiyátongé njúnnjúnafé."
english: He summoned the multitude , and said to them , “Hear, and understand .

nama: Féyo waitogh ár enmormén Yesuefaf a yémotayénd, "Fém mat ném Farasi ár nékw tam njam fá náyárangi fene si?"
english: Then the disciples came and said to him , “ Do you know that the Pharisees were offended when they heard this saying ?”

nama: Yémon ewawangoi, "Méinyotio wén tane njafar tukmén Afam árké yau eyai so erufete." 14 Fá tafrangongi; mámé mwighé yau em yéfenemén. Fá sem kwéfkwéf limánégh ár em; a njam kwéfkwéf árom yémnja ámb kwéfkwéf áryo, so sómbioyo kélawend yékwét."
english: But he answered , “ Every plant which my heavenly Father didn’ t plant will be uprooted .

nama: Fitam témndangé, "Ténmawafer yéné rengerenge sioene fifi téfeyot."
english: Peter answered him , “ Explain the parable to us .”

nama: Yesum yéné yu yéfrangoi a nuwanoi Taire a Sidon yuwot. 22 Kanan yumén amaf efe témorangérwén yéné yuwon yénmormén yáfaf a nutnai, "Yuré, Deifidene ambum! Tafaf ghérghérsisé so ném! Tane mérés yaufi mbérmbérafé yém a minde kértayan yém."
english: Jesus went out from there and withdrew into the region of Tyre and Sidon .

nama: Wénde Yesum si yau yawangoi. Féyo yáne waitogh ár enmormén a Yesu yamnendayénd, "Titrémb yéné amaf, ménamén yémon yénd yénmaitote a sarake yafrote."
english: But he answered her not a word . His disciples came and begged him , saying , “Send her away; for she cries after us .”

nama: Féyo Yesum ewawangoi, "Yénd wénmáfáretam mé olingégh sif Israil árétro."
english: But he answered , “ I wasn’ t sent to anyone but the lost sheep of the house of Israel .”

nama: Yéné sian amaf naflayéng a budme niyai yáne kafkafan a norayai, "Yuré, ta kwáutána!"
english: But she came and worshiped him , saying , “ Lord , help me .”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Yau mbarkánd yém ambumtértérafene njamke sái ewatarnat ághat."
english: But he answered , “ It is not appropriate to take the children ’s bread and throw it to the dogs .”

nama: Amafom yawangoi, "Efalo yéné yém, Yuré, wénde ágham enetat njamke fénjfénj árkéméné nuitat yéfene yurane kitarata."
english: But she said , “ Yes , Lord , but even the dogs eat the crumbs which fall from their masters ’ table .”

nama: Féyo Yesu norayai yáfaf, "Amaf, fene ndimbal mwighé siyém minde ndimbal yém! Némat fém ménde ném yéndon so yafrotan feyot." A tekofnaye yámérés mer náyátoi. Yesum mer táyátotau tárfár ár
english: Then Jesus answered her , “ Woman , great is your faith ! Be it done to you even as you desire .” And her daughter was healed from that hour .

nama: Yesum emotai yáne waitogh ár yáfaftio a norayai, "Yénd ghérghérsisé wém yéné árfenemén, ménamén yéndfé yéna té téném nambio efogh ámb yau némndafi em nénet. Yénd méndefnar wém siogh sái tawatemban ménamén fá mé té álighan nénguitat."
english: Jesus summoned his disciples and said , “ I have compassion on the multitude , because they have continued with me now three days and have nothing to eat . I don’ t want to send them away fasting , or they might faint on the way .”

nama: Waitogh árém yawangoyénd, "Ánde yéndfem so tanuwanangém njamke yéné yauyau sifayan yéné ár mérén manjarghét?"
english: The disciples said to him , “ Where could we get so many loaves in a deserted place as to satisfy so great a multitude ?”

nama: Yesum emotayéng fá, "Njénamb féskaf flawé em féfefaf?" Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Sefen féskaf flawé a nambio némbnar wagif."
english: Jesus said to them , “ How many loaves do you have ?” They said , “ Seven , and a few small fish .”

nama: Soramé Yesum ár mérén engwatembai, fá boutan nénguflai a néngwanoi Magadan yuwot.
english: Then he sent away the multitudes , got into the boat , and came into the borders of Magdala .

nama: Farasi ár a Saduki ár enmormén Yesuefaf a ámoghe tufotawét ufarogh yam uyafoghét yéfe matot ndené Ngánjánam yéné wafté yaramai.
english: The Pharisees and Sadducees came , and testing him , asked him to show them a sign from heaven .

nama: Njam fá néngférmayénd witmé karéf arakaf, waitogh ár engwawalindai féskaf flawé résaghét. 6 Yesum tamndangé fá, "Aya kor, fété aem ghékéf sénté Farasi ár a Saduki árfene féskaf flawé minaghmén."
english: The disciples came to the other side and had forgotten to take bread.

nama: Yémofem warunyéghét yiyátoyénd yéfe kénjúnro a norayayénd, "Ménamén yéndfem ámb féskaf flawé yau enwanangém."
english: They reasoned among themselves , saying , “ We brought no bread.”

nama: Njam Yesu yénmormén kétán Kaisaria Filifi tesenot, yémon emotai yánjo waitogh ár, "Ndernáye ár norayat ndené Ároene Ambum efe yém?"
english: Now when Jesus came into the parts of Caesarea Philippi , he asked his disciples , saying , “ Who do men say that I , the Son of Man , am ?”

nama: Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Ámb norayat Jon walitogh ár; ámb norayat Elaija; a ámb norayat Jeremaia o ámb Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár."
english: They said , “ Some say John the Baptizer, some , Elijah , and others , Jeremiah or one of the prophets .”

nama: Yémon emotayéng, "Wénde fém ndernáye norayati yénd efe wém?"
english: He said to them , “ But who do you say that I am ?”

nama: Saimon Fitam yawangoi, "Fém ném yéné Keriso, akegh Ngánjánene ambum."
english: Simon Peter answered , “ You are the Christ , the Son of the living God .”

nama: Féyo yémon ekmboi yáne waitogh ár ende yau táf taufrongi ndené fá yém yéné Keriso. Yesu korayau yánjo tékrátmén a kérmén
english: Then he commanded the disciples that they should tell no one that he was Jesus the Christ .

nama: Kétándmé yéné efoghta Yesum si waitogh yafngoi yánjo kérmén waitogh árét, "Yénd so fété wéngém Jerusalemét a tékrát so yáraretan sénko árfene ngángayan, limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a nák watamegh ár. Yénd yémofem so wesmetat, wénde nambio efogh soramé Ngánjánam so yénd kwanongé ghérsat."
english: From that time , Jesus began to show his disciples that he must go to Jerusalem and suffer many things from the elders , chief priests, and scribes , and be killed, and the third day be raised up .

nama: Fitam yasotai téndot a yusérmbotam, "Yau, Yuré! Ngánjánam yau so tumyongé yéné sái nufrota fefaf!"
english: Peter took him aside and began to rebuke him , saying , “ Far be it from you , Lord ! This will never be done to you .”

nama: Yesu nawengoi a témndangé Fité, "Sáifér, kitrémb tatambén! Nétér ném tayot, ménamén fene mwighé yau yém Ngánjáneta. Wénde fém nemne ndenanit ár ndernáye nemnat."
english: But he turned and said to Peter , “ Get behind me , Satan ! You are a stumbling block to me , for you are not setting your mind on the things of God , but on the things of men .”

nama: Yéndon efalo emndetan fém, ámb yéna em efe kér yau so em kétánotio yémofem tinjongi Ároene Ambumoene angogh a fá so kamndangé Warsagh ár.
english: Most certainly I tell you , there are some standing here who will in no way taste of death until they see the Son of Man coming in his Kingdom.”

nama: 6 efogh soramé Yesum engwasroi Fité, Jems a yánngén Jon, a elimayéng mband tunakéf tukét fáro. 2 Kété Yesuene fifi nafurnai yéfene sáfrére. Yáne sáf natremngoi ndenanit efogh, a yáne sáláme témorwén minde kwayaghé. 3 Féyo kété nambio waitogh árém ewinjeyayénd Moses a Elaija korayawét Yesufé.
english: After six days , Jesus took with him Peter , James , and John his brother, and brought them up into a high mountain by themselves .

nama: Fitam témndangé Yesu, "Yuré, nderé mer yém yénd yéna siyéném! Fém njam ménde ném, yéndon so nambio méngoméngo erametan yéna, ámb feyot, ámb Mosese a Elaijai ámb."
english: Peter answered and said to Jesus , “ Lord , it is good for us to be here . If you want , let ’ s make three tents here : one for you , one for Moses , and one for Elijah .”

nama: Njam fá mé korayau, kwayaghaye njafar kwamkwamam ewafaryéng fá, a si yénmormén njafar kwamkwamta, "Yéné siyém tane tikfafé Ambum yénd endefaf náuwetan. Náyáretati yáfaf!"
english: While he was still speaking , behold , a bright cloud overshadowed them . Behold , a voice came out of the cloud , saying , “ This is my beloved Son , in whom I am well pleased . Listen to him .”

nama: Njam waitogh árém náyárayénd si, fá férfér tamorwén a niyayénd mbandot. 7 Yesu naflai yéfefaf a eyanjai fá a emndai, "Kanongi, yau férfér em." 8 Njam fá néngretayénd, yémofem efe yau yinjoyénd mé Yesuro.
english: When the disciples heard it , they fell on their faces , and were very afraid .

nama: Njamandio fá kénewonawét mband tunakéfta, Yesum taikrataye emndai, "Ende yau tawaufrongi némé fémofem yéfandati, kétánotio Ngánjánam tanongé Ároene Ambum kérta."
english: As they were coming down from the mountain , Jesus commanded them , saying , “Don’ t tell anyone what you saw , until the Son of Man has risen from the dead .”

nama: Yémofem yémotayénd Yesu, "Némamén nák watamegh árém norayat ndené Elaija so yéném fronde?"
english: His disciples asked him , saying , “ Then why do the scribes say that Elijah must come first ?”

nama: Yesum yawangoyéng, "Fém efalo yátoghofnar a yaufi ár saté! Nderé teke yénd so wém féfefaf? Nderé teke fémofem so kérté warametati? Ténémnjend ambum tafaf!" 18 Yesum yémndai yaufi mbérmbér, "Kétor!" nétoryéng táf fété ambum mer náyátoi.
english: Jesus answered , “Faithless and perverse generation ! How long will I be with you ? How long will I bear with you ? Bring him here to me .”

nama: Njam méinyotio yáne waitogh ár náumendayénd Galili yuwon, Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Ároene Ambum siyém wáfnamoghétro yém yéfefaf 23 efe so yésmetat a nambio efogh soramé Ngánjánam so wéikor tanongé ghérsat." Yáne waitogh ár ghérghérsisayam ewifoyéng. Wáwefnogh méngomén mani kaféghmén si
english: While they were staying in Galilee , Jesus said to them , “ The Son of Man is about to be delivered up into the hands of men ,

nama: Njam Yesu a yáne waitogh ár nufaryénd Káfenamét, wáwefnogh méngomén mani kafégh ár nufaryénd Fitafaf yémotayénd, "Féfene watamegh árom so tákmangé wáwefnogh méngomén mani?"
english: When they had come to Capernaum , those who collected the didrachma coins came to Peter , and said , “Doesn’ t your teacher pay the didrachma?”

nama: Fitam ewawangoi, "O, yémon so tékmangé." Njam Fité nénglawai méngo kénjút, Yesu norayai fronde, "Saimon, fém ndernáye nemne? Emofem so ekmetat fai o mani mband marat warsagh árfet? Yéfenjo ambumam o ámb árém?
english: He said , “ Yes .” When he came into the house , Jesus anticipated him , saying , “ What do you think , Simon ? From whom do the kings of the earth receive toll or tribute ? From their children , or from strangers?”

nama: Wénde yénd yau nékwafé so káyátongém yéné árét, nguwano sawot susiot. Fronde wagif njam térnyé, kéreta so tinjo mani yáne sénfneyan a tutor téngwan téram téfene mani mbwe tayot a feyot."
english: But , lest we cause them to stumble , go to the sea , cast a hook, and take up the first fish that comes up . When you have opened its mouth , you will find a stater coin. Take that , and give it to them for me and you .”

nama: Yéné efghon waitogh ár naflayénd Yesuefaf yémotayénd, "Efe yém ndimbalfifi njafar limánéghan?"
english: In that hour the disciples came to Jesus , saying , “ Who then is greatest in the Kingdom of Heaven ?”

nama: "Kor aem! Yau ámb yéné ménd ár yuwan efandati. Ménamén yéndon emndetan ndené kété njafaran yéfene njafar si résagh árém túmén yéfandat tane Afane sáf.{i{ ...f* {i{18.11 Yau siménj.
english: See that you don’ t despise one of these little ones , for I tell you that in heaven their angels always see the face of my Father who is in heaven .

nama: "Yéndon féfe efalo ewaufrotan, némé fémofem tumbangi yéné mband maratan ndenéyameyo so tumbangé kété njafaran, a fémofem njam téferngi yéna mband maratan so ndenéyameyo kaferngé njafaran.
english: Most certainly I tell you , whatever things you bind on earth will have been bound in heaven , and whatever things you release on earth will have been released in heaven .

nama: "Yéndon wéi ewaufrotan féfe, njam fémofem sómbioyam tiyátend yéna mband maratan némat fém nómnengéghét, tane Afam so yafrote féfeyot njafaran. 20 Ménamén ánde sómbio o nambio káumendangi tane yétkwénan, yénd kété wém yéfefaf." Rengerenge si wawalingéghofnar faiofnar ásáfogh ároenemén
english: Again , assuredly I tell you , that if two of you will agree on earth concerning anything that they will ask , it will be done for them by my Father who is in heaven .

nama: Féyo Fité naflayéng Yesuefaf a yémotai, "Yuré, njam tane fútar ménjté mé yém tafaf yaufi wafroghan, njénamb mbinotmé yénd so kwawalindangé yáne yaufi? 7 mbinotmé?"
english: Then Peter came and said to him , “ Lord , how often shall my brother sin against me , and I forgive him ? Until seven times ?”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Yau, yau 7 mbinotmé wénde 70 mbinotmé 7."
english: Jesus said to him , “ I don’ t tell you until seven times , but , until seventy times seven .

nama: "Faiofnar ásáfogh árom yáwefnoi budme warsagh ároene sáfrére a nómnendai, 'Ámb efogh mé kwaram, a yéndon so némawafángotan méinyotio fai.' 27 Warsagh ár ghérghérsisayam yifoyéng, féyo fá yawalindai yáne faimén a yéngwatembai.
english: The servant therefore fell down and knelt before him , saying , ‘ Lord , have patience with me , and I will repay you all !’

nama: "Féyo ár néngtoryéng a yéfángoi ámb yáne faiofnar ásáfogh fútar yáne fai wangoghofnar témorwén 3,000 kina. Yémon yambnai a kém yéfaryéng yéné siafé a norayai, 'Kwawafango tane mani!'
english: “ But that servant went out and found one of his fellow servants who owed him one hundred denarii , and he grabbed him and took him by the throat, saying , ‘Pay me what you owe !’

nama: "Yáne faiofnar ásáfogh fútarom budme yáwefnoi a nómnendai, 'Ámb efogh mé kwaram, yéndon so kémawafangon fai!'
english: “ So his fellow servant fell down at his feet and begged him , saying , ‘ Have patience with me , and I will repay you !’

nama: "Wénde fá mé nakenayéng a néngaflayéng a yéné ár yélawayéng kwéfkwéf méngot kétánotio yémon fai kor kufrotau.
english: He would not , but went and cast him into prison until he should pay back that which was due .

nama: Yesum soramé si norayai, "Ndené fiyém tane Afam njafaran so yafrote féfeyot, njam fém yau tawawalindangé ámb efalo yátogh árfene yaufimén féfene tikfan."
english: So my heavenly Father will also do to you , if you don’ t each forgive your brother from your hearts for his misdeeds.”

nama: Njam Yesum yifoi yéné watamegh si, yémon yéfrangoi Galili yu a nénguwanoi Judia yuwot witmé karfan Joden wanjen. 2 Tárfár ár mérnam yaitoyénd fá, a yémon mer táyátotau enjne téfnár kété.
english: When Jesus had finished these words , he departed from Galilee and came into the borders of Judea beyond the Jordan .

nama: Ámb Farasi ár enmormén kétán yáfaf ámogh sie tufotawét, "Téfene nákam ár té yumyote amaf sái tatembangé ámb yam wafroghmén?"
english: Pharisees came to him , testing him and saying , “ Is it lawful for a man to divorce his wife for any reason?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoyéng, "Té fémofem yaftaménd buk árké noraye ndené kété ufroghan 'Ngánjánam ewafroméng ár a amaf{j{ ...f* {j{19.4 Gen 1:27; 5:2
english: He answered , “Haven’ t you read that he who made them from the beginning made them male and female ,

nama: A Ngánján noraye, 'Yéné téfnan árom so tafrange yárefé a yátmé a kakayongé amafoefef, a sómbio so kamndend ámbiro.'{k{ ...f* {k{19.5 Gen 2:24
english: and said , ‘ For this cause a man shall leave his father and mother , and shall be joined to his wife ; and the two shall become one flesh ’?

nama: Féyo sómbio yau ere, wénde ámbiro. Árké árom yau so tafale némé Ngánjánam eyáteyai."
english: So that they are no more two , but one flesh . What therefore God has joined together , don’ t let man tear apart.”

nama: Farasi árém yémotayénd, "Féyo némamén Mosesém nák ewaramai árét ménát amaf so kangongai watembégh férnafé?"
english: They asked him , “ Why then did Moses command us to give her a certificate of divorce and divorce her ?”

nama: Yáne waitogh ár norayayénd yáfaf, "Njam ár a amaf ere yéné si mbanmbanan, so mer témorwén yau njam kawereyayénd."
english: His disciples said to him , “ If this is the case of the man with his wife , it is not expedient to marry .”

nama: Ámb árém enémnjaménd ambumtértér Yesuefaf ngángé fayoghét a Ngánjánafé orayéghét yéfenemén. Wénde yáne waitogh árém ekmboyénd ár.
english: Then little children were brought to him that he should lay his hands on them and pray ; and the disciples rebuked them .

nama: Yesu norayai, "Tanéumyongi ambumtértér tafaf, yau ekmbotati, ménamén njafar limánégh siyém ndené árfet fiyém ambumtértér sem. 15 Yémon ngángé efayoi a soramé néngwanoi. Wemár totér ár
english: But Jesus said , “Allow the little children , and don’ t forbid them to come to me ; for the Kingdom of Heaven belongs to ones like these .”

nama: Ámb ár yénmormén a namotai, "Watamegh ár, némé mer yéndon so yafrotan ménát tuot ghérsé résaghét?"
english: Behold , one came to him and said , “ Good teacher , what good thing shall I do , that I may have eternal life ?”

nama: Yesum yawangoyéng, "Némamén fémo namota meryammén? Yau efe mer yém mé Ngánján fáro. Fém njam ménde ném tuot ghérsé résaghét, ewafrota némé nák noraye."
english: He said to him , “ Why do you call me good ? No one is good but one , that is , God . But if you want to enter into life , keep the commandments .”

nama: eutmanwé afé amé; euweta fenjo kaka ár ndené fété fémyo."
english: ‘ Honor your father and your mother .’ And , ‘ You shall love your neighbor as yourself .’”

nama: Wemár totér árom yawangoi, "Méinyotio yéné nák yéndon tawarawenan. Némé wét tafaf náláitat?"
english: The young man said to him , “ All these things I have observed from my youth. What do I still lack ?”

nama: Yesum yémndayéng fá, "Njam fém ménde ném féwénféwénofnarot, kuwano a etérna maniot fene méinyotio rokar fene némé em a ewarameta mani yauyau árét, a fene ngonjél so nawamndat njafaran, féyo kénaf, yénd kwénmaito."
english: Jesus said to him , “ If you want to be perfect , go , sell what you have , and give to the poor , and you will have treasure in heaven ; and come , follow me .”

nama: Njam totér árom yéné si náyárayéng, fá wáiwáiafé néngwanoyéng, ménamén fá témorwén ndimbal wemár.
english: But when the young man heard this , he went away sad , for he was one who had great possessions .

nama: Yesum táf norayai yánjo waitogh árfefaf, "Yéndon efalo emndetan: nderé táikér so yém wemár árét élaughét njafar limánéghét. 24 Yéndon kor emndetan: kameloe lil féne élaughét táikér yém, wénde wemár ároe kétán Ngánján limánégh élaughét siyém minde táikér yém a yáne kérté yamam so taindangé yéné."
english: Jesus said to his disciples , “Most certainly I say to you , a rich man will enter into the Kingdom of Heaven with difficulty.

nama: Njam waitogh árém yéné si náyárayénd, fá minde sélngwél emormén a namotayénd, "Féyo efe wét so ngunjarngi?"
english: When the disciples heard it , they were exceedingly astonished , saying , “ Who then can be saved ?”

nama: Yesum mbarkándaye engfandayéng fá a ewawangoi, "Yéné siyém féyotarofnar yém árét, wénde Ngánjáne méinyotio yam féyotaro em."
english: Looking at them , Jesus said , “ With men this is impossible, but with God all things are possible .”

nama: Fitam témndangé, "Kéreta, yéndfem rokar méinyotio té tanéurotam fe waitoghét! Féyo némé wét yéndfem so tawanangém?"
english: Then Peter answered , “ Behold , we have left everything and followed you . What then will we have ?”

nama: "Njafar limánégh siyém ndené yém. Mband yuré tándái akwan nuwanoi ámb árét mani ásáfogh ramghét yáne géreif mbwe ménj ndawot. 2 Yémon yiyátoi yéfe fai ramghét, ámbiro efoghmén túmén fai, a ewáfáretai fá ásáfoghét yáne wén mbwe ménj ndawot.
english: “ For the Kingdom of Heaven is like a man who was the master of a household , who went out early in the morning to hire laborers for his vineyard.

nama: "Yémofem yawangoyénd, 'Emon ámb yau mani ásáfoghét yénémnde.' "Yémon emndai fá, 'Féyotaro fém nguwanongi ásáfoghét géreif mbwe ménj ndawot.'
english: “ They said to him , ‘ Because no one has hired us .’ “ He said to them , ‘ You also go into the vineyard, and you will receive whatever is right .’

nama: "Njam férégh náyátoi, yuram yémndai yánjo wanjengégh ár, 'Tamota ásáfogh ár a fai ewarameta, kétándmé efe ásáfoghét soramé nufnyayénd a kefongé kétán efe ásáfoghét fronde nufnyayénd.'
english: “ When evening had come , the lord of the vineyard said to his manager , ‘ Call the laborers and pay them their wages , beginning from the last to the first .’

nama: "A Yesum wifoghétro si norayai, "Efe soramé em so em fronde, a efe fronde em so em soramé." Yesum korayau nambiomén si yánjo kérmén
english: So the last will be first , and the first last . For many are called , but few are chosen.”

nama: Féyo Jefediene ambum, Jems a Jon yéfene amé yénmormén Yesuefaf yánjo sómbio ambumofé, yáwefnoyénd sáfrére yáyot, a yémotayénd Yesu yáne ménde wafroghét.
english: Then the mother of the sons of Zebedee came to him with her sons , kneeling and asking a certain thing of him .

nama: Yesum yémotai, "Némé wafroghét fém ménde ném?" Amafom yawangoi, "Unyéghofnar si kwaram ta so tane sómbio ambum taumuyé ménát so emorare ámb fatrata ámb tambénta njam fémon warsagh ár yétkwén tané."
english: He said to her , “ What do you want ?” She said to him , “ Command that these , my two sons , may sit , one on your right hand and one on your left hand , in your Kingdom.”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Fém yau mat ere némat fém namot. Fém féyotaro ere tékrat kafusi nénet yéndon árkéméné so yénetan?" Yémofem yawangeyayénd, "Féyotaro yéndfem so ere."
english: But Jesus answered , “ You don’ t know what you are asking . Are you able to drink the cup that I am about to drink , and be baptized with the baptism that I am baptized with ?” They said to him , “ We are able .”

nama: Yesum emndeyai fá, "Fémofem so féyotaro yénét tékrat kafusi yéndon sái yénetan. Wénde kétán tane tambénta a fatrata yénd waftafnar wém ramghét. Yéné sifayé yéfendro yém efe tané Afam té efrendayéng."
english: He said to them , “ You will indeed drink my cup , and be baptized with the baptism that I am baptized with ; but to sit on my right hand and on my left hand is not mine to give , but it is for whom it has been prepared by my Father .”

nama: Soramé, Yesu a yáne waitogh ár yéngéfrangoyénd Jeriko, tárfár ár mérén kuwaitotawét. 30 Sómbio kwéfkwéf ár efe tamorarwén end téndon náyáreyayénd ndené Yesu kawaindawéng, fá táf ke nufngeyayénd, "Deifidene Ambum, ghérghérsisé kawer téfefaf, Yuré!"
english: As they went out from Jericho , a great multitude followed him .

nama: Ár mérnam eusérmboménd, "Métar!" Wénde fá mé minde tukén kutarwét, "Deifidene ambum! Ghérghérsisé kawer téfefaf, Yuré!"
english: The multitude rebuked them , telling them that they should be quiet , but they cried out even more , “ Lord , have mercy on us , you son of David !”

nama: Yesu nékmboyéng a emotangeyai fá, "Némat fém ménde ere yéndon sái ewawafrowan féfe?"
english: Jesus stood still and called them , and asked , “ What do you want me to do for you ?”

nama: Yémofem yawangeyayénd, "Yuré, yénd ménde yénre sái kretangém!"
english: They told him , “ Lord , that our eyes may be opened.”

nama: Yesu ghérghérsisé nawerai yéfefaf a ewayanjangeyai yéfene ghékéf. Táf fété néretangeyayénd, a yémofem yáiteyayénd Yesu.
english: Jesus , being moved with compassion , touched their eyes ; and immediately their eyes received their sight , and they followed him .

nama: Yéné kufrotau némat Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár korayau:
english: All this was done that it might be fulfilled which was spoken through the prophet , saying ,

nama: "Tawaufrongi Jerusalem árét, 'Kéretangi, féfene warsagh ár nufane féfefaf! Fá yém yuwan ár a yénfayong totér ndonki sémsot tukén."{l{ ...f* {l{21.5 Jakaraya 9:9
english: “ Tell the daughter of Zion , behold , your King comes to you , humble, and riding on a donkey , on a colt , the foal of a donkey .” + 21:5 Zechariah 9:9

nama: Njam Yesu nénglawai Jerusalem, méinyotio ár tesenan sélngwélan a uwérsoghan tamorwén a árém namotayénd, "Efe fá yém?"
english: When he had come into Jerusalem , all the city was stirred up , saying , “ Who is this ?”

nama: Ár mérnam enwawangoyénd, "Yéné siyém Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár Yesu, Najaretmén kété Galili yuwon." Yesu néngwanoyéng kétán wáwefnogh méngot
english: The multitudes said , “ This is the prophet , Jesus , from Nazareth of Galilee .”

nama: Yesu yiotam kétán wáwefnogh méngo sifayat a wifarégh ewafngoi fá emofem tarsawét a tátérnawét rokar kété. Yémon tawengotau mani térarégh árfene kitaré a mamu térarégh árfene ámnjogh kitaré, 13 a norayai yéfefaf, "Yéné ndené yéfarotaménd Buk sian ndené Ngánján norayai, 'Tane méngo so yémndetat Ngánjánafé orayégh méngo. Wénde fémofem yengongi oro téfnárafene átnogh sifayat.
english: Jesus entered into the temple of God and drove out all of those who sold and bought in the temple , and overthrew the money changers ’ tables and the seats of those who sold the doves .

nama: Yesum engéfrangoi fá a néwanoi tesenta kétán Betanit, ánde fá yékmangérmén sémbáran. Yesum yafalngoi fig wén
english: He left them and went out of the city to Bethany, and camped there .

nama: Tándái akwan, Yesu kénangotau kétán Jerusalem. Néndkfan fá siogham yifoi. 19 Yémon yéngwinjoi fig wén end téndon a néngwanoi kétán, wénde ámb mbwe yau ewinjoi mé árauro. Féyo fá norayayéng kétán wénoefaf, "Fefaf yau so mbwe néngafote wéikor!" Táf fété fig wén néruyam.
english: Now in the morning , as he returned to the city , he was hungry .

nama: Waitogh árém njam yéné wafroghyam yinjoyénd fá sélngwél emormén a namotayénd, "Ndernáye yéné fig wén kéruye tekofnaye?"
english: When the disciples saw it , they marveled , saying , “ How did the fig tree immediately wither away ?”

nama: Yesu nénangotam kétán wáwefnogh méngo sifayat a njam yémo tawatametau, limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a limánégh ár nénufaryénd yáfaf a namotayénd, "Némé muyaye fémo ewafrote yéné yam? Emo némaram yéné muyé feyot?"
english: When he had come into the temple , the chief priests and the elders of the people came to him as he was teaching , and said , “ By what authority do you do these things ? Who gave you this authority ?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoyéng yéfe, "Yéndon fém so tamotangén ámbiro ámogh si, a njam fémofem kwaramangi wangogh si ta, yéndon wéi so tawaufron féfe némé muyayan yéndon yéné yam ewafrotan. 25 Jonene walitogh árkamé yénmormén: Ngánjáneta o kétamé árta?"
english: Jesus answered them , “ I also will ask you one question , which if you tell me , I likewise will tell you by what authority I do these things .

nama: Ménamén Jon walitogh ár yénmormén féfefaf tawauyafotau mbarkánd end féfeyot résaghét, a fémofem yau efalo yiyátoyénd fá, wénde mani kafégh ár a tukal amafam efalo yiyátoyénd fá. Táf njam fémofem yinjoyénd yéné yam, fém yau nawengoyénd a efalo yiyátoyénd. Rengerenge si ndau téfnárfenemén géreif mbwe ménj ndawan
english: For John came to you in the way of righteousness , and you didn’ t believe him ; but the tax collectors and the prostitutes believed him . When you saw it , you didn’ t even repent afterward , that you might believe him .

nama: Yesum emotai, "Féyo, njam géreif mbwe ménj ndau yuré nénangota, némé yémon so yafrote ndau téfnárafefaf?
english: When therefore the lord of the vineyard comes , what will he do to those farmers?”

nama: Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Yémon so esmete yéné yaufi ár a géreif mbwe ménj ndau so tawaramangé watma maniot ámb árfeyot, emofem so taramangi yáyot yáne géreif mbwe wau efghon."
english: They told him , “ He will miserably destroy those miserable men , and will lease out the vineyard to other farmers who will give him the fruit in its season .”

nama: Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Té fémofem yéné si yaftaménd Buk sian? 'Wím yékenayénd méngo ramégh árém soramé namndayéng sénko wím. Yuram yéné yafrotaméng, merfifi téfene ghékfan.
english: Jesus said to them , “ Did you never read in the Scriptures , ‘ The stone which the builders rejected was made the head of the corner . This was from the Lord . It is marvelous in our eyes ’? + 21:42 Psalms 118:22-23

nama: Yesu kor mé korayau, "Féyo yéndon emndetan fém, Ngánjánene limánégh so tawakawangé féfeyot a tawaramangé árét emofem efunat mer mbwe. 44 Árké ár njam kuyangé yéné wíman so natyane karéfkarfot a fá endefaf njam kuyangé so yéfarne."
english: “ Therefore I tell you , God ’s Kingdom will be taken away from you and will be given to a nation producing its fruit .

nama: Limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a Farasi árém njam náyárayénd Yesuene rengerenge si a mat náyátoyénd ndené yémon korayawéng yéfenemén, 46 féyo yémofem werghét Yesu térametawét. Wénde fá férfér tamorwén ár mérénmén, emofem nemnat ndené fá siyém Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár.
english: When the chief priests and the Pharisees heard his parables , they perceived that he spoke about them .

nama: Yesu wéi korayau rengerenge sie yéfefaf: 2 "Njafar limánégh ndenanit yém. Kété témorwén warsagh ár emon yéfrendaméng awerégh téménd njamke yánjo ambumoenemén. 3 Yémon yánjo faiofnar ásáfogh ár ewáfáretam yéfe wasroghét efe té engémndai fronde, wénde fá yau ménde tamorwén álighét.
english: Jesus answered and spoke to them again in parables , saying ,

nama: "Féyo wéi ámb faiofnar ásáfogh ár ewáfáretam yéfe orayéghét efe té engémndai fronde: 'Tane téménd siyém frengéghkaf yém. Yéndon esman tane ghakér kau a ámb yarésafé tot kau, a méinyotio téménd frengéghkaf yém! Kénaflangi awerégh téméndfaf.'
english: Again he sent out other servants , saying , ‘ Tell those who are invited , “ Behold , I have prepared my dinner. My cattle and my fatlings are killed , and all things are ready . Come to the wedding feast !”’

nama: "Warsagh ár néngaflai wan téfnár fandaghét. Yémo yinjoi ámb ár efe yau tawongérwén awerégh sáláme. 12 Warsagh árom yémotayéng, 'Fútar, ndernáye fém yéna ném awerégh téménd sálámefnar?' Wénde árom yau nuwangoyéng.
english: “ But when the king came in to see the guests, he saw there a man who didn’ t have on wedding clothing ,

nama: "Féyo warsagh árom emndai faiofnar ásáfogh ár, 'Taumbangi yáne ngángé a kafkaf, a titangi sémta kwéfkwéf sifayat. Kété ánde yémon tékrát a sén so ekérne.'"
english: Then the king said to the servants , ‘ Bind him hand and foot , take him away , and throw him into the outer darkness . That is where the weeping and grinding of teeth will be .’

nama: Yesum kerker si norayai, "Tárfár so tangémndangé, wénde nambioro tawaferngé." Ámogh ménát mani ramégh Rom tuk warsagh ár, Kaisare
english: For many are called , but few chosen .”

nama: Wénde Yesu mat náyátoi yéfene yaufi mwighé a fá norayai, "Fém farun mer néretati wénde kénjún yau em. Némamén ta fémofem unyégh sie urér wakeindati? 19 Kwémauyafend ta mani mbwe árké mani ramégh fáyot!"
english: But Jesus perceived their wickedness , and said , “ Why do you test me , you hypocrites ?

nama: a yémon emotayéng fá, "Endene sáf a yétkwén yéné yém?"
english: He asked them , “ Whose is this image and inscription ?”

nama: Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Kaisarene." Féyo Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Kaisare taramangi yáne némé yém, a Ngánjáne taramangi yáne némé yém."
english: They said to him , “ Caesar ’s.” Then he said to them , “ Give therefore to Caesar the things that are Caesar ’s, and to God the things that are God ’s.”

nama: Yémofem njam náyárayénd, fá sélngwél emormén a yémofem yéfrangoyénd a nuwanoyénd. Ámogh si ménamén kérta anoghmén
english: When they heard it , they marveled , and left him and went away.

nama: Njam ár mérnam náyárayénd yéné, fá emormén sélngwél yáne watameghmén. Ndimbal nák
english: When the multitudes heard it , they were astonished at his teaching .

nama: Njam Farasi ár náyárayénd ndené Yesum té ekmboyéng Saduki ár, Farasi ár mérne náumendayénd, 35 a ámb Farasi ár efe témorwén nák watamegh ár, kemnau Yesue ámogh sie ufoghét. 36 Yémon yémotai, "Watamegh ár! Árké nákam ewainde ámb nák?"
english: But the Pharisees , when they heard that he had silenced the Sadducees , gathered themselves together .

nama: Njam ámb Farasi ár náumendayénd mérne, Yesum emotayéng, 42 "Ndernáye wét fém nemnati yéné Kerisoenemén? Árké ákimén fá yém?" Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Fá yém Deifidene ákimén."
english: Now while the Pharisees were gathered together , Jesus asked them a question ,

nama: Yesum emotai, "Féyo némamén Ngánján Mbérmbéram télimndau Deifidém sái tanmotau tane 'Yuré'? Deifid norayai,
english: He said to them , “ How then does David in the Spirit call him Lord , saying ,

nama: 'Yuré Ngánján noraye kétán tane Yurafaf: Kámnjo yénandmé tane tambénta kétánotio yéndon fene mék téfnár tákman fene kafkaf mbanmbanan.'
english: ‘ The Lord said to my Lord , sit on my right hand , until I make your enemies a footstool for your feet ’? + 22:44 Psalms 110:1

nama: Deifidém njam yémndeta Keriso 'Yuré,' ndernáye so yéné Keriso yém yáne ákiambum?"
english: “ If then David calls him Lord , how is he his son ?”

nama: Emon ámb kor yau Yesue uwangogh si yaramai, a kétándmé yéné efghon a ámb efghon, méinyotio ár férfér tamorwén Yesue ámb ámogh siyot.
english: No one was able to answer him a word , neither did any man dare ask him any more questions from that day forward.

nama: "Nderé mámáfi yém féfeyot, nák watamegh ár a Farasi ár. Fém farun mer néretati wénde kénjún yau. Fémofem njafar limánégh sésafne yémnati árfene sáfrére. Fém fémyo yau nélawangi, yau eumyotati fá efe ménde em élaughét!{m{ ...f* {m{23.14 Ámb Grik bukan siménj 14 kété yém, wénde tárfár Grik bukan yau yém. Yéné siménj, "Fém nák watamegh téfnár a Farasi ár efe farun mer néretati wénde kénjún yau em. Nderé mámáfi yém féfeyot. Fémofem ewawindati séfarékw amafafet a tawanangi yéfene méngo a rokar féfendio, a fémofem ewafrotati tombé Ngánjánafé orayégh si ménát ámb árém so efandat. Soramé kerker efghon fémofem so tawanangi ndimbalfifi kérté."
english: “ Woe to you , scribes and Pharisees , hypocrites ! For you devour widows’ houses, and as a pretense you make long prayers. Therefore you will receive greater condemnation.

nama: "Nderé mámáfi yém féfeyot, nák watamegh ár a Farasi ár. Fém farun mer néretati wénde kénjún yau. Fém boute eyota arakafamé a néférmetati méinyotio yuwomé ménát ámbiro waitogh ár winjoghét, a fémofem njam tinjongi yéné ár, fémofem minde yaufiafé tiyátongi kémboghofnar fését, yáne yaufiyam tawaindangé féfene yaufiyam!
english: Woe to you , scribes and Pharisees , hypocrites ! For you travel around by sea and land to make one proselyte ; and when he becomes one , you make him twice as much a son of Gehenna as yourselves .

nama: "Nderé mámáfi féfeyot, nák watamegh ár a Farasi ár. Fém farun mer néretati wénde kénjún yau em.
