Fémofem ewányányotati farutaro féfene kafusi a merekin, táf kénjú siyém yaufi mwighé afoghkaf a nité. 26 Kwéfkwéf Farasi ár! Fémofem kénjú eumbnati kafusi a merekin fronde, a faru so yém mer ndenáyo!
english: “ Woe to you , scribes and Pharisees , hypocrites ! For you clean the outside of the cup and of the platter , but within they are full of extortion and unrighteousness.

nama: Njam Yesu námnjoi Olif Mband tunakfan, waitogh ár enmormén yéfembia yáfaf a yémotayénd, "Ténmaufro njam yéné yam ufroghan so em wawefnogh méngofaf a némé yamam so ténmaufrongé ndené efogh té nawer fene angoghmén a mband maratoene yatoghmén."
english: As he sat on the Mount of Olives , the disciples came to him privately , saying , “ Tell us , when will these things be ? What is the sign of your coming , and of the end of the age?”

nama: "Fém so tawerangi a ewasérmbotat a krot takmangi. Méinyotio mband marat ár méndménd so em féfefaf ménamén tane téfnan. 10 Yéné efghon, tárfáram so etarnat ndimbal mwighé, a so sén nufrotat a méndméndat nafandat fárofáro.
english: “ Then they will deliver you up to oppression and will kill you . You will be hated by all of the nations for my name ’s sake .

nama: "O, njam árém tamndangé fém, 'Kéretangi, fá kété fanfne yuwon yém,' yau engém kétán; o yémofem tamndangi, 'Kéretangi, fá kété méngo sátayan yém,' efalo yau táf yiyátotati. 27 Ménamén Ároene Ambum so yéném ndenanit toya kwayaghé yénau yém njafaran kétándmé werta kétán mbormbor tambén.
english: “ If therefore they tell you , ‘ Behold , he is in the wilderness ,’ don’ t go out ; or ‘ Behold , he is in the inner rooms ,’ don’ t believe it .

nama: "Ánde kér fifi yékmang, ndikáké kété so náumendat. Ároene Ambumoene angoghmén
english: For wherever the carcass is , that is where the vultures gather together .

nama: "Tekofnar wasérmbogh efogh soramé, efogh so téfértangé kwéfité, ndenáyo ghérare kwayaghé yau so yém, kénd so nénuitat kétándmé njafarta, a njafarmén waftafé rokar so násámbnetat.
english: “ But immediately after the suffering of those days , the sun will be darkened , the moon will not give its light , the stars will fall from the sky , and the powers of the heavens will be shaken ;

nama: "Soramé ámb ongén mérés nufaryénd a fá nómnendayénd, "Yuré, yuré! Ténmasawér sésafne!' 12 Amaf awerégh árom ewawangoi, "Yéndo efalo emndetan, yénd mafina wém fém.'"
english: Afterward the other virgins also came , saying , ‘ Lord , Lord , open to us .’

nama: Yesum soramé si norayai, "Mwighé sénté, ménamén fém yau mat em yéné efogh o efoghféneféne tane angoghmén. Rengerenge si nambio faiofnar ásáfogh árfenemén
english: Watch therefore , for you don’ t know the day nor the hour in which the Son of Man is coming.

nama: "Féyo fá so kuwanongi kétán kémboghofnar tékratfaf, wénde mbarkánd ár so engém kétán tuot akegh ghérsafaf."
english: These will go away into eternal punishment , but the righteous into eternal life .”

nama: Fronde efghon Minaghofnar flawé téméndmén, waitogh ár enmormén kétán Yesuefaf a yémotayénd fá, "Ándan fene ménde yém yéndfem sái yéfrendam Waingégh téménd njamke feyot?"
english: Now on the first day of unleavened bread, the disciples came to Jesus , saying to him , “ Where do you want us to prepare for you to eat the Passover ?”

nama: Yémon emndai fá, "Kuwanongi ámb ár kété yém tesenan a témndangi fá: "Watamegh ár nénorayang: Tane kwéf té nawer, yéndon so enetan Waingégh téménd njamke tane waitogh árfé fene méngon."
english: He said , “ Go into the city to a certain person, and tell him , ‘ The Teacher says , “ My time is at hand . I will keep the Passover at your house with my disciples .”’”

nama: Waitogh árém yafrotaménd ndenáye Yesum ndernáye engémndai Waingégh téménd njamke frengéghét.
english: The disciples did as Jesus commanded them , and they prepared the Passover .

nama: Njam férégh namndai, Yesu a yáne 12 waitogh ár námnjoyénd nénet. 21 Njam yémofem njamke tanetawét Yesum emndayéng, "Yéndon efalo emndetan fém, ámbiro ár yéna yém emo sén so wéramete."
english: Now when evening had come , he was reclining at the table with the twelve disciples .

nama: Yéné siam waitogh ár eméindai ghérghérsisat a ámbiroámbiro korayawét, "Yuré, tanemén noraye?"
english: They were exceedingly sorrowful , and each began to ask him , “ It isn’t me , is it , Lord ?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Yéna fété yém ámb ár emafé yéndfé eukéwam féskaf flawé ámbiro merekinan yémon sén so kwéramangé. 24 Ároene Ambum kér so yém ndernáye yéfarotaménd Buk si ndené fá so yém, wénde nderé mámáfi so yém yéné ároe emon Ároene Ambum sén yéramete! Mer so témorwén fá yau fiya káráftau!"
english: He answered , “ He who dipped his hand with me in the dish will betray me .

nama: Judas, sén téfnár, norayai, "Watamegh ár, fém tanemén noraye?" Yesum yawangoyéng, "Fém té norayang efaloe." Yurane ambinomén njamke
english: Judas , who betrayed him , answered , “ It isn’ t me , is it , Rabbi ?” He said to him , “ You said it .”

nama: Njam yémofem njamke tánetawét, Yesum méinyo féskaf flawé yerai, kánjo si yaramai Ngánjáne, a tawatfotau, a ewaramai yánjo waitogh árét a norayai, "Tawerangi a tánetangi. Yéné siyém tane fifi yém."
english: As they were eating , Jesus took bread, gave thanks for it , and broke it . He gave to the disciples and said , “ Take , eat ; this is my body .”

nama: Táf yémofem Ngánjáneyot wagh eufaryénd a nuwanoyénd Olif Mband tunakfot. Yesu norayai Fitane kenaghmén
english: When they had sung a hymn , they went out to the Mount of Olives .

nama: Féyo Yesum emndai fá, "Sénonjo sémbár méinyotio fém so kenngongi kwéfrangongi yénd, ndené Buk siam noraye, 'Yéndon, Ngánjánam so tésmangén sif wanjengégh ár, táf sif so nofarnat.' 32 Wénde soramé yénd njam kwanongé ghérsat, yénd féfe frondeta so wéngém Galili yuwot."
english: Then Jesus said to them , “ All of you will be made to stumble because of me tonight , for it is written , ‘ I will strike the shepherd , and the sheep of the flock will be scattered .’

nama: Fitam yawangoi, "Yéndo yaufifi so kénéfrangon, wénde ámb árémro so kénéfrangongi!"
english: But Peter answered him , “ Even if all will be made to stumble because of you , I will never be made to stumble .”

nama: Yesu norayai Fitafaf, "Yéndon efalo némndetan fém, fém fronde so korayang nambinotmé, "Yénd mafina wém Yesu." Yéné soramé ghakér kowi kutnangé sénonjo sémbáran.
english: Jesus said to him , “Most certainly I tell you that tonight , before the rooster crows , you will deny me three times .”

nama: Fitam yawangoi, "Yénd yaufifi so ndené korayangén, féyotaro, yéndfé so kér yénre." A méinyotio ámb waitogh ár ndené sáfotio si korayawét. Yesuf Ngánjánafé koraiwét Getsemanen
english: Peter said to him , “ Even if I must die with you , I will not deny you .” All of the disciples also said likewise .

nama: Yesu néngwanoi nayuofnar, fá sáfe náwefnoi mbandot a Ngánjánafé koraiwét, "Tane Afé, njam féyotaro yém, téfnár yéné tékrát tafaf siyéném. Wénde tane ménde yau, wénde fene ménde so nufrote."
english: He went forward a little , fell on his face , and prayed , saying , “ My Father , if it is possible , let this cup pass away from me ; nevertheless , not what I desire , but what you desire .”

nama: Féyo Yesu nénangotam yánjo nambio waitogh árfefaf a ewinjoi fá kémghan, a yémo yémndai Fité, "Fém yau snéretati yéndfé ámbiro efoghfénefénero? 41 Néretati a Ngánjánafé norayati ménát fém yau so ufogham tautfongé. Mbérmbér ménde yém mer yam wafroghét, wénde fifi siyém njangénnjangén yém."
english: He came to the disciples and found them sleeping , and said to Peter , “ What , couldn’ t you watch with me for one hour ?

nama: Ámbirotaro Yesu néngaflai Ngánjánafé orayéghét, "Tane Afé, yéné tékrát yau njam téfnár táfandro yéndon yénetan, fene méndero so nufrote."
english: Again , a second time he went away and prayed , saying , “ My Father , if this cup can ’ t pass away from me unless I drink it , your desire be done .”

nama: Yesu kor nénangoi a ewinjoi waitogh ár kémghan, ménamén yéfene ghékéf tamorwén kérté.
english: He came again and found them sleeping , for their eyes were heavy.

nama: Judas néwanoi mbarkándaye Yesuefaf a yémndai. "Mer sémbár, watamegh ár," a yésnetai fá.
english: Immediately he came to Jesus , and said , “ Greetings , Rabbi !” and kissed him .

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Tafrota némat kéném, fútar!"
english: Jesus said to him , “ Friend , why are you here ?” Then they came and laid hands on Jesus , and took him .

nama: a norayangeyayénd yéné unyégh si, "Yéné ár norayayéng, 'Yéndon féyotaro so yironan Ngánjánene wáwefnogh méngo a nambio efogh kénjún so yérametan tifon."
english: and said , “ This man said , ‘ I am able to destroy the temple of God , and to build it in three days .’”

nama: Yesum yawangoi yá, "A! Yénd fété wém. Fém némé noraye. Wénde yéndon fém méinyotio emndetan: yénandmé sénonjo efoghta nde kés yéngém tekofnaye fémofem so tinjongi Ároene Ambum sái yémorang Wafté kér ro Ngánjáne tambén ngángata a so yéném njafar kwamkwam kénjún!"
english: Jesus said to him , “ You have said so . Nevertheless , I tell you , after this you will see the Son of Man sitting at the right hand of Power , and coming on the clouds of the sky .”

nama: Táf fété tuk ghéngén wárogh árom yéftéraryéng yáne sáláme a norayai, "Fá té korayau wasérmbogh si Ngánjánefaf! Yénd yau wéi so náyáretam ámb fandagh árfene si. Fémofem té yiyárangi yáne wasérmbogh si! 66 Fém ndernáye nemnati?" Méinyotio árém yawangoyénd, "Fá siyém yaufi, a krot so tékmangém."
english: Then the high priest tore his clothing , saying , “ He has spoken blasphemy! Why do we need any more witnesses ? Behold , now you have heard his blasphemy.

nama: Féyo ámb árém Yesu mbérme farángégh yafngoyénd sáfamé a faise tésmetawét. A ámb árém tésmetawét ngángaye 68 a norayayénd, "Keriso! Ténmauyafo téfe ndené fém ném Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár. Koraya emo nésém!" Fitam yékenayéng Yesu
english: Then they spat in his face and beat him with their fists , and some slapped him ,

nama: Fité témorangérwén téndota méngo sifayan njam tuk ghéngén wárogh ároene faiofnar ásáfogh mérés yénmormén kétán yáfaf a yémndai, "Fém ámb yéné ném, efe kénmorwén Galili yumén Yesufé."
english: Now Peter was sitting outside in the court, and a maid came to him , saying , “ You were also with Jesus , the Galilean !”

nama: Wénde yémo yékenai yéfe sáfrére a ewawangoi, "Yénd mafina wém némamén fém norayati." 71 A fá néngtoryéng méngo sifayé sésafnefaf. Ámb faiofnar ásáfogh mérsom yinjoi fá kété a norayai árfefaf, "Fá témorwén Najaretmén Yesufé."
english: But he denied it before them all , saying , “ I don’ t know what you are talking about .”

nama: Kor wéi Fitam yékenayéng a yawangoi, "Yéndon efalo si norayan ndené yénd mafina wém yéné ár!"
english: Again he denied it with an oath , “ I don’ t know the man .”

nama: Tekofnaye ámb ár efe tawakayongérwén kétándmé nuwanoyénd kétán Fitafaf a yémndayénd, "Efalo fété fém ámb ném. Fém ndenanit noraye ámb ár kés yém Galili yumén.
english: After a little while those who stood by came and said to Peter , “Surely you are also one of them , for your speech makes you known.”

nama: Féyo Fité norayai, "Yénd efalo sote si norayan ndené yénd efalo si norayan! Ngánjánam mété tékrátan kwékmangé táf njam nuindan! Yénd mafina wém yéné ár!"
english: Then he began to curse and to swear , “ I don’ t know the man !” Immediately the rooster crowed .

nama: a Fité nawafrotai némé Yesum té témndetau fá, "Fémon so fronde kwékenang nambinotma, yéné soramé ghakér kowi so kutnangé." Fá nuwanoi nétoryéng ye nufngoi máméghéraye.
english: Peter remembered the word which Jesus had said to him , “ Before the rooster crows , you will deny me three times .” Then he went out and wept bitterly .

nama: Tándái akwan méinyotio limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a Ju árfene limánégh ár mwighé efaronaménd a yaitoyénd Yesue krot. 2 Yémofem yumbetaménd, yémnjoyénd a yéramayénd Failetefaf Rommén gafanafaf. Judasene kérmén
english: Now when morning had come , all the chief priests and the elders of the people took counsel against Jesus to put him to death .

nama: Judasém mani mbwe ewitam mbandot wáwefnogh méngo kénjún a efrangoi. Féyo fá táf néngwanoi a náwámái ángéghan fáyo.
english: He threw down the pieces of silver in the sanctuary and departed. Then he went away and hanged himself .

nama: Yesu takayongérwén Rom gafanane sáfrére, a gafanam yémotai Yesu, "Fém fété ném Ju árfene warsagh ár?"
english: Now Jesus stood before the governor ; and the governor asked him , saying , “ Are you the King of the Jews ?” Jesus said to him , “ So you say .”

nama: Limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a limánégh árém korayawét tárfár sáfot si yáfaf. Fá korayawét ndené yémo yaufiyam tárfár tawafrotau, wénde Yesum ámb yau ewawangoi.
english: When he was accused by the chief priests and elders , he answered nothing .

nama: Féyo Failet norayai yáfaf, "Té náyárete njénambafé méndméndafé si némafayotat feyot?"
english: Then Pilate said to him , “Don’ t you hear how many things they testify against you ?”

nama: Wénde Yesu nakenai uwangoghét, yéné téfnan Failet sélngwélam yafrotam. Failetém norayai Yesu so fété kér yém
english: He gave him no answer, not even one word , so that the governor marveled greatly .

nama: Njamandio Failet témorangérwén mogh sifayan, yáne amafom si yénmawatembai: "Némé ámb yau yafrota yéné ménd ároefaf, ménamén sénonjo sémbáran onjoyan yéndon minde tékrát yéfandan yánemén."
english: While he was sitting on the judgment seat, his wife sent to him , saying , “ Have nothing to do with that righteous man , for I have suffered many things today in a dream because of him .”

nama: Limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a limángégh árém ewasemnayénd ár mérén Failete moghét ménát Barabase utorghét a Yesu yéramai krot. 21 Failetém emotai ár mérén, "Efe ár yém yéné sómbiota yéndon sái tutorén féfeyot? Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Barabas!"
english: Now the chief priests and the elders persuaded the multitudes to ask for Barabbas and destroy Jesus .

nama: Failetém emotai fá, "Némé so yéndon yafrotan yéné ároefaf Yesu efe yémndetati Keriso?" Méinyotioyam yawangoyénd, "Ténamndangi wafatarégh wénan!"
english: Pilate said to them , “ What then shall I do to Jesus who is called Christ ?” They all said to him , “ Let him be crucified !”

nama: Wénde Failetém emotai, "Némé yaufi yémon yafrotam?" Wénde fá kutnawét minde tukén: "Ténamndangi wafatarégh wénan!"
english: But the governor said , “ Why ? What evil has he done ?” But they cried out exceedingly , saying , “ Let him be crucified !”

nama: Failet mat náyátoi ndené yémon yau kor némé so tafrotau yéfe kémboghét. Fá nemnai mété ár kásmetawét yáne fiyarafé. Féyo yémon yanai nu a yánjo ngángé umbarégh ewafngoi yéfene sáfrére, a norayai, "Yénd yau wafnyang yéné ároene kér kénjún! Yéné siyém féfene yam wafrogh yém!"
english: So when Pilate saw that nothing was being gained, but rather that a disturbance was starting , he took water and washed his hands before the multitude , saying , “ I am innocent of the blood of this righteous person . You see to it .”

nama: Méinyotio ár mérnam nuwangoyénd, "Féyotaro yéné kérté yéné ároene kérmén so yém téfefaf a ndenáyo téfene ambumfaf!"
english: All the people answered , “ May his blood be on us and on our children !”

nama: Féyo Failetém yéngéumyoi Barabas utorghét yéfeyot. Wénde yémo tamndangé yánjo fiyaré, 'Yesu tésmetangi tárfár mbinotmé a téfmotangi. Féyo témnjongi a ténamndangi wafatarégh wénan." Fiyaram si tawafrotawét Yesue
english: Then he released Barabbas to them , but Jesus he flogged and delivered to be crucified .

nama: Njam fá tayotawéng, yémofem yéfángoyénd ár Sairénmén yétkwén Saimon, a fiyaram táfáretawét fá Yesuene wafatarégh wén résaghét. 33 Fá nufaryénd sifayé yétkwén Golgota, yáne fifi yém "Sénkosot sáfnit Sifayé." 34 Kété yémofem yauyafoyénd Yesue njérmat wéri nu, wénde yémo njam yufoi, yau yénetam.
english: As they came out , they found a man of Cyrene , Simon by name , and they compelled him to go with them , that he might carry his cross .

nama: Ár endmé kawaindawét yéfene sénko tafnendawét a si tawafrotawét Yesue: 40 "Fémon so tironawéng wáwefnogh méngo a térametau wéikor nambio efghon! Kawanjar fémyo njam fém ném Ngánjánene Ambum! Kénewor mbandot yénandmé wafatarégh wénta!"
english: Those who passed by blasphemed him , wagging their heads

nama: Yéné oro téfnár efe enaménd yémofem wéi si tawafrowét Yesue ndenéyameyo. Yesuene kérmén
english: The robbers also who were crucified with him cast on him the same reproach .

nama: Táf efoghméf témorwén méinyotio yu namndai kwéfitaro, yéné kwéfitayam yérsam kétán 3 aklokot. 46 Táf 3 aklokan Yesu ke nutnai marataye, "Eli, Eli, lama sabaktani?" Yéné sioene fifi siyém, "Tane Ngánján, tane Njánján, némamén yénd fémon wéfrango tambia?"
english: Now from the sixth hour there was darkness over all the land until the ninth hour .

nama: Ámb ár efe tawakayongérwén kaka yiyárayénd Yesu, a norayayénd, "Yémon yémote Elaija!" 48 Ámbiro ár táf fété néngenngoi wékeye a yanai ngu. Yémon yukai ghafté wéri nuan, yumbetam wén fétfétan, a yénguyoi Yesue nénet.
english: Some of them who stood there , when they heard it , said , “ This man is calling Elijah .”

nama: Wénde ámb árém norayayénd, "Somé, mato so yéfandam mété Elaija yéném yá wanjarghét!"
english: The rest said , “ Let him be . Let ’s see whether Elijah comes to save him .”

nama: Yesu wéikor minde tukén ke nutnai a ambinomén ambone yitam kér yémormén.
english: Jesus cried again with a loud voice , and yielded up his spirit .

nama: Njam fiyaré sénko ár a fiyaré emofem tanjetawét Yesu yinjoyénd sokrere a méinyotio yam némé kufrotau, fá férfér tamorwén a norayayénd, "Fá efalo Ngánjánene Ambum fété yém!"
english: Now the centurion and those who were with him watching Jesus , when they saw the earthquake and the things that were done , were terrified , saying , “ Truly this was the Son of God !”

nama: Kété tamorwén tárfár amaf efe nayuta kéretawét, emofem ténmaitotawét Yesu kétándmayo Galili yuta a yáutánaménd yáyot. 56 Yéfe kénjún tafnyangérwén Meri Makdalin, Meri yéfetmé Jems a Josef, a Jefediene amaf. Yesuene mband raméghmén
english: Many women were there watching from afar , who had followed Jesus from Galilee , serving him .

nama: Failetém emndai fá, "Tangwasrongi fiyaré, nguwanongi a mere mbéwé yánjetati ndernáye mer so yém."
english: Pilate said to them , “ You have a guard . Go , make it as secure as you can .”

nama: Féyo fá nuwanoyénd a tanjetawét mbéwé, angéghe yéngsoyénd taikrataye a kénde yiyátoyénd a wanjengégh ár efrangoyénd.
english: So they went with the guard and made the tomb secure, sealing the stone .

nama: Féyo yémofem yéfrangeyayénd mbéwé méngo wékeyero. Fá férfér tarwén wénde áuwéghan tarwén, a nengenngeyayénd kétán afroghét yáne waitogh árfefaf.
english: They departed quickly from the tomb with fear and great joy , and ran to bring his disciples word .

nama: Tekofnaye Yesum efangeyai yéné sómbio amaf a norayai, "Mer akw." Fá nénafleyayénd yáfaf, a yereyayénd kafkafan, a yáwefneyayénd yá. 10 Yesum emndeyai fá, "Yau férfér ere. Nguwanend a tawaufrend tane waitogh árfet kétán táf engém Galili yuwot, a kété yémofem so kwinjongi." Fiyarafene unyégh si
english: As they went to tell his disciples , behold , Jesus met them , saying , “ Rejoice !” They came and took hold of his feet , and worshiped him .

nama: Fiyaram engwanayénd mani a yafrotaménd némat fá té emndayénd wafroghét. A yéné mat si nófarnai marate Ju árfaf yénanotio sénonjo efogh. Yesum emndai yánjo waitogh ár némé ásáfogh so tafrotawét
english: So they took the money and did as they were told. This saying was spread abroad among the Jews , and continues until today .

nama: Mer si náreinde Ngánjánene ambum Yesu Kerisoenemén.
english: The beginning of the Good News of Jesus Christ , the Son of God .

nama: Ndernáye Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár Aisayam yéfarotam yáne Bukan, "Yéndon so yéngwáfáretan fronde si résagh ár, emon so fene end némáfrende,
english: As it is written in the prophets , “ Behold , + 1:2 “Behold”, from “ἰδοὺ”, means look at, take notice, observe, see, or gaze at. It is often used as an interjection. I send my messenger before your face , who will prepare your way before you : + 1:2 Malachi 3:1

nama: ke nutne fanfne yuta, 'End frengéghét Yuraye álighét, wafrogh mbarkánd end yáyot.'"
english: the voice of one crying in the wilderness , ‘ Make ready the way of the Lord ! Make his paths straight !’” + 1:3 Isaiah 40:3

nama: Táf fété Ngánján Mbérmbéram yéméindai Yesu álighét fanfne yuwot. 13 Fá yémorangérmén kétánotio 40 efogh Sáifram yufotam. Yesu kété témorwén ánde wérár tamorwén, wénde njafar si résagh árém yambayénd Yesu. Yesum ewaferyéng yánjo fronde waitogh ár
english: Immediately the Spirit drove him out into the wilderness .

nama: Soramé Jon yélawayénd kwéfkwéf sifayan, Yesu néngwanoi Galili yuwot Ngánjánene mer si táitotau. 15 Yesu norayai, "Efogh ténawer, Ngánján limánégh siyém kaka yém. Féfenjo yaufita kawengongi a efalo tiyátongi mer siǃ"
english: Now after John was taken into custody , Jesus came into Galilee , preaching the Good News of God ’s Kingdom,

nama: Ámb efghon Yesu tiyotawéng Galili arakaf téndomé, yémon ewinjeyai Saimon a yánngén Endru net waméghan ndimbal sawan, ménamén fá tárwén wagif rényégh ár. 17 Yesum emndeyai, "Kénaflend yénd kwénmaitend a yéndon so táyáten ár rényégh ár." 18 Táf fété yémofem eureyayénd yéfenjo net a yáiteyayénd Yesu.
english: Passing along by the sea of Galilee , he saw Simon and Andrew, the brother of Simon , casting a net into the sea , for they were fishermen.

nama: Njam fá néngwanoyénd nayuofnar, yémon ewinjeyai Jems Jefediene ambum, yánngén Jon boutan tawaflarwén, táfrengwét yéfenjo net. 20 Tekofnar Yesum emotangeyai, yémofem yéfrangeyayénd yéferafé Jefedi bout kénjún ásáfogh árofé a yáiteyayénd Yesu. Yesum yitroi yaufi mbérmbér
english: Going on a little further from there , he saw James the son of Zebedee , and John his brother, who were also in the boat mending the nets .

nama: Fá néngwanoyénd Káfenam tesenot, a Safatan Yesu nénglawai áumengégh méngot a watamegh ewafngoi. 22 Ár sélngwél emormén yáne watameghan, ménamén yáne si waitogh témorwén muyafé, yau ndené nák watamegh ár. 23 Áumengégh méngon kété témorwén ár tasarmbotau yaufi mbérmbéram. Fá nutnayeng minde tukén, 24 "Fém némat ménde ném téfefaf, Yesu Najaretmén? Fém kéném téfefaf wasérmboghét? Yénd mat wém fém efe ném, fém ném Ngánjánene njúnnjúnofnar ár."
english: They went into Capernaum , and immediately on the Sabbath day he entered into the synagogue and taught .

nama: Yesum yarnam, "Métar kékmboǃ Kéntor yá tambénǃ" 26 Yaufi mbérmbéram yésámbnetai ár a féyo yéméindai yaufi keyot a yéfrangoi.
english: Jesus rebuked him , saying , “ Be quiet , and come out of him !”

nama: Méinyotio ár emormén sélngwél a kawawanjawét fáro, némé watamegh yéné yém muyafé? Yéné ár muyafé yém yaufi mbérmbér wafareghét a yémofem tiyárangi Yesuǃ" 28 Si yánemén marat namndai wékeyero Galili yuwon. Yesum mer táyátotau tárfár ár enjneta
english: They were all amazed , so that they questioned among themselves , saying , “ What is this ? A new teaching ? For with authority he commands even the unclean spirits , and they obey him !”

nama: Yémofem yéfrangoyénd áumengégh méngo, fá néngwanoyénd yémafé Jems a Jon, Saimon a Endru yéfene méngot. 30 Saimone yanat enjne témorwén, a yémofem Yesue yaufroyénd yánemén. 31 Féyo Yesu néngwanoi yáfaf, Yesum ngángé yawerai a yauténam yáyot. Táf fété enjneyam yéfrangoi a yémon ewáfrendam yéfe njamke.
english: Immediately , when they had come out of the synagogue , they came into the house of Simon and Andrew, with James and John .

nama: Fauréghan Yesu néngwanoi méngota métar sifayat, ánde fá Ngánjánjafé koraiwét. 36 Saimonéf néngwanoyénd yá fútarfé Yesue ronjaghét, 37 a njam yémofem yinjoyénd Yesu, fá norayayénd, "Árém néronjat fémǃ"
english: Early in the morning , while it was still dark , he rose up and went out , and departed into a deserted place , and prayed there .

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Yénd so kuwanongém kaka tesenot, ménát yéndon so ewaufrotan mer si yéné árét. Yénémamén yénd kwéném." 39 Féyo fá tiotau Galili yuwomé, kété yémon táitotau si áumengégh méngo kénjún a yaufi mbérmbér tawifnau. Yesum mer yiyátoi yaufi ghéngan enjnefé ár
english: He said to them , “ Let ’ s go elsewhere into the next towns , that I may preach there also , because I came out for this reason.”

nama: Yaufi ghéngan enjnefé ár yénmormén Yesuefaf a yáwefnoi budme, "Fém njam ménde ném, fémon so mer kwiyáto yénd."
english: A leper came to him , begging him , kneeling down to him , and saying to him , “ If you want to , you can make me clean .”

nama: Yesu ghérghérsisayam yifoi ewatembai ngángé a yiyánjai ár. Yesum yawangoi, "Yénd ménde fété wém. So mer némǃ" 42 Táf fété yaufi ghéngan enjneyam yéfrangoi merafayo.
english: Being moved with compassion , he stretched out his hand , and touched him , and said to him , “ I want to . Be made clean .”

nama: Njam Yesum ewawinjoi yéfene ndimbal mwighé, fá norayai, "Fútar, fene yaufi té wawalinda."
english: Jesus , seeing their faith , said to the paralytic , “ Son , your sins are forgiven you .”

nama: Ámb nák watamegh ár tamorangérwén kété, kemnawét yéfenjomén, 7 "Némamén yéné ár ndené si noraye? Yémon Ngánjánene sifayé résaghét yafngoǃ Ngánjánro yém efe so tawalindangé yaufiyam!"
english: But there were some of the scribes sitting there and reasoning in their hearts ,

nama: Yesu néngafértai ámbirotaro néngwanoi ndimbal arakaf téndomé. Ár mérén enmormén yáfaf, a yémon watamegh ewafngoi fá. 14 Fá njam tiyoyawéng, Yesum yinjoi Lefi Alfasene ambum témorangérwén mani kafégh méngon. Yesum témndangé, "Yénd kwénmaitoǃ" a Lefi nokayoi yéngwaitoi Yesu.
english: He went out again by the seaside. All the multitude came to him , and he taught them .

nama: Yesum eyárai a ewawangoi, Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Yau mer árém njokté yarawetat wénde enjne téfnáramro. Yénd yau mbarkánd ár moghét wénmormén, wénde yaufi ár wanjarghét." Yesu yémotayénd awafarmanéghmén
english: When Jesus heard it , he said to them , “ Those who are healthy have no need for a physician , but those who are sick . I came not to call the righteous , but sinners to repentance.”

nama: Jonene waitogh ár a Farasi ár kawafarmetawét. Ámb ár enmormén Yesu yémotayénd, "Jonene waitogh ár a Farasi ár nawafarmetat, wénde némamén fene waitogh ár yauǃ"
english: John ’s disciples and the Pharisees were fasting , and they came and asked him , “ Why do John ’s disciples and the disciples of the Pharisees fast , but your disciples don’ t fast ?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Totér awerégh téfnárane ár yau so nawafarmetat njamandio fá em yémafé? 20 Wénde efogh yéna yéném njam awerégh ár so nguwanongé yéfe tambén, yéné efghon fá so nawafarmetat."
english: Jesus said to them , “ Can the groomsmen fast while the bridegroom is with them ? As long as they have the bridegroom with them , they can ’ t fast .

nama: Ámb Safatan Yesu tiotau kun ndawan yánjo waitogh árfé, yánjo waitogh árém ewafngoyénd kun mbwe férarégh. 24 Farasi ár norayayénd Yesuefaf, "Némamén yémofem ásáfogh yafrotat Safatan táf téfene nák yém?"
english: He was going on the Sabbath day through the grain fields ; and his disciples began , as they went , to pluck the ears of grain .

nama: Féyo Yesu wifogh si norayai yéfefaf, "Ngánjánam Safat yafrotam ároe, wénde yau ár yafrotam Safatoe. 28 Féyo Ároene Ambum siyém Safatoe Yuré."
english: He said to them , “ The Sabbath was made for man , not man for the Sabbath .

nama: Ámb efghon fá néngwanoi áumengégh méngo kénjút, a ár kété témorwén ngángé aknyégh ár. 2 Farasi árém end táronjawét Yesue ufarghét kotot ménát némé yaufi sái tafrotangai Safatan, yénémamén ghékéf tafayotawét yá. 3 Yesum yémndai ngángé aknyégh ár, "Kokai ár sáfan."
english: He entered again into the synagogue , and there was a man there whose hand was withered .

nama: Yesum emotai fá, "Árkéméné nák yém Safatan, mer wafroghét o yaufi wafroghét, ghérsé wanjarghét o ár ngiot?" Wénde fá métar náyátoyénd yáne sian.
english: He said to them , “ Is it lawful on the Sabbath day to do good or to do harm ? To save a life or to kill?” But they were silent .

nama: Yémon ghékfe fá tawámnjotau nékwafé, fá mwighé kérté nawerai yéfenemén ménamén tikéf táikér tamorwén. Féyo Yesum yémndai, "Ngángé táfer." Yémon ngángé yéferyéng táf yáne ngángé mer náyátoyéng. 6 Farasi ár néngwanoyénd a mwighé táfrendawét Erodene árfé Yesue ngiot. Ndimbal mérén eném Yesuefaf
english: When he had looked around at them with anger , being grieved at the hardening of their hearts , he said to the man , “ Stretch out your hand .” He stretched it out , and his hand was restored as healthy as the other .

nama: Yesu nélawai méngot, wéikor ár mérén náumendam, yénémamén Yesu a yánjo waitogh ár njamke yau enetaménd. 21 Njam yáne mérén náyárayénd némé kufrotau, fá engmormén kétán Yesue wangoghét ménamén yémofem témndetawét ndené, "Fá siyém onon yém."
english: The multitude came together again , so that they could not so much as eat bread.

nama: Nák watamegh téfnár efe enmormén kétándmé Jerusalemta norayayénd, "Fá siyém Beljebabém yarsoteǃ Yaufi mbérmbérafene sénko ároene muyaye, yémon yaufi mbérmbér ewifne."
english: The scribes who came down from Jerusalem said , “ He has Beelzebul,” and , “ By the prince of the demons he casts out the demons .”

nama: Yesum korayau yéné si ménamén fá korayawét, "Fá kar yaufi mbérmbérafé témorwén." Yesue yátmé a yánngnéf
english: — because they said , “ He has an unclean spirit .”

nama: Yesue yátmé a yánngnéf nénufaryénd. Tawakayongérwén méngo téndota, yémofem yáfáretayénd ámb ár Yesuefaf. 32 Ár mérén kénjún témorangérwén Yesu, a yémofem yaufroyénd yá, "Fene amé a fenngnéf téndota ewakai fém néronjat."
english: His mother and his brothers came , and standing outside , they sent to him , calling him .

nama: Yémo emotai, "Efe em tane amé a tane nénngnéf?"
english: He answered them , “ Who are my mother and my brothers?”

nama: Féyo yémon tafandangé fá emofem yarendayénd a norayai, "Tane amé a tane nénngnéf semǃ 35 Emo njam Ngánjánene ménde yafrota fá siyém tane néngén, tane mérés a tane amé."
english: Looking around at those who sat around him , he said , “ Behold , my mother and my brothers!

nama: Féyo Yesu norayai, "Fá efe ténganafé yém áyárghét, fá so káyárangé."
english: He said , “ Whoever has ears to hear, let him hear.”

nama: Yesum ndenéyameyo noyarai, "Ár yau ndené nufarotat lambefé sinan sái etnotat a yame mbanmbanan. Wénde árém tafayongi lambefé kitarékitarayan. 22 Kété siyém némé yau warambnoghmén yém, árkéméné so kakmangé marataye. Némé ténoghe yém safén so kakmangé. 23 Njam ténganafé ném, káyárǃ
english: He said to them , “ Is a lamp brought to be put under a basket or under a bed ? Isn’ t it put on a stand?

nama: Yéné férghan, Yesum emndai yánjo waitogh ár, "Kétándmé karéf arakaf kurtongém." 36 Féyo yémofem efrangoyénd ár mérén, a yáne waitogh árfé nuwanoyénd 37 Ndimbal mbormboram eutfoi sawan. Sóf armbogh nufngoyénd bout olitoghétro témorwén.
english: On that day , when evening had come , he said to them , “ Let ’s go over to the other side .”

nama: Yesu kémégh tékmangérwén sénko tafal téfayongérwén bout kwémbta. Fá témorwén kémégh kér. Yáne waitogh árém tanongi a témndangi, "Watamegh ár, yénd olitoghétro yéném, yénd fémon té yénmarawene?"
english: He himself was in the stern , asleep on the cushion ; and they woke him up and asked him , “ Teacher , don’ t you care that we are dying?”

nama: Yesu kéméghta nanoi mbormbor a sóf emndeyai, "Métar kamnden." Métar namndeyayénd táf fété.
english: He awoke and rebuked the wind, and said to the sea , “ Peace ! Be still !” The wind ceased and there was a great calm .

nama: Yesum emndai yánjo waitogh ár, "Némamén fém férfér em? Féfene ndimbal mwighé té yém?"
english: He said to them , “ Why are you so afraid ? How is it that you have no faith ?”

nama: Fá minde férfér tamorwén a korayangi yéfe kénjúnro, "Efe yéné yém? Mbormbor a sófam fá yiyárend!"
english: They were greatly afraid and said to one another , “ Who then is this , that even the wind and the sea obey him ?”

nama: Njam yéné árom yinjoi Yesu nayuta, fá nénenngoi Yesuefaf a budme niyai. 7 Fá nutnayéng yánjo ke féyotaroyan, "Yesu, Minde tukén Ngánjánene ambum, némat fém ménde ném tafaf? Ngánjánene yétkwénan, fémon yau tékrátan kwékémǃ" 8 Ménamén Yesu norayai yáfaf, "Fém yaufi mbérmbér, kéntor yéné ároe tambénǃ"
english: When he saw Jesus from afar , he ran and bowed down to him ,

nama: Féyo Yesum yémotai fá, "Fene yétkwén efe yém?"
english: He asked him , “ What is your name ?” He said to him , “ My name is Legion , for we are many .”

nama: Yémon wawérmanéghe taurémnau Yesu ménát yau yéfe witroghét yéné sifayata.
english: He begged him much that he would not send them away out of the country .

nama: Táf fété Yesuene wafté néférmai. Fá nawengoi ár mérnafefaf a kamotangé, "Emo tane sáláme yiyánja?"
english: Immediately Jesus , perceiving in himself that the power had gone out from him , turned around in the crowd and asked , “ Who touched my clothes ?”

nama: Yáne waitogh ár norayayénd yáfaf, "Kéreta yéné árfefaf emofem fém némarendangiǃ Némamén fém namote emo fém nianja?"
english: His disciples said to him , “ You see the multitude pressing against you , and you say , ‘ Who touched me ?’”

nama: Njamandio Yesu mé korayau, ámb ár enmormén Jairusene méngota efe témorwén áumengégh méngo sénko ár. Yémofem norayayénd, "Fene mérés kér té tém, Némamén watamegh ár ndenayu yawérsotati."
english: While he was still speaking , people came from the synagogue ruler’s house, saying , “ Your daughter is dead. Why bother the Teacher any more ?”

nama: Yesum ekenai yéfene si a fá norayai Jairusefaf, "Yau férfér ném, efalo kwiyátoǃ"
english: But Jesus , when he heard the message spoken , immediately said to the ruler of the synagogue, “Don’ t be afraid , only believe .”

nama: Yesum yéfrangoi yéné yu a néngwanoi yánjo tesenot yánjo waitogh árfé. 2 Njam Safat nawerai, yémon watamegh yérnyai áumengégh méngon, tárfár ár efe káyáretawét yáne sifaf sélngwél tamorwén.
english: He went out from there . He came into his own country , and his disciples followed him .

nama: Fá siyém méngo ramégh árro. Meriene ambum yém, Jems, Josef, Judas a Saimon yánngnéf em. Yáne mérésmérésafé yénd yéna yéném." Yémofem yékenayénd.
english: Isn’ t this the carpenter , the son of Mary and brother of James , Joses , Judah , and Simon ? Aren’ t his sisters here with us ?” So they were offended at him .

nama: Warsagh ár Erod náyárai Yesuenemén ménamén yáne yétkwén marat náyátoi. Ámb ár korayawét, "Jon walitogh ár kérta nénano, yénémamén sélngwélafé ásáfogh yémon ewafrote."
english: King Herod heard this , for his name had become known , and he said , “ John the Baptizer has risen from the dead , and therefore these powers are at work in him .”

nama: Ámb árém korayawét, "Yéné Elaija séno yém." Ámb ár wéi mé korayawét, "Fá siyém mat yátogh ár yém, ndenanit tándái ámb mat yátogh ár kés tanmorwén."
english: But others said , “ He is Elijah .” Others said , “ He is a prophet , or like one of the prophets .”

nama: Wénde njam Erod náyárai Yesuenemén, fá norayai ndené, "Jon séno yémǃ Yéndon efe sénko yénfayén, fá séno nénano ghérsat."
english: But Herod , when he heard this , said , “ This is John , whom I beheaded. He has risen from the dead.”

nama: Ámb efghon Erodene áráfégh efogh téménd nawerai, yémon ewarawai yánjo tuk ásáfogh ár a fiyaré sénko ár a Galili yumén limánégh ár. 22 Njam Erodiasene yámérés nélawai téménd sifayat ermángégh nufngoi, warsagh ár Erod a yáne wan téfnárafene merotro.
english: Then a convenient day came when Herod on his birthday made a supper for his nobles, the high officers, and the chief men of Galilee .

nama: Yéndon efalo si némndetan fém ndené witmé karéf méngotu so kémafarorén, njam fém ménde ném."
english: He swore to her , “ Whatever you ask of me , I will give you , up to half of my kingdom.”

nama: Mérés néngtoryéng a yátmé yémndai, "Yéndo némat so tamnendangén?" Yatmam yawangoi, "Jon walitogh ároene sénkotǃ"
english: She went out and said to her mother , “ What shall I ask ?” She said , “ The head of John the Baptizer.”

nama: Mérés wékeye néngangoi a Erode yaufroi, "Yénd ménde wém sénonjo kwaram Jon walitogh ároene sénko merekinan kwawafél."
english: She came in immediately with haste to the king and requested, “ I want you to give me right now the head of John the Baptizer on a platter .”

nama: Yesuene muyafé ár nénangotaménd Yesuefaf, yémofem taufrotawét yáyot yéfene ásáfoghmén a watameghmén. 31 Wénde tárfár ár tanmorwén a tangmorwén Yesuefaf a yáne muyafé árfefaf yéfeyot ámb féneféne yau témorwén nénet. Féyo Yesum emndai, "Kuwanongém métar sifayat enaghét."
english: The apostles gathered themselves together to Jesus , and they told him all things , whatever they had done , and whatever they had taught .

nama: Séitefifiyan Yesuene waitogh ár enmormén yáfaf a yémndayénd, "Yéné sifayé siyém yauyau sifayé yém a séite té namndé. 36 Ewafarnai ár kaka méngotuot a witmé mband karéf áronjaghét yéfendio njamket."
english: When it was late in the day , his disciples came to him and said , “ This place is deserted , and it is late in the day .

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Fémofem tawaramangi némndafi nénet." Wénde yémofem yémotayénd Yesu, "Fém ménde ném yéndfem 10,000 kinaye yéfe njamke résaghét?"
english: But he answered them , “ You give them something to eat .” They asked him , “ Shall we go and buy two hundred denarii + 6:37 200 denarii was about 7 or 8 months wages for an agricultural laborer. worth of bread and give them something to eat ?”

nama: Féyo Yesum emotai, "Nderé tárfár njamke ewam? Tangém kénufénmangi." Fá nénangoyénd a yaufroyénd ndené, "Téfene em 5 féskaf flawé a sómbio wagif."
english: He said to them , “ How many loaves do you have ? Go see .” When they knew , they said , “ Five , and two fish .”

nama: Yesum emndai yánjo waitogh ár tekofnar uflighét bout kénjút a néngwanoyénd Betsaidat, njam ár mérén engwafarnai. 46 Soramé fá engéfrangoi, fá néngwanoi witmé karéf mband tunakfot Ngánjánafé orayéghét.
english: Immediately he made his disciples get into the boat and go ahead to the other side , to Bethsaida, while he himself sent the multitude away.

nama: Féyo Yesu boutot nuflai, mbormbor táf nékmboi. Fá minde sélngwél emormén. 52 Yémofem yau yáyámngoyénd Yesuene wafté 5,000 ár manjarghan ménamén yéfene tikéf mé táikér tamorwén. Yesum mer táyátotau enjne téfnár Ganasaretén
english: He got into the boat with them ; and the wind ceased , and they were very amazed among themselves , and marveled;

nama: Farasi ár a nák watamegh ár efe enmormén Jerusalemta Yesufé náumendayénd. 2 Yémofem ewinjoyénd ámb Yesuene waitogh ár ngángé umbarghofnar tamorwén néneyan.
english: Then the Pharisees and some of the scribes gathered together to him , having come from Jerusalem .

nama: Farasi ár a nák watamegh árém Yesu yémotayénd, "Némamén fene waitogh ár yau ndenáye emor téfene ákiafene watamegh ndernáye témorwén? Némamén yémofem njamke enetat yéfene ngángé umbarghofnar?"
english: The Pharisees and the scribes asked him , “ Why don’ t your disciples walk according to the tradition of the elders , but eat their bread with unwashed hands ?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Aisayane si efalo témorwén njam fá kafrotau féfenemén ndené fém efe farun mer néretati wénde kénjún yau. Ndenaye fété si kés yéfarotaménd, "Ngánján noraye, yéné árém wutémndat yénd mé mbérmbérero, wénde yéfene tikéf em nayu ta tambén.
english: He answered them , “ Well did Isaiah prophesy of you hypocrites , as it is written , ‘ This people honors me with their lips , but their heart is far from me .

nama: Yémofem wáwefnotat ta fifiofnar yéfene watamegh em ár wafroghmén."
english: They worship me in vain , teaching as doctrines the commandments of men.’ + 7:7 Isaiah 29:13

nama: Fémofem ekarotati Ngánjánene si wénde nawertati ár wafroghmén sian."
english: “ For you set aside the commandment of God , and hold tightly to the tradition of men — the washing of pitchers and cups, and you do many other such things .”

nama: Yesum emotai ár tárfár yáfafaftio a emndai, "Kénáyárangi tafaf, méinyotio mat kamndangi. 15-16\~ Fémon némé enete a kénjút yéngém, yémo yau mámáfi tiyátongé. Wénde némé kénjuta kéntorngé farut yémo mámáfi ár yiyátote."
english: He called all the multitude to himself and said to them , “Hear me , all of you , and understand .

nama: Wénde Yesu norayai, "Ambum fronde njamkeye témanjnangiǃ Yau mer nérete yéfene njamke ághafet manjarghét."
english: But Jesus said to her , “ Let the children be filled first , for it is not appropriate to take the children ’s bread and throw it to the dogs .”

nama: Amafom yawangoi, "Yuré, Ambumtértrafene njamke mbarmbar nénguitat, ágham enetat kitaré mbanmbanan."
english: But she answered him , “ Yes , Lord . Yet even the dogs under the table eat the children ’ s crumbs .”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Efalo yéné yémǃ Fém nguwano sénonjo. Yaufi mbérmbéram fene mérés té yéfrango."
english: He said to her , “ For this saying , go your way . The demon has gone out of your daughter .”

nama: Njam amaf néngangoi méngot, yémon yinjoi yámérés tékmangérwén yameyan, yaufi mbérmbér frangoghkaf témorwén. Yesum mer yiyátoi téngan méngu a babé ár
english: She went away to her house , and found the child having been laid on the bed , with the demon gone out .

nama: Yesum yéfrangoi Taire a néngwanoi Sidon a Dekafolis tesenamé nufaryéng Galili arakaffaf. 32 Ámb árém yénérsaménd yáfaf ár efe téngan méngu a babé témorwén. Yémofem yamnendayénd Yesu yanjaghétro.
english: Again he departed from the borders of Tyre and Sidon , and came to the sea of Galilee through the middle of the region of Decapolis .

nama: Soramé Yesum yéngutoryéng téndot ár mérénta, Yesum ngángé efayoi ároene ténganan. Ndenéyameyo mbérém efayoi ngángayan a yayanjai yáne kánké. 34 Fá néwewoi njafarot a kénjkam ghérghérsisafé yémndai, "Efataǃ" yáne fifi yém 'Kasawérǃ' 35 Táf fété ároene téngan nasawéryénd, a si mere néngufngoi.
english: He took him aside from the multitude privately and put his fingers into his ears ; and he spat and touched his tongue .

nama: Yesum ekmboi fá yau néngafrotati ámb árfefaf. Yémon mé takmbotau yau nafrotati némé yéndon tafrotan, wénde árém ménjtaye mé ngafrotawét yánemén. 37 Ár sélngwél emormén a fá norayayénd, "Yémon tafrote yéné ásáfogh merfifi. Yémon mer yiyáto téngan méngu a babé ár."
english: He commanded them that they should tell no one , but the more he commanded them , so much the more widely they proclaimed it .

nama: Yánjo waitogh árém yawangoyénd, "Wénde ánde yéné yauyau sifayan árké árom téu tanwawanangé féskaf flawé yéfe manjarghét?"
english: His disciples answered him , “ From where could one satisfy these people with bread here in a deserted place ?”

nama: Yesum emotayéng, "Njénamb féskaf flawé em féfefaf?" Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Sefenro"
english: He asked them , “ How many loaves do you have ?” They said , “ Seven .”

nama: Yáne waitogh ár engwawalindai féskaf flawé résaghét. Wénde ámbiro yéfefaf boutan taflangérwén. 15 Yesum tamndetau fá, "Kor aem Farasi árfene a Erodene flawé minaghmén."
english: They forgot to take bread; and they didn’ t have more than one loaf in the boat with them .

nama: Yémofem warunyéghét yiyátoyénd yénémamén yéfe kénjúnro fá norayayénd, "Ménamén yénd flawafnar yéném."
english: They reasoned with one another, saying , “ It ’ s because we have no bread.”

nama: "Yéndon njam sefen féskaf flawé etfotamén yéfe 4,000 árét, nderé tárfár yáf afoghare njamke mbarmbar ekafayénd fémofem?" Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Sefen."
english: “ When the seven loaves fed the four thousand , how many baskets full of broken pieces did you take up ?” They told him , “ Seven .”

nama: Fá norayai yéfefaf, "Némé féfene mwighé kwéfkwéfan mé ewam?" Yesum mer yiyátoi ghékéf kwéfkwéf ár Betsaidan
english: He asked them , “Don’t you understand yet ?”

nama: Fá enmormén kétán Betsaidat, a ámb árém yénémnjaménd ghékéf kwéfkwéf ár a Yesu yaunendayénd yá yanjaghét. 23 Yesum ngángayan yéngwerai a yéngémnjoi méngotu téndot. Njam yémon mbérme yéfarndai ároene ghékéf a Yesum táf ngángé efayoi yáfaf, a yémotai, "Fémo ámb rokar té efande?"
english: He came to Bethsaida. They brought a blind man to him and begged him to touch him .

nama: Fá tukét néwewoi a norayai, "Yéndo ár efandan wénnit narendat."
english: He looked up , and said , “ I see men , but I see them like walking trees .”

nama: Ámbirotaro Yesum wéi ngángé efayoi yéné ároene ghékfan. Féyo táf yáne ghékéf nasawéryénd a yáne erégh nawafarnjaméng, a méinyotio rokar kwayaghan tafandau. 26 Yesum yéngwáfáretai méngot a témndangé, "Yau méngotuot kufar." Fité norayai Yesu siyém Keriso
english: Then again he laid his hands on his eyes . He looked intently , and was restored, and saw everyone clearly .

nama: Yesu a yánjo waitogh ár néngwanoyénd tárfár méngotuamé yénamé Kaisaria Filifi yuwomé. Álighan Yesum engmotai yánjo waitogh ár, "Ár norayat yénd efe wém?"
english: Jesus went out , with his disciples , into the villages of Caesarea Philippi . On the way he asked his disciples , “ Who do men say that I am ?”

nama: Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Ámb norayat Jon walitogh ár, wéi ámb norayat Elaija, a mé ámb árém néngorayat, ndené ámb Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár."
english: They told him , “ John the Baptizer, and others say Elijah , but others , one of the prophets .”

nama: Yémon emotai, "Wénde fém wét ndernáye? Fém ndernáye norayati yénd efe wém?" Fitam yawangoi, "Fém fété ném Keriso."
english: He said to them , “ But who do you say that I am ?” Peter answered , “ You are the Christ .”

nama: Yesum ekmboi fá ende yau taufrongi efe yénd wém. Yesu korayau yánjo kérmén
english: He commanded them that they should tell no one about him .

nama: Wénde njam Yesu nawengoi efandai yánjo waitogh ár, yémon sotafé si Fité yémndai, "Sáifér! Kitrémb ta tambén. Fene mwighé yau em Ngánjáneta, wénde árta."
english: But he , turning around and seeing his disciples , rebuked Peter , and said , “ Get behind me , Satan ! For you have in mind not the things of God , but the things of men .”

nama: A yémon emndai fá, "Yéndon féfe efalo ewaufrotan, ámb ár efe yéna ewakai yémofem fronde so tinjongi Ngánján limánégh sái yéném ménáyafé waftafé soramé kér em." Yesu nafurnai
english: He said to them , “ Most certainly I tell you , there are some standing here who will in no way taste death until they see God ’s Kingdom come with power .”

nama: Siks efogh soramé Yesu Fité, Jems a Jon néwanoyénd mband tunakfot, ánde fáro méinyotio tamorwén. Kété fá nafurnai yéfene sáfrére. 3 Yáne sáláme nálálai kafe ngarot ánde yau so tinjo ndené kwayaghé yéné mbandan. 4 A kété nufareyayénd yéfe sáfrére Elaija a Moses fá korayawét Yesufé.
english: After six days Jesus took with him Peter , James , and John , and brought them up onto a high mountain privately by themselves , and he was changed into another form in front of them .

nama: Fité norayai Yesuefaf, "Watamegh ár, nderé mer yém téfeyot yéna sieném. Yéndfem so erametam nambio méngoméngo, feyot ámb, Elaijai ámb a Mosese ámb." 6 Fité mat yau náyátoi némé so korayangai, fá táf férfér témorwén.
english: Peter answered Jesus , “ Rabbi , it is good for us to be here . Let ’s make three tents : one for you , one for Moses , and one for Elijah .”

nama: Féyo yéné soramé njafar kwamkwamam ewafaryéng fá, a kém yénmormén njafar kwamkwamta. "Yéné siyém tane ambum efe yéndon yuwetan. Káyárangi yáfafǃ"
english: A cloud came , overshadowing them , and a voice came out of the cloud , “ This is my beloved Son . Listen to him .”

nama: Tekofnaye fá njam néngretayénd yémofem efe ámb yau yinjoyénd mé Yesuro.
english: Suddenly looking around , they saw no one with them any more , except Jesus only .

nama: Njamandio fá kénewonawét mband tunakéfta yuwot, Yesum ekmboi ende yau táf taufrongi némé fémofem té téfandati kétánotio Ároene Ambum kérta kanongé. 10 Yémofem tarambnotawét yam yéfenjo kénjúnro taruindawét némé 'kérta anoghmén' fifi témorwén.
english: As they were coming down from the mountain , he commanded them that they should tell no one what things they had seen , until after the Son of Man had risen from the dead .

nama: A yémofem yémotayénd fá, "Némamén nák watamegh árém norayat ndené, 'Elaija so yéném fronde soramé Keriso?'"
english: They asked him , saying , “ Why do the scribes say that Elijah must come first ?”

nama: Njam Yesu a yánjo nambio waitogh árfé kénewonawét, yémofem ewinjoyénd ár mérén yáne waitogh ár ewarendayénd a kété nák watamegh árfé kéwitawét sian. 15 Tekofnaye njam méinyotio árém yinjoyénd Yesu, fá ndimbal kéráye sélngwél emormén yénémamén wérseye yanfetayénd fá áuwéghafé.
english: Coming to the disciples , he saw a great multitude around them , and scribes questioning them .

nama: Yémon emotai, "Némamén fém néwitati yémafé?"
english: He asked the scribes, “ What are you asking them ?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "O efalo yátoghofnar ár mérén, nderé teke yénd so wémor féfefaf? Nderé teke yénd so métar wém féfefaf? Ténmanend ghakér ambum tafaf."
english: He answered him , “Unbelieving generation , how long shall I be with you ? How long shall I bear with you ? Bring him to me .”

nama: Féyo yémofem yénmanayénd ambum yáfaf. Njam yaufi mbérmbéram yinjoi Yesu, táf fété ambumom sorar tatirnau. Fá yéntarmai mbandot, kaumnau, féfam tetotau.
english: They brought him to him , and when he saw him , immediately the spirit convulsed him and he fell on the ground , wallowing and foaming at the mouth.

nama: Yesum yárefé yémotai, "Nderé teke fá tém ndené siyém?" Yémon yawangoi, "Kétándmayo fá tosé. 22 Tárfár mbinotmé yéta yaufi mbérmbéram ngiot térametau fá fését unamngoghét a nuwan walitoghét. Njam téu yénmáutána fene ghérghérsisaye."
english: He asked his father , “ How long has it been since this has been happening to him ?” He said , “ From childhood .

nama: Yesu norayai, "Némamén ndené noraye, njam téu yénmáutána? Méinyotio yam áfrátro em yáyot emo efalo yiyátota."
english: Jesus said to him , “ If you can believe , all things are possible to him who believes .”

nama: Tekofnaye yéné ambumoe yárefam nuwangoi, "Yéndon efalo yiyátotan. Ta kwáutána ménát so yéndon efalo yiyátotan minde."
english: Immediately the father of the child cried out with tears, “ I believe . Help my unbelief!”

nama: Yesum njam ewinjoi ár mérén kénérsawét kaka, yémon yémndai yaufi mbérmbér. Fá norayai, "Fém téngan déudéu a babé mbérmbér, yéndon némndetan, kéntor yá tambén a yau kélau wéikor yáfaf."
english: When Jesus saw that a multitude came running together , he rebuked the unclean spirit , saying to him , “ You mute and deaf spirit , I command you , come out of him , and never enter him again !”

nama: Yaufi mbérmbér nutnayéng yaufi keyafé ambum yétarmai mbandot a nétoryéng. Ambum ndenanit néretai kar kér yémormén tárfár ár norayayénd, "Fá kér té tém." 27 Wénde Yesum yéngwerai ngángaye a yéngwakayoyéng.
english: After crying out and convulsing him greatly , it came out of him . The boy became like one dead , so much that most of them said , “ He is dead .”

nama: Soramé Yesu nénglawai, yánjo waitogh árém yémotayénd fá kwankwane, "Némamén yénd féyotarofnar ténmorwén yéné yaufi mbérmbér wifarghét?"
english: When he had come into the house , his disciples asked him privately , “ Why couldn’ t we cast it out ?”

nama: Yémon ewawangoi, "Némaye ámb yau mé Ngánjánafé oraighanro yaufi mbérmbér so ewifnati." Yesum wéikor korayau yánjo kérmén
english: He said to them , “ This kind can come out by nothing but by prayer and fasting.”

nama: Fá engmormén kétán Káfenamét. Fá njam méngo kénjún télawangérwén, yémon emotai fá, "Némamén fém nénwitati endmé?" 34 Wénde fá métar nékmboyénd ménamén álighan fá kéwitawét efe ndimbal so kamndangé.
english: He came to Capernaum , and when he was in the house he asked them , “ What were you arguing among yourselves on the way ?”

nama: Yesu námnjo a emotai 12 waitogh ár a tamndangé, "Njam ámb ár ménde yém frondeyot, fá táf némbnar kamndangé méinyotio árfene ásáfoghét."
english: He sat down and called the twelve ; and he said to them , “ If any man wants to be first , he shall be last of all , and servant of all .”

nama: Yémon yénémnjoi némbne ambum tosé yakayoi yéfe kénjún. A tambnangé a korayangé yéfefaf, 37 "Emon tumyongé ndené ambum tosé tane yétkwénan ndenéyameyo yénd kwumyongé, a emo yénd kwumyongé yau yénd kwumyongé wénde fá emo yénd kwémáfárete." Emofé yénd yau néuwitam fá sem téfene
english: He took a little child and set him in the middle of them . Taking him in his arms , he said to them ,

nama: Jon norayai, "Watamegh ár, yéndfem yinjoyém ámb ár tawifnau yaufi mbérmbér fene yétkwénan, féyo yémndayém, 'Fém kékmbo,' ménamén fém yau téfene mérénmén ár ném."
english: John said to him , “ Teacher , we saw someone who doesn’ t follow us casting out demons in your name ; and we forbade him , because he doesn’ t follow us .”

nama: "Emo njam yéméinda totér ambum yaufiot, nderé mer yém kéman ndimbal wím sái yumbetat a yitat árakafot. Yáne fai siyém némbnar. Wénde Ngánjánam sái taramangé yéné ároe minde ndimbal. 43-44\~ Fene ngángayam njam néméinda fém yaufiot, yéné ngángé téngnéf. Njam ámbiro ngángafé nguwano njafar méngotuot, yéné siyém mer. Wénde sómbio ngángafé njam nguwano ambino tuot fését ánde yau so kékmbongé, yéné siyém mámáfi. 45-46\~
english: “ Whoever will cause one of these little ones who believe in me to stumble , it would be better for him if he were thrown into the sea with a millstone hung around his neck .

nama: Njam fene ghékfam néméinda fém yaufiot, tutor yéné. Njam ámbiro ghékfafé nguwano Ngánjánene limánéghét, yéné siyém mer. Wénde sómbio ghékfafé njam nguwano ambino tuot fését, yéné siyém mámáfi. 48 Ánde 'Yéfene sésfél yau so kér em, a fés yau so kékmbongé.'
english: If your eye causes you to stumble , throw it out . It is better for you to enter into God ’ s Kingdom with one eye , rather than having two eyes to be cast into the Gehenna of fire,

nama: Méinyotio ár so njúnnjúnofnar eyátote fésam ndené fété solam ghéngén njúnnjúnofnar tiyátongé.
english: For everyone will be salted with fire , and every sacrifice will be seasoned with salt.

nama: Sol siyém mer, wénde yáne ménde njam kefongé, ndernáye fémon so yafarnje wéikor ndené méndetio? Yau, fém solnit aném, a mer métar ghérsé ámb árfé emor."
english: Salt is good , but if the salt has lost its saltiness, with what will you season it ? Have salt in yourselves , and be at peace with one another .”

nama: Féyo Yesum yéfrangoi yéné yu néngwanoi Judiat a néngférmai Joden wanje. Wéikor ár mérén enmormén kétán yáfaf, túmén yam áumengéghan, yémon tawatametau fá.
english: He arose from there and came into the borders of Judea and beyond the Jordan . Multitudes came together to him again . As he usually did , he was again teaching them .

nama: Ámb Farasi ár enmormén tufotawét ménaye ámoghe, "Féyotaro yém nákan árém so tatembangé yánjo amaf?
english: Pharisees came to him testing him , and asked him , “ Is it lawful for a man to divorce his wife ?”

nama: Yémon ewawangoi, "Ndernáye Mosesém tamndetau?"
english: He answered , “ What did Moses command you ?”

nama: Yémofem yémndayénd, "Mosesém ár tamndangai watembégh férén faroghét a amaf táf tangwatembangayénd watembégh férnafé."
english: They said , “ Moses allowed a certificate of divorce to be written , and to divorce her .”

nama: Fá njam méngo kénjún tamorwén wéikor, yáne waitogh árém yémotayénd Yesu yénémamén. 11 Yémon ewawangoi, "Árké árom yánjo amaf tatembangé a kawerangé ámb mérés amafanyo nák erafne yáne amafoefaf. 12 A njam amafom yánjar tatembangé a kawerangé ámb ár yémon amafanyo nák erafne." Ambum tértér a Yesu
english: In the house , his disciples asked him again about the same matter.

nama: Njamandio Yesu álighét nufngoi, ár nénenngoi yáfaf a budme niyai yá sáfrére. Yémon yémotai, "Mer watamegh ár, yéndon némé so yafrotan tuot ghérsé résaghét?"
english: As he was going out into the way , one ran to him , knelt before him , and asked him , “ Good Teacher , what shall I do that I may inherit eternal life ?”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Némamén fémon wémnde ndené mer? Yau efe mer yém, mé Ngánjánro fáro. 19 Fém mat ném náknák, 'Ár ngi yau, amafanyo wanégh yau, oro yau, unyégh si yau ewaufrota, wasogh yau, eutémanwé fene fetmé a ferafé.'"
english: Jesus said to him , “ Why do you call me good ? No one is good except one — God .

nama: Yémon témndangé, "Watamegh ár, yéné nák méinyotio yéndon taweretan kétándmayo yénd tosé kwémorwén."
english: He said to him , “ Teacher , I have observed all these things from my youth .”

nama: Yesum yéfandai áuwéghafé fá, a témndangé, "Ámbiro yam fefaf náláite, kuwano, etérna fene méinyotio rokar némé em a engwarameta méinyotio mani yauyau árét, a fene ngonjél so nawamndat njafaran. Féyo kénaf, yénd kwénmaito."
english: Jesus looking at him loved him , and said to him , “ One thing you lack . Go , sell whatever you have and give to the poor , and you will have treasure in heaven ; and come , follow me , taking up the cross.”

nama: Táf fété ár ghérghérsisafé nuwanoi, ménamén ndimbal wemár témorwén.
english: But his face fell at that saying , and he went away sorrowful , for he was one who had great possessions .

nama: Yesu néngretai a tamndangé yánjo waitogh ár, "Nderé táikér yém wemár ároe kétán élaughét Ngánján limánéghétǃ"
english: Jesus looked around and said to his disciples , “ How difficult it is for those who have riches to enter into God ’ s Kingdom!”

nama: Waitogh ár sélngwél emormén yáne sian. Wénde Yesum tamndangé kor, "Ambum, nderé táikér so yém kétán Ngánján limánégh élaughét. 25 Kértayafé yém kemoloe wét féneyan élaughét, wénde wemár ároe kérté yamam kétán élaughét Ngánján limánéghét so yáinde yéné!"
english: The disciples were amazed at his words . But Jesus answered again , “ Children , how hard it is for those who trust in riches to enter into God ’s Kingdom!

nama: Waitogh ár minde sélngwél emormén a norayayénd yéfe kénjúnro, "Efe so féyotaro ngunjarngé?"
english: They were exceedingly astonished , saying to him , “ Then who can be saved ?”

nama: Yesum engfandayéng fá a norayai, "Yéné siyém ároe féyotarofnar yém, wénde yau Ngánjáne, méinyotio féyotaro em Ngánjáneyot.
english: Jesus , looking at them , said , “ With men it is impossible , but not with God , for all things are possible with God .”

nama: Fitam témndangé, "Yéndfem rokar méinyotio té tanéurotam a nénmaitongém fémǃ"
english: Peter began to tell him , “ Behold , we have left all and have followed you .”

nama: Féyo Jems a Jon, Jefediene ambum engérmén kétán yáfaf. Yémofem yamnendangeyayénd, "Watamegh ár, yénd ménde yénre fémon so yénmawafrowé téfe némat njam fém kémamnendangem."
english: James and John , the sons of Zebedee , came near to him , saying , “ Teacher , we want you to do for us whatever we will ask .”

nama: Yesum emotangeyai, "Némé wafroghét fém ménde ere tafaf yéndon sái ewawafrowan féfe?"
english: He said to them , “ What do you want me to do for you ?”

nama: Yémofem yawangeyayénd, "So fémon féyotaro ténmumye yénd fene tambénta a ámb fatrata ámnjoghét táf fém njam kámnjo fene ndimbal kwayaghé kitarayan."
english: They said to him , “ Grant to us that we may sit , one at your right hand and one at your left hand , in your glory .”

nama: Yesum emndeyai, "Fém yau mat ere némamén fém namot, fém féyotaro ere ghafté kafusi nu nénet yéndon árkéméné so yénetan? O fém so ewalitot ndenáye yénd sái walitotat?"
english: But Jesus said to them , “ You don’ t know what you are asking . Are you able to drink the cup that I drink , and to be baptized with the baptism that I am baptized with ?”

nama: Wénde kétán ámnjoghét tane tambénta a fatrata yénd waftafnar wém raméghét. Ngánjánro yém emo so tawaramangé yéné sifayé yéfeyot efe yémon té efrendaméng."
english: but to sit at my right hand and at my left hand is not mine to give , but for whom it has been prepared .”

nama: Tárfár árém tusérmbotawét, "Métar!" Wénde fá mé minde tukén kutnau, "Deifidene ambum, ghérghérsisé kawer tafaf!"
english: Many rebuked him , that he should be quiet , but he cried out much more , “ You son of David , have mercy on me !”

nama: Yesu nékmboi áligh a korayangé, "Téngmotangend."
english: Jesus stood still and said , “ Call him .” They called the blind man , saying to him , “Cheer up ! Get up . He is calling you !”

nama: Yémon yánjo awafarégh sáláme yéngwitam téndot, fá natnam a néwanoi Yesufaf,
english: He , casting away his cloak , sprang up , and came to Jesus .

nama: Yesum yémotayéng, "Némé ménde ném yéndon sái némawafrotan?" Ghékéf kwéfkwéf árom yémndai, "Watamegh ár, yénd ménde wém sái kéretangen."
english: Jesus asked him , “ What do you want me to do for you ?” The blind man said to him , “ Rabboni , + 10:51 Rabboni is a transliteration of the Hebrew word for “great teacher.” that I may see again .”

nama: Yesum yémndayéng, "Nguwano, fenjo ndimbal mwighayam mer té niyáto fém." Táf fété néretai a yéngwaitoi Yesu endmé.
english: Jesus said to him , “ Go your way . Your faith has made you well .” Immediately he received his sight and followed Jesus on the way .

nama: "Téfene áki Deifidene méngotu yéném, frengéghkaf yém!" "Áuwégh minde tukén!"
english: Blessed is the kingdom of our father David that is coming in the name of the Lord ! Hosanna in the highest !”

nama: Yesu nénglawai Jerusalemét a néngwanoyéng kétán wáwefnogh méngot. Fá néngretai méinyotio rokarfaf, wénde táf tamorwén efogh nawaindai, fá néngwanoi kétán Betanit 12 waitogh árfé. Fig wén
english: Jesus entered into the temple in Jerusalem . When he had looked around at everything , it being now evening , he went out to Bethany with the twelve .

nama: Ghéngén wárogh sénko téfnár a nák watamegh ár náyárayénd yénémamén end ronjagh ewafngoyénd Yesue ngiot. Ghéngén wárogh sénko téfnár a nák watamegh ár férfér nufngoyénd Yesuenemén, ménamén méinyotio ár mérén tamorwén sélngwél yáne watameghan.
english: The chief priests and the scribes heard it , and sought how they might destroy him . For they feared him , because all the multitude was astonished at his teaching .

nama: Njam férégh yénmafngoi Yesu a yáne waitogh ár néngwanoyénd tesenot. Watameghyam fig wénmén
english: When evening came , he went out of the city .

nama: Tándái akwan táf fá néngwanoyénd endmé tangmorwéng, yémofem yinjoyénd fig wén uruyaghare kétándmayo tuk a sérémb. 21 Fité táf nawafarotayéng a norayai Yesuefaf, "Watamegh ár, kéreta! Yéné fig wén fémon siyafalngoi té kér tém!"
english: As they passed by in the morning , they saw the fig tree withered away from the roots .

nama: Fá nénufaryénd wéikor Jerusalem kénjút, a njamandio Yesu karendau wáwefnogh méngo sifayamé, ghéngén wárogh sénko ár, nák watamegh ár a limánégh ár nénufaryénd yáfaf. 28 Fá namotayénd, "Endene yétkwénan fémon tawifne mani térarégh ár wáwefnogh méngota? Emo fe yéné si muyé némaram?"
english: They came again to Jerusalem , and as he was walking in the temple , the chief priests, the scribes , and the elders came to him ,

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Yéndon fém so tamotangén ámbiro ámogh si. Kwawangongi ta, a yéndon so tawaufron féfe némé si muyayan yéndon yéné yam ewaufrotan. 30 Jonene walitogh árkamé yénmormén njafarta o árta? Ta kwaufrongi!"
english: Jesus said to them , “ I will ask you one question . Answer me , and I will tell you by what authority I do these things .

nama: Féyo yémofem yawangoyénd Yesue, "Yénd mafina yéném." Yesu norayai, "Yéndon yau so tawaufron némé si muyayan yéndon ewafrotan yéné yam."
english: They answered Jesus , “ We don’ t know .” Jesus said to them , “ Neither will I tell you by what authority I do these things .”

nama: 'Yémon yéfrangoi ámbiro watembghét, ambum efe yémon minde tuwetau. Soraméfifi yémon fá yáfáretam yéné siafé, 'Yémofem so yutémndat tane ambum.'
english: Therefore still having one , his beloved son , he sent him last to them , saying , ‘ They will respect my son .’

nama: Wénde ndau téfnár norayayénd kété yéfe kénjúnro, 'Yéné siyém yárefane sifayé résagh ár ambum. Kénaflangi so yésmetam krotio ménát yéné ndau so kamndangé téfene.' 8 Féyo yémofem yerayénd a yésmetaménd krotio a yitaménd géreif mbwe ménj ndau tambén.
english: But those farmers said among themselves , ‘ This is the heir . Come , let ’s kill him , and the inheritance will be ours .’

nama: Némé so wét géreif mbwe ménj ndau yuram yafrote? Fá so kénwanongé a esmeta yéné ndau téfnár a géreif mbwe ménj ndau so tawaramangé ámb árfeyot. 10 Té fémofem yéné Buk si yaftaménd nde, "Sérasér yékenayénd méngo ramégh árém soramé namndayéng néndkéf sérasér.
english: What therefore will the lord of the vineyard do ? He will come and destroy the farmers, and will give the vineyard to others .

nama: Yuram yéné yafrotaméng, merfifi téfene ghékfan?""
english: This was from the Lord . It is marvelous in our eyes ’?” + 12:11 Psalms 118:22-23

nama: Féyo Ju sénko téfnáram end taronjawét yá werghét, ménamén fá mat náyátoyénd fá korayau yéné rengerengeye yéfenemén. Wénde fá férféram tafindau ár mérénafenemén. Féyo yénémamén yémofem yéfrangoyénd a néngwanoyénd. Mani kémégh kétán Kaisare
english: They tried to seize him , but they feared the multitude ; for they perceived that he spoke the parable against them . They left him and went away.

nama: Yémofem yénmawanayénd mani mbwe a yémon emotayéng fá, "Endene sáf yéné yém? A endene yétkwén yém?" Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Kaisarene."
english: They brought it . He said to them , “ Whose is this image and inscription ?” They said to him , “ Caesar ’s.”

nama: Féyo Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Kaisare taramangi némé yáne yém a Ngánjáne taramangi némé yáne yém." A fá emormén sélngwél yánemén. Awerégh kérta anoghan
english: Jesus answered them , “ Give to Caesar the things that are Caesar ’s, and to God the things that are God ’s.” They marveled greatly at him .

nama: Ámb nák watamegh ár yénmormén áyárghét fá warunyéghan tamorwén. Ndené kémnawét nde Yesum mer wawangogh kar so tawaramangai yéfe, yémon yémotai Yesu, "Árké Mosesene nák minde ndimbalfifi em?"
english: One of the scribes came and heard them questioning together , and knowing that he had answered them well , asked him , “ Which commandment is the greatest of all ?”

nama: Njam Yesum téfandawang ndené yémon kwayaghaye tawawangotawéng merkéráye, fá norayai yáfaf, "Fém sném yau nayu ném kétándmé Ngánjánene limánéghta." Yéné soramé emo yau ámogh si yaramai férfér tamorwén. Endene ákimén Keriso Ngánjánene uyafoghmén ár yém
english: When Jesus saw that he answered wisely, he said to him , “ You are not far from God ’s Kingdom.” No one dared ask him any question after that .

nama: Deifidém njam yémndeta Keriso yáne Yuré, ndernáye so Keriso yém yáne ambum? Ndimbal mérén náyáretaménd yáfaf méndefé. Yesum mat táyátotau ár nák watamegh árfenemén
english: Therefore David himself calls him Lord , so how can he be his son ?” The common people heard him gladly .

nama: Yesu námnjoi kaka sifayan ánde ramégh rokar takmetawét Ngánjáneyot a tafandau ár mérnam tawitawét yéfenjo mani kémégh téruot. Tárfár wemár árém takmetawét ndimbal mani yétkwén. 42 Wénde yauyau kwiré yénmormén ekmeyai sómbio mani mbwero.
english: Jesus sat down opposite the treasury and saw how the multitude cast money into the treasury . Many who were rich cast in much .

nama: Njamandio Yesum yéfrangoi wáwefnogh méngo, ámb yáne waitogh árom norayai, "Watamegh ár, Kéreta! Némé ndimbal wíman méngo etnong!"
english: As he went out of the temple , one of his disciples said to him , “ Teacher , see what kind of stones and what kind of buildings !”

nama: Yesum yawangoyéng, "Té fémon téfande yéné ndimbal méngo? Yau so ámb wím efai ámb wíman, méinyotio so nironat."
english: Jesus said to him , “ Do you see these great buildings ? There will not be left here one stone on another , which will not be thrown down .”

nama: Njam Yesu témorwén Olif Mband tunakfan witmé karéf kété wáwefnogh méngota, Fité, Jems, Jon a Endru yémotayénd, 4 "Ténmaufro njam yéné yam so ufroghan em wáwefnogh méngofaf? A némé yamam so ténmaufrongé ndené kaka méinyotio ufroghétro em?"
english: As he sat on the Mount of Olives opposite the temple , Peter , James , John , and Andrew asked him privately ,

nama: Yanafem sén so yangnof taramangi krot, a yéferafafem sén so yéfe ambumof taramangi. Ambum so kénawengongi yéferafafefaf ménát krot so tákmangi. 13 Méinyotio árém so méndméndafé néfandat ménamén tanemén, wénde fá efe taikrataye yakai kétánotio yatoghfaf fá so kawanjarngé.
english: “Brother will deliver up brother to death , and the father his child . Children will rise up against parents and cause them to be put to death .

nama: Wénde tékrat kwéf soramé efghon, 'Efogh so yém kwéfkwéf, a ghéraream yau so yéramete kwayaghé,
english: But in those days , after that oppression, the sun will be darkened , the moon will not give its light ,

nama: kénd so nénatarnat kétándmé njafarta, a njafar fifi so nasámbnetat.'
english: the stars will be falling from the sky , and the powers that are in the heavens will be shaken .

nama: Yénémaménnde kor aem ghékéf sénté ménamén fém mafina em njam méngo yuré so nénangote féréghan, sémbár néndkéfan o njam ghakér kowi kutnangé, o akwan. 36 Fá njam kufarngé sélngwéle, yau táf kéminjongé kémghan. 37 Némé yénd norayan féfefaf, yénd norayan méinyotio árfefaf: Kor aem ghékéf sénté!"
english: Watch therefore , for you don’ t know when the lord of the house is coming — whether at evening , or at midnight , or when the rooster crows, or in the morning ;

nama: Ju árfene waingégh a minaghofnar flawé témndot sómbio efoghro néngafrangeyayénd. Ghéngén wárogh sénko ár a nák watamegh árém mwighé téronjawét Yesue ngiot. 2 Fá korayangi, "Yau téménd kénjún so terangém ménamén ár mété náumendat a nékw em téfefaf."
english: It was now two days before the Passover and the Feast of Unleavened Bread, and the chief priests and the scribes sought how they might seize him by deception and kill him .

nama: Njamandio fá témorangérwén Betanin, Yesum njamke tánetau Saimonene méngon efe yaufi ghéngan enjnefé témorwén. Amafom yénérsam a yétiaryéng minde tukén manimén wékwér ndarambafé Yesu yasuryéng sénkoyan.
english: While he was at Bethany, in the house of Simon the leper , as he sat at the table, a woman came having an alabaster jar of ointment of pure nard — very costly . She broke the jar and poured it over his head .

nama: Ámb ár káwatarnawét yéfenjo kénjúnro, "Némamén yéné amafom minde tukén manimén wékwér taghne? 5 Yémon miya 10,000 kinat tétérnangai a tawaramangai yauyau árétǃ" Yémofem yarnayénd amaf.
english: But there were some who were indignant among themselves , saying, “ Why has this ointment been wasted?

nama: Judas Iskariot, ámb témorwén Yesuene 12 waitogh ár, fá nuwanoi limánégh ghéngén wárogh árfefaf si frengéghét Yesue sénot. 11 Fá náuwetaménd yéné sian a yémofem efalo yiyátoyénd mani ramghét Judase. Féyo Judasém end táronjau Yesue ramghét. Yesuene ambinomén njamke
english: Judas Iscariot , who was one of the twelve , went away to the chief priests, that he might deliver him to them .

nama: Fronde efghon Minaghofnar flawé téméndmén, árké efghon túmén tásmétawét Waingégh sif tosé. Yesuene waitogh árém yémotayénd, "Yesu, ándan fene ménde yém yéndfem sái yéfrendam feyot Waingégh téménd njamke?"
english: On the first day of unleavened bread, when they sacrificed the Passover , his disciples asked him , “ Where do you want us to go and prepare that you may eat the Passover ?”

nama: Fá néwaneyayénd rokar ewinjeyayénd ndenáye fété Yesum ndernáye tamndéwéng. Féyo yémofem yéfrengménd Waingégh njamke.
english: His disciples went out , and came into the city , and found things as he had said to them , and they prepared the Passover .

nama: Férégh njam namndai, Yesuf nufaryénd yánjo 12 árfé. 18 Njam yémofem njamke tánetawét, Yesum emndai, "Yéndon efalo emndetan, ámbiro ár yéna yém emo so sén wéramete yénd, yéné ár emafé yéndfé enwam njamke."
english: When it was evening he came with the twelve .

nama: Yéné siam eméindai waitogh ár mámé mwighat a fénatayero kawafenawét Yesuefaf, "Yénd yau?"
english: They began to be sorrowful , and to ask him one by one , “ Surely not I ?” And another said , “ Surely not I ?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Yéna fété yém ámb 12 ármén emafé yéndfé enwam ámbiro merekinan. 21 Ároene Ambum kér so yém ndernáye yéfrotaménd Buk si yánemén. Wénde nderé mámáfi yém yéné ároe emo sén yéramete. Mer so témorwén fá yau fiya káráftau."
english: He answered them , “ It is one of the twelve , he who dips with me in the dish.

nama: Njamandio yémofem tánetawét, Yesum féskaf flawé yérai, kánjo si yaramai Ngánjáne a tawatfotau, a waitogh árfét tawarametau a norayai, "Ténetangi, yéné siyém tane fifi."
english: As they were eating , Jesus took bread, and when he had blessed it , he broke it and gave to them , and said , “ Take , eat . This is my body .”

nama: Féyo yémon yérai kafusi, kánjo si yaramai Ngánjáne a ewaramai yéfe a méinyotio árém nu enetaménd.
english: He took the cup , and when he had given thanks , he gave to them . They all drank of it .

nama: Yesum emndai, "Yéné siyém tane férék árké nertam tárfár árét. Ngánjánam si yéfrendai a yétetai tane férke. 25 Yéndon efalo emndetan fém, yéndon yaufifi so enetan yéné wéri nu kétánotio efogh kawerangé táf yéndon so ténetangén totér wéri nu Ngánjánene limánéghan."
english: He said to them , “ This is my blood of the new covenant , which is poured out for many .

nama: Táf yémofem Ngánjáneyot wagh eufaryénd a nuwanoyénd Olif Mband tunakfot. Yesu norayai Fitane kenaghmén
english: When they had sung a hymn , they went out to the Mount of Olives .

nama: Yesum emndai yánjo waitogh ár, "Méinyotio fém so kengongi a kwéfrangongi yéndro. Buk siam noraye, "Yéndon so tésmangén wanjengégh ár, táf sif so kófárnangi.' 28 Wénde yéné soramé yénd njam kanongén, yénd féfe frondeta so wéngém Galili yuwot."
english: Jesus said to them , “ All of you will be made to stumble because of me tonight, for it is written , ‘ I will strike the shepherd , and the sheep will be scattered .’

nama: Fité norayai, "Ámb árém njam fém kénéfrangongi, yéndon yaufifi so kénéfrangonǃ"
english: But Peter said to him , “ Although all will be offended , yet I will not .”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Yéndon efalo némndetan, sénonjo sémbáran, fém so koraya nambinotmé, 'Yénd mafina wém fá,' soramé ghakér kowi kutnangé sómbinotma."
english: Jesus said to him , “Most certainly I tell you that you today , even this night , before the rooster crows twice , you will deny me three times .”

nama: Wénde Fitam mé ménjtaye korayau, "Yénd fémafé kér so yénre, yéndon yau so korayangén, Yénd mafina wém fémǃ" Ámb árém ndené sáfotio si korayawét. Yesu oraighan Getsemanin
english: But he spoke all the more , “ If I must die with you , I will not deny you .” They all said the same thing .

nama: Yesu néngwanoi nayuofnar, fá budme niyai mbandan Ngánjánafé koraiwét. 36 Fá Ngánjánafé koraiwét, "Afé, Afé! Méinyotio yam feyot sem áfrat. Téfnár yéné tékrát tafafta. Wénde tane ménde yau, wénde fene ménde so nufrote."
english: He went forward a little , and fell on the ground , and prayed that if it were possible , the hour might pass away from him .

nama: Yesu nénangotam yánjo waitogh árfefaf a ewinjoi fá kémghan. Yesum yémndai Fité, "Saimon, némamén fém kémégh nékém? Némamén fém yau nérete ámbiro efoghféneféne yéndfé? 38 Kanongi a Ngánjánafé norayati ménát fém yau so ufogham tautfongé. Mbérmbér ménde yém meryam wafroghét, wénde fifi siyém njangén."
english: He came and found them sleeping , and said to Peter , “ Simon , are you sleeping ? Couldn’ t you watch one hour ?

nama: Ámbirotaro fá néngaflai Ngánjánafé oraighét yéné siyo tafértau. 40 Wénde njam Yesu kénangotau, yémon wéikor ewinjoi kémghan ménamén ghékéf tamorwén kérté. Fá yau mat tamorwén némé si so tawangongayénd yáyot.
english: Again he went away and prayed , saying the same words .

nama: Njam Yesu nambinotma nénangotam, yémon emndai, "Némé fém mé kémégh ekém a nenati? Féyo tamǃ Efogh té nawer. Kéretangi, Ároene Ambum yaufi árfene ngángat raméghét yafngong. 42 Kokayongiǃ Mato kuwanongémǃ Kéretangi tane sén téfnár snufaneǃ" Yesu yerayénd
english: He came the third time and said to them , “ Sleep on now , and take your rest. It is enough. The hour has come . Behold , the Son of Man is betrayed into the hands of sinners.

nama: Yesu norayai ár mérnafefaf, "Némé yénd ámb féfene oro téfnár wém, árkémamén fém taném náifafé a timafé? 49 Méinyotio efghon yénd fémafé ténmorwén wáwefnogh méngon, fémofem yénd yau wérayénd. Wénde Buk si efalo náyáto." 50 Méinyotio Yesuene waitogh árém yéfrangoyénd a néngoyénd.
english: Jesus answered them , “ Have you come out , as against a robber , with swords and clubs to seize me ?

nama: Ámb totér ár kété témorwén emo Yesu táitotau tawongérwén sáláme. Njam totér ár yerayénd sálámeyan, 52 sálámero teretawét fá firo nengoi. Yesu yénémnjoyénd ndimbal árfene sáfrére
english: A certain young man followed him , having a linen cloth thrown around himself over his naked body. The young men grabbed him ,

nama: Limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a méinyotio Ju sénko árfene áumengégh ár yéta táronjawét ménát Yesum némé yaufi tawafrotau yémofem krot sái tékmangayénd. Wénde efe yau ár yinjoyénd. 56 Tárfár ár enmormén a nufroyénd unyégh si yánemén. Wénde yéfene afrogh si efalo yau yiyátoyénd.
english: Now the chief priests and the whole council sought witnesses against Jesus to put him to death , and found none .

nama: Féyo ámb ár kokayongi a yéné unyégh si norayayénd, 58 "Yéndfem fété yiyáráyém fá korayau yéné sian, 'Yéndon so yironan yéné ár ngángé raméghmén wáwefnogh méngo a nambio efogh soramé yéndon so yérametan ámb, yau so yém ár ngángé raméghmén.'" 59 Wénde yéfene afrogh si efalo yau yiyátoyénd.
english: Some stood up and gave false testimony against him , saying ,

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "A, yénd fété wém, tekofnaye fémofem so tinjongi ámnjoghan Ároene Ambum yénd Ngánján wafté tambén ngángata, a so wéném njafar kwamkwam kénjún."
english: Jesus said , “ I am . You will see the Son of Man sitting at the right hand of Power , and coming with the clouds of the sky .”

nama: Ghéngén wárogh sénko árom yétiraryéng yánjo sáláme ménamén fá nékw nawerai a norayai, "Yénd méndefnar yéném ámb ghékéf fayogh ár. 64 Fémofem té yiyárangi yémon Ngánjánene sifayé résaghét yafngo! Fém ndernáye nemnati?"
english: The high priest tore his clothes and said , “ What further need have we of witnesses ?

nama: Ámb árém Yesu mbérme farángégh yafngoyénd. Yémofem ghékéf yawamoyénd, yesmayénd sáfan a témndetawét, "Emon nésém fém? Korayaǃ" Ámb wanjengégh árém yéngwasroi Yesu ngiot. Fitam yékenayéng Yesu
english: Some began to spit on him , and to cover his face , and to beat him with fists , and to tell him , “ Prophesy !” The officers struck him with the palms of their hands .

nama: Njamandio Fité mé témorwén méngo sáfan, limánégh ghéngén wárogh ároene ásáfogh mérés yénmormén kétán. 67 Njam yémon yinjoi Fité fésén kafalau, kor téfandau merkéráye, "Fém ámb yéné kénmorwén Yesufé Najaretménǃ"
english: As Peter was in the courtyard below , one of the maids of the high priest came ,

nama: Wénde Fitam yanyotayéng a yémndai, "Yénd mafina wém némamén fém noraye," a fá néngaflai méngo sáf sésafneta.
english: But he denied it , saying , “ I neither know nor understand what you are saying .” He went out on the porch , and the rooster crowed .

nama: Njam ásáfogh mérsom kété yinjoi, yémon emndai kor efe tawakayongérwén, "Yéné ár ámb fiyémǃ" 70 Wéikor Fitam yányotayéng. Tekofnaye efe tawakayongérwén kaka Fitafé yémndayénd Fité, "Fém ámb fété ném. Fém ném Galili yuménǃ"
english: The maid saw him and began again to tell those who stood by , “ This is one of them .”
