nama: Féyo Fité norayai, "Yénd soté efalo si norayan! Ngánjánam mété tékrátan kwékmangé táf njam nuindan. Yénd mat yau wém fém endenemén norayatiǃ"
english: But he began to curse and to swear , “ I don’ t know this man of whom you speak !”

nama: Táf fété ghakér kowi nutnam sómbinotma. Féyo Fité nawafarotai Yesuene si némé témndetau fá, "Frondeyo ghakér kowi njam kutnangé sómbinotma, fémon so kwékenang yénd nambinotmé." Táf Fité ye nufngoi.
english: The rooster crowed the second time . Peter remembered the words that Jesus said to him , “ Before the rooster crows twice , you will deny me three times .” When he thought about that , he wept .

nama: Tándái akwan, limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár, Ju árfene sénko ár, nák watamegh ár, a méinyotio áumengégh ár yéfenjo mwighé taufanawét. 'Némé so yafrotam Yesuefaf?' Yémofem yumbetaménd fá, yémnjoyénd, a yéramayénd Failetefaf.
english: Immediately in the morning the chief priests, with the elders , scribes , and the whole council , held a consultation , bound Jesus , carried him away , and delivered him up to Pilate .

nama: Failetém yémotai Yesu, "Fém fété ném Ju árfene warsagh ár?" Yesum yawangoi, "A yénd fété wém." 3 Limánégh ghéngén wárogh árém tárfár nékwmendafé si tafayotawét Yesue. 4 Wéikor Failetém yémotai, "Fém so féyotaro kuwango? Té yéfande njénambafé méndméndafé si némafayotat."
english: Pilate asked him , “ Are you the King of the Jews ?” He answered , “ So you say .”

nama: Wénde Yesu métar náyátoi uwangofnar, a Failet sélngwélam yafrotam.
english: But Jesus made no further answer, so that Pilate marveled .

nama: Waingégh témndan gafana téngmorwén yunjfero kwéfkwéf méngo ár utorghét ende ménát ár nómnendayénd. 7 Ár yétkwén Barabas efe témorwén kwéfkwéf méngon Rom warsagh ár ngi téfnár tárfár árfé talawangérwén. 8 Ár mérén enmormén Failet témotangi yá utorghét némé túmén tawafrotau.
english: Now at the feast he used to release to them one prisoner , whomever they asked of him .

nama: Failetém emotai, "Fém ménde em yéndon tutorén féfeyot Ju árfene warsagh ár." 10 Failet mat náyátoi nde limánégh ghéngén wárogh árém yéramayénd yáfaf Yesu méndménde.
english: Pilate answered them , saying , “ Do you want me to release to you the King of the Jews ?”

nama: Wénde limánégh ghéngén wárogh árém ewasemnayénd ár mérén Failetefaf Barabase utorghét. 12 Failetém emotai ár mérén, "Némé yéndon so yafrotan féfeyot yéné ároefaf fémofem efe yémndetati Ju árfene warsagh ár?"
english: But the chief priests stirred up the multitude , that he should release Barabbas to them instead .

nama: Fá nutnayénd "Téngwamend wafatarégh wén tukén!"
english: They cried out again , “ Crucify him !”

nama: Failetém emotai, "Némamén? Némé yaufi yafrotam yémon?" Wénde fá kutnawét minde tukén, "Téngwamendǃ"
english: Pilate said to them , “ Why , what evil has he done ?” But they cried out exceedingly , “ Crucify him !”

nama: Failetém ménde ewawifoi ár mérnafene. Féyo yéngéumyoi Barabas yéfefaf. Failetém tamndangé Yesue fémoghét yéngwafnamoi tukét wamghét. Fiyarayam si tawafrotawét Yesue
english: Pilate , wishing to please the multitude , released Barabbas to them , and handed over Jesus , when he had flogged him , to be crucified .

nama: Yémofem yénamndaménd wafatarégh wénan a téfalotawét yáne sáláme ménaye ndais kembneye.
english: Crucifying him , they parted his garments among them , casting lots on them , what each should take .

nama: Efogh féneféne 9 akwan Yesu ténamndawét wafatarégh wénan. 26 Férén yéfarotaménd wén karfan árét wafghét Yesuenemén, 'Ju árfene warsagh ár.'
english: It was the third hour when they crucified him .

nama: Yémofem enaménd sómbio oro téfnár Yesufé, ámb tambénta a fatrata. 28 (Yau siménj) 29 Ár endmé kawaindawét tasalitawét yéfene sénko tafnendawét sén krarghafé. Yémofem si tawafrotawét, "Fém korayawéng ndené 'Yéndon so wáwefnogh méngo yironan a nambio efghon so yérametan,' 30 kénewor wafatarégh wénta a kawanjar fémyoǃ"
english: With him they crucified two robbers , one on his right hand , and one on his left .

nama: Yéné séite méinyotio yu nénamndai kwéfitaro. Yéné kwéfitayam yérsam 3 aklok séite. 34 Yéné efoghféneféneyanyo Yesu minde nutnaméng, "Eli Eli, lama sabaktani?" Yéné sioene fifi siyém, 'Tane Ngánján, tane Ngánján, némamén yénd fémon wéfrango tambia?'
english: When the sixth hour had come , there was darkness over the whole land until the ninth hour .

nama: Ámb ár efe tawakayongérwén kaka yiyáráyénd Yesu, fá norayayénd, "Káyárangi, yémon yémote Elaija."
english: Some of those who stood by , when they heard it , said , “ Behold , he is calling Elijah .”

nama: Féyo ámbiro ár néngenngoi nguafé ghafté wéri nuan yukai wéne yéngwáuyoi Yesue nénet. Fá norayai, "Yambia téfrangend. Mato so yéfandam Elaijam téu ténmeworngaǃ" 37 Yesu minde nutnai soramé kér yémorméng.
english: One ran , and filling a sponge full of vinegar , put it on a reed and gave it to him to drink , saying , “ Let him be . Let ’s see whether Elijah comes to take him down .”

nama: Wáwefnogh méngon sénjté sáláme kété tamangérwén árkéménayam ár tawangotau Ngánjánefaf álighét, natiraryéng sómbio karéf kétándmé tuk kétánotio yu. 39 Njam Rom fiyaré sénko ár efe takayongérwén téfandau tukét ndernáye Yesu kér yémormén, fá norayai, "Efalo yéné árom yiyátoi Ngánjánene Ambum fété témǃ"
english: The veil of the temple was torn in two from the top to the bottom .

nama: Ámb amafam kétándmé nayuta ténfandawét. Ámb Meri Makdalin, Salome, ámb Meri efe témorwén Joses a yánngén Jems yéfetmé. 41 Yéné amafam Yesu táitotawét a tarawenawét fá njam Yesu témorwén Galili yuwon. Tárfáryo ámb amaf efe té enmormén Yesufé Jerusalemét kété tamorwén. Yesuene yátoghmén
english: There were also women watching from afar , among whom were both Mary Magdalene and Mary the mother of James the less and of Joses , and Salome ;

nama: Njam Safat nawaindai, Meri Makdalin, ámb Meri Jemse yátmé a Salome fai yafrotaménd mer wimafé wékwér ménát Yesuene fifi wasurghét. 2 Sande tándái akwan, totér efogh árnyéghan, fá nuwanoyénd kétán mbéwé méngofaf. 3 Álighan fáro namotayénd, "Emo so ténmafetangé wím téfeyot mbéwé méngo sésafneta?"
english: When the Sabbath was past , Mary Magdalene , and Mary the mother of James , and Salome bought spices, that they might come and anoint him .

nama: Wénde njam fá néngretayénd tukét, yémofem yinjoyénd yéné wím, árké ndimbal témorwén té nitérmboi. 5 Njam amaf mbéwé méngon nélawayénd, yémofem yinjoyénd totér ár kwayaghé sáláme tawongérwén témorangérwén amafafene tambén ngángata, a amaf férféram ewifoi.
english: for it was very big . Looking up , they saw that the stone was rolled back.

nama: Amaf nétoryénd a néngengoyénd mbéwé méngo tambén ménamén fá tamorwén ngernger mwighayan kowérsotawét. Fá némé si yau norayayénd ménamén férfér tamorwén. Tándáwár yátogh mer sifaf 16.9-20 Yesu nufaryéng Meri Makdalinefaf
english: They went out , and fled from the tomb , for trembling and astonishment had come on them . They said nothing to anyone ; for they were afraid .

nama: Yéné soramé Yesu nufaryéng fénaté sáfot sómbio árfefaf njamandio fá tangérwén endmé ámb yuwot. 13 Fá néngwaneyayénd ámb waitogh árét ewafroyénd yéfeyot némé kufrotau, wénde yémofem yau efalo yiyátoyénd yénémamén. Yesu nufaryéng 11 waitogh árfefaf
english: After these things he was revealed in another form to two of them as they walked , on their way into the country.

nama: Njam Yuré Yesum si ewifoi yéfefaf, fá táf nénguyoi njafarot a námnjoi Ngánjánene tambén ngángata. 20 Féyo waitogh ár táf nofarnayénd méinyotio yuwomé, mat tangyátotawét mer si. Yuré kásáfotau yéfe kénjúmé a tárfár sélngwélafé yam tawafrotawét. Yéné yamam tuyafotau ndené yáne si efalo témorwén.
english: So then the Lord , after he had spoken to them , was received up into heaven and sat down at the right hand of God .

nama: Jakarayam yémotai njafar si résagh ár, "Ndernáye wét yénd mat so kamndan yénémamén? Yénd swém bulu wém a tane amaf siyém ndenéyameyo ausé."
english: Zacharias said to the angel, “ How can I be sure of this ? For I am an old man , and my wife is well advanced in years .”

nama: Njafar si résagh árom yawangoi, "Yénd wém Geibrél. Yénd Ngánjáne kaka wakai a yénd kwénmáfárete siafé sái kémaufron yéné mer si. 20 A sénonjo fém kékmbo métar a yau noraya kétánotio yéné ufroghene efogh kawerangé ménamén fémo efalo yau tane si so táyáto. Árkéméné so efalo kénamndangi yánjo efghon."
english: The angel answered him , “ I am Gabriel , who stands in the presence of God . I was sent to speak to you and to bring you this good news .

nama: Merim yémotai njafar si résagh ár, "Ndernáye so yéné yém, ménamén yénd swém méinyo mérés?"
english: Mary said to the angel, “ How can this be , seeing I am a virgin ?”

nama: Merim yawangoi, "Yénd wém Yurane faiofnar ásáfogh ár. Féyotaro so nufrote némé té wémndé." Si soramé njafar si résagh árom yéfrangoi. Merim yiyafoi Elisabet
english: Mary said , “ Behold , the servant of the Lord ; let it be done to me according to your word .” Then the angel departed from her .

nama: Meri norayai, "Tane tikfam Yuré yuwete
english: Mary said , “ My soul magnifies the Lord .

nama: a tane mbérmbér áuwéghan yém Ngánján tane Wanjarégh ár kénjún,
english: My spirit has rejoiced in God my Savior ,

nama: ménamén yémon yénd wafarotam yuwan ghérsafé yáne ásáfogh mérés! Yénandmé sénonjo méinyotio árém so wémndetat yénd ndené frengéghmén ném,
english: for he has looked at the humble state of his servant . For behold , from now on , all generations will call me blessed .

nama: ménamén Minde tukén waftafé sélngwélafé yam tayot yafrotam. Yáne yétkwén yém njúnnjúnofnar.
english: For he who is mighty has done great things for me . Holy is his name .

nama: Yáne ghérghérsisé so néngusamngote yéfeyot emofem férférafé yéfandat fá kétándmé ámb ár saté kétánotio ámb ár saté.
english: His mercy is for generations and generations on those who fear him .

nama: Yémon té yuyafotam muyé yánjo ngángaye, yémon té ewafarnai fá efe tuktuk mwighé emarghan tamorwén.
english: He has shown strength with his arm . He has scattered the proud in the imagination of their hearts .

nama: Yémon té eweworyéng yuwot limánégh ár yéfenjo limánégh ámnjogh sifayata, wénde euyoyéng tukét métar ár.
english: He has put down princes from their thrones , and has exalted the lowly .

nama: Yémon té eremngoi siogh ár tárfár rokare wénde engwatembayéng wemár ár sotro.
english: He has filled the hungry with good things . He has sent the rich away empty .

nama: Yémon té yáutánam yánjo faiofnar ásáfogh ár Israil yafarotai ghérghérsisaye.
english: He has given help to Israel , his servant , that he might remember mercy ,

nama: Ebraamefaf a yánjo mérénfaf tuot, ndernáye té nénorayayéng téfene afafefaf."
english: as he spoke to our fathers , to Abraham and his offspring + 1:55 or, seed forever .”

nama: Merif emorarmén Elisabetfé nambio ghérare soramé Meri néngangoi méngotuot. Jon walitogh ár yáne áráféghmén si
english: Mary stayed with her about three months , and then returned to her house .

nama: Elisabetene efogh njam nawerai yáne ambummén, fá náráftam ghakér. 58 Yáne kaka ár a fútaréf náyárayénd ndené Yuram ndimbal ghérghérsisé yuyafoi a fá káuwétawét yémafé.
english: Now the time that Elizabeth should give birth was fulfilled, and she gave birth to a son .

nama: 8 efogh nawerayéng fá engmormén ghéngan néfghét a yémofem yétkwén yéramayénd yárefé Jakaraya soramé, 60 wénde yátmé norayai, "Yau! Yáne yétkwén so yém Jon."
english: On the eighth day , they came to circumcise the child ; and they would have called him Zacharias , after the name of his father .

nama: Yémofem yémndayénd, "Ámb yéné yétkwén yau yém féfene mérnan."
english: They said to her , “ There is no one among your relatives who is called by this name .”

nama: Yárefé Jakaraya Ngánján Mbérmbéram yafoi si nufngoi,
english: His father Zacharias was filled with the Holy Spirit , and prophesied , saying ,

nama: "Áuwégh yém Yurai, Israilmén Ngánján! Fá té téném yánjo ár wanjarghét.
english: “ Blessed be the Lord , the God of Israel , for he has visited and redeemed his people ;

nama: Fá yénmáfáretam téfe wanjarégh ár yáne faiofnar ásáfogh ár Deifid yáne mérénmén.
english: and has raised up a horn of salvation for us in the house of his servant David

nama: Némé fá norayai yáne Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár kénjúmé tándái,
english: ( as he spoke by the mouth of his holy prophets who have been from of old),

nama: Wanjarégh yém kétándmé téfene mék téfnárafene ngángata emofem méndméndat yénfandat yénd.
english: salvation from our enemies and from the hand of all who hate us ;

nama: Ghérghérsisé yuyafoi téfene afafefaf a ewafarotai yánjo njúnnjúnofnar árnyégh.
english: to show mercy toward our fathers , to remember his holy covenant ,

nama: Wengéghofnar si norayai téfene afé Ebraamefaf.
english: the oath which he swore to Abraham our father ,

nama: Yénd yénmutoryéng kétándmé mék téfnárfene ngángata a yénméindai yénd yáyot férférofnar yam wafarerghét:
english: to grant to us that we, being delivered out of the hand of our enemies , should serve him without fear,

nama: njúnnjúnofnar a mbarkánd kér ro Ngánjáne sáfan méinyotio téfene efghon.
english: in holiness and righteousness before him all the days of our life.

nama: Fém, tane ambum, so ném Minde Tuk Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár, so ném Yurane sáfréré end frengéghét yáyot,
english: And you , child , will be called a prophet of the Most High ; for you will go before the face of the Lord to prepare his ways ,

nama: yánjo árét so ewaramete wanjarégh mat yéfene yaufi wányányégh kénjúmé.
english: to give knowledge of salvation to his people by the remission of their sins,

nama: Ménamén téfene Ngánjánene ghérghérsisé njafar tambén árnyégh efogh so yéném téfefaf.
english: because of the tender mercy of our God , by which the dawn from on high will visit us ,

nama: So télálángé fá efe kwéfkwéfan em a kér mbanmbanan efe em so engwambete téfene kafkaf krufrát endmé."
english: to shine on those who sit in darkness and the shadow of death ; to guide our feet into the way of peace .”

nama: Ambum nanotam a muyafé namndai mbérmbéran, a fá tékmangérwén fanfne yuwon kétánotio marataye nufaryéng Israilét.
english: The child was growing and becoming strong in spirit , and was in the desert until the day of his public appearance to Israel .

nama: Yéné efghon Kaisar Augustusam muyé si yéramai marataye yétkwén kayoghét Rom yuwon. 2 Yéné simormén frondefifi yam yétkwén kayoghét njam Kwirinius gafana témorwén Sirian. 3 Méinyotio ár nuwanoyénd yéfenjo tesenot yétkwén yáuwéghét.
english: Now in those days , a decree went out from Caesar Augustus that all the world should be enrolled.

nama: Sélngwélafé minde tárfár njafar si résagh ár nufaryénd yéné njafar si résagh árfé, tuwetawét Ngánján a korayawét,
english: Suddenly , there was with the angel a multitude of the heavenly army praising God and saying ,

nama: "Áuwégh yém Ngánjáneyot minde tukén, yéné mbandan krufrát yém yéfeyot yáne méndefé árét."
english: “ Glory to God in the highest , on earth peace , good will toward men .”

nama: Ménayan 8 efghon, efogh nawerayéng yáne ghéngan néfghét, yáne yétkwén Yesu, njafar si résagh árom fronde yétkwén yaramai soramé su nawanai.
english: When eight days were fulfilled for the circumcision of the child , his name was called Jesus , which was given by the angel before he was conceived in the womb .

nama: "Wanjarégh ár Yuré, fémon némé té wémndai, sénonjo yénd fene faiofnar ásáfogh ár kér so wém áuwéghafé.
english: “ Now you are releasing your servant , Master , according to your word , in peace ;

nama: Ménamén tane ghékfam fene wanjarégh té yinjo,
english: for my eyes have seen your salvation ,

nama: ménát méinyotio árém so yéfandat árkéméné fémon té néusénam.
english: which you have prepared before the face of all peoples ;

nama: Fá so yém ndenanit kwayaghé sái yuyafotam fene efalofifi Téndo árét, a yémon so eméinde ár sái nemnat tukén Israil árfenemén."
english: a light for revelation to the nations , and the glory of your people Israel .”

nama: Njam Yurane nák némé wafroghét tamorwén Merifém Josefé té ewifeyayénd, fá táf nangeyayénd Galili yuwot yéfenjo tesenot Najaret. 40 Ambum nanotam muyafé namndai, fá káfeté mwighé wafoghkaf témorwén, Ngánjánene ngárám yáfaf témorwén. Ghakér ambum Yesu wáwefnogh méngon
english: When they had accomplished all things that were according to the law of the Lord , they returned into Galilee , to their own city , Nazareth .

nama: Yesum ewawangeyai, "Némémén yénd fémofem wéronjét? Fém mat fiya tarwén ndené yénd tane Afane méngo kénjún wém." 50 Wénde fá mé katambarwét némé si yémon té tamndéwéng.
english: He said to them , “ Why were you looking for me ? Didn’ t you know that I must be in my Father ’s house?”

nama: Fá nuwanoyénd Najaretét yárefafé a fá áyárégh ár náyátoi yárefafefaf. Wénde yatmam méinyotio si ewanai yánjo tikéf kénjút. 52 Yesu nanotam fifiyan a káfeté mwighayan a yáne ménde Ngánjánafé a ár.
english: And he went down with them and came to Nazareth . He was subject to them , and his mother kept all these sayings in her heart .

nama: Méinyotio yékwyékw wéfángéghét a méinyotio mband tunakéf fénarghét a fafatot. Méinyotio ménjuté end so em mbarkánd a yaufi end so em frengéghkaf.
english: Every valley will be filled . Every mountain and hill will be brought low . The crooked will become straight , and the rough ways smooth .

nama: A méinyotio árém so tinjongi Ngánjánene wanjarégh.'"
english: All flesh will see God ’s salvation .’”

nama: Ár mérnam yémotayénd, "Némé yéndfem so yafrotam yénandmé?"
english: The multitudes asked him , “ What then must we do ?”

nama: Joném ewawangoi, "Ár efe sómbio sodafé njam yém ámb ároe so taramangé, a efe njamkefé yém ndenéyameyo so yafrote."
english: He answered them , “ He who has two coats , let him give to him who has none . He who has food , let him do likewise .”

nama: Mani kafégh ár ndenéyameyo enmormén nu walitoghét, fá namotayénd, "Watamegh ár, némé so yafrotam?"
english: Tax collectors also came to be baptized, and they said to him , “ Teacher , what must we do ?”

nama: Yémon emndai fá, "Yau féfenjo méndeye takafangi kétamé némé té engémndan." 14 Ámb fiyaram wéi yémotayéng, "Yéndfem némé so yafrotam?" Yémo ewawangoi, "Yau ewarémnati maniot ár o ekafetati unyéghe a eremngotati féfenjo fayam."
english: He said to them , “ Collect no more than that which is appointed to you .”

nama: Wénde njam Joném yarnam Erod limánégh ár ménamén yémon nawerai yánngnoene amaf, Erodias a ámb yaufiyam ewafrotam, 20 Erodém yasamngoi yénandmé yéfefaf. Jon yélawayénd kwéfkwéf méngon. Yesuene walitoghmén
english: but Herod the tetrarch , being reproved by him for Herodias , his brother’s wife , and for all the evil things which Herod had done ,

nama: Njam méinyotio ár ewalitotam, Yesu wéi yálitotam. Njam fá Ngánjánafé oraighan témorwén njafar táf nasawéryéng, 22 a Ngánján Mbérmbér néneworyéng Yesuefaf men kénjúmé ndenanit mamu. Si yénmormén kétándmé njafarta, "Fém ném tane uwéghafé ambum, yénd minde náuwétan fefaf." Yesuene ákiafenemén
english: Now when all the people were baptized, Jesus also had been baptized and was praying . The sky was opened,

nama: Yesu namndai 30 yunjéf táf yánjo ásáfogh yérnyai. Yesu maratan nakmai ndené Josefene ambum yém Josef témorwén Eliene ambum,
english: Jesus himself, when he began to teach, was about thirty years old , being the son ( as was supposed ) of Joseph , the son of Heli ,

nama: Matatene ambum, Lefiene ambum, Melkiene ambum, Yanaiene ambum, Josefene ambum,
english: the son of Matthat , the son of Levi , the son of Melchi , the son of Jannai , the son of Joseph ,

nama: Matatiasene ambum, Amosene ambum, Nakumene ambum, Esliene ambum, Nagaiene ambum,
english: the son of Mattathias , the son of Amos, the son of Nahum , the son of Esli , the son of Naggai ,

nama: Matene ambum, Matatiasene ambum, Semeinene ambum, Josekene ambum, Jodene ambum,
english: the son of Maath , the son of Mattathias , the son of Semein , the son of Joseph , the son of Judah ,

nama: Joananene ambum, Resane ambum, Jerufafelene ambum, Sialtielene ambum, Neriene ambum,
english: the son of Joanan, the son of Rhesa , the son of Zerubbabel , the son of Shealtiel , the son of Neri ,

nama: Melkiene ambum, Adiene ambum, Kosamene ambum, Elmadamene ambum, Erene ambum,
english: the son of Melchi , the son of Addi, the son of Cosam , the son of Elmodam , the son of Er ,

nama: Josuane ambum, Elieserene ambum, Jorimene ambum Matatene ambum, Lefiene ambum.
english: the son of Jose, the son of Eliezer , the son of Jorim , the son of Matthat , the son of Levi ,

nama: Simionene ambum, Judane ambum, Josefene ambum, Jonamene ambum, Eliakimene ambum,
english: the son of Simeon , the son of Judah , the son of Joseph , the son of Jonan , the son of Eliakim ,

nama: Meliane ambum, Menane ambum, Matatane ambum, Natanene ambum, Deifidene ambum,
english: the son of Melea , the son of Menan , the son of Mattatha , the son of Nathan , the son of David ,

nama: Jesiene ambum, Obedene ambum, Boasene ambum, Samonene ambum, Nasunene ambum,
english: the son of Jesse , the son of Obed , the son of Boaz , the son of Salmon, the son of Nahshon ,

nama: Aminadafene ambum, Ramene ambum, Ejronene ambum, Feresene ambum, Judane ambum,
english: the son of Amminadab, the son of Aram, the son of Hezron , the son of Perez , the son of Judah ,

nama: Jeikofene ambum, Aisekene ambum, Ebraamene ambum, Terane ambum, Naorene ambum,
english: the son of Jacob , the son of Isaac , the son of Abraham, the son of Terah , the son of Nahor ,

nama: Serukene ambum, Reuene ambum, Felekene ambum, Eferene ambum, Selane ambum,
english: the son of Serug, the son of Reu , the son of Peleg , the son of Eber, the son of Shelah ,

nama: Keinanene ambum, Afasadene ambum, Semene ambum, Noane ambum, Lamekene ambum,
english: the son of Cainan , the son of Arphaxad, the son of Shem , the son of Noah , the son of Lamech ,

nama: Metuselane ambum, Inokene ambum, Jaredene ambum, Maalalelene ambum, Kenanene ambum,
english: the son of Methuselah , the son of Enoch , the son of Jared , the son of Mahalaleel , the son of Cainan ,

nama: Enosene ambum, Setene ambum, Edémene ambum, Ngánjánene ambum.
english: the son of Enos , the son of Seth , the son of Adam, the son of God .

nama: Yesu, Ngánján Mbérmbér afoghkaf, kangotau Jodenta a Ngánján Mbérmbéram yalimai fanfne yuwomé, 2 40 efghon fá yufotam Sáifram. Yémon yau enetam yéné efghon, yéné soramé siogh témorwén.
english: Jesus , full of the Holy Spirit , returned from the Jordan and was led by the Spirit into the wilderness

nama: Sáifram yémndai, "Fém njam ném Ngánjánene ambum, yéné wím tengo njamkeyot."
english: The devil said to him , “ If you are the Son of God , command this stone to become bread.”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Buk sian yékai, 'Ár njamkeyero yau so yémor.'"
english: Jesus answered him , saying , “ It is written , ‘ Man shall not live by bread alone , but by every word of God .’”

nama: Sáifram yalimai mband tunakfot a yauyafotam yáyot méinyotio mband marat. 6 Sáifram yémndai, "Yéndon so kémaraman méinyotio muyé a meryam, ménamén tane em, so tawaraman méndefé árfet ende téu. 7 Fémon njam kwáwefno ta, méinyotio fene so em."
english: The devil, leading him up on a high mountain, showed him all the kingdoms of the world in a moment of time .

nama: yémofem so kémerangi yéfenjo ngángaye, ménát fene kafkaf yau so kawambangi wíman."
english: and , ‘ On their hands they will bear you up , lest perhaps you dash your foot against a stone .’” + 4:11 Psalms 91:11-12

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Ndené noraye, fémo yau yékmeta fenjo Yuré Ngánján ufoghan."
english: Jesus answering, said to him , “ It has been said , ‘ You shall not tempt the Lord your God .’”

nama: Njam Sáifram yánjo ufogh yam ewifoi Yesu táf yéfrangoi ámb efghot. Yesu yékenayénd Najaretén
english: When the devil had completed every temptation , he departed from him until another time .

nama: Yesu nénangoi Galili yuwot Ngánján Mbérmbérene waftafé, si marat náyátoi yánemén méinyotio yuwomé. 15 Yémon tawatametau yéfenjo áumengégh méngomé, a méinyotio árém tuwetawét fá.
english: Jesus returned in the power of the Spirit into Galilee , and news about him spread through all the surrounding area.

nama: Fá nuwanoi Najaretét, ánde fá nanotam, Safatan nuwanoi nélawai áumengégh méngot yáne túmén yam témorwén. Fá nokayoi wafghét. 17 Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár Aisayane kanéghkaf buk témorwén yaramayénd. Yémon yéferyéng a yinjoyéng si tékayongérwén,
english: He came to Nazareth , where he had been brought up . He entered , as was his custom , into the synagogue on the Sabbath day , and stood up to read.

nama: "Yurane Mbérmbér siyém tafaf yém, ménamén yénd yémon wékafai mer si waitoghét yauyau árét. Yémon yénd kwamáfárete siot yéfeyot efe kwéfkwéf méngon elau wanjarghét, kwéfkwéf ár so kretangé, kérté téfnár so em ofé, 19 yéné yunjfan Ngánjánene ménde nufrotam."
english: “ The Spirit of the Lord is on me , because he has anointed me to preach good news to the poor . He has sent me to heal the broken hearted, + 4:18 NU omits “to heal the broken hearted” to proclaim release to the captives, recovering of sight to the blind , to deliver those who are crushed,

nama: Féyo yémon yéknam kénaghkaf buk, ewawangoi áumengégh méngo wanjengégh árét a námnjoyéng si waitogh sifayan. Méinyotio árfene ghékfam téfandawét fá áumengégh méngo kénjún. 21 Fá si orayégh nufngoi yéfefaf, "Sénonjo yéné si efalo náyáto féfene áyárégh kénjún."
english: He closed the book , gave it back to the attendant , and sat down . The eyes of all in the synagogue were fastened on him .

nama: Méinyotio korayawét yánemén frengégh si a sélngwélafé mer simén emormén yáne mbírmbírta njam nétoryéng. Yémofem namotayénd, "Yéné Josefene ambum yém?"
english: All testified about him and wondered at the gracious words which proceeded out of his mouth ; and they said , “Isn’ t this Joseph ’s son ?”

nama: Yesum emndai fá, "Fémofem so tanangi yéné káfeté si tafaf, 'Jokté, fémyo káfrenda!' A Fémofem so kwémndangi, 'Tafrota yéna fenjo tesenan némé yénd náyárangém ndené fémo némé tafrote Kafenamén.'"
english: He said to them , “Doubtless you will tell me this proverb , ‘ Physician , heal yourself ! Whatever we have heard done at Capernaum , do also here in your hometown .’”

nama: Méinyotio ár áumengégh méngo kénjún nékw tamorwén yéné sian njam yiyárayénd 29 Fá nékwafé nafghetaménd yifnayénd tesenta, yerayénd mband tunakéffaf ánde méngotu témorwén, kétándmé sái titawét yékwét. 30 Wénde fá tiotau ár mérén kénjúmé a kété néngwanoi. Yesum ewifnam yaufi mbérmbér
english: They were all filled with wrath in the synagogue as they heard these things .

nama: Féyo fá nuwanoi kétán Káfenam tesen Galili yu kénjún a Safatan ár watamegh ewafngoi. 32 Fá tamorwén sélngwél yáne watameghan, ménamén yáne si waitogh témorwén muyafé.
english: He came down to Capernaum , a city of Galilee . He was teaching them on the Sabbath day ,

nama: Áumengégh méngon kété témorwén ár tasérmbotau yaufi mbérmbéram. Fá nutnayéng minde tukén. 34 "A! Fém némat ménde ném téfefaf, Yesu Najaretmén? Fém téfe wasérmboghét kéném? Yénd mat wém fém efe ném. Fém ném Ngánjánene njúnnjúnofnar ár."
english: In the synagogue there was a man who had a spirit of an unclean demon ; and he cried out with a loud voice ,

nama: Yesum yarnam, "Métar mé! Kéntor yá tambén." Féyo yaufi mbérmbéram ár yétarmai árfe ghékfan a néngtoryéng yéfrangoi ár wasérmboghofnar.
english: Jesus rebuked him , saying , “ Be silent and come out of him !” When the demon had thrown him down in the middle of them , he came out of him , having done him no harm.

nama: Ár méinyotio sélngwél emormén a korayawét fáro, "Némé watamegh yéné yém? Muyafé a waftafé yémon yaufi mbérmbér ewitrote a fá néngtonat!" 37 A si yánemén marat namndai kaka méngotuamé Yesum mer táyátotau tárfár ár
english: Amazement came on all and they spoke together , one with another , saying , “ What is this word ? For with authority and power he commands the unclean spirits , and they come out !”

nama: Njam yémofem yafrotaménd némat té engémndai, yémofem ereindaménd tárfár wagif a yéfene net aftéraréghétro tamorwén. 7 Yénémamén yémofem engwaunyeyayénd yéfe fútarfet ámb boutot wáutárghét, fá enmormén a sómbio boutan tawaflitawét minde tárfár wagif a olitoghétro tárwén.
english: When they had done this , they caught a great multitude of fish , and their net was breaking.

nama: Njam Saimon Fitam yinjoi yéné, yémon yáwefnoi Yesue budme a norayai, "Nguwano ta tambén, Yuré, yénd wém yaufiyamafé ár!" 9 Fá a méinyotio yáne wáutárégh ár yéné wagif arnyéghmén sélngwél emormén, 10 ndenéyameyo wéi Jems a Jon, Jebediene ambum a Saimonene fútaréf.
english: But Simon Peter , when he saw it , fell down at Jesus ’ knees , saying , “ Depart from me , for I am a sinful man, Lord .”

nama: Yémofem yéfenjo bout tunat engwimndangeyayénd a méinyotio rokar eureyayénd yéngwaitoyénd fá. Yesum mer yiyátoi yaufi ghéngan enjnefé ár
english: When they had brought their boats to land , they left everything , and followed him .

nama: Njamandio Yesu témorwén ámb tesenan, ámb ár yaufi ghéngan enjnefé témorwén. Yémo njam Yesu yinjoi, fá yáne sáfe nuyai mbandot a yamnendai, "Yuré, fém njam ménde ném, fémon mer kwiyáto yénd."
english: While he was in one of the cities , behold , there was a man full of leprosy . When he saw Jesus , he fell on his face and begged him , saying , “ Lord , if you want to , you can make me clean .”

nama: Yesum ngángé ewatembai a yiyánjai ár a norayai, "Yénd ménde fété wém. So mer ném!" A táf fété yaufi ghéngan enjneyam yéfrangoi.
english: He stretched out his hand and touched him , saying , “ I want to . Be made clean .” Immediately the leprosy left him .

nama: Yesum yémndai fá, "Ende yau taufro, téu nguwano, kauyafo fémyo ghéngén wárogh téfnárafefaf a ghéngén taram némé Mosesene nákan noraye frengéghmén ánde árém so kémwinjongi ndené fene ghéngan mer té namndé."
english: He commanded him to tell no one , “ But go your way and show yourself to the priest , and offer for your cleansing according to what Moses commanded , for a testimony to them .”

nama: Wénde si yánemén marat náyátoi. Ár tárfár tanmorwén áyárghét yáfaf a tárfár frengégham tarsau enjne téfnár. 16 Wénde Yesu túmén kitérmbongai métar sifayat Ngánjánafé oraighét. Yesum mer yiyátoi akényégh ár
english: But the report concerning him spread much more , and great multitudes came together to hear and to be healed by him of their infirmities.

nama: Njam Yesum ewawinjoi yéfene ndimbal mwighé, fá norayai, "Fútar, fene yaufi té wawalinda."
english: Seeing their faith , he said to him , “Man, your sins are forgiven you .”

nama: Farasi ár a nák watamegh ár mwighé tawaitotawét yéfenjomén, "Efe yéné ár yém wanyogh si kés noraye? Efe yaufi so tawalindangé wénde Ngánjánamro?"
english: The scribes and the Pharisees began to reason , saying , “ Who is this who speaks blasphemies? Who can forgive sins, but God alone ?”

nama: Yéné soramé, Yesu néngwanoi a yinjoi mani kafégh ár yétkwén Lefi témorangérwén mani kafégh sifayan. Yesum yémndai fá, "Kwénmaito yénd." 28 A Lefi nokayoi, efrangoi méinyotio rokar a yáitoi fá.
english: After these things he went out and saw a tax collector named Levi sitting at the tax office, and said to him , “ Follow me !”

nama: Kétándmé Lefim ndimbal téménd néusénam Yesueyot yánjo méngon, a ndimbal mérén mani kafégh ár a ámb kés em njamke tánetawét yémafé. 30 Wénde Farasi ár a nák watamegh ár káwatarnawét yáne waitogh árfefaf, "Némamén fémofem enetati njamke a nu mani kafégh árfé a yaufiyam wafrogh árfé?"
english: Levi made a great feast for him in his house . There was a great crowd of tax collectors and others who were reclining with them .

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Yau mer árém njokté yarawetat wénde enjne téfnáramro. 32 Yénd yau mbarkánd ár moghét wénmormén, wénde yaufiyam ár wengoghét." Yesu yémotayénd awafarmanéghmén
english: Jesus answered them , “ Those who are healthy have no need for a physician , but those who are sick do .

nama: Ámb Safatan Yesu tiotau mbwe ndawan, a yánjo waitogh árém ámb wén mbwe kafégh ewafngoyénd, yéfenjo ngángaye tasénawét mbwe a tánetawét. 2 Ámb Farasi árém yémotayénd, "Némamén fémo nák eráfne Safatan?"
english: Now on the second Sabbath after the first , he was going through the grain fields . His disciples plucked the heads of grain and ate , rubbing them in their hands .

nama: Féyo Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Yéndo emotan fém, árkéméné yém nák Safatan: mer wafroghét o yaufi wafroghét, ghérsé wanjarghét o wirorghét?"
english: Then Jesus said to them , “ I will ask you something: Is it lawful on the Sabbath to do good , or to do harm ? To save a life , or to kill?”

nama: Yémon ghékfe fá tafandau méinyotio, a norayai ároefef, "Fenjo ngángé tásáfo." Akényégh árom yafrotam ndené, a yáne ngángé táf mer namndai. 11 Wénde fá tamorwén nékwafé a warunyégh yafngoyénd yéfene kénjúnro némé so tafrotawét Yesuefaf. 12 Yesuene muyafé ár
english: He looked around at them all , and said to the man , “ Stretch out your hand .” He did , and his hand was restored as sound as the other .

nama: Fá Yesufé néneworyénd tunakéfta a nokayoyénd fafat sifayan. Tárfár Yesuene waitogh ár kété tamorwén a tárfár wéi enmormén Judiamén, ndenáyo Jerusalem, Taire a Sidon arakaf téndomén, 18 efe té enmormén si áyárghét yáfaf a yéfene enjneta mer yátoghét. Efe yaufi mbérmbéram tawasérmbotau mer náyátoyénd, 19 a méinyotio árém yéta yanjaghét trametawét fá, ménamén wafté ngétonau Yesueta a mer ngáyátotawét.
english: He came down with them and stood on a level place , with a crowd of his disciples and a great number of the people from all Judea and Jerusalem and the sea coast of Tyre and Sidon , who came to hear him and to be healed of their diseases ,

nama: Yémon tafandau yánjo waitogh ár a norayai, "Frengégh yém féfeyot efe em yauyau, ménamén féfeyot siyém Ngánjánene limánégh.
english: He lifted up his eyes to his disciples , and said : “ Blessed are you who are poor , for God ’s Kingdom is yours .

nama: Frengégh yém féfeyot efe em siogh sénonjo, ménamén fém so em remngoghkaf. Frengégh yém féfeyot efe ye nendat sénonjo, ménamén fém so em fénan.
english: Blessed are you who hunger now , for you will be filled . Blessed are you who weep now , for you will laugh .

nama: Frengégh yém féfeyot njam árém méndméndat efandat, njam árém ekarotat fém a ewasalitat, a ekenat fém emndetat yaufi mbérmbér em, ménamén Ároene Ambummén.
english: Blessed are you when men hate you , and when they exclude and mock you , and throw out your name as evil , for the Son of Man ’s sake .

nama: "Áuwégh yém yéné efghon a ermángégh áuwéghafé, ménamén fene fai siyém ndimbal njafaran. Ndenéyameyo yéfene ákifem takarotawét Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár.
english: Rejoice in that day and leap for joy , for behold , your reward is great in heaven , for their fathers did the same thing to the prophets .

nama: "Wénde tékrát yém féfeyot efe em wemár, ménamén fém té tamorwén áfrát ghérsaye.
english: “ But woe to you who are rich ! For you have received your consolation .

nama: Tékrat yém féfeyot efe remngoghkaf sénonjo em, ménamén fém siogh so engém. Tékrat yém féfeyot efe em fénan sénonjo, ménamén fém so em ghérghérsisayan a yeyan.
english: Woe to you , you who are full now , for you will be hungry . Woe to you who laugh now , for you will mourn and weep .

nama: Nderé mámáfi so yém féfeyot njam méinyotio árém norayat mer si féfenemén ndenáye yéfene ákifem tamndetawét unyégh mat yátogh ár. Euwetati mék téfnár
english: Woe , when men speak well of you , for their fathers did the same thing to the false prophets .

nama: Yesum tawaufrotau yéné rengerenge si, "Féyotaro kwéfkwéf árém so yémnje kwéfkwéf ár? Wét yau so kélawend yékwét? 40 Waitogh árém yau so taindangi yéfene watamegh ár, wénde efe njam ewatametat méinyotio yam, fá so em ndenáyo yéfene watamegh ár.
english: He spoke a parable to them . “ Can the blind guide the blind ? Won’t they both fall into a pit ?

nama: Njam Yesum náyárai sélngwélafé si yá tambén, a fá nawengoi kétán ár mérénfaf táitotawét, "Yéndo emndetan fém, yéndon yau yinjon ndené ndimbal mwighé Israil yuwon." 10 Táf ár nénangoyénd méngot a yinjoyénd faiofnar ásáfogh ár merro. Yesum yanoi kwirane ambum
english: When Jesus heard these things , he marveled at him , and turned and said to the multitude who followed him , “ I tell you , I have not found such great faith , no , not in Israel .”

nama: Kaka nitroi taté yiyánjai, fá emofem ténérsawét nokayoyénd. Fá norayai, "Tot ambum, yéndon némndetan, kano!" 15 Kér ambum nanoyéng námnjoi a si nufngoi. Yesum yéngramai yatmafaf.
english: He came near and touched the coffin , and the bearers stood still . He said , “ Young man , I tell you , arise !”

nama: Fá sélngwél emormén a soramé áuwégh nufngoyénd a norayayénd, "Ndimbal Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár té nufar téfefaf. Ngánján té nufar yánjo ár wáutárghét." 17 Yéné si marat náyátoi Yesuenemén Judia yuwon a ámb yu kaka kés tamorwén. Yesu a Jon walitogh ár
english: Fear took hold of all , and they glorified God , saying , “ A great prophet has arisen among us !” and , “ God has visited his people !”

nama: Jonene waitogh árém yaufroyénd yá yéné yammén. Joném sómbio emotangeyai, 19 yémon sómbio ár ewafareméng Yurafaf moghét, "Fém yénéf ném efe kéném, o so néngawanjetam ámb ároe?"
english: The disciples of John told him about all these things .

nama: Sómbio ár njam enérmén Yesuefaf, fá korayangénd, "Jon walitogh árém tanmafarwe fefaf moghét. 'Fém yénéf ném efe kéném o so néngawanjetam ámb ároe?'"
english: When the men had come to him , they said , “ John the Baptizer has sent us to you , saying , ‘ Are you he who comes , or should we look for another ?’”

nama: Yesu kor norayai, "Yéndon emndetan, Jon walitogh árom ewainde méinyotio ár efe náráftat yéné mband maratan. Wénde efe yém némbnar ambumnit Ngánjánene limánéghan, yémo so taindangé Jon."
english: “ For I tell you , among those who are born of women there is not a greater prophet than John the Baptizer; yet he who is least in God ’s Kingdom is greater than he .”

nama: Yesuene si njam náyárayénd, méinyotio ár, kété tawafnyangérwén mani kafégh ár, mat namndayénd ndené Ngánjánene yam siyém efalo, ménamén Joném té tawawaitotau. 30 Wénde Farasi ár a nák watamegh árém yékenayénd Ngánjánene ménde yéfendio, ménamén fá nakenayénd Joném sái tawalitotau.
english: When all the people and the tax collectors heard this , they declared God to be just , having been baptized with John ’s baptism.

nama: "Némafaf yéndo so yétémndan yéné árfenemén? Némanit fá em? 32 Ndenanit em ambumtértér yénau emorang rokar térarégh sifayan a fárofáro námotat, "'Yénd nambnam sifraféré feyot, a fém yau neremndé Yénd neremndam ghérghérsisafé kérmén wagh, a fém yau nende.'
english: “ To what then should I compare the people of this generation ? What are they like ?

nama: Ámb Farasi ároene waráuwégh yénmormén Yesueyot séite njamket, fá néngwanoi kétán Farasi ároene méngot námnjoi nénet. 37 Ámb amaf efe témorangérwén yaufi ghérsayan yéné tesenan mat náyátoi ndené Yesum njamke tánetau ámb Farasi ároene méngon, yéné amafom yénérsam séfkwénafé mer wimafé wékwér, 38 amaf nokayoi yá sémta Yesuene kafkafot a niyai yáfaf, yáne yengam kuitawét Yesuene kafkafot. Yémon wányányogh yawafngoi yánjo séfe, a esnetai a yawasuryéng mer wimafé wékwére.
english: One of the Pharisees invited him to eat with him . He entered into the Pharisee ’s house and sat at the table.

nama: Njam yéné Farasi árom yinjoi yéné yam, fá norayai yánjo kénjún, "Yéné ár njam Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár yém, fá mat té yém emo fá yiyanje a nderé sáfot amaf yéné yém, fá siyém yaufiyamafé amaf."
english: Now when the Pharisee who had invited him saw it , he said to himself , “ This man , if he were a prophet , would have perceived who and what kind of woman this is who touches him , that she is a sinner.”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Saimon, yéndon ámb si so kémaufron." Yémo korayangé, "Kwaufro, watamegh ár."
english: Jesus answered him , “ Simon , I have something to tell you .” He said , “ Teacher , say on .”

nama: "Sómbio árét mani ewarameyai maniafé árém, ámb ároe 5,000 kina, ámb ároe 500 kina. 42 Sómbio ár maniofnar namndeyayénd wangoghét, féyo yémo mwighafnar ewawaineyai. Emo so minde méndefé yéfande?"
english: “ A certain lender had two debtors . The one owed five hundred denarii , and the other fifty .

nama: Saimon nuwangoi, "Yénd ndené nemnan endene ndimbal fai mwighafnar yawitam." Yesum yémndai, "Fémo mer nuwango."
english: Simon answered , “ He , I suppose , to whom he forgave the most .” He said to him , “ You have judged correctly .”

nama: Féyo Yesum yémndai amaf, "Fene yaufi té némawalindangén."
english: He said to her , “ Your sins are forgiven.”

nama: Ámb wan téfnár si nufngoyénd yéfene kénjúnro, "Efe yéné yém emo yaufi tawainangé?"
english: Those who sat at the table with him began to say to themselves , “ Who is this who even forgives sins?”

nama: Yesum yawangoi amafoe, "Fene ndimbal mwighayam té némanjar, nguwano mere a némor."
english: He said to the woman , “ Your faith has saved you . Go in peace .”

nama: Njamandio tárfár ár káumendawét Yesuefaf fénatafénaté tesenta, yémon rengerenge si tawaitotau:
english: When a great multitude came together and people from every city were coming to him , he spoke by a parable :

nama: "Ndau téfnár nuwanoi yánjo wén mbwe taranéghét. Njam yémon téngtarnau, ámb nuyáyénd téndomé, yéné tatumndawét kafkafe, a menam tánetawét. 6 Ámb nuyáyénd wímafé mbandan, njam kanotawét, kér emormén ménamén nuofnarmén. 7 Ámb mbwe nuyáyénd wétwét sifayan wétwétam njangénjangén eyátoyénd anoghan. 8 Ámb mbwe nuyáyénd mer mbandot. Kanotawét a nafoyénd kwéki 100 mindefifi tárfár ndené kés eitaménd." Fá njam norayai yéné, yémon emndai, "Fá efe njam ténganafé em áyárghét, fá so káyárangi."
english: “ The farmer went out to sow his seed . As he sowed , some fell along the road , and it was trampled under foot , and the birds of the sky devoured it .

nama: Yáne waitogh árém yémotayénd yéné rengerenge fifi némé yém. 10 Yémon emndai, "Ngánjánam yuyafote féfe fronde némé yau tauyafotau Ngánján limánéghmén, wénde ámb árét yéndon norayan rengerenge sie, ménát, "'Ghékfe so yéfandat, wénde yau so tinjongi, so náyáretat, wénde yau so tayamngongi.'
english: Then his disciples asked him , “ What does this parable mean ?”

nama: Yesue yátmé a yanngnéf enmormén yá fandaghét, wénde ménamén ár tárfár tamorwén, fá yau kaka tamorwén yáfaf. 20 Ámb árom yaufroi yá, "Fene amé a fenngnéf kétándmé ewakai safén, nawanjetat fe fandaghét."
english: His mother and brothers came to him , and they could not come near him for the crowd .

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Tane amé a nénngnéf fá em efe náyáretat Ngánjánene si a wafroghyaman ekmetat." Yesum yékmboi ndimbal mbormbor
english: But he answered them , “ My mother and my brothers are these who hear the word of God and do it .”

nama: Ámb efghon Yesum emndai yánjo waitogh ár, "Kuwanongém sawot kéférmangém witmé karéf." Féyo fá nuflitaménd boutan nuwanoyénd. 23 Njamandio fá karayawét, Yesu nakmai. Ndimbal mbormboram eutfoi sawan, féyo bout táfandio olitoghétro témorwén, fá tamorwén ndimbal kértayan.
english: Now on one of those days , he entered into a boat , himself and his disciples , and he said to them , “ Let ’s go over to the other side of the lake .” So they launched out .

nama: Waitogh ár naflayénd yanoyénd fá, nutnayénd, "Yuré, Yuré, yénd yéném olitoghétro!"
english: They came to him and awoke him , saying , “ Master , Master , we are dying!” He awoke and rebuked the wind and the raging of the water ; then they ceased , and it was calm .

nama: Yémo emndai yánjo waitogh ár, "Ánde yém féfene ndimbal mwighé?" Waitogh ár férfér a sélngwél emormén, fáro yémndayénd, "Efe fá yém? Njam fá korayangé mbormbor a sofam tiyárangi fá!" Yesum mer yiyátoi yaufi mbérmbérafé ár
english: He said to them , “ Where is your faith ?” Being afraid , they marveled , saying to one another , “ Who is this then , that he commands even the winds and the water , and they obey him ?”

nama: Yesum yémotai, "Fene yétkwén efe yém?"
english: Jesus asked him , “ What is your name ?” He said , “ Legion ,” for many demons had entered into him .

nama: A yémofem yamnendayénd fá férghe, "Yénd yau so yéngém kétán kémboghofnar yékwét."
english: They begged him that he would not command them to go into the abyss.

nama: Tárfár mérén kimb taménjnawét mband tunakéf téndon. Yaufi mbérmbéram yamnendayénd Yesu ménát élaughét yéfefaf féyo wafté ewaramai. 33 Njam yaufi mbérmbér nétoryénd árta, fá nélawayénd kimbafefaf, a néngengoyénd ngewonawét sawot a kolitotawét.
english: Now there was there a herd of many pigs feeding on the mountain , and they begged him that he would allow them to enter into those . Then he allowed them .

nama: Yéné ár kétándmé ende tambén yaufi mbérmbér tawifnau, yémon yamnendai Yesu yémafé álighét, wénde Yesum yéngwatembai ndené siafé, 39 "Ngangota méngotuot a tawaufro nderé ndimbal Ngánjánam kémawafrote feyot." Féyo ár nuwanoi, a kafrotau tesenamé nderé ndimbal Yesum yawafrotam yáyot. Kér mérés a enjnefé amaf
english: But the man from whom the demons had gone out begged him that he might go with him , but Jesus sent him away , saying ,

nama: Yesu njam néngangotam, ár mérnam yumyoyénd, ménamén yémofem méghméghafé tanjetawét. 41 Ár yétkwén Jairus, wáwefnogh méngo ndimbal ár yénmormén a nénuyai Yesuene kafkafot, yamnendai álighét yánjo méngot 42 ménamén yáne féfét mérés, 12 yunjéf krotro témorwén.
english: When Jesus returned , the multitude welcomed him , for they were all waiting for him .

nama: A amaf kété témorwén efe férék kertau 12 yunjéf, wénde emon yau yéfrendai. 44 Fá sémta yénmormén a yiyánjai Yesuene sáláme fétfétro férék táf nékmboi. 45 Yesu namotai, "Emo wiyánja?" Njam fá méinyotio nawanyotayénd, Fité norayai, "Yuré, ár mérnam némarendangi a néngsotat fém."
english: A woman who had a flow of blood for twelve years , who had spent all her living on physicians and could not be healed by any ,

nama: Wénde Yesu norayai, "Ámb árom té wiyánja. Yénd mat náyáton wafté té néngférém ta tambén."
english: But Jesus said , “ Someone did touch me , for I perceived that power has gone out of me .”

nama: Njam amaf yénmormén fandaghofnar a mat siofnar, férférafé ténmorwén nénuyai yáne kafkafot. Méinyotio árfene sáfréré, yémon yémndai némamén yémon yiyánjai a ndernáye fá táfandio frengégham yanai. 48 Ndenaye Yesum yémdayéng, "Mérés, fenjo ndimbal mwighayam mer niyáto. Kuwano mer so ném."
english: When the woman saw that she was not hidden, she came trembling ; and falling down before him declared to him in the presence of all the people the reason why she had touched him , and how she was healed immediately .

nama: Seitefifi 12 waitogh ár enmormén Yesuefaf a yémndayénd, "Tawafarna ár mérén, fá so néngangotat kaka méngotuot a téndo yuwot ménát njamke a kémégh sifayat áronjaghét, ménamén yénd yéném yauyau sifayan."
english: The day began to wear away ; and the twelve came and said to him , “Send the multitude away , that they may go into the surrounding villages and farms and lodge and get food, for we are here in a deserted place .”

nama: Yémon ewawangoi, "Fémofem némndafi tawaramangi nénet yéfeyot."
english: But he said to them , “ You give them something to eat .” They said , “ We have no more than five loaves and two fish , unless we should go and buy food for all these people .”

nama: Ámb efghon Yesum efrangoi ár mérén Ngánjánafé oraighét yambia a yánjo waitogh árfé tamorwén, yémon emotai fá, "Efe mérén korayawét yénd efe wém?"
english: As he was praying alone , the disciples were near him , and he asked them , “ Who do the multitudes say that I am ?”

nama: Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Ámb korayawét Jon walitogh ár, ámb árém korayawét Elaija, wénde ámb árém korayawét ndené tándáwár ámb Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár kénangote ghérsat."
english: They answered , “‘ John the Baptizer,’ but others say , ‘ Elijah ,’ and others , that one of the old prophets has risen again.”

nama: Yémon emotai, "Wénde fém wét? Fém korayangi yénd efe wém?" Fitam yawangoi, "Ngánjánene Keriso." Yesu korayau yánjo kérmén
english: He said to them , “ But who do you say that I am ?” Peter answered , “ The Christ of God .”

nama: Yesum táikér si tawawéngsotau yéfe ende yau taufrongi yénémamén. 22 A fá norayai, "Ároene Ambumom so fété kérté yéngfande tárfár yaman a yékarotat sénko árém, limánégh ghéngén wárogh árém a nák watamegh árém, a fá so fété yésmetat a nambio efogh soramé Ngánjánam so tanongé ghérsat."
english: But he warned them and commanded them to tell this to no one ,

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Fém ndimbal mwighafnar a áyáréghofnar ár, nderé teke fémafé so yénmor a ewamarotan fém? Ténémnjo fene ambum yénan."
english: Jesus answered , “Faithless and perverse generation , how long shall I be with you and bear with you ? Bring your son here .”

nama: Njamandio ambum ténmorwén, yaufi mbérmbéram yitam mbandot kosénau. Wénde Yesum yaufi mbérmbér yifnai, yéfrendai ambum a yangoi yárefafaf. 43 A fá sélngwél emormén Ngánjánene ndimbal yam wafroghan. Yesu korayau yánjo kérmén yénamayo
english: While he was still coming , the demon threw him down and convulsed him violently. But Jesus rebuked the unclean spirit , healed the boy , and gave him back to his father .

nama: "Mer kéráye káyárangi yéndon némé waufroghét féfe ewawafngon. Ároene Ambum so sén yérametat árfene ngángat." 45 Wénde fá yau mat náyátoyénd némé tésérmbnau. Ménamén ténoghe témorwén yéfefaf, fá yau mat náyátoyénd, a fá férfér tamorwén ámoghét yáfaf yénémamén. Efe so yém ndimbal
english: “ Let these words sink into your ears , for the Son of Man will be delivered up into the hands of men .”

nama: Jon norayai, "Yuré, yéndfem ár yinjongém yaufi mbérmbér tawifnau fene yétkwénan a yéta tékmbotawém, ménamém fá yau téfene yém."
english: John answered , “ Master , we saw someone casting out demons in your name , and we forbade him , because he doesn’ t follow with us .”

nama: Yesum emndai, "Yau yékmbotati ménamén emo njam yau nékarota fá siyém téfeta." Samariamén árém yékenayénd Yesu
english: Jesus said to him , “Don’t forbid him , for he who is not against us is for us .”

nama: Fá njam endmé tangmormén árom yémndai Yesu, "Yéndon so némaitotan árkamé fém njam niota."
english: As they went on the way , a certain man said to him , “ I want to follow you wherever you go , Lord .”

nama: Yesum yawangoyéng, "Ághéághafene féne té em a menafene njén té em, wénde Ároene Ambumoene sifayé yau yém kéméghét a enághét."
english: Jesus said to him , “ The foxes have holes and the birds of the sky have nests , but the Son of Man has no place to lay his head .”

nama: Yémon yémndai ámb ár, "Kwénmaito yénd." Wénde árém yawangoi, "Yuré, yénd so fronde nangotan méngot kétán tane afé kér njam yém yéndon so yiyátotan soramé yéndon so kémaiton."
english: He said to another , “ Follow me !” But he said , “ Lord , allow me first to go and bury my father .”

nama: Yesum yémndai fá, "Kér ár yémofem so eyátotat efe em mbérmbére kérwén, wénde fém nguwano Ngánjánene limánéghmén si waitoghét."
english: But Jesus said to him , “Leave the dead to bury their own dead , but you go and announce God ’s Kingdom.”

nama: Wéi ámb norayai, "Yéndon so kémaiton fém, Yuré, wénde so fronde néngangotan tane mérén watembghét."
english: Another also said , “ I want to follow you , Lord , but first allow me to say good-bye to those who are at my house .”

nama: Yesum yawangoyéng, "Emo tarégh ásáfogh térnyangé a néreta sémta, fá féyotarofnar yém Ngánjánene limánégh ásáfoghét."
english: But Jesus said to him , “ No one , having put his hand to the plow and looking back , is fit for God ’s Kingdom.”

nama: Yesum emndai yánjo waitogh ár, "Emo fém njam niyáreta, yénd yémon so wiyárete, Njam emo fém nékena, yénd yémon wékene, wénde emo wékene yénd, fá yékene emo yénd wénmáfáretam."
english: Whoever listens to you listens to me , and whoever rejects you rejects me . Whoever rejects me rejects him who sent me .”

nama: 72 waitogh ár kénangotawét áuwéghafé fá nafroyénd, "Yuré, yaufi mbérmbér mé kénamnyongayénd téfefaf fene yétkwénan."
english: The seventy returned with joy , saying , “ Lord , even the demons are subject to us in your name !”

nama: Yéné efghon, Ngánján Mbérmbéram Yesu áuwéghe yafoi norayai, "Yéndon némuwetan fém, Afé, Yuré njafarmén a mbandmén, ménamén fémon némé etnoi yéné yam kétándmé mer mwighé ár a matyam ár tambén wénde sáfét tawakmetau kor matyamofnar árét ambumnit. Néméwét, Afé, yéné témorwén fene mer frengéghafé.
english: In that same hour , Jesus rejoiced in the Holy Spirit , and said , “ I thank you , O Father , Lord of heaven and earth , that you have hidden these things from the wise and understanding, and revealed them to little children . Yes , Father , for so it was well-pleasing in your sight .”

nama: "Méinyotio yam enramai tafaf tane Afam. Efe ámb yau mat yém Ambumoenemén mé Afaro, a efe ámb yau mat yém efe Afé yém mé Ambumro a fáro efe Ambumom ewaferyéng yá uyafoghét."
english: Turning to the disciples , he said , “ All things have been delivered to me by my Father . No one knows who the Son is , except the Father , and who the Father is , except the Son , and he to whomever the Son desires to reveal him .”

nama: Ámb efghon ámb nák watamegh ár nokayoi Yesue ufoghét a yémotai, "Watamegh ár, yéndon némé so yafrotan efalo tuot ghérsé résaghét?"
english: Behold , a certain lawyer stood up and tested him , saying , “ Teacher , what shall I do to inherit eternal life ?”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Némé si yékai nák kénjún? Fémo ndernáye yafene?"
english: He said to him , “ What is written in the law ? How do you read it ?”

nama: Yémo yawangoi, "'Yuwetang Yuré fene Ngánján méinyotio fene tikfe, méinyotio fene mbérmbére, méinyotio fene waftaye, méinyotio fene mwighaye,' a 'Yuweta fenjo kaka ár ndenéyameyo fémyo ndernáye náuwete.'"
english: He answered , “ You shall love the Lord your God with all your heart , with all your soul , with all your strength , and with all your mind ; and your neighbor as yourself .”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Efalo, yéné yafrota a fém so nakete."
english: He said to him , “ You have answered correctly . Do this , and you will live .”

nama: Wénde fá ménde témorwén fáyo sái kauyafongai, féyo yémo Yesu yémotai, "A efe yém tane fútar?"
english: But he , desiring to justify himself , asked Jesus , “ Who is my neighbor ?”

nama: "Yéné nambio mérénta fém ndernáye nemne efe fútar yém yáyot efe oro téfnáram yésmetaménd?"
english: Now which of these three do you think seemed to be a neighbor to him who fell among the robbers ?”

nama: Nák watamegh árom yawangoi, "Yéné ár fiyém emon ghérghérsisafé yinjoi." Yesum yémndai, "Nguwano a yénéyamyo yafrota." Mata a Meri
english: He said , “ He who showed mercy on him .” Then Jesus said to him , “ Go and do likewise .”

nama: Yuram yawangoi, "Mata, Mata, fém némawérsotat a mwighat néméindat tárfár rokaram, 42 wénde ámbiro rokar náláite. Merim té yafer némé mer yém, a yau so tanangé yá tambén."
english: Jesus answered her , “ Martha , Martha , you are anxious and troubled about many things ,

nama: Ámb efghon Yesu Ngánjánjafé koraiwét fénaté sifayan. Njam yifoi, ámb yánjo waitogh árém yémndai fá, "Yuré, ténmatameta Ngánjánafé orayégh, ndené fété Joném ndernáye tawatametau yánjo waitogh ár."
english: When he finished praying in a certain place , one of his disciples said to him , “ Lord , teach us to pray , just as John also taught his disciples .”

nama: Yesum emndai fá, "Fém njam Ngánjánafé norayet, ndené koraya: "Afé, utmanéghafé fene njúnnjúnofnar yétkwén, fene limánégh so yéném.
english: He said to them , “ When you pray , say , ‘ Our Father in heaven, may your name be kept holy. May your Kingdom come . May your will be done on earth, as it is in heaven.

nama: Méinyotio efghon njamke so yénmaramete.
english: Give us day by day our daily bread.

nama: Kénmawalindangé téfene yaufi, ménamén yénd yéfene yaufi yénmawalinda emofem ewafrotat téfefaf. A yau yénd yénérsa ufoghan."
english: Forgive us our sins, for we ourselves also forgive everyone who is indebted to us . Bring us not into temptation , but deliver us from the evil one .’”

nama: Féyo Yesum emndai fá, "Fém ámb njam ném fútarafé, a fá nuwanoi yáfaf sémbár néndkéfan a norayai, 'Fútar, kwaram nambio féskaf flawé, 6 ménamén tane fútar té téném nayuta tafaf, a yéndon némé ámb yau téfrendan yáyot!'
english: He said to them , “ Which of you , if you go to a friend at midnight and tell him , ‘ Friend , lend me three loaves of bread,

nama: "Féyo yénd norayan féfefaf: Kamota a so kémaramangé; yéronja a so tinjo; náutána a feyot sésafne so kasawérngé. 10 Ménamén méinyotio ár emofem namotat so yanangi, méinyotio ár efe yéronjat so tinjongi; fá efe náutánat, sésafne so kasawérngé.
english: “ I tell you , keep asking , and it will be given you . Keep seeking , and you will find . Keep knocking , and it will be opened to you .

nama: "Njam muyafé ár yakai umaneghkaf yambwete yánjo méngo táf yáne rokar mer so em. 22 Wénde njam minde muyafé árom tésmangé a taindangé fá, yémon tangwanangé mék rokar árkéménayan yuré kamyotau a efaloi némé yémon ewanai oroe.
english: “ When the strong man , fully armed , guards his own dwelling, his goods are safe .

nama: "Efe yau yéndfé yénre, fá siyém ta kenagh ár, a emon yénd yau sái wáutána umengan, fá so nironat.
english: “ He who is not with me is against me . He who doesn’ t gather with me scatters .

nama: Yesum njam korayau yénémamén, amaf nutnayéng ár mérén kénjún, "Frengéghkaf amaf yém emo náráftam a endene nonoyan kanotau."
english: It came to pass , as he said these things , a certain woman out of the multitude lifted up her voice and said to him , “ Blessed is the womb that bore you , and the breasts which nursed you !”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Frengéghkaf fá em efe náyáretat Ngánjánene si a wafroghan tékmangi." Jonane yam ufarogh
english: But he said , “ On the contrary , blessed are those who hear the word of God , and keep it .”

nama: Yesum njam si yifoi Farasi árom yumyoi yémafe nénet. Féyo Yesu naflai a námnjoi nénet. 38 Wénde Farasi ár sélngwél yémormén ménamén ngángé umbarghofnar Yesum néne ewafngoi.
english: Now as he spoke , a certain Pharisee asked him to dine with him . He went in and sat at the table.

nama: Yuram yémndai Farasi ár, "Fém Farasi ár kafusi a sin faruro esénnati, wénde kénjún fém sem kwénjta a yaufi kér ro. 40 Fém afrengéghofnar árǃ Fém mat em emo faru yafrotam, wéi ndenáyo yafrotam kénjú? 41 Wénde tawaram némé enyau fene kénjún yauyau árét, méinyotio so em féfeyot njúnnjúnofnar.
english: The Lord said to him , “ Now you Pharisees cleanse the outside of the cup and of the platter , but your inward part is full of extortion and wickedness .

nama: "Nderé mámáfi so yém Farasi ár féfeyot, ménamén féfene ramégh siyém Ngánjáneyot méinyotio ndau tambén, wénde fémofem yékenati Ngánjánene uwégh a mbarkánd yam. Fémofem so otameghét yékmetati Ngánjánene uwégh a mbarkánd yam, a yau nékmbotati ndau njamke raméghta.
english: But woe to you Pharisees ! For you tithe mint and rue and every herb , but you bypass justice and God ’s love. You ought to have done these , and not to have left the other undone.

nama: "Nderé mámáfi so yém Farasi ár féfeyot, ménamén fémofem méndefé yéfandati mer ámnjogh sifayé áumengégh méngon, a áuwégh si utmanégh térarégh sifayan.
english: Woe to you Pharisees ! For you love the best seats in the synagogues and the greetings in the marketplaces.

nama: "Nderé mámáfi so yém Farasi ár féfeyot, ménamén fém ndenanit em wayamngoghofnar mbéwé, árkamé ár eyota matofnar."
english: Woe to you , scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites! For you are like hidden graves , and the men who walk over them don’ t know it .”

nama: Ámb nák watamegh árom yawangoi, "Watamegh ár, njam fém noraye yénémamén, fémon mámáfi yénd yényátote ndenáye."
english: One of the lawyers answered him , “ Teacher , in saying this you insult us also .”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Fém, nák watamegh ár, nderé mámáfi so yém féfeyot, ménamén fémofem árét ewafayotati kérté résaghét, wénde fémofem yau so ewáutánati kérté résaghét ámbiro tombé min ngángaye yéfe wáutárghét.
english: He said , “ Woe to you lawyers also ! For you load men with burdens that are difficult to carry, and you yourselves won’ t even lift one finger to help carry those burdens .

nama: "Nderé mámáfi so yém nák watamegh téfnárét, ménamén fémofem mé té tamndawét yéné ki matyam sésafne sauréghmén. Fémyo yau so kélawangi kénjút, a fémofem ekmbotati fá efe élaughét narametat."
english: Woe to you lawyers ! For you took away the key of knowledge . You didn’ t enter in yourselves , and those who were entering in , you hindered .”

nama: Njam Yesu nuwanoi kété, Farasi ár a nák watamegh téfnár nékwe tasotawét a ámogh si tarametawét tárfár yammén, 54 kawanjetawét sái terangayénd Yesu ménáyan némé yaufi si sái korayangai.
english: As he said these things to them , the scribes and the Pharisees began to be terribly angry, and to draw many things out of him ,

nama: "Njam fém nénémnjat áumengégh méngot, limánégh ár a muyafé árfefaf, fém yau mámé mwighé em ndernáye fém so nawamarotati o fém némé so norayati, 12 ménamén Ngánján Mbérmbéram so ewatamete fém yéné efghon némé so norayati." Wemár mámáfi ároene rengerenge si
english: When they bring you before the synagogues , the rulers, and the authorities , don’ t be anxious how or what you will answer or what you will say ;

nama: Ámb ár norayai mérén kénjún yáfaf, "Watamegh ár, témnde tane ané faloghét némé tane afam euroi."
english: One of the multitude said to him , “ Teacher , tell my brother to divide the inheritance with me .”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Fútar, emo wékafai yénd ménát yéndon efalotan rokarrokar féfene néndkéfan sómbio ár?" 15 Ndenaye fá norayai yéfefaf, "Kor fété! Ménamén féfene méinyotio fénatafénaté kwénjtamén; ménamén féfene ghérsé yau so rokaram tawanjarngé."
english: But he said to him , “ Man , who made me a judge or an arbitrator over you ?”

nama: Féyo Yesum emndayéng yéné rengerenge si: "Kété témorwén ámb wemár ár efe témorwén mband yuré némé kanotawét mer rokar ndawan. 17 Fá nemnayéng, 'Yéndo némé so yafrotan? Tane yau kor sifayé yém ánde tane méinyotio rokar so ewamndan.'
english: He spoke a parable to them , saying , “ The ground of a certain rich man produced abundantly.

nama: "Wénde Ngánjánam yémndai fá, 'Fém mámáfi árǃ Yéné sémbáran fémon fene ghérsé so téram. Féyo emon so tawanangé méinyotio rokar fémon némé té táfrende fendio?'
english: “ But God said to him , ‘ You foolish one , tonight your soul is required of you . The things which you have prepared — whose will they be ?’

nama: "Yéné fiyém ndernáye so yém ámb ár emon rokar ewamnde yandio wénde yau em wemár ár Ngánján kénjún." Mámé mwighé yau
english: So is he who lays up treasure for himself , and is not rich toward God .”

nama: Fitam yémotai, "Yuré, Fémo yéné rengerenge si noraye téfendro o méinyotio árét?"
english: Peter said to him , “ Lord , are you telling this parable to us , or to everybody?”

nama: "Árom yawangoi, 'Yuré, mé koro ámbiro yunjfot, a yéndon so yétanan téndomé dégwrot. 9 Njam kafongé kétamé yunjfan, merǃ Yau njam, téngnéf.'" Aknyégh amafom frengégh yanai Safatan
english: He answered , ‘ Lord , leave it alone this year also , until I dig around it and fertilize it .

nama: Áumengégh méngo limángégh ár nékw témorwén ménamén Yesum mer táyátotau Safatan, fá korayau árfefaf, "Kété sem 6 efogh ásáfoghét. Féyo eném frengéghét yéné efghon, yau Safatan."
english: The ruler of the synagogue, being indignant because Jesus had healed on the Sabbath , said to the multitude , “ There are six days in which men ought to work . Therefore come on those days and be healed , and not on the Sabbath day !”

nama: Yuram yawangoi yá, "Fém efe farun mer néretati wénde kénjún yauǃ Fémofem túmén taférngi kau o ndonki kétándmé kwélalta a talimángi nuot Safatan. 16 Féyo yéné amaf, Ebraamene mérés, efe Sáifram yumbai yékeindam 18 yunjéf. Fá fété nawanjar Safatan kétándmé némé yam yékeinda."
english: Therefore the Lord answered him , “ You hypocrites ! Doesn’ t each one of you free his ox or his donkey from the stall on the Sabbath and lead him away to water ?

nama: Yesum njam korayau yéné, yáne mék téfnár wáiwái yam ewifoi, wénde ár káuwetawét némé mer Yesum tawafrotau. Rengerenge si némbne mbwe a yist
english: As he said these things , all his adversaries were disappointed ; and all the multitude rejoiced for all the glorious things that were done by him .

nama: Féyo Yesum namotai, "Ndernáye nérete Ngánjánene limánégh? Némayafé so yétémndan? 19 Ndenanit némbne mbwe, árom yéngwanai yiyai yánjo ndawan a nanotam wén náyátoi, a menam njén tarametawét yéné kafeyamé."
english: He said , “ What is God ’s Kingdom like ? To what shall I compare it ?

nama: Wéikor Yesu namotai, "Yéndon némayafé so yétémndan Ngánjánene limánégh? 21 Ndené fété yist amafom yanai a yérémnam nambio flawé baik. Féyo méinyotio flawé néminam ndimbal kofékofé namndai." Némbne sésafne
english: Again he said , “ To what shall I compare God ’s Kingdom?

nama: Yesu njam tiotau Jerusalemét, yémo tangwatametau tesenamé a méngotuamé. 23 Ámb árom yémotai Yesu, "Yuré, féyotaro nambio árro so tawanjar?"
english: He went on his way through cities and villages , teaching , and traveling on to Jerusalem .

nama: "Féyo fém so korayangi, 'Yéndfem njamke a nu tánetawém fémafé, a fémon ténmatametau endmé.'
english: Then you will begin to say , ‘ We ate and drank in your presence , and you taught in our streets .’

nama: "Wénde yémon so tawawangongé, 'Yénd mafina wém fém o fém árkamé eném. Kitrongi ta tambén, fém méinyotio yaufiyam wafrogh téfnárǃ'
english: He will say , ‘ I tell you , I don’t know where you come from . Depart from me , all you workers of iniquity.’

nama: Yesum emotai, "Njam endene ámbiro ambum o kau kuyangé kétán yékwét Safatan, fémo wékeye yau so turto?" 6 A yéfeyot ámb yau si.
english: He answered them , “ Which of you , if your son or an ox fell into a well , wouldn’ t immediately pull him out on a Sabbath day ?”

nama: Soramé Yesum si waitogh yifoi, ámb wan ár norayai, "Frengégh yém yáyot emo so enete téménd kénjún Ngánjánene limánéghan!"
english: When one of those who sat at the table with him heard these things , he said to him , “ Blessed is he who will feast in God ’s Kingdom!”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Ámb árom téfrendau ndimbal téménd a eumyoi tárfár wan téfnár. 17 Téménd efghon, yémo ewáfáretam yánjo ásáfogh ár tanwaufrongi efe té eumyon, 'Taném, sénonjo méinyotio rokar siyém frengéghkaf yém.'
english: But he said to him , “ A certain man made a great supper , and he invited many people .

nama: "Wénde yémofem si waufrogh ewafngoyénd. Fronde ár norayai, 'Yéndon mband té yanan, a yénd so wéngém fandaghét. Ghérghérsisé kwawalo tayot.'
english: They all as one began to make excuses . “ The first said to him , ‘ I have bought a field, and I must go and see it . Please have me excused .’

nama: "Ámb norayai, 'Yéndo té ewanan 5 kau, a yénd álighan wém so eufotan. Ghérghérsisé kwawalo tayot.'
english: “ Another said , ‘ I have bought five yoke of oxen , and I must go try them out . Please have me excused .’

nama: "Wéi ámb norayai, 'Yénd somé naweran. Féyo yénd yau so wéném.'
english: “ Another said , ‘ I have married a wife , and therefore I can ’t come .’

nama: "Ásáfogh téfnár nangotam a kafrotau yéné yánjo yurafaf. Féyo méngo yuré nékwafé naféghetam a yáfáretam yánjo ásáfogh téfnár, 'Nguwano kétor wékeye némbne endmé a kéghat endmé yéné tesenan a tanwasro yauyau ár, aknyégh ár, ghékéf kwéfkwéf ár a wawér.'
english: “ That servant came , and told his lord these things . Then the master of the house , being angry , said to his servant , ‘ Go out quickly into the streets and lanes of the city , and bring in the poor , maimed, blind , and lame .’

nama: "Ásáfogh téfnárom yémndai 'Yuré, fémon némé wémndai té kufrote, wénde kété mé em sifayé.'
english: “ The servant said , ‘ Lord , it is done as you commanded , and there is still room .’

nama: "Féyo yuram yémndai yánjo ásáfogh téfnár, 'Nguwano kétor némbne endmé a kéghat endét a tanwaurémnau, 'Kénaflangi kénjút,' ménát tane méngo so yém afoghare. 24 Yéndon némndetan, efe fronde eumyongén yémofem yau so tufongi tane njamkeǃ'" Waitogh ároene yam
english: “ The lord said to the servant , ‘ Go out into the highways and hedges , and compel them to come in , that my house may be filled .

nama: "Njam efe ár ménde yém ndimbal méngo ramghét, fá fronde so kámnjongé a nufénmeta yéfanda njénamb mani yém wifoghét. 29 Yémon so tafngongé méngo ramégh, wénde yau so tifongé. Féyo méinyotio árém yéfandat némé nufrote so yurtat fá. 30 Fá korayawét, 'Yéné árom yérnyai ramégh wénde yau yifoi.'
english: For which of you , desiring to build a tower , doesn’ t first sit down and count the cost , to see if he has enough to complete it ?

nama: "Sol siyém mer yém, wénde yáne ménde njam kefongé, ndernáye so sol nawafarnjé wéikor? 35 Yau mer yém mbandot o ámb rokarot, árém táf yéngwitat. Efe njam ténganafé yém, so káyárangé yéné si."
english: “Salt is good , but if the salt becomes flat and tasteless , with what do you season it ?

nama: Mani kafégh ár a yaufiyam téfnár méinyotio káumendawét áyárghét yáfaf. 2 Wénde Farasi ár a nák watamegh ár mike nufngoyénd, "Yéné árom eumyote yaufiyam ár ménát yémafe nénet."
english: Now all the tax collectors and sinners were coming close to him to hear him .

nama: "Táfandio, fronde sénko ambum témorwén ndawan. Fá njam nénáyátoi méngo kaka, fá náyárayéng wagh ke a ermángégh. 26 Féyo yémon yanmoi ámb faiofnar ásáfogh ár a yémotai némé yam nufrote. 27 Yémon yawangoi, 'Fene néngén té nufar, a fene afam yarsafé kau té yésém ménamén fá yéna yém a merro yém.'
english: “ Now his elder son was in the field. As he came near to the house , he heard music and dancing .

nama: "Yárefé norayai, 'Tane ambum, fém túmén yéndfé ténre. Méinyotio rokar tane sem fene em. 32 Wénde yéndfem ásneghafé a áuwégh tafrotam ménamén fengén kér yémormén a sénonjo ghérsé yém. Fá nolindai a sénonjo yéna yém.'"
english: “ He said to him , ‘ Son , you are always with me , and all that is mine is yours .

nama: "Wanjengégh ár norayai yáfafétio, 'Yéndon némé so yafrotan sénonjo? Tane yuram tane ásáfoghta wutér. Yénd muyafnar wém targhét, a yénd wáiwái wém ómnengéghét. 4 Yénd mat wém némé yéndon so yafrotan ménát árém mé so umyotat yénd yéfene méngomé njam yéndon tanjo ásáfogh koron.'
english: “ The manager said within himself , ‘ What will I do , seeing that my lord is taking away the management position from me ? I don’ t have strength to dig . I am ashamed to beg .

nama: "Féyo yémon tamotau ámbiroámbiroe yáne yurane fai wangoghét. Yémo yémotai fronde ár, 'Njénamb fai ekmang tane yurane?' 6 Yémo yawangoi, '20 dram olif wékwér.' Wanjengégh árom yémndai fá, 'Téngwan fenjo fefé, kámnjo wékeye, a tafarota 10 dram.'
english: Calling each one of his lord ’ s debtors to him , he said to the first , ‘ How much do you owe to my lord ?’

nama: "Wéi yémo yémotai yénamayo ár, 'Fefaf njénamb em?' Yémon yawangoi yá, '1,000 flawé baik.' Yémon yémndai fá, 'Téngwan fenjo fefé. Tafarota kétán 800 flawé baikot.'
english: Then he said to another , ‘ How much do you owe ?’ He said , ‘ A hundred cors of wheat .’ He said to him , ‘ Take your bill , and write eighty .’

nama: "Yuram tuwetau yáne unyégh rokar wanjengégh ár ménamén fá kawarawenau merkéráye. Ár yéné mbandan nawarawenat merkéráye wénde kwayaghane ár yau ndené em. 9 Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe, fútar náyátotati fémyo mband rokere, njam tafrango, fém so kémumyongé tuot méngotuot.
english: “ His lord commended the dishonest manager because he had done wisely , for the children of this world are , in their own generation , wiser than the children of the light .

nama: "Ásáfogh ár yau so yém sómbio yurafene limánégh mbanmbanan. Fémon so yékene ámb a so yuwete ámb, o fém so kamnyong ámbfaf a tékena ámb. Yénémamén fém yau so sómbio limánégh mbanmbanan ném, Ngánján a mani."
english: No servant can serve two masters , for either he will hate the one and love the other ; or else he will hold to one and despise the other . You aren’ t able to serve God and Mammon .”

nama: Farasi ár sem mani méndero ár em. Yémofem njam náyárayénd yéné si a fén yafngoyénd Yesu. 15 Yesum emndai fá, "Fém yéné féyém efe mer nitaro kénamndangi árfene ghékfan, wénde Ngánján mat yém féfene tikéf. Némé minde tukén árfene mwighayan fifiofnar yém Ngánjánene ghékfan.
english: The Pharisees , who were lovers of money , also heard all these things , and they scoffed at him .

nama: "Mosesene nák a Ngánjánene mat yátogh ároene watamegh si táitotawét kétánotio Jonene efogh. Kétándmé yéné efghon, Ngánjánene limánéghmén mer si waitogh yérnyai, méinyotio árém end táronjawét kétán Ngánjánene limánéghfaf. 17 Áfráte yém njafar a mband so kawaindangend, wénde némbne si Ngánjánene sian yau so titrém.
english: “ The law and the prophets were until John . From that time the Good News of God ’s Kingdom is preached , and everyone is forcing his way into it .

nama: "Emon njam yánjo amaf tatembangé a kawerangé ámb amaf kamndangé amafanyo wanégh ár a emon njam watembégh amaf kawerangé káyátongé áranyo wanégh ár. Wemár ár a Lajarus
english: “ Everyone who divorces his wife and marries another commits adultery . He who marries one who is divorced from a husband commits adultery .

nama: "Wénde Ebraamém yawangoi, 'Ambum, kawafarota kété fene ghérsé ámnjogh efghon, fém meran kénmorwén, táf Lajarus yauyauan, wénde sénonjo fá enaghan yém yéna a fém tékrátan. 26 Ámb téfén siyém, féyotarofnar yém yéné ménamén yékw ndimbalam yénfalowé, ménát efe ménde éférmanéghét yénandmé fefaf siyém táikér yém.'
english: “ But Abraham said , ‘ Son , remember that you , in your lifetime , received your good things , and Lazarus , in the same way , bad things . But here he is now comforted and you are in anguish.

nama: "Yémo yawangoi, 'Féyo yéndon némamnendan fém, afé, téngwáfáreta Lajarus kétán tane afane méngot, 28 ménamén tane em 5 néngnéf. Mat so táyátongé fá yau so eném yéné tékrát sifayat.'
english: “ He said , ‘ I ask you therefore , father , that you would send him to my father ’s house —

nama: "Ebraamém yawangoi, 'Buk kété em Moses a Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár efarotaménd, fá sái náyáretat yéfendio.'
english: “ But Abraham said to him , ‘ They have Moses and the prophets . Let them listen to them .’

nama: "Fá norayai, 'Yau, afé Ebraam, ámb kér ár njam néngangota kétán yéfefaf, fá so kawengongi.'
english: “ He said , ‘ No , father Abraham, but if one goes to them from the dead , they will repent .’

nama: "Fá norayai yáfaf, 'Yau njam náyáretat Moses a Ngánjánene mat yátogh ároefaf, fá yau so nawengotat wéi ndenéyameyo kér tambén njam kénangongé ghérsat.'"
english: “ He said to him , ‘ If they don’ t listen to Moses and the prophets , neither will they be persuaded if one rises from the dead .’”

nama: Njam yémo yaufi yafrota fefaf 7 mbinotmé ámbiro efogh kénjún, a 7 mbinotmé nénangota wéikor fefaf a korayangé, 'Yénd té nawengon,' fémon tawalinda."
english: If he sins against you seven times in the day , and seven times returns , saying , ‘ I repent ,’ you shall forgive him .”

nama: Yesuene muyafé ár norayayénd Yurafaf, "Yuré, ténmamina téfene ndimbal mwighéǃ"
english: The apostles said to the Lord , “ Increase our faith .”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Njam fene ndimbal mwighé yém ndenanit némbne mbwe, fém féyotaro so koraya yéné ndimbal wénfaf, 'Karufang a kayang arakafan,' a so kényárángé fém.
english: The Lord said , “ If you had faith like a grain of mustard seed , you would tell this sycamore tree , ‘ Be uprooted and be planted in the sea ,’ and it would obey you .

nama: Yesu álighan témorwén Jerusalemét, tiotau Samaria a Galili yu néndkéfan. 12 Fá njam kufanau méngotuot, 10 ár yaufi ghéngan enjnefé tamorwén yéfángoyénd fá. Fá nénokayoyénd nayu 13 a nutnayénd minde tukén, "Yesu, Yuré, ghérghérsisé téfeyotǃ"
english: As he was on his way to Jerusalem , he was passing along the borders of Samaria and Galilee .

nama: Yesum ewinjoi fá a norayai, "Nguanongi, ngauyafongi fémyo ghéngén wárogh árfefaf." A njamandio néngwanoyénd, fá mer néngamndayénd.
english: When he saw them , he said to them , “ Go and show yourselves to the priests .” As they went , they were cleansed .

nama: Ámbiroam, njam yinjoi frengégham yanai, nénangoi, Ngánján tuwetawét minde tukén. 16 Fá budme niyai Yesuene kafkaffaf, kánjo yaramai yáyot. Fá témorwén Samariamén ár.
english: One of them , when he saw that he was healed , turned back , glorifying God with a loud voice .

nama: Yesum yémotai, "Némé 10 ár méinyotio frengéghkaf em? Ánde ámb 9 ár em? 18 Némamén yéné Téndo árro nénangoi Ngánján frengéghét?" 19 Féyo Yesum yémndai fá, "Kokai a nguwano. Fenjo ndimbal mwighayam mer té niyáto." Ngánjánene limánégh
english: Jesus answered , “Weren’ t the ten cleansed ? But where are the nine ?

nama: Ámb efghon Farasi árém yémotai Yesu, "Njam so Ngánjánene limánégh yéném?" Yesum ewawangoi, "Ngánjánene limánégh yau yéném yéné ende fémon so tinjo fenjo ghékfe. 21 Fém yau so norayati, 'Siyém' o 'Kété yém' ménamén Ngánjánene limánégh siyém féfene kénjún yém."
english: Being asked by the Pharisees when God ’s Kingdom would come , he answered them , “ God ’s Kingdom doesn’ t come with observation ;

nama: "Ndenaye fété Noane efghon kés tamorwén, ndenéyameyo so yém Ároene Ambumoene efghon. 27 Árém njamke a nu tánetawét, amaf ár kaweretawét kétán efogh nawerai Noa nélawai minde ndimbal ngárndot. Féyo táf kéfér nakmai a yérambaryéng méinyotio ár.
english: As it was in the days of Noah , even so it will also be in the days of the Son of Man .

nama: "Ndenéyameyo tamorwén Lotene efghon. Árém njamke a nu tánetawét, kéufnamotawét rokar, njamke yéghan a méngo raméghan. 29 Wénde yéné efghon Lotém yéfrangoi Sodom, fés a fésafé wím kénuitawét njafarta nunit kafamndau, a yérambaryéng méinyotio ár.
english: Likewise , even as it was in the days of Lot : they ate , they drank , they bought, they sold , they planted , they built ;

nama: Yémofem yémotayénd, "Ándan, Yuré?" Yesum ewawangoi, "Ánde kér fú yém, ndikáké kété so náumendat."
english: They , answering, asked him , “ Where , Lord ?” He said to them , “ Where the body is , there the vultures will also be gathered together .”

nama: "Nák sénko árom yékenai ámb efghot, wénde ambinomén norayai yánjomén, 'Yénd férférofnar wém Ngánjánefaf a utmanéghofnar árfefaf, 5 wénde yéné kwiram túmén wawérsote yénd, yéndon so tinjon yáfaf mbarkánd, ménát yau so nénatérne tafaf túménǃ'"
english: He wouldn’ t for a while ; but afterward he said to himself , ‘ Though I neither fear God nor respect man ,

nama: "Wénde mani kafégh ár takayongérwén nayu. Fá yau néwewoi ndenáyo njafarot, wénde yánjo kafan nasmai a norayai, 'Ngánján, ghérghérsisé tayot, yénd yaufi ár wém.'
english: But the tax collector , standing far away , wouldn’ t even lift up his eyes to heaven , but beat his chest , saying , ‘ God , be merciful to me , a sinner!’

nama: "Yéndon némndetan fém, yéné yaufi ár, yau ndené Farasi ár, fá kangotau méngot áuwéghafé Ngánjánene sáfrére. Fém njam nawarmbota ámb árfefaf, fém so kémeworngi, a fém njam yuwan ném, fém so ném tukén." Ambumtértér a Yesu
english: I tell you , this man went down to his house justified rather than the other ; for everyone who exalts himself will be humbled , but he who humbles himself will be exalted .”

nama: Ámb Ju sénko árom yémotai fá, "Mer watamegh ár, némé yéndon so yafrotan tuot ghérsé résaghét?"
english: A certain ruler asked him , saying , “ Good Teacher , what shall I do to inherit eternal life ?”
