nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Némamén wémndete yénd mer? Efe yau mer yém fá Ngánjánro. 20 Fém mat ném náknák, 'Amafanyo wanégh yau, ár ngi yau, oro yau, unyégh yau, eutmanwé afé a amé.'"
english: Jesus asked him , “ Why do you call me good ? No one is good , except one : God .

nama: Yémo yémndai, "Kétándmayo yénd tosé kwémorwén, yéndon yéné méinyotio nák tawarawénawén." 22 Yesum njam náyárai yéné, fá norayai yáfaf, "Fefaf mé náláite ámb yam wafroghét. Etérna maniot fene némé em méinyotio, ewarameta yéfeyot yauyau árét, a fém so ném wemár njafaran. Féyo kénaf, kwénmaito yénd."
english: He said , “ I have observed all these things from my youth up .”

nama: Fá efe náyárayénd yéné ámoghan, "Efe so wét kunjarngé?"
english: Those who heard it said , “ Then who can be saved ?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Némé táikér yém árét Ngánjáneyot siyém áfrat."
english: But he said , “ The things which are impossible with men are possible with God .”

nama: Fité norayai yáfaf, "Yéndfem enfrangongém méinyotio téfene némé tam fém némaitongémǃ"
english: Peter said , “ Look , we have left everything and followed you .”

nama: Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe efaloe, yéndon mat eyátotan méinyotio ár emo efrango méngo, amaf, yanaf, yárefaf, ambumtértér Ngánjánene limánégh téfnan 30 so kor ewinjotati tárfár mbinotmé sénonjo yéné ghérayan, a so akegh ghérsé tinjongi Ngánjáneta soramé yuwon." Yesu wéikor korayau yánjo kérmén
english: He said to them , “ Most certainly I tell you , there is no one who has left house , or wife , or brothers, or parents , or children , for God ’s Kingdom’s sake ,

nama: Wénde waitogh ár yau mat náyátoyénd yénémamén. Yénayoene fifi tétnongérwén kétándmé yéfe tambne, a fá yau mat náyátoyénd némémén fá korayau. Yesum mer yiyátoi ghékéf kwéfkwéf ómnengégh ár
english: They understood none of these things . This saying was hidden from them , and they didn’ t understand the things that were said .

nama: Njamandio Yesum tánetau Jeriko, ghékéf kwéfkwéf ár témorangérwén end téndon kómnendau. 36 Njam yémon eyárai ár mérén álighan kawaindawét, fá namotai némé yam nufrote. 37 Yémofem yaufroyénd yá, "Yesu Najaretmén siyém nawainde."
english: As he came near Jericho , a certain blind man sat by the road , begging .

nama: Fá nutnayéng, "Yesu, Deifidene ambum, so ghérghérsisé ném tafafǃ"
english: He cried out , “ Jesus , you son of David , have mercy on me !”

nama: Fá efe tangmorwén endmé yarnayénd fá a yémndayénd, "Métar kékmboǃ" Wénde fá yéméindayénd minde keyot, "Deifidene ambum, so ghérghérsisé ném tafafǃ"
english: Those who led the way rebuked him , that he should be quiet ; but he cried out all the more , “ You son of David , have mercy on me !”

nama: Yesu nékmboi a tamndangé ár yáfaf ménjaghét. Njam nénaflai kaka, Yesum témotangé fá, 41 "Némé wafroghét ménde ném tafaf?" Yémon yawangoi, "Yuré, yénd ménde wém éreghét."
english: Standing still , Jesus commanded him to be brought to him . When he had come near , he asked him ,

nama: A Yesum yémndai fá, "Féyotaro so kéretaǃ Fenjo ndimbal mwighayam némanjar fém." 43 Táf fété fá ghékéf néretai a yémon yáitoi Yesu, tuwetau Ngánján. Njam méinyotio árém yinjoyénd, yémofem wéi ndenáyo Ngánján tuwetawét.
english: Jesus said to him , “ Receive your sight . Your faith has healed you .”

nama: Njam Yesu nufaryéng yéné sifayan, Yesu néwewoi tukét a yémndai fá, "Jekies, kénewor wékeye yuwot. Fene méngon sénonjo so wémor." 6 Féyo fá néneworyéng wékeye a Yesu áuwéghafé yumyoi yánjo méngot.
english: When Jesus came to the place , he looked up and saw him , and said to him , “ Zacchaeus , hurry and come down , for today I must stay at your house .”

nama: Méinyotio árém yinjoyénd yéné yam a mikemike nufngoyénd, "Fá néngwanoi wan téfnár náyátoi yaufi ároefaf."
english: When they saw it , they all murmured , saying , “ He has gone in to lodge with a man who is a sinner.”

nama: Wénde Jekies nokayoi a norayai Yurafaf, "Kéreta, Yuréǃ Sénonjo yénandmé yéndon efalotan néndkéfan tane rokar yauyau árét, a yénd njam té kuindan árfefaf rokarmén, so ewangotan yéfene fai fo mbinotma."
english: Zacchaeus stood and said to the Lord , “ Behold , Lord , half of my goods I give to the poor . If I have wrongfully exacted anything of anyone , I restore four times as much .”

nama: Yesu norayai yáfaf, "Sénonjo wanjarégh yém yéné méngot, ménamén yéné ár siyém Ebraamene ákimén. 10 Ménamén Ároene Ambum yénmormén ronjaghét olingégh ár wanjarghét." Rengerenge si ten faiofnar ásáfogh árfenemén
english: Jesus said to him , “ Today , salvation has come to this house , because he also is a son of Abraham.

nama: "Wénde yánjo árém méndméndat tafandawét a ewáfáretam fénaté ásáfogh mérén soramé fá norayayénd, 'Yénd méndefnar yéném yéné ár sái kamndangé téfene warsagh ár.'
english: But his citizens hated him , and sent an envoy after him , saying , ‘ We don’ t want this man to reign over us .’

nama: "Fá náyátoi warsagh ár féyo fá nénangotam méngotuot. Féyo yémon ewáfáretam faiofnar ásáfogh ár kétán endefet mani ewarametam ménát matot njénamb mani ewafrotaménd.
english: “ When he had come back again , having received the kingdom, he commanded these servants , to whom he had given the money, to be called to him , that he might know what they had gained by conducting business .

nama: "Fronde ámbiro ár yénmormén a norayai, 'Yuré, fene maniam té efuna ámb ten.'
english: The first came before him , saying , ‘ Lord , your mina has made ten more minas .’

nama: "Yáne yuram yawangoi, 'Mer yém. Tane mer faiofnar ásáfogh árǃ Ménamén fém té efalo náyáto némbne mani funaghan, fémon so ewanjete ten ndimbal tesen.'
english: “ He said to him , ‘ Well done , you good servant ! Because you were found faithful with very little , you shall have authority over ten cities .’

nama: "Sómbiomén yénmormén a norayai, 'Yuré, fene maniam té efuna ámb 5.'
english: “ The second came , saying , ‘ Your mina , Lord , has made five minas .’

nama: "Yáne yuram yawangoi, 'Fémon so ewanjete 5 ndimbal tesen.'
english: “ So he said to him , ‘ And you are to be over five cities .’

nama: "Nambiomén faiofnar ásáfogh ár yénmormén a norayai, 'Yuré, fene mani siyém. Yéndon fene mani tamndan a etnoyén sáláme sutafé. 21 Yénd fenemén férfér kwémorwén ménamén fém ném táikér ár. Fémon totér némé yau yélawai a yétane némé yau yiyáyéng.'
english: Another came , saying , ‘ Lord , behold , your mina , which I kept laid away in a handkerchief ,

nama: "Féyo yémon fá emndai efe tawakayongérwén kaka, 'Takawangi yáne mani yá tambén a taramangi yá efe ten maniafé yém.'
english: He said to those who stood by , ‘ Take the mina away from him and give it to him who has the ten minas .’

nama: "Fá norayayénd, 'Yuré, té náyátongi ten mani yáneǃ'
english: “ They said to him , ‘ Lord , he has ten minas !’

nama: "Yémon tawangongé, 'Yéndon némndetan ndenáye méinyotio endene tárfár em, yá so taramangi tárfár, wénde endene yau em, so takawangi. 27 Wénde tane mék téfnár efe em méndefnar fá em yénd sái wém yéfene warsagh ár, tanwasrongi a tásmetangi tane sáfrére.'" Yesu warsagh ár nélawete Jerusalemét
english: ‘ For I tell you that to everyone who has , will more be given ; but from him who doesn’ t have , even that which he has will be taken away from him .

nama: Yéné efe ewafareméng nuwaneyayénd a yinjeyayénd ndernáye té engémndeyai fá. 33 Njamandio yémofem téferwét ndonki, yéné yuram emotangeyai fá, "Némamén fémofem yéferét ndonki?"
english: Those who were sent went away and found things just as he had told them .

nama: Yémofem yawangeyayénd, "Yurane ménde yém."
english: They said , “ The Lord needs it .”

nama: Yémofem yénémnjeménd Yesuefaf, yéfenjo sáláme efayeyayénd ndonkiyan a Yesu nafayoi yéné tukén. 36 Njamandio Yesu téngmorwén, árém yéfenjo sáláme tangéfyangotawét endmé.
english: Then they brought it to Jesus . They threw their cloaks on the colt and sat Jesus on them .

nama: Fá njam téngmorwén kaka néngamndai yéné sifayan ánde end ngewonau Olif Mband tunakfot, méinyotio Yesuene waitogh ár nufngoyénd wagh áuwéghafé Ngánjánefaf marat kéme, téfén ménamén sélngwélafé ásáfogh téfandawét Yesuefaf:
english: As he was now getting near , at the descent of the Mount of Olives , the whole multitude of the disciples began to rejoice and praise God with a loud voice for all the mighty works which they had seen ,

nama: "Frengégh ném warsagh ár efe néném Yurane yétkwénanǃ Krufrat njafar tukén a ndimbal kwayaghé minde tukén!"
english: saying , “ Blessed is the King who comes in the name of the Lord ! Peace in heaven , and glory in the highest !”

nama: Ámb Farasi ár kénjún norayayénd Yesuefaf, "Watamegh ár, táwárna fene waitogh árǃ"
english: Some of the Pharisees from the multitude said to him , “ Teacher , rebuke your disciples !”

nama: Yémon ewawangoi, "Yéndon emndetan fém, njam fá métar ekmbo, wím so nutnatǃ"
english: He answered them , “ I tell you that if these were silent , the stones would cry out .”

nama: Féyo Yesu nélawai wáwefnogh méngo sifayan a wifarégh ewafngoi emofem rokar téwáfnamotawét. 46 Fá norayai yéfefaf, "Buk sian yékai, 'Tane méngo so yém Ngánjánafé orayégh méngo,' wénde fémofem yiyátongi oro téfnárafene átnogh yékw."
english: He entered into the temple and began to drive out those who bought and sold in it ,

nama: Méinyotio efghon fá témorwén watameghan wáwefnogh méngon. Wénde limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár, nák watamegh ár a limánégh ár ménde tamorwén Yesue ngiot. 48 Wénde yémofem yau end ewinjoyénd yá ngiot, ménamén méinyotio árfene mwighé tarnyangérwén yáne sifaf.
english: He was teaching daily in the temple , but the chief priests, the scribes , and the leading men among the people sought to destroy him .

nama: Ámb efghon yémon njam tawatametau ár wáwefnogh méngo sifayan a táitotau mer si, limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a nák watamegh ár nafghayénd yémafe ámb sénko árfé, enmormén yáfaf. 2 Yémofem norayayénd, "Ténmaufro némé muyaye fémon ewafrote yéné ásáfogh. Emon fe yéné muyé némaramai?"
english: On one of those days , as he was teaching the people in the temple and preaching the Good News , the priests and scribes came to him with the elders .

nama: Yémon ewawangoi, "Yéndon so ndenéyameyo fém témotangén ámogh si. Ta kwaufrongi, 4 'Jonene walitogh yénmormén njafarta o árta?'"
english: He answered them , “ I also will ask you one question . Tell me :

nama: Yémofem táruindawét yéfe kénjúnro a korayawét nde, "Njam yénd korayangém 'Kétándmé njafarta,' fá so kamotangé, 'Némamén yau wét fá efalo yiyátongi?' 6 Wénde njam yénd korayangém, 'Kétándmé árta,' méinyotio árém so yénamndat yénd wíme ménamén fá em mat nde Jon témorwén Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár."
english: They reasoned with themselves , saying , “ If we say , ‘ From heaven ,’ he will say , ‘ Why didn’ t you believe him ?’

nama: Féyo yémofem yawangoyénd, "Yénd mafina yéném fá árkémamén yém."
english: They answered that they didn’t know where it was from .

nama: Yesu norayai, "Yéndon wét yau so tawaufron féfe némé muyaye yéndon ewafrotan yéné ásáfogh." Rengerenge si ndau wanjengégh téfnárafenemén
english: Jesus said to them , “ Neither will I tell you by what authority I do these things .”

nama: "Géreif mbwe ménj ndau yuré norayai, 'Yéndon némé so yafrotan? Yéndon so yéngwáfáretan tane ambum efe yéndon yuwetan. Efalo yiyátoi yémofem so yutémndat.'
english: The lord of the vineyard said , ‘ What shall I do ? I will send my beloved son . It may be that seeing him , they will respect him .’

nama: "Wénde njam ndau wanjengégh árém yinjoyénd fá, yémofem korayawét yéfenjo kénjúnro, 'Yéné siyém ndau yurane ambum yém. Wét yésmetam krotio fá, a ndau rokar so kénamndangi téfene.' 15 Féyo yémofem yitaménd géreif mbwe ménj ndau kénjúta a yesmayénd krotio fá.
english: “ But when the farmers saw him , they reasoned among themselves , saying , ‘ This is the heir . Come , let ’s kill him , that the inheritance may be ours .’

nama: Fá so yéném a engésmete krotio yéné ár mérén a tawaramangé géreif mbwe ménj ndau ámb árét." Njam árém náyárayénd yénémamen, fá norayayénd, "Yénandmé yaufifi so yémǃ"
english: He will come and destroy these farmers, and will give the vineyard to others .” When they heard that , they said , “ May that never be !”

nama: Yesu néngretai yéfefaf mbarkándaye a emotai, "Féyo némé fifi yéné yém árkéméné yéfarotaménd, 'Sérasér árké méngo ramégh téfnáram yékenayénd a namndayéng néndkéf sérasér.'
english: But he looked at them and said , “ Then what is this that is written , ‘ The stone which the builders rejected was made the chief cornerstone ’? + 20:17 Psalms 118:22

nama: Méinyotio ár efe njam nénuitat wíman so karéfkaréf nufrotat, a njam kénuyangé árfefaf fá so tásénangé."
english: Everyone who falls on that stone will be broken to pieces , but it will crush whomever it falls on to dust .”

nama: Nák watamegh ár a limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár end táronjawét werghét wékeye, ménamén fá mat náyátoyénd nde fá korayau yéné rengerenge si yéfenemén. Wénde fá férfér tamorwén árfenemén. Kaisare mani kémégh
english: The chief priests and the scribes sought to lay hands on him that very hour , but they feared the people — for they knew he had spoken this parable against them .

nama: Yesum ewawinjoi yéfene unyégh a norayayéng yéfefaf, 24 "Kwauyafongi yáne mani. Endene ár sáf a yétkwén ekayong?" Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Kaisarene."
english: But he perceived their craftiness , and said to them , “Why do you test me ?

nama: Yesum emndai, "Taramangi Kaisare yáne némé yém, a Ngánjáne taramangi némé yém yáne."
english: He said to them , “ Then give to Caesar the things that are Caesar ’s, and to God the things that are God ’s.”

nama: Fá endofnar namndayénd Yesue werghét némé yaufimén korayau kété árfene sáfrére. Sélngwél emormén yáne uwangoghan, a fá métar namndayénd. Anogh a awerégh
english: They weren’ t able to trap him in his words before the people . They marveled at his answer and were silent .

nama: Ámb Saduki ár enmormén efe norayayénd ndené kété ámb yau anogh yém. Fá enmormén Yesuefaf moghét. 28 Fá norayayénd, "Watamegh ár, Mosesém yéfarotam nák téfeyot ndené njam yánngénoene yané kér yém tatembangé amaf wénde ambumofnar, yánngnom fété so kwiré tékayongé a ambum eunjeta yanai.
english: Some of the Sadducees came to him , those who deny that there is a resurrection.

nama: Ámb nák watamegh ár namnyoyénd, "Mer norayayénd, watamegh árǃ" 40 A árém yau yémotayénd fá ámb ámogh si kor. Endene ambum yém Keriso?
english: Some of the scribes answered , “ Teacher , you speak well .”

nama: Yesum emotai fá, "Némamén ndené árém norayat nde Keriso yém Deifidene ambum? 42 Deifid fáyo safén nakmai Sams bukan a norayai, 'Yuré noyarai kétán tane Yurafaf: "Kámnjo yénandmé tane tambén ngángata.
english: He said to them , “ Why do they say that the Christ is David ’s son ?

nama: Kétánotio yéndon tákman fene mék téfnár fene kafkaf mbanmbanan."'
english: until I make your enemies the footstool of your feet .”’

nama: Deifidém tanmotau fá 'Yuré.' Ndernáye fá yáne ambum so yém?"
english: “ David therefore calls him Lord , so how is he his son ?”

nama: Ámb yáne waitogh ár tamorwén sian ménamén ndernáye wáwefnogh méngo yamanetaménd mer wíme a ramégh yam wateghkaf Ngánjáne. Wénde Yesu norayai, 6 "Méinyotio fémo némé yéfande yéna, efogh yéna yéném ánde ámbiro wím yau so kafrangongé kétándmé ámbta, méinyotio so ewite yuwot."
english: As some were talking about the temple and how it was decorated with beautiful stones and gifts, he said ,

nama: Fá namotayénd, "Watamegh ár, njam so yéné yam nufrotat? A némé yamam so tufarotangé ménát yéné yam ufroghétro em?"
english: They asked him , “ Teacher , so when will these things be ? What is the sign that these things are about to happen ?”

nama: Féyo fá norayai yéfefaf, "Ámb yu a ámb yu, fá so násmét, ámb ndimbal yu a ámb ndimbal yu, fá so násmét. 11 Kété so yém ndimbal sokrere, káukáu, ndimbal enjne tárfár yuwomé a férférafé yam a ndimbal sélngwélafé yam njafaran.
english: Then he said to them , “ Nation will rise against nation , and kingdom against kingdom.

nama: Yémon tawaufrotau yéné rengerenge si, "Téfandangi fig wén a méinyotio wén. 30 Njam wén mbambam éwiwogh kufngongi, fémofem so tinjongi féfendio a mat kamndangi nde efogh yu siyém kaka yém. 31 Yéné endeyo, njam yefandati yéné yam ufroghan, fém mat so kamndangi nde Ngánjánene limánégh siyém kaka yém.
english: He told them a parable . “ See the fig tree and all the trees .

nama: "Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe efalo si, ámb ár mérén yéné satamén so mé em ghérsé njam méinyotio yam nufrotat. 33 Njafar a mband so kawaindangend, wénde tane si yaufifi so kawaindangé.
english: Most certainly I tell you , this generation will not pass away until all things are accomplished .

nama: Méinyotio efghon Yesu témorwén watameghan wáwefnogh méngon, a fá tangmorwén méinyotio sémbáran Olif Mband tunakfan. 38 Méinyotio ár tanmorwén túmén tándái akwan áyárghét yáfaf wáwefnogh méngot.
english: Every day Jesus was teaching in the temple , and every night he would go out and spend the night on the mountain that is called Olivet.

nama: Efogh nawerai Minaghofnaye flawamén árké yém Waingégh sif tosane ghéngénmén. 8 Yesum ewafareméng Fité a Jon a norayai, "Kuwanend yéfrengéghét Waingégh njamke téfe nénet."
english: The day of unleavened bread came , on which the Passover must be sacrificed .

nama: Yémofem yémotangeyayénd, "Ándan fene ménde yém téfeyot frengéghét?"
english: They said to him , “ Where do you want us to prepare ?”

nama: Fá néwaneyayénd rokar ewinjeyayénd ndenáye fété Yesum ndernáye tamndéwéng. Féyo yémofem yéfrengéménd Waingégh njamke.
english: They went , found things as Jesus had told them , and they prepared the Passover .

nama: Njam efoghféneféne nawerai, Yesu a yánjo muyafé ár nénámnjoyénd njamke sifayan. 15 A Yesum emndai fá, "Yénd minde ménde kwém njamke nénet fémafé soramé tékrát so yéfandan. 16 Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe, yéndon yau so enetan wéikor kétánotio yéné nufrota Ngánjánene limánéghan."
english: When the hour had come , he sat down with the twelve apostles.

nama: Soramé kafusi yerai, yémon kánjo yaramai a norayai, "Tawanangi yéné a tafalotangi féfene kénjúnro. 18 Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe yéndon yau so yéfértan wéri nu kor kétánotio Ngánjánene limánégh kénufarngé."
english: He received a cup , and when he had given thanks , he said , “ Take this and share it among yourselves ,

nama: Yémon féskaf flawé yerai, kánjo yaramai a etfoi, a ewaramai, yéné siafé, "Yéné siyém tane fifi, árkéméné so téraman féfeyot. Yéné yafrotati awafaroghét tanemén."
english: He took bread, and when he had given thanks , he broke and gave it to them , saying , “ This is my body which is given for you . Do this in memory of me .”

nama: Yémon yémndai, "Saimon, Saimon, Ngánjánam muyé yaramai Sáifére fe ufoghét ndenanit ndau téfnáram yafrote witrémboghét kétándmé mer mbweta yaufiot. 32 Wénde yénd Ngánjánafé koraiwam feyot, Saimon, nde fene ndimbal mwighé yau so kuyangé. Fém njam kénawengo tafaf, fémon so muyafé eyátote fengénéf."
english: The Lord said, “ Simon , Simon , behold , Satan asked to have all of you , that he might sift you as wheat ,

nama: Wénde yémon yawangoi, "Yuré, yénd afrengéghkaf wém fémafé álighét kwéfkwéf sifayat a kétán krot."
english: He said to him , “ Lord , I am ready to go with you both to prison and to death !”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Yéndon némndetan fém, Fité, fémon so kwékena nambinotmé nde fém mafina ném tanemén soramé ghakér kowi kutnangé sénonjo."
english: He said , “ I tell you , Peter , the rooster will by no means crow today until you deny that you know me three times .”

nama: Féyo Yesum emotai fá, "Yéndon njam ewáfáretan fém mani yáfofnaye, awogh yáfofnaye o sandolofnaye, némé rokar ámb náláite?" Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Yau."
english: He said to them , “ When I sent you out without purse, bag , and sandals , did you lack anything ?” They said , “ Nothing .”

nama: Waitogh ár norayayénd, "Téfanda, Yuré, sómbio náifé sere." Yémon ewawangoi, "Féyotaro ere." Yesuf Ngánjánafé koraiwét Olif Mband tunakfan
english: They said , “ Lord , behold , here are two swords .” He said to them , “ That is enough .”

nama: Njafar si résagh ár nufaryéng yáfaf a yáutánam fá. 44 Yesum ndimbal tékrát yáyárai, fá minde tikfe Ngánjánafé koraiwét a yáne mélmél témorwén ndenanit férék njélkéfnit kasunau mbandot.
english: An angel from heaven appeared to him , strengthening him .

nama: Njam fá nokayoi Ngánjánafé orayéghta fá néngangoi yánjo waitogh árfefaf, yémon ewinjoi kémghan, yongnai ghérghérsisamén. 46 Yesum emotai fá, "Némamén fém kémégh ekém? Kanongi a Ngánjánafé norayati ménát fém yau so ufogham tawutfongé." Yesu yerayénd
english: When he rose up from his prayer , he came to the disciples and found them sleeping because of grief ,

nama: Njamandio Yesu mé sian témorwén, ár mérén enmormén a ár yétkwén Judas efe témorwén 12 waitogh ármén, yémon tanlimndau fá. Yémon yánetai Yesu a yésnetai. 48 Wénde Yesum yémotayéng fá, "Judas, fémon sénot yafngo Ároene Ambum ménaye séneghé?"
english: While he was still speaking , a crowd appeared . He who was called Judas , one of the twelve , was leading them . He came near to Jesus to kiss him .

nama: Njam Yesuene waitogh árém yinjoyénd némé ufroghétro témorwén, fá norayayénd, "Yuré, wét yéndfem so enfetam téfenjo naifaye?" 50 A ámb árom yanfai limánégh ghéngén wárogh ároene faiofnar ásáfogh ároene tambén téngan.
english: When those who were around him saw what was about to happen , they said to him , “ Lord , shall we strike with the sword ?”

nama: Wénde Yesu norayai, "Yéné yau yafrotatiǃ" A Yesum yéné ároene téngan yayanjai a mer yiyátoi fá.
english: But Jesus answered , “ Let me at least do this ” — and he touched his ear and healed him .

nama: Wénde yémon yanyotayéng a yémndai, "Mérés, yénd mafina wém fá."
english: He denied Jesus , saying , “ Woman , I don’ t know him .”

nama: Tekofnaye ámb árom wéi yinjoi fáyo a yémndai, "Fém ámb yéné fékéném." Yémon yawangoi, "Ár, yénd yauǃ"
english: After a little while someone else saw him and said , “ You also are one of them !” But Peter answered , “ Man , I am not !”

nama: Ámbiro efoghféneféne soramé ámb árom ménjtaye korayawét ndené, "Fá fété yém Yesue kaka ár, efe yém Galili yumén."
english: After about one hour passed , another confidently affirmed , saying , “ Truly this man also was with him , for he is a Galilean !”

nama: Árém emofem Yesu tanjetawét si tawafrotawét a ngi yafngoyénd. 64 Yémofem ghékéf yawamoyénd a témndetawét, "Koraya! Emon nésém fém?" 65 A yémofem korayawét tárfár yaufi si yáfaf. Yesu yém Failetene a Erodene sáfrére
english: The men who held Jesus mocked him and beat him .

nama: Fauréghan árfene sénko ár náumendayénd limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a nák watamegh ár a yéfene sáfrére Yesu yéngémnjoyénd. 67 Fá norayayénd, "Fém njam Keriso ném, téfe ténmaufro."
english: As soon as it was day , the assembly of the elders of the people were gathered together , both chief priests and scribes , and they led him away into their council , saying ,

nama: a yéndon njam fém tamotangén, fémofem yau so ta kwawangongi. 69 Wénde sénonjo yénandmé Ároene Ambum so kámnjongé Minde waftafé Ngánjánene tambén téndon."
english: and if I ask , you will in no way answer me or let me go.

nama: Fá méinyotio namotayénd, "Fém fété ném Ngánjánene ambum?" Yémon ewawangoi, "Fém sian mbarkánd em fété yénd wém."
english: They all said , “ Are you then the Son of God ?” He said to them , “ You say it , because I am .”

nama: Féyo yémofem norayayénd, "Yéndfem némé si so yéronjam ndenayu? Yéndfem téfendio té náyárangém yá tambén."
english: They said , “ Why do we need any more witness ? For we ourselves have heard from his own mouth !”

nama: Méinyotio árém Yesu yénémnjoyénd Failetefaf. 2 Yémofem Yesu usérmbogh yafngoyénd yéné sie, "Yéné árom ewarsote téfene ár yéné sie, 'Yau ekmetati mani Kaisarefaf, Rom tuk warsagh ároefaf a yéné yétkwénan nawarse nde yénd wém Keriso, warsagh ár.'"
english: The whole company of them rose up and brought him before Pilate .

nama: Féyo Failetém yémotayéng Yesu, "Fém fété ném Ju árfene warsagh ár?" Yesum yawangoi, "A, fém némé noraye."
english: Pilate asked him , “ Are you the King of the Jews ?” He answered him , “ So you say .”

nama: Failetém marataye korayau limánégh ghéngén wárogh árfefaf a ár mérénafefaf, "Yéndon némé mámáfi yau yinjon yéné ároefaf."
english: Pilate said to the chief priests and the multitudes , “ I find no basis for a charge against this man .”

nama: Wénde fá ménjtaye korayawét, "Yémon kértat taméinde ár méinyotio Judiamén yáne watameghe, kétándmé Galili yu a yénanotio Jerusalemǃ"
english: But they insisted, saying , “ He stirs up the people , teaching throughout all Judea , beginning from Galilee even to this place .”

nama: Njam Failetém náyárai yénémamén, fá namotai, "Yéné ár Galili yumén yém?" 7 Njam fá mat náyátoi nde Yesu témorwén Erodene limánégh mbanmbanan, Failetém yáfáretam Erodefaf, efe témorwén Jerusalemén yéné efghon.
english: But when Pilate heard Galilee mentioned, he asked if the man was a Galilean .

nama: Wénde ámbiro mwighayan fá nutnayénd, "Tésmetangi, Barabas ténmutorngi téfeyotǃ" 19 Barabas yélawayénd kétán kwéfkwéf sifayat ménamén fá stémorwén ámb ár mérén limánégh ár Jerusalemén yéné efe kásmetawét Rom gafamanafé a ár ngimén.
english: But they all cried out together , saying , “Away with this man ! Release to us Barabbas!”—

nama: Failet ménde témorwén Yesue utorghét, féyo fá kor norayai ár mérnafefaf. 21 Wénde fá ménj tarnyangérwén keyan, "Téngwamend, Téngwamendǃ"
english: Then Pilate spoke to them again , wanting to release Jesus ,

nama: Nambinotmé wéikor fá norayai, "Némamén? Némé yaufi yémon yafrotam? Yéndon ámb yau yáne fifi yinjon yáfaf krot. Féyo yéndon so yéfmotan soramé téngéfrangon fá."
english: He said to them the third time , “ Why ? What evil has this man done ? I have found no capital crime in him . I will therefore chastise him and release him .”

nama: Ár tárfár tawakayongérwén téfandawét yam ufroghan, limánégh árém sénkér tawafrotawét Yesue. Yémofem korayawét, "Yémon tawanjane ámb ár. Fáyo kawanjarngé, njam fá yém Ngánjánene Keriso, yáne waferghkaf ambum."
english: The people stood watching . The rulers with them also scoffed at him , saying , “ He saved others . Let him save himself , if this is the Christ of God , his chosen one !”

nama: Fiyaré enmormén si tawafrotawét. Yémofem yénmarsaménd njérmat wéri nu yáyot, 37 a norayayénd, "Fém njam ném Ju árfene warsagh ár, fémyo kawanjarǃ" 38 Kété témorwén farogh férén yá tukén, árké yémndetat, "Yéné fiyém Ju árfene warsagh ár."
english: The soldiers also mocked him , coming to him and offering him vinegar ,

nama: Ámb oro téfnár tamangérwén yá téndon, yémo yémndayéng Yesu, "Fém fété ném Keriso? Kawanjar fémyo a yénd ténmanjareǃ"
english: One of the criminals who was hanged insulted him , saying , “ If you are the Christ , save yourself and us !”

nama: Yesum yawangoi yá, "Yéndon némndetan fém efalo, sénonjo yénd fémafé so yénre áuwégh méngotuan." Yesuene Kérmén
english: Jesus said to him , “Assuredly I tell you , today you will be with me in Paradise .”

nama: Yéné amaf efe Yesufé enmormén kétándmé Galili yuta yéngwaitoyénd Josef mbéwé fandaghét a ndernáye yékmayénd yáne fifi. 56 Fá néngangoyénd méngot mer wimafé wékwér frengéghét. Wénde fá kenawét Safatan ndené fété Mosesene nák.
english: The women who had come with him out of Galilee followed after , and saw the tomb and how his body was laid .

nama: Yéné efghonyo sómbio ár tangérwén Jerusalemta kétán Emausét 11 kilomité 14 Yémofem téngwarunwét endmé yéfe kénjúnro némé yam kufrotau. 15 Njamandio fá ngoraiwét a téngwarunwét mérne, Yesu fáyo yénmormén a tayotau yémafé. 16 Wénde yémofem yau yayamngeyayénd Yesu.
english: Behold , two of them were going that very day to a village named Emmaus , which was sixty stadia from Jerusalem .

nama: Yémon emotangeyai fá, "Némamén fémofem yarunyét táf fém seyowé?"
english: He said to them , “ What are you talking about as you walk , and are sad ?”

nama: Ámb témorwén yétkwén Klofas, yémotai fá, "Fém némé wan téfnár ném Jerusalemén a mafina ném némé yam nufrotat yéné efghon?"
english: One of them , named Cleopas , answered him , “ Are you the only stranger in Jerusalem who doesn’ t know the things which have happened there in these days ?”

nama: Yémofem kaka méngotu yéngiyátoyénd ándan fá tangmorwén, Yesu awaingétro téngmorwén. 29 Wénde yémofem yamnendayénd Yesu ménjtaye, "Yéndfé kámnjongém ménamén yéférte." Féyo fá néngwanoi yéfefaf ámnjoghét.
english: They came near to the village where they were going , and he acted like he would go further .

nama: Njamandio fá mé korayawét yénémamén, Yesu fáyo nénokayoi yéfene kénjún a norayayéng yéfefaf, "Krufrat féfefaf so yémǃ"
english: As they said these things , Jesus himself stood among them , and said to them , “Peace be to you .”

nama: Fá norayai yéfefaf, "Yéné fiyém némé yénd korayawén táf yénd njam mé ténmorwén fémafé. Méinyotio si efalo so náyátote némé yéfarotaménd tanemén Mosesene nák kénjún, Ngánjánene mat yátogh árfene Buk a Sams."
english: He said to them , “ This is what I told you while I was still with you , that all things which are written in the law of Moses , the prophets , and the psalms concerning me must be fulfilled .”

nama: Si náyátoi ár a témorangérwén téfe kénjún, ngárám a efalo afoghkaf. Yéndfem yinjoyém yáne ndimbal kwayaghé, árké yémon yanai ndené fété Afane féfét Ambum.
english: The Word became flesh and lived among us . We saw his glory , such glory as of the only born Son of the Father , full of grace and truth.

nama: Jon korayau yánemén. Fá nutnai, "Yéné fá fiyém yénd endenemén kénorayan táf njam korayan, 'Fá yéném ta soramé, wénde yénd wainde yémo, ménamén fá fronde kaketau yénd soramé náráftamén.'"
english: John testified about him . He cried out , saying , “ This was he of whom I said , ‘ He who comes after me has surpassed me , for he was before me .’”

nama: Ju sénko árém Jerusalemén ewáfáretaménd ámb ghéngén wárogh ár a Lefi mérénmén Jone moghét, "Fém Efe ném?"
english: This is John ’s testimony , when the Jews sent priests and Levites from Jerusalem to ask him , “ Who are you ?”

nama: Jon yau nakenai uwangoghét, wénde norayai marataye a safénro, "Yénd yau Keriso wém."
english: He declared , and didn’ t deny , but he declared , “ I am not the Christ .”

nama: Fá námotayénd, "Féyo fém efe ném? Efe ném Elaija?" Joném ewawangoi, "Yau, yénd yau fá wém." Fá namotayénd, "Fém ném yéné Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár?" Yémo ewawangoi, "Yau."
english: They asked him , “ What then ? Are you Elijah ?” He said , “ I am not .” “ Are you the prophet ?” He answered , “ No .”

nama: Fá korayangi, "Ténmaufro téfe fém efe ném? Yéndfem so uwangogh si yangotam yéfe emofem ténmáfáretat yénd. Némé fém noraye fenjomén?"
english: They said therefore to him , “ Who are you ? Give us an answer to take back to those who sent us . What do you say about yourself ?”

nama: Jon nuwangoi Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár Aisayane sian: "Yénd ámb ároene kém wém nutne fanfne yuwon: Tafrotangi mbarkánd end Yurai álighét!"
english: He said , “ I am the voice of one crying in the wilderness , ‘ Make straight the way of the Lord ,’ as Isaiah the prophet said .”

nama: Farasi ár mérén efe enwáfáretaménd, 25 wéi yémotayénd Jon, "Fém yau njam ném Keriso o Elaija o Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár, némamén fémon nuan walitogh ewafrote?"
english: The ones who had been sent were from the Pharisees .

nama: Jon nuwangoi, "Yéndon ewalitotan nue, wénde féfefafényo yakai fá fiyém endenemén mat yau em. 27 Fá ta soramé yéném, wénde yénd féyotarofnar wém yáne sandol ángégh ferghét.
english: John answered them , “ I baptize in water , but among you stands one whom you don’ t know .

nama: Méinyotio yéné kété kufrotau Betanin kété Joden wanjen wér tambén, ánde Joném tawalitotau. Ngánjánene Sif tosé
english: These things were done in Bethany beyond the Jordan , where John was baptizing.

nama: Yénamayo efghon Jon takayongérwén wéikor kété yémafé sómbio yáne waitogh ár kénjún, 36 njam yémo yinjoi Yesu álighan, fá norayai, "Téfandangi, ndené kés yém Ngánjánene Sif tosé!"
english: Again , the next day , John was standing with two of his disciples ,

nama: Sómbio waitogh árém yiyáreyayénd fá norayai yéné a néngwanoyénd Yesufé. 38 Yesu nawengoyéng, ewinjeyai yá waitoghan, a namotai, "Némat fém nérét?" Yémofem yawangeyayénd, "Ánde fém némorang, Rabai?" Yéné yétkwénoene fifi siyém "Watamegh ár."
english: The two disciples heard him speak , and they followed Jesus .

nama: Fá nuwangoi, "Awe a fandaghét." Yéné táf témorwén 4 aklokotro séiteyan. Féyo fá néwaneyayénd yémafé a yinjeyayénd ánde fá témorangérwén a yifeyayénd yéné efogh yémafé.
english: He said to them , “ Come and see .” They came and saw where he was staying , and they stayed with him that day . It was about the tenth hour . + 1:39 4:00 p.m.

nama: Nataniel namotai, "Ámb némé mer rokar so yéném Najaretta?" Filif nuwangoi, "Awe a téfanda."
english: Nathanael said to him , “ Can any good thing come out of Nazareth ?” Philip said to him , “ Come and see .”

nama: Njam Yesum yinjoi Nataniel ténmorwén kétán yáfaf, Yesu norayai yánemén, "Siyém efalo Israil ár; yáfaf unyégh yau yém!"
english: Jesus saw Nathanael coming to him , and said about him , “ Behold , an Israelite indeed , in whom is no deceit !”

nama: Natanielém yémotai fá, "Ndernáye fém mat ném yénd?" Yesu nuwangoi, "Yéndon néminjon fém njam wén yétkwén figh njaran ném soramayo Filifém némanmo fém."
english: Nathanael said to him , “ How do you know me ?” Jesus answered him , “ Before Philip called you , when you were under the fig tree , I saw you .”

nama: Nataniel nuwangoi, "Watamegh ár, fém sném Ngánjánene Ambum! Fém sném warsagh ár Israilmén!"
english: Nathanael answered him , “ Rabbi , you are the Son of God ! You are King of Israel !”

nama: Sómbio efogh soramé kété témorwén awerégh téménd Kana tesenan Galili yu kénjún. Yesue yátmé kété témorwén, 2 a Yesu a yáne waitogh ár enwarawayénd kétán awerégh téméndfaf. 3 Njam wéri nu nefoi, Yesue yátmé norayai yáfaf, "Yéfene wéri nu té nefo."
english: The third day , there was a wedding in Cana of Galilee . Jesus ’ mother was there .

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Amé, fémo némamén wémndete yénémamén? Tane efogh yau nawer."
english: Jesus said to her , “ Woman , what does that have to do with you and me ? My hour has not yet come .”

nama: Yesue yatmam emndai faiofnar ásáfogh ár, "Ewafrotati némé njam yémo emndeta."
english: His mother said to the servants , “ Whatever he says to you , do it .”

nama: Yesum yafrotam yéné fronde ufarogh yam Kanan Galili yu kénjún; kété yémon yuyafoi yánjo ndimbal kwayaghé, a yánjo waitogh árém efalo yiyátoyénd fá.
english: This beginning of his signs Jesus did in Cana of Galilee , and revealed his glory ; and his disciples believed in him .

nama: Yéné soramé, Yesu a yánjo amé, néngnéf a waitogh ár engmormén kétán Káfenamét a emorangérmén tárfárofnar efogh. Yesu yéngmormén kétán wáwefnogh méngot
english: After this , he went down to Capernaum , he , and his mother , his brothers, and his disciples ; and they stayed there a few days .

nama: Ju sénko ár nénangoyénd ámoghafé yáfaf, "Némé ufarogh yam fémon so yafrote sái ténmauyafo téfe ndené fém waftafé ném yéné wafroghét?"
english: The Jews therefore answered him , “ What sign do you show us , seeing that you do these things ?”

nama: Yesu nuwangoi, "Tironangi yéné wáwefnogh méngo, a nambio efogh kénjún yéndon so tanongén yéné wéikor."
english: Jesus answered them , “ Destroy this temple , and in three days I will raise it up .”

nama: Yémofem yémotayénd, "Némé fémo so yéramete yéné wéikor nambio efogh kénjún? Yéné wáwefnogh méngo ramégham yérsam 46 yunjéf!"
english: The Jews therefore said , “ It took forty-six years to build this temple ! Will you raise it up in three days ?”

nama: Kété témorwén ámb Ju sénko ár yétkwén Nikodimas, efe témorwén Farasi mérénmén. 2 Ámb sémbár fá yéngmormén Yesuefaf a norayai yáfaf, "Watamegh ár, yénd mat yéném ndené fém ném watamegh ár efe nénmáfáretam Ngánjánam. Yau emo so ámb ufarogh yam ewafrote yéné fémon sewafrote táfandro Ngánjánafé njam fém ere."
english: Now there was a man of the Pharisees named Nicodemus , a ruler of the Jews .

nama: Yesu nuwangoi, "Yéndon efalo némaufrotan fe: emo yau so tinjongé Ngánjánene limánégh táfandro njam wéikor náráfta."
english: Jesus answered him , “ Most certainly I tell you , unless one is born anew, he can ’ t see God ’s Kingdom.”

nama: Nikodimas namotai, "Ndernáye so anoghkaf ár náráfte wéikor? Fá yau so kélawangé yátmane kafkalot a sái náráfta sómbinotma!"
english: Nicodemus said to him , “ How can a man be born when he is old ? Can he enter a second time into his mother ’s womb and be born ?”

nama: Nikodimas namotai, "Ndernáye yéné yém?"
english: Nicodemus answered him , “ How can these things be ?”

nama: Amafom yawangoi, "Fém sném Ju ár, a yénd swém Samariamén ámaf-yénémamén nde ndernáye so fémon wamnende yénd nuot?" Ménamén Ju ár yau so nafghetat Samaria árfé kafusi a merekinamé néneyan.
english: The Samaritan woman therefore said to him , “ How is it that you , being a Jew , ask for a drink from me , a Samaritan woman ?” ( For Jews have no dealings with Samaritans.)

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Njam té fém mat kénmorwén némé Ngánjánene ramégh yém a efe fá yém emon némamnende nuot, fémon so támnenda fá, a yémon so kémaramangé ghérsé akegh nu."
english: Jesus answered her , “ If you knew the gift of God , and who it is who says to you , ‘ Give me a drink ,’ you would have asked him , and he would have given you living water .”

nama: Amaf norayai, "Ndimbal, fém sném ukwégh rokarofnar, a yékw siyém kénjkam. Ánde so fémon ténman yéné ghérsé akegh nu? 12 Téfene ákim Jeikofém yénmaramai téfe yéné nu yékw; fá a yánjo ambumtértér a yánjo mánjarégh wérár mérén méinyotio nu yénaf tánetawét. Fémo yáinde afé Jeikof?"
english: The woman said to him , “ Sir , you have nothing to draw with , and the well is deep. So where do you get that living water ?

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Méinyotio emofem yéné nu yénetat mé so em nu ménde, 14 wénde emon njam yéneta yéné nu yéndon sewarametan yaufifi so efinde nuam. Néméwét, nu yéné yéndon sewarametan yéfe so kamndangé éfnogh nu yéfene kénjún so efrone akegh ghérsé nue a so tawaramangé tuot ghérsé."
english: Jesus answered her , “ Everyone who drinks of this water will thirst again ,

nama: Amaf norayai yáfaf, "Ndimbal, kwaram ta yéné nu ménát yau yénd so nuam wéfinde a yau so wéném yénan nu ukéghét."
english: The woman said to him , “ Sir , give me this water , so that I don’ t get thirsty , neither come all the way here to draw.”

nama: Yesum yémndai amaf, "Kuwano, fenjar ténmasro a kénango."
english: Jesus said to her , “ Go , call your husband, and come here .”

nama: Amaf nuwangoi, "Tanjar yau wém."
english: The woman answered , “ I have no husband.” Jesus said to her , “ You said well , ‘ I have no husband,’

nama: Wénde efalo siyém, fém té némasroyénd 5 árém, a ár sénonjo emafé emorare yau fenjarfifi yém. Fémo efalo té waufro."
english: for you have had five husbands; and he whom you now have is not your husband. This you have said truly.”

nama: Amaf norayai, "Ndimbal, yénd mat namndan ndené fém sném Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár. 20 Téfene ákifem yéné mband tunakfan táwefnotawét Ngánjáne, wénde fém Ju ár norayati ndené Jerusalem yéné yu fiyém ánde yéndfem so yáwefnotam Ngánjáne."
english: The woman said to him , “ Sir , I perceive that you are a prophet .

nama: Amaf norayai, "Yénd mat wém ndené Keriso so yéném. Njam fá yéném so yénmawafene méinyotio yam téfeyot."
english: The woman said to him , “ I know that Messiah is coming , he who is called Christ . When he has come , he will declare to us all things .”

nama: Yesu nuwangoi, "Yénd faf wém, efe yénd norayan fefaf."
english: Jesus said to her , “ I am he , the one who speaks to you .”

nama: Yéné efghonyo, nénangoyénd Yesuene waitogh ár, a sélngwél emormén syinjoyénd amafofé skoraiwét. Wénde yau efe ámb namotai, "Némé ménde ném fém?" o "Némat fém norayet amafofé?"
english: Just then , his disciples came . They marveled that he was speaking with a woman ; yet no one said , “ What are you looking for ?” or , “ Why do you speak with her ?”

nama: Féyo amafom noroi yánjo nu séfkwén, néngangoi kétán tesenot a ewaufroi árét, 29 "Awe, téfandangi yéné ár emon waufrote méinyotio yam yéndon árké té tawafrotan. Mé té fá yém Keriso?" 30 Féyo fá néwanoyénd tesenta a tayotau kétán Yesuefaf.
english: So the woman left her water pot, went away into the city , and said to the people ,

nama: Yéné efoghféneféneyan waitogh árém yémndayénd Yesu, "Watamegh ár, njamke ámb koneta!"
english: In the meanwhile , the disciples urged him , saying , “ Rabbi , eat .”

nama: Wénde fá norayai yéfefaf, "Tane té njamke yém nénet yéné árkémamén fém mat yau em."
english: But he said to them , “ I have food to eat that you don’ t know about .”

nama: Féyo waitogh ár kamotangi yéfenjo kénjún, "Mété emon táf yénmarsa yá njamke?"
english: The disciples therefore said to one another , “ Has anyone brought him something to eat ?”

nama: Yémofem norayayénd amafofefaf, "Yéndfem yau efalo yiyátongém ménamén fémon némé noraya; sénonjo yéndio téfé náyáretam, a yénd mat yéném ndené yéné ár efalo fété yém mband maratoene Wanjarégh ár. Yesum mer yiyátoi gafaman ásáfogh ároene ambum
english: They said to the woman , “ Now we believe , not because of your speaking ; for we have heard for ourselves, and know that this is indeed the Christ, the Savior of the world .”

nama: Yesu norayai yáfaf, "Emon ámb yau efalo so tiyáto táfandro fémon sái yéfanda ufarogh yam a sélngwélafé yam."
english: Jesus therefore said to him , “ Unless you see signs and wonders , you will in no way believe .”

nama: Gafaman ásáfogh ár nuwangoi, "Ndimbal, awe yéndfé mété táf tane ambum kér yém."
english: The nobleman said to him , “ Sir , come down before my child dies.”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Nguwano; fene ambum so ghérsé yém."
english: Jesus said to him , “ Go your way . Your son lives .” The man believed the word that Jesus spoke to him , and he went his way .

nama: Njam mé téngmorwén endmé, yánjo faiofnar ásáfogh árém yéfángoyénd fá yéné ghanyafé ndené yáne ghakér ambum ghérsé mé yém. 52 Yémon emotai fá árké efghe namndai mer, yémofem yawangoyénd, "Wawenagh enjneyam yéfrongé fá káye séite táf wan aklok."
english: As he was going down , his servants met him and reported , saying “ Your child lives !”

nama: Féyo yárefé nawafarotai nde yéné efghe fifi Yesum yémndai, "Fene ambum so ghérsé yém." Féyo fá a yánjo méinyotio mérén efalo yiyátoyénd Yesu.
english: So the father knew that it was at that hour in which Jesus said to him , “ Your son lives .” He believed , as did his whole house .

nama: Yéné yémormén sómbiomén ufarogh yam Yesum árké yafrotam soramé táf sinmormén Judiata kétán Galili yuwot.
english: This is again the second sign that Jesus did , having come out of Judea into Galilee .

nama: Ár ámb kété témorwén efe 38 yunjéf témorwén enjne. 6 Njam Yesum yinjoi fá stékmangérwén kété a mat namndai ndené fá yéné enjne kértayan stémorwén yu tombé, yémon yémndai fá, "Té fém ménde ném sái mer kamndé?"
english: A certain man was there who had been sick for thirty-eight years .

nama: Enjne téfnár nuwangoi, "Ndimbal, tayot efe ámb yau yém ménát yénd sái wáutána némbne sawét égharghét táf njam nu narémne. Njam yénd yéta kufngon kétán sái kégharén, ámb ár frondeyo táf nguwarngé."
english: The sick man answered him , “ Sir , I have no one to put me into the pool when the water is stirred up , but while I ’m coming , another steps down before me .”

nama: Féyo Yesu norayai yáfaf, "Kano! Tékaf fenjo yame a áligh." 9 Táf fété ár mer namndai; yémon yékafai yánjo yame a nuwanoi.
english: Jesus said to him , “ Arise , take up your mat , and walk .”

nama: féyo Ju sénko árém norayayénd yéné ároefaf efe té mer yiyátoi, "Yéné siyém Safat; yéné siyém téfene nákan fémon yau so yérse fenjo yame."
english: So the Jews said to him who was cured , “ It is the Sabbath . It is not lawful for you to carry the mat .”

nama: Wénde fá nuwangoi, "Ár emon yénd mer wiyáto wémnde yénd, 'Tékaf fenjo yame a kuwano.'
english: He answered them , “ He who made me well said to me , ‘ Take up your mat and walk .’ ”

nama: Féyo yémofem yémotayénd fá, "Efe yéné ár yém emon némnde fém kafghét a álighét?"
english: Then they asked him , “ Who is the man who said to you , ‘ Take up your mat and walk ’ ?”

nama: Ár efe té mer namndai yau mat témorwén efe témorwén, ménamén Yesu té wékeyero yéngmormén ár mérén kénjút kété stamorwén.
english: But he who was healed didn’ t know who it was , for Jesus had withdrawn, a crowd being in the place .

nama: Soramé Yesum yinjoi fá kété wáwefnogh méngo sifayan a norayai yáfaf, "Téfanda, fém sném merot té nango. Kékmbo yaufiyam wafrogh o minde mámáfi mété nufrota fefaf." 15 Yéné ár néngwanoi a ewaufroi Ju sénko árét ndené Yesum mer yiyátoi fá. Ambumoene muyé
english: Afterward Jesus found him in the temple and said to him , “ Behold , you are made well . Sin no more , so that nothing worse happens to you .”

nama: "Yénd njam nafrotan tanjomén, árém so nemnat ndené tane si yau efalo témorwén. 32 Wénde ámb ár yéna yém efe nafrote tane téfnan, a yénd mat wém ndené fá némé noraye tanemén siyém efalo.
english: “ If I testify about myself , my witness is not valid.

nama: Yesu néngretai a ewinjoi ndimbal mérén tanmorwén yáfaf, féyo yémotai Filif, "Ánde yéndfem so tawanangém féyotaroan njamke ménát sái emanjnam méinyotio yéné ár?" 6 Yémon norayai yéné ménát Filif yufotam, wénde fá mat témorwén némé yémon so tafrotau.
english: Jesus therefore , lifting up his eyes and seeing that a great multitude was coming to him , said to Philip , “ Where are we to buy bread, that these may eat ?”

nama: Filifém yawangoi, "Ménát méinyotio árém sái némbnare tánetangi, ndenanit yém ndené 200 Denarion{q{ ...f* {q{6.7 200 Denarion Yéné siyém 200 efoghmén fai , árké em 200 efoghmén fai so tawanangayénd flawé ménát sái féyotaro yém."
english: Philip answered him , “ Two hundred denarii worth of bread is not sufficient for them , that every one of them may receive a little .”

nama: Ámb yáne waitogh ár, Endru, efe Saimon Fitane yánngén, norayai, 9 "Ghakér ambum siyém yéna endefaf em 5 féskaf flawé a sómbio némbnar wagif. Wénde yéné yau féyotaro so em yéné ár tárfárét.
english: One of his disciples , Andrew, Simon Peter ’s brother, said to him ,

nama: Njam fá méinyotio eremngoi néneyan, Yesu norayai yánjo waitogh árfefaf, "Takafetangi a taumendangi mbarmbar. Yau némé ámb so ewaghnam." 13 Féyo yémofem eumendaménd méinyotio a ewafoyénd 12 mbaf yáf ménaye mbarmbar árkéméné nafrangoyénd 5 flawata árém árké enetaménd.
english: When they were filled , he said to his disciples , “ Gather up the broken pieces which are left over , that nothing be lost.”

nama: Njam yémofem yinjoyénd Yesu kété arakaf witmé karfan, yémofem yémotayénd fá, "Watamegh ár, njam fém nufar yénan?"
english: When they found him on the other side of the sea , they asked him , “ Rabbi , when did you come here ?”

nama: Féyo yémofem yémotayénd Yesu, "Némé yéndfem so yafrotam ménát sái yafrotam némé Ngánjánene ménde yém téfeyot wafroghét?"
english: They said therefore to him , “ What must we do , that we may work the works of God ?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Némé ménde Ngánján yém féfeyot wafroghét siyém efalo tiyátongi fá efe yémon ténmáfárete."
english: Jesus answered them , “ This is the work of God , that you believe in him whom he has sent .”

nama: Féyo yémofem yémotayénd Yesu, "Némé ufarogh yam so fémon yafrote ménát yéndfem sái tinjongém yéné a efalo kényátongém fém? Némé so fémon yafrote? 31 Téfene ákifem yénetaménd mana kété fanfne yuwon, ndené fété kés yéfarotaménd: 'Yémon ewaramai yéfe njafarmén féskaf flawé nénet.'"
english: They said therefore to him , “ What then do you do for a sign , that we may see and believe you ? What work do you do ?

nama: Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe efalo, némé Mosesém ewaramai féfe yau njafarmén féskaf flawé, wénde tane Afam ewaramete féfe efalo féskaf flawé njafarmén. 33 Ménamén Ngánjánene féskaf flawé fá yém efe yénmewéryéng kétándmé njafarta a ghérsé yéramete kétán mband maratot."
english: Jesus therefore said to them , “ Most certainly , I tell you , it wasn’ t Moses who gave you the bread out of heaven , but my Father gives you the true bread out of heaven .

nama: Fá norayayénd, "Ndimbal, túmén yénmarameta téfe yéné féskaf flawé."
english: They said therefore to him , “ Lord , always give us this bread.”

nama: Ju ár nufngoyénd áwátaranégh Yesuenemén ménamém fá norayai ndené, "Yénd wém féskaf flawé árkéméné nénewor njafarta." 42 Fá norayayénd, "Yéné ár fiyém Yesu, Josefene ambum, endene afé a amé yénd mat yéném. Ndernáye fá noraye sénonjo, 'Yénd néneworyén kétándmé njafarta?"
english: The Jews therefore murmured concerning him , because he said , “ I am the bread which came down out of heaven .”

nama: Féyo Ju ár nufngoyénd éwigh tékrátaye yéfenjo kénjún, "Ndernáye so yéné árom ténmaramangé téfe yánjo fifi ménát nénet?"
english: The Jews therefore contended with one another , saying , “ How can this man give us his flesh to eat ?”

nama: Njam yéné náyáretaménd, tárfár yáne waitogh ár norayayénd, "Yéné siyém táikér watamegh. Efe so náyárete yéné sifaf?"
english: Therefore many of his disciples , when they heard this , said , “ This is a hard saying ! Who can listen to it ?”

nama: Yénémamén tárfár yánjo waitogh ár nawengoyénd sémta a yau táitotawét fá.
english: At this , many of his disciples went back and walked no more with him .

nama: Féyo Yesum emotai 12, "Fém ménde em frangoghét wéi?"
english: Jesus said therefore to the twelve , “ You don’ t also want to go away , do you ?”

nama: Saimon Fitam yawangoi yá, "Yuré, endefaf yénd so yéngém? Fém tuot ghérsé siafé ném. 69 Yéndfem efalo niyátotam a mat yéném ndené fém ném Njúnnjúnofnar Ár Ngánjáneta."
english: Simon Peter answered him , “ Lord , to whom would we go ? You have the words of eternal life .

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Yéndon té ewaferyén fém 12. Wénde ámbiro yéna ném ndenanit Sáifér. 71 Fá korayau Judasenemén, Saimon Iskariotene ambum. Ndemamén fá témorwén 12 mén, soramé sén so téramangai fá.
english: Jesus answered them , “Didn’ t I choose you , the twelve , and one of you is a devil ?”

nama: Yéné soramé yánngnéf snéngwanoyénd téménd sifayat, Yesu wéi fété yéngmorméng, yau marataye, wénde átnoghe. 11 Téménd sifayé kénjún kété Yesu téronjawét Ju sénko árém a kamotawét, "Ánde yém fá?"
english: But when his brothers had gone up to the feast , then he also went up , not publicly , but as it were in secret .

nama: Mérén kénjún awawanjagh kété témorwén Yesuenemén.
english: There was much murmuring among the multitudes concerning him . Some said , “ He is a good man .” Others said , “ Not so , but he leads the multitude astray .”

nama: Emo yau marataye korayau ménamén fá férféram tafindau yéfenjo sénko árfenemén.
english: Yet no one spoke openly of him for fear of the Jews .

nama: Téménd njam néndkéfan náyátoi, Yesu nuwanoi wáwefnogh méngo sifayat a ewafngoi watamegh. 15 Ju sénko ár sélngwél emormén a norayayénd, "Ndernáye yéné ár minde mat yém táf nák skulot yau yiotam?"
english: But when it was now the middle of the feast , Jesus went up into the temple and taught .

nama: Árém yawangoyénd, "Fefaf syém yaufi mbérmbér! Emo némafngo fém ngiot?"
english: The multitude answered, “ You have a demon ! Who seeks to kill you ?”

nama: Yesum njamandio tawatametau wáwefnogh méngo sifayan, fá norayai marat kéme, "Fém matfifi té em yénd efe wém a árkamé wénmormén? Yénd yau wénmormén tanjo mwighé faroréghan. Wénde fá emo wénmáfáretam siyém efalo. Fém mat yau em fá, 29 wénde yénd mat fá wém, ménamén yénd wénmormén yá tambén a yémon yénd wénmáfáretam."
english: Jesus therefore cried out in the temple , teaching and saying , “ You both know me , and know where I am from . I have not come of myself , but he who sent me is true , whom you don’ t know .

nama: Farasi árém eyárayénd ár mérén Yesuenemén káwáwanjawét yénémamén, féyo fá a limánégh ghéngén wárogh árém engwáfáretaménd ámb wanjengégh ár ménát yá werghét.
english: The Pharisees heard the multitude murmuring these things concerning him , and the chief priests and the Pharisees sent officers to arrest him .

nama: Yesu norayai, "Yénd fémofé so yéném némbne efoghfénefénetro, a yénd so wéi ngangon kétán emon yénd wénmáfáretam. 34 Fémofem yénd so kwéronjangi, wénde fémofem yau so kwinjongi yénd, ménamén fém yau kétán so engém yénd ánde so wém."
english: Then Jesus said , “ I will be with you a little while longer , then I go to him who sent me .

nama: Ámb árém mérén kénjún yiyárayénd fá korayau yéné a norayayénd, "Yéné ár siyém efalo yéné Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár!"
english: Many of the multitude therefore , when they heard these words , said , “ This is truly the prophet .”

nama: Ámb korayawét, "Fá siyém Keriso!"
english: Others said , “ This is the Christ .” But some said , “ What , does the Christ come out of Galilee ?

nama: Buk si noraye ndené Keriso so yém Deifidene ákimén a so náráfte Betliemén kété Deifid ánde témorangérwén." 43 Kété mwighayan afalogh tamorwén ár mérén kénjún Yesuenemén. 44 Ámb ár ménde tamorwén werghét, wénde emon yau ngángé efayoi yáfaf. Efalo yátoghofnar Ju sénko ár
english: Hasn’ t the Scripture said that the Christ comes of the offspring of David , and from Bethlehem, the village where David was ?”

nama: Njam wanjengégh ár nénangoyénd, limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a Farasi árém emotayénd, "Némamén yau fémofem fyénémnjati fá?"
english: The officers therefore came to the chief priests and Pharisees ; and they said to them , “ Why didn’ t you bring him ?”

nama: Wanjengégh árém ewawangoyénd, "Efe ámb yau korayau ndené ende fá kés korayau!"
english: The officers answered, “ No man ever spoke like this man !”

nama: Farasi árém emotayénd, "Yémo wéi té tawaweinde. 48 Yau ámb sénko ár o Farasi árém efalo yiyátoyénd fá? 49 Wénde yéné ár mérén yau mat em Mosesene nákmén. Fá sem Ngánjánene mogh mbanmbanan!"
english: The Pharisees therefore answered them , “ You aren’ t also led astray , are you ?

nama: Ámbiro Farasi ár kété témorwén fá Nikodimas, yéné ár efe yéngmormén a Yesu yinjoi fronde. Fá norayai kété ámb árfefaf, 51 "Téfene nákam yau yénmumyote nde ár kértat sái tékmangém, fronde so tiyárangém sian. Yau so yawaftam ámbro kétán mat kor kamndangém némé yam tawafrote."
english: Nicodemus ( he who came to him by night, being one of them ) said to them ,

nama: Njam fá náyárayénd yéné si, fá méinyotio nofarnayénd, ámbiroámbiroero, ár ndimbal fronde a totér ár, kétánotio Yesufro efrangeyayénd amafofé mé tawakayarwén kété. 10 Yesu nokayoi a yémndai, "Amaf, ánde fá em? Efe ámb nafrango fe waghanghét?"
english: They , when they heard it , being convicted by their conscience , went out one by one , beginning from the oldest, even to the last . Jesus was left alone with the woman where she was , in the middle .

nama: Amafom yawangoi, "Ámb ár yau yém, ndimbal." Yesum yémndai, "Yéndon wéi yau so némaghnan fém. Nguwano, wénde yaufi yau ewafrota wéikor" Yesu kwayaghé mband maratoe
english: She said , “ No one , Lord .” Jesus said , “ Neither do I condemn you . Go your way . From now on , sin no more .” + 8:11 NU includes John 7:53–John 8:11, but puts brackets around it to indicate that the textual critics had less confidence that this was original.

nama: Njam wéikor Yesu korayau árfefaf, fá ndené norayai, "Yénd wém kwayaghé mband maratoe. Emon kwénmaitongé yénd yau so yiote kwéfitayan a yáfaf so yém kwayaghé árké yém ghérsat."
english: Again , therefore , Jesus spoke to them , saying , “ I am the light of the world . He who follows me will not walk in the darkness , but will have the light of life .”

nama: Farasi ár norayayénd yáfaf, "Sénonjo fém té norayang fenjo yammén. Némé fém noraye muyafnar yém."
english: The Pharisees therefore said to him , “ You testify about yourself . Your testimony is not valid.”

nama: Yémofem yémotayénd, "Ánde yém ferafé?" Yesum ewawangoi, "Fém mafina em tanemén o tane Afanemén. Fém njam mat em tanemén, fém mat so em Afanemén ndenáyo."
english: They said therefore to him , “ Where is your Father ?” Jesus answered , “ You know neither me nor my Father . If you knew me , you would know my Father also .”

nama: Yesum norayai méinyotio yéné si njam yémon tawatametau kété wáwefnogh méngo sifayan, kété yéné satayan ánde ramégh boks tékmangérwén. A emo yau yérai fá, ménamén yáne efogh yau somé nawerai. Fém yau kétán so engém yénd ándan wéngém
english: Jesus spoke these words in the treasury , as he taught in the temple . Yet no one arrested him , because his hour had not yet come .

nama: Wéi Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Yénd so kuwanongén; fémofem so wéronjati yénd, wénde fém so kér em féfenjo yaufiyan. Fém yau so engém kétán yénd ándan wéngém."
english: Jesus said therefore again to them , “ I am going away , and you will seek me , and you will die in your sins. Where I go , you can ’ t come .”

nama: Ndenaye Ju sénko ár norayayénd, "Fá norayai yénd yau so wéngém kétán fá ándan yéngém. Némé yéné sioene fifi yém, fáyo so násmete?"
english: The Jews therefore said , “ Will he kill himself , because he says , ‘ Where I am going , you can ’ t come ’ ?”

nama: Tane em tárfár mogh féfefaf, árkéménayam so tákmangé kértat. Wénde emo yénd wénmáfáretam fá siyém efalo, a yéndon yaufrotan mband maratoe yénaro némé yéndon náyárayén yá tambén."
english: I have many things to speak and to judge concerning you . However, he who sent me is true ; and the things which I heard from him , these I say to the world .”

nama: Tárfár ár efe náyárayénd Yesu korayau yénémamén efalo yiyátoyénd fá. Efaloyam so yuwek kényátongé
english: As he spoke these things , many believed in him .

nama: Yesum ár emndai efe ndimbal mwighafé em yáfaf, "Fém njam námyotati tane watamegh sifaf, fém efalo tane waitogh ár so em; 32 fém mat so em efalo, a efaloyam so yuwek táyátongé."
english: Jesus therefore said to those Jews who had believed him , “ If you remain in my word , then you are truly my disciples .

nama: Fá néwangoyénd yáfaf, "Yénd siéném Ebraamene ákiambum, a yénd yau ténmorwén ámb ároene faiofnar ásáfogh ár. Ndernáye wét yém ndené fém kés noraye, 'Fém so káyátongi yuwek'?"
english: They answered him , “ We are Abraham’s offspring, and have never been in bondage to anyone . How do you say , ‘ You will be made free ’ ?”

nama: Fá nowangoyénd yáfaf, "Téfene afé siyém Ebraam!"
english: They answered him , “ Our father is Abraham.” Jesus said to them , “ If you were Abraham’s children , you would do the works of Abraham.

nama: Yéndon némé méinyotio tawafrotan yéndon efalo ewaufrotan féfe némé kénáyáretan Ngánjánta, wénde ngiot wérametati yénd. Ebraamém némé yau ndené tawafrotau! 41 Wénde fémofem ewafrotati némé féferafam tawafrotau. Fá nowangoyénd, "Ngánjánro siyém téfene Afé, a yénd siéném yáne efalo ambumtértér."
english: But now you seek to kill me , a man who has told you the truth which I heard from God . Abraham didn’ t do this .

nama: Yesu yémotayénd, "Némé yénd mbarkánd yéném ndené snorayangém nde fém sném Samariamén ár a ndenénde fefaf yaufi mbérmbér yélau!"
english: Then the Jews answered him , “Don’ t we say well that you are a Samaritan , and have a demon ?”

nama: Yesu norayai, "Tane kénjún ámb yau yaufi mbérmbér yém. Yéndo yutémndan tane Afé, wénde féfene wutmanégh yau yém tafaf. 50 Yéndo yau yéronjan tandio wutmanégh, wénde Ngánjánam so wutémnde yénd. Fá fiyém efalofifi mogh ár. 51 Yéndo emndetan efalo si: emon náyárete tane si fá yaufifi kér so yém."
english: Jesus answered, “ I don’ t have a demon , but I honor my Father and you dishonor me .

nama: Fá norayayénd yáfaf, "Fém ámb yau 50 yunjéf réran ném, a fémon kés yinjoi Ebraam?"
english: The Jews therefore said to him , “ You are not yet fifty years old ! Have you seen Abraham?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Yéndon emndetan fém efalo, Ebraam náráftam soramayo, Yénd Wém Efe Yénd Wém{u{ ...f* {u{8.58 Yénd Wém Efe Yénd Wém Eksodés 3:14 ."
english: Jesus said to them , “Most certainly, I tell you , before Abraham came into existence, I AM . ”

nama: Féyo yémofem ekafayénd wím yáfaf wighét, wénde Yesu fá nofatoi a yéfrangoi wáwefnogh méngo sifayé.
english: Therefore they took up stones to throw at him , but Jesus hid himself and went out of the temple , having gone through the middle of them , and so passed by .

nama: Njam Yesu téngmorwén, yémon yinjoi ár ghékéf kwéfkwéf kétándmayo áráfégh. 2 Yánjo waitogh árém yémotayénd Yesu, "Watamegh ár, endene yaufiyam yéméindai ghékéf kwéfkwéfot ndené fá kés náráftam? Yánjo yaufiyamam yéméindai o yárefafene yaufiyamam?"
english: As he passed by , he saw a man blind from birth .

nama: Yáne kaka fútaréf a emofem té túmén téfandawét fá ómnengéghan namotayénd, "Yéné ár yém efe kámnjongai a kémnendau. Efalo fété yém? 9 Ámb korayawét, "Fá fété yém." Ámb korayawét, "Yau, fá yau; fá mé yanitro nérete." Wénde fá fáyo norayai, "Yénd féu wém yéné ár."
english: Therefore the neighbors and those who saw that he was blind before said , “Isn’ t this he who sat and begged ?”

nama: Yémofem yémotayénd, "Ndernáye wét fene ghékéf nasawéryénd?"
english: They therefore were asking him , “ How were your eyes opened ?”

nama: Yémon ewawangoi, "Yéné ár yétkwén Yesu, yémon yafrotam ngénd a wasénam tane ghékéf a wémndai yénd kétán álighét Siloamét umbarghét. Yénd wéngmormén, a njamandio numbnamén, yéndon fandagh ewafngoyén.
english: He answered , “ A man called Jesus made mud , anointed my eyes , and said to me , ‘ Go to the pool of Siloam and wash .’ So I went away and washed , and I received sight .”

nama: Yémofem yémotayénd fá, "Ánde yém yéné ár?" Fá norayai, "Yénd yau mat wém." Farasi árém namotawét némé kufrotawét ghékéf kwéfkwéfefaf
english: Then they asked him , “ Where is he ?” He said , “ I don’t know .”

nama: Ámb Farasi norayayénd. "Yéné ár yau yéném Ngánjáneta, ménamén yémon yau yutémnde Safat nák." Wénde ámb namotayénd, "Ndernáye so yaufi árom yafrote ndené ufarogh yam?" Féyo fá fété mwighan afalogh nufngoyénd.
english: Some therefore of the Pharisees said , “ This man is not from God , because he doesn’ t keep the Sabbath .” Others said , “ How can a man who is a sinner do such signs ?” So there was division among them .

nama: Féyo Farasi árém yémotayénd yéné ár wéikor, "Némé fém norayai ámb yánemén ménamén yémo esawéryéng fene ghékéf?" Yéné árom ewawangoi, "Fá siyém Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár."
english: Therefore they asked the blind man again , “ What do you say about him , because he opened your eyes ?” He said , “ He is a prophet .”

nama: Wénde yéné Ju árém mé so yau efalo tiyátotawét ndené fá témorwén ghékéf kwéfkwéf a té néretai fandaghét, kétánotio yémofem emotayénd yáne yárefaf 19 a namotayénd, "Fété yéné féfene ambum yém? Fété yém fá fém snorayet ndené náráftam ghékéf kwéfkwéf? Ndernáye sénonjo efande?"
english: The Jews therefore didn’ t believe concerning him , that he had been blind and had received his sight , until they called the parents of him who had received his sight ,

nama: Féyo limánégh téfnár norayayénd yéné ároefaf efe ghékéf kwéfkwéf témorwén. Yémofem yémndayénd fá, 'Ngánjánene sáfrére, unyéghofnar si koraya ndené fém so noraye mé efalo yamménro. Yénd mat yéném yéné ár yaufi ár.'
english: So they called the man who was blind a second time , and said to him , “ Give glory to God . We know that this man is a sinner.”

nama: Yémon ewawangoi, "Yénd yau mat wém fá yaufiyam ár yém o yau. Ámbiro yam yénd mat wém: yénd kwénmorwén ghékéf kwéfkwéf wénde sénonjo yéndon efandan!"
english: He therefore answered, “ I don’t know if he is a sinner. One thing I do know : that though I was blind , now I see .”

nama: Féyo yémofem yémotayénd fá, "Némé yémon tafrote fefaf? Ndernáye yémon némasawér fene ghékéf?"
english: They said to him again, “ What did he do to you ? How did he open your eyes ?”

nama: Yémon nuwangoi, "Yéndon té ewaufron fronde a fémofem yau náyárangi. Némat fém ménde em sái káyárangi kor? Té fém wéi ménde em sái kénamndangi yáne waitogh árot?"
english: He answered them , “ I told you already , and you didn’t listen. Why do you want to hear it again ? You don’t also want to become his disciples , do you ?”

nama: Féyo yémofem sotafé si tawitawét yáfaf, a norayayénd, "Fém fai yéné ároene waitogh ár ném! Yénd siéném Mosesene waitogh ár! 29 Yénd mat yéném Ngánján korayau Mosesefaf, wénde yéné ároenemén, yénd yaufifi mat yéném árkandmé fá yénmormén."
english: They insulted him and said , “ You are his disciple , but we are disciples of Moses .

nama: Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Fém náráftam a nanotam yaufi kénjún. Fémon yau so yénmatamete yénd!" Féyo yémofem yutoryénd. Mbérmbére ghékéf kwéfkwéf
english: They answered him , “ You were altogether born in sins, and do you teach us ?” Then they threw him out .

nama: Yesu náyárai ndené yémofem té yitrongi fá, a njam yinjoi yéné ár, Yesum yémndai, "Té fémon yiyátote Ároene Ambum?"
english: Jesus heard that they had thrown him out , and finding him , he said , “ Do you believe in the Son of God ?”

nama: Yéné árom yawangoi, "Efe yém fá, ndimbal? Ta kwaufro ménát yéndon so efalo tiyátongén fá."
english: He answered , “ Who is he , Lord , that I may believe in him ?”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Fémon té téfande fá, a fá yéné féyém emofé fém norayet sénonjo."
english: Jesus said to him , “ You have both seen him , and it is he who speaks with you .”

nama: Féyo yéné árom yawangoi, "Yuré, yéndon efalo niyátotan sénonjo," a budme niyai yá sáfrére.
english: He said , “ Lord , I believe !” and he worshiped him .

nama: Yesu norayai, "Yénd kwéném yéné mbandot ménát moghét, ménát ghékéf kwéfkwéf árém so efandat a fá emofem efandat so káyátongi ghékéf kwéfkwéf."
english: Jesus said , “ I came into this world for judgment , that those who don’ t see may see; and that those who see may become blind .”

nama: Ámb Farasi ár efe tamorwén yémafé yiyárayénd fá snorayai yéné a namotayénd, "Némé fété yénd ghékéf kwéfkwéf yéném ndenáyo?"
english: Those of the Pharisees who were with him heard these things , and said to him , “ Are we also blind ?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Njam fém tamorwén ghékéf kwéfkwéf, fém yau so tékmangé kértayan yaufimén, wénde fém mé norayati ndené fémofem fété efandati, féfene kérté mé so yém."
english: Jesus said to them , “ If you were blind , you would have no sin; but now you say , ‘ We see.’ Therefore your sin remains .

nama: Yesum tawaufrotau yéné rengerenge si, wénde yémofem yau térsawét némé yémo korayau. Yesu mer sif wanjengégh ár
english: Jesus spoke this parable to them , but they didn’ t understand what he was telling them .

nama: Wéikor mé kété mwighan afalogh témorwén Ju árfé ménamén yéné simén. 20 Tárfár ndené wéi korayawét, "Fá siyém yaufi mbérmbérafé yém! Fá siyém onon! Némat fémofem yiyáretati fá?"
english: Therefore a division arose again among the Jews because of these words .

nama: Wénde ámb korayawét, "Mato ár wét sái yaufi mbérmbérafé yém yau ndené so noraye! Ndernáye yaufi mbérmbéram so mer tayátongé ghékéf kwéfkwéf ár?" Yesu té yékenayénd
english: Others said , “ These are not the sayings of one possessed by a demon . It isn’ t possible for a demon to open the eyes of the blind , is it ?”

nama: Wéi Ju árém kor ekafayénd wím ménát Yesue laighét. 32 Yesum emndai fá, "Yéndon tawafrotan tárfár meryam féfene sáfrére árké Afam enramai wafroghét; árké ásáfoghmén wíme so wafiyátotati?"
english: Therefore the Jews took up stones again to stone him .

nama: Fá nowangoyénd, "Yau yénd ménde yéném yéndfem wíme sái nénamndam ménamén méinyotio mer wafroghyammén, wénde ménamén fene wutmanghofnar si! Fém ném ár fifi, wénde fémyo náyátote nde Ngánján kar ném!"
english: The Jews answered him , “ We don’ t stone you for a good work , but for blasphemy, because you , being a man , make yourself God .”

nama: Wéikor Yesu yéta yerayénd, wénde Yesu néngfénmai yéfene ngángata.
english: They sought again to seize him , and he went out of their hand .

nama: A Yesu wéikor néférmai Joden wanje kétán Joném ár ánde tawalitotau, a kété témorangérwén. 41 Tárfár ár tanmorwén yáfaf a korayawét yéfenjo kénjúnro, "Joném ámb ufarogh yam yau ewafrotam, wénde méinyotio yammén té korayau yéné ároenemén siyém efalo." 42 Tárfár árém kété efalo yiyátoyénd Yesu.
english: He went away again beyond the Jordan into the place where John was baptizing at first , and he stayed there .

nama: Njam fá náyárai yéné, Yesu norayai, "Yéné enjne siyém yau ménát krot. Yau, yéné siyém Ngánjánene ndimbal kwayaghat yém ménát Ngánjánene Ambum so yéngwiotat yéné kénjúmé."
english: But when Jesus heard it , he said , “ This sickness is not to death , but for the glory of God , that God ’s Son may be glorified by it .”

nama: Yesum táuwétau Mata a yánngén Meri a Lajarus. 6 Wénde njam fá náyárai ndené Lajarus enjne témorwén, fá kété mé yémorangérmén yéné sifayan wéikor sómbio efogh. 7 Féyo fá korayangé yánjo waitogh árfefaf, "Yénd so nangotam kétán Judiat."
english: Now Jesus loved Martha , and her sister, and Lazarus .

nama: Fá korayangi, "Watamegh ár, tekofnar efghon kété Ju árém fém wíme wafiyátoghét némafngoyénd a wéi kétán fém nangote?"
english: The disciples asked him , “ Rabbi , the Jews were just trying to stone you . Are you going there again ?”

nama: Yánjo waitogh árém yawangoyénd, "Yuré, fá njam kémégh yékém, fá so mer káyátongé." 13 Yesu korayau yáne kérmén, wénde yáne waitogh ár kéma kemnawét fifie kéméghmén kar korayau.
english: The disciples therefore said , “ Lord , if he has fallen asleep , he will recover .”

nama: Yénémamén yémon kor ewaufroi mbarkándaye, "Lajarus fété kér tém, 15 a féfe téfnan yénd áuwéghan wém yénd yau kété kés kwém, ménát fémofem so efalo tiyátongi. Wénde so kuwanongém yénd yáfaf."
english: So Jesus said to them plainly then , “ Lazarus is dead.

nama: Féyo Tomas efe yémndetat Didimas fá korayangé ámb waitogh árfefaf, "Yénd so kuwanongém, yénd wéi yémafé Yesufé kér so yéném." Yesu siyém anogh a ghérsé
english: Thomas therefore , who is called Didymus , said to his fellow disciples , “ Let ’s also go , that we may die with him .”

nama: Mata norayai Yesuefaf, "Yuré, fém yéna njam kénmorangérwén tane ghakér yau so kér témorwén. 22 Wénde yénd mat wém ndené sénonjo Ngánjánam so kémaramangé fém némat kómnenda."
english: Therefore Martha said to Jesus , “ Lord , if you would have been here , my brother wouldn’ t have died .

nama: Yesum korayangé yáfaf, "Fene ghakér wéi so kanongé."
english: Jesus said to her , “ Your brother will rise again.”

nama: Matam yawangoi, "Yénd mat wém fá wéi so kanongé soramé efghon."
english: Martha said to him , “ I know that he will rise again in the resurrection at the last day .”

nama: Yesu norayai yáfaf, "Yénd wém anogh a ghérsé. Yáyot emo efalo yénd kwiyátongé so ghérsé yém ndemamén téu kér yém, 26 a efe njam ghérsé yém a efalo kwiyátongé yénd fá yau so kér yém. Fémon efalo yéné té yiyátote?"
english: Jesus said to her , “ I am the resurrection and the life . He who believes in me will still live , even if he dies.

nama: Matam yawangoi, "Néméwét, Yuré, yéndo efalo niyátotan ndené fém ném Keriso, Ngánjánene ambum, efe té yénmorwén yéné mband maratot.
english: She said to him , “ Yes , Lord . I have come to believe that you are the Christ , God ’ s Son , he who comes into the world .”

nama: Yéné soramé fá njam norayai yéné, fá nénangoi a yéngmotayéng yánngén Meri téndot a korayangé, "Watamegh ár yéna yém a fém nénémndete."
english: When she had said this , she went away and called Mary , her sister, secretly , saying , “ The Teacher is here and is calling you .”

nama: Njam Meri yéné sifayé nufaryéng ánde Yesu témorwén a yinjoi fá, fá nuyai yáne kafkafot a korayangé, "Yuré, fém yéna njam kénmorangérwén, tane ghakér yau so kér témorwén."
english: Therefore when Mary came to where Jesus was and saw him , she fell down at his feet , saying to him , “ Lord , if you would have been here , my brother wouldn’ t have died .”

nama: Njam Yesum yinjoi fá yeyan, a Ju ár yémafé efe enmormén fá wéi ndenéyameyo kendawét, Yesu kénjkam ghérghérsisayam yifoi tikfan. 34 Yémo emotai, "Ánde fémofem mband yaramayénd?" Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Kénaf a téfanda, Yuré."
english: When Jesus therefore saw her weeping , and the Jews weeping who came with her , he groaned in the spirit and was troubled ,

nama: Wénde ámb korayawét, "Yémo ghékéf kwéfkwéf ár mer táyátote. Némamén yau Lajarus yanjaryéng kérta?" Yesum yanoi Lajarus kétándmé kérta
english: Some of them said , “Couldn’ t this man , who opened the eyes of him who was blind , have also kept this man from dying?”

nama: Yesu kénjkam ghérghérsisayam yifoi tikfan, nénaflai mbéwéfaf. Yékw témorwén a wím yéfayoyénd sésafnen. 39 Fá korayangé, "Titrembongi yéné wím." Mata, kér téfnárane mérés norayai, "Yuré, sénonjo yaufi wim so yém, ménamén fá té náyáto 4 efogh."
english: Jesus therefore , again groaning in himself , came to the tomb . Now it was a cave , and a stone lay against it .

nama: Wénde Yesu norayai, "Yéndon ewaufrotamén fémon so yéfande Ngánjánene ndimbal kwayaghé njam fémon efalo tiyáto."
english: Jesus said to her , “Didn’ t I tell you that if you believed , you would see God ’s glory ?”

nama: Yénémamén yémofem yitrémboyénd wím. Féyo Yesu néwewoi tukét a korayangé, "Afé, yéndon kánjo némarametan fémon yénd té wiyáré. 42 Yénd mat wém ndené fémon túmén wiyárete yénd, wénde yénd yéné néngorayan árfe téfnan swakai yéna, ménát yémofem so efalo yiyátotat ndené fémon yénd wénmáfáretam."
english: So they took away the stone from the place where the dead man was lying. Jesus lifted up his eyes and said , “ Father , I thank you that you listened to me .

nama: Njam fá norayai yéné, Yesu nutnai ndimbal keye, "Lajarus, kéntor!" 44 Kér téfnár néntoryéng, yáne ngángé a kafkaf mbéwé sáláme fiyaréghkaf tamorwén a sáláme umbéghkaf sénkoyamé warengéghare. Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Tafenangi mbéwé sáláme a tumyongi álighét." Kwankwane mwighé wafrogh Yesue ngiot
english: When he had said this , he cried with a loud voice , “ Lazarus , come out !”

nama: Yénémamén tárfár Ju ár efe té enmormén yafoghét Meriefaf, a wéi tafandawét némé Yesum tawafrotau, efalo yiyátoyénd fá. 46 Wénde ámb ár engmormén Farasi árfefaf a tawaufrotawét némé Yesum tawafrotau. 47 Féyo limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a Farasi árém yanmoyénd Ju sénko árfene áumengégh.
english: Therefore many of the Jews who came to Mary and saw what Jesus did believed in him .

nama: Yéndfem njam mé yéngéumyotam engwafrota yéné yam, méinyotio árém fá so efalo yiyátotat, a wéi Rom ár so eném ewasérmbotat téfene wáwefnogh méngo a téfene yu."
english: If we leave him alone like this , everyone will believe in him , and the Romans will come and take away both our place and our nation .”

nama: Ámb ár yétkwén Kayafas, efe témorwén limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár yéné yunjéfan, norayai yéfefaf, "Fém mafina em yénémén! 50 Fém mat yau em ndené ámbiro ár sái kér yém árét, ménaye ndené yau so méinyotio Ju ár nawaghne."
english: But a certain one of them , Caiaphas , being high priest that year , said to them , “ You know nothing at all ,

nama: Yesu yénémamén kor yau marataye tiotau Ju árfefafmé. Wénde fá naweghai a nuwanoi kétán tesen yétkwén Efaraim, árké témorwén fanfne yu kaka, ánde fá tamorangérwén yánjo waitogh árfé.
english: Jesus therefore walked no more openly among the Jews , but departed from there into the country near the wilderness , to a city called Ephraim . He stayed there with his disciples .

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Téfrangongi fá yambiayo! Yémon té tamnde yéné mer wimafé wékwér yéné efghot tane mband raméghfaf. 8 Fém túmén so em yauyau árfé, wénde yénd yau kor so wém féfefaf."
english: But Jesus said , “Leave her alone . She has kept this for the day of my burial .

nama: Yénamayo efghon ndimbal ár mérén efe té enmormén Waingégh témndot náyárayénd nde Yesu yéném Jerusalemét. 13 Yémofem tangérsawét nginar árau, a néngwanoyénd yá wanfégh, ngutnawét, "Áuwégh Ngánjáne! Frengéghkaf fá yém efe yéném Yurane yétkwénan! Frengéghkaf yém warsagh ár Israilmén!"
english: On the next day a great multitude had come to the feast . When they heard that Jesus was coming to Jerusalem ,

nama: Yesum tinjongé totér ndonki a nafayoi kété, ndené fété Buk si kés yéfarotaménd,
english: Jesus , having found a young donkey , sat on it . As it is written ,

nama: "Yau férfér em, ndimbal yu Jaion{v{ ...f* {v{12.15 Jaion Yéné siyém Jerusalem ! kéretangi, féfene warsagh ár yéném, yénfayong totér ndonki tukén."{w{ ...f* {w{12.15 Jekaria 9:9
english: “Don’ t be afraid , daughter of Zion . Behold , your King comes , sitting on a donkey ’s colt .”

nama: Yesuene waitogh ár yau mat náyátoyénd méinyotio yénémamén yéné efghon. Wénde fá mat náyátoyénd soramé Yesu témorwén ndimbal kwayaghafé. Féyo fá mat táf náyátoyénd ndené ámb árom té efarotam yéné yammén Bukan.
english: His disciples didn’ t understand these things at first , but when Jesus was glorified , then they remembered that these things were written about him , and that they had done these things to him .

nama: Ámb Grikmén ár kété tamorwén yéfe kénjún efe engmormén wáwefnoghét téméndfaf. 21 Fá enmormén Filifefaf, efe témorwén kétamamén Betsaida Galili yuwon, fá norayayénd, "Ndimbal, yénd ménde yéném sái tinjongém Yesu." 22 Filif yéngmormén taufrongé Endrue, Endru a Filif nénwaneyayénd tauférend Yesue.
english: Now there were certain Greeks among those who went up to worship at the feast .

nama: Sénonjo tane tikéf uwérsoghan yém, a némé so yénd norayan? Afé, kwanjar yénd yéné efoghta? Yau, mé yéné téfnan yénd wénmormén yéné efghot. 28 Afé, yuyota fenjo yétkwén!"
english: “ Now my soul is troubled . What shall I say ? ‘ Father , save me from this time ’? But I came to this time for this cause .

nama: Ár mérén kété efe tamorwén, náyáretaménd a norayayénd ndené aruruke tém; ámb norayayénd njafar si résagh árom séno yénémndete fá.
english: Therefore the multitude who stood by and heard it said that it had thundered . Others said , “ An angel has spoken to him .”

nama: Ár mérén norayayénd, "Yénd té náyárayém Buk sita ndené Keriso so nakete tuot. Némamén fém noraye Ároene Ambum fété so yuyotat? Efe yém yéné Ároene Ambum?"
english: The multitude answered him , “ We have heard out of the law that the Christ remains forever . How do you say , ‘ The Son of Man must be lifted up ’ ? Who is this Son of Man ?”

nama: Yéné téfnan yémofem yau efalo yiyátoyénd, ménamén Aisayam wéi té korayau:
english: For this cause they couldn’t believe , for Isaiah said again :

nama: "Yuram kwéfkwéf eyátoi yéfene ghékéf a tikéf táikér wéi ndenáyo, ménát fá yau so néretat yéfenjo ghékfe, yau so mat náyátotat yéfenjo tikfan, yau so nawengotat a yéndon sái mer eyátotan fá."
english: “ He has blinded their eyes and he hardened their heart , lest they should see with their eyes , and perceive with their heart , and would turn , and I would heal them .” + 12:40 Isaiah 6:10

nama: Aisaya norayai yéné ménamén yémon yinjoi Yesuene ndimbal kwayaghé a korayau yánemén.
english: Isaiah said these things when he saw his glory , and spoke of him .

nama: Wénde sénko ár kénjún tárfáram efalo yiyátoyénd Yesu. Wénde ménamén Farasi árfenemén yau yémofem kafrotawét yéfenjo ndimbal mwighamén férfér téfnan ménamén mété táf tautonawét áumengégh méngota, 43 ménamén yémofem áuwégh térsawét árta mindefifi yau Ngánjáneta.
english: Nevertheless , even many of the rulers believed in him , but because of the Pharisees they didn’ t confess it , so that they wouldn’ t be put out of the synagogue,

nama: Yesu norayai marat kéme, "Njam árom efalo kwiyátongé yénd, yémon yau yéndro efalo wiyátote, wénde fá wéi emon yénd wénmáfáretam. 45 Njam emo wefanda yénd, yémo yéfande fá emo yénd wénmáfáretam. 46 Yénd té wénmormén kwayaghé yéné mbandot, ménát emo njam efalo wiyátota fá yau so yém kwéfitayan.
english: Jesus cried out and said , “ Whoever believes in me , believes not in me , but in him who sent me .
