nama: Kaka témorwén Waingégh téménd. Yesu mat náyátoi ndené efogh té nawer yáyot yéné mband marat frangoghét a angoghét Yárefaf. Yémon tauwetau yánjo waitogh ár yéné mband maratan, yémon tauwetau fá mindefifi kétánotio yatoghfaf.
english: Now before the feast of the Passover , Jesus , knowing that his time had come that he would depart from this world to the Father , having loved his own who were in the world , he loved them to the end .

nama: Fá yénmormén Saimon Fitafaf, emo yémndai fá, "Yuré, fémon tane kafkaf so waumbne? Yénd yau ménde wém"
english: Then he came to Simon Peter . He said to him , “ Lord , do you wash my feet ?”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Sénonjo fémon yau yáyamngo yéndo némé yafrotan, wénde soramé fém mat so káyáto."
english: Jesus answered him , “ You don’t know what I am doing now , but you will understand later .”

nama: Fité norayai, "Yau, fémon yaufifi so waumbne tane kafkaf, yau sénonjo o tuot!" Yesum yawangoi, "Yéndon yau njam némaumbnan fene kafkaf, fém tane waitogh ár yau so ném."
english: Peter said to him , “ You will never wash my feet !” Jesus answered him , “ If I don’ t wash you , you have no part with me .”

nama: Saimon Fitam yawangoi, "Féyo, Yuré, yau mé tane kafkafro wénde tane ngángé a tane sénko ndenéyameyo."
english: Simon Peter said to him , “ Lord , not my feet only , but also my hands and my head !”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Efe té kumbnat mé yéfene kafkafro umbarghét em; yéfene méinyotio fifi siyém njúnnjúnofnar. Fém njúnnjúnofnar em wénde yau fém méinyotio." 11 Fá norayai ndené ménamén fá mat náyátoi emo so sén téramangai fá, a yéné téfnan fá norayai méinyotio njúnnjúnofnar tamorwén wénde ámbiro yau.
english: Jesus said to him , “Someone who has bathed only needs to have his feet washed , but is completely clean . You are clean , but not all of you .”

nama: Yénd yau norayan méinyotio féfenemén, yénd mat wém efe yéndon ekafayén. Wénde yéné ménát yém Buk si efalo sái káyátongé, 'Fá emafé tane féskaf flawé feném, fá yém tane sén téfnár.'
english: I don’ t speak concerning all of you . I know whom I have chosen ; but that the Scripture may be fulfilled , ‘ He who eats bread with me has lifted up his heel against me .’

nama: Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe sénonjo frondeyo soramé nufrota, ménát njam nufrota, fémofem so efalo kwiyátongi ndené Yénd yéné fwém efe Yénd wém. 20 Yéndon féfe ewaufrotan efalo: emon njam tumyongé ár efe yéndon yéngwáfáretan kumyongé yénd; a emo njam kumyongé yénd tumyongé fá emo yénd wénmáfáretam."
english: From now on , I tell you before it happens , that when it happens , you may believe that I am he .

nama: Soramé Yesu njam norayai yéné si, fá mbérmbéran nawayamngoi a norayai yánjo waitogh árfefaf, "Yéndon féfe ewaufrotan efalo, ámb féfene árom sén so kwéramangé."
english: When Jesus had said this , he was troubled in spirit , and testified , “ Most certainly I tell you that one of you will betray me .”

nama: Yáne waitogh ár afandagh nufngoyénd fáro fáro, ménamén fá mafina tamorwén efe Yesum tésérmbnau. 23 Ámb yánjo waitogh ár efe Yesum tuwetau témorangérwén Yesue kaka. 24 Saimon Fitam ngángaye yaunyai a norayai yéné waitogh ároefaf, "Témota fá árké ár yémon yésérmbne?"
english: The disciples looked at one another , perplexed about whom he spoke .

nama: Féyo yéné waitogh ár néngamghai Yesuefaf, yémon yémndai Yesu, "Yuré, efe yéné ár yém?"
english: He , leaning back, as he was , on Jesus ’ chest , asked him , “ Lord , who is it ?”

nama: Tane ambumtértér, yénd fémafé so yéna yéném tekofnaye. Fémofem so wéronjati, a sénonjo yéndon emndetan fém, némé yéndon tamndetan Ju ár: Ándan yénd wiota, fém kétán yau so eyota.
english: Little children , I will be with you a little while longer . You will seek me , and as I said to the Jews , ‘ Where I am going , you can ’ t come ,’ so now I tell you .

nama: Totér nák ewaraman féfe, euwetati ámb ár, ndené fété yéndon euwetamén fém, yénémamén fém náuwetati fémro fémro. 35 Yénayan méinyotio ár mat so kamndangi ndené fém sem tane waitogh ár, fém njam náuwetati fémro fémro.
english: A new commandment I give to you , that you love one another. Just as I have loved you , you also love one another.

nama: Saimon Fitam yémotai fá, "Yuré, fém ándan niota?" Yesum yawangoi, "Ándan yénd wiote, fémo yau so kwénmaito sénonjo, wénde soramé so néngwaitote."
english: Simon Peter said to him , “ Lord , where are you going ?” Jesus answered , “ Where I am going , you can ’t follow now , but you will follow afterwards .”

nama: Fitam yémotai, "Yuré, némamén yéndon yau so néngmaitotan fém sénonjo? Yénd afrengéghkaf wém feyot kérot."
english: Peter said to him , “ Lord , why can ’ t I follow you now ? I will lay down my life for you .”

nama: Wénde Yesum yawangoi, "Fém so efalo tayot kér ném? Efaloe yéndo némndetan fe, fémon yénd fronde so kwékenang nambinotmé, soramé ghakér kowi kutnangé!"
english: Jesus answered him , “ Will you lay down your life for me ? Most certainly I tell you , the rooster won’ t crow until you have denied me three times .

nama: Tomasém yémndai fá, "Yuré, yénd mafina yéném ándan fém nuwanote, ndernáye yénd mat so yéném end?"
english: Thomas said to him , “ Lord , we don’ t know where you are going . How can we know the way ?”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Yénd wém end a efalo a ghérsé. Yau tayofnaye ámb ár so yéngém Afafaf, mé ta kénjúmaro. 7 Njam fémofem yénd té wayamngoyénd, fémofem ndenéyameyo so tayamngongi tane Afé. Yénamé sénonjo fém mat em fá a té yinjongi."
english: Jesus said to him , “ I am the way , the truth, and the life . No one comes to the Father , except through me .

nama: Filif norayai, "Yuré, téfeyot ténmauyafo Afé a yénd yénanotro ménde yéném."
english: Philip said to him , “ Lord , show us the Father , and that will be enough for us .”

nama: Judas (yau Judas Iskariot) norayai, "Yuré, fém fémyo némamén so nauyafote téfefafro wénde yau mband maratfaf?"
english: Judas ( not Iscariot ) said to him , “ Lord , what has happened that you are about to reveal yourself to us , and not to the world ?”

nama: Njam Wáutárégh ár yéném, efe yéndon so yénmáfáretan kétamé Afata, Efaloene Njánján Mbérmbér efe so yéném Afata, fá so néngafrote tanemén. 27 Fém wéi ndenéyameyo so néngafrotati tanemén, ménamén yéndfé fém té téném rényéghta.
english: “ When the Counselor has come , whom I will send to you from the Father , the Spirit of truth, who proceeds from the Father , he will testify about me .

nama: Soramé Yesu norayai yéné, fá néretai njafarot a norayai:
english: Jesus said these things , then lifting up his eyes to heaven , he said , “ Father , the time has come . Glorify your Son , that your Son may also glorify you ;

nama: "Afé! Yénd ménde wém fá efe waramai ta so em yéndfé kété yénd ánde wém, a so yéfandat tane ndimbal kwayaghé, yéné ndimbal kwayaghé fémon árké té waramai ménamén fémon yénd uwetam, soramé yu yafrotam.
english: Father , I desire that they also whom you have given me be with me where I am , that they may see my glory which you have given me , for you loved me before the foundation of the world .

nama: Njam yémon yifoi Ngánjánafé orayégh, Yesuf nuwanoyénd yánjo waitogh árfé kéférmetawét Kidron tétkafe. Kétamé karfan témorwén olif wén ndaufaf, fá a yánjo waitogh ár engmormén kétán.
english: When Jesus had spoken these words , he went out with his disciples over the brook Kidron , where there was a garden , into which he and his disciples entered .

nama: Yesu, mat témorwén méinyotio némé so kufrotau yáfaf, néngaflai a emotai fá, "Efe fémofem yénronjati?"
english: Jesus therefore , knowing all the things that were happening to him , went out and said to them , “ Who are you looking for ?”

nama: Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Yesu Najaretmén." Yesu norayai, "Yénd féu Wém."
english: They answered him , “ Jesus of Nazareth .” Jesus said to them , “ I am he .” Judas also , who betrayed him , was standing with them .

nama: Táf njam Yesu norayai, "Ndené Yénd fété Wém," fá táf kwémbkwémbe nangoyénd a nuyáyénd mbandot.
english: When therefore he said to them , “ I am he ,” they went backward and fell to the ground .

nama: Wéikor Yesum emotai, "Efe fémofem yénronjati?
english: Again therefore he asked them , “ Who are you looking for ?” They said , “ Jesus of Nazareth .”

nama: Saimon Fité a ámb yánjo waitogh ár yéngwaiteyayénd Yesu. Limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár mat témorwén yéné Yesuene waitogh ároenemén, féyo fá engérmén Yesufé kénjút kétán limánégh ghéngén wárogh ároene méngo sifayat, 16 wénde Fité mé takayongérwén téndon sésafnefaf, wénde ámb Yesuene waitogh ár efe limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár mat témorwén, fá nénangoi, témndangé mérés efe témorwén sésafne wanjengégh ár, a yényawai Fité kénjút.
english: Simon Peter followed Jesus , as did another disciple . Now that disciple was known to the high priest, and entered in with Jesus into the court of the high priest;

nama: Mérés efe témorwén sésafnefaf yémon yémotai Fité, "Fém ámb yéné ném yáne waitogh ár, efalo fété ném?" Wénde Fitam yawangoi, "Yénd yau."
english: Then the maid who kept the door said to Peter , “ Are you also one of this man ’s disciples ?” He said , “ I am not .”

nama: Krufér témorwén, faiofnar ásáfogh ár a wáwefnogh méngo wanjengégh ár nokayoyénd fés téndomé árké yétayaménd afaloghét. Fité fá takayogérwén kafalau fés árenjén. Limánégh ghéngén wárogh árom témotau Yesu
english: Now the servants and the officers were standing there , having made a fire of coals, for it was cold . They were warming themselves . Peter was with them , standing and warming himself .

nama: Yénamayo, limánégh ghéngén wárogh árom yémotai Yesu yánjo waitogh ármén a yánjo watameghmén.
english: The high priest therefore asked Jesus about his disciples and about his teaching .

nama: Njam norayai yéné, ámb wáwefnogh méngo wanjengégh ár efe takayongérwén yá kaka ngángaye yésmai sáfan a norayai, "Fém yau táf noraya limánégh ghéngén wárogh ároe yéné ende."
english: When he had said this , one of the officers standing by slapped Jesus with his hand , saying , “ Do you answer the high priest like that ?”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Yénd njam té norayayén mámáfie, mé koraya ánde yém mámáfi. Wénde táf yénd njam té norayayén efaloe, némamén fémon wesem yénd?"
english: Jesus answered him , “ If I have spoken evil , testify of the evil ; but if well , why do you beat me ?”

nama: Féyo Anasém yéngwafnamoi Yesu umbéghkaf Kayafasefaf limánégh ghéngén wárogh ároefaf. Fitam yékenai Yesu wéikor
english: Annas sent him bound to Caiaphas , the high priest.

nama: Njamandio Saimon Fité takayongérwén fésén kafalau, fá yémotayénd, "Fém mété ném ámb yáne waitogh ár." Fá nawanyotai a norayai, "Yénd yau."
english: Now Simon Peter was standing and warming himself . They said therefore to him , “ You aren’ t also one of his disciples , are you ?” He denied it and said , “ I am not .”

nama: Ámb ghéngén wárogh ároene faiofnar ásáfogh ár, yá mérén endene téngan Fitam yanfai, yémon yémotai fá, "Némé yéndon yau fém ewinjeyayén yémafé kété ndawan?" 27 Wéikor Fité nawanyotayéng, yéné efoghféneféneyan ghakér kowi táf nutnayéng. Yesu Failete sáfrére
english: One of the servants of the high priest, being a relative of him whose ear Peter had cut off , said , “Didn’ t I see you in the garden with him ?”

nama: Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Fá yau njam témorwén yaufiyam wafrogh ár, yéndfem yau táf so téramangayém féfefaf."
english: They answered him , “ If this man weren’t an evildoer , we wouldn’t have delivered him up to you .”

nama: Failet korayangé, "Téngwasrongi fémofemyo a yémotati féfenjo náke."
english: Pilate therefore said to them , “ Take him yourselves , and judge him according to your law .” Therefore the Jews said to him , “ It is illegal for us to put anyone to death,”

nama: Yéné kufrotau ménamén Yesu némé si korayau ndernáye kér so témorwén.
english: that the word of Jesus might be fulfilled , which he spoke , signifying by what kind of death he should die .

nama: Failet táf néngangoi méngo kénjút, yanmoi yáfafétio Yesu a témotangé, "Némé fém warsagh ár ném Ju árfene?"
english: Pilate therefore entered again into the Praetorium , called Jesus , and said to him , “ Are you the King of the Jews ?”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Némé yéné ámogh si fe tambén yéném, o té ámb árém kafrotat tanemén?"
english: Jesus answered him , “ Do you say this by yourself , or did others tell you about me ?”

nama: Failetém yawangoi, "Yénd yau wém Jumén. Fene áryo a yéfene limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár yémofem nénramangi tafaf. Némé fémon tafrote?"
english: Pilate answered, “ I ’m not a Jew , am I ? Your own nation and the chief priests delivered you to me . What have you done ?”

nama: Yesu norayai, "Tane limángégh sifayé siyém yéné mband maratmén yau yém. Njam témorwén, tane faiofnar ásáfogh árém so kásmetawét a kwambetawét yénd kétamé Ju árfene weréghta. Wénde sénonjo tane limánégh sifayé siyém ámb yumén yém."
english: Jesus answered, “ My Kingdom is not of this world . If my Kingdom were of this world , then my servants would fight, that I wouldn’ t be delivered to the Jews . But now my Kingdom is not from here .”

nama: Failet norayai, "Féyo, fém ném warsagh ár, féyotaro?" Yesum yawangoi, "Fém ném mbarkánd ndené kés noraya yénd fété wém warsagh ár. Mbarkándaye, yéné téfnan yénd náráftamén a wénmormén yéné mband maratot sái kafrotawén efalomén. Méinyotio efaloe tambénta ár efe em náyáretat tafaf."
english: Pilate therefore said to him , “ Are you a king then ?” Jesus answered , “ You say that I am a king . For this reason I have been born , and for this reason I have come into the world , that I should testify to the truth. Everyone who is of the truth listens to my voice .”

nama: Wénde yéné siyém féfenjo túmén yam tayot ménát yéndon sái téngutorén féfefaf ámbiro kwéfkwéf méngo ár yéné Ju árfene awafarogh Waingégh efogh. Fém ménde té em yéndon sái tutorén warsagh ár Ju árfene?"
english: But you have a custom that I should release someone to you at the Passover . Therefore , do you want me to release to you the King of the Jews ?”

nama: Yémofem keye yawangoyénd, "Yau fá, wénde Barabas!" Barabas témorwén usérmbogh téfnár.
english: Then they all shouted again , saying , “ Not this man , but Barabbas!” Now Barabbas was a robber .

nama: Njam sénko ghéngén wárogh ár a wáwefnogh méngo wanjengégh árém yinjoyénd Yesu, fá nutnayénd, "Ténamndangi wafatarégh wénan! Ténamndangi wafatarégh wénan!" Wénde Failetém ewawangoi, "Fémofem téngwasrongi a téngwamangi. Ndené tayot, yéndon yau yinjon ámb mámáfi árkémamén fai so tanangé yémon."
english: When therefore the chief priests and the officers saw him , they shouted, saying , “ Crucify ! Crucify !” Pilate said to them , “ Take him yourselves and crucify him , for I find no basis for a charge against him .”

nama: Ju ár yawangoyénd, "Téfefaf yéna nák yém, a yéné nákan fá so kér yém, ménamén fá kawarsau ndené fá kar témorwén Ngánjánene Ambum."
english: The Jews answered him , “ We have a law , and by our law he ought to die, because he made himself the Son of God .”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Fefaf yau so témorwén yéné wafté ta waingéghét ndemamén kémaramangai fe njafarta. Yénémaménnde fá emo yénd wéram fefaf, yáne yaufiyamam yáinde fene yaufiyam."
english: Jesus answered, “ You would have no power at all against me , unless it were given to you from above. Therefore he who delivered me to you has greater sin.”

nama: Féyo yénamé Failetém yéta utorghét térametau Yesu, wénde Ju ár ménjtaye mé kutnawét, "Njam fémon téngéumyo yéné ár nguwanongé, fém yau so fútar ném ndimbal warsagh ár Kaisarene. Árké ár efe nawarsat ndené fá sái em warsagh ár yékarotat Kaisar."
english: At this , Pilate was seeking to release him , but the Jews cried out , saying , “ If you release this man , you aren’ t Caesar ’s friend ! Everyone who makes himself a king speaks against Caesar !”

nama: Wénde fá nutnayénd, "Tésmetangi! Tésmetangi! Ténamndangi wafatarégh wénan!" Failetém emotai, "Némé yéndon so yénamndan féfene warsagh ár wafatarégh wénan? Sénko ghéngén wárogh árém yawangoyénd, "Téfene ámb yau yém warsagh ár wénde Kaisarro!"
english: They cried out , “Away with him ! Away with him ! Crucify him !” Pilate said to them , “ Shall I crucify your King ?” The chief priests answered , “ We have no king but Caesar !”

nama: Ambinomén Failetém yéngwafamai yéfefaf ménát wafatarégh wénan namghét. Wamégh
english: So then he delivered him to them to be crucified . So they took Jesus and led him away.

nama: Téngérsau yánjo wafatarégh wén, yéné sifayat yémndetat sénko sot sifayé, yéné Ibru árfene sie árké yémndetat Golgota. 18 Kété yémofem yénamndaménd Yesu wafatarégh wénan. Yémofem ekmeyayénd ámb sómbio ár wafatarégh wénan Yesue kaka. Fá tárwén Yesue téndota a Yesu yéfe néndkéfan.
english: He went out , bearing his cross , to the place called “ The Place of a Skull ”, which is called in Hebrew , “ Golgotha ”,

nama: Failetém ewawangoi, "Némé yéndon téfarotan, yéndon yéné fété téfarotan."
english: Pilate answered, “ What I have written , I have written .”

nama: A njam fiyaram yénamndaménd wafatarégh wénan Yesu, yémofem yéfitraryénd sáláme a efaloyénd fo mérne kénjún a ámbiroero nawaftamend fiyaré. Yémofem yéné yafrotaménd a féyo yémofem yanayénd tombé sáláme árkéméné tawongérwén kénjún a yinjoyénd ndené sáláme namofnar témorwén tárfár karfan, wénde yéné yafrotaménd ámbiro karéfta kétamé tuk kétán yu.
english: Then the soldiers , when they had crucified Jesus , took his garments and made four parts , to every soldier a part ; and also the tunic . Now the tunic was without seam, woven from the top throughout .

nama: Yéné soramé, Yesu mat náyátoi ndené yémo té ásáfogh yifo. A ménát sái Buk si efalo káyátongé, fá norayai, "Yénd nuam wéramete." 29 Kété témorwén ghafté wéri nu{y{ ...f* {y{19.29 ghafté wéri nu Mt, Mk, Lk checked it again
english: After this , Jesus , seeing that all things were now finished , that the Scripture might be fulfilled , said , “ I am thirsty !”

nama: Njam yémon yénetai yéné wéri nu, Yesu norayai, "Kés nefo!" Yéné siafé táf sénko yéraweryéng a kér yémormén.
english: When Jesus therefore had received the vinegar , he said , “ It is finished !” Then he bowed his head and gave up his spirit .

nama: a ámb Buk si noraye, "Fá so néretat yáfaf efe yékunyayénd fimbe."{a{ ...f* {a{19.37 Jakaraya 12:10 Mband ramégh Yesue
english: Again another Scripture says , “ They will look on him whom they pierced .”

nama: Wénde Meri mé takayongérwén téndo mbéwata ye kendau. Njam mé kendau, fá néngáwefnoi fandaghét mbéwéfaf 12 a ewinjeyai sómbio njafar si résagh ár kafe ngarot sáláme umaneghkaf, tárwén kété Yesuene fifi ánde té tékmangérwén, ámb sénko tambén ámb kafkaf tambén.
english: But Mary was standing outside at the tomb weeping . So as she wept , she stooped and looked into the tomb ,

nama: Yémofem yémotangeyayénd, "Amaf, némamén fém nende?"
english: They asked her , “ Woman , why are you weeping ?” She said to them , “ Because they have taken away my Lord , and I don’ t know where they have laid him .”

nama: Yénamé, fá nawengoi a yinjoi Yesu takayongérwén kété, wénde yémo kor yau yáyamngoi ndené Yesu témorwén.
english: When she had said this , she turned around and saw Jesus standing , and didn’ t know that it was Jesus .

nama: Fá korayangé, "Amaf, némamén fém nende? Efe fémo yéronje?" Fá kéma kemnau nde ndau téfnár kar témorwén, fá norayai, "Ndimbal, táf fémon njam fá té yéngwan, kwaufro ánde fémon yékém fá a yéndo so ténmanan."
english: Jesus said to her , “ Woman , why are you weeping ? Who are you looking for ?” She , supposing him to be the gardener , said to him , “ Sir , if you have carried him away , tell me where you have laid him , and I will take him away .”

nama: Yesum témndangé fá, "Meri." Fá nawengoi Yesue tambén a norayai Ju árfene sie, "Raboni!" Yáne fifi watamegh ár.
english: Jesus said to her , “ Mary .” She turned and said to him , “ Rabboni !” + 20:16 Rabboni is a transliteration of the Hebrew word for “great teacher.” which is to say , “ Teacher !” + 20:16 or, Master

nama: Yesu norayai, "Yau mé wereta yénd, ménamén yénd yau mé narmbon Afafaf. Nguwano tane mérnafefaf a tawaufro, 'Yénd armboghét nufngon kétán tane Afafaf a fene Afafaf, tane Ngánjánefaf a fene Ngánjánefaf."
english: Jesus said to her , “Don’ t hold me , for I haven’ t yet ascended to my Father ; but go to my brothers and tell them , ‘ I am ascending to my Father and your Father , to my God and your God .’”

nama: Meri Makdalin yéngmormén a tawaufrongé Yesuene waitogh árét, "Yéndon té yinjon Yuré!" a yémon tawaufrotau yéfe yéné némé korayau Yesu yáfaf. Yesu nufaryéng yánjo waitogh árfefaf
english: Mary Magdalene came and told the disciples that she had seen the Lord , and that he had said these things to her .

nama: Tomasém témndangé Yesu, "Tane Yuré a tane Ngánján!"
english: Thomas answered him , “ My Lord and my God !”

nama: Féyo Yesum témndangé Tomas, "Ménamén fémon té winjo yénd, fémon yénémamén efalo wiyáto, frengéghkaf em fá emofem yau wéfandat wénde ndimbal mwighaye mé efalo wiyátotat."
english: Jesus said to him , “ Because you have seen me , you have believed . Blessed are those who have not seen and have believed .”

nama: Yesum ámb tárfár ufrogh yam tawafrotau njam yánjo waitogh árfé tamorwén, árké yau ekai yéné Bukan. 31 Wénde yéné faroghmén em ménát fémofem so efalo yiyátoti ndené Yesu fété yém Keriso, Ngánjánene Ambum, a efalo njam yiyátotati, féfene so yém ghérsé yáne yétkwénan.
english: Therefore Jesus did many other signs in the presence of his disciples , which are not written in this book ;

nama: Tándái akwan, Yesu nokayoi arakaf téndofaf, wénde yánjo waitogh árém yau yáyámngoyénd ndené Yesu témorwén.
english: But when day had already come , Jesus stood on the beach; yet the disciples didn’ t know that it was Jesus .

nama: Fá nénutnai yéfefaf, "Fútaréf, féfene wagif ámb té ewam? Yémofem yénmawangoyénd, "Yau."
english: Jesus therefore said to them , “ Children , have you anything to eat?” They answered him , “ No .”

nama: Fá korayangé, "Titangi féfenjo net boutoene tambénta a so tarnyangi ámb wagif." Njam yafrotaménd, fá féyotarofnar tamorwén net okaughét boutot waflighét ménamén minde tárfár wagif numetaménd.
english: He said to them , “ Cast the net on the right side of the boat , and you will find some .” They cast it therefore , and now they weren’ t able to draw it in for the multitude of fish .

nama: Njam yémofem ewifoyénd njamke néne, Yesu norayai Saimon Fitafaf, "Saimon Jonene ambum, fene uwégham tayot té ewainde yéné ámb waitogh árfene uwégh tayot?" Fá norayai, "Néméwét, Yuré, fém mat ném ndené yéndon némuwetan fém." Yesu korayangé, "Emanjna tane sif tosé."
english: So when they had eaten their breakfast, Jesus said to Simon Peter , “ Simon , son of Jonah, do you love me more than these ?” He said to him , “ Yes , Lord ; you know that I have affection for you .” He said to him , “ Feed my lambs.”

nama: Wéikor Yesu korayangé, "Saimon Jonene ambum, fémon efalo té wuwete yénd? Yémon yawangoi, "Néméwét, Yuré, fém mat ném ndené yéndon némuwetan." Yesum témndangé, "Ewanjeta kor tane sif."
english: He said to him again a second time , “ Simon , son of Jonah, do you love me ?” He said to him , “ Yes , Lord ; you know that I have affection for you .” He said to him , “Tend my sheep .”

nama: Nambiomén Yesum témndangé fá, "Saimon Jonene ambum, fémon efalo té wuwete yénd?" Fité ndémkefé yéfghetam ménamén Yesum yémotai fá nambinotma, "Té wuwete yénd?" Fá korayangé, "Yuré, fém mat ném méinyotio yam; fém mat ném yéndon némuwetan fém."
english: He said to him the third time , “ Simon , son of Jonah, do you have affection for me ?” Peter was grieved because he asked him the third time , “ Do you have affection for me ?” He said to him , “ Lord , you know everything . You know that I have affection for you .” Jesus said to him , “ Feed my sheep .

nama: Fité nawengoi a yinjoi Yesuene waitogh ár efe Yesum tuwetau tanwaitowéng fá. Yéné fá témorwén efe néngamghai Yesuefaf kété férégh njamke néneyan a té norayai, "Yuré, emo so sén néramete fém?" 21 Njam Fitam yinjoi fá, yémon kamotangé, "Yuré, ndernáye wét fá?"
english: Then Peter , turning around , saw a disciple following . This was the disciple whom Jesus loved, the one who had also leaned on Jesus ’ chest at the supper and asked , “ Lord , who is going to betray you ?”

nama: Yéné Yesuene waitogh ár témorwén efe kafrotau yénémamén a emo téfarotau. Yénd mat yéném ndené yáne afrogh siyém efalo.
english: This is the disciple who testifies about these things , and wrote these things . We know that his witness is true .

nama: Yesum tangwafrotau tárfár yam wéi ndenáyo, njam ményotio yammén téfarotawét, kété yau so témorwén féyotarofnar sifayé yéné mband maratan ménát sái Buk takmetawét
english: There are also many other things which Jesus did , which if they would all be written , I suppose that even the world itself wouldn’t have room for the books that would be written .

nama: Féyo njam fá nafángoyénd Yesufé, yémofem yémotayénd fá, "Yuré, fém féyotaro ném yéné efghon Israil yu sái yérameta wéikor?"
english: Therefore , when they had come together , they asked him , “ Lord , are you now restoring the kingdom to Israel ?”

nama: Yémo emndai fá, "Yéné féfeyot yau mat efogh o efoghféneféne em, wénde Ngánjánro mat yém. 8 Wénde fémofem so tawinjongi wafté táf Ngánján Mbérmbér njam yéném féfefaf, a fém so em tane si ghékéf fandagh ár Jerusalem kénjún, méinyotio Judian a Samarian a kétánotio mband marat árkamé yiyato."
english: He said to them , “ It isn’ t for you to know times or seasons which the Father has set within his own authority .

nama: Yéné soramé fá njam yéné si norayai, fá táf nuwanoi yéfene méinyotio ghékfanro, njafar kwamkwamam yéngwamoi yéfene ghékéfta.
english: When he had said these things , as they were looking , he was taken up , and a cloud received him out of their sight .

nama: Yéné efghon Fité nokayoi 120 efalo yátogh ár mérén kénjún 16 a norayai, "Fútaréf, Buk si so nufrote árkéméné Ngánján Mbérmbér korayau fronde Deifidene mbírmbírta némé korayau Judasenemén, efe náyátoyéng wambégh ár yéfeyot emofem Yesu yerayénd, 17 Judas ámb tém téfene kénjún a si waitogh ár."
english: In these days , Peter stood up in the middle of the disciples ( and the number of names was about one hundred twenty ), and said ,

nama: Judasém mani ewanai yaufi ásáfoghmén, yémon yanayéng mband, kété numai yáne fifi néfnoi marataye a yáne ghérghér nétoryénd. 19 Méinyotio ár Jerusalemén náyárayénd yénémamén, féyo yémofem yéné sifayé témndetawét yéfenjo sie Akeldama, yáne fifi siyém "Férék sifayé."
english: Now this man obtained a field with the reward for his wickedness; and falling headlong , his body burst open and all his intestines gushed out .

nama: Fité norayai, "Fété yékai Sams bukan, 'Yáne sifayé so yém fanfnero, efe yau so yémor yáne sifayan,' a 'Ámb árom téngwanangé yáne limánégh sifayé.'
english: For it is written in the book of Psalms , ‘ Let his habitation be made desolate . Let no one dwell in it ;’ + 1:20 Psalms 69:25 and , ‘ Let another take his office .’ + 1:20 Psalms 109:8

nama: Yénémamén so fété tékafangém ámb ár efe yéndfé té téném méinyotio efghon njam Yuré Yesufé yénd tényotau, 22 kétamé yéné efghon Joném njam nue yálitotam Yesu kétánotio fá néngwanoi téfe tambén. Ámbiro so kénamndangé ghékéf fandagh ár yéndfé Yesuene anoghmén."
english: “ Of the men therefore who have accompanied us all the time that the Lord Jesus went in and out among us ,

nama: Wénde ámb árém tawértawét a emndayénd, "Yémofem tánetat totér wéri nu." Fitam si táitotau ár mérnat
english: Others , mocking , said , “ They are filled with new wine .”

nama: "Ngánján noraye, 'Sénonjo kerker efghon, yéndo so téngwasurén tane Mbérmbér méinyotio árfefaf, a féfene ambum a mérésmérés so nafrotat Ngánjánene si, a féfene totér árém ghékéf waingégh yam so efandat, a féfene ákif onjo so ekém.
english: ‘ It will be in the last days , says God , that I will pour out my Spirit on all flesh . Your sons and your daughters will prophesy . Your young men will see visions . Your old men will dream dreams .

nama: Wénde tane faiofnar ásáfogh árfet, ár a amaf, yéndon so téngwasurén tane Mbérmbér yéné efghon, fá so nafrotat Ngánjánene si.
english: Yes, and on my servants and on my handmaidens in those days , I will pour out my Spirit , and they will prophesy .

nama: Yéndon so sélngwélafé yam ewauyafotan njafaran a ufarogh yam mband mbanmbanan, férék, fés a sénjté kwam.
english: I will show wonders in the sky above , and signs on the earth beneath : blood, and fire , and billows of smoke .

nama: Efogh so kawengongé kwéfitat a ghérare so kawengongé férkot yéné soramé Yurane efogh yéném ndimbal a ndimbal kwayaghafé.
english: The sun will be turned into darkness , and the moon into blood, before the great and glorious day of the Lord comes .

nama: A méinyotio ár efe kómnendangi Yurane yétkwénan, fá so kawanjarngi.'
english: It will be that whoever will call on the name of the Lord will be saved .’

nama: Féyo tane tikéf siyém nasnete a tane kánké náuwete, tane fifi so ndenéyameyo nene kamnangan,
english: Therefore my heart was glad , and my tongue rejoiced . Moreover my flesh also will dwell in hope ,

nama: ménamén fémo yau so kwéfrango kér árfé, o tumyo fene njúnnjúnofnar ár sái nornda mbéwé méngon.
english: because you will not leave my soul in Hades, neither will you allow your Holy One to see decay .

nama: Fém mat té náyátoi tafaf ghérsé endmén, fémo yénd so kwafo ménaye áuwéghe fene sáfrére.'
english: You made known to me the ways of life . You will make me full of gladness with your presence .’ + 2:28 Psalms 16:8-11

nama: kétánotio yéndo so tákman fene mék téfnár fene kafkaf mbanmbanan."'
english: until I make your enemies a footstool for your feet .”’

nama: "Féyo méinyotio Israil ár mat kamndangi ndené fémofem yéné Yesu té ténamndati wafatarégh wénan, wénde Ngánjánam té yiyátoi Yuré a Keriso."
english: “ Let all the house of Israel therefore know certainly that God has made him both Lord and Christ , this Jesus whom you crucified .”

nama: Njam árém Fité yiyárayénd yéné si snorayai, fá táf nuyáyénd tikfan a norayayénd Fitafaf a ámb Yesuene muyafé árfefaf, "Fútaréf, némé yéndfem so ewafrotam?"
english: Now when they heard this , they were cut to the heart , and said to Peter and the rest of the apostles, “Brothers, what shall we do ?”

nama: Fitam tárfár sie tawawéngsotau fá, a yémon tamndetau, "Fém kawanjarngi yéné yaufi saté árta." 41 Fá emofem yáne si waitogh yumyoyénd walitogh ewafngoi, a táf 3,000 ár farun nafayoyénd yéné efghon. Efalo yátogh árfene áumengégh
english: With many other words he testified and exhorted them , saying , “ Save yourselves from this crooked generation !”

nama: Wanjarégh siyém endefaf yau so tinjongi, ménamén ámb yétkwén yau yém mband maratan yéramai árét árkéménaye yénd so ténmanjarngé."
english: There is salvation in no one else , for there is no other name under heaven that is given among men , by which we must be saved !”

nama: Kémbogh si soramé, yémofem engéumieyayénd. Yémofem ámb yau end ewinjoyénd ndernáye so fá tékrátan takmeyayénd, ménamén méinyotio árém Ngánján tuwetawét ménamén némé nufrotam. 22 Yéné ár efe Ngánjánam mer yiyátoi 40 yunjéf té yáindai. Efalo yátogh árfene Ngánjánafé orayégh
english: When they had further threatened them , they let them go, finding no way to punish them , because of the people ; for everyone glorified God for that which was done .

nama: Mbandmén warsagh ár kafrendawét ngiot a limángégh ár náumendat mérne Yurafé ásméghét a wéi yémafé Keriso.'
english: The kings of the earth take a stand , and the rulers plot together , against the Lord , and against his Christ .’ + 4:26 Christ (Greek) and Messiah (Hebrew) both mean Anointed One. + 4:26 Psalms 2:1-2

nama: Soramé fá Ngánjánjafé koraiwét, yéné sifayan ánde kafángotawét kété kásámbnetau. Féyo fá Ngánján Mbérmbéram ewafoi a Ngánjánene si táitotawét férférofnar. Efalo yátogh árém tafalotawét yéfenjo rokar
english: When they had prayed , the place was shaken where they were gathered together . They were all filled with the Holy Spirit , and they spoke the word of God with boldness .

nama: Josef, Lefi mérénmén kétamamén Sáifres, efe Yesuene muyafé ár tanmotawét Banabas, yáne yétkwénone fifi siyém "Wawéngsogh ár ambum," 37 yéramai yánjo mband maniot a yékmai mani Yesuene muyafé árfene kafkafot.
english: Joses, who by the apostles was also called Barnabas ( which is , being interpreted , Son of Encouragement ), a Levite , a man of Cyprus by race ,

nama: Ámb ár yétkwén Ananias, yátnofé tárwén Safairafé, yémofem mband yérameyayénd maniot. 2 Yémon ámb mani ewerai yandio, a yatén mat témorwén méinyotio yénémamén, a wénde enwanai ámbro a ekmai Yesuene muyafé árfene kafkafot.
english: But a certain man named Ananias, with Sapphira his wife , sold a possession ,

nama: Njam Ananias náyárai yéné si, fá táf fété nuyai krotio. A ndimbal férféram ewanai méinyotio efe náyárayénd némé yam nufrotam. 6 Féyo totér ár nénuwanoyénd yáne fifi yéfinaménd, a yéngwanayénd a mband yaramayénd.
english: Ananias, hearing these words , fell down and died . Great fear came on all who heard these things .

nama: Nambio efoghféneféne soramé yáne amaf yénmormén, yau mat náyátoi némé nufrotam. 8 Fitam amaf yémotai, "Ta kwaufro, yéné fai fiyém fém a Ananias yéné mbandmén sewaneyayénd?" Amafom yawangoi, "A, yéné fai fété yém."
english: About three hours later, his wife , not knowing what had happened , came in .

nama: Fité norayai amafoefaf, "Némamén fémofem yéné mwighé kemarét Yurane Mbérmbér ufoghét? Kéretaǃ Yéné totér ár emofem fene ár tiyatotat kété ewakai méngo sésafneyan, a fém yémofem ndenéyameyo so nérsat."
english: But Peter asked her , “ How is it that you have agreed together to tempt the Spirit of the Lord ? Behold , the feet of those who have buried your husband are at the door , and they will carry you out .”

nama: Táf fété amaf nuyai yáne kafkafot krotio. Féyo yéné totér ár nélawayénd a amaf yinjoyénd kérwén, yéngwanayénd yiyatotaménd a yánjarfé esareyayénd. 11 Ndimbal férféram ewanai méinyotio Yesuene mérén a méinyotio ár efe náyárayénd yénémamén némé nufrotam. Yesuene muyafé árém tárfár ár mer táyátotawét
english: She fell down immediately at his feet and died . The young men came in and found her dead , and they carried her out and buried her by her husband.

nama: Táf njam akw yéfawéryéng fá nélawayénd wáwefnogh méngo sifayat, ndernáye té njafar si résagh árom emndai, a ár watamegh ewafngoyénd.
english: When they heard this , they entered into the temple about daybreak and taught . But the high priest and those who were with him came and called the council together , with all the senate of the children of Israel , and sent to the prison to have them brought .

nama: Yáne si ewanayénd yémofem. Yémofem emotayénd Yesuene muyafé ár kénjút ényawéghét a fá fémogh ewafngoyénd. Féyo yémofem emndayénd fá yau so norayat Yesuene yétkwénan, a fá tangéumyend a nguwanongi.
english: They agreed with him . Summoning the apostles, they beat them and commanded them not to speak in the name of Jesus , and let them go .

nama: Yesuene muyafé árém yéfrangoyénd Ju sénko árfene áumengégh áuwéghafé ménamén fá Yesuene yétkwén téfnan tékrátan tamorwén. 42 Méinyotio efghon wáwefnogh méngo sifayan a méngomé, fá yau nékmboyénd watameghan a mer si waitoghan Yesu Kerisoenemén.
english: They therefore departed from the presence of the council , rejoicing that they were counted worthy to suffer dishonor for Jesus ’ name .

nama: Féyo Ngánjánene si marat náyátoyéng. Efalo yátogh ár Jerusalemén wékeye tárfár káyátotawét, a ndenéyameyo tárfár ghéngén wárogh ár námyoyénd áyárghét kétán ndimbal mwighafaf. Stifen yerayénd
english: The word of God increased and the number of the disciples greatly multiplied in Jerusalem . A great company of the priests were obedient to the faith .

nama: Yémofem kwankwane ewaferyénd ámb ár ndené siot, "Yéndfem té yiyárayém Stifen yaufi si korayau Mosesefaf a Ngánjánefaf."
english: Then they secretly induced men to say , “ We have heard him speak blasphemous words against Moses and God .”

nama: Méinyotio efe tamorangérwén Ju árfene sénko árfene áumengéghan Stifen yémofem téfandawét yáne sáf náyátoi ndenanit njafar si résagh árnit.
english: All who sat in the council , fastening their eyes on him , saw his face like it was the face of an angel.

nama: Féyo limánégh ghéngén wárogh árom yémotai Stifen, "Yéné wátaranégh efalo em?"
english: The high priest said , “ Are these things so ?”

nama: "Jeikofene ambumam waramnjagh yafngoyénd yéfenngén Josef, yémofem fá yéramayénd Ijifét faiofnar ásáfogh ár. Wénde Ngánjánafé fá tárwén 10 a Ngánjánam tambetau fá kétándmé méinyotio yánjo kértata. Farawa Ijifmén warsagh árom méndefé téfandau Josef ménamén Ngánjánam yaramai káfeté mwighé, yéné téfnan Farawam yémndai Ijif yu limánéghét a méinyotio yáne méngo.
english: “ The patriarchs , moved with jealousy against Joseph , sold him into Egypt. God was with him

nama: "Yéné efghon Moses náráftam a Ngánjánene ghékfan fá kéretau mer ambum. Nambio ghérare kénjún yémon tarawenau yárefane méngon. 21 Njam yémon yénmutoryéng, Farawane mérsom yérnyai yandio ambumot. 22 Moses méinyotio káfeté mwighé yatametaménd Ijif árém a témorwén wafté kér ro sian a wafroghan.
english: At that time Moses was born , and was exceedingly handsome to God . He was nourished three months in his father ’s house .

nama: "Féyo Yuram yémndai, 'Tafitrar fenjo sandol, yéné sifayé ánde fém némakai siyém njúnnjúnofnar mband. 34 Yéndon té téfandan tane árfene tékrát Ijifén tekfifi. Yénd té kénáyáretan yéfene ye ke a yéné téfnan yénd néneworén yéfe wanjarghét. Sénonjo kuwano, yéndon so kémangon Ijifét.'
english: The Lord said to him , ‘ Take off your sandals , for the place where you stand is holy ground .

nama: "Wénde téfene ákif yau námyoyénd wafroghét a yémofem yékenayénd a fá ménde tamorwén Ijifét angoghét.
english: to whom our fathers wouldn’ t be obedient , but rejected him and turned back in their hearts to Egypt,

nama: "Yémofem yémndayénd Aron, 'Téfe ténmawafrota némbne ngánján efe so yém téfene limánégh ár. Ménamén yéné ár Moses emo yénmutoryéng yénd Ijifta, yénd mat yau yéném némé nufrotam yáfafǃ'
english: saying to Aaron, ‘ Make us gods that will go before us , for as for this Moses who led us out of the land of Egypt, we don’ t know what has become of him .’

nama: Fémofem té térsati Molek mewangoene némbne farai méngo a féfenjo ngánján Réfan kénd, árké mewangoe fémofem tawefnotati. Féyo yéndon so tawitrombon kétán Babilonét.'
english: You took up the tabernacle of Moloch , the star of your god Rephan , the figures which you made to worship , so I will carry you away + 7:43 Amos 5:25-27 beyond Babylon.’

nama: "Wénde Minde tukén Ngánján yau yémor ár wafroghmén méngon. Ndené Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár noraye,
english: However, the Most High doesn’ t dwell in temples made with hands , as the prophet says ,

nama: "'Yuré noraye, 'Njafar siyém tane limánégh ámnjogh sifayé, a yéné mband siyém tane kafkaf enaghfaf. Fém féyotarofnar em méngo sái yérametati tayot. Yénd méndefnar wém tane enagh sifayat.
english: ‘ heaven is my throne , and the earth a footstool for my feet . What kind of house will you build me ?’ says the Lord . ‘ Or what is the place of my rest ?

nama: Tane ngángayam ewafrotam méinyotio rokar.'
english: Didn’ t my hand make all these things ?’

nama: Féyo Yémofem ngángaye ewamoyénd téngan a kutnawét tukén, méinyotio ár nénguférmoyénd yáfaf, 58 tutonawét tesenta a wíme tafiyátotawét. Yéné efghon ghékéf fandagh árém yéfenjo farun sáláme tafitérnawét a totér ambum Solene kafkaf mbanmbanan takmetawét.
english: But they cried out with a loud voice and stopped their ears , then rushed at him with one accord .

nama: Sol namyoi stifén tésmetawét kérotio. Yesuene mérén ngimén niroryénd
english: Saul was consenting to his death. A great persecution arose against the assembly which was in Jerusalem in that day . They were all scattered abroad throughout the regions of Judea and Samaria , except for the apostles.

nama: Ngánján férférafé árém Stifen yiyatotaménd mbandan a ghérghérsisé tamorwén minde. 3 Wénde Solém yiroréng Yesuene mérén. Fá téngmorwén méngot a ámb méngot, ár a amaf, taweretau a talawetau kwéfkwéf méngot. Filif Samaria kénjún
english: Devout men buried Stephen and lamented greatly over him .

nama: Njam Saimoném yinjoi nde Ngánján Mbérmbér té yumyoyénd táf Yesuene muyafé árém ngángé efayeyayénd yéfefaf, yémon mani ewauyafeyai, 19 ndené siafé, "Kwaramend yéné wafté ménát endefefaf yéndon téu efayotan tane ngángé so Ngánján Mbémbér ndenáyo yumyotatǃ"
english: Now when Simon saw that the Holy Spirit was given through the laying on of the apostles’ hands , he offered them money ,

nama: Saimoném yawangoi, "Orayégh kufngo Yurafaf tanemén ménát némé fém noraye yau so nufrote tafaf."
english: Simon answered , “ Pray for me to the Lord , that none of the things which you have spoken happen to me .”

nama: Yéné soramé fá Yurane si kafrowét, Fité a Jon nangeyayénd Jerusalemét, mer si taitowét tárfár Samaria méngotuamé. Filif a Etiofiyamén ár
english: They therefore , when they had testified and spoken the word of the Lord , returned to Jerusalem , and preached the Good News to many villages of the Samaritans .

nama: Féyo Filif táf néngenngoi osafene roagh kitarafaf a yiyárayéng ár taftau Aisaya Ngánjánene mat yátogh ároene buk. Filifém yémotai, "Fém mat té náyátote némamén fémon yafte?"
english: Philip ran to him , and heard him reading Isaiah the prophet , and said , “ Do you understand what you are reading?”

nama: Fá norayai, "Yénd ndernáye mat so káyáton, táfandro ámb árom njam ta wawafena?" Féyo yéné téfnan yémon yumyoi Filif armboghét yémafé ámnjoghét.
english: He said , “ How can I , unless someone explains it to me ?” He begged Philip to come up and sit with him .

nama: Yéné Buk saté siyém yémo taftau, "Fá télimndawét sifnit kétán ngifaf, a sif tosanit síf néfégh téfnároene sáfrére siofnar, yémon yau yáne mbírmbír yasawéryéng.
english: Now the passage of the Scripture which he was reading was this , “ He was led as a sheep to the slaughter . As a lamb before his shearer is silent, so he doesn’ t open his mouth .

nama: Fá yewonaménd a yanayénd yáne mbarkánd. Fá ambumofnar yémormén, féyo efe yau so noraye yáne ákiambumafenemén. Ménamén yáne ghérsé té yanayénd yéné mbandta."
english: In his humiliation , his judgment was taken away. Who will declare His generation ? For his life is taken from the earth .” + 8:33 Isaiah 53:7,8

nama: Árom yémotai Filif, "Ta kwaufro, endenemén Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár norayai, yánjomén o ámb ároenemén?" 35 Féyo Filifém waitogh yawafngoi yéné Aisayane Buk satayan a yaufroi mer si Yesuenemén.
english: The eunuch answered Philip , “ Who is the prophet talking about ? About himself , or about someone else ?”

nama: Njamandio fá tangérwén endmé, fá nufareyayénd nufaf a árom norayai, "Kéreta, nu siyém. Yénd ménde wém walitoghét." 37 {b{ ...f* {b{8.37 Ámb matyam ár néngemnat: yéné simén si té yém yéna ámb si, wénde tárfár matyam ár yau nemnat. Yéné si siyém, "Filif norayai yáfaf, 'Njam fémo efalo yiyátota Yesu fene kénjúe, fém so táf némalitotan.' Yémo yawangoi, 'Yéndo efalo yiyátotan ndené Yesu Keriso siyém Ngánjánene Ambum.'"
english: As they went on the way , they came to some water ; and the eunuch said , “ Behold , here is water . What is keeping me from being baptized?”

nama: Sénonjo kokai a kuwano ndimbal tesenot, a ár kété yém yémon so kénémndangé némé so fémon yafrote."
english: But rise up and enter into the city , then you will be told what you must do .”

nama: Damaskosén kété témorwén waitogh ár yétkwén Ananias. Yuram yémotai ghékéf waingéghe, "Ananiasǃ" Yémon yawangoi, "Wai, Yuré."
english: Now there was a certain disciple at Damascus named Ananias. The Lord said to him in a vision , “Ananias!” He said , “ Behold , it ’ s me , Lord .”

nama: Yuram yémndai, "Kuwano Judasene méngot Mbarkánd Endmé a kamota Tarsusmén ár yétkwén Sol, fá Ngánjánafé oraighan yém. 12 Ghékéf waingéghe yémon téfandau ár yétkwén Ananias ténmorwén yáfaf a ngángé efayoi a yáne ghékéf nasawéryénd a nawafarnjaménd wéikor."
english: The Lord said to him , “Arise and go to the street which is called Straight , and inquire in the house of Judah for one named Saul , a man of Tarsus . For behold , he is praying ,

nama: Ananiasém yawangoi, "Yuré, yéndon káyáretawén tárfár si yéné ároenemén ménamén yémon tékrát tawarametau fene árfet Jerusalemén. 14 A fá téném yénan si muyafé limánégh ghéngén wárogh ároe tambén ménát yéfe werghét méinyotio efe norayat fene yétkwénan."
english: But Ananias answered, “ Lord , I have heard from many about this man , how much evil he did to your saints at Jerusalem .

nama: Wénde Yuré norayai Ananiasefaf, "Kuwanoǃ Yéné ár siyém tane waferéghkaf ménát tane si résaghét Téndo árét a yéfene warsagh ár a Israilmén ár. 16 Yéndon so yauyafotan yáyot nderé mámáfi yémon so yáyarete tane yétkwén téfnan."
english: But the Lord said to him , “ Go your way , for he is my chosen vessel to bear my name before the nations and kings , and the children of Israel .

nama: Tárfár efogh soramé, ámb Ju árém mwighé táitotawét Sole ngiot, 24 wénde Sol mat náyátoi yéfene mwighé. Efogh sémbár fá kumnjotawét tesen sésafnen Sole ngiot. 25 Wénde yánjo waitogh árém yanayénd Sol sémbáran a ndimbal yáfe tewonawét tesen áráke sémta.
english: When many days were fulfilled , the Jews conspired together to kill him ,

nama: Féyo Yesuene mérén yénamé Judia, Galili yu a Samaria, yémofem tayamnetawét krufrát yéné efghon. Ngánján Mbérmbéram tawáutánau muyafé sái kamndangayénd, ár tárfár káyátotawét a Yurane férférafé tamorangérwén. Enias a Dorkas
english: So the assemblies throughout all Judea , Galilee , and Samaria had peace and were built up . They were multiplied , walking in the fear of the Lord and in the comfort of the Holy Spirit .

nama: Fitaf néngwanoyénd yémafé, a njam fá nufaryénd, fá néngarmboi méngo kénjút. Méinyotio kwiram yarendayénd fá, ye kendawét a tauyafongi sáláme a ámb sáláme Dorkasém árké enamndam njam yémafé mé ghérsé tamorwén.
english: Peter got up and went with them . When he had come , they brought him into the upper room . All the widows stood by him weeping , and showing the tunics and other garments which Dorcas had made while she was with them .

nama: Koneliasém yinjoi férférafé a yémotai, "Némé yém, Yuré?"
english: He , fastening his eyes on him and being frightened , said , “ What is it , Lord ?” He said to him , “ Your prayers and your gifts to the needy have gone up for a memorial before God .

nama: Sénonjo ár tawáfáreta Jofa tesenot ár yétkwén Saimon yá wangoghét efe ámb yétkwén yanmotat Fité. 6 Fá tamorarwén Saimonfé, wérár ghéngan watorégh árofé, endene méngo arakaf téndon témorwén."
english: Now send men to Joppa , and get Simon , who is also called Peter .

nama: Njam njafar si résagh ár efe korayau yáfaf néngolindai, Koneliasém ewanmeyai yáne sómbio faiofnar ásáfogh ár a Ngánján férférafé fiyaré. 8 Koneliasém si ewaufrotam yéfeyot méinyotio némé kufrotau yáfaf a soramé engwáfáretai fá Jofa tesenot. Fitam yéfandam ghékéf waingégh yam
english: When the angel who spoke to him had departed, Cornelius called two of his household servants and a devout soldier of those who waited on him continually .

nama: Fitam yawangoi, "Yau, Yuré. Yéndo yaufifi enetamén tayot ufi yém."
english: But Peter said , “ Not so , Lord ; for I have never eaten anything that is common or unclean .”

nama: Ngánján norayai yáfaf wéikor ndené, "Yau. Fémo so enete. Yau noraya ndené mámáfi em némé Ngánjánam ewafrota mer."
english: A voice came to him again the second time , “ What God has cleansed , you must not call unclean .”

nama: Yéné yam nufrotam nambinotma, a táf fété yéné sáláme yénamayo nangoi njafarot.
english: This was done three times , and immediately the thing was received up into heaven .

nama: Njam Fité mé katambnau ghékéf waingéghoene fifimén, ár engwáfáretam Koneliasém fá namotayénd ánde Saimonene méngo yém a nékmboyénd méngo sésafnefaf. 18 Fá namotayénd, "Yéna wan téfnár yém yáne yétkwén Saimon Fité?"
english: Now while Peter was very perplexed in himself what the vision which he had seen might mean , behold , the men who were sent by Cornelius , having made inquiry for Simon ’s house , stood before the gate ,

nama: Njam Fité mé kemnau yéné ghékéf waingéghmén, Ngánján Mbérmbéram yémndai, "Saimon, nambio árém fém néronjat. 20 Féyo kokai a kewor. Yau nautémnda yémafé álighét, ménamén yéndon tanwáfáretan fá."
english: While Peter was pondering the vision , the Spirit said to him , “ Behold , three men seek you .

nama: Fité néneworyéng a yéné ár emndai, "Yénd yéné fwém fémofem efe yéronjati. Némamén fém taném?"
english: Peter went down to the men , and said , “ Behold , I am he whom you seek . Why have you come ?”

nama: "Yémofem té yanangi Ngánján Mbérmbér ndené fété yéndfem. Árké árom yau so takmbongé nu walitoghét." 48 Yénémaménnde yémon emndai fá fété so ewalitote Yesu Kerisoene yétkwénan. Féyo yémofem yamnendayénd Fité ámnjoghét yémafé nambio efghotro.
english: “ Can anyone forbid these people from being baptized with water ? They have received the Holy Spirit just like us .”

nama: Yesuene muyafé ár a efalo yátogh árém Judia yuwomé náyárayénd ndené Téndo árém ndenéyameyo yanangi Ngánjánene si. 2 Njam Fité néngwanoyéng Jerusalemét, Ju efalo yátogh árém tanangotawét fá 3 a norayai, "Fém tangém Téndo árfene méngot a yémafé tánetati njamke."
english: Now the apostles and the brothers who were in Judea heard that the Gentiles had also received the word of God .

nama: "Yénd nuwangoyén, 'Yau, Yuré. Njúnnjúnafé a fenjfenjafé wérár yau nélawai tane sénfnet.'
english: But I said , ‘ Not so , Lord , for nothing unholy or unclean has ever entered into my mouth .’

nama: "Ngánján norayai kétamé njafarta wéikor, 'Yau. Fémo so enete. Yau noraya ndené mámáfi em némé Ngánjánam ewafrota mer.' 10 Yéné yam kufrotau nambinotma, a yéné sáláme yénamayo nangoi njafarot wéikor.
english: But a voice answered me the second time out of heaven , ‘ What God has cleansed , don’ t you call unclean .’

nama: Njam fá náyárayénd yénémamén, fá nékmboyénd éwigh a Ngánjánro tuwetawét, korayawét, "Féyo Ngánjánam mwighé ewaramai Téndo árét yaufita awengoghét ghérsat." Yesuene mérén Antiok tesenan
english: When they heard these things , they held their peace and glorified God , saying , “ Then God has also granted to the Gentiles repentance to life !”

nama: Féyo Fité kwéfkwéf méngon télawangérwén, wénde Yesuene mérén ndimbal kéráye oraighan Ngánjánefaf tamorwén yánemén.
english: Peter therefore was kept in the prison , but constant prayer was made by the assembly to God for him .

nama: Fité mwighat nangoi a norayai, "Sénonjo mat náyáton atambaréghofnar nde Yuram ténmáfárete njafar si résagh ár ta wanjarghét kétándmé Erodene ngángata a kétándmé méinyotio Ju árfene kamnangta."
english: When Peter had come to himself , he said , “ Now I truly know that the Lord has sent out his angel and delivered me out of the hand of Herod , and from everything the Jewish people were expecting .”

nama: Yémofem témndangi, "Fe mwighayam némauwéinde!" Njam fá mé kafrotau ndené efalo fété yém, fá norayayénd, "Mété táf njafar si résagh ár yém yá wáutárghét."
english: They said to her , “ You are crazy!” But she insisted that it was so . They said , “ It is his angel.”

nama: Wénde Fité ménjtaye mé káutanau. Njam yémofem sésafne yésawéryénd a yinjoyénd Fité, fá sélngwél emormén. 17 Fitam ngángaye engwaunyai métar a tawawalinjotau ndernáye Yuram yénmutoryéng kwéfkwéf méngota. Fá norayai, "Tawaufrongi Jems a ámb fútarét yénémamén." A féyo fá táf nuwanoi ámb yuwot.
english: But Peter continued knocking . When they had opened, they saw him and were amazed .

nama: Ámb akwan kété ndimbal atambarégh témorwén fiyarafefaf némé nufrotam Fitafaf. 19 Soramé Erodém yéta ronjagh yafngoi wénde yau yinjoi Fité, yémon mogh ghékéf fayogh ár ewafngoi a krot takmetau. Erod kér yémormén
english: Now as soon as it was day , there was no small stir among the soldiers about what had become of Peter .

nama: Erod nékw témorwén Taire a Sidon Yumén árfefaf, yénémamén fá nuwanoyénd mérne Erode fandaghét. Fronde yémofem yamnendayénd Blastus, Erodene méngo wanjéngégh sénko ár ménát yéfe wáutárghét. Féyo fá nuwanoyénd Erodefaf a yamnendayénd yau so ménjtaye tékmbotau njamkemén ménamén túmén Taire a Sidon Yu tarsawét njamke warsagh ár Erodene ndimbal yuta.
english: Now Herod was very angry with the people of Tyre and Sidon . They came with one accord to him and , having made Blastus, the king ’s personal aide, their friend , they asked for peace , because their country depended on the king ’s country for food.

nama: Wénde Ngánjánene si mulmulafé kanotau a marat káyátotau.
english: But the word of God grew and multiplied .

nama: Njam Banabas a Sol yéfenjo ásáfogh yifeyayénd, fá kénangowét kétándmé Jerusalemta kétán Antiokét yémafé Jon Mak.
english: Barnabas and Saul returned to Jerusalem when they had fulfilled their service , also taking with them John who was called Mark .

nama: Njam Rom fiyarafene sénko árom yinjoi némé kufrotau, fá sélngwél yémormén Ngánjánene si watameghan, yémon táf efalo yiyátoi Yuré. Fol a Banabasfem mer si taitowét Antiok tesenan Fisidia ndimbal yuwon
english: Then the proconsul, when he saw what was done , believed , being astonished at the teaching of the Lord .

nama: "Yéndfem ewaufrotam féfe mer si, Ngánjánam némé nénorayam unyéghofnar si téfene ákifefaf 33 Ngánjánam té tawafrote téfeyot, yéfene ákiambumat, ménaye Yesu kés yanoi. Ndené fété kés yékai yénamayo Sams bukan, "'Fém ném tane Ambum, sénonjo yénd nénáyáton fene Afé.'
english: We bring you good news of the promise made to the fathers ,

nama: Ngánjánam fá yanoi kérta, yénémamén yau so nornde, némé noraye yéné sian, "'Yéndon so tawaraman njúnnjúnofnar a efalo frengégh némé té nénorayam Deifidefaf.'
english: “ Concerning that he raised him up from the dead , now no more to return to corruption , he has spoken thus : ‘ I will give you the holy and sure blessings of David .’

nama: Ámb Sams bukan yéné yékai, "'Fémon yau so tumyo fenjo Njúnnjúnofnar Ambum kérkfot.'
english: Therefore he says also in another psalm, ‘ You will not allow your Holy One to see decay .’

nama: "Njam Deifidém Ngánjánene ásáfogh tawafrotau yánjo ár satafaf, fá táf kémégh nakmai, fá esareyayénd yákifé a yáne fifi norndam. 37 Wénde ámbiro ár efe Ngánjánam yanoi kérta yau norndam.
english: For David , after he had in his own generation served the counsel of God , fell asleep , was laid with his fathers , and saw decay .

nama: "'Fém Ngánján karogh ár, sunsunan kér so em, némamén yéndon so ewafrotan ámb yam féfene efghon fémofem efalo yau so eyátotati, ndemamén ámb árom so kémaufrongé feyot.'"
english: ‘ Behold , you scoffers ! Wonder and perish, for I work a work in your days , a work which you will in no way believe , if one declares it to you .’” + 13:41 Habakkuk 1:5

nama: Njamandio Fol a Banabasfem téfrangowét Ju árfene áumengégh méngo, árém eumieyayénd fá kor ámb Safatot siot. 43 Njam ár mérén kófarnawét, tárfár Ju ár a Téndo árém ewáiteyayénd Fol a Banabas, efe korayawét yémafé a ewamnendangeyayénd fá ménát mé sái engérnyang Ngánjánene ngárám kénjún.
english: So when the Jews went out of the synagogue, the Gentiles begged that these words might be preached to them the next Sabbath .

nama: Njam Téndo árém náyárayénd yéné si, fá áuwéghan tamorwén a kánjo tarametawét Yurane simén; a efe méinyotio ewaferyéng tuot ghérsat efalo yiyátoyénd.
english: As the Gentiles heard this , they were glad and glorified the word of God . As many as were appointed to eternal life believed .

nama: Féyo ámb efalo yátogh ár efe tawafnyangérwén Farasi mérénmén nokayoi a tamndangé, "Téndo ár so fété ghéngan enfetat ndenáye Mosesene nákam kés noraye."
english: But some of the sect of the Pharisees who believed rose up , saying , “ It is necessary to circumcise them , and to command them to keep the law of Moses .”

nama: 'Yéné soramé yénd so nénangotan, a kor so yafarnjan Deifidene méngotu. Yéndon kor so yérametan wasérmboghkaf yém, a yéndon so kor yafrotan,
english: ‘ After these things I will return. I will again build the tabernacle of David , which has fallen . I will again build its ruins . I will set it up

nama: ménát méinyotio árém so yéronjat Yuré, so tanéfghangé Téndo ár emofem tane yétkwén so yuyotat, Yuré noraye, emo ewafrote yéné yam
english: that the rest of men may seek after the Lord : all the Gentiles who are called by my name , says the Lord , who does all these things .’ + 15:17 Amos 9:11-12

nama: tándái árkéméné mat náyátoyénd.'
english: “All of God’s works are known to him from eternity.

nama: Ngánján Mbérmbér a yénd efalo té yiyátongém ndené yéndfem yau so kérté ewarametam táikér yame wénde mé nambio yamero: 29 Fém so nafrangotati kétándmé njamke árkéméné mewang sifayamén em, férékta, férék eréghofnar wérárta a téndo walta. Merfifi yém yéné yamta kékmbongi. Yénaro fai."
english: For it seemed good to the Holy Spirit , and to us , to lay no greater burden on you than these necessary things :

nama: Yénd ndimbal boute tényotau Troasta kétán Samotrasét, a ámb efghon néngufaryém Neafolisét. 12 Kétamé yénd néngwanoyém kétán Filifi, Rom mwighafé yu a limánégh tesen Makedonia ndimbal yuwot. Kété yénmorangérmén tárfár efogh.
english: Setting sail therefore from Troas , we made a straight course to Samothrace , and the day following to Neapolis ;

nama: Sémbár néndkéfan Fol a Sailes Ngánjánjafé korayawét a wagh kermangwét Ngánjánefaf, a ámb ár kwéfkwéf méngon talawangérwén táyárwét waghan. 26 Sunsune ndimbal sokrereyam kwéfkwéf méngo sérasér esámbnetam. Táf fété méinyotio kwéfkwéf méngo sésafne kasaunawét, a méinyotio árfene sein naferyénd.
english: But about midnight Paul and Silas were praying and singing hymns to God , and the prisoners were listening to them .

nama: Kwéfkwéf méngo wanjengégh ár nanoi, a njam néngretai kwéfkwéf méngo sésafne sauréghkaf tamorwén, fá witmafé sénté naifaye akunyéghét féf nufngoi krotio ménamén fá kéma kemnau nde kwéfkwéf méngo ár kar té nétoryénd. 28 Wénde Fol nutnai, "Yau nawaghna fémyoǃ Yénd méinyotio yéna mé yénémǃ"
english: The jailer , being roused out of sleep and seeing the prison doors open, drew his sword and was about to kill himself , supposing that the prisoners had escaped .

nama: Kwéfkwéf méngo wanjengégh ár néngutnai kwayaghat a soramé ewawanayénd kwayaghé, néngénngoi kwéfkwéf méngo kénjút a nénguyai ngerngerafé Fol a Sailesfene sáfrére. 30 Féyo yémon enutoreyai kénjúta a emotangeyai, "Ndimbal, yéndon némé so yafrotan awanjarghét?"
english: He called for lights , sprang in , fell down trembling before Paul and Silas ,

nama: Wénde Folém korayangé ásáfogh árfefaf: "Yémofem yénd ténsémét marataye moghofnar yuwon, ndemamén yénd yénre Rom yumén ár, a yénmiménd kwéfkwéf méngo kénjút. Sénonjo yénd yémofem métare yénmutorend? Yauǃ Fá fáyo táf kénaflangi a téngémnjend yénd."
english: But Paul said to them , “ They have beaten us publicly without a trial, men who are Romans , and have cast us into prison ! Do they now release us secretly ? No , most certainly , but let them come themselves and bring us out !”

nama: Njam Ju ár mat náyátoyénd Tesalonika kénjún ndené Folém táitotau Ngánjánene si Bereyan, ámb ár wéi kétán néngwanoyénd a amrorégh yérnyayénd ár mérén tawanjmetawét.
english: But when the Jews of Thessalonica had knowledge that the word of God was proclaimed by Paul at Beroea also , they came there likewise , agitating the multitudes .

nama: Táf fété efalo yátogh árém Fol yáfáretaménd arakaf tambén, wénde Saileséf Timotifé tamorarwén Bereyan. 15 Njam yéné árém yénémnjaménd Fol Atenét, Fol norayai yéfefaf ndené, "Sailes a Timoti tafaf táf enre wékeye." Féyo táf néngwanoyénd. Folém mer si táitotau Aten kénjún
english: Then the brothers immediately sent out Paul to go as far as to the sea , and Silas and Timothy still stayed there .

nama: Féyo Folém yéngéfrangoi Ju árfene áumengégh méngo a néngaflai kaka méngot, Taitus Jéstusene méngot efe témorwén Ngánján wáwefnogh ár. 8 Krisfus, Ju árfene áumengégh méngo limánégh ár, a yánjo mérnam Yuré efalo yiyátoyénd a tárfár Korintmén ár efe káyáretawét, efalo yiyátoyénd a nuwan ewalitotam.
english: He departed there and went into the house of a certain man named Justus , one who worshiped God , whose house was next door to the synagogue .

nama: Njam Galio témorwén gafana Akaya ndimbal yumén, ámb Ju ár nafghayénd Fole kékmboghét a yénmasroyénd moghét. 13 Yémofem yémndayénd, "Yéné árom elimnde ár Ngánján wáwefnoghét yéné ende téfene nák eráfne."
english: But when Gallio was proconsul of Achaia, the Jews with one accord rose up against Paul and brought him before the judgment seat,

nama: Ámb efogh ámnjogh soramé, Antiokta kétamé Fol néngwanoi yéné yuwomé karendau Galasia yu a Frigia yu, muyé tawarametau méinyotio waitogh árét. |nmx_215wbt - Paul journey 3 [bwf-light] @en_v4.tif|col||© 2025 Wycliffe Bible Translators, Inc.|Folene nambiomén áligh (Acts 18.23—21.17)|18.23—21.17
english: Having spent some time there , he departed and went through the region of Galatia and Phrygia , in order , establishing all the disciples .

nama: Njam Afolos témorwén Korint tesenan, Fol tiotau mband tunamé kétán Efesos tesen néngufaryéng. Kété yémon ewinjoi ámb waitogh ár 2 a yémon emotai, "Fémofem Ngánján Mbérmbér té yanayénd njam fémofem efalo yiyátoyénd Yesu?" Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Yau, yénd yau náyárayém ndené yéna yém Ngánján Mbérmbér."
english: While Apollos was at Corinth , Paul , having passed through the upper country , came to Ephesus and found certain disciples .

nama: Féyo Folém emotai, "Endene walitogh fémofem yanayénd?" Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Jonene nu walitogh."
english: He said , “ Into what then were you baptized?” They said , “ Into John ’s baptism.”

nama: Ngánjánam yéramai Fole wafté sélngwélafé ásáfoghét. 12 Árém muku o sáláme Folém árké tiyánjangai tafayotawét enjne téfnárefaf, táf mer káyátotawét a yaufi mbérmbér kitérmbotawét.
english: God worked special miracles by the hands of Paul ,

nama: Méinyotio yéné yam njam kufrotau soramé, Folém mwighé yaitotam yafoghét Makedonia a Akaya a Jerusalemét. Fol norayai, "Yénandmé yénd so kuwanon kétán Rom." 22 Féyo yémon ewáfáreméng yáne sómbio wáutárégh ár, Timoti a Erastus, kétán Makedoniat, wénde fá mé témorangérwén Esian. Kérté Efesos kénjún
english: Now after these things had ended , Paul determined in the Spirit , when he had passed through Macedonia and Achaia, to go to Jerusalem , saying , “ After I have been there , I must also see Rome .”

nama: Njam Folém si ewifoi, fá méinyotio budme neitaménd Ngánjánafé orayéghét. 37 Féyo táf yémofem yengamafé yambnayénd a Fol tésnetawét. 38 Fá áuwéghofnar tamorwén ménamén Fol árké norayai ndené ámb káye tane sáf yau so kor yéfandati. Féyo yémofem engémnjoyénd ndimbal boutfaf.
english: When he had spoken these things , he knelt down and prayed with them all .

nama: Yéné soramé, yénd nafrendamém a néngwanoyém Jerusalemét. 16 Ámb waitogh ár kétamamén Kaisaria yénngmaitoyénd a yénngémnjoyénd kétán Nasonene méngot ánde yénd so ténmorangérwén kété. Fá témorwén Saifrusmén ár a ámb fronde waitogh ár. Fol nufaryéng Jerusalemét
english: After these days we took up our baggage and went up to Jerusalem .

nama: Njam yénd néngufaryém Jerusalemét, efalo yátogh árém yénmumyoyénd yénd áuwéghafé. 18 Ámb efghon Fol a ámb ár néngaflayém kétán Jemsefaf, méinyotio sénko ár kété tamorwén. 19 Folém áuwégh si ewaramai a tawaufrotau méinyotio yam némé Ngánjánam tafrotau Téndo árfefaf yáne ásáfoghan.
english: When we had come to Jerusalem , the brothers received us gladly.

nama: Ámb efghon Foléf engmormén ámb árfé a yémofem yafrotaménd yéné téméndmén yam ndernáye témorwén wányányéghmén. Yéné soramé, fá néngwanoi wáwefnogh méngo sifayat a tamndetau ghéngén wárogh ár, "Kétán árké efghot so em sái kénamndangi njúnnjúnofnar yam so kefongé, yéndfem so enérsam ghéngén yénat." Fol yerayénd
english: Then Paul took the men , and the next day purified himself and went with them into the temple , declaring the fulfillment of the days of purification, until the offering was offered for every one of them .

nama: Njam Fol ménjághétro témorwén kétán fiyarafene sifayat, yémo témotangé fiyaré ndimbal sénko ár, "Féyotaro yénd so korayangén ámb si fefaf?"
english: As Paul was about to be brought into the barracks , he asked the commanding officer, “ May I speak to you ?” He said , “ Do you know Greek ?

nama: Fém yéné ném Ijifmén ár emo yérnyai awifarégh nambétio elimai 4,000 fiyaré kétán fanfne sifayat?"
english: Aren’ t you then the Egyptian who before these days stirred up to sedition and led out into the wilderness the four thousand men of the Assassins ?”

nama: Folém yawangoi, "Yau, yénd yau! yénd swém Ju ár, kété náráftamén Tarsus tesenan, árké yém mer marataye matkaf tesen Silisia kénjún. Féyotaro yénd so kwumyo yéné árfefaf siot."
english: But Paul said , “ I am a Jew from Tarsus in Cilicia , a citizen of no insignificant city . I beg you , allow me to speak to the people .”

nama: Fiyaré ndimbal sénko árom yumyoi siyot, Fol nokayoi ratayan a ekmboi ár. Fá njam métar náyátoyénd, fá korayangé yéfefaf Ibru sie.
english: When he had given him permission , Paul , standing on the stairs, beckoned with his hand to the people . When there was a great silence , he spoke to them in the Hebrew language , saying ,

nama: "Fútaréf a afaf, kénáyárangi tane awamarogh sifaf."
english: “Brothers and fathers , listen to the defense which I now make to you .”

nama: Njam yémofem yiyárayénd Fol korayau Ibru sie, fá métar namndayénd.
english: When they heard that he spoke to them in the Hebrew language , they were even more quiet . He said ,

nama: "Ámb efogh sotan, njam kaka yéngyátoyén Damaskos, sélngwéle njafarmén ndimbal kwayaghayam wélálái yénd. 7 Yénd nuyáyén mbandot a náyárayén kém a norayai tafaf ndené, 'Solǃ Solǃ Fémo némamén yénd wésmete?'
english: “ As I made my journey and came close to Damascus , about noon suddenly a great light shone around me from the sky .

nama: "Yénd namotayén, 'Fém efe ném, Yuré?'
english: I answered , ‘ Who are you , Lord ?’ He said to me , ‘ I am Jesus of Nazareth , whom you persecute .’

nama: Tane mérnam yinjoyénd kwayaghé, wénde yémofem yau yáyámngoyénd yáne kém efe korayau tafaf.
english: “ Those who were with me indeed saw the light and were afraid, but they didn’ t understand the voice of him who spoke to me .

nama: "Yéndon yémotayén, 'Némé so yéndon yafrotan, Yuré?'
english: I said , ‘ What shall I do , Lord ?’ The Lord said to me , ‘Arise, and go into Damascus . There you will be told about all things which are appointed for you to do .’

nama: Tane mérnam kwémnjawét Damaskos kénjút, ménamén ndimbal kwayaghayam ghékéf kwéfkwéf wiyátoi.
english: When I couldn’ t see for the glory of that light , being led by the hand of those who were with me , I came into Damascus .

nama: "Ár yétkwén Ananias yénmormén ta fandaghét. Fá témorwén Ngánján wáwefnogh ár a ndimbal kéráye tutémndawét Ju árém efe méinyotio kété tamorangérwén. 13 Fá nokayoi ta kaka korayangé, 'Fútar Sol, kéretaǃ' Táf fété néretayén yinjoyén Ananias.
english: “ One Ananias, a devout man according to the law , well reported of by all the Jews who lived in Damascus,

nama: "Yéné soramé yénd néngangoyén Jerusalemét a Ngánjánafé koraiwém wáwefnogh méngon. Yéndon yinjoyén ghékéf waingégh yam 18 a Yuram kwémndetau, 'Wékeye kuwano Jerusalem téfrango ménamén yémofem yau so tumyongi fene afrogh si tanemén.'
english: “ When I had returned to Jerusalem and while I prayed in the temple , I fell into a trance

nama: "Féyo Yuré norayai tafaf, 'Kuwano, yéndon so némáfáretan fém nayu yuwot kétán Téndo árfefaf.'" Fol naufaryéng yénd swém Rommén ár
english: “ He said to me , ‘ Depart , for I will send you out far from here to the Gentiles .’ ”

nama: Ár mérnam kor merkéráye káyáretawét Folefaf kétánotio njam fá norayai téndo árfenemén. Yémofem kém euyoyénd nékwan a kutnawét, "Yéné ár titérmbongi yéné yutaǃ Fá yau féyotaro yém mé ghérsé sái yémǃ"
english: They listened to him until he said that ; then they lifted up their voice and said , “Rid the earth of this fellow , for he isn’ t fit to live !”

nama: Njam fiyaré sénko ár náyárai yéné si, fá naflai kétán fiyaré ndimbal sénko ároefaf a yémndai, "Yau yafrota yéné yam yéné árofefaf. Yéné ár siyém Rommén ár."
english: When the centurion heard it , he went to the commanding officer and told him , “Watch what you are about to do , for this man is a Roman !”

nama: Fiyaré ndimbal sénko ár néngaflai Folefaf a yémotai, "Kwaufro ta, fém fété ném Rommén ár?" Folém yawangoi, "A, yénd fété wém."
english: The commanding officer came and asked him , “ Tell me , are you a Roman ?” He said , “ Yes .”

nama: Féyo fiyaré ndimbal sénko ár norayai, "Yéndo ndimbal mani té ekman so kamndangé Rommén ár." Folém yawangoi, "Wénde yénd náráftamén Rommén árot."
english: The commanding officer answered , “ I bought my citizenship for a great price .” Paul said , “ But I was born a Roman.”

nama: Fiyaré efe ngiot a ámoghétro femormén Folefaf, táf fété yau yafrotaménd. Fiyaré ndimbal sénko ár férféram yifoi, ménamén yémon emndai yánjo ár Fole umbghét, wénde Fol témorwén Rommén ár. Fol yakai Ju sénko árfene áumengégh sáfrére
english: Immediately those who were about to examine him departed from him , and the commanding officer also was afraid when he realized that he was a Roman , because he had bound him .

nama: Ámb efghon, fiyaré ndimbal sénko árom téronjau téfén némamén Fol tékarotawét Ju árém. Féyo ámb efghon fiyaré ndimbal sénko árom Folene sein yaferyéng. Fá wéi emndai limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a méinyotio Ju sénko ár áumengéghét. Yémon yéngémnjoi Fol a Ju sénko árfene sáfrére nokayoi. |CN02020B.tif|col||© 1996 David C Cook. Used by permission.|Foléf korayawét Ju árfene limánégh árfé (Acts 22.30)|23.30
english: But on the next day , desiring to know the truth about why he was accused by the Jews , he freed him from the bonds and commanded the chief priests and all the council to come together , and brought Paul down and set him before them .

nama: Efe tawakayongérwén Fole kaka norayayénd, "Fémon yasalite Ngánjánene limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár!"
english: Those who stood by said , “ Do you malign God ’s high priest?”

nama: Folém ewawangoi, "Fútaréf, yénd yau mat kwémorwén ndené fá siyém limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár. Ménamén si ndené yékai, 'Yaufi si yau norayati féfenjo limánégh ároefaf.'"
english: Paul said , “ I didn’ t know , brothers, that he was high priest. For it is written , ‘ You shall not speak evil of a ruler of your people .’”

nama: Fol mat náyátoi ndené ámb ár tamorwén Saduki ár a ámb Farasi ár, fá néngutnayéng ár mérnafefaf, "Tane fútaréf, yénd swém Farasi ár, Farasi árfene ambum. Yénd wakayong ufoghamé ménamén tane méghmégh kérta anoghmén."
english: But when Paul perceived that the one part were Sadducees and the other Pharisees , he cried out in the council , “ Men and brothers, I am a Pharisee , a son of Pharisees . Concerning the hope and resurrection of the dead I am being judged !”

nama: Njam fá norayai yéné si, Farasi ár a Saduki ár nafaloyénd a éwigh yérnyayénd. 8 Ménamén Saduki ár korayawét ndené kér ár yau so nanotat ghérsat, yémofem efalo yau tiyátotawét ndené njafar si résagh ár a mbérmbér kété em. Wénde Farasi árém efalo tiyátotawét méinyotio yéné yam.
english: When he had said this , an argument arose between the Pharisees and Sadducees , and the crowd was divided .

nama: Yéné sémbáran Yuré nokayoi kaka Folefaf a yémndai, "Férfér yau némǃ Ndené fété kés noraye tanemén Jerusalem kénjún, ndenéyameyo tanemén so wéi nafrote kété Romén." Yémofem mwighé téfaronawét Fole ngiot
english: The following night , the Lord stood by him and said , “Cheer up , Paul , for as you have testified about me at Jerusalem , so you must testify also at Rome .”

nama: Wénde njam Fole yánjafam náyárai ndernáye Ju ár mwighé kémnawét yá ngiot, fá táf néngaflai fiyarafene sifayat a Fole yaufroi.
english: But Paul ’s sister’s son heard they were lying in wait , and he came and entered into the barracks and told Paul .

nama: Féyo Folém yémotai ámb fiyaré sénko ár a témndangé, "Téngwasro yéné totér ár kétán fiyaré ndimbal sénko ároefaf, ménamén yáfaf ámb si em yá waufroghét."
english: Paul summoned one of the centurions and said , “Bring this young man to the commanding officer, for he has something to tell him .”

nama: Féyo yémo yéngémnjoi fiyaré ndimbal sénko ároefaf. Fiyaré sénko árom témotangé, "Fol, kwéfkwéf méngo árom wémnde. Fá ténmasro yéné totér ambum fefaf, ménamén yáfaf ámb si em fe sái kémaufrongé."
english: So he took him and brought him to the commanding officer and said , “ Paul , the prisoner , summoned me and asked me to bring this young man to you . He has something to tell you .”

nama: Fiyaré ndimbal sénko árom yéngwasroi totér ár téndot ménát ár yau so káyárangayénd a témotangé, "Fene ménde némé yém kwaufro?"
english: The commanding officer took him by the hand , and going aside , asked him privately , “ What is it that you have to tell me ?”

nama: Fiyaré ndimbal sénko árom yémndai totér ár, "Yau taufro ende ndené fémo té waufro yéné ta." Féyo yémo yéngwatembai totér ár. Fiyaré sénko árom yáfáretam Fol kétán Kaisariat
english: So the commanding officer let the young man go, charging him , “ Tell no one that you have revealed these things to me .”

nama: Yémon emotangeyayai yánjo sómbio fiyaré sénko ár a emndeyai, "Takafend 200 fiyaré, 70 os wérse ár a 200 námb táikér ár so kuwanongi Kaisariat 9 aklok sénonjo sémbár. 24 Ámb os taramend Fole ménát fá merro so néngérse gafana Feliksefaf."
english: He called to himself two of the centurions , and said , “ Prepare two hundred soldiers to go as far as Caesarea , with seventy horsemen and two hundred men armed with spears, at the third hour of the night .”

nama: Yémo yéné férén yéfarotam ndené,
english: He wrote a letter like this :

nama: Klaudius Lisias, Kétán fene utmanégh yétkwén Gafana Feliks, Áuwégh yém.
english: “ Claudius Lysias to the most excellent governor Felix : Greetings .

nama: Ámb Ju ár nufnyayénd wátaranégh kénjút, fá norayayénd ndené méinyotio yam Tétulusém árké noyarai efalo yém. Fol nawamarote fáyo
english: The Jews also joined in the attack, affirming that these things were so .

nama: Sómbio yunjéf soramé, Forsius Festus nosoi Gafana Feliksene sifayan. Wénde ménamén Feliks ménde témorwén Ju árfene ménde sái tawawafrotau, yémo yéfrangoi Fol kwéfkwéf méngon.
english: But when two years were fulfilled , Felix was succeeded by Porcius Festus , and desiring to gain favor with the Jews , Felix left Paul in bonds .

nama: Féyo Fol fáyo nawamarotai, "Yéndon yau ámb mámáfi tafrotan kétán Ju árfene nákfaf o wáwefnogh méngofaf o Rom tuk warsagh ár Kaisarefaf."
english: while he said in his defense, “ Neither against the law of the Jews , nor against the temple , nor against Caesar , have I sinned at all .”

nama: Festus ménde témorwén Ju ár sái áuwéghét taméindau, Folefaf norayai, "Fém ménde té ném álighét Jerusalemét a sái némakai tane sáfrére yéné wátaranéghan?"
english: But Festus , desiring to gain favor with the Jews , answered Paul and said , “ Are you willing to go up to Jerusalem and be judged by me there concerning these things ?”

nama: Festus yánjo árfé korayawét, yéné soramé fá norayai Folefaf, "Fém té norayai, 'Kaisarém so náyárete tane mogh.' Yénémaménnde, fém so kuwano Rom tuk warsagh ár Kaisarefaf!" Festusém yaufroi warsagh ár Agrifai Folenemén
english: Then Festus , when he had conferred with the council , answered, “ You have appealed to Caesar . To Caesar you shall go .”

nama: Féyo Agrifa norayai Festusefaf, "Yéndon so yiyáretan fá némé si njam noraya." Yémon yawangoi, "Káye fémo so yiyárete." Fol noraye Agrifafaf
english: Agrippa said to Festus , “ I also would like to hear the man myself.” “Tomorrow,” he said , “ you shall hear him .”

nama: Féyo Agrifa norayai Folefaf, "Koraya sénonjo."
english: Agrippa said to Paul , “ You may speak for yourself .” Then Paul stretched out his hand , and made his defense.

nama: "Warsagh ár Agrifa, yénd áuwéghafé wém fe sáfrére sénonjo táf yéndon norayan awamarogh si méinyotio Ju árfene wánangoghmén, 3 ménamén fém mer mat ném ndernáye Ju ár emor a yéfene fénatayam. Féyo fém náyáreta tafaf métare!
english: “ I think myself happy , King Agrippa, that I am to make my defense before you today concerning all the things that I am accused by the Jews ,

nama: "Féyo yéndon yémotayén, 'Efe fém ném, Yuré?'
english: “ I said , ‘ Who are you , Lord ?’ “ He said , ‘ I am Jesus , whom you are persecuting .

nama: Njam Folém mé korayau, Festusém nutnai, "Fol, fém onon ném! Fenjo ndimbal otamegham néméinde ononot!"
english: As he thus made his defense, Festus said with a loud voice , “ Paul , you are crazy! Your great learning is driving you insane !”

nama: Féyo Agrifa norayai Folefaf, "Fém ndené nemne yéné tekofnare fémon so kwiyáto wékeye yénd ndené fété efalo yátogh ár?"
english: Agrippa said to Paul , “ With a little persuasion are you trying to make me a Christian ?”

nama: Folém yawangoi, "Ténjfi o tombé kéráye, tane orayégh Ngánjánefaf feyot a méinyotio emofem wiyáretat yénd sénonjo so kénamndangi efalo yátogh ár ndené yénd swém, wénde yénd yau ménde wém fém sái kamndangi kwéfkwéf méngo ár ndené yénd."
english: Paul said , “ I pray to God , that whether with little or with much , not only you , but also all that hear me today , might become such as I am , except for these bonds .”

nama: Warsagh ár, gafana, Bernis a méinyotio efe tamorangérwén yémafé fá nokayoyénd. 31 Soramé yémofem yéfrangoyénd a fá nufngoyénd si yéfe kénjúnro, "Yéné árom némé yau tafrote némndafi árkémamén krot so tékmangi o kwéfkwéf méngot tényawangi."
english: The king rose up with the governor and Bernice, and those who sat with them .

nama: Agrifa norayai Festusefaf, "Njam yéné ár yau té norayai Kaisarefaf ménát sái káyáretau yane si, féyo yéndfem so téngwurtongém."
english: Agrippa said to Festus , “ This man might have been set free if he had not appealed to Caesar .”

nama: Fauréghétro témorwén Folém ewamnendai njamke nénet, a emndai, "14 efogh fém té tam mámé mwighé a ámb njamke yau tánetati. 34 Yéndon ewamnendan fém, féyo, njamke tánetangi, ghérsé sái mé em. Yéné yafrotati a fém so mer em."
english: While the day was coming on , Paul begged them all to take some food , saying , “ Today is the fourteenth day that you wait and continue fasting, having taken nothing .

nama: Njam yénd merro nufaryém, yéndfem yáyamngoyém fér yétkwén Malta. 2 Fér ár efe tákmangérwén yémofem yénmumyoyénd mere a fútar náyátoyém. Yémofem fés yétayaménd a yénmumyoyénd yénd méinyotio ménamén nu kafamndau a kurférmén.
english: When we had escaped , then they learned that the island was called Malta .

nama: Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Yéndfem ámb yau némé férén ewinjoyém Judiamén fenemén. Ámb yau téfene ár efe enmormén kétándmé nafroyénd o norayayénd yaufi si fenemén. 22 Wénde yénd ménde yéném áyárghét fene si némé em, ménamén yénd mat yéném árém norayat yaufi si marataye yéné totér mérénmén."
english: They said to him , “ We neither received letters from Judea concerning you , nor did any of the brothers come here and report or speak any evil of you .

nama: "'Kuwano yéné árfefaf a koraya, "Fém so náyáretati wénde mat yau so náyátotati. Fémofem so yéfandati wénde yau so tayamngongi.
english: saying , ‘ Go to this people and say , in hearing, you will hear, but will in no way understand . In seeing , you will see , but will in no way perceive .

nama: Ménamén yéné árfene tikéf té nénamndai táikér, yémofem táikér yéfandat áyárghét, a yémofem yéfenjo ghékéf té eumbértongi. Féyo mété táf yau néretat yéfenjo ghékfe, a yau náyáretat yéfenjo téngane, a efalo yau yiyátotat yéfenjo tikfe a kawengongi ménát yéndon so mer táyáton fá."'"
