english: For this people ’s heart has grown callous. Their ears are dull of hearing . Their eyes they have closed . Lest they should see with their eyes , hear with their ears , understand with their heart , and would turn again , then I would heal them .’ + 28:27 Isaiah 6:9-10

nama: Yénémaménnde yénd Fol ménde wém fém mat so em Ngánjánene wanjarégh té yéngramai kétán Téndo árfefaf, a fá so náyáretat! 29 {c{ ...f* {c{28.29 Yau siménj
english: “ Be it known therefore to you that the salvation of God is sent to the nations , and they will listen.”

nama: Sómbio yunjéf Fol yémorangérmén kété yáne mani faimén méngon a taumyotau fá efe tanmormén yá fandaghét. 31 Yémo tawaufrotau Ngánján limánéghmén a tawatametau Yuré Yesu Kerisoenemén férférofnar a emo yau tékmbongai.
english: Paul stayed two whole years in his own rented house and received all who were coming to him ,

nama: Fol, Yesu Kerisoene faiofnar ásáfogh ár, nénamndai Yesuene muyafé ár a fénataye náyátoi Ngánjánene mer si waitoghét.
english: Paul , a servant of Jesus Christ , called to be an apostle, set apart for the Good News of God ,

nama: A yéndon yéfarotan méinyotio féfeyot kétán efe em Romén efe euwete Ngánjánam a namndetat yáne njúnnjúnofnar ár. Ngárám a krufrát féfeyot Ngánjáneta téfene Afé a kétamé Yuré Yesu Keriso. Folene ménde yafoghét Romét
english: to all who are in Rome , beloved of God , called to be saints: Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ .

nama: Yéné téfnan, Ngánjánam eramai kétán wáiwáiafé ménde yam wafroghét. Yéfene amafam yengoyénd árfé kémégh yam kétán amafro kémégh yamfaf. 27 Ndené yameyo árém yéfrangoyénd amafafé kémégh yam a nufngoyénd ár ghakér ro yam fárofáro. Ár wáiwáiafé yam nefngoyénd fárofáro, a yanayénd fai yéfenjo yaufimén.
english: For this reason , God gave them up to vile passions . For their women changed the natural function into that which is against nature .

nama: Némé yénd so norayan yénamé? Yénd merro yéném? Yaufifi! Yénd té efalo nauyafongém ndené Ju ár a Téndo ár ndenaro em méinyotio yaufi mbanmbanan. 10 Ndené fété kés yéfarotaménd: Ámb efe yau mbarkánd yém, ámbiro ámb yau;
english: What then ? Are we better than they ? No , in no way . For we previously warned both Jews and Greeks that they are all under sin.

nama: efe ámb yau yém emo mat yiyátoté yau ámb emo yéronje Ngánján.
english: There is no one who understands . There is no one who seeks after God .

nama: Méinyotio té kangotat fá té nénafghangi nénáyátongi fifiofnar, efe yau yém ámbiro emo ewafrote mer, yau ámbiro ámb yém.
english: They have all turned away . They have together become unprofitable. There is no one who does good , no , not so much as one .” + 3:12 Psalms 14:1-3; 53:1-3; Ecclesiastes 7:20

nama: Yéfene kémngaféne sem ásauréghkaf mbéwé. Yéfene mbírmbíram yafrote unyégh. Yéfene si sem ndenanit kamban rarégh.
english: “ Their throat is an open tomb. With their tongues they have used deceit .” + 3:13 Psalms 5:9 “ The poison of vipers is under their lips .” + 3:13 Psalms 140:3

nama: Yéfene sénféne siyém waghanégh a njérmat si afoghare.
english: “ Their mouth is full of cursing and bitterness .”

nama: Yéfene kafkaf wékeye em ár ngiot.
english: “ Their feet are swift to shed blood.

nama: Awirorghafé a usérmboghafé eyota,
english: Destruction and misery are in their ways .

nama: krufrát ghérsé fá mafina em.
english: The way of peace , they haven’t known .”

nama: Kété yau yém Ngánján férfér yéfene ghékfan."
english: “ There is no fear of God before their eyes .”

nama: "Frengéghkaf fá em endefene yaufiyam tawalindangé, endefene yaufiyam rautoghkaf em.
english: “ Blessed are they whose iniquities are forgiven, whose sins are covered .

nama: Frengéghkaf yéné ár yém endene yaufiyam Yuram so yau ewawafte yéfefaf!"
english: Blessed is the man whom the Lord will by no means charge with sin.”

nama: Yéndon yéné mbanmban yafrotamén méinyotio efoghta ménamén yéné yém táikér matot. Fronde fémofem té taumyotawét féfenjo fifi kafe ménát tamorwén yaufiyamoene faiofnar ásáfogh ár, fém yaufiyamotro tamorangérwén. Wénde sénonjo fém táf karamangi mbarkándoene faiofnar ásáfogh árot ménát wafroghét yéné árké yém njúnnjúnofnar.
english: I speak in human terms because of the weakness of your flesh ; for as you presented your members as servants to uncleanness and to wickedness upon wickedness, even so now present your members as servants to righteousness for sanctification.

nama: Féyo, ámb ár mé té noraya, 'Yéné fifi ndené yém ámb meram yénérsam kér féfefaf.' Yaufifi! Yaufiyamam yénérsam kér tayot. Yaufiyam Ngánjánene mer nákan nauyafotam ndené yénd kwémorwén kértafé. Yéné téfnan, yéndfem yéfandam ndené yaufiyam fété yém minde mámáfi. Ngánjánene mer nák kénjúmé yaufiyam násáfotam minde yaufiot.
english: Did then that which is good become death to me ? May it never be ! But sin, that it might be shown to be sin, was producing death in me through that which is good ; that through the commandment sin might become exceedingly sinful.

nama: Emo so yénfalote yénd kétamé Kerisoene uwéghta? Féyotaro táikéryam o kérté yamam o ngiyam o siogh o firoyam o kér kakayam o witmafé sénté náifé? 36 Ndené Buk si noraye, "Fene téfnan yéndfem kér yéfandam méinyotio efghon; yénd ndenéyame yéném sif ngiot tawafngongi."
english: Who shall separate us from the love of Christ ? Could oppression, or anguish , or persecution , or famine , or nakedness , or peril , or sword ?

nama: Yéné fifi yém ndené yau em mé fifie ambum kétamé fifie ákita efe emndetat Ngánjánene ambum, wénde yáne efalo áki ambum fá em efe náráftat yáne unyéghofnar sian. 9 Yéné yém némé Ngánján unyéghofnar si norayai Ebraamefaf, "Kété kaféghmén efghon yénd so wéném, a Sara so yém ambumafé."
english: That is , it is not the children of the flesh who are children of God , but the children of the promise are counted as heirs.

nama: Ndernáye so norayam? Némé Ngánján yau yém mbarkánd? Yaufifi. 15 Ménamén fá té norayai Mosesefaf, "Tane mer yam so yém yáfaf endefaf mer yam yém, a tane ghérghérsisé so yém yáfaf endefaf ghérghérsisé yém."
english: What shall we say then ? Is there unrighteousness with God ? May it never be !

nama: 'Ngánján té norayai yéfefaf, 'Fém yau em tane ár.' Yéné sifayanyo ánde fá norayai ndené, árém so sénonjo emndetat fá "Ngánjánene ambumtértér, efe túmén so em ghérsé."'
english: “ It will be that in the place where it was said to them , ‘ You are not my people ,’ there they will be called ‘ children of the living God .’” + 9:26 Hosea 1:10

nama: Aisaya kutnau Israil ár téfnan: "Ndemamén Israil ár em tárfár ndenanit mirinit arakaf téndon, mé nambio árro so kunjarngi;
english: Isaiah cries concerning Israel , “ If the number of the children of Israel are as the sand of the sea , it is the remnant who will be saved ;

nama: Yuré Ngánjánam so tifongé yánjo ásáfogh wékeye. Yémo té tawawéngsote yánjo ár némé yémo so ewafrote. A yémo so tékratan tákmangé fá féyotio.'
english: for he will finish the work and cut it short in righteousness, because the Lord will make a short work upon the earth .” + 9:28 Isaiah 10:22-23

nama: Ndené fété Aisaya ndernáye norayai tándái, "Yau njam wafté kér ro Yuram ténéfrangongai yénd nambio, yénd so ténmalindangai ndenanit Sodom yénd so ténmalindangai ndenanit Gomora." Ndimbal mwighafnar Israil ár
english: As Isaiah has said before , “ Unless the Lord of Armies + 9:29 Greek: Sabaoth (or Hebrew: Tze’va’ot) had left us a seed , we would have become like Sodom , and would have been made like Gomorrah .” + 9:29 Isaiah 1:9

nama: Wénde ndernáye wét Israil árfenemén? Némé yémofem té wét náyárayénd si? Néméwét, yémofem té náyátayénd: "Yéfene si té tiotau méinyotio árfefaf yéné mband maratan, a yéfene siam té yarafnam mband kwéndkwéndot."
english: But I say , didn’ t they hear? Yes, most certainly , “ Their sound went out into all the earth , their words to the ends of the world .” + 10:18 Psalms 19:4

nama: Wénde Israilmén ár yau mat tamorwén? Néméwét, fronde Moses korayau, "Yéndon so táyáton waramnjagh ár ménamén ármén efe yau em tane ár. Yéndon so eméindan nékwafé ménamén ármén efe yau em mat tanemén."
english: But I ask , didn’t Israel know ? First Moses says , “ I will provoke you to jealousy with that which is no nation . I will make you angry with a nation void of understanding.” + 10:19 Deuteronomy 32:21

nama: Wéi soramé Aisaya marataye norayai, "Yénd yémofem winjoyénd yéné árém emofem yénd yau kwénronjawét; yénd nauyafoyén yéndio yéfefaf efe yau kamotawét tanemén."
english: Isaiah is very bold and says , “ I was found by those who didn’ t seek me . I was revealed to those who didn’ t ask for me .” + 10:20 Isaiah 65:1

nama: Wénde Israil árfenemén yémon norayai, "Méinyotio efghon yéndon tane ngángé tasafotan yéfefaf, wénde fá yau káyáretat tafaf a kamronam yéndfé."
english: But about Israel he says , “ All day long I stretched out my hands to a disobedient and contrary people .”

nama: Deifid noraye, "Yéfene njamke kitaré so kénamndangé ndénndén a urér. Yéfene frengégham yéfune yéfeyot usérmbogh, a so tawanangi yémofem némat ménde em.
english: David says , “ Let their table be made a snare , a trap , a stumbling block , and a retribution to them .

nama: Yéfene ghékéf so kwéfkwéf náyátotat ménát fá yau so néretat, a yéfene sémsot so ewáwefno tuot!" Israil árfene kenagh yau yém ambino
english: Let their eyes be darkened , that they may not see. Always keep their backs bent.” + 11:10 Psalms 69:22,23

nama: Táf fémo njam taram fronde féskaf flawé karéf Ngánjáne, féyo méinyotio féskaf flawé so yém Ngánjáne. Táf wén sérémb njam em Ngánjáne, féyo kafekefe wéi so em Ngánjáne.
english: If the first fruit is holy, so is the lump . If the root is holy, so are the branches .

nama: A yéndon so yafrotan yéné árnyégh yémafé njam yéndon ewawitan yéfene yaufiyam."
english: This is my covenant with them , when I will take away their sins.” + 11:27 Isaiah 59:20-21; 27:9; Jeremiah 31:33-34

nama: O, nderé merfifi Ngánján yém téfene! Nderé kénjkam em yáne káfeté mwighé a matyam! Nderé táikér yém téfeyot mat yiyátongém yáne mwighé farorégh a yáne end! 34 "Efe ámb mat yém Yurane mwighé? Efe ámb yém yáne mwighé wáutárégh ár?
english: Oh the depth of the riches both of the wisdom and the knowledge of God ! How unsearchable are his judgments , and his ways past tracing out !

nama: Emo ámb némé yaram Ngánjáne, ménát Ngánjánam sái fai taramangé?
english: “ Or who has first given to him , and it will be repaid to him again ?” + 11:35 Job 41:11

nama: Yá tambén a yáne kénjúmé a yáyotro méinyotio rokar em. Yáyotro so yém ndimbal yétkwén tuot! Efalo.
english: For of him and through him and to him are all things . To him be the glory for ever ! Amen.

nama: Wénde ewafrotati yéné yam ndenáye Buk si noraye, "Féfene mék téfnár njam siogh em, emanjnati njamkeye. Njam nuam erameta, tawaramangi nu yéfe nénet, a fá so wáiwáiyam eramete ménamén némé yam té tafrotat féfefaf."
english: Therefore “ If your enemy is hungry , feed him . If he is thirsty , give him a drink ; for in doing so , you will heap coals of fire on his head .” + 12:20 Proverbs 25:21-22

nama: Yau taumyongi yaufiyamam sái fene ghérsé tawainde, wénde tawaindangi yaufiyam meryam wafroghe.
english: Don’ t be overcome by evil , but overcome evil with good .

nama: Yau táf árfene wafángogh mani{d{ ...f* {d{13.8 wafángogh mani what is meaning? ekmang féfefef, yanaro túmén fai so yém sái euwetati féfe kénjún, {e{ ...f* {e{13.8 Yau táf árfene wafángogh mani ekmang féfefef, yanaro túmén fai so yém sái euwetati féfe kénjún, need be BT and check the meaning.
english: Owe no one anything , except to love one another ; for he who loves his neighbor has fulfilled the law .

nama: Nák, "Yau awérghanyo wal. Yau ár ngi krot; yau oro. Yau mwighaye yérsa ároene rokar." Ámb nák yéné kés engém, méinyotio efghang yéné ámbiro nákan, "Yuweta fenjo kaka ár ndené fémyo." 10 Uwégham yau téfunangé mámáfi fútarefaf. Yénémaménnde uwéghan efalo táyátongé nák.
english: For the commandments , “ You shall not commit adultery ,” “ You shall not murder ,” “ You shall not steal ,” “ You shall not covet ,” and whatever other commandments there are , are all summed up in this saying , namely , “ You shall love your neighbor as yourself .”

nama: Néméwét, yéndfem méinyotio so yarametam wangogh téfenjomén yáyot Ngánjáne.
english: So then each one of us will give account of himself to God .

nama: Wéikor ndené noraye, "Náuwétati, fém Téndo ár, Ngánjánene árfé!"
english: Again he says , “ Rejoice , you Gentiles , with his people .” + 15:10 Deuteronomy 32:43

nama: A wéikor, "Yarsati Yuré, méinyotio fémofem Téndo árém, Yuyotati fá, fém méinyotio ár."
english: Again , “ Praise the Lord , all you Gentiles ! Let all the peoples praise him .” + 15:11 Psalms 117:1

nama: A wéikor, Aisaya noraye, "Ámb ár kétamé Jesiene mérénta so kénamndangé waftafé, efe so kokayongé sái elimnda méinyotio mband marat, Téndo ár so em méghmégh yáfaf."
english: Again , Isaiah says , “ There will be the root of Jesse , he who arises to rule over the Gentiles ; in him the Gentiles will hope .” + 15:12 Isaiah 11:10

nama: Méghméghafé Ngánjánam so ewafote méinyotio áuwéghe a krufrát ménamén fémofem yiyátotati fá, ménát fém so afoghare em méghméghan Ngánján Mbérmbér waftayan. Folene misi ásáfogh Téndo árfeyot
english: Now may the God of hope fill you with all joy and peace in believing , that you may abound in hope in the power of the Holy Spirit .

nama: Áuwégh tawaraménd Frisila a Akwila, tane mérne ásáfogh ár Keriso Yesuene kénjún. 4 Yémofem ekmetat yéfenjo ghérsé ta wanjarégh téfnan. Yénd erametan kanjo si yéfefaf, yau yéndro, wénde méinyotio Téndo árfene Yesuene mérén wéi. 5 Áuwégh wéi si tawaramangi Yesuene mérnot sái náumendat yéfene méngon.
english: Greet Prisca and Aquila, my fellow workers in Christ Jesus ,

nama: Áuwégh si tawaraménd yéfe Trifena a Trifosa, yéné amaf efe mindefifi kásáfotat Yurane kénjún. Áuwégh si taramangi tane áuwéghafé fútare Fersis, ámb amaf efe mindefifi kásáfotau Yurane kénjún. 13 Áuwégh si taramangi Rufuse, yékafayénd Yurane kénjún, a yáne amé, efe témorwén tayot amanit wéi. 14 Áuwégh si taramangi Asinkrituse, Flegon, Ermas, Fatrobas, Ermas, a yéfene mérén kés em yémafé. 15 Áuwégh so taramangi Filologus, Julia, Nereus a yáne mérés, a Olimfas a méinyotio Yurane ár kés em yémafé.
english: Greet Tryphaena and Tryphosa , who labor in the Lord . Greet Persis , the beloved, who labored much in the Lord .

nama: Áuwégh tawaramangi féfe kénjún ménaye njúnnjúnofnar sénéghégh. Méinyotio efalo yátogh árfene Yesuene mérnam yénan engwawatembangi yéfene áuwégh si.
english: Greet one another with a holy kiss . The assemblies of Christ greet you .

nama: Timoti, yéndfé mérne ásáfogh ár, engwawatemb yánjo áuwégh si féfeyot, ndenáyo wéi yémofem Lukius, Jason a Sosifata, tane mérnam.
english: Timothy , my fellow worker , greets you , as do Lucius , Jason , and Sosipater , my relatives .

nama: Yénd, Tertius, emo yéfarotam yéné férén ménat Fol, áuwégh si ewarametan Yurane kénjún.
english: I , Tertius , who write the letter , greet you in the Lord .

nama: Gaius, endene waráuwéghan yénd a méinyotio Yesuene mérén yéna náuwétam, yémon engwawatemb yánjo áuwégh si. Erastus, efe yém ndimbal tesenan mani wanjángégh ár, a téfene fútar Kuartus engwatembangi féfeyot yéfene áuwégh si. 24 Téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene ngárám so yém méinyotio féfefaf. Efalo.
english: Gaius , my host and host of the whole assembly , greets you . Erastus , the treasurer of the city , greets you , as does Quartus , the brother.

nama: Yéné férén siyém kétándmé Fol, efe té yémotayéng sái yém Keriso Yesuene muyafé ár Ngánjánene méndeyan, a kétándmé téfene fútar Sostenes,
english: Paul , called to be an apostle of Jesus Christ through the will of God , and our brother Sosthenes ,

nama: Yéndon yéfarotan yéné férén kétán Ngánjánene Yesuene mérnot Korint kénjún, yéfefaf efe efghayéng Keriso Yesu kénjún a efe té emotayéng yáne njúnnjúnofnar ár sái em mérne yémafé méinyotio árfé, emofem yáwefnotat téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoe, yéfene Yuré a téfene.
english: to the assembly of God which is at Corinth — those who are sanctified in Christ Jesus , called saints, with all who call on the name of our Lord Jesus Christ in every place , both theirs and ours :

nama: So Ngánján téfene Afam a Yuré Yesu Kerisom tawaramangé féfe ngárám a krufrát. Frengégh Keriso kénjún
english: Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ .

nama: Ánde wét káfeté mwighé ár yém? Ánde wét nák watamegh ár yém? Ánde wét matyam kér ro éwigh ár yém yéné mband maratan? Ngánjánam té yuyafoyéng yéné mbandoene káfeté mwighé siyém fifiofnar!
english: Where is the wise ? Where is the scribe ? Where is the debater of this age ? Hasn’ t God made foolish the wisdom of this world ?

nama: Efaloe fém mat em ndené fém Ngánjánene wáwefnogh méngo em a Ngánjánene Mbérmbér yémor féfene kénjún! 17 Ngánjánam so tirorngé fá emon tirorngé yáne wáwefnogh méngo. Ménamén Ngánjánene wáwefnogh méngo siyém njúnnjúnofnar, a fém fémyo em yáne wáwefnogh méngo.
english: Don’ t you know that you are God ’s temple and that God ’s Spirit lives in you ?

nama: Tane ásáfogh yau yém sái norayan efe Yesuene mérén kénjún yau em. Ngánjánam mogh so yafrote yéfefaf. Wénde yau mogh yafrotati fenjo mérénmén árfefaf. 13 Ndené fété Buk si noraye, "Tawitrombongi yaufiyamafé ár fenjo mérénta."
english: For what do I have to do with also judging those who are outside ? Don’ t you judge those who are within ?

nama: Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe yéné yau wáfaregh yém, wénde mé mwigharo yém. 7 Yénd nemnan méinyotio fém kar ndené yam yénd kés wém. Wénde ámbiroámbiro féne fénataye fok Ngánjánam árké té yéramai yá, ámb ároe ámb fok, ámb ároe yéné.
english: But this I say by way of concession , not of commandment .

nama: Sénonjo, yénd norayan aweréghofnar árfefaf a kwirafefaf, mer nérete féfeyot miya engérnyang ámnjoghan féfembia ndené fété yénd swém. 9 Wénde njam yau fém nawamarotati, féyo mer yém téu naweretati, yau táf mwighayan nuitati.
english: But I say to the unmarried and to widows , it is good for them if they remain even as I am .

nama: Awerégh árét táfaf yéna sotafé si em árkéméné tanjoyo yau em wénde Yurane. Yátén yau so kafalongé yánjarta. 11 Wénde téu téfrangongé, fá so yémor strewar ámnjogh o kawafarotangé fá yánjarefaf. A yánjarém yau so tatembangé yatén.
english: But to the married I command — not I , but the Lord — that the wife not leave her husband

nama: Ámb si némé fémofem yafarotaménd aweréghofnar árfenemén. Yénd wafaréghofnar wém Yurata, wénde yéndon yarametan tane mwigharo, ménamén yáne ghérghérsisayan Yuram yénd té wiyátoi efe nafrotan efalo si.
english: Now concerning virgins , I have no commandment from the Lord , but I give my judgment as one who has obtained mercy from the Lord to be trustworthy .

nama: Yénd norayan yéné ménamén yénd ménde wém féfe wáutárghét. Yéndon yau kémbogh yénérsan féfefaf. Wénde yénd ménde wém fémofem sái yafrotati némé yém mbarkánd a utmanéghafé, a sái fémyo karamangi méinyotio Yurane ásáfoghét ékmboghofnaye.
english: This I say for your own benefit , not that I may ensnare you , but for that which is appropriate , and that you may attend to the Lord without distraction.

nama: Sénonjo yénd so norayan ménamén njamke raméghmén mewangfaf.
english: Now concerning things sacrificed to idols : We know that we all have knowledge . Knowledge puffs up , but love builds up .

nama: Fá efe nemnat ndené fá mat em nauyafote ndené fla efalo yau mat em ndené fété fá so mat em. 3 Wénde njam ár uweta Ngánján, féyo Ngánján efaloe mat yém yéné ár.
english: But if anyone thinks that he knows anything , he doesn’t yet know as he ought to know .

nama: Yénd yuwek ár wém. Yénd Yesuene muyafé ár wém. Yéndon té yinjoyén Yesu téfene Yuré. A fém em tane ásáfogh mbwe Yurai. 2 Táf ámb árém yau njam kumyongi yénd ndené fété Yesuene muyafé ár, yénd mé fété wém féfeyot! Ménamén fém em tane fagharéghkaf em yénd wém Yesuene muyafé ár.
english: Am I not free ? Am I not an apostle? Haven’ t I seen Jesus Christ , our Lord ? Aren’ t you my work in the Lord ?

nama: Méinyotio yéné yam kufrotawét yéfefaf ndené matyamot téfeyot, a yéfarotaménd matot téfeyot efe yénmor yéné efoghon mbandoene yatogh wifoghétro yam.
english: Now all these things happened to them by way of example , and they were written for our admonition , on whom the ends of the ages have come .

nama: Féyo fá ndené norayat."Yénd féyotaro yéném méinyotio yam wafroghét, " Yéné siyém efalo yém, wénde yau méinyotio yam em wáutáréghafé. 24 Efe yau so náronje yéfenjo merot, wénde náronja ámb árfene merot.
english: “ All things are lawful for me ,” but not all things are profitable . “ All things are lawful for me ,” but not all things build up .

nama: Fém sem yuwek em némndafi téu enetati wérár fenjen maket téraréghmén, yau némndafimén namotati, ménamén féfenjo mwighé. 26 Buk si noraye ndené, "Yéné mband marat a méinyotio rokar yéné kénjún sem mé Yuranero em."
english: Whatever is sold in the butcher shop, eat , asking no question for the sake of conscience ,

nama: Táf yéndon kánjo yarametan Ngánjáne ménamén tane njamkemén, némamén wét ámb árém waruindat yénd ménamén njamkemén árkémamén yéndon kánjo yarametan?
english: If I partake with thankfulness , why am I denounced for something I give thanks for ?

nama: Wufénmametati tafaf ndené fété yénd nufénmetan Kerisoefaf. Wafarégh sénko wáwefnogh kénjún
english: Be imitators of me , even as I also am of Christ .

nama: Tane fútaréf, sénonjo mwighé ménamén fokmén Ngánján Mbérmbéroeta.
english: Now concerning spiritual things , brothers, I don’ t want you to be ignorant.

nama: Uwégh siyém yau náuwéte yaufiyaman wénde náuwéte efalo yaman. 7 Uwégh túmén warawerégh yém, túmén ndimbal mwighé yém, túmén méghmégh yém, a túmén métar.
english: doesn’ t rejoice in unrighteousness, but rejoices with the truth;

nama: Sénonjo yéné nambioro nafrangongi: ndimbal mwighé, méghmégh, a uwégh. Wénde minde ndimbalfifi siyém uwégh.
english: But now faith , hope , and love remain — these three . The greatest of these is love.

nama: Yéndon kánjo Ngánjáne yarametan némé yénd norayan kankaye yáinde fémofem méinyotio némé ewafrotati. 19 Wénde yéndon so tawaferén Yesuene mérén wáwefnoghan yénd norayan 5 si ménát eném so tanangi kwayaghaye ménát ámb ár watameghét, yau tárfár 10,000 si kanké sie árkéméné ámb árém yau yérsat kwayaghé.
english: I thank my God , I speak with other languages more than you all .

nama: Fém yau so em ndenanit ambumtértér féfene mwighayan. Aem ndenanit ambumtértér yaufimén, wénde. anoghkaf ár aem káfeté mwighamén. 21 Buk si noraye, "Yuré norayai, Ámb árfene kanké sie yénd so norayan tane árfefaf, Yénd so norayan dábi árfene mbírmbíre, wénde nde yémofem yénd yau so wiyáretat."
english: Brothers, don’ t be children in thoughts, yet in malice be babies, but in thoughts be mature .

nama: Féyo fok kankaye si orayégh siyém efalo yátoghét yém efalo yátoghofnar árfet, yau efalo yátogh árfet, fok Ngánjánene si wafroghmén siyém efalo yátoghét yém efalo yátogh árfet, yau efalo yátoghofnar árfet.
english: Therefore other languages are for a sign , not to those who believe , but to the unbelieving; but prophesying is for a sign , not to the unbelieving, but to those who believe .

nama: Féyo, tane fútaréf, yafarenati Ngánjánene si wafroghét, wénde yau kékmbongi kanké orayégh. 40 Méinyotio yam miya ewafrotati merkéraye a mbarkándero.
english: Therefore , brothers, desire earnestly to prophesy , and don’ t forbid speaking with other languages .

nama: Yau nawawérsotati fém: "Mámáfi mérnam ewaghnat mer wafroghyam." 34 Féfenjo mbarkánd mwighét kénangongi a kékmbongi féfenjo yaufita. Yénd norayan yéné ndené fém wáiwái aem ménamén ámb fém mafina em Ngánján. Anoghmén fifi
english: Don’t be deceived ! “ Evil companionships corrupt good morals .”

nama: Méinyotio fifi sem yau ámbiro sáfot em. Árfene sewam ámb sáf fifi, wérárafene fénatayo, menafene fénatayo a wagifafene fénatayo.
english: All flesh is not the same flesh , but there is one flesh of men , another flesh of animals, another of fish , and another of birds .

nama: A kété em njafarmén fifi a mbandmén fifi. Merafé yam njafarmén fifi sem fénatayo a kétándmé mbandmén fifi sem fénatayo merafé yam. 41 Efogh siyém yánjo merafé yam, ghérare fénatayo merafé yam, a kénd sem fénatayo merafé yam.Kété em fénaté sáfot merafé yam kéndan
english: There are also celestial bodies and terrestrial bodies ; but the glory of the celestial differs from that of the terrestrial .

nama: "Kér! Fene waingégh ánde yém? Kér! Fene wafté ánde yém ngiot?"
english: “ Death , where is your sting ? Hades, + 15:55 or, Hell where is your victory ?” + 15:55 See Hosea 13:14

nama: Kéram yérse yánjo wafté ngiot kétándmé yaufita, a yaufiyam yérse yánjo wafté kétándmé Ngánjánene nákta. 57 Wénde Ngánjáne kánjo yarametat emo yénmaramet téfe waingégh muyé téfene Yuré Yesu Keriso kénjúmé!
english: The sting of death is sin, and the power of sin is the law .

nama: Yénémaménnde, tane tikfafé fútaréf, kokayongi taikrataye a ndernder. Mia em túmén ásáfoghan Yurai, ménamén fém mat em ndené Yurane kénjún fifiofnar ásáfogh yau so násáfotati.
english: Therefore , my beloved brothers, be steadfast , immovable, always abounding in the Lord ’ s work , because you know that your labor is not in vain in the Lord .

nama: Yénd so wémor yénan Efesos kénjún kétánotio Fentikos efogh kawerangé. 9 Yéné siyém ndimbal sésafne té nasawér tayot ásáfoghét, a karogh ár wéi sem tárfár em.
english: But I will stay at Ephesus until Pentecost ,

nama: Njam Timoti yéném, fia nemne ndené té wumyongi féfe kénjút, ménamén fá siyém Yurai násáfote, ndené fété yénd swém. 11 Árké árom yau so yékarote fá, wénde fémofem mé ténmáutánangi yáne álighan krufráte, ménát fá so nénangote tafaf. Ménamén yénd nawanjetan yáyot ámb Yesuene efalo yátogh árfé.
english: Now if Timothy comes , see that he is with you without fear , for he does the work of the Lord , as I also do .

nama: Sénonjo fútar Afolosenemén: yéndo taikratye yawéngsotan fá féfe yafoghét ámb efalo yátogh árfé. Fá méndefnar tamorwén álighét sénonjo, wénde fá so yéngém njam kété yém féneféne. Soramamén si
english: Now concerning Apollos the brother, I strongly urged him to come to you with the brothers, but it was not at all his desire to come now ; but he will come when he has an opportunity .

nama: Mwighé sauréghkaf aem, kokayongi taikrataye ndimbal mwighé kénjún, miya ndernder ewakai, miya táikér em. 14 Ewafrotati méinyotio féfenjo ásáfogh uwégh kénjún.
english: Watch ! Stand firm in the faith ! Be courageous! Be strong !

nama: Fém mat em Stefanas a yáne mérén. Fá em fronde efalo yátogh ár Akaya yumén a naramayénd Ngánjánene árét ásáfoghét. Yéndon ewamnendan fém, tane fútaréf 16 ménát sái namyotati ndené árfefaf a méinyotio árfefaf efe nufeindat yéné ásáfoghét a násáfotat yénayan.
english: Now I beg you , brothers— you know the house of Stephanas , that it is the first fruits of Achaia, and that they have set themselves to serve the saints—

nama: Yénd áuwéghan wém yéfene wáfareghmén Stefanas, Fotunatus, a Akaikus, ménamén yémofem té ténmafrotat yéné wafrogh féfene yukéra. 18 Yémofem tane mwighé ásneghét yanoyénd a féfene ndenáyo. Fémofem sái tawayamngongi ndené ár.
english: I rejoice at the coming of Stephanas , Fortunatus , and Achaicus; for that which was lacking on your part , they supplied.

nama: Yéné Yesuene mérén Esia yuwan enwawatembangi féfe yéfene áuwégh. Akwila a Frisila a Yesuene mérén árké nafángotat yéfenjo méngon engwawatembangi efalo yátogh árfene áuwégh. 20 Méinyotio fútarém yéné sem engwawatembangi áuwégh. Nafángotati fútarafé ásneghafé.
english: The assemblies of Asia greet you . Aquila and Priscilla greet you warmly in the Lord , together with the assembly that is in their house .

nama: Tanjo ngángaye yéndon yéné yafarotan: Áuwégh Foleta.
english: This greeting is by me , Paul , with my own hand .

nama: Emon njam yau uwetat Yuré so yém wafalngogh yáne! Marana ta, yáne fifi, téfene Yuré, Kénaf!
english: If any man doesn’ t love the Lord Jesus Christ , let him be cursed. Come , Lord !

nama: Yuré Yesuene ngárám so yém féfefaf.
english: The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ be with you .

nama: Tane uwégh so yém féfefaf méinyotio Keriso Yesu kénjún.
english: My love to all of you in Christ Jesus . Amen.

nama: Yéné férén siyém Foleta, Keriso Yesuene muyafé ár Ngánjánene méndeyan, a kétándmé téfene fútar Timoti, Yéndon yéfarotan kétán Ngánjánene Yesuene mérnot Korint kénjún, a kétán Ngánjánene árfefaf Akaya yuwomé.
english: Paul , an apostle of Christ Jesus through the will of God , and Timothy our brother, to the assembly of God which is at Corinth , with all the saints who are in the whole of Achaia:

nama: So Ngánján téfene Afé a Yuré Yesu Keriso yéramet féfe ngárám a krufrát. Folém yaramete kánjo Ngánjáne
english: Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ .

nama: Fútaréf, yéndfem mat eyátotam fém kértamén yénd sténmorwén Esia yuwan. Yéné kérté téfayongérwén téfefaf tamorwén ndimbalfifi a yénd mwighayan nuyángém téfene ghérsamén.{i{ ...f* {i{1.8 yénd mwighayan nuyángém téfene ghérsamén. need to BT
english: For we don’ t desire to have you uninformed, brothers, concerning our affliction which happened to us in Asia : that we were weighed down exceedingly, beyond our power , so much that we despaired even of life .

nama: A féyo Yuré Méinyotio Wafté Afoghare noraye, "Fémofem so tafrangongi fá a kafalongi fémyo kétándmé yéfe tambén. Yau eyanjati némé em mámáfi, a yéndon so taumyon fém.
english: Therefore “‘ Come out from among them , and be separate,’ says the Lord . ‘Touch no unclean thing . I will receive you . + 6:17 Isaiah 52:11; Ezekiel 20:34,41

nama: Yénd so wém Féferafé, a fém so kamndangi tane ambum a mérésmérés."
english: I will be to you a Father . You will be to me sons and daughters ,’ says the Lord Almighty .” + 6:18 2 Samuel 7:14; 7:8

nama: Tane tikfafé fútaréf, ménamén yéné unyéghofnar si eramai téfefaf, yéndio nawainam kétándmé méinyotio yam némé ewafrotam fifi a mbérmbér njúnnjúnafé, a so yéném njúnnjúnofnar ménáyan sái yénmor Ngánján férfér kénjún. Folene áuwégh
english: Having therefore these promises , beloved, let ’ s cleanse ourselves from all defilement of flesh and spirit , perfecting holiness in the fear of God .

nama: Féyo yéndon yéfarotamén yéné férén féfe, yéné yau témorwén yéné téfnan emo tafrote mámáfi o emo yafrotam mámáfi. Wénde yéndon efarotamén safén yékmayén féfe, Ngánjánene sáfrére, ndernáye kénjkam féfene aramégh yém téfeyot fifi. 13 Yéné téfnan yénd yénmawéngsotayéng.
english: So although I wrote to you , I wrote not for his cause that did the wrong, nor for his cause that suffered the wrong, but that your earnest care for us might be revealed in you in the sight of God .

nama: Yénd wéi nawarawenam yau táf nawatarna ménamén yéné marataye raméghmén. 21 Yénd nawarawenam sái yafrotam némé mbarkánd yém, yau mé Yurane ghékfanro, wénde ámb árfene ghékfan wéi.
english: We are avoiding this , that any man should blame us concerning this abundance which is administered by us .

nama: Wénde ndené Buk si noraye, "Efe ménde yém tuktukot so tuktuk yéfande némé Ngánjánam ewafrote." 18 Efe efalo mer yém? Yéné yau yém ár efe nemna merro fáyo. Yéné yém ár efe Yuré nemne merro yánemén.
english: But “ he who boasts , let him boast in the Lord .”

nama: Ambinomén, tane fútaréf, yawo! Náuwetati! Nanotati sotafé. Náyáretati tane wawanjagh si. Miya em ámbiro mwighayan a krufrát emor. A Ngánjánene uwégh a krufrát so mé yém féfefaf.
english: Finally , brothers, rejoice ! Be perfected. Be comforted . Be of the same mind . Live in peace , and the God of love and peace will be with you .

nama: Áuwéghafé nafángotati féfe kénjún ásneghafé krufráte.
english: Greet one another with a holy kiss .

nama: Méinyotio Ngánjánene árém yéna enwawatembangi yéfenjo áuwégh.
english: All the saints greet you .

nama: Yuré Yesu Kerisoene ngárám, Ngánjánene uwégh a Ngánján Mbérmbéroene awarnyégh mé so yém féfefaf méinyotio.
english: The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ, God’s love, and the fellowship of the Holy Spirit be with you all. Amen.

nama: Yéné férén siyém ta tambén, Fol. Yénd wémotai ménát Yesuene muyafé árot. Yéné ásáfogh siyém yau yénmormén kétándmé ár mérénta o ároene si muyata, wénde kétamé Yesu Keriso a Afé Ngánján, emo Yesu yanoi kérta. 2 Yénd a tane fútar yénmatembangém yéné férén féfefaf, Yesuene mérén Galasia yuwomé.
english: Paul , an apostle— not from men , nor through man , but through Jesus Christ , and God the Father , who raised him from the dead —

nama: Yénd njam norayan yéné yammén, yéndon yau áuwéghét eméindan ár, wénde Ngánjánro yéndo áuwéhgét yéméindan. Njam yéndon ár áuwéghétro eméindan, féyo yénd yau so wém Kerisoene faiofnar ásáfogh ár. Ndernáye Fol namndai Yesuene muyafé ár
english: For am I now seeking the favor of men , or of God ? Or am I striving to please men ? For if I were still pleasing men , I wouldn’ t be a servant of Christ .

nama: Tane fútaréf, yénd ménde wém fém sái mat em ndené yéné mer si árké yéndo yaitotan yau ár wafroghmén yém. 12 Yéndon yau yanayén árta, o emo yau yénd watametam. Yesu Keriso fáyo nauyafoi tafaf.
english: But I make known to you , brothers, concerning the Good News which was preached by me , that it is not according to man .

nama: Njam yénd néretayén ndené yémofem yau yaitotat mer sioene efalo end, yénd norayan Fitafaf méinyotio ár sáfrére, "Fém ném Ju ár, wéndende fém kénmor ndenanit Téndo árnit, yau ndené Ju árnit. Ndernáye wéi fémon ewáfárete Téndo ár sái emor Ju árfene túmén yame?"
english: But when I saw that they didn’ t walk uprightly according to the truth of the Good News , I said to Peter before them all , “ If you , being a Jew , live as the Gentiles do , and not as the Jews do , why do you compel the Gentiles to live as the Jews do ?

nama: Kerisom té efalo yényátoyéng yuwek. Sénonjo kamndangi fém yuwek, a yau wéikor kaumbangi nákoene faiofnar sifayat.
english: Stand firm therefore in the liberty by which Christ has made us free , and don’ t be entangled again with a yoke of bondage .

nama: Fifioene wafroghyam safén em: yaufi walyam, wáiwáiyafé yam, yuwek wal, 20 mewang wáwefnogh, ghar, méndménd, amrorégh, waramnjagh, nékwro, a yandro yémanjone, ásnanégh, afalogh, 21 karogh, wériyam, yaufi téménd, a ámb mé kés engém. Yéndon ewawéngsotan sénonjo, ndené kés ewawéngsotamén fronde: emofem ewafrotat yéné yam Ngánjánam yau so tawaramangé Ngánjánene limánégh.
english: Now the deeds of the flesh are obvious , which are : adultery, sexual immorality , uncleanness, lustfulness,

nama: Sénonjo yénandmé, yau emo táf kérté warameta, ménamén yéndo ersan tane fifiyan Yesuene mbor.
english: From now on , let no one cause me any trouble , for I bear the marks of the Lord Jesus branded on my body .

nama: Yuré Yesu Kerisoene ngárám so yém féfene mbérmbérfaf, tane efalo fútaréf. Efalo.
english: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with your spirit , brothers. Amen.

nama: Yénd wém Fol, Keriso Yesuene muyafé ár efe yém Ngánjánene méndeyan. Yéndon yéfarotan yéné férén féfefaf, Ngánjánene njúnnjúnofnar árfefaf Efesos kénjún, efe em ndimbal mwighafé Keriso Yesue kénjún.
english: Paul , an apostle of Christ Jesus through the will of God , to the saints who are at Ephesus , and the faithful in Christ Jesus :

nama: Ngánján téfene Afé a Yuré Yesu Kerisom so tawaramangé féfe ngárám a krufrát. Ngánjánam té ewafrote téfeyot mer yam Keriso kénjún
english: Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ .

nama: Méinyotio yam nufrotat Ngánjánene mwighé faroréghan a méndeyan. Kerisoe kénjún Ngánjánam yénmaferyéng yánjo árot yánjo méndeyan. Yéné témorwén némé yémon mwighé yafrotam kétándmé rényéghan, 12 ménát ndené yénd yénmormén fronde ekmayém téfene méghmégh Keriso kénjún, yénd mété yéném Ngánjánene ndimbal yétkwén uyoghét!
english: We were also assigned an inheritance in him , having been foreordained according to the purpose of him who does all things after the counsel of his will ,

nama: Yuyotam Ngánján. Yáne wafté násáfote téfene kénjún. Yéné waftayam ewainde téfene matyam. Yéné wafté árkéméné nemnam a yamnendam yau so taindangé Ngánjánene wafté. 21 Yuyotam Ngánján ndimbalkéraye Yesuene mérnan a wéi Keriso Yesuene kénjún méinyotio ár sata kénjúmé, tuot! Efalo.
english: Now to him who is able to do exceedingly abundantly above all that we ask or think , according to the power that works in us ,

nama: Yénd ámbiroámbiroam té ewanayém tambén fénatayero Kerisoeta. 8 Ndené Buk si noraye, "Fá njam tukét nénguyoi, yémon engwasroi tárfár ár efe yémon té eumbai, yémon ewarametam tambén yáne árét."
english: But to each one of us , the grace was given according to the measure of the gift of Christ .

nama: Wéndende, mer a ghérghérsisé tikfafé aem ámb árfé, a mwighafnar yaufi ewitati ámb árfene, ndené fété Ngánján té yawalindai Kerisoe kénjúmé féfene yaufiyam.
english: And be kind to one another , tender hearted, forgiving each other , just as God also in Christ forgave you .

nama: Fém Ngánjánene tikfafé ambumtértér em, fémofem so fété ewafrotati ndené Ngánjánam kés ewafrote. 2 Féfene ghérsé ayélimnda uwégham, ndené fété Kerisom yénmuwetam yénd a yéramai yánjo ghérsé téfeyot nénamndai méndefé wimafé ghéngén ramégh Ngánjánene áuwéghafé.
english: Be therefore imitators of God , as beloved children .

nama: Yénémaménnde, kor so fété em ménamén ndernáye fém emor. Yau emor ndenanit káfetafnar árnit, wénde káfeté árnit. 16 Ewafrotati merkéráye méinyotio ásáfogh féfene kés em, ménamén yéné sem yaufi efogh. 17 Yau aem fifiofnar, fété so mat náyátotati Yurane ménde némé yém féfe wafroghét.
english: Therefore watch carefully how you walk , not as unwise, but as wise ,

nama: Náyáretati féfe kénjún ménamén fémofem yutémndati Keriso ndené fété féfene Yuré.
english: subjecting yourselves to one another in the fear of Christ .

nama: Ambumtértér, eyáretati féfene afaf a amaf Yurane kénjún, yéné siyém mbarkánd. 2 Yéné siyém fronde nák unyéghofnar siafé "Eutémanwé fenjo afé a amé 3 ménát feyot merro so yéngém, a fémon so yayamnete tombé ghérsé ámnjogh mbandan."
english: Children , obey your parents in the Lord , for this is right .

nama: Afaf a amaf, yau eusérmbotati féfene ambumtértér yéné yame árké yamam so eméindat nékwot. Wénde ewanotati Yurane watameghe a wawéngsoghe. Faiofnar ásáfogh ár a yuraf
english: You fathers , don’ t provoke your children to wrath , but nurture them in the discipline and instruction of the Lord .

nama: Yuraf, ndenéyameyo nawarawenati féfenjo faiofnar ásáfogh árfefaf a yau eusérmbotati. Nawafarotati ndené fém a féfene faiofnar ásáfogh árfé ámbiro Yuré ewam njafaran, emo yau yuyafote witmaro ménde yam a mogh. Méinyotio Ngánjánene asmégh rokar
english: You masters , do the same things to them , and give up threatening, knowing that he who is both their Master and yours is in heaven , and there is no partiality with him .

nama: Tukikus yém téfene tikfafé fútar a Yurane ndimbal mwighé kér ro faiofnar ásáfogh ár. Yémon so ewaufrote méinyotio si tanemén, ménát mat so em yéndon némé yafrotan a yénd ndernáye wém. 22 Yéné téfnan yéndon yénmáfáretan fá féfefaf, ndené fém mat so em yénd ndernáye yéném, a ndené fém so ewawéngsote.
english: But that you also may know my affairs , how I am doing , Tychicus , the beloved brother and faithful servant in the Lord , will make known to you all things .

nama: Ngánján Afam a Yuré Yesu Kerisom méinyotio efalo yátogh árfet so tawaramangé krufrát a uwégh ndimbal mwighafé. 24 Ngánjánene ngárám so yém méinyotio yéfefaf emofem yuwetat téfene Yuré Yesu Keriso kérofnar uwéghe.
english: Peace be to the brothers, and love with faith , from God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ .

nama: Yénd wém Fol, Timoti a yénd yénre Keriso Yesuene faiofnar ásáfogh téfnár. Yénd, Fol, yéfarotan yéné férén kétán méinyotio Ngánjánene njúnnjúnofnar ár Yesu Keriso kénjún kété Filifi, mérne yémafé Yesuene mérnafene sénko árfé a ndikun.
english: Paul and Timothy , servants of Jesus Christ , to all the saints in Christ Jesus who are at Philippi , with the overseers and servants :

nama: Ngánján téfene Afé a Yuré Yesu Kerisom so ewaramete ngárám a krufrát féfeyot. Folém kánjo yaramai Ngánjáne efalo yátogh árfenemén Filifiyan
english: Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ .

nama: Yéné yém mbarkánd ménamén yénd nemnan yéné ende ménamén méinyotio féfenemén, ménamén fém em tane tikfan. Fém em Ngánjánene ngáráman yéndfé njam yénd wém umbéghkaf seine o yamarotan a efalo yiyátotan mer si. 8 Ngánján mat yém ndernáye yénd náronjan méinyotio féfenemén ménáye Yesu Kerisoene uwéghe.
english: It is even right for me to think this way on behalf of all of you , because I have you in my heart , because both in my bonds and in the defense and confirmation of the Good News , you all are partakers with me of grace .

nama: Féfene yam wafrogh ndenéyameyo fiya tam Keriso Yesuene:
english: Have this in your mind , which was also in Christ Jesus ,

nama: Keriso témorwén efalofifi Ngánján, wénde fá yau kaneghau fáyo ménát ámbrérero sái tárwén Ngánjánafé.
english: who , existing in the form of God , didn’ t consider equality with God a thing to be grasped,

nama: Wénde yémo yénéfrangoi yánjo sifayé Ngánjánefaf a nénamndai fáyo yauyau. Fá té náráftam sái témorwén ár a nénamndai ndenanit faiofnar ásáfogh téfnár.
english: but emptied himself , taking the form of a servant , being made in the likeness of men .

nama: Fá nénamndai árfifi a témorwén yuwan ghérsafé, yémo taitotatau Ngánjánene ménde ndemamén kér tésérmbnau, fá kér yémormén wafatarégh wénan.
english: And being found in human form, he humbled himself , becoming obedient to the point of death , yes , the death of the cross .

nama: Féyo Ngánjánam yaramai Kerisoe tukénfifi sifayé a yaramai yétkwén árkéménayém ndimbalfifi, yéné yétkwénam ewainde ámb méinyotio yétkwén.
english: Therefore God also highly exalted him , and gave to him the name which is above every name ,

nama: Yénémamén, Yesuene yétkwénoe méinyotio ár so budéme yawefnetat, efe em njafaran, mbandan, a mbandoene mbanmbanan,
english: that at the name of Jesus every knee should bow , of those in heaven , those on earth , and those under the earth ,

nama: a méinyotio kankayam so yémndetat, "Yesu Keriso siyém Yuré!" ménát Afé Ngánjánene minde ndimbalot. Natremngotati ndenanit kénd kwayaghé mband maratan
english: and that every tongue should confess that Jesus Christ is Lord , to the glory of God the Father .

nama: Méinyotio efe yénd yéném mbérmbére anoghkaf fai kemnangém yéné ende wéi. A njam fémofem nemnati fénatayero yéné yammén, Ngánjánam so ekmete safén féfeyot. 16 Wénde yéndfem fiya mé táitotangém efalo si árkéméné Ngánjánjam té yénmaramai.
english: Let us therefore , as many as are perfect , think this way . If in anything you think otherwise , God will also reveal that to you .

nama: Yénémaménnde, tane fútaréf, fém yéndon efe euwetan a karonjan fandaghét, tane áuwégh a ákiki, yakai taikrataye Yurane kénjún yéné endén.
english: Therefore , my brothers, beloved and longed for , my joy and crown , stand firm in the Lord in this way , my beloved.

nama: Téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene ngárám so yém féfefaf méinyotio. Efalo.
english: The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ be with you all . Amen.

nama: Yénd wém Fol, Keriso Yesuene muyafé ár Ngánjánene méndeyan, Timoti téfene fútarfé yénre.
english: Paul , an apostle of Christ Jesus through the will of God , and Timothy our brother,

nama: Yéndfem yéfarowam yéné férén kétán Ngánjánene njúnnjúnofnar árfefaf Kolosia kénjún, efe em téfene ndimbal mwighafé fútar Kerisoene kénjún: Téfene Afé Ngánjánam so tawaramangé ngárám a krufrát féfeyot. Folém kánjo si tarametau Ngánjáne Kolosia efalo yátogh árfenemén
english: to the saints and faithful brothers in Christ at Colossae : Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ .

nama: Fémofem té yanayénd Keriso Yesu ndené fété Yuré. Yénémaménnde, ménjtaye aemor yáne kénjún. 7 Sérémb yéghkaf aem a erametati féfenjo ghérsé yáne kénjún, muyé résagh ndimbal mwighayan ndernáye fém té enwatametamén, a túmén aem kánjo ramégh ár.
english: As therefore you received Christ Jesus the Lord , walk in him ,

nama: Kor aem emo yau táf elimnda ménaye unyéghe a fifiofnar watameghe, árké em árfene wafroghmén a yéné mband maratmén wénde yau yéné eném Kerisoe tambén.
english: Be careful that you don’ t let anyone rob you through his philosophy and vain deceit, after the tradition of men , after the elemental spirits of the world , and not after Christ .

nama: Amaf, náyáretati féfenjo árfefaf, yénéfai fémofem tawafrotangi ndené fété efalo yátogh ár.
english: Wives , be in subjection to your husbands, as is fitting in the Lord .

nama: Ár, euwetati féfenjo amaf a yau táf tékrát em yéfefaf.
english: Husbands, love your wives , and don’ t be bitter against them .

nama: Ambum, eyáretati féfene afaf a amaf méinyotio efghon, yénayan náuwete Yuré.
english: Children , obey your parents in all things , for this pleases the Lord .

nama: Afaf a amaf, yau nékwot eméindati ambumtértér, o fá so kuwembangi.
english: Fathers , don’ t provoke your children , so that they won’ t be discouraged.

nama: Yuré, ewawafrotati féfenjo faiofnar ásáfogh árét mbarkándaye a ámbrérero, ménamén fém mat em ndené féfene Yuré wéi kété yém njafaran. Wéikor waufarogh yam
english: Masters , give to your servants that which is just and equal , knowing that you also have a Master in heaven .

nama: Soramé fémofem yaftati yéné férén, mat aem ndené yaftati wéi Laodikia Yesuene mérnan. Yéné efghonyo, yaftati tane férén efalo yátogh árét Laodikia yuwon yémofem so tawawatembangi féfe.
english: When this letter has been read among you , cause it to be read also in the assembly of the Laodiceans , and that you also read the letter from Laodicea .

nama: Taufrongi Akifuse: "Sia tifongé yéné ásáfogh árké Yuram yéramai fe."
english: Tell Archippus, “ Take heed to the ministry which you have received in the Lord , that you fulfill it .”

nama: Yénd, Fol, yéfarotan yéné ásneghafé si tanjo ngángaye. Wafarotati Ngánjánafé orayégh tayot njam yénd wém kwéfkwéf méngon. Ngárám so yém féfefaf.
english: I , Paul , write this greeting with my own hand . Remember my chains . Grace be with you . Amen.

nama: Yéné férén siyém yéfeta Fol, Sailes a Timoti. Yéndfem yéfarotam yéné kétán Tesalonika árfefaf efe em Afé Ngánján a Yuré Yesu Keriso kénjún. So ngárám a krufrát yém féfeyot. Kánjo ramégh yéfeyot Tesalonika árfeyot ndimbal mwighamén
english: Paul , Silvanus , and Timothy , to the assembly of the Thessalonians in God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ : Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ .

nama: Fútaréf, wifoghan yéndfem ewatametamém ndernáye fém so emor ménát Ngánján áuwéghét sái yéméindati, ndené fété fém kés emor. Sénonjo yéndfem ewamnendam fém a ewendam fém Yuré Yesuene yétkwénan ménát sái yafrotati túmén. 2 Ménamén fém mat em némé yéndfem ewatametamém fém ménaye Yuré Yesuene muyaye.
english: Finally then , brothers, we beg and exhort you in the Lord Jesus , that as you received from us how you ought to walk and to please God , that you abound more and more .

nama: Fútaréf, utémndati fá efe em féfene limánégh ár Yurane ásáfogh kénjún. Fá minde násáfotat féfene kénjún a ewarametat mbérmbére wamarogh. 13 Ewauyafotati ndimbal utmanégh a uwégh ménamén yéfene ásáfoghmén. Krufrát ghérsaye aemor.
english: But we beg you , brothers, to know those who labor among you , and are over you in the Lord and admonish you ,

nama: Fútaréf, yéndfem ewamnendam fém so ewendam efe em imángéghofnar. So ewawéngsotam efe férfér em. So ewáutánam efe em njangénnjangén. Métar aem méinyotio árfé. 15 Ndené yaufie yau so néwangotati, wénde túmén mer ewafrotati ámb árét a méinyotio árét.
english: We exhort you , brothers: Admonish the disorderly; encourage the faint-hearted; support the weak; be patient toward all .

nama: So Ngánjánam emo ténmaramangé téfe krufrát táyátongé fém njúnnjúnofnar méinyotio yaman. So ewarawene féfene mbérmbér, mwighé a fifi téfnofnar táf téfene Yuré Yesu Keriso yáne angoghan. 24 Ngánjánam so ewafrote yéné yam, ménamén Ngánján emo fém emotai siyém ndimbal mwighé kér ro.
english: May the God of peace himself sanctify you completely . May your whole spirit , soul , and body be preserved blameless at the coming of our Lord Jesus Christ .

nama: Téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene ngárám so yém féfefaf.
english: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you . Amen.

nama: Yéné férén siyém yéfeta Fol, Sailes a Timoti. Yéndfem yéfarotam yéné kétán Yesuene mérénfaf Tesalonika kénjún téfene Afé Ngánján a Yuré Yesu Keriso kénjún:
english: Paul , Silvanus , and Timothy , to the assembly of the Thessalonians in God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ :

nama: So Afé Ngánjánam a Yuré Yesu Kerisom tawaramangé ngárám a krufrát féfeyot. Kánjo ramégh a orayégh Ngánjánefaf
english: Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ .

nama: Tane fútaréf, méinyotio yéné aem mwighayan, taikre ewakai a kawerangi taikrataye yénayan méinyotio yéndfem némé tawatametam fém si afroghe a férne.
english: So then , brothers, stand firm and hold the traditions which you were taught by us , whether by word or by letter .

nama: So téfene Yuré Yesu Keriso a Ngánján téfene Afé, emo yénmuwetam yénd a yáne ngáráme yénmaramai tuot akegh wáutárégh a mer méghmégh, 17 ewamarotati féfenjo tikéf a so ewaramete muyé méinyotio meryam kénjún fémofem némé ewafrotati a norayati.
english: Now our Lord Jesus Christ himself, and God our Father , who loved us and gave us eternal comfort and good hope through grace ,

nama: Kor efandati yéné ár efe nakenat áyárghét némé yénd norayam téfene férnan. Nayu kéráye aem yéfe tambén ménát fá so wáiwáiam tawifongé. 15 Yau efandati ndené fene mék téfnár em, wénde ewawéngsotati ndené fété efalo yátogh ár em. Folene ambinomén ásneghafé si
english: If any man doesn’ t obey our word in this letter , note that man and have no company with him , to the end that he may be ashamed .

nama: So krufrát Yuram yémonyo túmén ewaramete féfe yánjo krufrát méinyotio efghon a méinyotio yam kénjún. So Yuré yém féfefaf méinyotio.
english: Now may the Lord of peace himself give you peace at all times in all ways. The Lord be with you all .

nama: Yéna yém tane ásneghafé si árké yém tane ngángé faroghmén. Folém, yéndo túmén yéné ténjfi férén táf efarotan kerkeran méinyotio férnan ménát yéné yam so efalo wiyátote ndené yéné férén ta tambén fété eném.
english: I , Paul , write this greeting with my own hand , which is the sign in every letter . This is how I write .

nama: Téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene ngárám so yém méinyotio féfeyot.
english: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you all . Amen.

nama: Yénd wém Fol, Keriso Yesuene muyafé ár, wafaretai téfene Wanjarégh ár Ngánjánam a Keriso Yesum téfene méghmégh,
english: Paul , an apostle of Jesus Christ according to the commandment of God our Savior and the Lord Jesus Christ our hope ,

nama: Yéndo yéfarotam kétán Timoti, tane efalo ambum ndimbal mwighé kénjún: Afé Ngánjánam a Keriso Yesu téfene Yuram so ewaramete ngárám, ghérghérsisé a krufrát. Unyégh watameghmén
english: to Timothy , my true child in faith : Grace , mercy , and peace from God our Father and Christ Jesus our Lord .

nama: Dikun ndenáyo aem mer wafroghyamafé aem efalofifi; yémofem yau so enetat wéri nu mindefifi o em nité manian. 9 Fá so nawéretat efalo sian ndimbal mwighamén ménáyafé kwayaghé emaréghafé. 10 Fá fété aeufotat fronde, a féyo njam yémofem taindangi ufogh yam, fá so násáfotat.
english: Servants , in the same way , must be reverent, not double-tongued , not addicted to much wine , not greedy for money,

nama: Yau yusérmbota bulu, wénde noraya utmanégh ende ndené fété fene afé kar yém. Ewarena totér ambum ndenáye fenjo fútar em, 2 buluausé ndenáye amaf kar em, a totér amaf ndené fene mérés kar em, ménaye méinyotio mere.
english: Don’t rebuke an older man , but exhort him as a father ; the younger men as brothers;

nama: Yau tafény ámb kwiré kwirafene yétkwénfaf téfandro fá njam yém 60 yunjéf, a fá ayém ámbirotaro ár awerégh ár 10 a árém témndetat yémon tawafrote meryam: amaf emo tawanote yánjo ambumtértér, mere taumyote wan téfnár yáne méngon, tawafrote métar ásáfogh ámb efalo yátogh árét, tawáutáne ár kértayan, a naramai fáyo kétán mer ásáfoghfaf.
english: Let no one be enrolled as a widow under sixty years old , having been the wife of one man ,

nama: Yau nuro so yénete, wénde némbne wéri nu so téneta ndené fété murémuré ménamén fém túmén enjne ném.
english: Be no longer a drinker of water only , but use a little wine for your stomach ’s sake and your frequent infirmities.

nama: Ámb árfene yaufiyam em méinyo fandagh safén, a yéfene yaufiyam engém fronde moghfaf, wénde ámb árfene yaufiyam fandaghét em soramé. 25 Ndené yameyo mer wafroghyam fandaghét em mé safénro, a ndenáyo yéné árké yau em safénro yau so atnoghe em.
english: Some men ’s sins are evident , preceding them to judgment , and some also follow later.

nama: Emo njam ewatameta fénatayo si a yau natemnda efalo sifaf téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene a watameghfaf téfene ngánján ghérsamén 4 fá sem tuktuk ár em a mat yau em yénémamén. Fá sem wasnengégh mwighafé éwighét a amrorghét simén, a yéné yamam yénérse waramnjagh, asénanégh, yaufi si orayégh, mé fayogh, 5 a túmén éwigh yam eném kétándmé yéné árta endefene mer mwighé yau násáfotat a endefaf yau efalo em. Fá nemnat ndené ngánján ghérsé yame kar yém wemár.
english: If anyone teaches a different doctrine and doesn’ t consent to sound words , the words of our Lord Jesus Christ , and to the doctrine which is according to godliness ,

nama: Timoti, ewarawena némé té eraman fene ngángat. Nawarawena fifiofnar a mwighafnar amroréghta némé unyéghe ámb ár norayat ndené, "Matyam" 21 Ámb ár norayat té yanangém, wénde yénayoene fifi yémofem té téláitat ndimbal mwighane end. Ngánjánene ngárám so yém féfefaf méinyotio.
english: Timothy , guard that which is committed to you , turning away from the empty chatter and oppositions of what is falsely called knowledge ,

nama: Yénd wém Fol, Keriso Yesuene muyafé ár Ngánjánene méndeyan wénmafaretam unyéghofnar ghérsé si afroghét árké yém Keriso Yesue kénjún,
english: Paul , an apostle of Jesus Christ through the will of God , according to the promise of the life which is in Christ Jesus ,

nama: Kétán Timoti, tane tikfafé ambum: Afé Ngánján a Keriso Yesu téfene Yuram so kémaramangé ngárám, ghérghérsisé, a krufrát. Kánjo ramégh a wawéngsogh yam
english: to Timothy , my beloved child : Grace , mercy , and peace , from God the Father and Christ Jesus our Lord .

nama: Ngánjánam té waferyéng yénd ndené fété Yesuene muyafé ár a watamegh ár ménát mer si waitoghét, 12 féyo yéné téfnan ndené yénd wém tékratan yéné yammén. Wénde yénd mé táikér mwighafé wém, ménamén yénd mat wém yéndon efe efalo yiyátotan, a yénd mé mat wém ndené fá féyotaro yém yémon so warawene némé yémon té yiyátoi tayot kétánotio Yesuene angoghot.
english: For this I was appointed as a preacher , an apostle, and a teacher of the Gentiles.

nama: Taikrataye nawereta efalo sian ndené yéndon kés kématametan, ndené fété kés kénmaufarotan fe ménát waitoghét, a kawer taikrataye ndimbal mwighayan a uwéghan Keriso Yesu kénjún. 14 Ngánján Mbérmbér wafté kénjúmé, efe yémor téfe kénjún, ewarawena yéné meryam árké té eramayén feyot.
english: Hold the pattern of sound words which you have heard from me , in faith and love which is in Christ Jesus .

nama: Tane ambum, muyafé aném ngárám kénjún árké yém Keriso Yesu kénjún. 2 Tawanang watamegh si ndené fémon kés kwiyárete si waitoghan tárfár ghékéf fandagh ár sáfrére, a engéumyotan fá kétán ndimbal mwighé kér ro árfefaf, emofem wéi so engwatametat ámb ár.
english: You therefore , my child , be strengthened in the grace that is in Christ Jesus .

nama: Yéné si siyém efalo: "Njam yénd té kér téném yémafé, yénd so ndenáyo naketam yémafé.
english: This saying is trustworthy : “ For if we died with him , we will also live with him .

nama: Njam yénd mé yénngérnyang métaran, yénd mé so ndenáyo limánéghan yéném yémafé. Njam yéndfem tékenangém fá, yémo ndenáyo so ténkenangé yénd.
english: If we endure , we will also reign with him . If we deny him , he also will deny us .

nama: Njam yénd yau ndimbal mwighé kér ro yéném, fá mé yakai ndimbal mwighé kér ro, ménamén fáyo yau so nawawinde. Efalo yátoghkaf ásáfogh ár
english: If we are faithless, he remains faithful ; for he can ’t deny himself .”

nama: Aleksenda tot téfén ásáfogh ár yénd yémon tárfár ende kwaghne. Yuram so taramangé yáne fai ndené fété némé yémo té tafrote. 15 Aya kor anawarawena yánemén fémyo, ménamén yémon tékarotau mindefifi téfene si.
english: Alexander the coppersmith did much evil to me . The Lord will repay him according to his deeds .

nama: Yuré so yém fene mbérmbéran. Ngánjánene ngárám so yém féfefaf méinyotio.
english: The Lord Jesus Christ be with your spirit . Grace be with you . Amen.

nama: Yéné férén siyém kétamé Fol, Ngánjánene faiofnar ásáfogh ár a Yesu Kerisoene muyafé ár.
english: Paul , a servant of God and an apostle of Jesus Christ , according to the faith of God ’s chosen ones and the knowledge of the truth which is according to godliness ,

nama: árké yém téfén méghmégh tuot ghérsat. Ngánján, efe yau nuinde, unyéghofnar si yénémndai fronde ufroghan. 3 A yáne waferégh efghon yémon safot yékmai yáne si kénjún. Yéné yékmai tafaf, a yéndo táitotawén ndené fété Ngánján téfene Wanjarégh árom té norayai.
english: in hope of eternal life , which God , who can’ t lie, promised before time began ;

nama: Yéndon férén yéngfarotan fefaf, Taitus, tane efalo ambum ndimbal mwighayan téfene árké yénmam. Ngárám a krufrát so yém kétándmé Ngánján Afé a Keriso Yesu téfene Wanjarégh ár. Taitus násáfotam kété Kreten
english: to Titus , my true child according to a common faith : Grace , mercy, and peace from God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ our Savior .

nama: Faiofnar ásáfogh ár so fété em áyárégh ár yéfenjo yurafefaf a remngogh ár méinyotio yaman. Yémofem yau so ewawangotat yéfenjo yurafet 10 o yau so oro nufrotat. Wénde fá táf nauyafotat ndené fá mer a efalo yátogh kér ro em, ménamén yéfene mer yammén, méinyotio árém so yuyafotat ndimbal utmanégh Ngánjánene watameghmén téfene Wanjarégh ár.
english: Exhort servants to be in subjection to their own masters and to be well-pleasing in all things , not contradicting,

nama: Ewatameta yéné yam a yafrota fenjo méinyotio muyaye ménát wawéngsoghét a mbarkánd yátoghét fenjo ár. Árké árom yau so nérete yuwot fefaf.
english: Say these things and exhort and reprove with all authority . Let no one despise you .

nama: Méinyotio efe em yéna yéndfé kasnetangi fém. Tasnetangi téfene fútaréf ndimbal mwighaye. Ngánjánene ngárám so yém féfefaf méinyotio.
english: All who are with me greet you . Greet those who love us in faith . Grace be with you all . Amen.

nama: Yéné férén siyém kétamé yénd, Fol. Yénd wém kwéfkwéf méngon ménamén yénd násáfotan Keriso Yesue. Téfene fútar Timoti yéna yém yéndfé.
english: Paul , a prisoner of Christ Jesus , and Timothy our brother, to Philemon , our beloved fellow worker ,

nama: a yáfaf Afiya téfene mérés, yáfaf Akifus téfene fiyaré, a wéi Yesuene mérén árfefaf efe náumendat fene méngon:
english: to the beloved Apphia, to Archippus our fellow soldier , and to the assembly in your house :

nama: Ngárám a krufrát so yém feyot téfene Afé Ngánjáneta a Yuré Yesu Keriso. Folene kánjo ramégh a Ngánjánafé orayégh
english: Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ .

nama: Áuwégh si féfeyot kétamé Efafras, yéndfé emafé yényaweyayénd kwéfkwéf méngon Keriso Yesuene téfnan, 24 a kétamé Mak, Aristakus, Demas a Luk, tane mérne ásáfogh ár.
english: Epaphras , my fellow prisoner in Christ Jesus , greets you ,

nama: Ngárám so yém téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene féfefaf méinyotio.
english: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with your spirit . Amen.

nama: Ngánjánam yau yémndai ámb njafar si résagh ár, "Fém ném tane Ambum; sénonjo yénd té nénamndan fene Afé"? o wéikor, "Yénd so wém yáne Afé, a fá so yém tane Ambum"?
english: For to which of the angels did he say at any time , “ You are my Son . Today I have become your father ?” + 1:5 Psalms 2:7 and again , “ I will be to him a Father , and he will be to me a Son ?” + 1:5 2 Samuel 7:14; 1 Chronicles 17:13

nama: A wéikor, táf Ngánjánam njam ténramangé yánjo fronde sénko Ambum yénan mbandot, fá noraye, "Méinyotio Ngánjánene njafar si résagh árém so yáwefnotat!"
english: When he again brings in the firstborn into the world he says , “ Let all the angels of God worship him .”

nama: Ngánján noraye njafar si résagh árfenemén ndené yéné, "Yémo eyátote yánjo njafar si résagh ár ndené mbormbornit, a yánjo faiofnar ásáfogh ár fés kánkékánkénit, "
english: Of the angels he says , “ He makes his angels winds , and his servants a flame of fire .” + 1:7 Psalms 104:4

nama: Wénde Ambummén fá noraye, "Fene limánégh ámnjogh sifayé, o Ngánján, so nakete tuot. a fémon so yélimnde Ngánján limánégh mbarkánd wétuafé
english: But of the Son he says, “ Your throne , O God , is forever and ever . The scepter of uprightness is the scepter of your Kingdom.

nama: Fémo té yuwetam mbarkánd yam a méndméndat yéfandam yaufi yam, yénémaménnde, O Ngánján, fene Ngánjánam, té néfagharyéng fém, a yéméindai fene yékwén nénamndai ndimbal a fémo yayarai ndimbal áuwégh. Fene yétkwénam ewainde méinyotio fene fútarfene.
english: You have loved righteousness and hated iniquity; therefore God , your God , has anointed you with the oil of gladness above your fellows .” + 1:9 Psalms 45:6-7

nama: Fá wéi noraye, "Ufroghan, Yuré, fémo yékmai mband maratoene téfén a njafar em fene ngángé ásáfoghmén.
english: And , “ You , Lord , in the beginning, laid the foundation of the earth . The heavens are the works of your hands .

nama: Njafar a mband so kolindangi, wénde fém so nakete, njafar a mband so méinyotio kényáyátongi tándáwár sálámenit.
english: They will perish, but you continue . They all will grow old like a garment does.

nama: Fémo so ekéne fá ndenanit ángégh, sálámenit fá so tawengo. Wénde fém ném ndenaro, a fene yunjéf yau so kefongi."
english: You will roll them up like a mantle , and they will be changed; but you are the same . Your years won’ t fail .” + 1:12 Psalms 102:25-27

nama: Yau Ngánján ámb norayai njafar si résagh árfefaf, wénde yánjo Ambumoefaf, "Kámnjo tane tambén ngángata kétánotio yéndon tákman fene mék téfnár fene kafkaf mbanmbanan"
english: But which of the angels has he told at any time , “ Sit at my right hand , until I make your enemies the footstool of your feet ?” + 1:13 Psalms 110:1

nama: Wénde méinyotio njafar si résagh ár sem mé faiofnar ásáfogh ár. Fá sem mbérmbér eném kétamé Ngánjáne tambén ménát wáutárghét yéfeyot emofem so tawanangi wanjarégh.
english: Aren’ t they all serving spirits , sent out to do service for the sake of those who will inherit salvation ?

nama: Ngánjánam yau ekmai njafar si résagh ár ménát sái yélimndat soramé yu árké yéném-árké mband maratmén yénd norayam. 6 Wénde ámb sifayan Buk si kénjún noraye: "O Ngánján, némé ár em fém snemne yéfenemén, o ndené ároene ambum fémo sái yarawena?
english: For he didn’ t subject the world to come , of which we speak , to angels.

nama: Fémo yékmai fá njafar si résagh árfene yuwan tekofnarot. A fémo utémnde a yaramai yá ndimbal kwayaghaye.
english: You made him a little lower than the angels. You crowned him with glory and honor . + 2:7 TR adds “and set him over the works of your hands”

nama: Wénde yéndfem yéfandam Yesu. Ngánjánam tekofnarot yiyátoi Yesu yuwan njafar si résagh árfeta. Sénonjo yéfandam ndené Ngánjánam té yaram Yesue ndimbal kwayaghé a utmanégh ménamén yánjo kéran tékrát yéfandam, ménát Ngánjánene ngáráme yémo so tufongai kér méinyotio árét.
english: But we see him who has been made a little lower than the angels, Jesus , because of the suffering of death crowned with glory and honor , that by the grace of God he should taste of death for everyone .

nama: Yéné mé mbarkánd témorwén ndené Ngánján, endeyot a emo yafrotam méinyotio rokar, so enérse yánjo tárfár ambum ndimbal kwayaghat Yesuene tékrát kénjúmé. Ngánjánam yiyátoi Yesu féwénféwénofnar limánégh ár, efe féyotaro yém sái enérsa fá wanjaréghét.
english: For it became him , for whom are all things and through whom are all things , in bringing many children to glory , to make the author of their salvation perfect through sufferings .

nama: Sénonjo Yesu a fá efe eyátote njúnnjúnofnar ewam ámbiro Afé. Yénémamén Yesu yau yém wáiwáiyafé sái emndeta fá yáne fútar. 12 Fá norayai Ngánjánefaf, "Yéndon so marat tiyáton fene mer yétkwén yéfeyot tane árét; Yéndon so némuyotan fém fene méinyotio ár kénjúmé.
english: For both he who sanctifies and those who are sanctified are all from one , for which cause he is not ashamed to call them brothers,

nama: Fá wéi norayai, "Yéndon so efalo yiyátotan fá." A yéné sieyo fá norayai, "Yéna yénd wém mérne yémafé ambumtértér Ngánjánam árké waramai ta."
english: Again , “ I will put my trust in him .” Again , “ Behold , here I am with the children whom God has given me .”

nama: Yénémamén Ngánján Mbérmbér noraye, "Sénonjo fém njam náyáretati yáne kém,
english: Therefore , even as the Holy Spirit says , “ Today if you will hear his voice ,

nama: yau eyátotati táikér féfenjo tikéf yá tambén, ndené Israil skufrotawét njam yau káyáretawét, njam yémofem tufotawét Ngánjánene métar kété fanfne yuwon.
english: don’ t harden your hearts as in the rebellion, in the day of the trial in the wilderness ,

nama: Ánde féfene ákiam kwufotawét yénd ndemamén yémofem téfandawét némé yéndon tafrotawén yéné 40 yunjfan.
english: where your fathers tested me and tried me , and saw my deeds for forty years .

nama: Yéné téfnan yénd kwémorwén nékw yéné ár sátafaf; a yénd korayawén, 'Yéfene tikéf sem túmén nayu, a fá yau mat náyátongi tane end.'
english: Therefore I was displeased with that generation , and said , ‘ They always err in their heart , but they didn’ t know my ways .’

nama: Tane nékwan yéndo tafrotan unyéghofnar si, "Fá yau so kényawangi tane enagh sifayat."
english: As I swore in my wrath , ‘ They will not enter into my rest .’” + 3:11 Psalms 95:7-11

nama: Ámb sifayan fá té noraye ménamén 7 efoghmén Ngánjánene si kénjún: "Yéné 7 efghon Ngánján nenam kétamé méinyotio yánjo ásáfoghta." 5 A wéikor ámb si ménjan fá noraye, "Fá yau so kélawangi tane enaghfaf."
english: For he has said this somewhere about the seventh day , “ God rested on the seventh day from all his works ;”

nama: Ndené yameyo, Keriso yau kawarmbotau fáyo ménát sái kénamndangai limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár. Wénde Ngánjánam yémndai fá, "Fém ném tane Ambum, sénonjo efghon yénd té nénamndan fene Afé."
english: So also Christ didn’ t glorify himself to be made a high priest, but it was he who said to him , “ You are my Son . Today I have become your father .” + 5:5 Psalms 2:7

nama: Fá wéi noraye ámb sifayan, "Fém ném ghéngén wárogh ár tuot ndené Melkisedek."
english: As he says also in another place , “ You are a priest forever , after the order of Melchizedek .” + 5:6 Psalms 110:4

nama: Mband árkéménayam yénete nu afaméghmén táf njam nuite kétán a árkéménayam efune mbwe fifiotio yéfeyot endefeyot eitaménd, yéné siyém Ngánjánene frengégh yém. 8 Wénde mband árkéménayam yéfune wétwét a yus téfnat, siyém fifiofnar. Ngánjánam so tekofnar tafalngongé yéné mband. Soramé so nakérne fésén.
english: For the land which has drunk the rain that comes often on it and produces a crop suitable for them for whose sake it is also tilled , receives blessing from God ;

nama: Ngánjánam té ewitérmboi tándáwár nák ménamén ghéngén wároghmén, ménamén yéné nák namndai muyafnar, féyo yéné féyotarofnar témorwén téfe wáutárghét. 19 Nákam yau yiyátoi féwénféwénofnar. A sénonjo mer méghmégham té néusénam yéné kénjúmé árkéménáyan yénd yéném kaka Ngánjánefaf.
english: For there is an annulling of a foregoing commandment because of its weakness and uselessness

nama: Kété wéi yém Ngánjánene sotafé si. Kété yau em ndené sotafé si njam ámb ár eyátoyéng ghéngén wárogh ár. 21 Wénde Yesu namndai ghéngén wárogh ár sotafé sie njam Ngánján noraye yáfaf, "Yuram té yafrotam sotafé si a yau so térafarngé yánjo unyéghofnar si: 'Fém ném ghéngén wárogh ár tuot.'"
english: Inasmuch as he was not made priest without the taking of an oath

nama: Ménamén Ngánjánene sotafé simén, Yesu yéné féyém emo yafrotam mer árnyégh sái kufrotau.
english: By so much , Jesus has become the guarantee of a better covenant .

nama: Yéné siyém si téfén: Téfene té yém Limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár, efe námnjoi limánégh ámnjogh sifayan kété njafaran kétamé Ngánjánene tambén ngángata. 2 Fá násáfote ndené fété limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár Minde Njúnnjúnofnar sifayan, efalo farai méngon árkéméné yérametam Yuram, yau ár ngángayam.
english: Now in the things which we are saying , the main point is this : we have such a high priest, who sat down on the right hand of the throne of the Majesty in the heavens ,

nama: Njam fronde árnyégh témorwén téfnofnar, kété wéi yau so témorwén ámb ménde ménát yénamayomén árnyégh sái tasongai yáne sifayan. 8 Wénde Ngánjánam yémonyo yinjoi téfén yánjo árfefaf a norayai: "Yuré noraye, 'Efogh so yéném, njam yéndon so yérametan totér árnyégh yémafé Israil árfé a Judamén árfé.
english: For if that first covenant had been faultless, then no place would have been sought for a second .

nama: Yéné árnyégh yau so ndené yém yéndon sirametamén yéfene ákiafé njam yéndon tarsawén fá ngángaye a elimayén kétamé Ijif mbandta. Fá yau kawéretawét ndimbal mwighaye kétán tane árnyéghfaf, féyo yéndon ewawengoyén tane sém yéfeyot.
english: not according to the covenant that I made with their fathers in the day that I took them by the hand to lead them out of the land of Egypt; for they didn’ t continue in my covenant , and I disregarded them ,” says the Lord .

nama: Wénde yéné siyém totér árnyégh yéndon so yafrotan yémafé Israil árfé yéné efghon, noraye Yuré: Yéndon so ekmetan tane nák yéfene mwighayan a efarotan yéfene tikfan. Yénd so wém yéfene Ngánján, a fá so em tane ár.
english: “ For this is the covenant that I will make with the house of Israel after those days ,” says the Lord : “ I will put my laws into their mind ; I will also write them on their heart . I will be their God , and they will be my people .

nama: A yémofem yau so ewatametat yéfe fútaréf, yau so yémofem ewatametat yéfenjo mérén, néngorayat, 'Fém fai mat tam Yuré.' Ménamén méinyotio ár kétamé némbnar kétán ndimbal so mat em tanemén.
english: They will not teach every man his fellow citizen and every man his brother, saying , ‘ Know the Lord ,’ for all will know me , from their least to their greatest .

nama: Yénd so kwawalindangé yéfene yaufi, a yéndon yau so ewawafarotan yéfene yaufi."
english: For I will be merciful to their unrighteousness. I will remember their sins and lawless deeds no more .” + 8:12 Jeremiah 31:31-34

nama: Njam Ngánján noraye totér árnyéghmén, Ngánjánam té yiyátoi frondemén árnyégh tándáwár, a némndafi árkéméné kamndangé tándáwár so tekofnaye kolindangé.
english: In that he says , “ A new covenant”, he has made the first obsolete . But that which is becoming obsolete and grows aged is near to vanishing away.

nama: Yénémamén Yesu yéné féyém emo so yéfrende totér árnyégh yémafé Ngánján a ár, ménát méinyotio efe eumyote so ersat tuot rokar Ngánjánam némat mat eyátoi fá ménamén Keriso kér yémormén ménát sái yuwek táyátongai kétamé yaufiyamoene faita yémofem árké tawafrotawét fronde árnyégh mbanmbanan.
english: For this reason he is the mediator of a new covenant , since a death has occurred for the redemption of the transgressions that were under the first covenant , that those who have been called may receive the promise of the eternal inheritance .

nama: Yéné téfnan Keriso njam yénmormén mbandot, norayai Ngánjánefaf: "Fém méndefnar ném wérár ghéngén a ramégh yam, wénde fémo té waramai ta fifi ménát raméghét.
english: Therefore when he comes into the world , he says , “ You didn’ t desire sacrifice and offering , but you prepared a body for me .

nama: Fém yau kénremngotau ménáyan njam wérár kaneghawét ghéngén kitarayan o ámb ramégh yam yaufiyammén.
english: You had no pleasure in whole burnt offerings and sacrifices for sin.

nama: Féyo yénd norayayén, "Kéreta, yénd té kwéném sái yafrotan fene ménde, o Ngánján ndené fété kés yéfarotaménd tanemén kété Ngánjánene sian.
english: Then I said , ‘ Behold , I have come ( in the scroll of the book it is written of me ) to do your will , O God .’” + 10:7 Psalms 40:6-8

nama: Ngánján Mbérmbér wéi noraye yénémamén. Ndené noraye:
english: The Holy Spirit also testifies to us , for after saying ,

nama: "Njam efogh kawerangé, yéndon so yafrotan árnyégh yémafé, yéndon so efarotan tanjo nák kété yéfene mwighayan a tikéfan
english: “ This is the covenant that I will make with them after those days ,” says the Lord , “ I will put my laws on their heart , I will also write them on their mind ;” + 10:16 Jeremiah 31:33 then he says ,

nama: Féyo yénd so kwawalindangé ménamén yéfene yaufiyammén a yau so ewafarotan yéfene yaufi wafroghyam."
english: “ I will remember their sins and their iniquities no more .”

nama: Njam yaufiyam té tawalindangé, kété wéi yau yém sái erametat ghéngén. Ke kétán awamaroghét
english: Now where remission of these is , there is no more offering for sin.

nama: Fém so em métar, ménát fémofem so mé yéngwafrotati Ngánjánene ménde. Féyo fémofem so tawanangi méinyotio némat yémo té néngorayai. 37 Mé tekofnaye, Fá efe yéném so yéném a yau so yale."
english: For you need endurance so that , having done the will of God , you may receive the promise .

nama: Wénde tane mbarkánd ár so emor ndimbal mwighaye. A njam fá kangongi, yénd yau so náuwétan yéfefaf.
english: But the righteous one will live by faith . If he shrinks back , my soul has no pleasure in him .” + 10:38 Habakkuk 2:3-4

nama: Wénde yénd yau ndené yéném efe nangotat férfére a Ngánjánam tékratan tankmangé. Wénde yénd yéném ár emofem mé efalo yiyátotat Ngánján, a féyo, téfene ghérsé so em wanjarégh Ngánjánafé.
english: But we are not of those who shrink back to destruction, but of those who have faith to the saving of the soul .

nama: Ndimbal mwighé yém táikér mwighé ndené némat yénd méghmégh yéném yéné so nufrote, yénmaramete téfén rokarmén yéndfem árké yau efandam. 2 Ngánjánam yéramai yánjo efalo yátogh kétán árét tándái efghon ménamén yéfene ndimbal mwighamén.
english: Now faith is assurance of things hoped for , proof of things not seen.

nama: Ménaye ndimbal mwighaye yénd mat náyátotam ndené méinyotio mband marat kufrotau kété Ngánjánene sie, ménát némé yéndfem sénonjo efandam yau enmormén kétamé árké rokar té efandam.
english: By faith we understand that the universe has been framed by the word of God , so that what is seen has not been made out of things which are visible .

nama: A Abelém tafrotawéng ghéngén ramégh Ngánjáne fá efalo tiyátotau. Táfandio, yáne ghéngén ramégham yáindai yáné Keinene ghéngén ramégh a témorwén merfifi. Ngánján témorwén áuwéghafé yáfaf a yáne ramégh yammén a ndemamén Abel sénonjo yém kér téfnár, yáne ndimbal mwighé mé noraye téfefaf.
english: By faith Abel offered to God a more excellent sacrifice than Cain , through which he had testimony given to him that he was righteous , God testifying with respect to his gifts ; and through it he , being dead, still speaks .

nama: Ndimbal mwighaye ndené Noam yérametam bout sái tawanjarngai yánjo mérén kétamé kéférta. Yémon tiyáretau Ngánján, emo tawéngsotau fá ménamén ámb yammén árké yau nufrotam tándái. Ménaye yánjo ndimbal mwighaye Ngánjánam yafalngoi méinyotio mband marat a nénamndai Noa mbarkánd Ngánjánene ghékfan.
english: By faith Noah , being warned about things not yet seen, moved with godly fear , prepared a ship for the saving of his house , through which he condemned the world and became heir of the righteousness which is according to faith .

nama: Ndimbal mwighaye ndené Aisekém efrendangeyai yánjo sómbio ambum, Jeikof a Esau, yáne témorwén táikér mwighé kétán némé Ngánjánam so tafrotau kété táf soramayan.
english: By faith Isaac blessed Jacob and Esau , even concerning things to come .

nama: Ndimbal mwighaye ndené Jeikof, njam fá témorwén bulu a nufngoi krot, efrendayéng fénatayero Josefene ambum. Fá namghai yánjo wétuan a Ngánjáne yáwefnoi.
english: By faith Jacob , when he was dying, blessed each of the sons of Joseph , and worshiped , leaning on the top of his staff .

nama: Ndimbal mwighaye ndené Josef, njam kaka témorwén krot, mwighé taikre norayai Israil ár tanéutorngai kétamé Ijifta. A fá témorwén féyotaro yénémamén ndené yémo tamndetau fá ménát sái társawét yáne sot yémofem njam fá kuwanongayénd.
english: By faith Joseph , when his end was near, made mention of the departure of the children of Israel , and gave instructions concerning his bones .

nama: Ndimbal mwighaye Moses yárefafem yátmafé yétneyayénd nambio ghérare yánjoyo mérnam njam fá náráftam. Yémofem yinjeyayénd fá témorwén mer ambum, a fá yau tarwén férfér warsagh ároene wafroghyammén.
english: By faith Moses , when he was born , was hidden for three months by his parents , because they saw that he was a beautiful child ; and they were not afraid of the king ’s commandment .

nama: Ndimbal mwighaye Israil ár tayotau yénamé Férkat Arakafamé ndenanit fá kar tamorwén ghérnat mbandan. Wénde njam Ijif árém tawaitotawét, fá semormén méinyotio kolitotawét.
english: By faith they passed through the Red Sea as on dry land . When the Egyptians tried to do so , they were swallowed up .

nama: Yéné ár tamorwén méinyotio efalo ménamén yéfene ndimbal mwighamén, wénde ámb árom yau yanai némat Ngánjánam té unyéghofnar si norayai, 40 ménamén Ngánjánam té yéfaronam ámb merfifi mwighé téfeyot, ménát mé yéndfé njam yéném so fá táf káyátongi féwénféwénofnar.
english: These all , having been commended for their faith , didn’ t receive the promise ,

nama: Ménamén Yuram téfél ewaramete yéné ár yémon seuwete, a yémon tékratan ekmete fá yémo seumyote ndené yáne ambum."
english: for whom the Lord loves, he disciplines , and chastises every son whom he receives .” + 12:6 Proverbs 3:11-12

nama: Yénémaménnde, ndémbérndérmbérafé ngángé muyafé táyátongi a féfene njangén budém. 13 Ewafrotati mbarkánd end féfene kafkafot, ménát aknyégh ár yau so eknyang, wénde so mer káyátongi. Ke ménát áyárghét Ngánjánefaf
english: Therefore lift up the hands that hang down and the feeble knees ,

nama: Yénémaménnde, yénd so yéném kánjo ramégh ár, ménamén téfene yém warsagh ároene yu árkéménayam yau so yésambnete, yéndfem fai táwefnotangém Ngánjáne yéné ende árkéménayam yéremngote fá utmanéghafé a férférafé, 29 ménamén téfene Ngánján syém ndenanit fés emo yéngwakerne rokar méinyotio.
english: Therefore , receiving a Kingdom that can’ t be shaken, let ’ s have grace , through which we serve God acceptably , with reverence and awe,

nama: Yénémamén yénd norayam táikér mwighaye, "Yuré siyém tane wáutárégh ár, féyo yénd yau so férfér wém. Némé so árém yafrotat tafaf?"
english: So that with good courage we say , “ The Lord is my helper. I will not fear . What can man do to me ?” + 13:6 Psalms 118:6-7

nama: Yau ewawalinda yéfenemén féfene limánégh ár, emofem tawatametat fém Ngánjánene si. Nawafarotati ndernáye sáfot ghérsé fá tanmorangérwén a mato a ewam ndimbal mwighé ndené yéfene tawamorwén. 8 Yesu Keriso mé ndenaro yém, káye, sénonjo, a tuot.
english: Remember your leaders , men who spoke to you the word of God , and considering the results of their conduct, imitate their faith .
