nama: Yénémamén yéndfem so túmén ewatetam Ngánjánefaf áuwégh wangogh ghéngén Yesue kénjúmé, árké yém ramégh mbírmbíram yéramete ndené yémndetat fá yém Yuré. 16 Wénde yau ewawalinda mer yam wafrogh a sái nawáutánati fémro kénjún, ménamén yéné féyém ghéngén árkéménayam yéméindat Ngánján áuwéghét.
english: Through him , then , let ’s offer up a sacrifice of praise to God continually , that is , the fruit of lips which proclaim allegiance to his name .

nama: Eutémndati a eyáretati féfene limánégh ár, yémofem féfene ghérsé efandat Ngánjánene téfnan. Ngánjánam so efande yéfene ásáfogh nde té tafrotat mere. Féyo eutémndati, fá so áuwéghafé em Ngánjánene ásáfoghan. Yau táf yaufi si norayati yéfefaf, ménamén yéné yam yau so ewáutánat.
english: Obey your leaders and submit to them , for they watch on behalf of your souls , as those who will give account , that they may do this with joy and not with groaning, for that would be unprofitable for you .

nama: Ngánjánafé norayati téfeyot, yénd mat yéném ndené téfene mwighé siyém kwayaghayan a ménde yéném ménát sái yénmor utmanéghafé méinyotio ende. 19 Yénd ménde wém féfene Ngánjánafé orayégh mé sénonjo ménát yénd so nénangotan féfefaf wékeye.
english: Pray for us , for we are persuaded that we have a good conscience , desiring to live honorably in all things .

nama: Tane fútaréf, yéndon té téfarotan mé ténjfi fefé ménát féfe wawéngsoghét, a yéndon ewamnendan fém ménát kwaramangi kaka áyárégh némé yénd té norayangén.
english: But I exhort you , brothers, endure the word of exhortation , for I have written to you in few words .

nama: Yénd ménde wém fém sái mat kamndangi ndené téfene fútar Timoti té yutorngi kétamé kwéfkwéf méngota. Njam fá kufarngé wékeye, yéndfé mérne so yénre táf féfe fandaghét.
english: Know that our brother Timothy has been freed, with whom , if he comes shortly , I will see you .

nama: Esnetati méinyotio féfenjo limánégh ár a méinyotio Yurane ár. Efe em kétamamén Italia engwatembangi ásneghafé si féfeyot.
english: Greet all of your leaders and all the saints. The Italians greet you .

nama: Ngánjánene ngárám so yém féfefaf méinyotio.
english: Grace be with you all . Amen.

nama: Yénd wém Jems, Ngánjánene faiofnar ásáfogh ár a Yuré Yesu Kerisoene: Yéndo yéfarotan kétán 12 mérnat efe nofarnaménd mband maratan. Ásneghafé! Ufogh a utarégh yam
english: James , a servant of God and of the Lord Jesus Christ , to the twelve tribes which are in the Dispersion : Greetings .

nama: Wénde ámb ár so korayangé, "Fefaf yém ndimbal mwighé, tafaf yém wafroghyam."
english: Yes, a man will say , “ You have faith , and I have works .” Show me your faith without works , and I will show you my faith by my works .

nama: Fémofem efalo yiyátotati ndené yénayém ámbiro Ngánján? Mer! Ndené yame yaufi mbérmbéram efalo yiyátotat a néwérsotat férférafé.
english: You believe that God is one . You do well . The demons also believe — and shudder .

nama: Ndené endeyo, Raab, árfé awanégh téfnár yiyátoi mbarkánd yénayan némé yémo yafrotam njam yémo eumyoi ayamégh téfnár a engwatembai fá fénaté endmé. 26 Ndené fété fifi kés yém mbérmbérofnar kérwén, yénémamén ndimbal mwighé wafroghyamofnar wéi yém kérwén.
english: In the same way , wasn’ t Rahab the prostitute also justified by works when she received the messengers and sent them out another way ?

nama: Árém so ewarawenat méinyotio fénatafénaté wérár, men, kamban, wagif. 8 Wénde yau árké árom so yarawene kanké. Yéné siyém wamaroghofnar yaufi, áfoghare férndén.
english: For every kind of animal, bird , creeping thing , and sea creature is tamed , and has been tamed by mankind;

nama: Wénde káfeté mwighé árké yéném kétamé njafarta yém fronde yém njúnnjúnofnar; krufrát wafrogh, merafé yam, amyoghar, afoghare ghérghérsisé a mer mbwe, yau ámb árfaro afrengégh a unyéghofnar. 18 Krufrát wafrogh ár emofem eitat krufrátoene mbwe yéférnat mbarkánd ghérsé.
english: But the wisdom that is from above is first pure, then peaceful , gentle , reasonable , full of mercy and good fruits , without partiality, and without hypocrisy.

nama: Wénde yémo yénmaramete téfe mindefifi ngárám. Yéné téfnan Buk si noraye: "Ngánjánam ekarote tuktuk ár wénde yuyafote ménde yéfe yuwan árét."
english: But he gives more grace . Therefore it says , “ God resists the proud , but gives grace to the humble .”

nama: Yéné tukén méinyotio, tane fútar, yau táf olaghofnar si norayati njafare o mband maratoe o ámb rokare. Méinyotio féfene siot sái ewam nekambe "O" o "Yau, " a féyo fém yau so eném Ngánjánene mogh mbanmbanan.
english: But above all things , my brothers, don’ t swear — not by heaven , or by the earth , or by any other oath ; but let your “ yes ” be “ yes ”, and your “ no ”, “ no ”, so that you don’ t fall into hypocrisy.

nama: Yénémaménnde eufanati féfenjo yaufiyam féfenjo kénjún a Ngánjánafé norayati féfenjo kénjún ménát fém so mer káyátongi. Mbarkánd ároene Ngánjánafé orayégh siyém wafté kér ro a féyotaro yém ámb ár wáutárghét.
english: Confess your sins to one another and pray for one another , that you may be healed . The insistent prayer of a righteous person is powerfully effective .

nama: Afé Ngánján mat témorwén a ekafai frondeyo, a Ngánján Mbérmbéram té eyátoi fém njúnnjúnofnar. Féyo fémofem té yiyáretati Yesu Keriso a yáné férkam eumbaryéng fém. Ngárám a krufrát so yém féfene méinyoe. Áuwégh Ngánjáneyot ghérsamén méghmégh
english: according to the foreknowledge of God the Father , in sanctification of the Spirit , that you may obey Jesus Christ and be sprinkled with his blood: Grace to you and peace be multiplied .

nama: wénde Yurane si so nakete tuot." Yéné si fiyém árké té táitotawét féfefaf.
english: but the Lord ’ s word endures forever .” This is the word of Good News which was preached to you .

nama: Yénémaménnde, nékmbotati méinyotio yaufita, yau unyégh o wasogh o waramnjagh o wasáligh si. 2 Aem totér áráfégh fasrinit efe em siogh mbérmbére nono wékwérot, ménát njam enetati fém so nanotati a kawanjarngi, 3 sénonjo fémofem té yérnongi ndené Yuré siyém mer.
english: Putting away therefore all wickedness , all deceit , hypocrisies , envies , and all evil speaking,

nama: Yéné wím siyém merfifi féfeyot emofem efalo yiyátotat, wénde árét emofem yau efalo yiyátotat: "Wím méngo ramégh árém árké yékenayénd té nénamndé téndo wím, "
english: For you who believe therefore is the honor , but for those who are disobedient, “ The stone which the builders rejected has become the chief cornerstone ,” + 2:7 Psalms 118:22

nama: wéi, Buk si noraye, "Wím árkéménayam eméinde ár ménát eunoghét, mbaré yéné árkéménayam eméinde ár uighét." Fá neunotat ménamén fá yau náyáretat si, yéné siyém Ngánjánene ménde yém yéfeyot.
english: and , “ a stumbling stone and a rock of offense .” + 2:8 Isaiah 8:14 For they stumble at the word , being disobedient, to which also they were appointed .

nama: Fém ár kor fété so emor féfenjo amafafé mer ende. Fém táf em mer féfene amaffaf a ewáutánati amaf. Nawafarotati ndené fá yau em kor muyafé. Nawafarotati ndené fémofem té yanangi efalo ghérsé Ngánjánta, ménamén fá mer yém. Eutémndati amaf. Féyo Ngánjánam so ewawangote féfene Ngánjánafé orayégh. Tékrat ménamén meryam wafroghmén
english: You husbands, in the same way , live with your wives according to knowledge , giving honor to the woman as to the weaker vessel , as also being joint heirs of the grace of life , that your prayers may not be hindered .

nama: Fá táf kawengongi yaufita a ewafrotat mer. Yémofem táf yéronjat krufrát a yaitotat yéné.
english: Let him turn away from evil and do good . Let him seek peace and pursue it .

nama: Ménamén Yuram yéfande némé mbarkánd árém yafrotat. Fá yiyárete mbarkánd ár njam fá Ngánjánafé norayét. Wénde fá tengo kétamé emofem ewafrotat yaufi yam."
english: For the eyes of the Lord are on the righteous , and his ears open to their prayer ; but the face of the Lord is against those who do evil .” + 3:12 Psalms 34:12-16

nama: Yénémaménnde, fá efe em tékratan ménáyan Ngánjánene méndeyan so karamangi fáyo kétán yéfene ndimbal mwighé kér ro Wafrogh ároefaf a mé so engém meryam wafroghan.
english: Therefore let them also who suffer according to the will of God in doing good entrust their souls to him , as to a faithful Creator .

nama: Totér ambum, ndené endeyo, namyotati yéfefafmé efe em sénko ár. Méinyotio fém, nawamanetati fémyo yuwan ghérsaye, ménamén Buk si noraye, "Ngánjánam ekene tuktuk ár wénde yuyafote ménde yéfeyot efe em yuwan ghérsafé."
english: Likewise , you younger ones , be subject to the elder . Yes , all of you clothe yourselves with humility and subject yourselves to one another ; for “ God resists the proud , but gives grace to the humble .”

nama: Yénémamén, yuwan náyátotati fémyo Ngánjánene ndimbal ngángé mbanmbanan, táf yémo so tauyongé fém tukét yánjo mer efghon. 7 Taramangi méinyotio féfene mwighé wawérsogh Ngánjánefaf ménamén yémon ewambete fém.
english: Humble yourselves therefore under the mighty hand of God , that he may exalt you in due time ,

nama: Awamarogh a ghékéf sénté. Féfene mék téfnár Sáifér noférkawete awánangoghafé ndenanit ndimbal munjan fus nérete ménát ámb ár sái yasérmbota. 9 Yékenati fá, kokayongi taikrataye ndimbal mwighé kénjún, ménamén fém mat em efalo yátogh ár mérén mband maratan eyota yéné tékrat yamamayo.
english: Be sober and self-controlled. Be watchful . Your adversary, the devil , walks around like a roaring lion , seeking whom he may devour .

nama: A Ngánján méinyotio ngárámmén, emo emotai kétán tuot ndimbal kwayaghafaf Kerisoene kénjún, yéné soramé fém té tam tékratan tekofnar, so yémonyo kor táyátongé mer a muyafé. Fém so ewakai taikre a mbénmbénate. 11 Yáfaf em wafté tuot. Efalo. Kerkermén ásneghafé si
english: But may the God of all grace , who called you to his eternal glory by Christ Jesus , after you have suffered a little while , perfect , establish , strengthen , and settle you .

nama: Sailesene wáutárghe, efe yéndon yiyátotan ndené ndimbal mwighafé fútar, yéndon té tafarotan féfeyot némbnare férén, tawawanjan fém a kéngorayan ndené yéné siyém Ngánjánene efalo ngárám. Kokayongi taikrataye yénayan.
english: Through Silvanus , our faithful brother, as I consider him , I have written to you briefly , exhorting and testifying that this is the true grace of God in which you stand .

nama: Ásneghafé si kétamé efalo yátogh árfeta kété Babilonén, fá em Ngánjánene kaféghmén ár, Mak efe yém ndenanit tane ambum, engwatemb yánjo ásnegh si wéi. 14 Kasnetangi fémro fémro ménaye uwéghafé ásneghe. Krufrat so yém méinyotio féfefaf efe em Kerisoene kénjún.
english: She who is in Babylon, chosen together with you , greets you . So does Mark , my son .

nama: Yéné férén siyém kétamé Saimon Fité, Yesu Kerisoene faiofnar ásáfogh ár a muyafé ár. Yéndo yéfarotan féfefaf emofem téfene Ngánjánene a Wanjarégh ár Yesu Kerisoene mbarkánd kénjúmé té ewanayénd ndimbal mwighé merfifi ndené téfene:
english: Simon Peter , a servant and apostle of Jesus Christ , to those who have obtained a like precious faith with us in the righteousness of our God and Savior , Jesus Christ :

nama: Ngárám a krufrát so yém féfefaf afoghare Ngánjánene a téfene Yuré Yesuene matyam kénjúmé. Ngánjánam yénkafai yandio
english: Grace to you and peace be multiplied in the knowledge of God and of Jesus our Lord ,

nama: Yénémaménnde, tane fútar, násáfotati taikrataye ménát so efalo tiyátongi féfene wanmogh a waferégh. Njam fémofem ewafrotati yéné yam, fém yau so kuyangi, 11 a fémofem so tanangi wemár umyogh téfene Yurafaf a Wanjarégh ár Yesu Kerisoene akegh Ngánján limánéghfaf. Ufrogh si Bukan
english: Therefore , brothers, be more diligent to make your calling and election sure. For if you do these things , you will never stumble .

nama: Wénde njafar si résagh árém ewaindat yéné ár a em minde tukén a waftafé, yémofem yau tamndetawét yaufi si Yurane sáfrére. 12 Wénde yéné unyégh watamegh ár sem ndenanit kéghat wérár ménát werghét a krot. Fá nénwangotat tékrate fá árkéméné mafina em. Fá so kolindangi ndenanit kéghat wérár.
english: whereas angels, though greater in might and power , don’t bring a slanderous judgment against them before the Lord .

nama: Wénde Yurane efogh so yéném ndenanit oro téfnár. Njafar so nolindat ukefé. Fésam so yasérmbote méinyotio rokar. Mband marat a méinyotio rokar némé árém ewafrotat so kolindangi.
english: But the day of the Lord will come as a thief in the night, in which the heavens will pass away with a great noise , and the elements will be dissolved with fervent heat ; and the earth and the works that are in it will be burned up .

nama: Tikfafé ambumtértér, yéndon yéfarotan féfefaf ménamén féfene yaufiyam té tawalindangé Kerisoene kénjúmé.
english: I write to you , little children , because your sins are forgiven you for his name ’s sake .

nama: Afaf, yéndon yéfarotan féfefaf ménamén fémofem mat té yiyátongi fá efe yém kétamé rényégh. Totér ambum, yéndon yéfarotan féfefaf ménamén fémofem té yáindangi yaufi ár.
english: I write to you , fathers , because you know him who is from the beginning. I write to you , young men , because you have overcome the evil one . I write to you , little children , because you know the Father .

nama: Tikfafé ambumtértér, yéndon yéfarotan féfefaf ménamén fém mat té náyátongi Afé. Afaf, yéndon yéfarotan féfefaf ménamén fémofem mat té yiyátongi fá efe yém kétamé rényégh. Totér ambum, yéndon yéfarotan féfefaf ménamén fém em muyafé, a Ngánjánene si yékmang féfefaf, a fémofem té yáindangi yaufi ár. Yau yuwetati mband marat
english: I have written to you , fathers , because you know him who is from the beginning. I have written to you , young men , because you are strong , and the word of God remains in you , and you have overcome the evil one .

nama: Wénde féfefaf té Ngánján Mbérmbér yasuryéng Kerisom, a féyo méinyotio fém mat em efalo. 21 Yéndon yéfarotan féfefaf, yau ménamén fém mafina em efalo wénde ménamén fém mat em ndené unyégh si yau yéném efalota.
english: You have an anointing from the Holy One , and you all have knowledge .

nama: A efe yém unyégh ár? Fá efe noraye ndené Yesu yau yém Keriso, ndené ár fem unyégh keriso. Yémofem té yékenangi Yárefé a Ambum. 23 Emofem yékarotat Ambum, wéi yékarotat Yárefé, wénde emofem yumyotat Ambum, ndenéyameyo yumyotat Yárefé.
english: Who is the liar but he who denies that Jesus is the Christ ? This is the Antichrist, he who denies the Father and the Son .

nama: Mé a nemnati ménamén si fémofem árké nénáyárayénd fronde, a fém so em túmén ámbiro féfene tikfan yémafé Ambumofé a Yárefafé. 25 Ambumom té unyéghofnar si norayai téfefaf: tuot ghérsé.
english: Therefore , as for you , let that remain in you which you heard from the beginning. If that which you heard from the beginning remains in you , you also will remain in the Son , and in the Father .

nama: Tikfafé ambumtértér, sénonjo mé aem yáne kénjún, ménát fá njam kufarngé, yénd so yéném féyotaro a wáiwáiofnar yánerére yáne angoghan. 29 Fém njam mat em ndené fá yém mbarkánd, fém mat em ndené méinyotio árém emofem ewafrotat némé em mbarkánd té náráftayénd yáfaf.
english: Now , little children , remain in him , that when he appears , we may have boldness and not be ashamed before him at his coming .

nama: Yéné fiyém watamegh fémofem árké náyárayénd kétamé rényégh: Yénd so náuwetam téfenjo kénjún. 12 Yau ndené em Kein efe témorwén yaufi ároe tambén a yésmetam yánngén. Némamén yémo yésmetam krotio fá? Ménamén yam Keiném tawafrotau tamorwén mámáfi, a yam yanngnom tawafrotau tamorwén mer.
english: For this is the message which you heard from the beginning, that we should love one another —

nama: Tikfafé fútaréf, njam Ngánjánam yénmuwetam yénd mindefifi wéi ndenéyameyo so náuwetam téfenjo kénjún. 12 Ámb árom yau yinjoi Ngánján, wénde njam yénd náuwetam téfenjo kénjún, Ngánján yémor téfefaf, a yáne uwégh káyátongé féwénféwénofnar téfefaf.
english: Beloved, if God loved us in this way , we also ought to love one another .

nama: Yénd mat yéném ndené yénd yénmor Ngánjánene kénjún a fá yémor téfene kénjún, ménamén yémo té yénmaramai téfe yánjo Mbérmbér. 14 Yéndfem té yinjoyém a so néngafrotam ndené Yárefam yénmáfáretam yánjo Ambum ménát sái témorwén Wanjarégh ár mband maratoe.
english: By this we know that we remain in him and he in us , because he has given us of his Spirit .

nama: Efe njam néngoraya ndené Yesu siyém Ngánjánene Ambum yényau Ngánján yáne kénjún, a yéné ár yényau Ngánjánene kénjún. 16 A yénd mat yéném uwégh Ngánjánene árké yém téfeyot, a yéndfem efalo yiyátotam yéné uwégh.
english: Whoever confesses that Jesus is the Son of God , God remains in him , and he in God .

nama: Yéné fiyém ndenáye so yéndfem euwetam ámb ár méinyotio tikfe. Féyo, yénd so yéném férférofnar yéné efghon Ngánjánam njam so emote méinyotio ár. Yénd mat so yéném ndené Ngánjánam yau so tékratan ténékmangé yénd. Yénd mat yéném yéné ménamén yénd ténmor yéné mband maratan yéné ende Yesu ndernaye témorangérwén. 18 Ánde Ngánjánene uwégh yém, kété yau yém férfér, ménamén Ngánjánene féwénféwénofnar uwégham titérmbongé férfér. Féyo uwégh yau náyáto féwénféwénofnar yéné ároefaf efe yém férfér, ménamén férféram so tékmangé tékratan.
english: In this , love has been made perfect among us , that we may have boldness in the day of judgment , because as he is , even so we are in this world .

nama: Yéné férén siyém kétamé Jon, sénko ár.,
english: The elder , to the chosen lady and her children , whom I love in truth, and not I only , but also all those who know the truth,

nama: ménamén efalo, árké yém téfefaf a so yém yéndfé tuot.
english: for the truth’s sake , which remains in us , and it will be with us forever :

nama: Ngárám, ghérghérsisé a krufrát árké yéném kétamé Afé Ngánjáneta a kétamé Yesu Keriso yáne Ambum so yéném yéndfé efe yém efaloyan a uwéghan.
english: Grace , mercy , and peace will be with us , from God the Father and from the Lord Jesus Christ , the Son of the Father , in truth and love.

nama: Tane em tárfár faroghét féfeyot, wénde yénd méndefnar wém fene farogh fefayan, wénde yénd méghmégh wém ménát féfe fandaghét a sái norayam fémafé sáfero, ménát téfene áuwégh so yém wifoghkaf.
english: Having many things to write to you , I don’ t want to do so with paper and ink , but I hope to come to you and to speak face to face , that our joy may be made full .

nama: Fene kaféghmén mérésoene ambumtértér enwatembangi féfe yéfenjo ásnegh si.
english: The children of your chosen sister greet you . Amen.

nama: Yéné férén siyém kétamé Jon, sénko ár. Yéndo yéfarotan kétán tane tikfafé fútar Gaius, efe yéndon yuwetan efaloe.
english: The elder to Gaius the beloved, whom I love in truth.

nama: Tafaf em tárfár ménát afroghét féfeyot, wénde yénd méndefnar wém sái yéfarotan fene fefayan. 14 Yénd méghmégh wém ménát sái tawinjon fém wékeye, a yénd so norayam sáfero.
english: I had many things to write to you , but I am unwilling to write to you with ink and pen ;

nama: Yéné férén siyém kétamé Juda tambén, Yesu Kerisoene faiofnar ásáfogh ár a yém Jemse yánngén. Yéndo yéfarotan yéfe méinyotio efe ekafai Ngánjánam, efe emor Ngánján Afane uwéghan a Yesu Kerisoene waraweréghan.
english: Jude , a servant of Jesus Christ , and brother of James , to those who are called , sanctified by God the Father , and kept for Jesus Christ :

nama: Féfefaf so yém mindefifi Ngánjánene ghérghérsisé, krufrát a uwégh. Unyégh watamegh téfnár
english: May mercy , peace , and love be multiplied to you .

nama: Tane tikfafé fútaréf, yénd minde ménde wém sái yéfarotan féfefaf ménamén wanjarégh árké yéndfem yéfalotam, yénd njam ménde wém faroghét féfeyot ménát wawéngsoghét sái násmétati ndimbal mwighat ambinotaro a méinyotio árét Ngánjánam árké yéramai. 4 Ámb ár té kwankwane nényawangi féfene mérnan. Tándái Ngánjánene mat yátogh árém té yéfarotaménd yéné árfenemén efe so moghan em kértafé. Fá em asénanégh ár Ngánjánafé a té tengotat téfene Ngánjánene ngárám ménát sái emor yaufiyam ghérsaye. Fá wéi ndenáyo nakenat ménát sái tumyongi Yesu Keriso, téfene fáro Ndimbal a Yuré.
english: Beloved, while I was very eager to write to you about our common salvation , I was constrained to write to you exhorting you to contend earnestly for the faith which was once for all delivered to the saints.

nama: Yéné so yém yaufififi yéfeyot! Yémofem té yaitoyénd Keinene end, a fá té naramangi fáyo ménát wafroghét yaufi némé Balamém tawafrotau mani téfnan. Fá té kásmetawét Ngánjánafé, ndené Kora skufrotau. Féyo fá so tawalindangé.
english: Woe to them ! For they went in the way of Cain , and ran riotously in the error of Balaam for hire , and perished in Korah ’s rebellion.

nama: Enok témorwén 7mén ár saté Edéme soramé, a fá té korayau yéfenemén yéné árfenemén njam norayai, "Kéretangi! Yuré yéném tausen a tausen njafarmén njúnnjúnofnar si résagh árfé 15 ménát sái emota méinyotio ár. Yémo so tékrátan tákmangé méinyotio yéné ngánjánofnar ár ménamén méinyotio yaufiyam yémofem árké tawafrotawét. Yuram efalo so tékrátan tákmangé yéné ngánjánofnar yaufi ár ménamén méinyotio yaufi si árké korayawét yáfaf.
english: About these also Enoch , the seventh from Adam, prophesied , saying , “ Behold , the Lord came with ten thousands of his holy ones,

nama: Yéné ár nawatarnat a efayotat ámb ár; engwafrotat yaufiyam fá ándan ménde em wafroghét; fá nawauyotat yéfenjoménro a yémofem yuwan eyátotat ámb ár ménát sái ewarsat némat fá ménde em. Matot a wafroghét
english: These are murmurers and complainers , walking after their lusts — and their mouth speaks proud things —showing respect of persons to gain advantage .

nama: Tikfafé fútaréf, mé a narmbotati fémyo féfene mindefifi njúnnjúnofnar ndimbal mwighayan, ndené fété Ngánján Mbérmbéram sái ewáutána oraighét Ngánjánafé, 21 a kawerangi fémyo kété Ngánjánene uwéghan, njamandio fém nawanjetati téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene ghérghérsisat sái tawaramangé féfe tuot ghérsé.
english: But you , beloved, keep building up yourselves on your most holy faith , praying in the Holy Spirit .

nama: Engéuyafotati ghérghérsisé ámb árét fá efe natambnat; 23 enéfnanati ámb ár kétamé fésta, a ewanjanati fá; euyafotati ghérghérsisé férférafé ámb árét, engkarotati yéfene sáláme árké em njúnnjúnafé yaufiyammén. Yuwetam Ngánján
english: On some have compassion, making a distinction ,

nama: Yéné férén siyém Jone tambén tafarotau kétán 7 Yesuene mérén kénjút kété Esia marat yuwon.
english: John , to the seven assemblies that are in Asia : Grace to you and peace from God , who is and who was and who is to come ; and from the seven Spirits who are before his throne ;

nama: a kétamé Yesu Kerisoe tambén, efe yém ndimbal mwighé kér ro fandagh ár yéné yammén, fronde efe nanoi kérta a efe yém mband maratmén warsagh árfene limánégh ár.
english: and from Jesus Christ , the faithful witness , the firstborn of the dead , and the ruler of the kings of the earth . To him who loves us , and washed us from our sins by his blood—

nama: a emo yényátoi yénd sái yéném Ngánján limánéghan a ghéngén wárogh ár ménát sái yutémndam Ngánján Yárefé. Yáfaf so yém ndimbal kwayaghé a wafté tuot! Efalo.
english: and he made us to be a Kingdom, priests to his God and Father — to him be the glory and the dominion forever and ever . Amen.

nama: "Kéretangi, fá nénangote njafar kwamkwamafé! Méinyotio árém so yéfandat, emofem fimbe yékunyayénd, a méinyotio ár mband maratan so tafarngé yeyam yáne téfnan. So fété nufrote! Efalo.
english: Behold , he is coming with the clouds , and every eye will see him , including those who pierced him . All the tribes of the earth will mourn over him . Even so , Amen.

nama: Yuré Ngánján noraye, "Yénd wém fronde a soramé, efe yém, efe témorwén, a efe so yéném, Méinyotio tukén waftafé." Ndenanit témorwén Ároene Ambum
english: “ I am the Alpha and the Omega , ” says the Lord God , “ who is and who was and who is to come , the Almighty .”

nama: Yéfarota yéné férén kétán njafar si résagh ároefaf Efesos Yesuene mérén kénjún:
english: “ To the angel of the assembly in Ephesus write : “ He who holds the seven stars in his right hand , he who walks among the seven golden lamp stands says these things :

nama: Árké ár ménde em áyárghét, táf náyáretat Ngánján Mbérmbéroefaf, a yérsat ndernáye Ngánján Mbérmbér noraye Yesuene mérnafefaf. Yéné ár efe njam nawaindat so yémofem enetat kétamé ghérsé akegh wénta árké yém Ngánjánene sariafé limánéghan. Kétán Yesuene mérén Sémirna kénjún
english: He who has an ear , let him hear what the Spirit says to the assemblies . To him who overcomes I will give to eat from the tree of life , which is in the Paradise of my God .

nama: Yéfarota yéné férén kétán njafar si résagh ároefaf Sémirna Yesuene mérén kénjún:
english: “ To the angel of the assembly in Smyrna write : “ The first and the last , who was dead , and has come to life says these things :

nama: Árké ár efe njam ménde em áyárghét, so náyáretat némé Ngánján Mbérmbér noraye Yesuene mérénfaf. Efe njam em nawaindat yau so yasérmbote yénamayo kéram. Kétán Yesuene mérén Fegamam kénjún
english: He who has an ear , let him hear what the Spirit says to the assemblies . He who overcomes won’ t be harmed by the second death .

nama: Yéfarota yéné férén kétán njafar si résagh ároefaf Fégamam Yesuene mérén kénjún:
english: “ To the angel of the assembly in Pergamum write : “ He who has the sharp two-edged sword says these things :

nama: Yénd mat wém ndené fém emor yéné ndimbal tesenan ánde Sáiféroene limánégh ámnjogh sifayé yém. Wénde fém mé táikér tawakai tafaf a fém yau nékmbotati ta efalo yátoghan táf njam Antifas, tane ndimbal mwighé kér ro fandagh ár, krot yékmayénd féfene ndimbal tesen ánde Sáifér yémor.
english: “ I know your works and where you dwell , where Satan ’s throne is . You hold firmly to my name , and didn’ t deny my faith in the days of Antipas my witness , my faithful one , who was killed among you , where Satan dwells .

nama: Árké ár efe ménde em áyárghét, so náyáretat ndernáye Ngánján Mbérmbér noraye Yesuene mérénfaf. Méinyotio efe njam nawaindat so enetat féskaf flawé árké té engétnoi njafaran. A yéndon so ewarametan fénatayero kwayaghé wím a yéné wíman so ekai totér yétkwén árkéméné ámb ár yau mat so yém mé fáro emo tanangé. Kétán Yesuene mérén Taiatira kénjún
english: He who has an ear , let him hear what the Spirit says to the assemblies . To him who overcomes , to him I will give of the hidden manna , and I will give him a white stone , and on the stone a new name written which no one knows but he who receives it .

nama: Yéfarota yéné férén kétán njafar si résagh ároefaf Taiatira Yesuene mérén kénjún:
english: “ To the angel of the assembly in Thyatira write : “ The Son of God , who has his eyes like a flame of fire , and his feet are like burnished brass , says these things :

nama: Yéfarota yéné férén kétán njafar si résagh ároefaf Sadis Yesuene mérén kénjún:
english: “ And to the angel of the assembly in Sardis write : “ He who has the seven Spirits of God and the seven stars says these things : “ I know your works , that you have a reputation of being alive , but you are dead .

nama: Yéfarota yéné férén kétán njafar si résagh ároefaf Filadelfia Yesuene mérén kénjút:
english: “ To the angel of the assembly in Philadelphia write : “ He who is holy, he who is true , he who has the key of David , he who opens and no one can shut , and who shuts and no one opens, says these things :

nama: Yéfarota yéné férén kétán njafar si résagh ároefaf Laodikia Yesuene mérén kénjún:
english: “ To the angel of the assembly in Laodicea write : “ The Amen, the Faithful and True Witness , the Beginning + 3:14 or, Source, or Head of God ’s creation , says these things :

nama: Yéndon so eumyotan méinyotio ár efe njam nawindat ménát sái yénmor yéndfé tane kitarayan, ndené fété yénd wémormén waingégh téfnár a namnjeyayém tane Afafé yáne limánégh ámnjogh sifayan. 22 Fá efe yém ténganafé, so fété náyárete némé Ngánján Mbérmbér noraye Yesuene mérénfaf.
english: He who overcomes , I will give to him to sit down with me on my throne , as I also overcame and sat down with my Father on his throne .

nama: Njam yéné akegh ghérsafé rokaram yuyotat a utémndat a kánjo yarametat yáyot efe yémor limánégh ámnjogh sifayan a efe nakete tuot, 10 yéné 24 sénko ár táf budme kiangi a yáwefnotat yá efe nakete tuot a yémofem táf tákmangi yéfenjo ákiki limánégh ámnjogh sifayé frondeta a norayat,
english: When the living creatures give glory , honor , and thanks to him who sits on the throne , to him who lives forever and ever ,

nama: "O Yuré téfene Ngánján, fém ném féyotaro sái yérsa ndimbal kwayaghé o utmanégh a wafté, ménamén fémo ewafrotam méinyotio rokar, a fene méndeyan naketat a kufrotawét."
english: “Worthy are you , our Lord and God , the Holy One , to receive the glory , the honor , and the power , for you created all things , and because of your desire they existed and were created !”

nama: A fémofem fá té táyátotati Ngánjánene limángégh a yáne ghéngén wárogh ár a fá so em limánégh ár mband maratan."
english: and made us kings and priests to our God ; and we will reign on the earth .”

nama: A yéndon táyáretawén méinyotio ghérsafé rokar njafaran a mband maratan a mband marat mbanmbanan a arakafan, yémofem wéi wagh taufanawét: "Frengégh a utmanégh a ndimbal kwayaghé a wafté yáne yém efe yémor limánégh ámnjogh sifayan a yáyot wéi Sif tosé efe yém tuot!"
english: I heard every created thing which is in heaven , on the earth , under the earth , on the sea , and everything in them , saying , “ To him who sits on the throne and to the Lamb be the blessing , the honor , the glory , and the dominion , forever and ever ! Amen!”

nama: A wéi 4 akegh ghérsafé rokar norayayénd, "Efalo!" A wéi 24 sénko ár nuyáyénd a yáwefnoyénd Ngánjáne a Sif tosae.
english: The four living creatures said , “Amen!” Then the elders fell down and worshiped .

nama: Njam yénd kéretawén Sif tosam yésawéryéng fronde 7mén manéghkaf yam bukan. Féyo ámb akegh ghérsafé rokar néngutnai yéné ke ndenanit árurkenit, "Kénaf!" 2 Yénd néngretayén tukét a yinjoyén kwayaghé os. Os résagh árém teretau namb, a yémo yanai ákiki. Fá kérsau ménát sái kawaindau ásméghan fáro.
english: I saw that the Lamb opened one of the seven seals , and I heard one of the four living creatures saying , as with a voice of thunder , “ Come and see !”

nama: Kétamé Judane mérénta 12,000 manéghkaf yam yérue eramayénd, kétamé Réubenene mérénta 12,000, kétamé Gadene mérénta 12,000,
english: of the tribe of Judah twelve thousand were sealed , of the tribe of Reuben twelve thousand , of the tribe of Gad twelve thousand ,

nama: kétamé Ásarene mérénta 12,000, kétamé Naftaliene mérénta 12,000, kétamé Ménasene mérénta 12,000,
english: of the tribe of Asher twelve thousand , of the tribe of Naphtali twelve thousand , of the tribe of Manasseh twelve thousand ,

nama: kétamé Simionene mérénta 12,000, kétamé Lefiene mérénta 12,000, kétamé Isakarene mérénta 12,000,
english: of the tribe of Simeon twelve thousand , of the tribe of Levi twelve thousand , of the tribe of Issachar twelve thousand ,

nama: kétamé Jebulunene mérénta 12,000, kétamé Josefene mérénta 12,000, kétamé Benjaminene mérénta 12,000. Ndimbal ár mérén
english: of the tribe of Zebulun twelve thousand , of the tribe of Joseph twelve thousand , and of the tribe of Benjamin twelve thousand were sealed .

nama: Méinyotio njafar si résagh ár tawakayongérwén yarendayénd limánégh ámnjogh sifayé a sénko ár a 4 akegh ghérsafé rokar. Fá sénkoe kuitawét limánégh ámnjogh sifayarére a táwefnotawét Ngánjáne, 12 korayawét: "Efalo! Uwégh a ndimbal kwayaghé a káfeté mwighé a kánjo a utmanégh a wafté a muyé yém téfene Ngánjáne kétánotio tuot! Efalo!"
english: All the angels were standing around the throne , the elders , and the four living creatures ; and they fell on their faces before his throne , and worshiped God ,

nama: Féyo ámb sénko árom wémotai, "Yéné kwayaghé sálámefé sem efe em, a árkamé fá enmormén?"
english: One of the elders answered , saying to me , “ These who are arrayed in the white robes , who are they , and where did they come from ?”

nama: Yéndon yawangoyén, "Ndimbal, fém mat ném." A fá korayangé, "Yéné em efe tamorwén ndimbal kértayan; yémofem té taumbnawét yéfenjo sáláme a eyátoyénd kwayaghé Sif tosane férkan.
english: I told him , “ My lord , you know .” He said to me , “ These are those who came out of the great suffering . + 7:14 or, oppression They washed their robes and made them white in the Lamb ’ s blood.

nama: Yénémamén, fá yéné fem Ngánjánene limánégh ámnjogh sifayarére a yémofem yáwefnotat yáyot efogh a sémbár yánjo wáwefnogh méngo kénjún; a fá efe yémor limánégh ámnjogh sifayan so em yémafé mérne.
english: Therefore they are before the throne of God , and they serve him day and night in his temple . He who sits on the throne will spread his tabernacle over them .

nama: Yau wéikor so siogham fá eramete yau wéi so fá nu siogham eramete. Efogh waftayam yau so elále, fá yau so ewakérne.
english: They will never be hungry or thirsty any more . The sun won’ t beat on them , nor any heat ;

nama: Ménamén Sif tosé efe yémor limánégh ámnjogh sifayé kaka so mé ewanjete ndenanit sif wanjengégh ár. Yémon so elimnde kétán akegh wérér nufaf. A Ngánjánam so tawawányányongé méinyotio yengam kétamé yéfene ghékéfta.
english: for the Lamb who is in the middle of the throne shepherds them and leads them to springs of life-giving waters . And God will wipe away every tear from their eyes .”

nama: Njam yémo yésawéryéng 7mén manéghkaf, métar náyátoi njafaran séno ámbiro efoghféneféne mbarmbar. 2 A yéndon ewinjoyén 7 njafar si résagh ár tawakayongérwén Ngánjánerére, a yéfe ewaramayéng 7 sufér.
english: When he opened the seventh seal , there was silence in heaven for about half an hour .

nama: Féyo 7 njafar si résagh ár nafrendaménd sufér waufghét.
english: The seven angels who had the seven trumpets prepared themselves to sound .

nama: Fronde njafar si résagh árom yaufetai yánjo sufér, a nu mbwe a fés wanjméghkaf férkafé enwitam mbandot. Ámbiro nambiomén mband marat nakérnam, a ámbiro nambiomén wén kakérnawét a yus méinyotio nefoi.
english: The first sounded , and there followed hail and fire , mixed with blood, and they were thrown to the earth . One third of the earth was burned up , and one third of the trees were burned up , and all green grass was burned up .

nama: Féyo yénamayo njafar si résagh árom yaufetai yánjo sufér, a ámb rokar ndenanit mband tunakéf fésafé yitam arakafot. Ámbiro nambiomén arakaf nawengoi férkot, 9 a ámbiro nambiomén akegh rokar arakafan eramngotam, a ámbiro nambiomén bout ewasérmbotam.
english: The second angel sounded , and something like a great burning mountain was thrown into the sea . One third of the sea became blood,

nama: 4mén njafar si résagh árom yaufetai yánjo sufér. Ámbiro nambiomén efogh yiroryéng a ámbiro nambiomén ghérare, a ámbiro nambiomén kénd kés em, ménát yéfene ámbiro nambiomén kwayaghé nénamndayénd kwéfité; ámbiro nambiomén efogh témorwén kwayaghafnar a ámbiro nambiomén sémbár witmaro wéi ndenáyo.
english: The fourth angel sounded , and one third of the sun was struck , and one third of the moon , and one third of the stars, so that one third of them would be darkened ; and the day wouldn’ t shine for one third of it , and the night in the same way .

nama: Féyo yénd néngretayén tukét, a yéndo yiyárayén ámbiro ndikáké kutnau ndimbal keye njamandio kanefetau tukmé njafaran, "Férférafé! Férférafé! Férférafé méinyotio ár efe emor yéné mband maratan, ménamén sufér kemén árké ámb nambio njafar si résagh árém so ewaufetat!"
english: I saw , and I heard an eagle, flying in mid heaven , saying with a loud voice , “ Woe ! Woe ! Woe to those who dwell on the earth , because of the other blasts of the trumpets of the three angels, who are yet to sound !”

nama: Fronde férférafé yam té kawainde, wénde ámb sómbio férférafé yam mé ere ufroghét.
english: The first woe is past. Behold , there are still two woes coming after this .

nama: Féyo kém árké náyárayén yéndon kétamé njafarta nénorayai tafaf wéikor, "Nguwano, téngwan sauréghkaf buk árkéméné yéfai njafar si résagh ároene ngángayan efe yakai arakafan a mbandan."
english: The voice which I heard from heaven , again speaking with me , said , “ Go , take the book which is open in the hand of the angel who stands on the sea and on the land .”

nama: Ár efe em yéné mband maratmén so erametat ramégh yéfenjo kénjún a téménd sái yafrotat, ménamén sómbio Ngánjánene mat yátogh árfene kérmén emofem takméwét ár kértayan.
english: Those who dwell on the earth will rejoice over them , and they will be glad . They will give gifts to one another , because these two prophets tormented those who dwell on the earth .

nama: Yénamayo férférafé yam té nawaindé, wénde nambiomén férférafé yam yéném tekofnaye. 7mén sufér ke
english: The second woe is past. Behold , the third woe comes quickly .

nama: Mband marat ár mérén nékw té tam fefaf, wénde sénonjo fene nékw efogh té nufar. Yéné efogh té nawer sái emota kér ár a fai ewarameta fenjo ásáfogh téfnárat, fémo so fai ewaramete fenjo faiofnar ásáfogh árét Ngánjánene mat yátogh árét a efalo yátogh ár a méinyotio emofem yéfandat fene yétkwén férférafé, kétamé némbnar kétán ndimbal, a fémon so ewasérmbote méinyotio fá emofem tasérmbotat mband marat."
english: The nations were angry , and your wrath came , as did the time for the dead to be judged , and to give your bondservants the prophets , their reward , as well as to the saints and those who fear your name , to the small and the great , and to destroy those who destroy the earth .”

nama: Féyo njafaran Ngánjánene wáwefnogh méngo nasawéryéng, a yáne Nák Boks safénro téfandawét yáne wáwefnogh méngo kénjún. Féyo kété témorwén toyé karametawét, árurke kásmetawét a karoghawét, nu mbwefé ndimbal mbormbor, a sokrere.
english: God ’s temple that is in heaven was opened, and the ark of the Lord ’s covenant was seen in his temple . Lightnings, sounds , thunders , an earthquake , and great hail followed .

nama: Ndimbal sélngwélafé yam nufaryéng njafaran: amaf efogh umaneghkaf témorwén, ménáyafé ghérare témorwén yáne kafkaf mbanmbanan a 12 kéndafé ákiki téfayongérwén yáne sénkoyan. 2 Amaf témorwén ambum suafé a tékrát téfandau áráfghét.
english: A great sign was seen in heaven : a woman clothed with the sun , and the moon under her feet , and on her head a crown of twelve stars.

nama: Yéna yém káfeté mwighé. Efe yém mwighé kér ro so yafene yéné wafégh ndimbal gásiane, ménamén yéné siyém ároenemén waferégh a yáne waférghét siyém 666.
english: Here is wisdom . He who has understanding , let him calculate the number of the beast , for it is the number of a man. His number is six hundred sixty-six .

nama: Yénamayo njafar si résagh árom yáitoi a korayau, 'Té nuyai! Té nuyai ndimbal Babilon, emon táyátote méinyotio ár mband maratan ténetat yáne wéri nu ménaye amafoene yaufi wal yame!"
english: Another , a second angel, followed, saying , “Babylon the great has fallen , which has made all the nations to drink of the wine of the wrath of her sexual immorality .”

nama: Yéné siyém ménát yém awamarogh yéfeyot Ngánjánene árét, emofem ewaitotat Ngánjánene nák a ewakai ndimbal mwighé kér ro Yesuefaf.
english: Here is the perseverance of the saints, those who keep the commandments of God and the faith of Jesus .”

nama: Féyo yénd náyárayén kém njafarta kénorayau, "Efarota: Frengéghkaf fá em yéné kér téfnár efe kér em Yurane kénjún kétánotio sénonjo. Ngánján Mbérmbér noraye, "Néméwét! Fá so nenat yéfenjo ásáfoghta, ménamén yéfenjo wafroghyamam so ewaitote fá." Mband maratoene wau yu
english: I heard a voice from heaven saying , “ Write , ‘ Blessed are the dead who die in the Lord from now on .’” “ Yes ,” says the Spirit , “ that they may rest from their labors , for their works follow with them .”

nama: Ámb njafar si résagh ár néntoryéng wáwefnogh méngota njafaran, a yáne wéi témorwén sénté náifé.
english: Another angel came out of the temple which is in heaven . He also had a sharp sickle .

nama: Emofem yau so férférafé néfandat, Yuré a so yénérsat ndimbal kwayaghé fene yétkwénfaf? Ménamén mé fémro ném njúnnjúnofnar. Méinyotio ndimbal yu so eném fe wáwefnoghét ménamén fene mbarkánd yam fémon némé tawafrote té mat káyátotat.
english: Who wouldn’ t fear you , Lord , and glorify your name ? For you only are holy . For all the nations will come and worship before you . For your righteous acts have been revealed .”

nama: Féyo yéndo yiyárayén ndimbal kém korayau kétamé wáwefnogh méngota 7 njafar si résagh árfefaf: "Tangém tawasunangi 7 dis Ngánjánene nékw mband maratan!"
english: I heard a loud voice out of the temple , saying to the seven angels, “ Go and pour out the seven bowls of the wrath of God on the earth !”

nama: Fronde njafar si résagh ár yéngmormén a yasuryéng yánjo dis mbandot, a mafulafé a ndémkefé fénend atyarégh nufngoyénd yéné árfefafmé efe tamorwén ndimbal gásiane mborafé a táwefnotat yáne mbanmbanoe.
english: The first went , and poured out his bowl into the earth , and it became a harmful and painful sore on the people who had the mark of the beast , and who worshiped his image .

nama: Yénamayo njafar si résagh árom yasuryéng yánjo dis arakafot. Nawengoi arakaf kér ároene féréknit, méinyotio ghérsafé rokar arakafan kér emormén.
english: The second angel poured out his bowl into the sea , and it became blood as of a dead man . Every living thing in the sea died .

nama: Nambiomén njafar si résagh árom yasuryéng yánjo dis wanjeyamé a wérér nuamé, a méinyotio nawengoyénd férkot. 5 A yéndo yiyárayén njafar si résagh ár efe témorwén waftafé méinyotio nufaf korayau, "Fém fété ném mbarkánd yéné tékrát yammén, O Njúnnjúnofnar ár, efe ném a efe túmén témorwén!
english: The third poured out his bowl into the rivers and springs of water , and they became blood.

nama: Fene njúnnjúnofnar ár a fene mat yátogh ár té esmetaménd krotio a yéfene férék té tasunawét mbandan. Féyo fémo té ewaramai yéfene ngi téfnárat férék nénet. Yéné fiyém yéfene fai."
english: For they poured out the blood of saints and prophets , and you have given them blood to drink . They deserve this .”

nama: A yénd náyárayén si kétamé ghéngén wárogh kitarata kénorayau, "Néméwét, Yuré Ngánján Méinyotio wafté! Fene tékrát kéméghét siyém efalo yém a mbarkánd!"
english: I heard the altar saying , “ Yes , Lord God , the Almighty , true and righteous are your judgments .”

nama: 4mén njafar si résagh árom yasuryéng yánjo dis efoghfaf, téméindau minde waftat ménát ár sái tawakérnau yéné fese. 9 Ár tawakérnau yéné ndimbal efogh waftayam, a yémofem tafalngotawét Ngánjánene yétkwén, emo enwáfárete yéné férférafé kérté yam. Wénde fá yau kawengotawét yaufiyam wafroghta a tuyafotawét yáyot ndimbal kwayaghé.
english: The fourth poured out his bowl on the sun , and it was given to him to scorch men with fire .

nama: Féyo 5mén njafar si résagh árom yasuryéng yánjo dis ndimbal gásiane limánégh ámnjogh sifayan, a yáne ndimbal yu yafaryéng kwéfitayam. Árém kánké tarnawét yéfenjoyo ndémkemén, 11 a tafalngotawét Ngánján njafarmén ménamén yéfene ndémkemén a fénendmén, wénde fá kakenawét awengowét yéné yaufita némé tawafrotawét mé yémofem.
english: The fifth poured out his bowl on the throne of the beast , and his kingdom was darkened . They gnawed their tongues because of the pain ,

nama: "Káyárangi, yénd so wéném oro téfnárnit! Frengéghkaf fá yém efe mé néréte ewarawene yánjo sáláme, ménát fá yau so yéngém firo a waiwaiafé."
english: “ Behold , I come like a thief . Blessed is he who watches, and keeps his clothes , so that he doesn’ t walk naked , and they see his shame.”

nama: Féyo yémofem eumendayénd warsagh ár méinyotio yéné sifayat árké Ibru sie yémndetat Amagedon.
english: He gathered them together into the place which is called in Hebrew , “Harmagedon”.

nama: Yéné amaf fémo árké té yinjo ghékéf waingéghe yufarote ndimbal tesen árkéménéyam elimnde mband maratmén warsagh ár.
english: The woman whom you saw is the great city which reigns over the kings of the earth .”

nama: Féyo yéndo wéi ámb si kém náyárayén njafarot, kénorayau, "Kéntonangi yéné amafoe tambén, tane ár, ménát fém yau so nufeindati yáne yaufiyamot, ménát fém yau so tawanangé yéné amafoene tékrát yamam!
english: I heard another voice from heaven , saying , “ Come out of her , my people , that you have no participation in her sins, and that you don’ t receive of her plagues ,

nama: Ménamén yéné amafoene yaufiyam té kafayotat farufaru njafarot, a Ngánjánam té yawafarota yáne yaufiyam.
english: for her sins have reached to the sky , and God has remembered her iniquities.

nama: Yafrotati yéné yam ndernáye yéné amafom té tawafrote ámb ár. Taramangi yá férghe tékrát yáne méinyotio yaufiyammén. Yémo taméindau ár tárfár kérté yamot yáne kafusi nénean, féyo yawafrotati ndenéyameyo sómbinotmé tárfár kérté yándio.
english: Return to her just as she returned, and repay her double as she did , and according to her works . In the cup which she mixed , mix to her double .

nama: Taramangi yá minde kérté a ye ndené ndimbal kwayaghé a ngonjél yémo té ewaramai yáfaftio. Ménamén yémon té mé ténémndetau: Yénd wémor warsagh amaf kitarayan ndené warsagh amaf! Yénd yau wém séfarékw amaf, yénd yau mat so wém ye!
english: However much she glorified herself and grew wanton, so much give her of torment and mourning . For she says in her heart , ‘ I sit a queen, and am no widow , and will in no way see mourning .’

nama: Yénémaménnde, ámb efghon yáne férférafé kérté yam so kufarngé yáfaf- kér, ye a káukáu. Fá so yakérne fésam, ménamén waftafé yém Yuré Ngánján, emo yéné amaf so tékmangé tékrátan.
english: Therefore in one day her plagues will come : death , mourning , and famine ; and she will be utterly burned with fire , for the Lord God who has judged her is strong .

nama: Wénde fém, o njafar, náuwétati yáne kérkéfmén! Fém wéi ndenáyo náuwétati, efalo yátogh ár a Yesuene muyafé ár a Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár! Ménamén kerkeran Ngánjánam té moghan yékém féfene téfnan.
english: “ Rejoice over her , O heaven , you saints, apostles, and prophets , for God has judged your judgment on her .”

nama: Yéné tesenan Ngánjánene mat yátogh árfene a Ngánjánene njúnnjúnofnar ároene férék té ewinjoyénd, a méinyotio efe esmetaménd yéné mband maratan.
english: In her was found the blood of prophets and of saints, and of all who have been slain on the earth .”

nama: Yéné soramé yéndon tiyáretawén ámb rokar ndenanit ár mérén yénau narne njafaran, kutnawét, "Ngánján yuyotam! Wanjarégh a ndimbal kwayaghé a wafté yém téfene Ngánjánene!
english: After these things I heard something like a loud voice of a great multitude in heaven , saying , “Hallelujah! Salvation , power , and glory belong to our God ;

nama: Efalo a mbarkánd yém yáne mogh yam! Yémo té yafalngo yéné yaufi wal amaf emo tasérmbote mband marat yáne yaufi wal yame. Yémo té fai yawango yéné amafoe yáne árfene kér téfnan."
english: for his judgments are true and righteous . For he has judged the great prostitute who corrupted the earth with her sexual immorality , and he has avenged the blood of his servants at her hand .”

nama: Wéikor fá kutnawét, "Ngánján yuyotam! Fés kwam kuyotau yéné ndimbal tesenta tuotot!"
english: A second said , “Hallelujah! Her smoke goes up forever and ever .”

nama: 24 sénko ár a 4 akegh ghérsafé rokar nuyáyénd a táwefnotawét Ngánjáne, efe témorangérwén limánégh ámnjogh sifayan. A kutnawét "Néméwét, Ngánján yuwetam!"
english: The twenty-four elders and the four living creatures fell down and worshiped God who sits on the throne , saying , “Amen! Hallelujah!”

nama: Wéikor si yénmormén limánégh ámnjogh sifayé tambén, korayau, "Yuyotam téfene Ngánján, méinyotio fém yáne faiofnar ásáfogh ár, fém emofem férférafé yéfandati, méinyotio némbnar kétán ndimbal!"
english: A voice came from the throne , saying , “ Give praise to our God , all you his servants , you who fear him , the small and the great !”

nama: Féyo yéndon yiyárayén ke ndenanit ár tárfár yénau nutnat, ndenanit nu wérér rárákenit a ndimbal árurke yénau kutnangé, "Ngánján yuwetam! Ménamén Yuré Ngánján Méinyotio waftafé limánéghan yém!
english: I heard something like the voice of a great multitude , and like the voice of many waters , and like the voice of mighty thunders , saying , “Hallelujah! For the Lord our God , the Almighty , reigns!

nama: Yénd so náuwétam a áuwéghafé yéném a yarametam yá ndimbal kwayaghé! Ménamén áwérégh yam té nufar Sif tosafé, a yáne amaf té kafrende fáyo.
english: Let ’s rejoice and be exceedingly glad , and let ’s give the glory to him . For the wedding of the Lamb has come , and his wife has made herself ready .”

nama: Mer sáláme, kwayaghé a njúnnjúnofnar, yaramayénd yáyot awoghét." Ménamén mer sálámeyam eufarote Ngánjánene árfene meryam wafrogh.
english: It was given to her that she would array herself in bright , pure , fine linen , for the fine linen is the righteous acts of the saints.

nama: Féyo njafar si résagh ár norayai tafaf, "Efarota: Frengéghkaf fá em efe té taumyongi Sif tosane áwérégh téméndfaf." A wéikor wémndai, "Yéné sem efalofifi si em Ngánjánene."
english: He said to me , “ Write , ‘ Blessed are those who are invited to the wedding supper of the Lamb .’” He said to me , “ These are true words of God .”

nama: Yénamé yénd nuyáyén yáne kafkafot yá wáwefnoghét, wénde fá norayai tafaf, "Yau yéné yafrota! Yénd mé faiofnar ásáfogh ár yénre fémafé a ámb efalo yátogh árfé, méinyotio fá efe nawéretat efalo yátoghfaf Yesum ewafote fá. Yáwefnota Ngánjáne!" Ménamén afrogh Yesuenemén siyém Ngánjánene mat yátoghmén Mbérmbére yém." Résagh ár yéfai kwayaghé osan
english: I fell down before his feet to worship him . He said to me , “ Look ! Don’ t do it ! I am a fellow bondservant with you and with your brothers who hold the testimony of Jesus . Worship God , for the testimony of Jesus is the Spirit of Prophecy .”

nama: Féyo yéndon yinjoyén njafar si résagh ár takayongérwén efghan, efe nutnai ndimbal keye méinyotio menafefaf árké nanefetat njafaran, "Taném, kénáumendangi méinyotio Ngánjánene ndimbal témndot, 18 ménát fémofem so yéngnetati warsagh árfene fenjen, fiyarafene sénko árfene, a fiyarafene, os a yéfene résagh árfene, a méinyotio árfene fenjen, faiofnar ásáfogh ár a yuwek ár, némbnar ár kétán ndimbal!"
english: I saw an angel standing in the sun . He cried with a loud voice , saying to all the birds that fly in the sky, “ Come ! Be gathered together to the great supper of God ,

nama: Yéndon ewinjoyén limánégh ámnjogh sifayé, yéné ár kété tamorangérwén endefet té wafrogh muyé ewaramayénd mogh kéméghét. A yéndon ewinjoyén yéné árfene mbérmbér efe té esmetaménd Yesuenemén afrogh téfnan a ménamén Ngánjánene simén. Yémofem yau táwefnotawét ndimbal gásiai o yáne mbanmbanoe a wéi yau ewanayénd yáne mbor yéfene sáf sotan o yéfene ngángayan. Fá nénamndayénd ghérsat a télimndawét Kerisofé 1,000 yunjéf. 5 (Ámb kér téfnár yau nanotaménd ghérsat kétánotio kor 1,000 yunjéf yiyato.) Yéné fiyém fronde anogh kérta. 6 Áuwéghafé a njúnnjúnofnar fá yéné fem efe sái kérta nanotat fronde anoghan. Yénamayo kér siyém waftafé yau yém yéfefaf, wénde fá so em Ngánjánene ghéngén wárogh ár a wéi Kerisoene a so yélimndat yémafé 1,000 yunjéf. Sáifér yáindayénd
english: I saw thrones , and they sat on them , and judgment was given to them . I saw the souls of those who had been beheaded for the testimony of Jesus and for the word of God , and such as didn’ t worship the beast nor his image , and didn’ t receive the mark on their forehead and on their hand . They lived and reigned with Christ for a thousand years .

nama: Njafar si résagh árom norayai tafaf, "Yéné si sem ndimbal mwighafé a efalo. Yuré Ngánján, emo ewaramete Ngánján Mbérmbér Ngánjánene mat yátogh árfet, té ténmáfárete yánjo njafar si résagh ár ménát emo sái ewauyafota yáne faiofnar ásáfogh árfét némé yam so natyanat tekofnaye."
english: He said to me , “ These words are faithful and true . The Lord God of the spirits of the prophets sent his angel to show to his bondservants the things which must happen soon .”

nama: "Kor aem! Yénd nénangotan tekofnar! Frengéghkaf yéné ár yém emo erete afrogh si yéné Bukan."
english: “ Behold , I am coming soon ! Blessed is he who keeps the words of the prophecy of this book .”

nama: "Kor aem! Yénd nénangotan tekofnar! Tane fai sem tafaf em a yéndon so ewarametan fénatayero ménamén némé yémofem té tawafrotat. 13 Yénd wém Alfa a Omega, Fronde a Soramé, Rényégh a Wifogh.
english: “ Behold , I am coming soon ! My reward is with me , to repay to each man according to his work .

nama: "Yéndo, Yesum, té yéngwáfáretamén tane njafar si résagh ár sái kafrotau yéné yammén méinyotio Yesuene mérnamé. Yénd wém Deifidene Ákimén, a kwayaghé Akw Kénd."
english: I , Jesus , have sent my angel to testify these things to you for the assemblies . I am the root and the offspring of David , the Bright and Morning Star.”

nama: Ngánján Mbérmbér a awerégh mérés noraye, "Taném!" A tumyo fá efe náyárete noraye, "Taném!" Efe njam nuam nérameta, fá so kénaflangé, a efe njam ménde yém, faiofnaye yémo ghérsé wérér nu so tanangé.
english: The Spirit and the bride say , “ Come !” He who hears, let him say , “ Come !” He who is thirsty , let him come . He who desires , let him take the water of life freely .

nama: Fá efe nafrote yéné yammén noraye, "Néméwét, yénd nénangotan wékeye." Efalo. Kéném, Yuré Yesu.
english: He who testifies these things says , “ Yes , I am coming soon .” Amen! Yes , come , Lord Jesus !

nama: Yuré Yesuene ngárám so yém méinyotio Ngánjánene árfé. Efalo.
english: The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ be with all the saints. Amen.

nama: Mer si náreinde Ngánjánene ambum Yesu Kerisoenemén.
english: Good talk started God's the son Yesu about Keriso.

nama: Ndernáye Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár Aisayam yéfarotam yáne Bukan, "Yéndon so yéngwáfáretan fronde si résagh ár, emon so fene end némáfrende,
english: How prophet Aisaya wrote in his Buk: " I will send first messanger, who will your way prepare"

nama: ke nutne fanfne yuta, 'End frengéghét Yuraye álighét, wafrogh mbarkánd end yáyot.'"
english: "voice shout clear from place, 'Way to prepare Lord to walk, make straight way for him.' "

nama: Táf fété Ngánján Mbérmbéram yéméindai Yesu álighét fanfne yuwot. 13 Fá yémorangérmén kétánotio 40 efogh Sáifram yufotam. Yesu kété témorwén ánde wérár tamorwén, wénde njafar si résagh árém yambayénd Yesu. Yesum ewaferyéng yánjo fronde waitogh ár
english: When immediate God's Spirit lead Yesu to walk clear to place. 13 He stayed until 40 days Sáifér tested him. Yesu was where the wild animal lived, but men carrying heavenly message(angels) served Yesu. Yesu called his first following man

nama: Soramé Jon yélawayénd kwéfkwéf sifayan, Yesu néngwanoi Galili yuwot Ngánjánene mer si táitotau. 15 Yesu norayai, "Efogh ténawer, Ngánján limánégh siyém kaka yém. Féfenjo yaufita kawengongi a efalo tiyátongi mer siǃ"
english: After Jon was put in darkness house, Yesu went to Galili region God's good talk to teach. 15 "Time/day has come," Yesu said, "God's kingdom is close is. Your from sins turn away and real listen good talk"

nama: Ámb efghon Yesu tiyotawéng Galili arakaf téndomé, yémon ewinjeyai Saimon a yánngén Endru net waméghan ndimbal sawan, ménamén fá tárwén wagif rényégh ár. 17 Yesum emndeyai, "Kénaflend yénd kwénmaitend a yéndon so táyáten ár rényégh ár." 18 Táf fété yémofem eureyayénd yéfenjo net a yáiteyayénd Yesu.
english: Other in day Yesu walked Galili region sea beside, he saw Saimon and little brother Endru net cleaning big lake, because they.d were fish catching man. 17 Yesu said, "Come me follow me and I will make man catching man." 18 When immediate they followed their net and followed Yesu.

nama: Njam fá néngwanoyénd nayuofnar, yémon ewinjeyai Jems Jefediene ambum, yánngén Jon boutan tawaflarwén, táfrengwét yéfenjo net. 20 Tekofnar Yesum emotangeyai, yémofem yéfrangeyayénd yéferafé Jefedi bout kénjún ásáfogh árofé a yáiteyayénd Yesu. Yesum yitroi yaufi mbérmbér
english: When He went back not far, he saw Jems Jebedy son, little brother Jon bout sat, prepared their net. 20 Not far Yesu called them.d, they left it(net) their father Jebedy bout in working to man and followed Yesu. Yesu cast out evil spirit

nama: Fá néngwanoyénd Káfenam tesenot, a Safatan Yesu nénglawai áumengégh méngot a watamegh ewafngoi. 22 Ár sélngwél emormén yáne watameghan, ménamén yáne si waitogh témorwén muyafé, yau ndené nák watamegh ár. 23 Áumengégh méngon kété témorwén ár tasarmbotau yaufi mbérmbéram. Fá nutnayeng minde tukén, 24 "Fém némat ménde ném téfefaf, Yesu Najaretmén? Fém kéném téfefaf wasérmboghét? Yénd mat wém fém efe ném, fém ném Ngánjánene njúnnjúnofnar ár."
english: They went back to the town of Capernaum, and Sabbath Yesu went into teaching to house and teaching began. 22 Man surprised come his teaching, because his talk following man come with authority, not like law teaching men. 23 Teaching in house there come man was possessed evil spirit. They shouted very high, 24 "You what want are to us, Yesu from Najaret? You come us to destroy? Me knowledge am you who are-you are God's without.dust(holy) man."

nama: Yesum yarnam, "Métar kékmboǃ Kéntor yá tambénǃ" 26 Yaufi mbérmbéram yésámbnetai ár a féyo yéméindai yaufi keyot a yéfrangoi.
english: Yesu said strongly, "Quiet stop! Come out him from" 26 Evil spirit shaked man and then lead evil with voice and left him.

nama: Méinyotio ár emormén sélngwél a kawawanjawét fáro, némé watamegh yéné yém muyafé? Yéné ár muyafé yém yaufi mbérmbér wafareghét a yémofem tiyárangi Yesuǃ" 28 Si yánemén marat namndai wékeyero Galili yuwon. Yesum mer táyátotau tárfár ár enjneta
english: All man were surprised and said themselves, "What teaching this is with authority? This man has authority to give orders to the evil Spirit and they heard Yesu 28 Word about him became wide became quickly Galili region in place." Yesu made good many man

nama: Yémofem yéfrangoyénd áumengégh méngo, fá néngwanoyénd yémafé Jems a Jon, Saimon a Endru yéfene méngot. 30 Saimone yanat enjne témorwén, a yémofem Yesue yaufroyénd yánemén. 31 Féyo Yesu néngwanoi yáfaf, Yesum ngángé yawerai a yauténam yáyot. Táf fété enjneyam yéfrangoi a yémon ewáfrendam yéfe njamke.
english: They left teaching house, they went back with them Jems and Jon Saimon and Endru their to house. 30 Saimon's mother in law sick was, and they to Yesu told about her. 31 Then Yesu went to him, Yesu hand took and made rise to her. When immediate sick left him and he served them food.

nama: Fauréghan Yesu néngwanoi méngota métar sifayat, ánde fá Ngánjánjafé koraiwét. 36 Saimonéf néngwanoyénd yá fútarfé Yesue ronjaghét, 37 a njam yémofem yinjoyénd Yesu, fá norayayénd, "Árém néronjat fémǃ"
english: In evening Yesu went from house clear to place, where they closed(eyes). 36 Saimon went back him with friend to Yesu to look for, 37 and when they saw Yesu, they said: " People are looking for you"

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Yénd so kuwanongém kaka tesenot, ménát yéndon so ewaufrotan mer si yéné árét. Yénémamén yénd kwéném." 39 Féyo fá tiotau Galili yuwomé, kété yémon táitotau si áumengégh méngo kénjún a yaufi mbérmbér tawifnau. Yesum mer yiyátoi yaufi ghéngan enjnefé ár
english: Yesu answered, " We will go to close to town, so that we will say good talk this to people. That is why I came." 39 Then Yesu walked their teaching through house all in Galili region in place, there he preach talk teaching house through and evil spirit drived out. Yesu good made evil with skin man

nama: Yaufi ghéngan enjnefé ár yénmormén Yesuefaf a yáwefnoi budme, "Fém njam ménde ném, fémon so mer kwiyáto yénd."
english: Evil skin with sickness man came Sick and bent knee, "You when want are, you will make me good."

nama: Yesu ghérghérsisayam yifoi ewatembai ngángé a yiyánjai ár. Yesum yawangoi, "Yénd ménde fété wém. So mer némǃ" 42 Táf fété yaufi ghéngan enjneyam yéfrangoi merafayo.
english: Yesu mercy thing filled reached hand and touched man. "Me want immediate am." Yesu answered. "Will good are 42 When immediate evil skin sick left him good.

nama: Njam Yesum ewawinjoi yéfene ndimbal mwighé, fá norayai, "Fútar, fene yaufi té wawalinda."
english: When Yesu saw their big mind(faith), they said, "Friend, your.s sins had was forgiven."

nama: Ámb nák watamegh ár tamorangérwén kété, kemnawét yéfenjomén, 7 "Némamén yéné ár ndené si noraye? Yémon Ngánjánene sifayé résaghét yafngoǃ Ngánjánro yém efe so tawalindangé yaufiyam!"
english: Other law teaching men was sitting there, thinking about theirs, 7 "Why this man like talk said? He cursing talk talk said! God is the only one who can forget/forgive sins!"

nama: Yesu néngafértai ámbirotaro néngwanoi ndimbal arakaf téndomé. Ár mérén enmormén yáfaf, a yémon watamegh ewafngoi fá. 14 Fá njam tiyoyawéng, Yesum yinjoi Lefi Alfasene ambum témorangérwén mani kafégh méngon. Yesum témndangé, "Yénd kwénmaitoǃ" a Lefi nokayoi yéngwaitoi Yesu.
english: Yesu went once again went big swamp beside. Man crowd came to him, and he teaching began them. 14 They when walked, Yesu saw him Lefi of Alphaeus son stayed money collecting in house. "Follow me" Yesu tell, and Lefi got up followed him Yesu.

nama: Yesum eyárai a ewawangoi, Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Yau mer árém njokté yarawetat wénde enjne téfnáramro. Yénd yau mbarkánd ár moghét wénmormén, wénde yaufi ár wanjarghét." Yesu yémotayénd awafarmanéghmén
english: Yesu heard them and answered, "Not good people need a doctor but sick only men. I not straight man come , but evil man save." They asked Yesu about fasting

nama: Jonene waitogh ár a Farasi ár kawafarmetawét. Ámb ár enmormén Yesu yémotayénd, "Jonene waitogh ár a Farasi ár nawafarmetat, wénde némamén fene waitogh ár yauǃ"
english: Jon following man and Farasi man . Other man came Yesu is, "How this is Jon following man and Farasi your , but your not

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Totér awerégh téfnárane ár yau so nawafarmetat njamandio fá em yémafé? 20 Wénde efogh yéna yéném njam awerégh ár so nguwanongé yéfe tambén, yéné efghon fá so nawafarmetat."
english: Yesu answered, "How will guest men new men bridegroom while they are with them? They not will bridegroom. 20 But time/day this when take man will go them from, this in day they will bridegroom."

nama: Ámb Safatan Yesu tiotau kun ndawan yánjo waitogh árfé, yánjo waitogh árém ewafngoyénd kun mbwe férarégh. 24 Farasi ár norayayénd Yesuefaf, "Némamén yémofem ásáfogh yafrotat Safatan táf téfene nák yém?"
english: Other Sabbath Yesu walked corn in garden and his following man with man, they picked corn seed began. 24 Farasi men said to Yesu, "Why they working do in Sabbath must our law is?"

nama: Féyo Yesu wifogh si norayai yéfefaf, "Ngánjánam Safat yafrotam ároe, wénde yau ár yafrotam Safatoe. 28 Féyo Ároene Ambum siyém Safatoe Yuré."
english: Then Yesu strict talk said to them, "Sabbath be made for man, not man for Sabbath. 28 Then Of man child is Sabbath Lord."

nama: Yesum emotai fá, "Árkéméné nák yém Safatan, mer wafroghét o yaufi wafroghét, ghérsé wanjarghét o ár ngiot?" Wénde fá métar náyátoyénd yáne sian.
english: Yesu asked them, "Which is lawful to do, to save life or kill the people?" But they remained silently in this talk.

nama: Yémon ghékfe fá tawámnjotau nékwafé, fá mwighé kérté nawerai yéfenemén ménamén tikéf táikér tamorwén. Féyo Yesum yémndai, "Ngángé táfer." Yémon ngángé yéferyéng táf yáne ngángé mer náyátoyéng. 6 Farasi ár néngwanoyénd a mwighé táfrendawét Erodene árfé Yesue ngiot. Ndimbal mérén eném Yesuefaf
english: He looked with eyes(looked around) them, he felt sad about them because their heart were hard(stubborn). So Yesu said, "Stretch out [your] hand." He stretched [his] hand, his hand healed 6 Farasi men went out and began to plot with Erod's people [how]to kill Yesu. Crowds follow Yesu

nama: Yesu nélawai méngot, wéikor ár mérén náumendam, yénémamén Yesu a yánjo waitogh ár njamke yau enetaménd. 21 Njam yáne mérén náyárayénd némé kufrotau, fá engmormén kétán Yesue wangoghét ménamén yémofem témndetawét ndené, "Fá siyém onon yém."
english: Yesu entered a house, [and] again crowd gathered, Yesu and his following men were not able to eat food. 21 When his family heard what was happening, they went to take him away because they thought that, "He is out of mind."

nama: Nák watamegh téfnár efe enmormén kétándmé Jerusalemta norayayénd, "Fá siyém Beljebabém yarsoteǃ Yaufi mbérmbérafene sénko ároene muyaye, yémon yaufi mbérmbér ewifne."
english: The teaching men of the law who came from Jerusalem said, "He is possessed by Beljebabǃ With the Power of head men of the evil spirits, he cast out evil spirits."

nama: Yesum korayau yéné si ménamén fá korayawét, "Fá kar yaufi mbérmbérafé témorwén." Yesue yátmé a yánngnéf
english: Yesu said this talk because they were saying, "He has an evil spirit." Yesu's mother and his young brothers

nama: Yesue yátmé a yánngnéf nénufaryénd. Tawakayongérwén méngo téndota, yémofem yáfáretayénd ámb ár Yesuefaf. 32 Ár mérén kénjún témorangérwén Yesu, a yémofem yaufroyénd yá, "Fene amé a fenngnéf téndota ewakai fém néronjat."
english: Yesu's mother and his younger brothers arrived. They stood outside house, they sent someone to call Yesu. 32 A crowd was sitting around Yesu, and they said to him, "Your mother and your younger brother are standing outside and are looking for you.

nama: Yémo emotai, "Efe em tane amé a tane nénngnéf?"
english: "Who are my mother and my little brother?" he asked. 34 Then he looked at those who seated around him and said, "Here are My mother and my little brothers! 35 Whoever does God's will he is my younger bother and my sister and mother."

nama: Féyo Yesu norayai, "Fá efe ténganafé yém áyárghét, fá so káyárangé."
english: Then Yesu said, "He who has ears to hear, let him hear"

nama: Yesum ndenéyameyo noyarai, "Ár yau ndené nufarotat lambefé sinan sái etnotat a yame mbanmbanan. Wénde árém tafayongi lambefé kitarékitarayan. 22 Kété siyém némé yau warambnoghmén yém, árkéméné so kakmangé marataye. Némé ténoghe yém safén so kakmangé. 23 Njam ténganafé ném, káyárǃ
english: Yesu said like that, "You don't bring in a lamp to put in a pot under a mat. But you put it on the table. 22 Whatever cannot be hidden, therefore it will be brought into the open. What was in secret will be brought light. 23 If you.s has ears, hearǃ

nama: Yéné férghan, Yesum emndai yánjo waitogh ár, "Kétándmé karéf arakaf kurtongém." 36 Féyo yémofem efrangoyénd ár mérén, a yáne waitogh árfé nuwanoyénd 37 Ndimbal mbormboram eutfoi sawan. Sóf armbogh nufngoyénd bout olitoghétro témorwén.
english: That evening, Yesu said to his following men, "Let us go over to the other side." 36 So they left the crowds [behind], and his following men started. 37 The storm came up in the lake. The waves broke over the bout, [so that] it was nearly swamped.

nama: Yesu kémégh tékmangérwén sénko tafal téfayongérwén bout kwémbta. Fá témorwén kémégh kér. Yáne waitogh árém tanongi a témndangi, "Watamegh ár, yénd olitoghétro yéném, yénd fémon té yénmarawene?"
english: Yesu was in bottom of the bout., sleeping. He slept like died(deeply). His following men woke him up and shouting, "Teacher, we are going to drown, don't you care us?

nama: Yesu kéméghta nanoi mbormbor a sóf emndeyai, "Métar kamnden." Métar namndeyayénd táf fété.
english: He got up, said to the wind and waves, "Be quiet." It was completely calm.

nama: Yesum emndai yánjo waitogh ár, "Némamén fém férfér em? Féfene ndimbal mwighé té yém?"
english: Yesu said to his following men, "Why are you afraid? Where is your big mind(faith)?

nama: Fá minde férfér tamorwén a korayangi yéfe kénjúnro, "Efe yéné yém? Mbormbor a sófam fá yiyárend!"
english: They were very afraid and said to each other, "Who is this? [Even] the wind and the waves obey himǃ"

nama: Njam yéné árom yinjoi Yesu nayuta, fá nénenngoi Yesuefaf a budme niyai. 7 Fá nutnayéng yánjo ke féyotaroyan, "Yesu, Minde tukén Ngánjánene ambum, némat fém ménde ném tafaf? Ngánjánene yétkwénan, fémon yau tékrátan kwékémǃ" 8 Ménamén Yesu norayai yáfaf, "Fém yaufi mbérmbér, kéntor yéné ároe tambénǃ"
english: When that man saw Yesu far away, he came back to Yesu and knelt before him. 7 He shouted with his voice limitted, "Yesu, the son of the Most high God, what do you want from me? In the name of God, you don't cast me!" 8 Yesu said to him, "Come out of this man, you evil spirit!"

nama: Féyo Yesum yémotai fá, "Fene yétkwén efe yém?"
english: Then Yesu answered him, "Who(what) is your name?" "My name is the plenty," he answered, "because we are plenty."

nama: Yémon wawérmanéghe taurémnau Yesu ménát yau yéfe witroghét yéné sifayata.
english: He really wanted Yesu not to take them out of this place.

nama: Táf fété Yesuene wafté néférmai. Fá nawengoi ár mérnafefaf a kamotangé, "Emo tane sáláme yiyánja?"
english: At once the Power of Yesu left [from him]. He turned around to the people and asked, "Who touched my clothes?"

nama: Yáne waitogh ár norayayénd yáfaf, "Kéreta yéné árfefaf emofem fém némarendangiǃ Némamén fém namote emo fém nianja?"
english: His following men said to him, "Look those people who surrounded you! How did you ask, who touched you?"

nama: Njamandio Yesu mé korayau, ámb ár enmormén Jairusene méngota efe témorwén áumengégh méngo sénko ár. Yémofem norayayénd, "Fene mérés kér té tém, Némamén watamegh ár ndenayu yawérsotati."
english: While Yesu was still speaking, some men came from the house of Jairus, head man of Yesu's family(church). "Your daughter has died," they said, "Why bother the teaching man any more?"

nama: Yesum ekenai yéfene si a fá norayai Jairusefaf, "Yau férfér ném, efalo kwiyátoǃ"
english: Yesu ignored their saying, Yesu told Jairus, "don't be afraid; trust me."

nama: Yesum yéfrangoi yéné yu a néngwanoi yánjo tesenot yánjo waitogh árfé. 2 Njam Safat nawerai, yémon watamegh yérnyai áumengégh méngon, tárfár ár efe káyáretawét yáne sifaf sélngwél tamorwén.
english: Yesu left this place and went to his town with his following men. 2 When the Safat came, he started to teach in the Yesu's family(church), many people who heard his talk, they were surprised.

nama: Fá siyém méngo ramégh árro. Meriene ambum yém, Jems, Josef, Judas a Saimon yánngnéf em. Yáne mérésmérésafé yénd yéna yéném." Yémofem yékenayénd.
english: He is a carpenter. He is Meri's son. Jems, Josef, Judas and Saimon are his small brother. His sister are here with us. People are not happy because what he was doing miraculous thing.

nama: Warsagh ár Erod náyárai Yesuenemén ménamén yáne yétkwén marat náyátoi. Ámb ár korayawét, "Jon walitogh ár kérta nénano, yénémamén sélngwélafé ásáfogh yémon ewafrote."
english: King Erod heard about Yesu because his name became well known. Some people were talking, "Jon the baptist has been raised from the dead, because he was performing miraculos things.

nama: Ámb árém korayawét, "Yéné Elaija séno yém." Ámb ár wéi mé korayawét, "Fá siyém mat yátogh ár yém, ndenanit tándái ámb mat yátogh ár kés tanmorwén."
english: Others said, "That might be Eliaja." Others still said, "He is a God's man who make know(prophet), like one of God's man who make know(prophet) were of long time ago."

nama: Wénde njam Erod náyárai Yesuenemén, fá norayai ndené, "Jon séno yémǃ Yéndon efe sénko yénfayén, fá séno nénano ghérsat."
english: But when Erod heard about Yesu, the said that, "Might be Jon! Whom I cut the head, he might be arised to life.

nama: Ámb efghon Erodene áráfégh efogh téménd nawerai, yémon ewarawai yánjo tuk ásáfogh ár a fiyaré sénko ár a Galili yumén limánégh ár. 22 Njam Erodiasene yámérés nélawai téménd sifayat ermángégh nufngoi, warsagh ár Erod a yáne wan téfnárafene merotro.
english: The other day it was Erod's birthday, he invited his high officials and military coomanders and head men of Galili region. 22 When daughter of Erodias went in the feasting place to started to dance, she pleased King Erod and his guests.

nama: Yéndon efalo si némndetan fém ndené witmé karéf méngotu so kémafarorén, njam fém ménde ném."
english: I tell you the truth I will divide half of the village[kingdom], if you want.

nama: Mérés néngtoryéng a yátmé yémndai, "Yéndo némat so tamnendangén?" Yatmam yawangoi, "Jon walitogh ároene sénkotǃ"
english: The girls went out and told her mother, "What will I ask for?" Mother answered, "The head of Jon the Baptist."

nama: Mérés wékeye néngangoi a Erode yaufroi, "Yénd ménde wém sénonjo kwaram Jon walitogh ároene sénko merekinan kwawafél."
english: The girl went back quickly and told Erod, " I want you to give me the head of Jon the Baptist on a platter."

nama: Yesuene muyafé ár nénangotaménd Yesuefaf, yémofem taufrotawét yáyot yéfene ásáfoghmén a watameghmén. 31 Wénde tárfár ár tanmorwén a tangmorwén Yesuefaf a yáne muyafé árfefaf yéfeyot ámb féneféne yau témorwén nénet. Féyo Yesum emndai, "Kuwanongém métar sifayat enaghét."
english: The men with Yesu's authority(apostles) came back to Yesu, they told him about their work and teaching. 31 But many people were coming and going to Yesu and to his men with Yesu's authority(apostles), [so] they have no chance to eat. So Yesu told them, "Let's go to the quiet place to have a rest."

nama: Séitefifiyan Yesuene waitogh ár enmormén yáfaf a yémndayénd, "Yéné sifayé siyém yauyau sifayé yém a séite té namndé. 36 Ewafarnai ár kaka méngotuot a witmé mband karéf áronjaghét yéfendio njamket."
english: In the late afternoon, his following men came to Yesu and told him, "This is a remote place and it's almost very late. 36 Send the people away to nearby villages and other side to look for food for themselves to eat."

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Fémofem tawaramangi némndafi nénet." Wénde yémofem yémotayénd Yesu, "Fém ménde ném yéndfem 10,000 kinaye yéfe njamke résaghét?"
english: Yesu answered, " You give them something to eat." But they asked Yesu, "Do you want us to get 10,000 Kina worth of food?"

nama: Féyo Yesum emotai, "Nderé tárfár njamke ewam? Tangém kénufénmangi." Fá nénangoyénd a yaufroyénd ndené, "Téfene em 5 féskaf flawé a sómbio wagif."
english: Then Yesu asked, "How mich food do you have? Go and see." They came back and told him that, "We have 5 rapt of biskar and two fish."

nama: Yesum emndai yánjo waitogh ár tekofnar uflighét bout kénjút a néngwanoyénd Betsaidat, njam ár mérén engwafarnai. 46 Soramé fá engéfrangoi, fá néngwanoi witmé karéf mband tunakfot Ngánjánafé orayéghét.
english: Yesu told his following men to get into the bout quickly and left to Besaida, while he sent people away. 46 After he left people, he went up on the mountainside to talk with God.

nama: Féyo Yesu boutot nuflai, mbormbor táf nékmboi. Fá minde sélngwél emormén. 52 Yémofem yau yáyámngoyénd Yesuene wafté 5,000 ár manjarghan ménamén yéfene tikéf mé táikér tamorwén. Yesum mer táyátotau enjne téfnár Ganasaretén
english: Then Yesu climbed into the bout, the wind stopped. They were still confused. 52 They did not recognize Yesu' authority to feed 5,000 people because their mind were still on doubt. Yesu healed the sick people in Ganasaret

nama: Farasi ár a nák watamegh ár efe enmormén Jerusalemta Yesufé náumendayénd. 2 Yémofem ewinjoyénd ámb Yesuene waitogh ár ngángé umbarghofnar tamorwén néneyan.
english: Farasi men and the teaching men of the law who came from Jerusalem gathered around Yesu. 2 They saw some of Yesu's following men was eating without washing.

nama: Farasi ár a nák watamegh árém Yesu yémotayénd, "Némamén fene waitogh ár yau ndenáye emor téfene ákiafene watamegh ndernáye témorwén? Némamén yémofem njamke enetat yéfene ngángé umbarghofnar?"
english: Farasi men and the techers of law asked Yesu, " Why your following men don't live like our ancesters teaching how was? Why they eat without washing their hands?"

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Aisayane si efalo témorwén njam fá kafrotau féfenemén ndené fém efe farun mer néretati wénde kénjún yau. Ndenaye fété si kés yéfarotaménd, "Ngánján noraye, yéné árém wutémndat yénd mé mbérmbérero, wénde yéfene tikéf em nayu ta tambén.
english: Yesu answered them, " Aisaya was straight talk saying when he said about you liar men(hypocrites), as talk already wrote: "These people respect me with only their lips, but their heart are far from me.

nama: Yémofem wáwefnotat ta fifiofnar yéfene watamegh em ár wafroghmén."
english: They worship me in vain their teaching are that men made."

nama: Fémofem ekarotati Ngánjánene si wénde nawertati ár wafroghmén sian."
english: You ignore God's talk but hold talk that men made."

nama: Yesum emotai ár tárfár yáfafaftio a emndai, "Kénáyárangi tafaf, méinyotio mat kamndangi. 15-16\~ Fémon némé enete a kénjút yéngém, yémo yau mámáfi tiyátongé. Wénde némé kénjuta kéntorngé farut yémo mámáfi ár yiyátote."
english: Yesu called the crowd to him and said, "Listen to me, every people, understand it. 15-16\~ What you eat with lips and go into don't make unclean. But what comes out of that make unclean."

nama: Wénde Yesu norayai, "Ambum fronde njamkeye témanjnangiǃ Yau mer nérete yéfene njamke ághafet manjarghét."
english: But Yesu said, "First I feed the children! [It's] not straight to take thier food and throw to the dogs."

nama: Amafom yawangoi, "Yuré, Ambumtértrafene njamke mbarmbar nénguitat, ágham enetat kitaré mbanmbanan."
english: The woman answered, "Lord, the scraps of Children food dropped, dogs eat under the table.

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Efalo yéné yémǃ Fém nguwano sénonjo. Yaufi mbérmbéram fene mérés té yéfrango."
english: Yesu answered her, " It is true! Go now. The evil spirit has left your daughter."

nama: Njam amaf néngangoi méngot, yémon yinjoi yámérés tékmangérwén yameyan, yaufi mbérmbér frangoghkaf témorwén. Yesum mer yiyátoi téngan méngu a babé ár
english: When the woman went home and she found her daughter lying on the matress, and the evil spirit was gone. Yesu heals a deaf and mute man

nama: Yesum yéfrangoi Taire a néngwanoi Sidon a Dekafolis tesenamé nufaryéng Galili arakaffaf. 32 Ámb árém yénérsaménd yáfaf ár efe téngan méngu a babé témorwén. Yémofem yamnendayénd Yesu yanjaghétro.
english: Yesu left the Taire and went Sidon area [and] went down the sea of Galili and around the region of Dekafolis. 32 Some people took to him a man who was deaf and mute. They asked Yesu just to touch him.

nama: Soramé Yesum yéngutoryéng téndot ár mérénta, Yesum ngángé efayoi ároene ténganan. Ndenéyameyo mbérém efayoi ngángayan a yayanjai yáne kánké. 34 Fá néwewoi njafarot a kénjkam ghérghérsisafé yémndai, "Efataǃ" yáne fifi yém 'Kasawérǃ' 35 Táf fété ároene téngan nasawéryénd, a si mere néngufngoi.
english: After Yesu took him aside from the crowd, Yesu put the middle finger into man's ears. Then he spit [and] touched the man's tongue with the middle finger 34 He looked up to the heaven and with a deep sigh said, 'Efata!' this meaning is "Be opened!" 35 Instantly, man's ears opened, and speak a talk well.

nama: Yesum ekmboi fá yau néngafrotati ámb árfefaf. Yémon mé takmbotau yau nafrotati némé yéndon tafrotan, wénde árém ménjtaye mé ngafrotawét yánemén. 37 Ár sélngwél emormén a fá norayayénd, "Yémon tafrote yéné ásáfogh merfifi. Yémon mer yiyáto téngan méngu a babé ár."
english: Yesu commended them not to tell to anyone. But the more he did saying, the more the people continue to talked about it. 37 People were amazed and they said, "[That] he does this work [is] well. He heals deaf and mute man."

nama: Yánjo waitogh árém yawangoyénd, "Wénde ánde yéné yauyau sifayan árké árom téu tanwawanangé féskaf flawé yéfe manjarghét?"
english: His following men answered, "But where in this nothing place which people can take cassava to feed them?"

nama: Yesum emotayéng, "Njénamb féskaf flawé em féfefaf?" Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Sefenro"
english: "How many cassavas do you have?" Yesu asked. "Only 7," they answered.
