nama: Yáne waitogh ár engwawalindai féskaf flawé résaghét. Wénde ámbiro yéfefaf boutan taflangérwén. 15 Yesum tamndetau fá, "Kor aem Farasi árfene a Erodene flawé minaghmén."
english: His following men forgot to bring cassava. But only one [bag] they had with them in the bout . 15 Yesu told them, "Be alert. Be careful the yeast of Farasi men and Erod."

nama: Yémofem warunyéghét yiyátoyénd yénémamén yéfe kénjúnro fá norayayénd, "Ménamén yénd flawafnar yéném."
english: They began to discuss in themselves and said, "[it is ]because we have no cassavas."

nama: "Yéndon njam sefen féskaf flawé etfotamén yéfe 4,000 árét, nderé tárfár yáf afoghare njamke mbarmbar ekafayénd fémofem?" Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Sefen."
english: When I broke 7 flowa for 4,000 people, how many basketfuls of pieces of food did you pick up? They answered, "Seven."

nama: Fá norayai yéfefaf, "Némé féfene mwighé kwéfkwéfan mé ewam?" Yesum mer yiyátoi ghékéf kwéfkwéf ár Betsaidan
english: He said to them, "Do you still not understand?" Yesu healed the blind man in Betsaida

nama: Fá enmormén kétán Betsaidat, a ámb árém yénémnjaménd ghékéf kwéfkwéf ár a Yesu yaunendayénd yá yanjaghét. 23 Yesum ngángayan yéngwerai a yéngémnjoi méngotu téndot. Njam yémon mbérme yéfarndai ároene ghékéf a Yesum táf ngángé efayoi yáfaf, a yémotai, "Fémo ámb rokar té efande?"
english: They came to Betsaida, and some people brought a blind man and begged Yesu to touch him. 23 Yesu held him by the hand and took him outside the village. When he spitted [on] man's eyes and put his hands on him, Yesu asked, " Do you see anything?"

nama: Fá tukét néwewoi a norayai, "Yéndo ár efandan wénnit narendat."
english: He looked up and said, "I see people moving like trees."

nama: Ámbirotaro Yesum wéi ngángé efayoi yéné ároene ghékfan. Féyo táf yáne ghékéf nasawéryénd a yáne erégh nawafarnjaméng, a méinyotio rokar kwayaghan tafandau. 26 Yesum yéngwáfáretai méngot a témndangé, "Yau méngotuot kufar." Fité norayai Yesu siyém Keriso
english: Once more Yesu put his hands on this man's eyes. Then his eyes began to see and his sight was recovered, and he saw everything clearly. 26 Yesu sent him home and said, "Don't go into the village." Fitè's true saying about Keriso

nama: Yesu a yánjo waitogh ár néngwanoyénd tárfár méngotuamé yénamé Kaisaria Filifi yuwomé. Álighan Yesum engmotai yánjo waitogh ár, "Ár norayat yénd efe wém?"
english: Yesu and his following men went through many villages around region of Kasaria Filifi. On the way Yesu asked his following men, "People say who I am?"

nama: Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Ámb norayat Jon walitogh ár, wéi ámb norayat Elaija, a mé ámb árém néngorayat, ndené ámb Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár."
english: They answered, "Some say Jon the Baptist; other people say Elaija; and still other people say, might be a God's man who make know(prophet)."

nama: Yémon emotai, "Wénde fém wét ndernáye? Fém ndernáye norayati yénd efe wém?" Fitam yawangoi, "Fém fété ném Keriso."
english: "But what about you?" he asked. "How do you say I am?" Fitè answered, "You are Keriso."

nama: Yesum ekmboi fá ende yau taufrongi efe yénd wém. Yesu korayau yánjo kérmén
english: Yesu stopped them not to tell anyone about him. Yesu told them about his death

nama: Wénde njam Yesu nawengoi efandai yánjo waitogh ár, yémon sotafé si Fité yémndai, "Sáifér! Kitrémb ta tambén. Fene mwighé yau em Ngánjáneta, wénde árta."
english: But Yesu turned around and saw his following men, he rebuked Fitè. "Go away from me, Sáifèr! Your thought is not from God but from men."

nama: A yémon emndai fá, "Yéndon féfe efalo ewaufrotan, ámb ár efe yéna ewakai yémofem fronde so tinjongi Ngánján limánégh sái yéném ménáyafé waftafé soramé kér em." Yesu nafurnai
english: And he said to them, "I tell you the truth, some who are standing here will not taste death before they see the ruling of God come with power." Yesu was changed

nama: Siks efogh soramé Yesu Fité, Jems a Jon néwanoyénd mband tunakfot, ánde fáro méinyotio tamorwén. Kété fá nafurnai yéfene sáfrére. 3 Yáne sáláme nálálai kafe ngarot ánde yau so tinjo ndené kwayaghé yéné mbandan. 4 A kété nufareyayénd yéfe sáfrére Elaija a Moses fá korayawét Yesufé.
english: After 6 days Yesu went to the mountain with Fitè, Jems and Jon, where they only themselves. There he was changed in front of them. 3 His clothes shined white where it can not be found in the world like as that bright. 4 And there appeared before them Elaija and Moses, they were talking with Yesu. 5 Fitè said to Yesu, "Teacher, it is good for us to be here. We will build three houses-one for you, one for Moses and one for Elaija. 6 (He did not know what to say, they were so frightened.)

nama: Féyo yéné soramé njafar kwamkwamam ewafaryéng fá, a kém yénmormén njafar kwamkwamta. "Yéné siyém tane ambum efe yéndon yuwetan. Káyárangi yáfafǃ"
english: Then after that a cloud covered them, and a voice came from the sky: "This is my son, whom I love. Listen to him!"

nama: Tekofnaye fá njam néngretayénd yémofem efe ámb yau yinjoyénd mé Yesuro.
english: Suddenly, when they looked [around], they did not see anyone but only Yesu.

nama: Njamandio fá kénewonawét mband tunakéfta yuwot, Yesum ekmboi ende yau táf taufrongi némé fémofem té téfandati kétánotio Ároene Ambum kérta kanongé. 10 Yémofem tarambnotawét yam yéfenjo kénjúnro taruindawét némé 'kérta anoghmén' fifi témorwén.
english: While they were coming down the mountain, Yesu gave them orders not to telll anyone about what you saw until the Son of Man rise from dead. 10 They kept secret to themselves, discussing about meaning of "rising from the dead."

nama: A yémofem yémotayénd fá, "Némamén nák watamegh árém norayat ndené, 'Elaija so yéném fronde soramé Keriso?'"
english: And they asked him, "Why do the teaching man of the law say that Elaija will(must) come first?"

nama: Njam Yesu a yánjo nambio waitogh árfé kénewonawét, yémofem ewinjoyénd ár mérén yáne waitogh ár ewarendayénd a kété nák watamegh árfé kéwitawét sian. 15 Tekofnaye njam méinyotio árém yinjoyénd Yesu, fá ndimbal kéráye sélngwél emormén yénémamén wérseye yanfetayénd fá áuwéghafé.
english: When they came to the other following men, they saw a large crowd surrounded them and the teaching men of the law arguing with them. 15 Not long all the people saw Yesu, they were bigly surprised about this and ran to greet him.

nama: Yémon emotai, "Némamén fém néwitati yémafé?"
english: "What are you arguing with them about?" he asked.

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "O efalo yátoghofnar ár mérén, nderé teke yénd so wémor féfefaf? Nderé teke yénd so métar wém féfefaf? Ténmanend ghakér ambum tafaf."
english: O unbelieveing people," Yesu answered, " how long shall I stay with you? How long will I be patient to you? Bring the boy to me."

nama: Féyo yémofem yénmanayénd ambum yáfaf. Njam yaufi mbérmbéram yinjoi Yesu, táf fété ambumom sorar tatirnau. Fá yéntarmai mbandot, kaumnau, féfam tetotau.
english: So they brought the child to him. When the spirit saw Yesu, it threw the boy into the ground and rolled, shivering the teeth.

nama: Yesum yárefé yémotai, "Nderé teke fá tém ndené siyém?" Yémon yawangoi, "Kétándmayo fá tosé. 22 Tárfár mbinotmé yéta yaufi mbérmbéram ngiot térametau fá fését unamngoghét a nuwan walitoghét. Njam téu yénmáutána fene ghérghérsisaye."
english: "How long has he been like this?" Yesu asked his father.

nama: Yesu norayai, "Némamén ndené noraye, njam téu yénmáutána? Méinyotio yam áfrátro em yáyot emo efalo yiyátota."
english: "For sure to you?" said Yesu "Everything is possbile for him who truly approves(believes)."

nama: Tekofnaye yéné ambumoe yárefam nuwangoi, "Yéndon efalo yiyátotan. Ta kwáutána ménát so yéndon efalo yiyátotan minde."
english: Immediately the boy's father answered, "I truly approve(believe), help me to believe more strongly!"

nama: Yesum njam ewinjoi ár mérén kénérsawét kaka, yémon yémndai yaufi mbérmbér. Fá norayai, "Fém téngan déudéu a babé mbérmbér, yéndon némndetan, kéntor yá tambén a yau kélau wéikor yáfaf."
english: When Yesu saw that the crowd was running close to him, he rebuked the evil spirit. "You deaf and mute spirit," he said, "I command you, come out of him and never enter him again."

nama: Yaufi mbérmbér nutnayéng yaufi keyafé ambum yétarmai mbandot a nétoryéng. Ambum ndenanit néretai kar kér yémormén tárfár ár norayayénd, "Fá kér té tém." 27 Wénde Yesum yéngwerai ngángaye a yéngwakayoyéng.
english: The evil spirit shouted with bad cry, threw the boy to the ground and came out. The boy looked like that he was dead the many said, "He is dead." 27 But Yesu held hom by the hand and made him stand.

nama: Soramé Yesu nénglawai, yánjo waitogh árém yémotayénd fá kwankwane, "Némamén yénd féyotarofnar ténmorwén yéné yaufi mbérmbér wifarghét?"
english: After Yesu went inside, his following men asked him secretly, "Why couldn't we cast out that evil spirit?"

nama: Yémon ewawangoi, "Némaye ámb yau mé Ngánjánafé oraighanro yaufi mbérmbér so ewifnati." Yesum wéikor korayau yánjo kérmén
english: He answered, "Nothing else can cast out the evil spirit only by talking with God."

nama: Fá engmormén kétán Káfenamét. Fá njam méngo kénjún télawangérwén, yémon emotai fá, "Némamén fém nénwitati endmé?" 34 Wénde fá métar nékmboyénd ménamén álighan fá kéwitawét efe ndimbal so kamndangé.
english: They went to kafenam. When he was in ther house, he asked them, "Why were you arguing on the road?" 34 But they kept quiet because on the way they had argued [about] who will be big.

nama: Yesu námnjo a emotai 12 waitogh ár a tamndangé, "Njam ámb ár ménde yém frondeyot, fá táf némbnar kamndangé méinyotio árfene ásáfoghét."
english: When they sat down, Yesu asked the 12 and said, "If anyone wants to be first, he must be last person, and the without.payment working man(servant) of all the people."

nama: Yémon yénémnjoi némbne ambum tosé yakayoi yéfe kénjún. A tambnangé a korayangé yéfefaf, 37 "Emon tumyongé ndené ambum tosé tane yétkwénan ndenéyameyo yénd kwumyongé, a emo yénd kwumyongé yau yénd kwumyongé wénde fá emo yénd kwémáfárete." Emofé yénd yau néuwitam fá sem téfene
english: He brought a little child among them, and grabbed him and said to them. 37 Who[ever] welcomes like this child in my name in the same way welcomes me; and whoever welcomes me does not welcome me but he who sent me." Whoever is not against us he is for us.

nama: Jon norayai, "Watamegh ár, yéndfem yinjoyém ámb ár tawifnau yaufi mbérmbér fene yétkwénan, féyo yémndayém, 'Fém kékmbo,' ménamén fém yau téfene mérénmén ár ném."
english: Jon said, "Teacher, we saw a man driving out the evil spirit in your name, so we told him, " You stop" , you are not from our group."

nama: "Emo njam yéméinda totér ambum yaufiot, nderé mer yém kéman ndimbal wím sái yumbetat a yitat árakafot. Yáne fai siyém némbnar. Wénde Ngánjánam sái taramangé yéné ároe minde ndimbal. 43-44\~ Fene ngángayam njam néméinda fém yaufiot, yéné ngángé téngnéf. Njam ámbiro ngángafé nguwano njafar méngotuot, yéné siyém mer. Wénde sómbio ngángafé njam nguwano ambino tuot fését ánde yau so kékmbongé, yéné siyém mámáfi. 45-46\~
english: If anyone causes to sin these little child who truly approve(believe) me, how good will be for him tied around his neck with a big stone and throw it into the sea. 43-44\~ If your hand makes you to sin, cut one of your hand. How good will be for you to go into life with one hand, [instead of you go] into the without.end home(hell) with your two hands. 45-46\~

nama: Njam fene ghékfam néméinda fém yaufiot, tutor yéné. Njam ámbiro ghékfafé nguwano Ngánjánene limánéghét, yéné siyém mer. Wénde sómbio ghékfafé njam nguwano ambino tuot fését, yéné siyém mámáfi. 48 Ánde 'Yéfene sésfél yau so kér em, a fés yau so kékmbongé.'
english: If your eye makes you to sin, take away one of your eyes. How good will be for you to enter God's kingdom with one eye instead of having two eyes which will cause you to throw you to the fire(hell), 48 where 'their worms do not die, and the fire is not stopped.'

nama: Méinyotio ár so njúnnjúnofnar eyátote fésam ndené fété solam ghéngén njúnnjúnofnar tiyátongé.
english: Everyone will be purified by fire as a sacrifice is purified by salt.

nama: Sol siyém mer, wénde yáne ménde njam kefongé, ndernáye fémon so yafarnje wéikor ndené méndetio? Yau, fém solnit aném, a mer métar ghérsé ámb árfé emor."
english: Salt is good, but if it is loses its taste, how can you make salty again? You must be salt, and be at peace with one another."

nama: Féyo Yesum yéfrangoi yéné yu néngwanoi Judiat a néngférmai Joden wanje. Wéikor ár mérén enmormén kétán yáfaf, túmén yam áumengéghan, yémon tawatametau fá.
english: Then Yesu left that place and went up to other side of Judia and across the Joden river. Again crowd came to him, as usual, he taught them.

nama: Ámb Farasi ár enmormén tufotawét ménaye ámoghe, "Féyotaro yém nákan árém so tatembangé yánjo amaf?
english: Some Farasi men came and tested him by asking, "How does law say about divorce?

nama: Yémon ewawangoi, "Ndernáye Mosesém tamndetau?"
english: "How did Moses teach you? he answered.

nama: Yémofem yémndayénd, "Mosesém ár tamndangai watembégh férén faroghét a amaf táf tangwatembangayénd watembégh férnafé."
english: They said, "Moses instructed a man to write a divorce letter and sent wife away with divorce letter."

nama: Fá njam méngo kénjún tamorwén wéikor, yáne waitogh árém yémotayénd Yesu yénémamén. 11 Yémon ewawangoi, "Árké árom yánjo amaf tatembangé a kawerangé ámb mérés amafanyo nák erafne yáne amafoefaf. 12 A njam amafom yánjar tatembangé a kawerangé ámb ár yémon amafanyo nák erafne." Ambum tértér a Yesu
english: When they were in their house again, his diciples asked Yesu about this. 11 He answered, "Which person divorces his wife and marries another woman breaks the law to his wife. 12 And if wife divorces his husband and marries another man, she breaks the law." The little children and Yesu

nama: Njamandio Yesu álighét nufngoi, ár nénenngoi yáfaf a budme niyai yá sáfrére. Yémon yémotai, "Mer watamegh ár, yéndon némé so yafrotan tuot ghérsé résaghét?"
english: As Yesu was about to walk, a man ran to him and knelt before him. "Good teaching man," he asked, "What can I do to get enternal life?"

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Némamén fémon wémnde ndené mer? Yau efe mer yém, mé Ngánjánro fáro. 19 Fém mat ném náknák, 'Ár ngi yau, amafanyo wanégh yau, oro yau, unyégh si yau ewaufrota, wasogh yau, eutémanwé fene fetmé a ferafé.'"
english: "Why do you call me good? Yesu answered. "No one is good, only God alone. 19 You know the commandments: 'Do not murder, do not commit adultary, do not steal, do not lie, do not cheat, respect your mother and father."

nama: Yémon témndangé, "Watamegh ár, yéné nák méinyotio yéndon taweretan kétándmayo yénd tosé kwémorwén."
english: "Teacher," he said, "all these commandments I was faithful since I was a small."

nama: Yesum yéfandai áuwéghafé fá, a témndangé, "Ámbiro yam fefaf náláite, kuwano, etérna fene méinyotio rokar némé em a engwarameta méinyotio mani yauyau árét, a fene ngonjél so nawamndat njafaran. Féyo kénaf, yénd kwénmaito."
english: Yesu saw him with love. "Only one thing you are missing," Yesu said. "Go, sell everything you have and [then] give all money to the poor, and your riches will be kept in heaven. Then come, follow me."

nama: Táf fété ár ghérghérsisafé nuwanoi, ménamén ndimbal wemár témorwén.
english: At the same time the man's face fell, he went away sad, because he was a big rich man.

nama: Yesu néngretai a tamndangé yánjo waitogh ár, "Nderé táikér yém wemár ároe kétán élaughét Ngánján limánéghétǃ"
english: Yesu looked and said to his following men, "How hard it is for the rich man to enter the kindom of God!"

nama: Waitogh ár sélngwél emormén yáne sian. Wénde Yesum tamndangé kor, "Ambum, nderé táikér so yém kétán Ngánján limánégh élaughét. 25 Kértayafé yém kemoloe wét féneyan élaughét, wénde wemár ároe kérté yamam kétán élaughét Ngánján limánéghét so yáinde yéné!"
english: The following men were surprised at his talks. But Yesu said again, " Children, how hard it is to enter the kingdon of God! 25 It is difficut to for a kamel to pass through the hole of a needle, but the difficulty of a rich person to enter inside God's kingdom surpasses that.”

nama: Waitogh ár minde sélngwél emormén a norayayénd yéfe kénjúnro, "Efe so féyotaro ngunjarngé?"
english: "The following men were surprised and said to themselves, "Who can be saved?"

nama: Yesum engfandayéng fá a norayai, "Yéné siyém ároe féyotarofnar yém, wénde yau Ngánjáne, méinyotio féyotaro em Ngánjáneyot.
english: Yesu looked at them and said, "This is impossible for man but not for God; everything is possible for God."

nama: Fitam témndangé, "Yéndfem rokar méinyotio té tanéurotam a nénmaitongém fémǃ"
english: Fitè told him, "We left everything and followed you!"

nama: Féyo Jems a Jon, Jefediene ambum engérmén kétán yáfaf. Yémofem yamnendangeyayénd, "Watamegh ár, yénd ménde yénre fémon so yénmawafrowé téfe némat njam fém kémamnendangem."
english: Then Jems and Jon, Jefedi's sons, went to him. they begged him, "Teacher, we.d want you to do for us what we.d ask for."

nama: Yesum emotangeyai, "Némé wafroghét fém ménde ere tafaf yéndon sái ewawafrowan féfe?"
english: "What do you want me to do for you? Yesu asked.

nama: Yémofem yawangeyayénd, "So fémon féyotaro ténmumye yénd fene tambénta a ámb fatrata ámnjoghét táf fém njam kámnjo fene ndimbal kwayaghé kitarayan."
english: They answered.d, " Do you allow us to sit at your right and left when you sit on your.s big light(glorious) throne.

nama: Yesum emndeyai, "Fém yau mat ere némamén fém namot, fém féyotaro ere ghafté kafusi nu nénet yéndon árkéméné so yénetan? O fém so ewalitot ndenáye yénd sái walitotat?"
english: "You don't know what you are asking," Yesu said to them. "Can you drink the cup of water which I will drink and be baptized with the baptism I am baptized?

nama: Yémofem yawangeyayénd, "Féyotaro yéndfem so."
english: "We can," they answered.d. Yesu told them, "You will drink the cup of water which I will drink and be baptized with the baptism I am baptized, 40 but to sit there at my right and left, I have no authoruty to give you. Only God is who gives this place to those whom he has chosen.

nama: Tárfár árém tusérmbotawét, "Métar!" Wénde fá mé minde tukén kutnau, "Deifidene ambum, ghérghérsisé kawer tafaf!"
english: Many people rebuked him and told him to be quiet, but he still shouted, "Son of Deifid, have pity on me!"

nama: Yesu nékmboi áligh a korayangé, "Téngmotangend."
english: Yesu stopped and said, "Call him." So they called to the blind man, "Come quickly he is calling you." 50 he threw his clothes aside, he Jumped up and went to Yesu.

nama: Yesum yémotayéng, "Némé ménde ném yéndon sái némawafrotan?" Ghékéf kwéfkwéf árom yémndai, "Watamegh ár, yénd ménde wém sái kéretangen."
english: "What do you want me to do for you?" yesu asked him. The blind man said, " Teacher , I want to see ."

nama: Yesum yémndayéng, "Nguwano, fenjo ndimbal mwighayam mer té niyáto fém." Táf fété néretai a yéngwaitoi Yesu endmé.
english: "Go," said Yesu, "your big mind(faith) made you well." Immediately he can see and followed Yesu on the road.

nama: "Téfene áki Deifidene méngotu yéném, frengéghkaf yém!" "Áuwégh minde tukén!"
english: Blessed is coming the ruling of God our father Deifid! Hosanna in the highest.

nama: Yesu nénglawai Jerusalemét a néngwanoyéng kétán wáwefnogh méngot. Fá néngretai méinyotio rokarfaf, wénde táf tamorwén efogh nawaindai, fá néngwanoi kétán Betanit 12 waitogh árfé. Fig wén
english: Yesu entered Jerusale and went to the worshipping house. He looked around everything, but when it was late afternoon, he went to Betani with 12 following men. Yesu sweeps the worshipping house

nama: Ghéngén wárogh sénko téfnár a nák watamegh ár náyárayénd yénémamén end ronjagh ewafngoyénd Yesue ngiot. Ghéngén wárogh sénko téfnár a nák watamegh ár férfér nufngoyénd Yesuenemén, ménamén méinyotio ár mérén tamorwén sélngwél yáne watameghan.
english: The leading sacrifice burning people(high priests) and teaching men of the law heard about this and began looking for the way to kill Yesu, for they began to feel afraid about him, because the whole crowd was surprised at his teaching.

nama: Njam férégh yénmafngoi Yesu a yáne waitogh ár néngwanoyénd tesenot. Watameghyam fig wénmén
english: When evening came, Yesu and his disciples went to the city. The withered bread fruit

nama: Tándái akwan táf fá néngwanoyénd endmé tangmorwéng, yémofem yinjoyénd fig wén uruyaghare kétándmayo tuk a sérémb. 21 Fité táf nawafarotayéng a norayai Yesuefaf, "Watamegh ár, kéreta! Yéné fig wén fémon siyafalngoi té kér tém!"
english: In the early morning, when they were going on the street, they saw the bread fruit dried from the top to the root. 21 Fitè remembered and said to Yesu, "Teacher, look! This bread fruit you cursed has withered!"

nama: Fá nénufaryénd wéikor Jerusalem kénjút, a njamandio Yesu karendau wáwefnogh méngo sifayamé, ghéngén wárogh sénko ár, nák watamegh ár a limánégh ár nénufaryénd yáfaf. 28 Fá namotayénd, "Endene yétkwénan fémon tawifne mani térarégh ár wáwefnogh méngota? Emo fe yéné si muyé némaram?"
english: They arrived again in Jerusalem, and while Yesu was walking in the worshipping house area, the leading sacrifice burning people(high priests), the teaching men of the law and the head people came to him. 28 "What authority are you doing these things?" they asked. " Who gave you this authority to speak?"

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Yéndon fém so tamotangén ámbiro ámogh si. Kwawangongi ta, a yéndon so tawaufron féfe némé si muyayan yéndon yéné yam ewaufrotan. 30 Jonene walitogh árkamé yénmormén njafarta o árta? Ta kwaufrongi!"
english: Yesu answered, "I will ask you one question. Answer me, and I will tell you [by]what authority I am doing these things. 30 Jon's baptism from heaven or from men? Tell me!

nama: Féyo yémofem yawangoyénd Yesue, "Yénd mafina yéném." Yesu norayai, "Yéndon yau so tawaufron némé si muyayan yéndon ewafrotan yéné yam."
english: So they answered Yesu, "We don't know." Yesu said, "I will not tell you by what authority I am doing these things."

nama: 'Yémon yéfrangoi ámbiro watembghét, ambum efe yémon minde tuwetau. Soraméfifi yémon fá yáfáretam yéné siafé, 'Yémofem so yutémndat tane ambum.'
english: "He left one to send, a son who he love so much. At last he sent him with this talk, 'They will respect my son.'

nama: Wénde ndau téfnár norayayénd kété yéfe kénjúnro, 'Yéné siyém yárefane sifayé résagh ár ambum. Kénaflangi so yésmetam krotio ménát yéné ndau so kamndangé téfene.' 8 Féyo yémofem yerayénd a yésmetaménd krotio a yitaménd géreif mbwe ménj ndau tambén.
english: "But farmers said to themselves, "This is the heir of owner. Come, let's kill him, this garden will become ours. 8 So they held him and killed him and threw him out of the grape fruit vine garden.

nama: Némé so wét géreif mbwe ménj ndau yuram yafrote? Fá so kénwanongé a esmeta yéné ndau téfnár a géreif mbwe ménj ndau so tawaramangé ámb árfeyot. 10 Té fémofem yéné Buk si yaftaménd nde, "Sérasér yékenayénd méngo ramégh árém soramé namndayéng néndkéf sérasér.
english: "What will the owner of the grape fruit vine garden do? He will come and killed this farmers and give this grape fruit vine garden to other people. 10 Haven't you read this God's talk written like this, the stone the builder rejected and became the capstone,

nama: Yuram yéné yafrotaméng, merfifi téfene ghékfan?""
english: The Lord did it and how good it is in our eyes?

nama: Féyo Ju sénko téfnáram end taronjawét yá werghét, ménamén fá mat náyátoyénd fá korayau yéné rengerengeye yéfenemén. Wénde fá férféram tafindau ár mérénafenemén. Féyo yénémamén yémofem yéfrangoyénd a néngwanoyénd. Mani kémégh kétán Kaisare
english: Then jewish head men looked for a way to arrest him, because they knew he told the parable about them. But they were afraid of the crowd; so they left him and went away. Paying tax to Rom high ruling man Kaisar

nama: Yémofem yénmawanayénd mani mbwe a yémon emotayéng fá, "Endene sáf yéné yém? A endene yétkwén yém?" Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Kaisarene."
english: They brought the money and he asked them,, "Whose face is this? And whose name is?" "Rom high ruling man Kaisar's," they answered.

nama: Féyo Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Kaisare taramangi némé yáne yém a Ngánjáne taramangi némé yáne yém." A fá emormén sélngwél yánemén. Awerégh kérta anoghan
english: Then Yesu said to them, "Give to Rom high ruling man Kaisar what is Rom high ruling man Kaisar's and Give to God what belongs to." And they were surprised of him. Marriage at the rising

nama: Ámb nák watamegh ár yénmormén áyárghét fá warunyéghan tamorwén. Ndené kémnawét nde Yesum mer wawangogh kar so tawaramangai yéfe, yémon yémotai Yesu, "Árké Mosesene nák minde ndimbalfifi em?"
english: One of the teaching men of the law came to hear them debating. He thought that Yesu gave them a good answer, he asked Yesu, "Which commandment is the most important?"

nama: Njam Yesum téfandawang ndené yémon kwayaghaye tawawangotawéng merkéráye, fá norayai yáfaf, "Fém sném yau nayu ném kétándmé Ngánjánene limánéghta." Yéné soramé emo yau ámogh si yaramai férfér tamorwén. Endene ákimén Keriso Ngánjánene uyafoghmén ár yém
english: When Yesu saw that he answered very clearly, he said to him, "You are not far from the ruling of God." After that no one ask him questions. Whose son is Keriso

nama: Deifidém njam yémndeta Keriso yáne Yuré, ndernáye so Keriso yém yáne ambum? Ndimbal mérén náyáretaménd yáfaf méndefé. Yesum mat táyátotau ár nák watamegh árfenemén
english: Deifid himself calls him 'Lord.' How he can be his descestant?" The large crowd heard him with joy.

nama: Yesu námnjoi kaka sifayan ánde ramégh rokar takmetawét Ngánjáneyot a tafandau ár mérnam tawitawét yéfenjo mani kémégh téruot. Tárfár wemár árém takmetawét ndimbal mani yétkwén. 42 Wénde yauyau kwiré yénmormén ekmeyai sómbio mani mbwero.
english: Yesu sat down close place where they were putting the offering and he watched the crowd putting ther money into the offering basket. Many rich people put a large amount of money. 42 But a poor widow came and put in only two coins.

nama: Njamandio Yesum yéfrangoi wáwefnogh méngo, ámb yáne waitogh árom norayai, "Watamegh ár, Kéreta! Némé ndimbal wíman méngo etnong!"
english: As Yesu was leaving the worshipping house, one of his following men said to him, "Teacher, look what very big stones are these! What wonderful solid buildings are these!

nama: Yesum yawangoyéng, "Té fémon téfande yéné ndimbal méngo? Yau so ámb wím efai ámb wíman, méinyotio so nironat."
english: "Do you see these big buildings? Yesu answered. "Not one stone here will be left, everything will threw down.'

nama: Njam Yesu témorwén Olif Mband tunakfan witmé karéf kété wáwefnogh méngota, Fité, Jems, Jon a Endru yémotayénd, 4 "Ténmaufro njam yéné yam so ufroghan em wáwefnogh méngofaf? A némé yamam so ténmaufrongé ndené kaka méinyotio ufroghétro em?"
english: When Yesu was on the Mountain of Olif opposite the worshipping house, Fitè, Jems and Endru asked him secretly, 4 "Tell us, when these things will be happen? And what will be the surprising thing that will be happening?

nama: Yanafem sén so yangnof taramangi krot, a yéferafafem sén so yéfe ambumof taramangi. Ambum so kénawengongi yéferafafefaf ménát krot so tákmangi. 13 Méinyotio árém so méndméndafé néfandat ménamén tanemén, wénde fá efe taikrataye yakai kétánotio yatoghfaf fá so kawanjarngé.
english: Elder brother will give teeth(betray) his young brother to death, and a father his child. Children will come against his parents to put them to death. 13 All men will hate you because of me, but he who stand firm to the end will be saved.

nama: Wénde tékrat kwéf soramé efghon, 'Efogh so yém kwéfkwéf, a ghéraream yau so yéramete kwayaghé,
english: But this trouble dau, 'the sun will be darkened, and the moon will not give [its ]light;

nama: kénd so nénatarnat kétándmé njafarta, a njafar fifi so nasámbnetat.'
english: the stars will fall down from the sky, and heavenly bodies will be shaken.

nama: Yénémaménnde kor aem ghékéf sénté ménamén fém mafina em njam méngo yuré so nénangote féréghan, sémbár néndkéfan o njam ghakér kowi kutnangé, o akwan. 36 Fá njam kufarngé sélngwéle, yau táf kéminjongé kémghan. 37 Némé yénd norayan féfefaf, yénd norayan méinyotio árfefaf: Kor aem ghékéf sénté!"
english: Therefore watch because you don't know when the owner of the house will come back-in the evening, at midnight or when the rooster crows, or morning. 36 If he arrives in surprise, do not [let] him find you sleeping. 37 What I say to you, I say to every people: 'Watch!'"

nama: Njamandio fá témorangérwén Betanin, Yesum njamke tánetau Saimonene méngon efe yaufi ghéngan enjnefé témorwén. Amafom yénérsam a yétiaryéng minde tukén manimén wékwér ndarambafé Yesu yasuryéng sénkoyan.
english: While he was staying in Betani, Yesu ate food in Saimon's house who had leprocy on the skin, a woman brought special smelling liquid and poured on the head of Yesu.

nama: Ámb ár káwatarnawét yéfenjo kénjúnro, "Némamén yéné amafom minde tukén manimén wékwér taghne? 5 Yémon miya 10,000 kinat tétérnangai a tawaramangai yauyau árétǃ" Yémofem yarnayénd amaf.
english: This woman made some people angry so people started making fun of her in themselves, "Why this woman waste of special smelling liquid? 5 It could have sold for more than 300 silver coin{j{ ...f* {j{14.5 This money is year slary for work man, it's about 10,000 Kina. I put put note. and [the money] give to the poor." They said bad talk to this woman.

nama: Judas Iskariot, ámb témorwén Yesuene 12 waitogh ár, fá nuwanoi limánégh ghéngén wárogh árfefaf si frengéghét Yesue sénot. 11 Fá náuwetaménd yéné sian a yémofem efalo yiyátoyénd mani ramghét Judase. Féyo Judasém end táronjau Yesue ramghét. Yesuene ambinomén njamke
english: Judas Iskariot, one of the 12 following men, he went to the leading sacrifice burning people(high priests) to give teeth(betray) Yesu [to them.] 11 They were happy in this talk and agreed to give him money. So Judas is looking for a way to arrest Yesu. Yesu's last supper

nama: Fronde efghon Minaghofnar flawé téméndmén, árké efghon túmén tásmétawét Waingégh sif tosé. Yesuene waitogh árém yémotayénd, "Yesu, ándan fene ménde yém yéndfem sái yéfrendam feyot Waingégh téménd njamke?"
english: On the first day of the Feast of unleavened biskar, which it was customary to sacrife the Passover lamb, Yesu's following men asked him, "Yesu, where do yo want us to prepare for you Passover meal?

nama: Fá néwaneyayénd rokar ewinjeyayénd ndenáye fété Yesum ndernáye tamndéwéng. Féyo yémofem yéfrengménd Waingégh njamke.
english: They went.d and saw.d everything just as Yesu said. So they prepared.d the Passover meal.

nama: Férégh njam namndai, Yesuf nufaryénd yánjo 12 árfé. 18 Njam yémofem njamke tánetawét, Yesum emndai, "Yéndon efalo emndetan, ámbiro ár yéna yém emo so sén wéramete yénd, yéné ár emafé yéndfé enwam njamke."
english: When evening came, Yesu arrived with his 12 people. 18 When they were eating food, Yesu said, "I tell you the truth, one [of you] is here who will give teeth(betray) me-this man who is eating with me."

nama: Yéné siam eméindai waitogh ár mámé mwighat a fénatayero kawafenawét Yesuefaf, "Yénd yau?"
english: This talk made the following men to worry, and one by one explain to Yesu, "Not me?"

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Yéna fété yém ámb 12 ármén emafé yéndfé enwam ámbiro merekinan. 21 Ároene Ambum kér so yém ndernáye yéfrotaménd Buk si yánemén. Wénde nderé mámáfi yém yéné ároe emo sén yéramete. Mer so témorwén fá yau fiya káráftau."
english: Yes answered, "This is one of the 12 who are eating in one plate. 21 The Son of Man will die in God's will, but how terrible is that man who give teeth(betray) him. It would be better for him not to be burn."

nama: Njamandio yémofem tánetawét, Yesum féskaf flawé yérai, kánjo si yaramai Ngánjáne a tawatfotau, a waitogh árfét tawarametau a norayai, "Ténetangi, yéné siyém tane fifi."
english: While they were eating, Yesu took biskar, gave thank to God and broke it, and gave it to his following men and said, "Eat it, this is my body."

nama: Féyo yémon yérai kafusi, kánjo si yaramai Ngánjáne a ewaramai yéfe a méinyotio árém nu enetaménd.
english: Then he held the cup, gave thanks to God and gave it them and they all drank it.

nama: Yesum emndai, "Yéné siyém tane férék árké nertam tárfár árét. Ngánjánam si yéfrendai a yétetai tane férke. 25 Yéndon efalo emndetan fém, yéndon yaufifi so enetan yéné wéri nu kétánotio efogh kawerangé táf yéndon so ténetangén totér wéri nu Ngánjánene limánéghan."
english: Yesu said, "This is my blood which is poured for many people, which we have agreed with Father. 25 "I tell you the truth, I will not drink this alcohol until the day when I will drink new alcohol in the kingdom of God."

nama: Táf yémofem Ngánjáneyot wagh eufaryénd a nuwanoyénd Olif Mband tunakfot. Yesu norayai Fitane kenaghmén
english: When they sung a song and went to the Mount of Olif. Yesu said about Fitè's denial

nama: Yesum emndai yánjo waitogh ár, "Méinyotio fém so kengongi a kwéfrangongi yéndro. Buk siam noraye, "Yéndon so tésmangén wanjengégh ár, táf sif so kófárnangi.' 28 Wénde yéné soramé yénd njam kanongén, yénd féfe frondeta so wéngém Galili yuwot."
english: Yesu said to his following men, "All of you will deny me, how God's talk say' " 'I will kill the watching man, the sheep will be scattered.'

nama: Fité norayai, "Ámb árém njam fém kénéfrangongi, yéndon yaufifi so kénéfrangonǃ"
english: Fitè said, "[even]If other people deny,, I will not deny!"

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Yéndon efalo némndetan, sénonjo sémbáran, fém so koraya nambinotmé, 'Yénd mafina wém fá,' soramé ghakér kowi kutnangé sómbinotma."
english: Yesu answered, "Today in the night before the rooster crows two times, you will say three times that, 'I don't know him.'"

nama: Wénde Fitam mé ménjtaye korayau, "Yénd fémafé kér so yénre, yéndon yau so korayangén, Yénd mafina wém fémǃ" Ámb árém ndené sáfotio si korayawét. Yesu oraighan Getsemanin
english: But Fitè kept saying that, "I will die with you, I will not say, I don't know you!" Other people say the same. Getsemane

nama: Yesu néngwanoi nayuofnar, fá budme niyai mbandan Ngánjánafé koraiwét. 36 Fá Ngánjánafé koraiwét, "Afé, Afé! Méinyotio yam feyot sem áfrat. Téfnár yéné tékrát tafafta. Wénde tane ménde yau, wénde fene ménde so nufrote."
english: Yesu went little farther, he knelt down to the ground and talked with God. 36 He talked with God, "Father, Father! Everything is possible for you. Take this suffering from me. But no my will, but your will be done."

nama: Yesu nénangotam yánjo waitogh árfefaf a ewinjoi fá kémghan. Yesum yémndai Fité, "Saimon, némamén fém kémégh nékém? Némamén fém yau nérete ámbiro efoghféneféne yéndfé? 38 Kanongi a Ngánjánafé norayati ménát fém yau so ufogham tautfongé. Mbérmbér ménde yém meryam wafroghét, wénde fifi siyém njangén."
english: Yesu came back to his following men and found them sleeping. Yesu said to Fitè, "Saimon, why are you asleep? Why are you not wake with for one hour? 38 Wake up and talk with God so that you will not fall into temptation. The spirit is willing, bt the body is weak."

nama: Ámbirotaro fá néngaflai Ngánjánafé oraighét yéné siyo tafértau. 40 Wénde njam Yesu kénangotau, yémon wéikor ewinjoi kémghan ménamén ghékéf tamorwén kérté. Fá yau mat tamorwén némé si so tawangongayénd yáyot.
english: Once more he went and talked with God the same talk repeatly. 40 But when Yesu came back, he found them again sleeping, because their eyes were heavy. They did not know what to say to him.

nama: Njam Yesu nambinotma nénangotam, yémon emndai, "Némé fém mé kémégh ekém a nenati? Féyo tamǃ Efogh té nawer. Kéretangi, Ároene Ambum yaufi árfene ngángat raméghét yafngong. 42 Kokayongiǃ Mato kuwanongémǃ Kéretangi tane sén téfnár snufaneǃ" Yesu yerayénd
english: When Yesu came back the third time, he told them, "Are you still sleeping and resting? Enough! The hour has come. Look, the Son of Man is given into the hand of sinners. 42 Wake up! Let us go! Look my man who give teeth(betrayer) is arriving. Yesu held

nama: Yesu norayai ár mérnafefaf, "Némé yénd ámb féfene oro téfnár wém, árkémamén fém taném náifafé a timafé? 49 Méinyotio efghon yénd fémafé ténmorwén wáwefnogh méngon, fémofem yénd yau wérayénd. Wénde Buk si efalo náyáto." 50 Méinyotio Yesuene waitogh árém yéfrangoyénd a néngoyénd.
english: Yesu said to the crowd, "Am I a robber, that's why you came with stalks and clubs? 49 Every day I was with you in the worshipping house, you did not arrest me. But the Scripture will be fulfilled. 50 All Yesu's following men left him and ran away.

nama: Ámb totér ár kété témorwén emo Yesu táitotau tawongérwén sáláme. Njam totér ár yerayénd sálámeyan, 52 sálámero teretawét fá firo nengoi. Yesu yénémnjoyénd ndimbal árfene sáfrére
english: One young man was there who followed Yesu wearing a clothe. When Yesu held, 52 he took off clothes, and ran away naked. Yesu brought before the head people

nama: Limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a méinyotio Ju sénko árfene áumengégh ár yéta táronjawét ménát Yesum némé yaufi tawafrotau yémofem krot sái tékmangayénd. Wénde efe yau ár yinjoyénd. 56 Tárfár ár enmormén a nufroyénd unyégh si yánemén. Wénde yéfene afrogh si efalo yau yiyátoyénd.
english: The leading sacrifice burning people(high priests) and whole counculers(Sandrin) tried to look for Yesu's fault [in order] that they will put him to death. But no one found his fault. 56 Many people came and told lie about him. But their testamony did not agree.

nama: Féyo ámb ár kokayongi a yéné unyégh si norayayénd, 58 "Yéndfem fété yiyáráyém fá korayau yéné sian, 'Yéndon so yironan yéné ár ngángé raméghmén wáwefnogh méngo a nambio efogh soramé yéndon so yérametan ámb, yau so yém ár ngángé raméghmén.'" 59 Wénde yéfene afrogh si efalo yau yiyátoyénd.
english: Then some people stood up and said this lying talk, 58 "We heard what he said this talk, "I will destroy this hand made worshipping house and in three days will build another one, not like as man made.' 59 But their testamony did not agree.

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "A, yénd fété wém, tekofnaye fémofem so tinjongi ámnjoghan Ároene Ambum yénd Ngánján wafté tambén ngángata, a so wéném njafar kwamkwam kénjún."
english: Yesu answered, "Yes, I am, Not long you will see the Son of Man sitting the right hand of the Mighty God, and will come from heaven."

nama: Ghéngén wárogh sénko árom yétiraryéng yánjo sáláme ménamén fá nékw nawerai a norayai, "Yénd méndefnar yéném ámb ghékéf fayogh ár. 64 Fémofem té yiyárangi yémon Ngánjánene sifayé résaghét yafngo! Fém ndernáye nemnati?"
english: The leading burning sacrifice man tore his clothes and said, "Why do we need [any]more watching men? 64 You have heard dening talk. How do you think?"

nama: Ámb árém Yesu mbérme farángégh yafngoyénd. Yémofem ghékéf yawamoyénd, yesmayénd sáfan a témndetawét, "Emon nésém fém? Korayaǃ" Ámb wanjengégh árém yéngwasroi Yesu ngiot. Fitam yékenayéng Yesu
english: Some people began to spit Yesu. They covered his eyes and said to him, "Who hit you? Say! Some guards took Yesu and beat him. Fitè denied Yesu

nama: Njamandio Fité mé témorwén méngo sáfan, limánégh ghéngén wárogh ároene ásáfogh mérés yénmormén kétán. 67 Njam yémon yinjoi Fité fésén kafalau, kor téfandau merkéráye, "Fém ámb yéné kénmorwén Yesufé Najaretménǃ"
english: While Fitè was still in the courtyard, One of without.payment working man(servant) girls of the leading burning sacrifice man came by. 67 When she saw Fitè warming [himself], she came close and recognized Fitè. "You were with Yesu from Najaret(Najarian)," she said.

nama: Wénde Fitam yanyotayéng a yémndai, "Yénd mafina wém némamén fém noraye," a fá néngaflai méngo sáf sésafneta.
english: But Fitè denied it and said, "I don't know what are you saying," and he went out into the enterance.

nama: Njam ásáfogh mérsom kété yinjoi, yémon emndai kor efe tawakayongérwén, "Yéné ár ámb fiyémǃ" 70 Wéikor Fitam yányotayéng. Tekofnaye efe tawakayongérwén kaka Fitafé yémndayénd Fité, "Fém ámb fété ném. Fém ném Galili yuménǃ"
english: When the without.payment working man(servant) girl saw him there, she said again to those standing around, "This man is one of them." 70 Again Fitè denied it. Not long those standing near Fitè said to Fitè, "You are one of them. You are Galili region man!"

nama: Féyo Fité norayai, "Yénd soté efalo si norayan! Ngánjánam mété tékrátan kwékmangé táf njam nuindan. Yénd mat yau wém fém endenemén norayatiǃ"
english: He began to curse on himself by saying, "I don't know this man whom you are talking about!"

nama: Táf fété ghakér kowi nutnam sómbinotma. Féyo Fité nawafarotai Yesuene si némé témndetau fá, "Frondeyo ghakér kowi njam kutnangé sómbinotma, fémon so kwékenang yénd nambinotmé." Táf Fité ye nufngoi.
english: Immediately the rooster crowed the second time. Then Fitè remembered what Yesu said to him: Before the rooster crows twice, you will deny me three times." Then Fitè began to cry.

nama: Tándái akwan, limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár, Ju árfene sénko ár, nák watamegh ár, a méinyotio áumengégh ár yéfenjo mwighé taufanawét. 'Némé so yafrotam Yesuefaf?' Yémofem yumbetaménd fá, yémnjoyénd, a yéramayénd Failetefaf.
english: In early morning, the chief burning sacrifice men, Ju head men, the teaching men of the law and whole Ju head men's meetings discussed their plan. What will we do to Yesu? They tied him, led him and handed him to Failet.

nama: Failetém yémotai Yesu, "Fém fété ném Ju árfene warsagh ár?" Yesum yawangoi, "A yénd fété wém." 3 Limánégh ghéngén wárogh árém tárfár nékwmendafé si tafayotawét Yesue. 4 Wéikor Failetém yémotai, "Fém so féyotaro kuwango? Té yéfande njénambafé méndméndafé si némafayotat."
english: Failet asked Yesu, "Are you the ruling man(king) of the Ju people?" Yesu answered, "I am."

nama: Wénde Yesu métar náyátoi uwangofnar, a Failet sélngwélam yafrotam.
english: But Yesu was still silent without any reply, and Failet was amazed.

nama: Waingégh témndan gafana téngmorwén yunjfero kwéfkwéf méngo ár utorghét ende ménát ár nómnendayénd. 7 Ár yétkwén Barabas efe témorwén kwéfkwéf méngon Rom warsagh ár ngi téfnár tárfár árfé talawangérwén. 8 Ár mérén enmormén Failet témotangi yá utorghét némé túmén tawafrotau.
english: It was the custome at the Feast to take out the darkness house man(prisoner) whom the people asked. 7 A man called Barabas who was in the darkness house who committed murder. 8 The crowd came to Failet and asked him to do for them what he usually did.

nama: Failetém emotai, "Fém ménde em yéndon tutorén féfeyot Ju árfene warsagh ár." 10 Failet mat náyátoi nde limánégh ghéngén wárogh árém yéramayénd yáfaf Yesu méndménde.
english: "Do you want me set free for you the ruling man(king) of the Ju people? Failet asked, 10 Failet knew that the chief prists handed Yesu over to him with jealousy.

nama: Wénde limánégh ghéngén wárogh árém ewasemnayénd ár mérén Failetefaf Barabase utorghét. 12 Failetém emotai ár mérén, "Némé yéndon so yafrotan féfeyot yéné ároefaf fémofem efe yémndetati Ju árfene warsagh ár?"
english: But the leading sacrifice burning people(high priests) stirred the crowd to Failet to set free Barabas. 12 Failet asked the crowd, "What will I do for you about this man who you call the ruling man(king) of the Ju people?"

nama: Fá nutnayénd "Téngwamend wafatarégh wén tukén!"
english: They shouted, "Crucified him on the cross!"

nama: Failetém emotai, "Némamén? Némé yaufi yafrotam yémon?" Wénde fá kutnawét minde tukén, "Téngwamendǃ"
english: "Why? What crime has he did?" Failet asked, But they shouted louder, "Cricified him!"

nama: Failetém ménde ewawifoi ár mérnafene. Féyo yéngéumyoi Barabas yéfefaf. Failetém tamndangé Yesue fémoghét yéngwafnamoi tukét wamghét. Fiyarayam si tawafrotawét Yesue
english: Failet wanted to satisfy the crowd, Failet released Barabas to them. He bit him and handed him over to crucify him. The soldiers made fun of Yesu

nama: Yémofem yénamndaménd wafatarégh wénan a téfalotawét yáne sáláme ménaye ndais kembneye.
english: They crucified on the cross. They distributed his clothes by playing dice.

nama: Efogh féneféne 9 akwan Yesu ténamndawét wafatarégh wénan. 26 Férén yéfarotaménd wén karfan árét wafghét Yesuenemén, 'Ju árfene warsagh ár.'
english: It was 9:00 o'clock in the morning [when] Yesu was nailed on the cross. 26 The written notice about Yesu to read, "The ruling man(king) of the Ju people."

nama: Yémofem enaménd sómbio oro téfnár Yesufé, ámb tambénta a fatrata. 28 (Yau siménj) 29 Ár endmé kawaindawét tasalitawét yéfene sénko tafnendawét sén krarghafé. Yémofem si tawafrotawét, "Fém korayawéng ndené 'Yéndon so wáwefnogh méngo yironan a nambio efghon so yérametan,' 30 kénewor wafatarégh wénta a kawanjar fémyoǃ"
english: They nailed two criminals with Yesu, one on the his right side and another on the left side. 28 29 People[who]passed by the road insult him, shaking their heads with grainding.{k{ ...f* {k{15.29 with grainding check spelling

nama: Yéné séite méinyotio yu nénamndai kwéfitaro. Yéné kwéfitayam yérsam 3 aklok séite. 34 Yéné efoghféneféneyanyo Yesu minde nutnaméng, "Eli Eli, lama sabaktani?" Yéné sioene fifi siyém, 'Tane Ngánján, tane Ngánján, némamén yénd fémon wéfrango tambia?'
english: That afternoon whole land was dark. This darkness took till 3 O'clock in the afternoon. 34 At that hour Yesu cried out with a loud voice, "Eli, Eli lama sabaktani? This talk meaning is, "My God, my God, why did you forsake me?"

nama: Ámb ár efe tawakayongérwén kaka yiyáráyénd Yesu, fá norayayénd, "Káyárangi, yémon yémote Elaija."
english: Some people who were standing near heard him saying, they said, "Listen, he is calling Elaija."

nama: Féyo ámbiro ár néngenngoi nguafé ghafté wéri nuan yukai wéne yéngwáuyoi Yesue nénet. Fá norayai, "Yambia téfrangend. Mato so yéfandam Elaijam téu ténmeworngaǃ" 37 Yesu minde nutnai soramé kér yémorméng.
english: Then one man ran, dip the sponge with sour alcohol, put it on a stick, and offered it to Yesu to drink, he said, "Leave himself, let's see if Elaija bring him down." 37 Yesu cried out and after he died.

nama: Wáwefnogh méngon sénjté sáláme kété tamangérwén árkéménayam ár tawangotau Ngánjánefaf álighét, natiraryéng sómbio karéf kétándmé tuk kétánotio yu. 39 Njam Rom fiyaré sénko ár efe takayongérwén téfandau tukét ndernáye Yesu kér yémormén, fá norayai, "Efalo yéné árom yiyátoi Ngánjánene Ambum fété témǃ"
english: In the worshipping house the thick curtain was hanging torn into two part from top to bottom. 39 When Roman soldiers' big head man who was standing, looking at how Yesu died, he said, "Truly this man was the Son of God!"

nama: Ámb amafam kétándmé nayuta ténfandawét. Ámb Meri Makdalin, Salome, ámb Meri efe témorwén Joses a yánngén Jems yéfetmé. 41 Yéné amafam Yesu táitotawét a tarawenawét fá njam Yesu témorwén Galili yuwon. Tárfáryo ámb amaf efe té enmormén Yesufé Jerusalemét kété tamorwén. Yesuene yátoghmén
english: Some women saw from a distance, Among them were Meri Magdalin, Meri the mother Jems and Joses,and Salome. 41 These women followed Yesu and cared him when Yesu was in Galili region. Many other women who came with Yesu to Jerusalem were also there. The burial of Yesu

nama: Njam Safat nawaindai, Meri Makdalin, ámb Meri Jemse yátmé a Salome fai yafrotaménd mer wimafé wékwér ménát Yesuene fifi wasurghét. 2 Sande tándái akwan, totér efogh árnyéghan, fá nuwanoyénd kétán mbéwé méngofaf. 3 Álighan fáro namotayénd, "Emo so ténmafetangé wím téfeyot mbéwé méngo sésafneta?"
english: When the Sabath was over, Meri Magdalin, Meri the mother of Jems and Salome bought good smelling special smelling liquid so that they might go to anoint Yesu's body. 2 Early morning on Sunday, at sunrise, they went to the grave house. 3 On the road they asked to themselves, "Who will roll the stone away from the entrance of the grave house?"

nama: Wénde njam fá néngretayénd tukét, yémofem yinjoyénd yéné wím, árké ndimbal témorwén té nitérmboi. 5 Njam amaf mbéwé méngon nélawayénd, yémofem yinjoyénd totér ár kwayaghé sáláme tawongérwén témorangérwén amafafene tambén ngángata, a amaf férféram ewifoi.
english: But when they looked up, they saw that stone, which was large, had been rolled away. 5 When women went into the grave house, they so young man wearing white clothes sitting on the right side, and women were afraid.

nama: Amaf nétoryénd a néngengoyénd mbéwé méngo tambén ménamén fá tamorwén ngernger mwighayan kowérsotawét. Fá némé si yau norayayénd ménamén férfér tamorwén. Tándáwár yátogh mer sifaf 16.9-20 Yesu nufaryéng Meri Makdalinefaf
english: Women went out and ran away from the grave house with fear and amazed. They did not say anything because they were afraid. [Early reliable talk(manuscriture) and old watching men do not have Mak 16:9-20]

nama: Yéné soramé Yesu nufaryéng fénaté sáfot sómbio árfefaf njamandio fá tangérwén endmé ámb yuwot. 13 Fá néngwaneyayénd ámb waitogh árét ewafroyénd yéfeyot némé kufrotau, wénde yémofem yau efalo yiyátoyénd yénémamén. Yesu nufaryéng 11 waitogh árfefaf
english: After this Yesu appeared two men [of the following men] in a different form while they were walking .dto other place. 13 They came back and told to other people what had happened, but they could not truly approve(believe) it.

nama: Njam Yuré Yesum si ewifoi yéfefaf, fá táf nénguyoi njafarot a námnjoi Ngánjánene tambén ngángata. 20 Féyo waitogh ár táf nofarnayénd méinyotio yuwomé, mat tangyátotawét mer si. Yuré kásáfotau yéfe kénjúmé a tárfár sélngwélafé yam tawafrotawét. Yéné yamam tuyafotau ndené yáne si efalo témorwén.
english: When the Lord Yesu finished his saying to them , he was lift up into heaven and sat at the right hand of God. 20 Then the following men went out everywhere to preach good talk, and the Lord worked through them to confirm what he was saying to them by many surprising things and surprising things followed them.

nama: Fútar Tiafilus:
english: Friend Tiafilus:

nama: Jakarayam yémotai njafar si résagh ár, "Ndernáye wét yénd mat so kamndan yénémamén? Yénd swém bulu wém a tane amaf siyém ndenéyameyo ausé."
english: Jakaya asked the man carrying heavenly message, "How can I become knowing(know) about this? I am an old man and my wife is also old woman."

nama: Njafar si résagh árom yawangoi, "Yénd wém Geibrél. Yénd Ngánjáne kaka wakai a yénd kwénmáfárete siafé sái kémaufron yéné mer si. 20 A sénonjo fém kékmbo métar a yau noraya kétánotio yéné ufroghene efogh kawerangé ménamén fémo efalo yau tane si so táyáto. Árkéméné so efalo kénamndangi yánjo efghon."
english: The man carrying heavenly message answered, "I am Geibrèl. I stand close to God and he sent me with talk [which] I will tell you this good talk. 20 And now silence put [into] you and [you] cannot speak until the practicing day come because you didn't become true(believe) my talk. Which [it] will come true in its day.

nama: Merim yémotai njafar si résagh ár, "Ndernáye so yéné yém, ménamén yénd swém méinyo mérés?"
english: Meri asked the man carrying heavenly message, "How will be this, because I am virgin?"

nama: Merim yawangoi, "Yénd wém Yurane faiofnar ásáfogh ár. Féyotaro so nufrote némé té wémndé." Si soramé njafar si résagh árom yéfrangoi. Merim yiyafoi Elisabet
english: Meri answered, "I am the God's without.payment working man(servant). It will happen what you told me." After talks the man carrying heavenly message left her. Meri visits Elisafet

nama: Meri norayai, "Tane tikfam Yuré yuwete
english: Meri said, "My heart praises the Lord

nama: a tane mbérmbér áuwéghan yém Ngánján tane Wanjarégh ár kénjún,
english: and my spirit rejoices in God my saving man,

nama: ménamén yémon yénd wafarotam yuwan ghérsafé yáne ásáfogh mérés! Yénandmé sénonjo méinyotio árém so wémndetat yénd ndené frengéghmén ném,
english: for he remembers me (as )his humble without.payment working man(servant) woman. From now on all the people will call me you are blessed.

nama: ménamén Minde tukén waftafé sélngwélafé yam tayot yafrotam. Yáne yétkwén yém njúnnjúnofnar.
english: for the power of Most High has done surprised thing for me. His name is without.dust(holy).

nama: Yáne ghérghérsisé so néngusamngote yéfeyot emofem férférafé yéfandat fá kétándmé ámb ár saté kétánotio ámb ár saté.
english: His mercy will extend to those who fear Him from generation to generation.

nama: Yémon té yuyafotam muyé yánjo ngángaye, yémon té ewafarnai fá efe tuktuk mwighé emarghan tamorwén.
english: He has shown mighty with his hands; he scattered those who are high-mind.

nama: Yémon té eweworyéng yuwot limánégh ár yéfenjo limánégh ámnjogh sifayata, wénde euyoyéng tukét métar ár.
english: He put down rulers from their positions, but has raised up the humble.

nama: Yémon té eremngoi siogh ár tárfár rokare wénde engwatembayéng wemár ár sotro.
english: He has filled the hungry with many things, but has sent the rich empty.

nama: Yémon té yáutánam yánjo faiofnar ásáfogh ár Israil yafarotai ghérghérsisaye.
english: He has helped his without.payment working man(servant) Israil, remebering with mercy.

nama: Ebraamefaf a yánjo mérénfaf tuot, ndernáye té nénorayayéng téfene afafefaf."
english: to Ebraam and his descendants forever how he had said to our fathers.

nama: Merif emorarmén Elisabetfé nambio ghérare soramé Meri néngangoi méngotuot. Jon walitogh ár yáne áráféghmén si
english: Meri stayed with Elisafet for three months after Meri went back village. The birth of Jon the baptist

nama: Elisabetene efogh njam nawerai yáne ambummén, fá náráftam ghakér. 58 Yáne kaka ár a fútaréf náyárayénd ndené Yuram ndimbal ghérghérsisé yuyafoi a fá káuwétawét yémafé.
english: When the time for Elisafet to have her baby, she gave birth to a son. 58 Her neighbors and relatives heard that God has shown big mercy and they rejoiced with her.

nama: 8 efogh nawerayéng fá engmormén ghéngan néfghét a yémofem yétkwén yéramayénd yárefé Jakaraya soramé, 60 wénde yátmé norayai, "Yau! Yáne yétkwén so yém Jon."
english: On the eighth day they went to circumcise the child, and they were going to name(gave a name)him after his father Jakaraya, 60 but his mother said, "Noǃ his name will be Jon."

nama: Yémofem yémndayénd, "Ámb yéné yétkwén yau yém féfene mérnan."
english: They said, "There is no one among your relatives who has that name."

nama: Yárefé Jakaraya Ngánján Mbérmbéram yafoi si nufngoi,
english: His fatherJakaraya was filled with spirit and began to speak,

nama: "Áuwégh yém Yurai, Israilmén Ngánján! Fá té téném yánjo ár wanjarghét.
english: "Praise be to the Lord, the God of Israil, who has come to save his people.

nama: Fá yénmáfáretam téfe wanjarégh ár yáne faiofnar ásáfogh ár Deifid yáne mérénmén.
english: He has sent us saving man in his without.payment working man(servant) Deifid his family.

nama: Némé fá norayai yáne Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár kénjúmé tándái,
english: What he said through his God's people who make know(prophets) of long ago,

nama: Wanjarégh yém kétándmé téfene mék téfnárafene ngángata emofem méndméndat yénfandat yénd.
english: salvation from our enemies and from hand of all who hate us.

nama: Ghérghérsisé yuyafoi téfene afafefaf a ewafarotai yánjo njúnnjúnofnar árnyégh.
english: he showed mercy to our fathers and remembered his without.dust(holy) covenant.

nama: Wengéghofnar si norayai téfene afé Ebraamefaf.
english: He said without changing talk/oath to our father Ebraam.

nama: Yénd yénmutoryéng kétándmé mék téfnárfene ngángata a yénméindai yénd yáyot férférofnar yam wafarerghét:
english: He rescued us from our enemies's hand and enabled us to serve him without fear.

nama: njúnnjúnofnar a mbarkánd kér ro Ngánjáne sáfan méinyotio téfene efghon.
english: In holiness and straightness before God all our days.

nama: Fém, tane ambum, so ném Minde Tuk Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár, so ném Yurane sáfréré end frengéghét yáyot,
english: You, my child, will be be a God's man who make know(prophet) of the Most High, you will be(go) before Lord to prepare the way for him,

nama: yánjo árét so ewaramete wanjarégh mat yéfene yaufi wányányégh kénjúmé.
english: you will give his people the knowledge of salvation through the washing of their sins.

nama: Ménamén téfene Ngánjánene ghérghérsisé njafar tambén árnyégh efogh so yéném téfefaf.
english: Because of our God's mercy from heaven the rising sunwill come to us.

nama: So télálángé fá efe kwéfkwéfan em a kér mbanmbanan efe em so engwambete téfene kafkaf krufrát endmé."
english: It will shine on those who lived in darkness and on those who lived under death, he will guide our feet into the path of peace.

nama: Ambum nanotam a muyafé namndai mbérmbéran, a fá tékmangérwén fanfne yuwon kétánotio marataye nufaryéng Israilét.
english: The child grew and became strong in spirit, and he stayed in desert until he appeared publicly to Israil.

nama: Yéné efghon Kaisar Augustusam muyé si yéramai marataye yétkwén kayoghét Rom yuwon. 2 Yéné simormén frondefifi yam yétkwén kayoghét njam Kwirinius gafana témorwén Sirian. 3 Méinyotio ár nuwanoyénd yéfenjo tesenot yétkwén yáuwéghét.
english: In those days [Rom high ruling man] Kaisar Augustus gave strong talk widely to take a census(gave name to register) in Roman country. 2 This was the first thing to take a census when Kwirinius was governor in Siria. 3 All people went to their town to take a census.

nama: Sélngwélafé minde tárfár njafar si résagh ár nufaryénd yéné njafar si résagh árfé, tuwetawét Ngánján a korayawét,
english: Suddenly so many men carrying heavenly message(angels) appeared with the man carrying heavenly message, praising God and said,

nama: "Áuwégh yém Ngánjáneyot minde tukén, yéné mbandan krufrát yém yéfeyot yáne méndefé árét."
english: "Glory to God in very high, on land peace is to them to his liking people."

nama: Ménayan 8 efghon, efogh nawerayéng yáne ghéngan néfghét, yáne yétkwén Yesu, njafar si résagh árom fronde yétkwén yaramai soramé su nawanai.
english: On the eighth day, the day came to cut his skin(circumcise him), his name Yesu, [which]the man carrying heavenly message had firstly given him before he was conceived.

nama: "Wanjarégh ár Yuré, fémon némé té wémndai, sénonjo yénd fene faiofnar ásáfogh ár kér so wém áuwéghafé.
english: "Savior Lord, what you have said me, now I, your worker can die with joy.

nama: Ménamén tane ghékfam fene wanjarégh té yinjo,
english: Because my eyes have seen your salvation,

nama: ménát méinyotio árém so yéfandat árkéméné fémon té néusénam.
english: so that all people will see which you have prepared.

nama: Fá so yém ndenanit kwayaghé sái yuyafotam fene efalofifi Téndo árét, a yémon so eméinde ár sái nemnat tukén Israil árfenemén."
english: He will be like a light that show your truth to Side people, and he will cause people to think highly the people of Israil.

nama: Njam Yurane nák némé wafroghét tamorwén Merifém Josefé té ewifeyayénd, fá táf nangeyayénd Galili yuwot yéfenjo tesenot Najaret. 40 Ambum nanotam muyafé namndai, fá káfeté mwighé wafoghkaf témorwén, Ngánjánene ngárám yáfaf témorwén. Ghakér ambum Yesu wáwefnogh méngon
english: When Josef and Meri had finished what the law of the Lord required, they.d returned to Galili region to their town of Najaret. 40 The child grew and became strong; he was full of wisdom, and the grace of God was to him. The Boy Yesu at the worshipping house

nama: Yesum ewawangeyai, "Némémén yénd fémofem wéronjét? Fém mat fiya tarwén ndené yénd tane Afane méngo kénjún wém." 50 Wénde fá mé katambarwét némé si yémon té tamndéwéng.
english: Yesu answered them, "Why were you looking for me? You should know that I am in my Father's house." 50 But they didn't understand what talk he was saying.

nama: Fá nuwanoyénd Najaretét yárefafé a fá áyárégh ár náyátoi yárefafefaf. Wénde yatmam méinyotio si ewanai yánjo tikéf kénjút. 52 Yesu nanotam fifiyan a káfeté mwighayan a yáne ménde Ngánjánafé a ár.
english: He went back to Najaret with parents and he became obedient man to the parents. But his mother accepted all talks in her heart. 52 Yesu grew in body and in wisdom and in favor with God and men.

nama: Méinyotio yékwyékw wéfángéghét a méinyotio mband tunakéf fénarghét a fafatot. Méinyotio ménjuté end so em mbarkánd a yaufi end so em frengéghkaf.
english: Every valley shall be smooth, and every montain shall be leveled and lowered. Every crooked roads shall be straight, and the bad roads shall bestraighten.

nama: A méinyotio árém so tinjongi Ngánjánene wanjarégh.'"
english: And all people will see God's salvation.'"

nama: Ár mérnam yémotayénd, "Némé yéndfem so yafrotam yénandmé?"
english: The crowd asked, "What shall we do from here?"

nama: Joném ewawangoi, "Ár efe sómbio sodafé njam yém ámb ároe so taramangé, a efe njamkefé yém ndenéyameyo so yafrote."
english: Jon answered, "If the man with two shirts must give it to other, and who has food must do the same way.

nama: Mani kafégh ár ndenéyameyo enmormén nu walitoghét, fá namotayénd, "Watamegh ár, némé so yafrotam?"
english: Tax collectors came the same way to be baptized, they asked, "Teacher, what should we do?"

nama: Yémon emndai fá, "Yau féfenjo méndeye takafangi kétamé némé té engémndan." 14 Ámb fiyaram wéi yémotayéng, "Yéndfem némé so yafrotam?" Yémo ewawangoi, "Yau ewarémnati maniot ár o ekafetati unyéghe a eremngotati féfenjo fayam."
english: He told them, "Don't collect with your wanting from what had told to." 14 Some soldiers also asked him, "What should we do?" He answered, "Don't steal money from people and accuse them with lying and be content with your pay.

nama: Wénde njam Joném yarnam Erod limánégh ár ménamén yémon nawerai yánngnoene amaf, Erodias a ámb yaufiyam ewafrotam, 20 Erodém yasamngoi yénandmé yéfefaf. Jon yélawayénd kwéfkwéf méngon. Yesuene walitoghmén
english: But when Jon rebuked the ruler Erod because of Erodias, his young brother's wife, and the other evil things he did, 20 Erod added this to them. He put Jon to the darkness house(darkness house). The Baptism of Yesu

nama: Njam méinyotio ár ewalitotam, Yesu wéi yálitotam. Njam fá Ngánjánafé oraighan témorwén njafar táf nasawéryéng, 22 a Ngánján Mbérmbér néneworyéng Yesuefaf men kénjúmé ndenanit mamu. Si yénmormén kétándmé njafarta, "Fém ném tane uwéghafé ambum, yénd minde náuwétan fefaf." Yesuene ákiafenemén
english: When he baptized all the people, he also baptized Yesu. When he was talking with God, heaven was opened, 22 and the God Spirit came down to Yesu with a through bird like a mamu(pigeon). A voice came from heaven, "You are my lovely son, I'm so pleased with you." Ancester of Yesu

nama: Yesu namndai 30 yunjéf táf yánjo ásáfogh yérnyai. Yesu maratan nakmai ndené Josefene ambum yém Josef témorwén Eliene ambum,
english: Yesu himself was 30 years old when he began his work. Yesu was thought widely that was the Josef's son, Josef was the son of Eli,

nama: Matatene ambum, Lefiene ambum, Melkiene ambum, Yanaiene ambum, Josefene ambum,
english: the Son of Matat, the son of Lefi, the son of Melki, the son of Yanai, the Josef's son,

nama: Matatiasene ambum, Amosene ambum, Nakumene ambum, Esliene ambum, Nagaiene ambum,
english: the son of Matatias, the son of Amos, the son of Nakum, the son of Esli, the son of Nagai,

nama: Matene ambum, Matatiasene ambum, Semeinene ambum, Josekene ambum, Jodene ambum,
english: the son of Mat, the son of Matatias, the son of Semein, the son of Josek, the son of Joda

nama: Joananene ambum, Resane ambum, Jerufafelene ambum, Sialtielene ambum, Neriene ambum,
english: the son of Joanan, the son of Resa, the son of Jerufafel, the son of Sealtiel, the son of Neri,

nama: Melkiene ambum, Adiene ambum, Kosamene ambum, Elmadamene ambum, Erene ambum,
english: the son of Melki, the son of Adi, the son of Kosam, the son of Elmadam, the son of Er,

nama: Josuane ambum, Elieserene ambum, Jorimene ambum Matatene ambum, Lefiene ambum.
english: the son of Josua, the son of Elieser, the son of Jorim, the son of Matat, the son of Lefi,

nama: Simionene ambum, Judane ambum, Josefene ambum, Jonamene ambum, Eliakimene ambum,
english: the son of Saimon, the son of Juda, the Josef's son, the son of Jonam, the son of Eliakim,

nama: Meliane ambum, Menane ambum, Matatane ambum, Natanene ambum, Deifidene ambum,
english: the son of Melia, the son of Mena, the son of Matata, the son of Natan, the son of Deifid,

nama: Jesiene ambum, Obedene ambum, Boasene ambum, Samonene ambum, Nasunene ambum,
english: the son of Jesi, the son of Obed, the son of Boas, the son of Samon, the son of Nasun,

nama: Aminadafene ambum, Ramene ambum, Ejronene ambum, Feresene ambum, Judane ambum,
english: the son of Aminadaf, the son of Ram, the son of Ejron, the son of Feres,

nama: Jeikofene ambum, Aisekene ambum, Ebraamene ambum, Terane ambum, Naorene ambum,
english: the son of Jeikof, the son of Aisek, the son of Ebraam, the son of Tera, the son of Naor,

nama: Serukene ambum, Reuene ambum, Felekene ambum, Eferene ambum, Selane ambum,
english: the son of Seruk, the son of Reu, the son of Felek, the son of Efer, the son of Sela,

nama: Keinanene ambum, Afasadene ambum, Semene ambum, Noane ambum, Lamekene ambum,
english: the son of Keinan, the son of Afasad, the son of Sem, the son of Noa, the son of Lamek,

nama: Metuselane ambum, Inokene ambum, Jaredene ambum, Maalalelene ambum, Kenanene ambum,
english: the son of Metusela, the son of Enok, the son of Jared, the son of Maalalel, the son of Kenan,

nama: Enosene ambum, Setene ambum, Edémene ambum, Ngánjánene ambum.
english: the son of Enos, the son of Set, the son of Edèm, the son of God.

nama: Yesu, Ngánján Mbérmbér afoghkaf, kangotau Jodenta a Ngánján Mbérmbéram yalimai fanfne yuwomé, 2 40 efghon fá yufotam Sáifram. Yémon yau enetam yéné efghon, yéné soramé siogh témorwén.
english: Yesu, full of the God Spirit, returned from the Joden and the God Spirit led into the desert, 2 for the forty days Saifè tempted him. He did not eat during these days, after that he was hungry.

nama: Sáifram yémndai, "Fém njam ném Ngánjánene ambum, yéné wím tengo njamkeyot."
english: Sáifèr said, "If you are God's son, turn this stone into the food."

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Buk sian yékai, 'Ár njamkeyero yau so yémor.'"
english: Yesu answered, "It is written in the God's talk, 'Man shall not live by food alone.'

nama: Sáifram yalimai mband tunakfot a yauyafotam yáyot méinyotio mband marat. 6 Sáifram yémndai, "Yéndon so kémaraman méinyotio muyé a meryam, ménamén tane em, so tawaraman méndefé árfet ende téu. 7 Fémon njam kwáwefno ta, méinyotio fene so em."
english: Sáifèr led him to the mountain and showed him all the world. 6 Sáifèr said to him, "I will give you all the authority and good things, for [these] are mine, I will give it to anyone I want. 7 If you worship me, all will be yours."

nama: yémofem so kémerangi yéfenjo ngángaye, ménát fene kafkaf yau so kawambangi wíman."
english: they will hold you with their hands so that your foot will not be hurt on a stone.'

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Ndené noraye, fémo yau yékmeta fenjo Yuré Ngánján ufoghan."
english: Yesu answered, "It says that, you don't put your Lord God into the test.'"

nama: Njam Sáifram yánjo ufogh yam ewifoi Yesu táf yéfrangoi ámb efghot. Yesu yékenayénd Najaretén
english: When Sáifèr finished his temptation, he left Yesu until other day. They rejected Yesu at Najaret

nama: Yesu nénangoi Galili yuwot Ngánján Mbérmbérene waftafé, si marat náyátoi yánemén méinyotio yuwomé. 15 Yémon tawatametau yéfenjo áumengégh méngomé, a méinyotio árém tuwetawét fá.
english: Yesu went back to Galili region with the power of God Spirit, talk about him became wide through the whole area. 15 He taught them through their meeting houses(meeting houses), and every people praised him.

nama: Fá nuwanoi Najaretét, ánde fá nanotam, Safatan nuwanoi nélawai áumengégh méngot yáne túmén yam témorwén. Fá nokayoi wafghét. 17 Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár Aisayane kanéghkaf buk témorwén yaramayénd. Yémon yéferyéng a yinjoyéng si tékayongérwén,
english: He went to Najaret, where he grew up, on the sabbath he went and entered into the meeting house as his custom was. He stood up to read. 17 They gave him the scroll book of the God's man who make know(prophet) Aisaya. He unrolled it[scroll] and he found the talks[it is] written,

nama: "Yurane Mbérmbér siyém tafaf yém, ménamén yénd yémon wékafai mer si waitoghét yauyau árét. Yémon yénd kwamáfárete siot yéfeyot efe kwéfkwéf méngon elau wanjarghét, kwéfkwéf ár so kretangé, kérté téfnár so em ofé, 19 yéné yunjfan Ngánjánene ménde nufrotam."
english: "The Spirit of the Lord is on me, because he anointed me to teach good talk to the poor. He sent me to speak one who put in the darkness house saving, the blind will see, people with problem will be light 19 In this year the Lord's wanting happen."

nama: Féyo yémon yéknam kénaghkaf buk, ewawangoi áumengégh méngo wanjengégh árét a námnjoyéng si waitogh sifayan. Méinyotio árfene ghékfam téfandawét fá áumengégh méngo kénjún. 21 Fá si orayégh nufngoi yéfefaf, "Sénonjo yéné si efalo náyáto féfene áyárégh kénjún."
english: Then he rolled up the scroll, gave it back to the meeting house keeper and sat down in the teaching place. Everyone's eyes in the worshipping house was looking at him. 21 He began to say to them, "Today this talk become true in your hearing.

nama: Méinyotio korayawét yánemén frengégh si a sélngwélafé mer simén emormén yáne mbírmbírta njam nétoryéng. Yémofem namotayénd, "Yéné Josefene ambum yém?"
english: All spoke well of him about blessing talk and were amazed at the good talk that came out from his lips. They asked, "This is the Josef's son."

nama: Yesum emndai fá, "Fémofem so tanangi yéné káfeté si tafaf, 'Jokté, fémyo káfrenda!' A Fémofem so kwémndangi, 'Tafrota yéna fenjo tesenan némé yénd náyárangém ndené fémo némé tafrote Kafenamén.'"
english: Yesu said to them, "You will take this wise talk to me, 'Doctor, heal yourselfǃ' And you will tell me, 'Do here in your hometown what we have heard that you did in Kafernam."

nama: Méinyotio ár áumengégh méngo kénjún nékw tamorwén yéné sian njam yiyárayénd 29 Fá nékwafé nafghetaménd yifnayénd tesenta, yerayénd mband tunakéffaf ánde méngotu témorwén, kétándmé sái titawét yékwét. 30 Wénde fá tiotau ár mérén kénjúmé a kété néngwanoi. Yesum ewifnam yaufi mbérmbér
english: All the people in the meeting house were angry when they heard this talks. 29 They got angry, drove him out of the town and hold him to the mountain where was the village, from there they tried to throw him off the hole/cliff. 30 But he walked through the people and went away. Yesu drove/chased out an evil spirit

nama: Féyo fá nuwanoi kétán Káfenam tesen Galili yu kénjún a Safatan ár watamegh ewafngoi. 32 Fá tamorwén sélngwél yáne watameghan, ménamén yáne si waitogh témorwén muyafé.
english: Then he went to Kafernam town in Galili region, and on the Safat he began to teach the people. 32 They were surprised of his teaching, because his teaching were with authority.

nama: Áumengégh méngon kété témorwén ár tasérmbotau yaufi mbérmbéram. Fá nutnayéng minde tukén. 34 "A! Fém némat ménde ném téfefaf, Yesu Najaretmén? Fém téfe wasérmboghét kéném? Yénd mat wém fém efe ném. Fém ném Ngánjánene njúnnjúnofnar ár."
english: In the meeting house there was a man spoiled by evil spirit. He shouted at the very high. 34 "Haǃ What do you want with us, Yesu of Najaret? [Have] you came to destroy us? I know who are you. You are the Without.dust man of Godǃ"

nama: Yesum yarnam, "Métar mé! Kéntor yá tambén." Féyo yaufi mbérmbéram ár yétarmai árfe ghékfan a néngtoryéng yéfrangoi ár wasérmboghofnar.
english: Yesu ordered it, "Be guietǃ Come out of him." Then the evil spirit threw the man before[the eyes of] people and came out and left him without doing him [any] harm.

nama: Ár méinyotio sélngwél emormén a korayawét fáro, "Némé watamegh yéné yém? Muyafé a waftafé yémon yaufi mbérmbér ewitrote a fá néngtonat!" 37 A si yánemén marat namndai kaka méngotuamé Yesum mer táyátotau tárfár ár
english: All the people were amazed and said to each other, "What teaching is this? With authority and power he ordered the evil spirits and they went outǃ" 37 And the talk about him became wide thoughout near town. Yesu healed many people

nama: Njam yémofem yafrotaménd némat té engémndai, yémofem ereindaménd tárfár wagif a yéfene net aftéraréghétro tamorwén. 7 Yénémamén yémofem engwaunyeyayénd yéfe fútarfet ámb boutot wáutárghét, fá enmormén a sómbio boutan tawaflitawét minde tárfár wagif a olitoghétro tárwén.
english: When they did what he had told them, they caught many fish and their nets was about to break. 7 So they made a surprising thing to the friends in the other bout to help them, they came and put so many fish in the two bouts and they were about to sink.

nama: Njam Saimon Fitam yinjoi yéné, yémon yáwefnoi Yesue budme a norayai, "Nguwano ta tambén, Yuré, yénd wém yaufiyamafé ár!" 9 Fá a méinyotio yáne wáutárégh ár yéné wagif arnyéghmén sélngwél emormén, 10 ndenéyameyo wéi Jems a Jon, Jebediene ambum a Saimonene fútaréf.
english: When Saimon Fitè saw this, he bowed down to Yesu's knees and said, "Go away from me, Lord; I am a sinful manǃ" 9 He and all his helpers were astonised at catching of fish, 10 in a same way were Jems and Jon, the sons of Jebedi, Saimon's friends.

nama: Yémofem yéfenjo bout tunat engwimndangeyayénd a méinyotio rokar eureyayénd yéngwaitoyénd fá. Yesum mer yiyátoi yaufi ghéngan enjnefé ár
english: They pulled their bouts to the shore, left everything and followed him. Yesu healed a man with leprosy

nama: Njamandio Yesu témorwén ámb tesenan, ámb ár yaufi ghéngan enjnefé témorwén. Yémo njam Yesu yinjoi, fá yáne sáfe nuyai mbandot a yamnendai, "Yuré, fém njam ménde ném, fémon mer kwiyáto yénd."
english: While Yesu was in one of the town, a man [who] was with skin disease(leprosy). When he saw Yesu, he fell with his face to the ground and begged him, "Lord, if you want, you can make me clean."

nama: Yesum ngángé ewatembai a yiyánjai ár a norayai, "Yénd ménde fété wém. So mer ném!" A táf fété yaufi ghéngan enjneyam yéfrangoi.
english: Yesu reached out his hand and touched the man and said. "I really want to do. You will be cleanǃ" And immediately the leprocy left him.

nama: Yesum yémndai fá, "Ende yau taufro, téu nguwano, kauyafo fémyo ghéngén wárogh téfnárafefaf a ghéngén taram némé Mosesene nákan noraye frengéghmén ánde árém so kémwinjongi ndené fene ghéngan mer té namndé."
english: Yesu told him, "Don't tell anyone, you must go, show yourself to the burning sacrifice man and offer the sacrifices that Moses told you for your healing so that people will see that your skin is good.

nama: Wénde si yánemén marat náyátoi. Ár tárfár tanmorwén áyárghét yáfaf a tárfár frengégham tarsau enjne téfnár. 16 Wénde Yesu túmén kitérmbongai métar sifayat Ngánjánafé oraighét. Yesum mer yiyátoi akényégh ár
english: But the talk about him became widely. Crowds came to hear him and he healed many sick people. 16 But Yesu often moved out lonely places to talk with God. Yesu healed a paralyzed man

nama: Njam Yesum ewawinjoi yéfene ndimbal mwighé, fá norayai, "Fútar, fene yaufi té wawalinda."
english: When Yesu saw their big mind(faith), he said, "Friend, your sin are washed."

nama: Farasi ár a nák watamegh ár mwighé tawaitotawét yéfenjomén, "Efe yéné ár yém wanyogh si kés noraye? Efe yaufi so tawalindangé wénde Ngánjánamro?"
english: Farasi men and the teaching men of the law discussed with themselves, "Who is this man who speak bad/wrong talk(blasphemy)? Who can wash sins but God alone?"

nama: Yéné soramé, Yesu néngwanoi a yinjoi mani kafégh ár yétkwén Lefi témorangérwén mani kafégh sifayan. Yesum yémndai fá, "Kwénmaito yénd." 28 A Lefi nokayoi, efrangoi méinyotio rokar a yáitoi fá.
english: After this, Yesu went and saw a tax collector name Lefi sitting at tax collecting place(booth). Yesu told him, "Follow me." 28 And Lefi stood up, left everything and followed him.

nama: Kétándmé Lefim ndimbal téménd néusénam Yesueyot yánjo méngon, a ndimbal mérén mani kafégh ár a ámb kés em njamke tánetawét yémafé. 30 Wénde Farasi ár a nák watamegh ár káwatarnawét yáne waitogh árfefaf, "Némamén fémofem enetati njamke a nu mani kafégh árfé a yaufiyam wafrogh árfé?"
english: From there Lefi made a big feast for Yesu at his house, and a large crowd of tax collectors and other people were eating with them. 30 But the Farasi men and the teaching men of the law complanied to his following men, "Why do you eat and drink with tax collectors and people doing sins (sinners)?"

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Yau mer árém njokté yarawetat wénde enjne téfnáramro. 32 Yénd yau mbarkánd ár moghét wénmormén, wénde yaufiyam ár wengoghét." Yesu yémotayénd awafarmanéghmén
english: Yesu answered them, "The healthy people don't look for a doctor but only the sick people [do]. 32 I didn't come to call straight people, but sinful people [come to call] to turn away. People asked Yesu About fasting

nama: Ámb Safatan Yesu tiotau mbwe ndawan, a yánjo waitogh árém ámb wén mbwe kafégh ewafngoyénd, yéfenjo ngángaye tasénawét mbwe a tánetawét. 2 Ámb Farasi árém yémotayénd, "Némamén fémo nák eráfne Safatan?"
english: One Safat Yesu was walking through the grainfields, and his following men began to pick some head of grain, rubbed them in their hands to eat the seeds(kernels) 2 Some of Farasi men asked, "Why are you breaking the law on the Safat?

nama: Féyo Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Yéndo emotan fém, árkéméné yém nák Safatan: mer wafroghét o yaufi wafroghét, ghérsé wanjarghét o wirorghét?"
english: Then Yesu said to them, "I ask you, which is lawful on the Safat: to do good or to do evil, to save life or to destroy it?"

nama: Yémon ghékfe fá tafandau méinyotio, a norayai ároefef, "Fenjo ngángé tásáfo." Akényégh árom yafrotam ndené, a yáne ngángé táf mer namndai. 11 Wénde fá tamorwén nékwafé a warunyégh yafngoyénd yéfene kénjúnro némé so tafrotawét Yesuefaf. 12 Yesuene muyafé ár
english: He looked at them all, and said to the man, "Stetch out your hand." Paralyzed man did that, and his hand became good. 11 But they were angry and began to discuss with each other what they might do to Yesu. The Twelve men with Yesu's authority

nama: Fá Yesufé néneworyénd tunakéfta a nokayoyénd fafat sifayan. Tárfár Yesuene waitogh ár kété tamorwén a tárfár wéi enmormén Judiamén, ndenáyo Jerusalem, Taire a Sidon arakaf téndomén, 18 efe té enmormén si áyárghét yáfaf a yéfene enjneta mer yátoghét. Efe yaufi mbérmbéram tawasérmbotau mer náyátoyénd, 19 a méinyotio árém yéta yanjaghét trametawét fá, ménamén wafté ngétonau Yesueta a mer ngáyátotawét.
english: He went down with them and stood on level place. Many Yesu's following men was there and many [people] came from Judia, same way from Jerusalem, and from the coast of Taire and Sidon, 18 who had come to hear him and to be healed from their diseases. Who spoiled by evil spirit became good, 19 and all the people tried to touch him, because power was [coming] from Yesu and healing them.

nama: Yémon tafandau yánjo waitogh ár a norayai, "Frengégh yém féfeyot efe em yauyau, ménamén féfeyot siyém Ngánjánene limánégh.
english: He looked his following men and said, Blessed are you who are poor, because yours is the ruling of God.

nama: Frengégh yém féfeyot efe em siogh sénonjo, ménamén fém so em remngoghkaf. Frengégh yém féfeyot efe ye nendat sénonjo, ménamén fém so em fénan.
english: Blessed are you who are hunger now, because you will be satisfied. Blessed are you who weep now, because you will laugh.
