nama: Frengégh yém féfeyot njam árém méndméndat efandat, njam árém ekarotat fém a ewasalitat, a ekenat fém emndetat yaufi mbérmbér em, ménamén Ároene Ambummén.
english: Blessed are you when people see you with hate, when people exclude you and insult you, and reject you and said that you are evil spirit, because of the Son of Man.

nama: "Áuwégh yém yéné efghon a ermángégh áuwéghafé, ménamén fene fai siyém ndimbal njafaran. Ndenéyameyo yéfene ákifem takarotawét Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár.
english: "Rejoice in that day and dance for joy, because your pay/reward is big in heaven. In a same way their ancesters treated God's people who make know(prophets)."

nama: "Wénde tékrát yém féfeyot efe em wemár, ménamén fém té tamorwén áfrát ghérsaye.
english: "But How painful to you who are rich, because you aready have easy life.

nama: Tékrat yém féfeyot efe remngoghkaf sénonjo em, ménamén fém siogh so engém. Tékrat yém féfeyot efe em fénan sénonjo, ménamén fém so em ghérghérsisayan a yeyan.
english: How painful to you who are satisfied now, because you will be hungry. How painful to you who laugh now, because you will be in sadness and in crying.

nama: Nderé mámáfi so yém féfeyot njam méinyotio árém norayat mer si féfenemén ndenáye yéfene ákifem tamndetawét unyégh mat yátogh ár. Euwetati mék téfnár
english: How painful to you when all people speak good talk about you, in a same way their ancesters treated and said to the false God's people who make know(prophets). Love for Enemies

nama: Yesum tawaufrotau yéné rengerenge si, "Féyotaro kwéfkwéf árém so yémnje kwéfkwéf ár? Wét yau so kélawend yékwét? 40 Waitogh árém yau so taindangi yéfene watamegh ár, wénde efe njam ewatametat méinyotio yam, fá so em ndenáyo yéfene watamegh ár.
english: Yesu told them this parable, "Can a blind man lead a blind man? Will they not [both] fall down a hole? 40 The followers will be not above their teaching man, but if who have learned everything, he will be same to his teaching man.

nama: Njam Yesum náyárai sélngwélafé si yá tambén, a fá nawengoi kétán ár mérénfaf táitotawét, "Yéndo emndetan fém, yéndon yau yinjon ndené ndimbal mwighé Israil yuwon." 10 Táf ár nénangoyénd méngot a yinjoyénd faiofnar ásáfogh ár merro. Yesum yanoi kwirane ambum
english: When Yesu heard amazing talk from him, and he turned to the crowd following him, he said, "I tell you, I have not found such a big mind(faith) in Israil. 10 When the men [who were sent] returned to the house and found the worker well. Yesu raised a widow's son

nama: Kaka nitroi taté yiyánjai, fá emofem ténérsawét nokayoyénd. Fá norayai, "Tot ambum, yéndon némndetan, kano!" 15 Kér ambum nanoyéng námnjoi a si nufngoi. Yesum yéngramai yatmafaf.
english: He moved close and touch the carrier, those who carried it stood. He said "Young man, I say to you, get upǃ" 15 The dead son got up [and] sat down and started to talk. Yesu gave him to his mother.

nama: Fá sélngwél emormén a soramé áuwégh nufngoyénd a norayayénd, "Ndimbal Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár té nufar téfefaf. Ngánján té nufar yánjo ár wáutárghét." 17 Yéné si marat náyátoi Yesuenemén Judia yuwon a ámb yu kaka kés tamorwén. Yesu a Jon walitogh ár
english: They were surprised and after they were happy and said, "A big God's man who make know(prophet) has arrived to us. God has arrived here to help his people. 17 This talk about Yesu became wide out to Judia and which close regions. Yesu and Jon the Baptist

nama: Jonene waitogh árém yaufroyénd yá yéné yammén. Joném sómbio emotangeyai, 19 yémon sómbio ár ewafareméng Yurafaf moghét, "Fém yénéf ném efe kéném, o so néngawanjetam ámb ároe?"
english: Jon's following men told him about these things. Jon called two, 19 he sent two people to the Lord to ask, "Are you the one who is to come, or will(should) we wait for other people?"

nama: Sómbio ár njam enérmén Yesuefaf, fá korayangénd, "Jon walitogh árém tanmafarwe fefaf moghét. 'Fém yénéf ném efe kéném o so néngawanjetam ámb ároe?'"
english: When two men came to Yesu, they said, "Jon the baptist sent us to ask to you, "Are you the one who comes, or we will wait for other people?"

nama: Yesu kor norayai, "Yéndon emndetan, Jon walitogh árom ewainde méinyotio ár efe náráftat yéné mband maratan. Wénde efe yém némbnar ambumnit Ngánjánene limánéghan, yémo so taindangé Jon."
english: Yeus said more, "I tell you, Jon the Baptist surpasses all men who have been born on this earth. But the one who is like a small child inside the ruling of God, he surpasses Jon."

nama: Yesuene si njam náyárayénd, méinyotio ár, kété tawafnyangérwén mani kafégh ár, mat namndayénd ndené Ngánjánene yam siyém efalo, ménamén Joném té tawawaitotau. 30 Wénde Farasi ár a nák watamegh árém yékenayénd Ngánjánene ménde yéfendio, ménamén fá nakenayénd Joném sái tawalitotau.
english: When they heard Yesu's talks, all the people including to tax collects knew that God's way is true, because Jon baptized them. 30 But Farasi men and teaching men of the law rejected God's wanting for themselves, because they refused [that] Jon baptize them.

nama: "Némafaf yéndo so yétémndan yéné árfenemén? Némanit fá em? 32 Ndenanit em ambumtértér yénau emorang rokar térarégh sifayan a fárofáro námotat, "'Yénd nambnam sifraféré feyot, a fém yau neremndé Yénd neremndam ghérghérsisafé kérmén wagh, a fém yau nende.'
english: To what, I (can) hard to find/compare about these people? What are they like? 32 They are like children sitting in the exchanging place(market place) and calling out to each other, "We played flute for you and you did not dance! We sang a funeral song, and you did not cry!"

nama: Ámb Farasi ároene waráuwégh yénmormén Yesueyot séite njamket, fá néngwanoi kétán Farasi ároene méngot námnjoi nénet. 37 Ámb amaf efe témorangérwén yaufi ghérsayan yéné tesenan mat náyátoi ndené Yesum njamke tánetau ámb Farasi ároene méngon, yéné amafom yénérsam séfkwénafé mer wimafé wékwér, 38 amaf nokayoi yá sémta Yesuene kafkafot a niyai yáfaf, yáne yengam kuitawét Yesuene kafkafot. Yémon wányányogh yawafngoi yánjo séfe, a esnetai a yawasuryéng mer wimafé wékwére.
english: One of Farasi men invited Yesu for dinner, he went to Farasi man's house and sit to eat. 37 A woman had lived a sinful life in that town learned that Yesu was eating at one Farasi man's house, that woman brought a jar of the good smelling liquid(perfume), 38 woman stood behind him to [wash] his feet and knelt down to him, and wet Yesu's feet with her tears. She began to wipe them(2 feet) with her hair, and kissed them and poured special smelling liquid on them.

nama: Njam yéné Farasi árom yinjoi yéné yam, fá norayai yánjo kénjún, "Yéné ár njam Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár yém, fá mat té yém emo fá yiyanje a nderé sáfot amaf yéné yém, fá siyém yaufiyamafé amaf."
english: When this Farasi man who invited him saw this, he said to himself, "If this man is God's man who make know(prophet), he would know who is touching him and what kind of woman she is, she is a woman with sin."

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Saimon, yéndon ámb si so kémaufron." Yémo korayangé, "Kwaufro, watamegh ár."
english: Yesu answered him, "Saimon, I will say one talk [to you]." He said, "Tell me, teaching man."

nama: "Sómbio árét mani ewarameyai maniafé árém, ámb ároe 5,000 kina, ámb ároe 500 kina. 42 Sómbio ár maniofnar namndeyayénd wangoghét, féyo yémo mwighafnar ewawaineyai. Emo so minde méndefé yéfande?"
english: Two men owed money to a moneylender, 5000 kina to one and the other 500 kina. 42 Both of them became no money to pay him back, so he forgave debt for both. Do you see who will very liking him?"

nama: Saimon nuwangoi, "Yénd ndené nemnan endene ndimbal fai mwighafnar yawitam." Yesum yémndai, "Fémo mer nuwango."
english: Saimon answered, "I think that who had deleted big payment back." Yesu said, "You answered well."

nama: Féyo Yesum yémndai amaf, "Fene yaufi té némawalindangén."
english: Then Yesu said to her, "Your sins have been washed."

nama: Ámb wan téfnár si nufngoyénd yéfene kénjúnro, "Efe yéné yém emo yaufi tawainangé?"
english: The other guests began to say among themselves, "Who is this who washes sins?"

nama: Yesum yawangoi amafoe, "Fene ndimbal mwighayam té némanjar, nguwano mere a némor."
english: Yesu said to the woman, "Your big mind(faith) has saved you, go well and live."

nama: Njamandio tárfár ár káumendawét Yesuefaf fénatafénaté tesenta, yémon rengerenge si tawaitotau:
english: While a large crowd was gathering to Yesu from different towns, he preached parable:

nama: "Ndau téfnár nuwanoi yánjo wén mbwe taranéghét. Njam yémon téngtarnau, ámb nuyáyénd téndomé, yéné tatumndawét kafkafe, a menam tánetawét. 6 Ámb nuyáyénd wímafé mbandan, njam kanotawét, kér emormén ménamén nuofnarmén. 7 Ámb mbwe nuyáyénd wétwét sifayan wétwétam njangénjangén eyátoyénd anoghan. 8 Ámb mbwe nuyáyénd mer mbandot. Kanotawét a nafoyénd kwéki 100 mindefifi tárfár ndené kés eitaménd." Fá njam norayai yéné, yémon emndai, "Fá efe njam ténganafé em áyárghét, fá so káyárangi."
english: "A farmer went out to sow his seed. When he scattered the seed, some fell along the road, it was trampled on, and the birds ate it. 6 Some seed fell on the land with stones, when it came up, it died because there is no water(moisture). 7 Other seed fell among the thorns place which it grew up with thorns and choked it. 8 Other seed fell on good land. It grew and produced a crop 100 times more than was sorn. When he talked this, he said, "He who has ears to hear, he will hear."

nama: Yáne waitogh árém yémotayénd yéné rengerenge fifi némé yém. 10 Yémon emndai, "Ngánjánam yuyafote féfe fronde némé yau tauyafotau Ngánján limánéghmén, wénde ámb árét yéndon norayan rengerenge sie, ménát, "'Ghékfe so yéfandat, wénde yau so tinjongi, so náyáretat, wénde yau so tayamngongi.'
english: His following men asked him what is meaning of this parable. 10 He said, "God is showing to you what he did not show before about ruling of God, but I am speaking to other people with parables, so that, The eye will see, but they may not find, they will hear, but they may not understand.

nama: Yesue yátmé a yanngnéf enmormén yá fandaghét, wénde ménamén ár tárfár tamorwén, fá yau kaka tamorwén yáfaf. 20 Ámb árom yaufroi yá, "Fene amé a fenngnéf kétándmé ewakai safén, nawanjetat fe fandaghét."
english: Yesu's his mother and his younger brothers came to see him, but because there are many people, they can't come to close to him. 20 Someone told him, "Your mother and your younger brothers are standing outside, waiting to see you."

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Tane amé a nénngnéf fá em efe náyáretat Ngánjánene si a wafroghyaman ekmetat." Yesum yékmboi ndimbal mbormbor
english: He answered, "My mother and younger brothers are those who hear God's talk and put it action." Yesu calms big wind(storm)

nama: Ámb efghon Yesum emndai yánjo waitogh ár, "Kuwanongém sawot kéférmangém witmé karéf." Féyo fá nuflitaménd boutan nuwanoyénd. 23 Njamandio fá karayawét, Yesu nakmai. Ndimbal mbormboram eutfoi sawan, féyo bout táfandio olitoghétro témorwén, fá tamorwén ndimbal kértayan.
english: One day Yesu said to his following men, "Let's go to theh lake and pass over to the other side." So they got into the bout and went. 23 As they started, Yesu fell asleep. Big wind blew in the lake, so bout almost was sink, they were in the big problem.

nama: Waitogh ár naflayénd yanoyénd fá, nutnayénd, "Yuré, Yuré, yénd yéném olitoghétro!"
english: The following men went and woke him, shouted, "Lord, Lord, we're going to drown!"

nama: Yémo emndai yánjo waitogh ár, "Ánde yém féfene ndimbal mwighé?" Waitogh ár férfér a sélngwél emormén, fáro yémndayénd, "Efe fá yém? Njam fá korayangé mbormbor a sofam tiyárangi fá!" Yesum mer yiyátoi yaufi mbérmbérafé ár
english: He said to his following men, "Where is your big mind(faith)?" The following men came to fear and amazement, they said themselves, "Who is he? When he speak to wind and waves, [they] obey him!" Yesu healed man with evil spirit

nama: Yesum yémotai, "Fene yétkwén efe yém?"
english: Yesu asked him, "Who(What) is your name?"

nama: A yémofem yamnendayénd fá férghe, "Yénd yau so yéngém kétán kémboghofnar yékwét."
english: And they begged him repeatedly not to order that, 'We will not go to into the never ending hold.'

nama: Tárfár mérén kimb taménjnawét mband tunakéf téndon. Yaufi mbérmbéram yamnendayénd Yesu ménát élaughét yéfefaf féyo wafté ewaramai. 33 Njam yaufi mbérmbér nétoryénd árta, fá nélawayénd kimbafefaf, a néngengoyénd ngewonawét sawot a kolitotawét.
english: A large herd of pigs was feeding on the mountainside. Evil spirits begged Yesu to let them go into them, and he gave them power(permission). 33 When evil spirits came out of the man, they went to the pigs, and they rushed down steep bank to the lake and was drowned.

nama: Yéné ár kétándmé ende tambén yaufi mbérmbér tawifnau, yémon yamnendai Yesu yémafé álighét, wénde Yesum yéngwatembai ndené siafé, 39 "Ngangota méngotuot a tawaufro nderé ndimbal Ngánjánam kémawafrote feyot." Féyo ár nuwanoi, a kafrotau tesenamé nderé ndimbal Yesum yawafrotam yáyot. Kér mérés a enjnefé amaf
english: That man from whom the evil spirits gone out, he begged Yesu to go with him, but Yesu sent him with talk that, 39 "Return to the village and tell how much God has done for you." So the man went away and told through the city how much Yesu had done for him. A dead girl and a sick woman

nama: Yesu njam néngangotam, ár mérnam yumyoyénd, ménamén yémofem méghméghafé tanjetawét. 41 Ár yétkwén Jairus, wáwefnogh méngo ndimbal ár yénmormén a nénuyai Yesuene kafkafot, yamnendai álighét yánjo méngot 42 ménamén yáne féfét mérés, 12 yunjéf krotro témorwén.
english: When Yesu went back, a crowd welcomed, because they were waiting for him with expecting. 41 The man name Jairus, a meeting house head man came and fell at Yesu's feet, begged him to go to his house 42 because his only daughter, [a girl] 12 years old was dying.

nama: A amaf kété témorwén efe férék kertau 12 yunjéf, wénde emon yau yéfrendai. 44 Fá sémta yénmormén a yiyánjai Yesuene sáláme fétfétro férék táf nékmboi. 45 Yesu namotai, "Emo wiyánja?" Njam fá méinyotio nawanyotayénd, Fité norayai, "Yuré, ár mérnam némarendangi a néngsotat fém."
english: And a woman was there who had been bleeding for 12 years, but no one heal her. 44 She came him from backside and touched the edge of Yesu's clothes that time her bleeding stopped. 45 Yesu asked, "Who touched me?" When they all denied it, Fitè said, "Lord, the crowd are surrounding and pressing you."

nama: Wénde Yesu norayai, "Ámb árom té wiyánja. Yénd mat náyáton wafté té néngférém ta tambén."
english: But Yesu said, "Someone has touched me. I know [my]power has gone out from me."

nama: Njam amaf yénmormén fandaghofnar a mat siofnar, férférafé ténmorwén nénuyai yáne kafkafot. Méinyotio árfene sáfréré, yémon yémndai némamén yémon yiyánjai a ndernáye fá táfandio frengégham yanai. 48 Ndenaye Yesum yémdayéng, "Mérés, fenjo ndimbal mwighayam mer niyáto. Kuwano mer so ném."
english: When the woman came without watching man and without notice, she had a fear and knelt down at his feet. In front of all the people, she told why she had touched him and how she had been healed at once. 48 Then Yesu said to her, "Daughter, your big mind(faith) has healed you. Go in peace."

nama: Seitefifi 12 waitogh ár enmormén Yesuefaf a yémndayénd, "Tawafarna ár mérén, fá so néngangotat kaka méngotuot a téndo yuwot ménát njamke a kémégh sifayat áronjaghét, ménamén yénd yéném yauyau sifayan."
english: Late in the afternoon 12 following men came to him and said, "Send the crowd, they will go back to the close village and countryside in order to find food and sleeping place, because we came in remote place here.

nama: Yémon ewawangoi, "Fémofem némndafi tawaramangi nénet yéfeyot."
english: He answered to them, "You(plural) give them something to eat."

nama: Ámb efghon Yesum efrangoi ár mérén Ngánjánafé oraighét yambia a yánjo waitogh árfé tamorwén, yémon emotai fá, "Efe mérén korayawét yénd efe wém?"
english: One day Yesu left the crowd for talking with God alone and his diciples were with him, he asked them, "Who do people say I am?"

nama: Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Ámb korayawét Jon walitogh ár, ámb árém korayawét Elaija, wénde ámb árém korayawét ndené tándáwár ámb Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár kénangote ghérsat."
english: They answered, "Some say Jon the baptist, other people say Elaija, but other people say one of God's man who make know(prophet) of long ago has come back to life."

nama: Yémon emotai, "Wénde fém wét? Fém korayangi yénd efe wém?" Fitam yawangoi, "Ngánjánene Keriso." Yesu korayau yánjo kérmén
english: He asked them, "But what about you? Who do you say I am?" Fitè answered, "God's Keriso." Yesu spoke about his death

nama: Yesum táikér si tawawéngsotau yéfe ende yau taufrongi yénémamén. 22 A fá norayai, "Ároene Ambumom so fété kérté yéngfande tárfár yaman a yékarotat sénko árém, limánégh ghéngén wárogh árém a nák watamegh árém, a fá so fété yésmetat a nambio efogh soramé Ngánjánam so tanongé ghérsat."
english: Yesu strictly warned them not to tell about this to anyone. 22 And he said, "The Son of Man must suffer many things and the head people, the leading sacrifice burning people(high priests) and the teaching men of the law rejected him, and they surely kill and after the three day he will rise to life."

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Fém ndimbal mwighafnar a áyáréghofnar ár, nderé teke fémafé so yénmor a ewamarotan fém? Ténémnjo fene ambum yénan."
english: Yesu answered, "You without big mind(faith) and without hearing people, how long must I stay with you and endure you? Bring your son here."

nama: Njamandio ambum ténmorwén, yaufi mbérmbéram yitam mbandot kosénau. Wénde Yesum yaufi mbérmbér yifnai, yéfrendai ambum a yangoi yárefafaf. 43 A fá sélngwél emormén Ngánjánene ndimbal yam wafroghan. Yesu korayau yánjo kérmén yénamayo
english: While the child was coming, the evil spirit threw him to the ground twisting. But Yesu rebuked the evil spirit, healed the child and gave him back to his father. 43 And they were amazed at God's big things doing. Yesu spoke about his death a second time

nama: "Mer kéráye káyárangi yéndon némé waufroghét féfe ewawafngon. Ároene Ambum so sén yérametat árfene ngángat." 45 Wénde fá yau mat náyátoyénd némé tésérmbnau. Ménamén ténoghe témorwén yéfefaf, fá yau mat náyátoyénd, a fá férfér tamorwén ámoghét yáfaf yénémamén. Efe so yém ndimbal
english: "Listen carefully to what I am about to tell you. The Son of Man is going to be gave teeth(betrayed) into the hands of men." 45 But they did not understand what is meaning. Because it was secret to them, they did not know it, and they were afraid to ask him about it. Who will be big

nama: Jon norayai, "Yuré, yéndfem ár yinjongém yaufi mbérmbér tawifnau fene yétkwénan a yéta tékmbotawém, ménamém fá yau téfene yém."
english: Jon said, "Lord, we saw the man driving out evil spirits in your name and we tried to stop him, because he is not one of us."

nama: Yesum emndai, "Yau yékmbotati ménamén emo njam yau nékarota fá siyém téfeta." Samariamén árém yékenayénd Yesu
english: Yesu said, "Don't stop him because whoever is not against us, he is for us." Samaria people rejected Yesu

nama: Fá njam endmé tangmormén árom yémndai Yesu, "Yéndon so némaitotan árkamé fém njam niota."
english: As they were walking along the road, a man said to Yesu, "I will follow you wherever you go."

nama: Yesum yawangoyéng, "Ághéághafene féne té em a menafene njén té em, wénde Ároene Ambumoene sifayé yau yém kéméghét a enághét."
english: Yesu answered, "Wild dogs have holes and birds have nests, but the Son of Man has no place to sleep and to rest."

nama: Yémon yémndai ámb ár, "Kwénmaito yénd." Wénde árém yawangoi, "Yuré, yénd so fronde nangotan méngot kétán tane afé kér njam yém yéndon so yiyátotan soramé yéndon so kémaiton."
english: He said to another man, "Follow me." But man answered, "Lord, first I will go back to home. After my father dies I will bury him, after I will foloow you."

nama: Yesum yémndai fá, "Kér ár yémofem so eyátotat efe em mbérmbére kérwén, wénde fém nguwano Ngánjánene limánéghmén si waitoghét."
english: Yesu said to him, "Those who are spiritually dead will bury the dead, but you go and proclaim talk of the ruling of God."

nama: Wéi ámb norayai, "Yéndon so kémaiton fém, Yuré, wénde so fronde néngangotan tane mérén watembghét."
english: Another still said, "I will follow you, Lord, but first let me go back to my family to say goodbye."

nama: Yesum yawangoyéng, "Emo tarégh ásáfogh térnyangé a néreta sémta, fá féyotarofnar yém Ngánjánene limánégh ásáfoghét."
english: Yesu answered, "Anyone who starts to work to plow and looks back, he is not able to work for the ruling of God."

nama: Yesum emndai yánjo waitogh ár, "Emo fém njam niyáreta, yénd yémon so wiyárete, Njam emo fém nékena, yénd yémon wékene, wénde emo wékene yénd, fá yékene emo yénd wénmáfáretam."
english: Yesu said to his following men, "Whoever listens to you, he listens to me, but whoever rejects you, he rejects me, but whoever rejects me, he rejects him who sent me."

nama: 72 waitogh ár kénangotawét áuwéghafé fá nafroyénd, "Yuré, yaufi mbérmbér mé kénamnyongayénd téfefaf fene yétkwénan."
english: 72 following men returned with joy and they told, "Lord, even evil spirits obeyed us in your name."

nama: Yéné efghon, Ngánján Mbérmbéram Yesu áuwéghe yafoi norayai, "Yéndon némuwetan fém, Afé, Yuré njafarmén a mbandmén, ménamén fémon némé etnoi yéné yam kétándmé mer mwighé ár a matyam ár tambén wénde sáfét tawakmetau kor matyamofnar árét ambumnit. Néméwét, Afé, yéné témorwén fene mer frengéghafé.
english: At that day the God Spirit filled with joy to Yesu and he(Yesu) said, "I praise you, Father, Lord of heaven and earth, because you have hidden these things from the wise and intelligent, but revealed them to without-knowledge/intelligent men like children. Yes, Father, this was with your good blessing.

nama: "Méinyotio yam enramai tafaf tane Afam. Efe ámb yau mat yém Ambumoenemén mé Afaro, a efe ámb yau mat yém efe Afé yém mé Ambumro a fáro efe Ambumom ewaferyéng yá uyafoghét."
english: My Father has given me all things. No one knows the Son only the Father [knows], and no one knows who the Father is only Son [knows] and those to whom the Son chooses to reveal him."

nama: Ámb efghon ámb nák watamegh ár nokayoi Yesue ufoghét a yémotai, "Watamegh ár, yéndon némé so yafrotan efalo tuot ghérsé résaghét?"
english: One day a teaching man of the law stood up to test Yesu and asked, "Teacher, what I must to do to receive the eternal life?"

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Némé si yékai nák kénjún? Fémo ndernáye yafene?"
english: Yesu answered, "What is written in the law? How do you interpret it?"

nama: Yémo yawangoi, "'Yuwetang Yuré fene Ngánján méinyotio fene tikfe, méinyotio fene mbérmbére, méinyotio fene waftaye, méinyotio fene mwighaye,' a 'Yuweta fenjo kaka ár ndenéyameyo fémyo ndernáye náuwete.'"
english: He answered, "'Love the Lord your God with all your heart, with all your spirit, with all your power and with all your mind' and 'Love your neighbor like as yourself how do you love.'"

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Efalo, yéné yafrota a fém so nakete."
english: Yesu answered, "Correct, do this and you will live."

nama: Wénde fá ménde témorwén fáyo sái kauyafongai, féyo yémo Yesu yémotai, "A efe yém tane fútar?"
english: But he wanted to justify himself, so he asked Yesu, "And who is my neighbor?"

nama: "Yéné nambio mérénta fém ndernáye nemne efe fútar yém yáyot efe oro téfnáram yésmetaménd?"
english: Which of these three do you think become a neighbor to the man who was striked by robbers?

nama: Nák watamegh árom yawangoi, "Yéné ár fiyém emon ghérghérsisafé yinjoi." Yesum yémndai, "Nguwano a yénéyamyo yafrota." Mata a Meri
english: The teaching man of the law answered, "The man who had mercy to him." Yesu told him, "Go and do like this." Mata and Meri

nama: Ámb efghon Yesu Ngánjánjafé koraiwét fénaté sifayan. Njam yifoi, ámb yánjo waitogh árém yémndai fá, "Yuré, ténmatameta Ngánjánafé orayégh, ndené fété Joném ndernáye tawatametau yánjo waitogh ár."
english: One day Yesu was talking with God in a different/certain place. When he finished, one of his following men said to him, "Lord, teach us to talk with God, just as Jon taught his following men." 2 Yesu said to them, "When you talk with God, say like: Father, Be honored your without.dust(holy) name, your kingdom will come.

nama: Méinyotio efghon njamke so yénmaramete.
english: Will give us food in every day.

nama: Kénmawalindangé téfene yaufi, ménamén yénd yéfene yaufi yénmawalinda emofem ewafrotat téfefaf. A yau yénd yénérsa ufoghan."
english: Forget us our sins, because we forget their sins those who did against us. And do not bring us in temptation."

nama: Féyo Yesum emndai fá, "Fém ámb njam ném fútarafé, a fá nuwanoi yáfaf sémbár néndkéfan a norayai, 'Fútar, kwaram nambio féskaf flawé, 6 ménamén tane fútar té téném nayuta tafaf, a yéndon némé ámb yau téfrendan yáyot!'
english: Then Yesu said to them, "If one [of you] have a friend, and you should go to him at midnight and say, 'Friend, give me three loaves of flawè, 6 because my friend has come to me from long distance, and I have no [food] to prepare for him!'

nama: "Féyo yénd norayan féfefaf: Kamota a so kémaramangé; yéronja a so tinjo; náutána a feyot sésafne so kasawérngé. 10 Ménamén méinyotio ár emofem namotat so yanangi, méinyotio ár efe yéronjat so tinjongi; fá efe náutánat, sésafne so kasawérngé.
english: So I say to you: Ask and it will be given to you; seek and you will find; knock and the door wll be opened to you. 10 Because every people who ask will receive, every people seek will find; the one who knocks, the door will be opened.

nama: "Njam muyafé ár yakai umaneghkaf yambwete yánjo méngo táf yáne rokar mer so em. 22 Wénde njam minde muyafé árom tésmangé a taindangé fá, yémon tangwanangé mék rokar árkéménayan yuré kamyotau a efaloi némé yémon ewanai oroe.
english: When a strong man arms himself and guards his home when everything he owns are safe. 22 But if very strong man strikes and defeats him, he carries away the fight things which the owner was depending on and divides up what he stole.

nama: "Efe yau yéndfé yénre, fá siyém ta kenagh ár, a emon yénd yau sái wáutána umengan, fá so nironat.
english: Who is not with me, he is man rejecting me, and who does not gather with me, he is scattering.

nama: Yesum njam korayau yénémamén, amaf nutnayéng ár mérén kénjún, "Frengéghkaf amaf yém emo náráftam a endene nonoyan kanotau."
english: When Yesu was saying these things, a woman called out [to him] in the crowd, "Blessed is the woman who gave birth to you and [let you] nurs at her breasts!"

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Frengéghkaf fá em efe náyáretat Ngánjánene si a wafroghan tékmangi." Jonane yam ufarogh
english: Yesu answered, "Blessed are those who hear God's talk and put it in practice." The surprising thing of Jona

nama: Yesum njam si yifoi Farasi árom yumyoi yémafe nénet. Féyo Yesu naflai a námnjoi nénet. 38 Wénde Farasi ár sélngwél yémormén ménamén ngángé umbarghofnar Yesum néne ewafngoi.
english: When Yesu had finished speaking, a Farasi man invited him to eat with him. 38 But Farasi man came to surprise because Yesu began to eat without washing hands.

nama: Yuram yémndai Farasi ár, "Fém Farasi ár kafusi a sin faruro esénnati, wénde kénjún fém sem kwénjta a yaufi kér ro. 40 Fém afrengéghofnar árǃ Fém mat em emo faru yafrotam, wéi ndenáyo yafrotam kénjú? 41 Wénde tawaram némé enyau fene kénjún yauyau árét, méinyotio so em féfeyot njúnnjúnofnar.
english: The Lord said to Farasi man, "You Farasi man clean the outside of the cup and pot, but inside of you are [full of] greed and wickedness. 40 You foolish men! [Didn't] you know the one who made the outside, also made inside? 41 But give away what is inside you to the poor, everything will be clean for you.

nama: "Nderé mámáfi so yém Farasi ár féfeyot, ménamén féfene ramégh siyém Ngánjáneyot méinyotio ndau tambén, wénde fémofem yékenati Ngánjánene uwégh a mbarkánd yam. Fémofem so otameghét yékmetati Ngánjánene uwégh a mbarkánd yam, a yau nékmbotati ndau njamke raméghta.
english: Woe/how terrible to you Farasi men, because your offering is to God from all the garden, but you neglect God's love and justice. You should have practiced the love of God and justice, and don't stop offering of garden food.

nama: "Nderé mámáfi so yém Farasi ár féfeyot, ménamén fémofem méndefé yéfandati mer ámnjogh sifayé áumengégh méngon, a áuwégh si utmanégh térarégh sifayan.
english: Woe to you Farasi men, because you like to find the good(important) seat in meeting house, and respectful greeting in the marketplaces.

nama: "Nderé mámáfi so yém Farasi ár féfeyot, ménamén fém ndenanit em wayamngoghofnar mbéwé, árkamé ár eyota matofnar."
english: Woe/how terrible to you Farasi men, because you are like unmarked graves, which people walk on without knowing it.

nama: Ámb nák watamegh árom yawangoi, "Watamegh ár, njam fém noraye yénémamén, fémon mámáfi yénd yényátote ndenáye."
english: One of the teaching man of law answered, "Teacher, when you say these things, you spoil/attack us also."

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Fém, nák watamegh ár, nderé mámáfi so yém féfeyot, ménamén fémofem árét ewafayotati kérté résaghét, wénde fémofem yau so ewáutánati kérté résaghét ámbiro tombé min ngángaye yéfe wáutárghét.
english: Yesu answered, "You, the teaching men of the law, woe to you, because you put people down with burdons they are heavy to carry, but you will not lift on finger to help them.

nama: "Nderé mámáfi so yém nák watamegh téfnárét, ménamén fémofem mé té tamndawét yéné ki matyam sésafne sauréghmén. Fémyo yau so kélawangi kénjút, a fémofem ekmbotati fá efe élaughét narametat."
english: Woe/how terrible to you the teaching man of the law, because you have kept the key to open the door of knowledge. You yourselves have not entered inside, and you have stopped those who were entering.

nama: Njam Yesu nuwanoi kété, Farasi ár a nák watamegh téfnár nékwe tasotawét a ámogh si tarametawét tárfár yammén, 54 kawanjetawét sái terangayénd Yesu ménáyan némé yaufi si sái korayangai.
english: When Yesu left there, Farasi men and the teaching men of law became angry and they made a asking talk about many things, 54 they waited, [they] will catch Yesu through what he will say wrong talk.

nama: "Njam fém nénémnjat áumengégh méngot, limánégh ár a muyafé árfefaf, fém yau mámé mwighé em ndernáye fém so nawamarotati o fém némé so norayati, 12 ménamén Ngánján Mbérmbéram so ewatamete fém yéné efghon némé so norayati." Wemár mámáfi ároene rengerenge si
english: When you are brought to meeting houses, to rulers and authorities, do not worried about how will you defend yourself or what you will say, 12 because God Spirit will teach you at that time what will say." The parable of rich fool

nama: Ámb ár norayai mérén kénjún yáfaf, "Watamegh ár, témnde tane ané faloghét némé tane afam euroi."
english: Someone in the crowd said to him, "Teacher, tell my big brother to divide what my father's left things."

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Fútar, emo wékafai yénd ménát yéndon efalotan rokarrokar féfene néndkéfan sómbio ár?" 15 Ndenaye fá norayai yéfefaf, "Kor fété! Ménamén féfene méinyotio fénatafénaté kwénjtamén; ménamén féfene ghérsé yau so rokaram tawanjarngé."
english: Yesu answered, "Friend, who appointed me in order that I divide things between two men?" 15 Then he said to them, "Be careful! Because of your every kind of greed; because possessions/things do not save your life.

nama: Féyo Yesum emndayéng yéné rengerenge si: "Kété témorwén ámb wemár ár efe témorwén mband yuré némé kanotawét mer rokar ndawan. 17 Fá nemnayéng, 'Yéndo némé so yafrotan? Tane yau kor sifayé yém ánde tane méinyotio rokar so ewamndan.'
english: Then Yesu told them this parable: There was a rich man who was land owner what produce good crops. 17 He thought, 'What shall I do? My place is no enough where I will store all my things.' 18 Then he said, "This is what I will do. I will tear down my crops storage house and build very big, and there I will store my farm crops and other things. 19 And I will say in my mind, "There are many good things to me to keep many years. Take life easy; in eating food and drink alcohol and be happy."

nama: "Wénde Ngánjánam yémndai fá, 'Fém mámáfi árǃ Yéné sémbáran fémon fene ghérsé so téram. Féyo emon so tawanangé méinyotio rokar fémon némé té táfrende fendio?'
english: But God said to him, 'You fool! This night your life will be demanded from you. So who will take everything what you have prepared for yourself?

nama: "Yéné fiyém ndernáye so yém ámb ár emon rokar ewamnde yandio wénde yau em wemár ár Ngánján kénjún." Mámé mwighé yau
english: This is how will be anyone who stores things for himself but is not rch in God." Don't worry

nama: Fitam yémotai, "Yuré, Fémo yéné rengerenge si noraye téfendro o méinyotio árét?"
english: Fitè asked, "Lord, are you speaking this parable only for us or every people?"

nama: Áumengégh méngo limángégh ár nékw témorwén ménamén Yesum mer táyátotau Safatan, fá korayau árfefaf, "Kété sem 6 efogh ásáfoghét. Féyo eném frengéghét yéné efghon, yau Safatan."
english: The meeting house head man was angry because Yesu healed her on the Safat, he said to the people, "There are 6 days for working. So come to heal on those days, not on the Safat."

nama: Yuram yawangoi yá, "Fém efe farun mer néretati wénde kénjún yauǃ Fémofem túmén taférngi kau o ndonki kétándmé kwélalta a talimángi nuot Safatan. 16 Féyo yéné amaf, Ebraamene mérés, efe Sáifram yumbai yékeindam 18 yunjéf. Fá fété nawanjar Safatan kétándmé némé yam yékeinda."
english: The Lord answered him, "You liar! You always untie cow and donkey from the stall and lead it out to give it water on the Safat. 16 Then this woman, a daughter of Ebraam, whom Sáifèr has kept to bound for 18 years. She should be saved on the Safat from what bound her."

nama: Yesum njam korayau yéné, yáne mék téfnár wáiwái yam ewifoi, wénde ár káuwetawét némé mer Yesum tawafrotau. Rengerenge si némbne mbwe a yist
english: When Yesu said this, his enemies was full of shame, but the people rejoiced what Yesu did good. Parables of the small seed and the Yeast

nama: Féyo Yesum namotai, "Ndernáye nérete Ngánjánene limánégh? Némayafé so yétémndan? 19 Ndenanit némbne mbwe, árom yéngwanai yiyai yánjo ndawan a nanotam wén náyátoi, a menam njén tarametawét yéné kafeyamé."
english: Then Yesu asked, "How is like the ruling of God? What shall I compare it to? 19 [It is] like small seed, a man took and planted in his garden and grew and became a tree, and the birds make nest in this branches."

nama: Wéikor Yesu namotai, "Yéndon némayafé so yétémndan Ngánjánene limánégh? 21 Ndené fété yist amafom yanai a yérémnam nambio flawé baik. Féyo méinyotio flawé néminam ndimbal kofékofé namndai." Némbne sésafne
english: Again Yesu asked, "What shall I compare the ruling of God to? 21 It is like yeast a woman took and mixed into 3 bags of flour. So all the flour rises [and] become big dough." The narrow door

nama: Yesu njam tiotau Jerusalemét, yémo tangwatametau tesenamé a méngotuamé. 23 Ámb árom yémotai Yesu, "Yuré, féyotaro nambio árro so tawanjar?"
english: When Yesu went to Jerusalem, he taught them through the town and village. 23 Someone asked Yesu, "Lord, are only a few people possible to be saved?"

nama: "Féyo fém so korayangi, 'Yéndfem njamke a nu tánetawém fémafé, a fémon ténmatametau endmé.'
english: Then you will say, 'We ate and drank with you, and you taught us on the roads.'

nama: "Wénde yémon so tawawangongé, 'Yénd mafina wém fém o fém árkamé eném. Kitrongi ta tambén, fém méinyotio yaufiyam wafrogh téfnárǃ'
english: Then he will answer, 'I don't know you or where you come from. Get away from me, all of you evil doing people!

nama: Yesum emotai, "Njam endene ámbiro ambum o kau kuyangé kétán yékwét Safatan, fémo wékeye yau so turto?" 6 A yéfeyot ámb yau si.
english: Yesu asked them, "If one of you has child or cow fallen into a well on the Safat, will you not rush to get it out? 6 And they didn't say any talk.

nama: Soramé Yesum si waitogh yifoi, ámb wan ár norayai, "Frengégh yém yáyot emo so enete téménd kénjún Ngánjánene limánéghan!"
english: After Yesu finished teaching, one of guests said, "Blessed is the one who will eat at the feast in the ruling of God!"

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Ámb árom téfrendau ndimbal téménd a eumyoi tárfár wan téfnár. 17 Téménd efghon, yémo ewáfáretam yánjo ásáfogh ár tanwaufrongi efe té eumyon, 'Taném, sénonjo méinyotio rokar siyém frengéghkaf yém.'
english: Yesu answered, "A man prepared a big feast and invited many guests. 17 On the feast day, he sent his workers to tell those who had been invited, "Come, everything is now ready.'

nama: "Wénde yémofem si waufrogh ewafngoyénd. Fronde ár norayai, 'Yéndon mband té yanan, a yénd so wéngém fandaghét. Ghérghérsisé kwawalo tayot.'
english: But they began to make excusing talk. The first man said, 'I have bought a field, and I will go to see it. Excuse me.'"

nama: "Ámb norayai, 'Yéndo té ewanan 5 kau, a yénd álighan wém so eufotan. Ghérghérsisé kwawalo tayot.'
english: Another said, "I have bought 5 cows, and I'm on the way to try them out. Excuse me.'

nama: "Wéi ámb norayai, 'Yénd somé naweran. Féyo yénd yau so wéném.'
english: Still another said, 'I just got married, so I can't come.'

nama: "Ásáfogh téfnár nangotam a kafrotau yéné yánjo yurafaf. Féyo méngo yuré nékwafé naféghetam a yáfáretam yánjo ásáfogh téfnár, 'Nguwano kétor wékeye némbne endmé a kéghat endmé yéné tesenan a tanwasro yauyau ár, aknyégh ár, ghékéf kwéfkwéf ár a wawér.'
english: The workers returned and told to his master. Then house's owner became angry and ordered his workers, 'Go out quickly small roads and ouside/bush roads in the town and bring the poor, the crippled, the blind, and the lame.'

nama: "Ásáfogh téfnárom yémndai 'Yuré, fémon némé wémndai té kufrote, wénde kété mé em sifayé.'
english: The worker said, 'Lord, what you said has been done, but there are still place(room).'

nama: "Féyo yuram yémndai yánjo ásáfogh téfnár, 'Nguwano kétor némbne endmé a kéghat endét a tanwaurémnau, 'Kénaflangi kénjút,' ménát tane méngo so yém afoghare. 24 Yéndon némndetan, efe fronde eumyongén yémofem yau so tufongi tane njamkeǃ'" Waitogh ároene yam
english: Then the master told his workers, 'Go out to small roads and bush roads and demand strong them 'Come in,' so that my house will be full. 24 I tell you, those who were invited first will not get taste of my food(banquet)'" Being a following man

nama: "Njam efe ár ménde yém ndimbal méngo ramghét, fá fronde so kámnjongé a nufénmeta yéfanda njénamb mani yém wifoghét. 29 Yémon so tafngongé méngo ramégh, wénde yau so tifongé. Féyo méinyotio árém yéfandat némé nufrote so yurtat fá. 30 Fá korayawét, 'Yéné árom yérnyai ramégh wénde yau yifoi.'
english: "If the man who wants to build a big house, he will sit first and estimate and see how much money to finish it. 29 He will start to build the house, but he cannot finish. So every people [who]see what he does will make fun of him. 30 They will say, "This man began to build but could not finish."

nama: "Sol siyém mer yém, wénde yáne ménde njam kefongé, ndernáye so sol nawafarnjé wéikor? 35 Yau mer yém mbandot o ámb rokarot, árém táf yéngwitat. Efe njam ténganafé yém, so káyárangé yéné si."
english: Salt is good, but if its flavor is finished, how can it be made to taste salty again? 35 It is not good for the soil or for anything, [so]people throw it out. Whoever has ears, he must hear this talk."

nama: Mani kafégh ár a yaufiyam téfnár méinyotio káumendawét áyárghét yáfaf. 2 Wénde Farasi ár a nák watamegh ár mike nufngoyénd, "Yéné árom eumyote yaufiyam ár ménát yémafe nénet."
english: The tax collectos and sinners were all gathering to hear him. 2 But Farasi men and teaching men of the law began to gramble, "This man welcomes sinner to eat with them."

nama: Yesum wéikor si yéngwafngoi, "Kété témorwén ár sómbio ambumafé. 12 Kertrom yémndai yárefé, 'Afé, yénd yau so nawanjetan kétán fém kér ném. Sénonjo kwaram fene rokarta tane némé so em.' Féyo yémon ewafaleyai rokar néndkéfan yánjo sómbio ambumat.
english: Yesu began to say again, "There was a man with two sons. 12 The younger son said to his father, 'Father, I will not wait until you die. Now give me your things what will belong to me.' Then he divided things(property)between his two sons.

nama: "Táfandio, fronde sénko ambum témorwén ndawan. Fá njam nénáyátoi méngo kaka, fá náyárayéng wagh ke a ermángégh. 26 Féyo yémon yanmoi ámb faiofnar ásáfogh ár a yémotai némé yam nufrote. 27 Yémon yawangoi, 'Fene néngén té nufar, a fene afam yarsafé kau té yésém ménamén fá yéna yém a merro yém.'
english: At that time, the first son was in the field. When he came close the house, he heard singing sound and dancing. 26 So he called one of the workers and asked him what was happening. 27 He answered, 'Your small brother has arrived, and your father has killed fattened cow because he is here and is good.' 28 So first born son became angry and would't go into the house. His father came out and begged him to enter. 29 But he answered his father, 'Look! All years I have worked for you and have never disobeyed your talk. But you didn't give us to young goat in order that we will do feast with friends. 30 But when this your son who wasted your money in bad living [and] come back to the house, you killed the fattened cow for him!

nama: "Yárefé norayai, 'Tane ambum, fém túmén yéndfé ténre. Méinyotio rokar tane sem fene em. 32 Wénde yéndfem ásneghafé a áuwégh tafrotam ménamén fengén kér yémormén a sénonjo ghérsé yém. Fá nolindai a sénonjo yéna yém.'"
english: His father said, "My son, you are always with me. Everything I have is yours. 32 But we celebrate and rejoice because your younger brother was dead and now is alive. He was lost and now is here."

nama: "Wanjengégh ár norayai yáfafétio, 'Yéndon némé so yafrotan sénonjo? Tane yuram tane ásáfoghta wutér. Yénd muyafnar wém targhét, a yénd wáiwái wém ómnengéghét. 4 Yénd mat wém némé yéndon so yafrotan ménát árém mé so umyotat yénd yéfene méngomé njam yéndon tanjo ásáfogh koron.'
english: The manager said to himself, 'What shall I do now? My master is taking away my work. I'm not strong to dig, and I am shame to beg. 4 I know what shall I do so that people will continue to welcome me into their houses when I lost my work'

nama: "Féyo yémon tamotau ámbiroámbiroe yáne yurane fai wangoghét. Yémo yémotai fronde ár, 'Njénamb fai ekmang tane yurane?' 6 Yémo yawangoi, '20 dram olif wékwér.' Wanjengégh árom yémndai fá, 'Téngwan fenjo fefé, kámnjo wékeye, a tafarota 10 dram.'
english: So he called one by one his master's people to pay back. He asked the first man, 'How much pay do you put my master's? 6 He answered, '20 drums of olive oil.' Manager told him, 'Take your paper, sit down quickly, and write 10 drums.'

nama: "Wéi yémo yémotai yénamayo ár, 'Fefaf njénamb em?' Yémon yawangoi yá, '1,000 flawé baik.' Yémon yémndai fá, 'Téngwan fenjo fefé. Tafarota kétán 800 flawé baikot.'
english: He asked again the second man, 'How much is to you? He answered, '1,000 flawè bags .' He told him, 'Take your paper. Write 800 flawè bags.'

nama: "Yuram tuwetau yáne unyégh rokar wanjengégh ár ménamén fá kawarawenau merkéráye. Ár yéné mbandan nawarawenat merkéráye wénde kwayaghane ár yau ndené em. 9 Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe, fútar náyátotati fémyo mband rokere, njam tafrango, fém so kémumyongé tuot méngotuot.
english: The master praised his dishonest manager because he deal with well. The people of this world deal well but the people of the light are not like them. 9 I tell you, become friend for yourself with worldly things. When it is gone, you will be welcomed into an eternal village.

nama: "Ásáfogh ár yau so yém sómbio yurafene limánégh mbanmbanan. Fémon so yékene ámb a so yuwete ámb, o fém so kamnyong ámbfaf a tékena ámb. Yénémamén fém yau so sómbio limánégh mbanmbanan ném, Ngánján a mani."
english: A worker cannot stay under two owners ruling. He will hate the one and love the other. You will obey to the one and deny the other. Therefore you cannot stay under two ruling, God and money.'

nama: Farasi ár sem mani méndero ár em. Yémofem njam náyárayénd yéné si a fén yafngoyénd Yesu. 15 Yesum emndai fá, "Fém yéné féyém efe mer nitaro kénamndangi árfene ghékfan, wénde Ngánján mat yém féfene tikéf. Némé minde tukén árfene mwighayan fifiofnar yém Ngánjánene ghékfan.
english: The Farasi men are money lovers. When they heard this talk and made fun of Yesu. 15 Yesu said to them, "You are ones who make yourselves look good in the eyes of people, but God knows your heart. What is value highly to people's thought is without.meaning to God's sight.

nama: "Mosesene nák a Ngánjánene mat yátogh ároene watamegh si táitotawét kétánotio Jonene efogh. Kétándmé yéné efghon, Ngánjánene limánéghmén mer si waitogh yérnyai, méinyotio árém end táronjawét kétán Ngánjánene limánéghfaf. 17 Áfráte yém njafar a mband so kawaindangend, wénde némbne si Ngánjánene sian yau so titrém.
english: Moses' law and God's people who make know(prophets)' teaching were proclaimed until Jon's day. From that time, the good talk about the ruling of God started to preach, every people is trying to get in to the ruling of God. 17 Heaven and earth will disapper, but little talk in God's talk will not remove.

nama: "Emon njam yánjo amaf tatembangé a kawerangé ámb amaf kamndangé amafanyo wanégh ár a emon njam watembégh amaf kawerangé káyátongé áranyo wanégh ár. Wemár ár a Lajarus
english: Anyone who divorces his wife and marries another man commits adultery and man who marries a divorced woman commits adultery. The rich and Lajarus

nama: "Wénde Ebraamém yawangoi, 'Ambum, kawafarota kété fene ghérsé ámnjogh efghon, fém meran kénmorwén, táf Lajarus yauyauan, wénde sénonjo fá enaghan yém yéna a fém tékrátan. 26 Ámb téfén siyém, féyotarofnar yém yéné ménamén yékw ndimbalam yénfalowé, ménát efe ménde éférmanéghét yénandmé fefaf siyém táikér yém.'
english: But Ebraam answered, 'Son, remember there your living days(lifetime), you lived in good [things], while Lajarus had nothing, but now he is resting here and you are suffering. 26 Another reason, it is impossible because big hole seperate between us, anyone who want to cross from here to you are difficult.'

nama: "Yémo yawangoi, 'Féyo yéndon némamnendan fém, afé, téngwáfáreta Lajarus kétán tane afane méngot, 28 ménamén tane em 5 néngnéf. Mat so táyátongé fá yau so eném yéné tékrát sifayat.'
english: He answered, 'Then I beg you, father, send Lajarus there to my father's house, 28 because I have 5 small brothers. Let them know they will not come to this suffering place.'

nama: "Ebraamém yawangoi, 'Buk kété em Moses a Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár efarotaménd, fá sái náyáretat yéfendio.'
english: Ebraam answered, 'There are books Moses and the God's people who make know(prophets) wrote, they should listen/obey to them.'

nama: "Fá norayai, 'Yau, afé Ebraam, ámb kér ár njam néngangota kétán yéfefaf, fá so kawengongi.'
english: He said, 'No, father Ebraam, if the dead returns to them, they will turn away.'

nama: "Fá norayai yáfaf, 'Yau njam náyáretat Moses a Ngánjánene mat yátogh ároefaf, fá yau so nawengotat wéi ndenéyameyo kér tambén njam kénangongé ghérsat.'"
english: He said to him, 'If they do not listen/obey to Moses and the God's people who make know(prophets), they will not turn away also same way if someone returns from the dead to life.'"

nama: Njam yémo yaufi yafrota fefaf 7 mbinotmé ámbiro efogh kénjún, a 7 mbinotmé nénangota wéikor fefaf a korayangé, 'Yénd té nawengon,' fémon tawalinda."
english: If he do sins against you 7 times in a day and 7 times come back again to you and saying, 'I had turn away,' you wash them."

nama: Yesuene muyafé ár norayayénd Yurafaf, "Yuré, ténmamina téfene ndimbal mwighéǃ"
english: The men with Yesu's authority(apostles) said to the Lord, "Lord, add our big mind(faith)!"

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Njam fene ndimbal mwighé yém ndenanit némbne mbwe, fém féyotaro so koraya yéné ndimbal wénfaf, 'Karufang a kayang arakafan,' a so kényárángé fém.
english: Yesu answered, "If your big mind(faith) is like a small seed, you can say to this big tree, 'be uprootes and planted in the sea,' and it will obey you.

nama: Yesu álighan témorwén Jerusalemét, tiotau Samaria a Galili yu néndkéfan. 12 Fá njam kufanau méngotuot, 10 ár yaufi ghéngan enjnefé tamorwén yéfángoyénd fá. Fá nénokayoyénd nayu 13 a nutnayénd minde tukén, "Yesu, Yuré, ghérghérsisé téfeyotǃ"
english: Yesu were walking to Jerusalem, traveled between Samaria and Galili region. 12 When he entered a village, 10 lepers met him. They stood at a distance, 13 and shouted loudly, "Yesu, Yure, have mercy on us!"

nama: Yesum ewinjoi fá a norayai, "Nguanongi, ngauyafongi fémyo ghéngén wárogh árfefaf." A njamandio néngwanoyénd, fá mer néngamndayénd.
english: Yesu saw them and said, "Go, show yourselves to the burning sacrifice man." And while they went, they were made clean.

nama: Ámbiroam, njam yinjoi frengégham yanai, nénangoi, Ngánján tuwetawét minde tukén. 16 Fá budme niyai Yesuene kafkaffaf, kánjo yaramai yáyot. Fá témorwén Samariamén ár.
english: One [of them], when he saw he was healed, came back, praising God loudly. 16 He knelt down at Yesu's feet, gave thank him and he was man from Samaria.

nama: Yesum yémotai, "Némé 10 ár méinyotio frengéghkaf em? Ánde ámb 9 ár em? 18 Némamén yéné Téndo árro nénangoi Ngánján frengéghét?" 19 Féyo Yesum yémndai fá, "Kokai a nguwano. Fenjo ndimbal mwighayam mer té niyáto." Ngánjánene limánégh
english: Yesu asked, "What were cleased all of ten? Where is other 9 men? 18 Why only this foreigner came back to praise God?" 19 Then Yesu said to him, "Stand and go. Your big mind(faith) has made you heal." ' The ruling of God

nama: Ámb efghon Farasi árém yémotai Yesu, "Njam so Ngánjánene limánégh yéném?" Yesum ewawangoi, "Ngánjánene limánégh yau yéném yéné ende fémon so tinjo fenjo ghékfe. 21 Fém yau so norayati, 'Siyém' o 'Kété yém' ménamén Ngánjánene limánégh siyém féfene kénjún yém."
english: One day Farasi men asked Yesu, "When the ruling of God would come?" Yesu answered, "The ruling of God does not come this way you see with your eyes. 21 You can't say, 'Here it is' or 'There it is' because the ruling of God is inside you.

nama: "Ndenaye fété Noane efghon kés tamorwén, ndenéyameyo so yém Ároene Ambumoene efghon. 27 Árém njamke a nu tánetawét, amaf ár kaweretawét kétán efogh nawerai Noa nélawai minde ndimbal ngárndot. Féyo táf kéfér nakmai a yérambaryéng méinyotio ár.
english: Just as it was the days of Noa, it will same way in the days of the Son of Man. 27 People ate food and [drinking] water, men married to women up to the day Noa entered very boat. Then the flood came and destroyed them all.

nama: "Ndenéyameyo tamorwén Lotene efghon. Árém njamke a nu tánetawét, kéufnamotawét rokar, njamke yéghan a méngo raméghan. 29 Wénde yéné efghon Lotém yéfrangoi Sodom, fés a fésafé wím kénuitawét njafarta nunit kafamndau, a yérambaryéng méinyotio ár.
english: It was the same in the days of Lot. People were eating food and [drinking] water, exchanging things, planting food and building house. 29 But in that day Lot left Sodom, fire and buring stone fell down from heaven like a rain, and destroyed them all.

nama: "Nák sénko árom yékenai ámb efghot, wénde ambinomén norayai yánjomén, 'Yénd férférofnar wém Ngánjánefaf a utmanéghofnar árfefaf, 5 wénde yéné kwiram túmén wawérsote yénd, yéndon so tinjon yáfaf mbarkánd, ménát yau so nénatérne tafaf túménǃ'"
english: The judge ignored her to some day, but finally he said to himself, 'I am without-fear to God and without-respect to men, 5 but this widow keeps on bothering me, I will see it that she gets her justice, so that she won't keep on coming to me!'

nama: "Wénde mani kafégh ár takayongérwén nayu. Fá yau néwewoi ndenáyo njafarot, wénde yánjo kafan nasmai a norayai, 'Ngánján, ghérghérsisé tayot, yénd yaufi ár wém.'
english: But the tax colletor stood a distance. He would not even look on to heaven, but beat his breast and said, 'God, mercy on me, I am a sinner.'

nama: "Yéndon némndetan fém, yéné yaufi ár, yau ndené Farasi ár, fá kangotau méngot áuwéghafé Ngánjánene sáfrére. Fém njam nawarmbota ámb árfefaf, fém so kémeworngi, a fém njam yuwan ném, fém so ném tukén." Ambumtértér a Yesu
english: I tell you, this sinner, not Farasi man, he went back home with joy in front of God. If you exalt yourself to other people, you will be put down, and if you are down yourself, you will be ontop." The children and Yesu

nama: Ámb Ju sénko árom yémotai fá, "Mer watamegh ár, némé yéndon so yafrotan tuot ghérsé résaghét?"
english: A Juwish head man asked him, "Good teaching man, what should I do to take the eternal life?"

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Némamén wémndete yénd mer? Efe yau mer yém fá Ngánjánro. 20 Fém mat ném náknák, 'Amafanyo wanégh yau, ár ngi yau, oro yau, unyégh yau, eutmanwé afé a amé.'"
english: Yesu answered, "Why do you call me good? Who is no good only God himself. (There no good except God alone.) 20 You know the commandments, 'No adultery, don't kill people, don't steal, don't lie, respect father and mother.'"

nama: Yémo yémndai, "Kétándmayo yénd tosé kwémorwén, yéndon yéné méinyotio nák tawarawénawén." 22 Yesum njam náyárai yéné, fá norayai yáfaf, "Fefaf mé náláite ámb yam wafroghét. Etérna maniot fene némé em méinyotio, ewarameta yéfeyot yauyau árét, a fém so ném wemár njafaran. Féyo kénaf, kwénmaito yénd."
english: He said, "Since I was baby, I obeyed all these laws."

nama: Fá efe náyárayénd yéné ámoghan, "Efe so wét kunjarngé?"
english: Those who heard on this asking, "Who can be saved?"

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Némé táikér yém árét Ngánjáneyot siyém áfrat."
english: Yesu answered, "What is hard to man is easy to God."

nama: Fité norayai yáfaf, "Yéndfem enfrangongém méinyotio téfene némé tam fém némaitongémǃ"
english: Fitè said to him, "We left all of what we have, [and] followed you!

nama: Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe efaloe, yéndon mat eyátotan méinyotio ár emo efrango méngo, amaf, yanaf, yárefaf, ambumtértér Ngánjánene limánégh téfnan 30 so kor ewinjotati tárfár mbinotmé sénonjo yéné ghérayan, a so akegh ghérsé tinjongi Ngánjáneta soramé yuwon." Yesu wéikor korayau yánjo kérmén
english: Yesu said to them, "I tell you truly, I know every people who has left house, wife, big brothers, parents, children for the reason of the ruling of God 30 will see many times today in this life, and will see eternal life from God on next age(in the future)." Yesu said again his death

nama: Njamandio Yesum tánetau Jeriko, ghékéf kwéfkwéf ár témorangérwén end téndon kómnendau. 36 Njam yémon eyárai ár mérén álighan kawaindawét, fá namotai némé yam nufrote. 37 Yémofem yaufroyénd yá, "Yesu Najaretmén siyém nawainde."
english: As Yesu approched Jeriko, a blind man was sitting beside the road, begged. 36 When he heard the crowd passing by, he asked what was happening. 37 They told him, "Yesu of Najaret is passing by."

nama: Fá nutnayéng, "Yesu, Deifidene ambum, so ghérghérsisé ném tafafǃ"
english: He cried out, "Yesu, Son of Deifid, have mercy on me!"

nama: Fá efe tangmorwén endmé yarnayénd fá a yémndayénd, "Métar kékmboǃ" Wénde fá yéméindayénd minde keyot, "Deifidene ambum, so ghérghérsisé ném tafafǃ"
english: Those who was in the way rebuked him and told him, "Be quiet!" But he shouted with more big sound, "Son of Deifid, have mercy on me!"

nama: Yesu nékmboi a tamndangé ár yáfaf ménjaghét. Njam nénaflai kaka, Yesum témotangé fá, 41 "Némé wafroghét ménde ném tafaf?" Yémon yawangoi, "Yuré, yénd ménde wém éreghét."
english: Yesu stopped and ordered the man to bring him to him. When he came near, Yesu asked him, 41 "What do you want me to do for you?" He said, "Lord, I want to see!"

nama: A Yesum yémndai fá, "Féyotaro so kéretaǃ Fenjo ndimbal mwighayam némanjar fém." 43 Táf fété fá ghékéf néretai a yémon yáitoi Yesu, tuwetau Ngánján. Njam méinyotio árém yinjoyénd, yémofem wéi ndenáyo Ngánján tuwetawét.
english: Yesu said to him, You will able to see! Your big mind(faith) saves you." 43 Immediately his eyes was opened and he followed Yesu, praised God. When all the people saw it, they praised God in a same way.

nama: Njam Yesu nufaryéng yéné sifayan, Yesu néwewoi tukét a yémndai fá, "Jekies, kénewor wékeye yuwot. Fene méngon sénonjo so wémor." 6 Féyo fá néneworyéng wékeye a Yesu áuwéghafé yumyoi yánjo méngot.
english: When Yesu arrived at that palce, Yesu looked up him and said to him, "Jekiyes, come down quickly. I must stay at your house today." 6 So he came down quickly and welcomed him to his house with joy.

nama: Méinyotio árém yinjoyénd yéné yam a mikemike nufngoyénd, "Fá néngwanoi wan téfnár náyátoi yaufi ároefaf."
english: All the people saw this thing and began to grumble, "He went to become the guest to a sinner."

nama: Wénde Jekies nokayoi a norayai Yurafaf, "Kéreta, Yuréǃ Sénonjo yénandmé yéndon efalotan néndkéfan tane rokar yauyau árét, a yénd njam té kuindan árfefaf rokarmén, so ewangotan yéfene fai fo mbinotma."
english: But Jekies stood and said to Lord, "Look, Lord! Now and here I divide half my things [to give] to the poor, and if I have cheated to the people anything, I will pay back 4 times their payment."

nama: Yesu norayai yáfaf, "Sénonjo wanjarégh yém yéné méngot, ménamén yéné ár siyém Ebraamene ákimén. 10 Ménamén Ároene Ambum yénmormén ronjaghét olingégh ár wanjarghét." Rengerenge si ten faiofnar ásáfogh árfenemén
english: Yesu said to him, "Today salvation is into this house, because this man is Ebraam's descendant. 10 For the Son of Man came to look for and to save the lost." The parable of ten workers

nama: "Wénde yánjo árém méndméndat tafandawét a ewáfáretam fénaté ásáfogh mérén soramé fá norayayénd, 'Yénd méndefnar yéném yéné ár sái kamndangé téfene warsagh ár.'
english: But his people saw him with hate and sent different woking group(delegation) after they said, 'We don't want this man will become our king.'

nama: "Fá náyátoi warsagh ár féyo fá nénangotam méngotuot. Féyo yémon ewáfáretam faiofnar ásáfogh ár kétán endefet mani ewarametam ménát matot njénamb mani ewafrotaménd.
english: "He became a king so he return to village(kingdom). Then he sent for the workers to whom he had given the money in order to know how much money they made.

nama: "Fronde ámbiro ár yénmormén a norayai, 'Yuré, fene maniam té efuna ámb ten.'
english: The first one came and said, "Lord, your money has earned ten times more.'

nama: "Yáne yuram yawangoi, 'Mer yém. Tane mer faiofnar ásáfogh árǃ Ménamén fém té efalo náyáto némbne mani funaghan, fémon so ewanjete ten ndimbal tesen.'
english: His owner answered, 'That's good, my good worker! Because you have become true(faithful) in a very small money work, you will take care of ten cities.'

nama: "Sómbiomén yénmormén a norayai, 'Yuré, fene maniam té efuna ámb 5.'
english: The second came and said, 'Lord, your mina has earned 5 times more.'

nama: "Yáne yuram yawangoi, 'Fémon so ewanjete 5 ndimbal tesen.'
english: His owner answered, 'You will take care of 5 cities.'

nama: "Nambiomén faiofnar ásáfogh ár yénmormén a norayai, 'Yuré, fene mani siyém. Yéndon fene mani tamndan a etnoyén sáláme sutafé. 21 Yénd fenemén férfér kwémorwén ménamén fém ném táikér ár. Fémon totér némé yau yélawai a yétane némé yau yiyáyéng.'
english: The third worker came and said, "Lord, here is your money. I kept your money and hid them with clothe. 21 I was afraid of you because you are a hard man. You take what did not put in and reap what you did not plant.'

nama: "Féyo yémon fá emndai efe tawakayongérwén kaka, 'Takawangi yáne mani yá tambén a taramangi yá efe ten maniafé yém.'
english: Then he said to those who were standing close, 'Take his money from him and give it to the one who has ten moneys.'

nama: "Fá norayayénd, 'Yuré, té náyátongi ten mani yáneǃ'
english: They said, 'Lord, his has already become ten moneys!'

nama: "Yémon tawangongé, 'Yéndon némndetan ndenáye méinyotio endene tárfár em, yá so taramangi tárfár, wénde endene yau em, so takawangi. 27 Wénde tane mék téfnár efe em méndefnar fá em yénd sái wém yéfene warsagh ár, tanwasrongi a tásmetangi tane sáfrére.'" Yesu warsagh ár nélawete Jerusalemét
english: He answered, 'I tell you that to every people who has many, will be given to them many, but those who has nothing, will be taken away. 27 But my enemies who without-want methat I will be their king, bring them and kill them in front of me.' Yesu enter Jerusalem as a king

nama: Yéné efe ewafareméng nuwaneyayénd a yinjeyayénd ndernáye té engémndeyai fá. 33 Njamandio yémofem téferwét ndonki, yéné yuram emotangeyai fá, "Némamén fémofem yéferét ndonki?"
english: Those who were sent went and found it how he had told them. 33 As they untied donkey, that owners asked them, "Why are you untying donkey?"

nama: Yémofem yawangeyayénd, "Yurane ménde yém."
english: They answered, "It is Lord' need."

nama: Yémofem yénémnjeménd Yesuefaf, yéfenjo sáláme efayeyayénd ndonkiyan a Yesu nafayoi yéné tukén. 36 Njamandio Yesu téngmorwén, árém yéfenjo sáláme tangéfyangotawét endmé.
english: They brought it to Yesu, threw their clothes on the donkey and Yesu got on that. 36 As Yesu went, people spread their clothes on the road.

nama: Fá njam téngmorwén kaka néngamndai yéné sifayan ánde end ngewonau Olif Mband tunakfot, méinyotio Yesuene waitogh ár nufngoyénd wagh áuwéghafé Ngánjánefaf marat kéme, téfén ménamén sélngwélafé ásáfogh téfandawét Yesuefaf:
english: When he came near and reached on that place where [road] sloped down to the Olive mountain, all of Yesu's following men began song/praise with joy to God in loud voices, reason because they had seen special workings(miracles) from Yesu:

nama: "Frengégh ném warsagh ár efe néném Yurane yétkwénanǃ Krufrat njafar tukén a ndimbal kwayaghé minde tukén!"
english: "Blessed are you the king who comes in the name of the Lord! peace in heaven and big light(glory) in the very high(highest)!"

nama: Ámb Farasi ár kénjún norayayénd Yesuefaf, "Watamegh ár, táwárna fene waitogh árǃ"
english: Some of the Farasi men in the crowd said to Yesu, "Teacher, rebuke your following men!"

nama: Yémon ewawangoi, "Yéndon emndetan fém, njam fá métar ekmbo, wím so nutnatǃ"
english: He answered, "I tell you, if they keep silent, the stones will cry out."

nama: Féyo Yesu nélawai wáwefnogh méngo sifayan a wifarégh ewafngoi emofem rokar téwáfnamotawét. 46 Fá norayai yéfefaf, "Buk sian yékai, 'Tane méngo so yém Ngánjánafé orayégh méngo,' wénde fémofem yiyátongi oro téfnárafene átnogh yékw."
english: Then Yesu entered into the worshipping house courts and began to chase out [the people]who were exchanging things. 46 He said to them, "It is written in the God's talk, 'My house will be house of talking with God.' but you made it robber hidding hole.'

nama: Méinyotio efghon fá témorwén watameghan wáwefnogh méngon. Wénde limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár, nák watamegh ár a limánégh ár ménde tamorwén Yesue ngiot. 48 Wénde yémofem yau end ewinjoyénd yá ngiot, ménamén méinyotio árfene mwighé tarnyangérwén yáne sifaf.
english: Everyday he was in teaching at the worshipping house. But the leading sacrifice burning people(high priests), the teaching men of the law and the head men wanted to kill Yesu. 48 But they couldn't find a way to kill him, because all the people's mind tied up his talk.

nama: Ámb efghon yémon njam tawatametau ár wáwefnogh méngo sifayan a táitotau mer si, limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a nák watamegh ár nafghayénd yémafe ámb sénko árfé, enmormén yáfaf. 2 Yémofem norayayénd, "Ténmaufro némé muyaye fémon ewafrote yéné ásáfogh. Emon fe yéné muyé némaramai?"
english: One day when he was teaching the people in the worshipping house courts and preaching the good talk, the leading sacrifice burning people(high priests) and the teaching men of the law with head people, came to him. 2 They said, "Tell us by what authority you are doing these work. Who gave you this authority?"

nama: Yémon ewawangoi, "Yéndon so ndenéyameyo fém témotangén ámogh si. Ta kwaufrongi, 4 'Jonene walitogh yénmormén njafarta o árta?'"
english: He answered, "I will also ask you a asking talk(question). Tell me, 4 Jon's baptism comes from heaven or from human?"

nama: Yémofem táruindawét yéfe kénjúnro a korayawét nde, "Njam yénd korayangém 'Kétándmé njafarta,' fá so kamotangé, 'Némamén yau wét fá efalo yiyátongi?' 6 Wénde njam yénd korayangém, 'Kétándmé árta,' méinyotio árém so yénamndat yénd wíme ménamén fá em mat nde Jon témorwén Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár."
english: They discussed it among themselves and said that, "If we say, 'From heaven,' he will ask, 'Why didn't you truly approve(believe) him?' 6 But if we say, 'From men,' all the people will stone us because they knew that Jon was a God's man who make know(prophet)."

nama: Féyo yémofem yawangoyénd, "Yénd mafina yéném fá árkémamén yém."
english: So they answered, "We don't know where it come from."

nama: Yesu norayai, "Yéndon wét yau so tawaufron féfe némé muyaye yéndon ewafrotan yéné ásáfogh." Rengerenge si ndau wanjengégh téfnárafenemén
english: Yesu said, "I will not tell you by what authority I am doing these work." Parable about people looking after field(Tenants)

nama: "Géreif mbwe ménj ndau yuré norayai, 'Yéndon némé so yafrotan? Yéndon so yéngwáfáretan tane ambum efe yéndon yuwetan. Efalo yiyátoi yémofem so yutémndat.'
english: The owner of the grape fruit vine garden said, 'What shall I do? I will send my son whom I love. Surely they will respect him.'

nama: "Wénde njam ndau wanjengégh árém yinjoyénd fá, yémofem korayawét yéfenjo kénjúnro, 'Yéné siyém ndau yurane ambum yém. Wét yésmetam krotio fá, a ndau rokar so kénamndangi téfene.' 15 Féyo yémofem yitaménd géreif mbwe ménj ndau kénjúta a yesmayénd krotio fá.
english: But when the tenants saw him, they said to each other, 'This is the son of the owner of the grape fruit vine garden. Let's kill him, and farm things will be ours.' 15 So they threw him out of the grape fruit vine garden and killed him.

nama: Fá so yéném a engésmete krotio yéné ár mérén a tawaramangé géreif mbwe ménj ndau ámb árét." Njam árém náyárayénd yénémamen, fá norayayénd, "Yénandmé yaufifi so yémǃ"
english: He will come and kill those men and give the grape fruit vine garden to other people." When the people heard about this, they said, "From here it won't be."

nama: Yesu néngretai yéfefaf mbarkándaye a emotai, "Féyo némé fifi yéné yém árkéméné yéfarotaménd, 'Sérasér árké méngo ramégh téfnáram yékenayénd a namndayéng néndkéf sérasér.'
english: Yesu looked to them straightly and asked, "Then what is the meaning of that which is written, 'The post which the builders rejected and became the middle post.

nama: Méinyotio ár efe njam nénuitat wíman so karéfkaréf nufrotat, a njam kénuyangé árfefaf fá so tásénangé."
english: Everyone who falls on the stone will be broken pieces, and when it falls on to them, they will be destroyed.'"

nama: Nák watamegh ár a limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár end táronjawét werghét wékeye, ménamén fá mat náyátoyénd nde fá korayau yéné rengerenge si yéfenemén. Wénde fá férfér tamorwén árfenemén. Kaisare mani kémégh
english: The teaching men of the law and the leading sacrifice burning people(high priests) looked for a way to arrest him quickly, because they knew that he spoke this parable about them. But they were afraid of the people. Paying taxes to [Rom high ruling man] Kaisar

nama: Yesum ewawinjoi yéfene unyégh a norayayéng yéfefaf, 24 "Kwauyafongi yáne mani. Endene ár sáf a yétkwén ekayong?" Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Kaisarene."
english: Yesu saw their lying/trick and said to them, 24 "Show me his money. Whose face and name are these on it?" They reanswered, "[Rom high ruling man] Kaisar's"

nama: Yesum emndai, "Taramangi Kaisare yáne némé yém, a Ngánjáne taramangi némé yém yáne."
english: Yesu said, "Give to [Rom high ruling man] Kaisar what is his, and give to God what is his."

nama: Fá endofnar namndayénd Yesue werghét némé yaufimén korayau kété árfene sáfrére. Sélngwél emormén yáne uwangoghan, a fá métar namndayénd. Anogh a awerégh
english: They became without-way to catch Yesu saying anything wrong there in front of the people. They were amazed at his answer, and they became silent. The rising and marriage

nama: Ámb Saduki ár enmormén efe norayayénd ndené kété ámb yau anogh yém. Fá enmormén Yesuefaf moghét. 28 Fá norayayénd, "Watamegh ár, Mosesém yéfarotam nák téfeyot ndené njam yánngénoene yané kér yém tatembangé amaf wénde ambumofnar, yánngnom fété so kwiré tékayongé a ambum eunjeta yanai.
english: Some of Saduki men, who say that there is no rising, came to him. They came to ask Yesu. 28 They said, "Teacher, Moses wrote a law for us that if a small brother's big brother dies and leaves a wife but no children, his small brother must marry the widow and must produce children for his big brother.

nama: Yesum emotai fá, "Némamén ndené árém norayat nde Keriso yém Deifidene ambum? 42 Deifid fáyo safén nakmai Sams bukan a norayai, 'Yuré noyarai kétán tane Yurafaf: "Kámnjo yénandmé tane tambén ngángata.
english: Yesu asked them, "Why [do] people say that Keriso is the son of Deifid? 42 Deifid himself put in clear in the book of Psalms and said, 'The Lord said to my Lord: Sit here at my right hand.

nama: Kétánotio yéndon tákman fene mék téfnár fene kafkaf mbanmbanan."'
english: until I put your enemies under your feet.'

nama: Deifidém tanmotau fá 'Yuré.' Ndernáye fá yáne ambum so yém?"
english: Deifid called him 'Lord.' How can he be his son?"

nama: Ámb yáne waitogh ár tamorwén sian ménamén ndernáye wáwefnogh méngo yamanetaménd mer wíme a ramégh yam wateghkaf Ngánjáne. Wénde Yesu norayai, 6 "Méinyotio fémo némé yéfande yéna, efogh yéna yéném ánde ámbiro wím yau so kafrangongé kétándmé ámbta, méinyotio so ewite yuwot."
english: Some of his following men were talking about how worshipping house decorated with good stone and offered things to dedicate God. but Yesu said, 6 "Everything what you see here, the day come where one stone will not leave from another people, everything will be thrown down to land."

nama: Fá namotayénd, "Watamegh ár, njam so yéné yam nufrotat? A némé yamam so tufarotangé ménát yéné yam ufroghétro em?"
english: They asked, "Teacher, when will these things happen? And what will be the surprising thing in order that this things are about to happen?"

nama: Féyo fá norayai yéfefaf, "Ámb yu a ámb yu, fá so násmét, ámb ndimbal yu a ámb ndimbal yu, fá so násmét. 11 Kété so yém ndimbal sokrere, káukáu, ndimbal enjne tárfár yuwomé a férférafé yam a ndimbal sélngwélafé yam njafaran.
english: Then he said to them, "One nation and other nation, they will fight, one kingdom and other kingdom, they will fight. 11 There will be big earthquakes, and famines, serious deseases in many places and fearful events and big surprising thing in heaven.

nama: Yémon tawaufrotau yéné rengerenge si, "Téfandangi fig wén a méinyotio wén. 30 Njam wén mbambam éwiwogh kufngongi, fémofem so tinjongi féfendio a mat kamndangi nde efogh yu siyém kaka yém. 31 Yéné endeyo, njam yefandati yéné yam ufroghan, fém mat so kamndangi nde Ngánjánene limánégh siyém kaka yém.
english: He told them this parable, "Look at the fig tree and all the trees. 30 When they begin to come up new leaves, you can see for yourselves and know that sunny season is near. 31 Like this, when you see these things happening, you will know that the ruling of God is near.

nama: "Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe efalo si, ámb ár mérén yéné satamén so mé em ghérsé njam méinyotio yam nufrotat. 33 Njafar a mband so kawaindangend, wénde tane si yaufifi so kawaindangé.
english: I tell you the truth, some of the people of this generation will still be arive when all the things happens. 33 Heaven and earth will pass away, but my talks will never pass away.

nama: Méinyotio efghon Yesu témorwén watameghan wáwefnogh méngon, a fá tangmorwén méinyotio sémbáran Olif Mband tunakfan. 38 Méinyotio ár tanmorwén túmén tándái akwan áyárghét yáfaf wáwefnogh méngot.
english: Every day Yesu was in teaching at the worshipping house, and he spent every night on the mount of Olif. 38 All the people came early each morning to hear him at the worshipping house.

nama: Efogh nawerai Minaghofnaye flawamén árké yém Waingégh sif tosane ghéngénmén. 8 Yesum ewafareméng Fité a Jon a norayai, "Kuwanend yéfrengéghét Waingégh njamke téfe nénet."
english: The day came for unleavened flawè which is Passover lamb being sacrifice. 8 Yesu sent Fitè and Jon and said, "Go to prepare for us to eat Passover food."

nama: Yémofem yémotangeyayénd, "Ándan fene ménde yém téfeyot frengéghét?"
english: They asked, "Where do you want us to prepare for it?"

nama: Fá néwaneyayénd rokar ewinjeyayénd ndenáye fété Yesum ndernáye tamndéwéng. Féyo yémofem yéfrengéménd Waingégh njamke.
english: They left [and] found things like as Yesu how told them. So they prepared the Passover food.

nama: Njam efoghféneféne nawerai, Yesu a yánjo muyafé ár nénámnjoyénd njamke sifayan. 15 A Yesum emndai fá, "Yénd minde ménde kwém njamke nénet fémafé soramé tékrát so yéfandan. 16 Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe, yéndon yau so enetan wéikor kétánotio yéné nufrota Ngánjánene limánéghan."
english: When the time came, Yesu and his men with Yesu's authority(apostles) sit at the eating place. 15 And Yesu said them, "I wanted very much to eat the Passover food with you after [this] I will see the suffering. 16 I tell you, I will not eat again until this fulfill in the ruling of God.

nama: Soramé kafusi yerai, yémon kánjo yaramai a norayai, "Tawanangi yéné a tafalotangi féfene kénjúnro. 18 Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe yéndon yau so yéfértan wéri nu kor kétánotio Ngánjánene limánégh kénufarngé."
english: After taking a cup, he gave thanks and said, "Take this and divide it among you. 18 I tell you I will not repeat [to drink] alcohol again until the ruling of God arrives."

nama: Yémon féskaf flawé yerai, kánjo yaramai a etfoi, a ewaramai, yéné siafé, "Yéné siyém tane fifi, árkéméné so téraman féfeyot. Yéné yafrotati awafaroghét tanemén."
english: He took flawè(bread), gave thanks and broke it, and gave it, with this talk, "This is my body which is given for you. Do this for remembering me."

nama: Yémon yémndai, "Saimon, Saimon, Ngánjánam muyé yaramai Sáifére fe ufoghét ndenanit ndau téfnáram yafrote witrémboghét kétándmé mer mbweta yaufiot. 32 Wénde yénd Ngánjánafé koraiwam feyot, Saimon, nde fene ndimbal mwighé yau so kuyangé. Fém njam kénawengo tafaf, fémon so muyafé eyátote fengénéf."
english: Yesu said, "Saimon, Saimon, God gave authority for Sáifèr to test you as a farmer do to remove bad [seeds] from good seeds. 32 But I talked with God for you, Saimon, that your big mind(faith) may not fall. When you have turned back to me, you must strengten your younger brothers. "

nama: Wénde yémon yawangoi, "Yuré, yénd afrengéghkaf wém fémafé álighét kwéfkwéf sifayat a kétán krot."
english: But he answered, "Lord, I am ready to go with you to darkness house and to death."

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Yéndon némndetan fém, Fité, fémon so kwékena nambinotmé nde fém mafina ném tanemén soramé ghakér kowi kutnangé sénonjo."
english: Yesu answered, "I tell you, Fitè, you will deny me three times that you don't know about me after [this] the rooster crows today."

nama: Féyo Yesum emotai fá, "Yéndon njam ewáfáretan fém mani yáfofnaye, awogh yáfofnaye o sandolofnaye, némé rokar ámb náláite?" Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Yau."
english: Then Yesu asked them, "When I sent you without money bag, without big(traveling) bag or without sandols, what did you miss? They answered, "No[thing]"

nama: Waitogh ár norayayénd, "Téfanda, Yuré, sómbio náifé sere." Yémon ewawangoi, "Féyotaro ere." Yesuf Ngánjánafé koraiwét Olif Mband tunakfan
english: The following men said, "See, Lord, here are two knife." He answered, "That's enough." Yesu talks with God on the mount of Olif

nama: Njafar si résagh ár nufaryéng yáfaf a yáutánam fá. 44 Yesum ndimbal tékrát yáyárai, fá minde tikfe Ngánjánafé koraiwét a yáne mélmél témorwén ndenanit férék njélkéfnit kasunau mbandot.
english: An man carrying heavenly message appeared to him and helped him. 44 Yesu was in big pain, he talked with God with whole heart and his sweat fell down like drops of blood falling to the ground.

nama: Njam fá nokayoi Ngánjánafé orayéghta fá néngangoi yánjo waitogh árfefaf, yémon ewinjoi kémghan, yongnai ghérghérsisamén. 46 Yesum emotai fá, "Némamén fém kémégh ekém? Kanongi a Ngánjánafé norayati ménát fém yau so ufogham tawutfongé." Yesu yerayénd
english: When he got up from talking with God and went back to his following men, he found them asleep, exausted because of sorrow. 46 Yesu asked them, "Why are you sleeping? Get up and talk with God so that you won't fall into temptation." Yesu held

nama: Njamandio Yesu mé sian témorwén, ár mérén enmormén a ár yétkwén Judas efe témorwén 12 waitogh ármén, yémon tanlimndau fá. Yémon yánetai Yesu a yésnetai. 48 Wénde Yesum yémotayéng fá, "Judas, fémon sénot yafngo Ároene Ambum ménaye séneghé?"
english: While Yesu was still in talk, a crowd came and the man who was called Judas one of 12 following men, he led them. He came up Yesu and kissed him. 48 But Yesu asked him, "Judas, are you betraying the Son of Man with a kiss?"

nama: Njam Yesuene waitogh árém yinjoyénd némé ufroghétro témorwén, fá norayayénd, "Yuré, wét yéndfem so enfetam téfenjo naifaye?" 50 A ámb árom yanfai limánégh ghéngén wárogh ároene faiofnar ásáfogh ároene tambén téngan.
english: When Yesu's following men saw what was about to happen, they said, "Lord, should we cut them with our knifes?" 50 And one man cut the right ear of the worker of the leading burning sacrifice man.

nama: Wénde Yesu norayai, "Yéné yau yafrotatiǃ" A Yesum yéné ároene téngan yayanjai a mer yiyátoi fá.
english: But Yesu said, "Don't this!" And Yesu touched man's ear and healed him.

nama: Wénde yémon yanyotayéng a yémndai, "Mérés, yénd mafina wém fá."
english: But he dinied it and said, "Woman, I don't know him."

nama: Tekofnaye ámb árom wéi yinjoi fáyo a yémndai, "Fém ámb yéné fékéném." Yémon yawangoi, "Ár, yénd yauǃ"
english: Little later other man also saw him and said, "You are one of them." He answered, "Man, I'm not!"

nama: Ámbiro efoghféneféne soramé ámb árom ménjtaye korayawét ndené, "Fá fété yém Yesue kaka ár, efe yém Galili yumén."
english: About a hour later other man said strongly that, "He is Yesu's close man, who is from Galili region."

nama: Árém emofem Yesu tanjetawét si tawafrotawét a ngi yafngoyénd. 64 Yémofem ghékéf yawamoyénd a témndetawét, "Koraya! Emon nésém fém?" 65 A yémofem korayawét tárfár yaufi si yáfaf. Yesu yém Failetene a Erodene sáfrére
english: The man who were guarding Yesu made fun of him and beat him. 64 They blindfolded him and said, "Say! Who hit you?" 65 And they kept saying many bad talk to him. Yesu are in fornt of Failet and Erod

nama: Fauréghan árfene sénko ár náumendayénd limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a nák watamegh ár a yéfene sáfrére Yesu yéngémnjoyénd. 67 Fá norayayénd, "Fém njam Keriso ném, téfe ténmaufro."
english: At daybreak the head people of the people and the leading sacrifice burning people(high priests) and the teaching men of the law gathered and brought Yesu in front of them. 67 They said, "If you are Keriso, tell us."

nama: a yéndon njam fém tamotangén, fémofem yau so ta kwawangongi. 69 Wénde sénonjo yénandmé Ároene Ambum so kámnjongé Minde waftafé Ngánjánene tambén téndon."
