english: and if I asked you, you wouldn't answer to me. 69 But from now on, the Son of Man will be seat at the right side of the With Strong Power(Almighty) God."

nama: Fá méinyotio namotayénd, "Fém fété ném Ngánjánene ambum?" Yémon ewawangoi, "Fém sian mbarkánd em fété yénd wém."
english: They all asked, "Are you the son of God?"

nama: Féyo yémofem norayayénd, "Yéndfem némé si so yéronjam ndenayu? Yéndfem téfendio té náyárangém yá tambén."
english: Then they said, "What we will find other saying? We have heard it from him."

nama: Méinyotio árém Yesu yénémnjoyénd Failetefaf. 2 Yémofem Yesu usérmbogh yafngoyénd yéné sie, "Yéné árom ewarsote téfene ár yéné sie, 'Yau ekmetati mani Kaisarefaf, Rom tuk warsagh ároefaf a yéné yétkwénan nawarse nde yénd wém Keriso, warsagh ár.'"
english: Everyone brought Yesu to Failet. 2 They began to accuse him with this talk, "This man tricked our people with this talk, 'Don't put money to Kaisar, Rom high ruling man and cliams with name to be Keriso, the ruling man(king).'"

nama: Féyo Failetém yémotayéng Yesu, "Fém fété ném Ju árfene warsagh ár?" Yesum yawangoi, "A, fém némé noraye."
english: So Failet asked Yesu, "Are you the ruling man(king) of Ju people?" Yesu answered, "Yes, you said that."

nama: Failetém marataye korayau limánégh ghéngén wárogh árfefaf a ár mérénafefaf, "Yéndon némé mámáfi yau yinjon yéné ároefaf."
english: Failet said widely(announced) to the leading sacrifice burning people(high priests) and the crowd, "I don't find this man what is bad."

nama: Wénde fá ménjtaye korayawét, "Yémon kértat taméinde ár méinyotio Judiamén yáne watameghe, kétándmé Galili yu a yénanotio Jerusalemǃ"
english: But they said strongly, "He is causing trouble through all Judia by his teaching, from Galili region to Jerusalem here!"

nama: Njam Failetém náyárai yénémamén, fá namotai, "Yéné ár Galili yumén yém?" 7 Njam fá mat náyátoi nde Yesu témorwén Erodene limánégh mbanmbanan, Failetém yáfáretam Erodefaf, efe témorwén Jerusalemén yéné efghon.
english: When Failet heard about this, he asked, "Is this man from Galili region?" 7 When he learned that Yesu was under the Erod's ruling, Failet sent him to Erod, who was in Jerusalem at that time.

nama: Wénde ámbiro mwighayan fá nutnayénd, "Tésmetangi, Barabas ténmutorngi téfeyotǃ" 19 Barabas yélawayénd kétán kwéfkwéf sifayat ménamén fá stémorwén ámb ár mérén limánégh ár Jerusalemén yéné efe kásmetawét Rom gafamanafé a ár ngimén.
english: But they shouted with a one mind, "Kill him, take Baraba out to us!" 19 Barabas was thrown to darkness house because he was a head man of group in Jerusalem that fight against Roman Government and for murder. 20 Failet wanted to take Yesu out, so he spoke again to the crowds. 21 But they kept shouting, "Crucify him! Crucify him!"

nama: Nambinotmé wéikor fá norayai, "Némamén? Némé yaufi yémon yafrotam? Yéndon ámb yau yáne fifi yinjon yáfaf krot. Féyo yéndon so yéfmotan soramé téngéfrangon fá."
english: For the third time he said, "Why? What sins has he done? I have not found him the reason to put him to death. I will beat him after [it] set him free."

nama: Ár tárfár tawakayongérwén téfandawét yam ufroghan, limánégh árém sénkér tawafrotawét Yesue. Yémofem korayawét, "Yémon tawanjane ámb ár. Fáyo kawanjarngé, njam fá yém Ngánjánene Keriso, yáne waferghkaf ambum."
english: Many people stood watching this happening, the head men made fun of Yesu. They said, "He saved other people; let him save himself, if he is God's Keriso, his chosen son."

nama: Fiyaré enmormén si tawafrotawét. Yémofem yénmarsaménd njérmat wéri nu yáyot, 37 a norayayénd, "Fém njam ném Ju árfene warsagh ár, fémyo kawanjarǃ" 38 Kété témorwén farogh férén yá tukén, árké yémndetat, "Yéné fiyém Ju árfene warsagh ár."
english: The soldiers made fun of Yesu. They brought him sour alcohol, 37 and said, "If you are the ruling man(king) of the Ju people, save yourself."

nama: Ámb oro téfnár tamangérwén yá téndon, yémo yémndayéng Yesu, "Fém fété ném Keriso? Kawanjar fémyo a yénd ténmanjareǃ"
english: One of thiefs hunged beside of Yesu, said to Yesu, "Are you Keriso? Save yourself and save us!

nama: Yesum yawangoi yá, "Yéndon némndetan fém efalo, sénonjo yénd fémafé so yénre áuwégh méngotuan." Yesuene Kérmén
english: Yesu answered him, "Truly I tell you, today I will be with you in rejoicing country(pradise). The death of Yesu

nama: Yéné amaf efe Yesufé enmormén kétándmé Galili yuta yéngwaitoyénd Josef mbéwé fandaghét a ndernáye yékmayénd yáne fifi. 56 Fá néngangoyénd méngot mer wimafé wékwér frengéghét. Wénde fá kenawét Safatan ndené fété Mosesene nák.
english: This women who had come with Yesu from Galili region followed Josef and saw the grave and how his body was laid in it. 56 They went home to prepare good smelling liquid(perfumes). But they rested on the Safat like as Moses law.

nama: Yéné efghonyo sómbio ár tangérwén Jerusalemta kétán Emausét 11 kilomité 14 Yémofem téngwarunwét endmé yéfe kénjúnro némé yam kufrotau. 15 Njamandio fá ngoraiwét a téngwarunwét mérne, Yesu fáyo yénmormén a tayotau yémafé. 16 Wénde yémofem yau yayamngeyayénd Yesu.
english: On that same day two [of them] were going from Jerusalem to Emaus about 11kilomitèrs. 14 They were talking on the road each other what had happened. 15 As they talked and discussed together, Yesu himself came and walked with them. 16 But they did not recognize him.

nama: Yémon emotangeyai fá, "Némamén fémofem yarunyét táf fém seyowé?"
english: He asked them, "Why are you discussing as you walk?"

nama: Ámb témorwén yétkwén Klofas, yémotai fá, "Fém némé wan téfnár ném Jerusalemén a mafina ném némé yam nufrotat yéné efghon?"
english: One [of them] name Klofas, asked him, "Are you what kind visiter to Jerusalem and who does not know what have happened in these days?"

nama: Yémofem kaka méngotu yéngiyátoyénd ándan fá tangmorwén, Yesu awaingétro téngmorwén. 29 Wénde yémofem yamnendayénd Yesu ménjtaye, "Yéndfé kámnjongém ménamén yéférte." Féyo fá néngwanoi yéfefaf ámnjoghét.
english: They approached the village where they were going, Yesu was about to pass over. 29 But they urged Yesu strongly, "Stay with us because it is nearly evening." So they went in to stay with them.

nama: Njamandio fá mé korayawét yénémamén, Yesu fáyo nénokayoi yéfene kénjún a norayayéng yéfefaf, "Krufrat féfefaf so yémǃ"
english: While they were still talking about this, Yesu himself stood among them and said to them "Peace be with you!"

nama: Fá norayai yéfefaf, "Yéné fiyém némé yénd korayawén táf yénd njam mé ténmorwén fémafé. Méinyotio si efalo so náyátote némé yéfarotaménd tanemén Mosesene nák kénjún, Ngánjánene mat yátogh árfene Buk a Sams."
english: He said to them, "This is what I told you while I was still with you. Every talks must be fulfilled what was written in the laws of Moses, God's people who make know(prophets) and psalms."

nama: Si náyátoi ár a témorangérwén téfe kénjún, ngárám a efalo afoghkaf. Yéndfem yinjoyém yáne ndimbal kwayaghé, árké yémon yanai ndené fété Afane féfét Ambum.
english: The Word became a man and lived among us, full of grace and truth. We saw his strong light(big light), which he received as the Father's only one Son.

nama: Jon korayau yánemén. Fá nutnai, "Yéné fá fiyém yénd endenemén kénorayan táf njam korayan, 'Fá yéném ta soramé, wénde yénd wainde yémo, ménamén fá fronde kaketau yénd soramé náráftamén.'"
english: Jon spoke about him. He shouted, "This is the one I was talking about when I said, 'He comes after me, but he surpasses me, because he first existed I was born later(existed before I was born).'"

nama: Ju sénko árém Jerusalemén ewáfáretaménd ámb ghéngén wárogh ár a Lefi mérénmén Jone moghét, "Fém Efe ném?"
english: The Ju head men(head men) in Jerusalem sent some sacrifice offering man(burning sacrifice men) and people from Lefi group(Levites) to Jon to ask [him], "Who are you.s?"

nama: Jon yau nakenai uwangoghét, wénde norayai marataye a safénro, "Yénd yau Keriso wém."
english: Jon did not refuse to answer, but spoke openly and clearly, "I am not the Keriso."

nama: Fá námotayénd, "Féyo fém efe ném? Efe ném Elaija?" Joném ewawangoi, "Yau, yénd yau fá wém." Fá namotayénd, "Fém ném yéné Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár?" Yémo ewawangoi, "Yau."
english: They asked, "So who are you? Are you Elaija{m{ ...f* {m{1.21 Elaija explain who were waiting for by Ju ?" Jon answered them, "No, I am not him." They asked, "Are you the Prophet(man to making knowing God's knowledge)? He answered, "No."

nama: Fá korayangi, "Ténmaufro téfe fém efe ném? Yéndfem so uwangogh si yangotam yéfe emofem ténmáfáretat yénd. Némé fém noraye fenjomén?"
english: They said, "Tell us who you are? We will take an answer to those who sent us. What do you say about yourself?"

nama: Jon nuwangoi Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár Aisayane sian: "Yénd ámb ároene kém wém nutne fanfne yuwon: Tafrotangi mbarkánd end Yurai álighét!"
english: Jon answered in the talk of the God's man who make know(prophet) Aisaya: "I am the voice of someone shouting in the clear place(desert){n{ ...f* {n{1.23 picture for printout : Make a straight way [for] the Lord to walk!"

nama: Farasi ár mérén efe enwáfáretaménd, 25 wéi yémotayénd Jon, "Fém yau njam ném Keriso o Elaija o Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár, némamén fémon nuan walitogh ewafrote?"
english: The Farasi men who had been sent, 25 asked Jon again, "If you are not Keriso or Elaija or the Prophet, why do you do washing with water(baptize)?

nama: Jon nuwangoi, "Yéndon ewalitotan nue, wénde féfefafényo yakai fá fiyém endenemén mat yau em. 27 Fá ta soramé yéném, wénde yénd féyotarofnar wém yáne sandol ángégh ferghét.
english: Jon answered, "I put into(baptize) with water, but among you stands one who you do not know. 27 He is coming after me, but I am not enough to untie his sandol's rope."

nama: Méinyotio yéné kété kufrotau Betanin kété Joden wanjen wér tambén, ánde Joném tawalitotau. Ngánjánene Sif tosé
english: All this happend there in Betani there the east side of the Joden River, where Jon was baptizing. God's Lamb

nama: Yénamayo efghon Jon takayongérwén wéikor kété yémafé sómbio yáne waitogh ár kénjún, 36 njam yémo yinjoi Yesu álighan, fá norayai, "Téfandangi, ndené kés yém Ngánjánene Sif tosé!"
english: The next day Jon was standing there again with two in/of his following men, 36 when he saw Yesu walking, he said, "Look That's the Lamb of God"

nama: Sómbio waitogh árém yiyáreyayénd fá norayai yéné a néngwanoyénd Yesufé. 38 Yesu nawengoyéng, ewinjeyai yá waitoghan, a namotai, "Némat fém nérét?" Yémofem yawangeyayénd, "Ánde fém némorang, Rabai?" Yéné yétkwénoene fifi siyém "Watamegh ár."
english: The two following men heard(dual) him say this and went with Yesu. 38 Yesu turned, saw them(2 of them) following him, and asked (to 2 of them), "What are you(dual) looking for?" They.d answered, "Where are you staying, Rabai? (This name's meaning is "Teaching man(Teacher.")

nama: Fá nuwangoi, "Awe a fandaghét." Yéné táf témorwén 4 aklokotro séiteyan. Féyo fá néwaneyayénd yémafé a yinjeyayénd ánde fá témorangérwén a yifeyayénd yéné efogh yémafé.
english: He answered, "Come and to see." (It was 4 o'clock in the afternoon.) So they.d went with him and saw where he was staying and spent that day with him.

nama: Nataniel namotai, "Ámb némé mer rokar so yéném Najaretta?" Filif nuwangoi, "Awe a téfanda."
english: Nataniel asked, "Can anything good come from Najaret?" Filif answered, "Come and see."

nama: Njam Yesum yinjoi Nataniel ténmorwén kétán yáfaf, Yesu norayai yánemén, "Siyém efalo Israil ár; yáfaf unyégh yau yém!"
english: When Yesu saw Nataniel coming to him, Yesu said about him, "Here is a real Israil man; to him there is no deceit!"

nama: Natanielém yémotai fá, "Ndernáye fém mat ném yénd?" Yesu nuwangoi, "Yéndon néminjon fém njam wén yétkwén figh njaran ném soramayo Filifém némanmo fém."
english: Nataniel asked him, "How do you know me?" Yesu answered, "I saw you when you were in the shadow of the breadfruit tree before Filif called you."

nama: Nataniel nuwangoi, "Watamegh ár, fém sném Ngánjánene Ambum! Fém sném warsagh ár Israilmén!"
english: Nataniel answered, "Teacher, you are the Son of God! You are the ruling man(king) of Israil!"

nama: Sómbio efogh soramé kété témorwén awerégh téménd Kana tesenan Galili yu kénjún. Yesue yátmé kété témorwén, 2 a Yesu a yáne waitogh ár enwarawayénd kétán awerégh téméndfaf. 3 Njam wéri nu nefoi, Yesue yátmé norayai yáfaf, "Yéfene wéri nu té nefo."
english: Two days later there was a wedding feast in Kana town in Galili region. Yesu's mother was there, 2 and they invited Yesu and his following men to the wedding feast. 3 When the alcohol finished, Yesu's mother said to him, "Their alcohol has already finished."

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Amé, fémo némamén wémndete yénémamén? Tane efogh yau nawer."
english: Yesu answered her, "Mother, why do you tell me this? My day has not come."

nama: Yesue yatmam emndai faiofnar ásáfogh ár, "Ewafrotati némé njam yémo emndeta."
english: Yesu's mother told the workers, "Do if what he tells you."

nama: Yesum yafrotam yéné fronde ufarogh yam Kanan Galili yu kénjún; kété yémon yuyafoi yánjo ndimbal kwayaghé, a yánjo waitogh árém efalo yiyátoyénd fá.
english: Yesu did this first surprising things in Kana in Galili region; there he revealed his strong light(big light), and his following men truly approved(believed) in him.

nama: Yéné soramé, Yesu a yánjo amé, néngnéf a waitogh ár engmormén kétán Káfenamét a emorangérmén tárfárofnar efogh. Yesu yéngmormén kétán wáwefnogh méngot
english: After this, Yesu and his mother, small brothers and following men went to Kafenam and stayed there not for a many days. Yesu went to the worshipping house

nama: Ju sénko ár nénangoyénd ámoghafé yáfaf, "Némé ufarogh yam fémon so yafrote sái ténmauyafo téfe ndené fém waftafé ném yéné wafroghét?"
english: The Ju head men came back at him with a question, "What surprising thing can you do to show us that you have the power(authority) to do this?"

nama: Yesu nuwangoi, "Tironangi yéné wáwefnogh méngo, a nambio efogh kénjún yéndon so tanongén yéné wéikor."
english: Yesu answered, "Destroy this worshipping house, and in three days I will raise it up again."

nama: Yémofem yémotayénd, "Némé fémo so yéramete yéné wéikor nambio efogh kénjún? Yéné wáwefnogh méngo ramégham yérsam 46 yunjéf!"
english: They asked him, "What are you going to build it again in three days? To build this worshipping house took 46 years!"

nama: Wénde Yesu njam norayai wáwefnogh méngo yánjo fifimén korayau 22 Féyo njam fá nanoi kérta, yáne waitogh árém nawafarotayénd nde fá té norayai yéné, a yémafem efalo yiyátoyénd Buk si a némé Yesu té norayai. Yesu mat yém árfene tikéf
english: But when Yesu said the worshipping house he said his body. 22 So when he was raised from death, his following men remeberd that he had said this, and they truly approved(believed) the Buk(scripture) and what Yesu had said. Yesu know people's heart

nama: Kété témorwén ámb Ju sénko ár yétkwén Nikodimas, efe témorwén Farasi mérénmén. 2 Ámb sémbár fá yéngmormén Yesuefaf a norayai yáfaf, "Watamegh ár, yénd mat yéném ndené fém ném watamegh ár efe nénmáfáretam Ngánjánam. Yau emo so ámb ufarogh yam ewafrote yéné fémon sewafrote táfandro Ngánjánafé njam fém ere."
english: There was one Ju head man name Nikodimas, who was in a Farasi group. 2 One night he went to Yesu and said to him, "Teacher, we know that you are a teaching man who God sent. No one can perform the surprising things you are doing unless God were/Note:dual/ with you."

nama: Yesu nuwangoi, "Yéndon efalo némaufrotan fe: emo yau so tinjongé Ngánjánene limánégh táfandro njam wéikor náráfta."
english: Yesu answered, "I am telling you the truth: no one can see the ruling of God(God's reigning) unless he is born again."

nama: Nikodimas namotai, "Ndernáye so anoghkaf ár náráfte wéikor? Fá yau so kélawangé yátmane kafkalot a sái náráfta sómbinotma!"
english: Nikodimas asked, "How can a grown man be born again? He cannot enter his mother's womb and be born a second time!"

nama: Nikodimas namotai, "Ndernáye yéné yém?"
english: Nikodimas asked, "How this is?"

nama: Amafom yawangoi, "Fém sném Ju ár, a yénd swém Samariamén ámaf-yénémamén nde ndernáye so fémon wamnende yénd nuot?" Ménamén Ju ár yau so nafghetat Samaria árfé kafusi a merekinamé néneyan.
english: The woman answered him, "You are a Ju man, and I am a woman from Samaria-then how can you asked me for a water? (Because Ju people will not share cups and bowls with Samaria people in eating.)

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Njam té fém mat kénmorwén némé Ngánjánene ramégh yém a efe fá yém emon némamnende nuot, fémon so támnenda fá, a yémon so kémaramangé ghérsé akegh nu."
english: Yesu answered her, "If you knew what is God gift and who is he that is asking you for water, you will(would) ask him, and he will(would) give you living water."

nama: Amaf norayai, "Ndimbal, fém sném ukwégh rokarofnar, a yékw siyém kénjkam. Ánde so fémon ténman yéné ghérsé akegh nu? 12 Téfene ákim Jeikofém yénmaramai téfe yéné nu yékw; fá a yánjo ambumtértér a yánjo mánjarégh wérár mérén méinyotio nu yénaf tánetawét. Fémo yáinde afé Jeikof?"
english: The woman said, "Bigman, you have no drawing tool, and the well is deep. Where you would you get that life living water? 12 Our ancestor Jeikof gave us this water hole(well), he and his children and his all farming animal group(livestocks) drank water here. You surpass father Jeikof?

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Méinyotio emofem yéné nu yénetat mé so em nu ménde, 14 wénde emon njam yéneta yéné nu yéndon sewarametan yaufifi so efinde nuam. Néméwét, nu yéné yéndon sewarametan yéfe so kamndangé éfnogh nu yéfene kénjún so efrone akegh ghérsé nue a so tawaramangé tuot ghérsé."
english: Yesu answered her, "Everyone who drinks this water will still be seeking water, 14 but whoever.single drinks the water I give them will never feel thirsty. Yes, the water this I gave them will become a flowing water in them will flowing by living life water and will give them forever life."

nama: Amaf norayai yáfaf, "Ndimbal, kwaram ta yéné nu ménát yau yénd so nuam wéfinde a yau so wéném yénan nu ukéghét."
english: The woman said to him, "Bigman, give me this water in order that I will never feel thirsty and I will not come here to draw water."

nama: Yesum yémndai amaf, "Kuwano, fenjar ténmasro a kénango."
english: Yesu told her, "Go, bring your.husband and come back."

nama: Amaf nuwangoi, "Tanjar yau wém."
english: She answered, "My.husband is not."

nama: Wénde efalo siyém, fém té némasroyénd 5 árém, a ár sénonjo emafé emorare yau fenjarfifi yém. Fémo efalo té waufro."
english: But truth is, 5 husbands had brought you, and a man now who is not real your.husband. You have told me the truth."

nama: Amaf norayai, "Ndimbal, yénd mat namndan ndené fém sném Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár. 20 Téfene ákifem yéné mband tunakfan táwefnotawét Ngánjáne, wénde fém Ju ár norayati ndené Jerusalem yéné yu fiyém ánde yéndfem so yáwefnotam Ngánjáne."
english: The woman said, "Bigman, I know that you are a God's man who make know(prophet). 20 Our ancestors on this mountain worshipped God, but you Ju people say that Jerusalem is that place where we should worship God."

nama: Amaf norayai, "Yénd mat wém ndené Keriso so yéném. Njam fá yéném so yénmawafene méinyotio yam téfeyot."
english: The woman said, "I know that Keriso will come. When he comes, he will tell everything to us."

nama: Yesu nuwangoi, "Yénd faf wém, efe yénd norayan fefaf."
english: Yesu answered, "I am he, who I am talking to you."

nama: Yéné efghonyo, nénangoyénd Yesuene waitogh ár, a sélngwél emormén syinjoyénd amafofé skoraiwét. Wénde yau efe ámb namotai, "Némé ménde ném fém?" o "Némat fém norayet amafofé?"
english: In this moment, Yesu's diciples came back, and they came surprise they found him talking with a woman. But no one asked him, "What do you want? or "Why are you talking with woman?"

nama: Féyo amafom noroi yánjo nu séfkwén, néngangoi kétán tesenot a ewaufroi árét, 29 "Awe, téfandangi yéné ár emon waufrote méinyotio yam yéndon árké té tawafrotan. Mé té fá yém Keriso?" 30 Féyo fá néwanoyénd tesenta a tayotau kétán Yesuefaf.
english: Then the woman left her water jar, went back to the town and said to people, 29 "Come, see this man who told me everything which I have done. Could he be Keriso?" 30 So they came from the town and walked/went to Yesu.

nama: Yéné efoghféneféneyan waitogh árém yémndayénd Yesu, "Watamegh ár, njamke ámb koneta!"
english: In this time the following men said to Yesu, "Teacher, Eat some food!"

nama: Wénde fá norayai yéfefaf, "Tane té njamke yém nénet yéné árkémamén fém mat yau em."
english: But he said to them, "There is my food to eat that which you don't know about."

nama: Féyo waitogh ár kamotangi yéfenjo kénjún, "Mété emon táf yénmarsa yá njamke?"
english: So the following men asked among themselves, "Has already someone brought him food?"

nama: Yémofem norayayénd amafofefaf, "Yéndfem yau efalo yiyátongém ménamén fémon némé noraya; sénonjo yéndio téfé náyáretam, a yénd mat yéném ndené yéné ár efalo fété yém mband maratoene Wanjarégh ár. Yesum mer yiyátoi gafaman ásáfogh ároene ambum
english: They said to the woman, "We don't truly approve(believe) because of what you said, now we ourselves already heard him, and we know that this man is really the Savior of the world." Yesu makes good(heals) an Government worker's son

nama: Yesu norayai yáfaf, "Emon ámb yau efalo so tiyáto táfandro fémon sái yéfanda ufarogh yam a sélngwélafé yam."
english: Yesu said to him, "None of you will truly approve(believe) unless you may see happening thing(surprising things) and surprising things(surprising things)."

nama: Gafaman ásáfogh ár nuwangoi, "Ndimbal, awe yéndfé mété táf tane ambum kér yém."
english: The government working man answered, "Bigman, come with me before my son dies."

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Nguwano; fene ambum so ghérsé yém."
english: Yesu answered him, "Go; your son will be life.(live)"

nama: Njam mé téngmorwén endmé, yánjo faiofnar ásáfogh árém yéfángoyénd fá yéné ghanyafé ndené yáne ghakér ambum ghérsé mé yém. 52 Yémon emotai fá árké efghe namndai mer, yémofem yawangoyénd, "Wawenagh enjneyam yéfrongé fá káye séite táf wan aklok."
english: When he went through the way, his without.payment working man(servant) men met him with this news that your boy is still life. 52 He asked them in which time he became good, they answered to him, "The fever sickness left him yesterday afternoon one o'clock."

nama: Féyo yárefé nawafarotai nde yéné efghe fifi Yesum yémndai, "Fene ambum so ghérsé yém." Féyo fá a yánjo méinyotio mérén efalo yiyátoyénd Yesu.
english: Then his father rememberd that in that exact time Yesu had told him, "Your son will be life." So he and his whole family truly approved(believed) Yesu.

nama: Yéné yémormén sómbiomén ufarogh yam Yesum árké yafrotam soramé táf sinmormén Judiata kétán Galili yuwot.
english: This was the second surprising thing which Yesu did after coming from Judia to Galili region.

nama: Ár ámb kété témorwén efe 38 yunjéf témorwén enjne. 6 Njam Yesum yinjoi fá stékmangérwén kété a mat namndai ndené fá yéné enjne kértayan stémorwén yu tombé, yémon yémndai fá, "Té fém ménde ném sái mer kamndé?"
english: One man was there who had been sick for 38 years. 6 When Yesu saw him lying there and knew that he had been in suffering this sickness for a long time, he asked him, "Do you want to become well?"

nama: Enjne téfnár nuwangoi, "Ndimbal, tayot efe ámb yau yém ménát yénd sái wáutána némbne sawét égharghét táf njam nu narémne. Njam yénd yéta kufngon kétán sái kégharén, ámb ár frondeyo táf nguwarngé."
english: The sick man answered, "Bigman, to me nobody in order to help to put me in the small lake when the water is spinned. While I am trying to start to get into, other man goes down ahead of me."

nama: Féyo Yesu norayai yáfaf, "Kano! Tékaf fenjo yame a áligh." 9 Táf fété ár mer namndai; yémon yékafai yánjo yame a nuwanoi.
english: Then Yesu said to him, "Get up, pick up your mat and walk." 9 Immediately the man became well; he picked up his mat and went.

nama: féyo Ju sénko árém norayayénd yéné ároefaf efe té mer yiyátoi, "Yéné siyém Safat; yéné siyém téfene nákan fémon yau so yérse fenjo yame."
english: so the Ju head men said to this man who had became good, "This is the Safat; this is in our law you must not carry your mat."

nama: Wénde fá nuwangoi, "Ár emon yénd mer wiyáto wémnde yénd, 'Tékaf fenjo yame a kuwano.'
english: But he answered, "The man who made me well told me , 'Pick up your mat and go.'

nama: Féyo yémofem yémotayénd fá, "Efe yéné ár yém emon némnde fém kafghét a álighét?"
english: So they asked him, "Who is this man who told you to pick up and to walk?"

nama: Ár efe té mer namndai yau mat témorwén efe témorwén, ménamén Yesu té wékeyero yéngmormén ár mérén kénjút kété stamorwén.
english: The man who became well did not know who it was, because Yesu had went quickly into the people group(crowd) there was.

nama: Soramé Yesum yinjoi fá kété wáwefnogh méngo sifayan a norayai yáfaf, "Téfanda, fém sném merot té nango. Kékmbo yaufiyam wafrogh o minde mámáfi mété nufrota fefaf." 15 Yéné ár néngwanoi a ewaufroi Ju sénko árét ndené Yesum mer yiyátoi fá. Ambumoene muyé
english: Later Yesu found him there in the worshipping house place and said to him, "See, you are already turn to good. Stop doing sin or any bad [things] happen to you any more." 15 The man went away and told the Ju head men that Yesu made him good. The Son's power(authority)

nama: "Yénd njam nafrotan tanjomén, árém so nemnat ndené tane si yau efalo témorwén. 32 Wénde ámb ár yéna yém efe nafrote tane téfnan, a yénd mat wém ndené fá némé noraye tanemén siyém efalo.
english: If I am going to report about mine, people would think my talk was not true. 32 But there is someone who reports on my behalf, and I know that what he says about me is true.

nama: Fémofem té téngwáfáretati si résagh ár kétán Jonefaf a yémon té norayai efalomén. 34 Yau wénde yénd námyotan árfene afroghfaf; wénde yénd norayan yéné ménát fém so wanjarégham tawanangé. 35 Jon témorwén lambefanit kánetau a kálálau kwayaghé, a fém kámyotawét tekofnar wayamneghét yáne kwayaghayan.
english: You have sent messengers to Jon and he had spoke about the truth. 34 But I don't accept people's reporting; but I say this in order that you may receive save. 35 Jon was like a lamp burning and shining light, and you were willing without-long(for a while) to rejoice in his light.

nama: Yesu néngretai a ewinjoi ndimbal mérén tanmorwén yáfaf, féyo yémotai Filif, "Ánde yéndfem so tawanangém féyotaroan njamke ménát sái emanjnam méinyotio yéné ár?" 6 Yémon norayai yéné ménát Filif yufotam, wénde fá mat témorwén némé yémon so tafrotau.
english: Yesu looked around and saw a large crowd was coming to him, so he asked Filif, "Where are we possible to buy food in order to feed all this people?" 6 He said this in order to test Filif, but he knew what he would do.

nama: Filifém yawangoi, "Ménát méinyotio árém sái némbnare tánetangi, ndenanit yém ndené 200 Denarion{q{ ...f* {q{6.7 200 Denarion Yéné siyém 200 efoghmén fai , árké em 200 efoghmén fai so tawanangayénd flawé ménát sái féyotaro yém."
english: Filif answered him, "For every people to eat a little, it looks it will be about 200 denarion, which are wages for 200 days to buy enough bread."

nama: Ámb yáne waitogh ár, Endru, efe Saimon Fitane yánngén, norayai, 9 "Ghakér ambum siyém yéna endefaf em 5 féskaf flawé a sómbio némbnar wagif. Wénde yéné yau féyotaro so em yéné ár tárfárét.
english: One of his following men, Endru, who is Saimon Fitè's small brother, said, 9 "Here is a boy with 5 bread and two small fish. But that will not enough for these many people.

nama: Njam fá méinyotio eremngoi néneyan, Yesu norayai yánjo waitogh árfefaf, "Takafetangi a taumendangi mbarmbar. Yau némé ámb so ewaghnam." 13 Féyo yémofem eumendaménd méinyotio a ewafoyénd 12 mbaf yáf ménaye mbarmbar árkéméné nafrangoyénd 5 flawata árém árké enetaménd.
english: When they all satisfied to eat, Yesu said to his following men, "Pick up and gather. Let nothing be wasted." 13 So they gathered them all and filled 12 baskets with the pieces which left over from the 5 bread which the people had eaten.

nama: Njam yémofem yinjoyénd Yesu kété arakaf witmé karfan, yémofem yémotayénd fá, "Watamegh ár, njam fém nufar yénan?"
english: When they found Yesu there on the other side of the lake, they asked to him, "Teacher, when did you arrive here?"

nama: Féyo yémofem yémotayénd Yesu, "Némé yéndfem so yafrotam ménát sái yafrotam némé Ngánjánene ménde yém téfeyot wafroghét?"
english: Then they asked Yesu, "What can we do in order that we do what is God's will for us to do?"

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Némé ménde Ngánján yém féfeyot wafroghét siyém efalo tiyátongi fá efe yémon ténmáfárete."
english: Yesu answered them, "What God wants for you to do is to truly approve(believe) him who he sent."

nama: Féyo yémofem yémotayénd Yesu, "Némé ufarogh yam so fémon yafrote ménát yéndfem sái tinjongém yéné a efalo kényátongém fém? Némé so fémon yafrote? 31 Téfene ákifem yénetaménd mana kété fanfne yuwon, ndené fété kés yéfarotaménd: 'Yémon ewaramai yéfe njafarmén féskaf flawé nénet.'"
english: So they asked Yesu, "What surprising thing will you do so that we may see this and truly approve(believe) you? What will you do? 31 Our ancesters ate mana there in the desert, just as it is written: 'He gave them bread from the heaven to eat.'"

nama: Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe efalo, némé Mosesém ewaramai féfe yau njafarmén féskaf flawé, wénde tane Afam ewaramete féfe efalo féskaf flawé njafarmén. 33 Ménamén Ngánjánene féskaf flawé fá yém efe yénmewéryéng kétándmé njafarta a ghérsé yéramete kétán mband maratot."
english: Yesu said to them, "I tell you the truth, What Moses gave you.p [was] not the bread from heaven, but my Father gives you.p the real bread from heaven. 33 For God's bread is he who comes down from heaven and gives life to the land/world."

nama: Fá norayayénd, "Ndimbal, túmén yénmarameta téfe yéné féskaf flawé."
english: They said, "Bigman, always give us this bread."

nama: Ju ár nufngoyénd áwátaranégh Yesuenemén ménamém fá norayai ndené, "Yénd wém féskaf flawé árkéméné nénewor njafarta." 42 Fá norayayénd, "Yéné ár fiyém Yesu, Josefene ambum, endene afé a amé yénd mat yéném. Ndernáye fá noraye sénonjo, 'Yénd néneworyén kétándmé njafarta?"
english: The Ju people began to grumble about Yesu because he said that, "I am the bread which came down form heaven." 42 They said, "This man is Yesu, Josef's son, whose father and mother we know. How does he now say, 'I came down from heaven?'"

nama: Féyo Ju ár nufngoyénd éwigh tékrátaye yéfenjo kénjún, "Ndernáye so yéné árom ténmaramangé téfe yánjo fifi ménát nénet?"
english: Then Ju people began to argue heavily among them, "How can this man give us his body to eat?"

nama: Njam yéné náyáretaménd, tárfár yáne waitogh ár norayayénd, "Yéné siyém táikér watamegh. Efe so náyárete yéné sifaf?"
english: When they heard this, many of his following men said, "This is a hard teaching. Who can listen to this talk?"

nama: Yénémamén tárfár yánjo waitogh ár nawengoyénd sémta a yau táitotawét fá.
english: This reason many of his following men turned back and would not follow him.

nama: Féyo Yesum emotai 12, "Fém ménde em frangoghét wéi?"
english: So Yesu asked 12, "Do you also want to leave?"

nama: Saimon Fitam yawangoi yá, "Yuré, endefaf yénd so yéngém? Fém tuot ghérsé siafé ném. 69 Yéndfem efalo niyátotam a mat yéném ndené fém ném Njúnnjúnofnar Ár Ngánjáneta."
english: Saimon Fitè answered him, "Lord, to whom woud we go? You are with the talks of eternal life. 69 We truly approve(believe) and know that you are the Without.dust Man from God."

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Yéndon té ewaferyén fém 12. Wénde ámbiro yéna ném ndenanit Sáifér. 71 Fá korayau Judasenemén, Saimon Iskariotene ambum. Ndemamén fá témorwén 12 mén, soramé sén so téramangai fá.
english: Yesu answered them, "I have chosen you 12. But one here is like a Sáifèr(Stan)!" 71 He spoke of Judas, Saimon Iskariot's son. Even though he was one of the Twelve, later he will give teeth(betray) him.

nama: Yéné soramé yánngnéf snéngwanoyénd téménd sifayat, Yesu wéi fété yéngmorméng, yau marataye, wénde átnoghe. 11 Téménd sifayé kénjún kété Yesu téronjawét Ju sénko árém a kamotawét, "Ánde yém fá?"
english: After this his small brothers had gone to the place of festival, Yesu also went, not publicly, but secretly. 11 At the place of festival there the Ju head men were looking for Yesu and asked, "Where is he?"

nama: Mérén kénjún awawanjagh kété témorwén Yesuenemén.
english: Among the groups/crowds there was whispering about Yesu.

nama: Emo yau marataye korayau ménamén fá férféram tafindau yéfenjo sénko árfenemén.
english: No one talk about him openly because they felt fear about their head men.

nama: Téménd njam néndkéfan náyátoi, Yesu nuwanoi wáwefnogh méngo sifayat a ewafngoi watamegh. 15 Ju sénko ár sélngwél emormén a norayayénd, "Ndernáye yéné ár minde mat yém táf nák skulot yau yiotam?"
english: When the festival became middle, Yesu went to the worshipping house area and began teaching. 15 The Ju head men were surprised and said, "How does this man know so much when he has never been to law school?"

nama: Árém yawangoyénd, "Fefaf syém yaufi mbérmbér! Emo némafngo fém ngiot?"
english: People answered him, "Evil spirit is to you! Who is trying to kill you?"

nama: Yesum njamandio tawatametau wáwefnogh méngo sifayan, fá norayai marat kéme, "Fém matfifi té em yénd efe wém a árkamé wénmormén? Yénd yau wénmormén tanjo mwighé faroréghan. Wénde fá emo wénmáfáretam siyém efalo. Fém mat yau em fá, 29 wénde yénd mat fá wém, ménamén yénd wénmormén yá tambén a yémon yénd wénmáfáretam."
english: While Yesu was teaching in the worshipping house area, he spoke with a loud voice, "Do you really know who I am and from where I am? I have not come on my decision. But he who sent me is true. You do not know him, 29 but I know him, because I came from him and he sent me."

nama: Farasi árém eyárayénd ár mérén Yesuenemén káwáwanjawét yénémamén, féyo fá a limánégh ghéngén wárogh árém engwáfáretaménd ámb wanjengégh ár ménát yá werghét.
english: Farasi men heard the crowd whispering like that about Yesu, so they and the sacrifice burning head men(chief burning sacrifice men) sent some watching men(guards) in order to arrest him.

nama: Yesu norayai, "Yénd fémofé so yéném némbne efoghfénefénetro, a yénd so wéi ngangon kétán emon yénd wénmáfáretam. 34 Fémofem yénd so kwéronjangi, wénde fémofem yau so kwinjongi yénd, ménamén fém yau kétán so engém yénd ánde so wém."
english: Yesu said, "I will be with you a only little time, and I will go back again to [him] who sent me. 34 You.p will seek me, but you.p can't find me, because you cannot go to where I will be."

nama: Ámb árém mérén kénjún yiyárayénd fá korayau yéné a norayayénd, "Yéné ár siyém efalo yéné Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár!"
english: Some people in the crowd heard him say this and said, "This man is really this Prophet!"

nama: Ámb korayawét, "Fá siyém Keriso!"
english: Others said, "He is Keriso!"

nama: Buk si noraye ndené Keriso so yém Deifidene ákimén a so náráfte Betliemén kété Deifid ánde témorangérwén." 43 Kété mwighayan afalogh tamorwén ár mérén kénjún Yesuenemén. 44 Ámb ár ménde tamorwén werghét, wénde emon yau ngángé efayoi yáfaf. Efalo yátoghofnar Ju sénko ár
english: The Buk(scripture) says that Keriso will be Deifid's descendant and will be born in Betliem there where Deifid lived." 43 There was a division in the thought in the crowd about Yesu. 44 Some people wanted to catch him, but no one laid a hand on him. Ju head men without big mind(faith)

nama: Njam wanjengégh ár nénangoyénd, limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a Farasi árém emotayénd, "Némamén yau fémofem fyénémnjati fá?"
english: When the guards went back, the leading sacrifice burning people(high priests) and Farasi men asked them, "Why did you not bring him?"

nama: Wanjengégh árém ewawangoyénd, "Efe ámb yau korayau ndené ende fá kés korayau!"
english: The guards answered them, "Nobody has talked like that he said!"

nama: Farasi árém emotayénd, "Yémo wéi té tawaweinde. 48 Yau ámb sénko ár o Farasi árém efalo yiyátoyénd fá? 49 Wénde yéné ár mérén yau mat em Mosesene nákmén. Fá sem Ngánjánene mogh mbanmbanan!"
english: Farasi men asked them, "He deceived you.p also? 48 None of the head men or of the Farasi men truly approved(believed) in him? 49 But this crowd does not know the Moses's law. They are under God's judgment!"

nama: Ámbiro Farasi ár kété témorwén fá Nikodimas, yéné ár efe yéngmormén a Yesu yinjoi fronde. Fá norayai kété ámb árfefaf, 51 "Téfene nákam yau yénmumyote nde ár kértat sái tékmangém, fronde so tiyárangém sian. Yau so yawaftam ámbro kétán mat kor kamndangém némé yam tawafrote."
english: One of Farasi men there was he Nikodimas, this man who came saw Yesu before. He said there to the other people, 51 "Our law did not allow that put people in a punishment, before we hear talk. We wan't count other until we understand well what he did."

nama: Njam fá náyárayénd yéné si, fá méinyotio nofarnayénd, ámbiroámbiroero, ár ndimbal fronde a totér ár, kétánotio Yesufro efrangeyayénd amafofé mé tawakayarwén kété. 10 Yesu nokayoi a yémndai, "Amaf, ánde fá em? Efe ámb nafrango fe waghanghét?"
english: When they heard this talk, they all left, one by one, people big(adult) first to young people, until only Yesu left with woman still standing there. 10 Yesu stood up and said to her, "Woman, where are they? Who is left to condemn you?"

nama: Amafom yawangoi, "Ámb ár yau yém, ndimbal." Yesum yémndai, "Yéndon wéi yau so némaghnan fém. Nguwano, wénde yaufi yau ewafrota wéikor" Yesu kwayaghé mband maratoe
english: Woman answered him, "There is nobody, bigman." Yesu said to him, "I will not also condemn you. Go, but do not sin again." Yesu the light of the world

nama: Njam wéikor Yesu korayau árfefaf, fá ndené norayai, "Yénd wém kwayaghé mband maratoe. Emon kwénmaitongé yénd yau so yiote kwéfitayan a yáfaf so yém kwayaghé árké yém ghérsat."
english: When again Yesu spoke to the people, he said that, "I am the light of the world. Who follows me will not walk in the darkness and to him will have the light for giving life.

nama: Farasi ár norayayénd yáfaf, "Sénonjo fém té norayang fenjo yammén. Némé fém noraye muyafnar yém."
english: Farasi men said to him, "Now you had spoken about your own things. What you are saying has no authority."

nama: Yémofem yémotayénd, "Ánde yém ferafé?" Yesum ewawangoi, "Fém mafina em tanemén o tane Afanemén. Fém njam mat em tanemén, fém mat so em Afanemén ndenáyo."
english: They asked him, "Where is your.s father?" Yesu answered them, "You don't know about me and about my Father. If you know about me, you would know about my Father also."

nama: Yesum norayai méinyotio yéné si njam yémon tawatametau kété wáwefnogh méngo sifayan, kété yéné satayan ánde ramégh boks tékmangérwén. A emo yau yérai fá, ménamén yáne efogh yau somé nawerai. Fém yau kétán so engém yénd ándan wéngém
english: Yesu said all this talk when he taught there in the worshipping house area, there in the room where the offering box was placed. And no one held him, because his day not come yet. You cannot go there where I am going

nama: Wéi Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Yénd so kuwanongén; fémofem so wéronjati yénd, wénde fém so kér em féfenjo yaufiyan. Fém yau so engém kétán yénd ándan wéngém."
english: Again Yesu said to them, "I will go; you.p will seek me, but you.p will die in your.p sins. You cannot go there where I am going."

nama: Ndenaye Ju sénko ár norayayénd, "Fá norayai yénd yau so wéngém kétán fá ándan yéngém. Némé yéné sioene fifi yém, fáyo so násmete?"
english: Then the Ju head men said, "He says we cannot go there where he is going. What this talk's meaning is, he will kill himself?"

nama: Yémofem yémotayénd fá, "Efe fém ném?"
english: They asked him, "Who are you?

nama: Tane em tárfár mogh féfefaf, árkéménayam so tákmangé kértat. Wénde emo yénd wénmáfáretam fá siyém efalo, a yéndon yaufrotan mband maratoe yénaro némé yéndon náyárayén yá tambén."
english: I have many judgement to you.p, which will put punishment. But who sent me he is true, and I tell to the world only that what I heard from him."

nama: Tárfár ár efe náyárayénd Yesu korayau yénémamén efalo yiyátoyénd fá. Efaloyam so yuwek kényátongé
english: Many people who heard Yesu say this reason they truly approved(believed) in him. The truth will make you free

nama: Yesum ár emndai efe ndimbal mwighafé em yáfaf, "Fém njam námyotati tane watamegh sifaf, fém efalo tane waitogh ár so em; 32 fém mat so em efalo, a efaloyam so yuwek táyátongé."
english: Yesu said to the people who is with big mind(faith) to him, "If you obey to my teaching talk, you will be true my following men; 32 you.p will know the truth, and the truth will make you free."

nama: Fá néwangoyénd yáfaf, "Yénd siéném Ebraamene ákiambum, a yénd yau ténmorwén ámb ároene faiofnar ásáfogh ár. Ndernáye wét yém ndené fém kés noraye, 'Fém so káyátongi yuwek'?"
english: They answered to him, "We are Ebraam's descendant, and we have never been anyone's without.payment working men(servants). How can you say that, 'You will become free'?"

nama: Fá nowangoyénd yáfaf, "Téfene afé siyém Ebraam!"
english: They aswered him, "Our father is Ebraam!"

nama: Yéndon némé méinyotio tawafrotan yéndon efalo ewaufrotan féfe némé kénáyáretan Ngánjánta, wénde ngiot wérametati yénd. Ebraamém némé yau ndené tawafrotau! 41 Wénde fémofem ewafrotati némé féferafam tawafrotau. Fá nowangoyénd, "Ngánjánro siyém téfene Afé, a yénd siéném yáne efalo ambumtértér."
english: What all I did [is] I tell you the truth what I heard from God, but you are making to kill me. What Ebraam did not do such a thing! 41 But you.p do what your.p father does. They answered, "Only God is our Father, and we are his true children."

nama: Yesu yémotayénd, "Némé yénd mbarkánd yéném ndené snorayangém nde fém sném Samariamén ár a ndenénde fefaf yaufi mbérmbér yélau!"
english: They asked Yesu, " We are straight what we say that you are a Samaria man and to you a evil spirit came into!"

nama: Yesu norayai, "Tane kénjún ámb yau yaufi mbérmbér yém. Yéndo yutémndan tane Afé, wénde féfene wutmanégh yau yém tafaf. 50 Yéndo yau yéronjan tandio wutmanégh, wénde Ngánjánam so wutémnde yénd. Fá fiyém efalofifi mogh ár. 51 Yéndo emndetan efalo si: emon náyárete tane si fá yaufifi kér so yém."
english: Yesu said, "In me there is no evil spirit. I respect my Father, but your.p respect is not to me. 50 I am not seeking big light(glory) myself, but God is going to big light(glory) me. He is the true judge. 51 I am telling you the truth: who obeys my talk he will never die."

nama: Fá norayayénd yáfaf, "Fém ámb yau 50 yunjéf réran ném, a fémon kés yinjoi Ebraam?"
english: They said to him, “You are not even 50 years old, and you have ever seen Ebraam?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Yéndon emndetan fém efalo, Ebraam náráftam soramayo, Yénd Wém Efe Yénd Wém{u{ ...f* {u{8.58 Yénd Wém Efe Yénd Wém Eksodés 3:14 ."
english: Yesu answered them, “I tell you the truth, before Ebraam was born, I am who I am.”

nama: Féyo yémofem ekafayénd wím yáfaf wighét, wénde Yesu fá nofatoi a yéfrangoi wáwefnogh méngo sifayé.
english: Then they picked up stones to throw at him, but Yesu hid himself and left the worshipping house area.

nama: Njam Yesu téngmorwén, yémon yinjoi ár ghékéf kwéfkwéf kétándmayo áráfégh. 2 Yánjo waitogh árém yémotayénd Yesu, "Watamegh ár, endene yaufiyam yéméindai ghékéf kwéfkwéfot ndené fá kés náráftam? Yánjo yaufiyamam yéméindai o yárefafene yaufiyamam?"
english: When Yesu he went, he saw him man blind from birth. 2 His following men asked Yesu, "Teacher, whose sin led to blind as he was born? His sin led or of his parent sins?"

nama: Yáne kaka fútaréf a emofem té túmén téfandawét fá ómnengéghan namotayénd, "Yéné ár yém efe kámnjongai a kémnendau. Efalo fété yém? 9 Ámb korayawét, "Fá fété yém." Ámb korayawét, "Yau, fá yau; fá mé yanitro nérete." Wénde fá fáyo norayai, "Yénd féu wém yéné ár."
english: His close friends/neighbors and [those] who had always seen him in begging asked, "This is a man who sat and begged. Is it true? 9 Some said, "Surely he is." Others said, "No, he is not; he just looks like him." But he himself said, "I am that man."

nama: Yémofem yémotayénd, "Ndernáye wét fene ghékéf nasawéryénd?"
english: They asked him, "How were your eyes opened?"

nama: Yémon ewawangoi, "Yéné ár yétkwén Yesu, yémon yafrotam ngénd a wasénam tane ghékéf a wémndai yénd kétán álighét Siloamét umbarghét. Yénd wéngmormén, a njamandio numbnamén, yéndon fandagh ewafngoyén.
english: He answered them, "That man name Yesu, he made mud and put it on my eyes and told me to walk to Siloam to forget. I went, and as soon as I washed, I start seeing."

nama: Yémofem yémotayénd fá, "Ánde yém yéné ár?" Fá norayai, "Yénd yau mat wém." Farasi árém namotawét némé kufrotawét ghékéf kwéfkwéfefaf
english: They asked him, "Where is this man?" He said, "I don't know." Farasi men ask about what happened to the blind man

nama: Ámb Farasi norayayénd. "Yéné ár yau yéném Ngánjáneta, ménamén yémon yau yutémnde Safat nák." Wénde ámb namotayénd, "Ndernáye so yaufi árom yafrote ndené ufarogh yam?" Féyo fá fété mwighan afalogh nufngoyénd.
english: Some Farasi men said. "This man cannot come from God, because he does not respect/keep Sabbath's law." But other people asked, "How can sinner do like this surprising thing?" Then they began to divide of thought .

nama: Féyo Farasi árém yémotayénd yéné ár wéikor, "Némé fém norayai ámb yánemén ménamén yémo esawéryéng fene ghékéf?" Yéné árom ewawangoi, "Fá siyém Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár."
english: Then Farasi men asked the man again, "What do you say anything about him because he opened your eyes?" This man answered them, "He is a God's man who make know(prophet)."

nama: Wénde yéné Ju árém mé so yau efalo tiyátotawét ndené fá témorwén ghékéf kwéfkwéf a té néretai fandaghét, kétánotio yémofem emotayénd yáne yárefaf 19 a namotayénd, "Fété yéné féfene ambum yém? Fété yém fá fém snorayet ndené náráftam ghékéf kwéfkwéf? Ndernáye sénonjo efande?"
english: But this Ju people people will not stoll truly approve(believe) that he was blind and had received for seeing, until they called his parents 19 and asked them, "Is this your.d son? Is this the one you.d say was born blind? How can he see now?"

nama: Féyo limánégh téfnár norayayénd yéné ároefaf efe ghékéf kwéfkwéf témorwén. Yémofem yémndayénd fá, 'Ngánjánene sáfrére, unyéghofnar si koraya ndené fém so noraye mé efalo yamménro. Yénd mat yéném yéné ár yaufi ár.'
english: So the head men again spoke to the man who had been blind. They said to him, ‘In front of God, without.lying talk(promise) that you will speak only true things. We know that this man is a sinner.’

nama: Yémon ewawangoi, "Yénd yau mat wém fá yaufiyam ár yém o yau. Ámbiro yam yénd mat wém: yénd kwénmorwén ghékéf kwéfkwéf wénde sénonjo yéndon efandan!"
english: He answered them, "I don't know he is sinner or not. One thing I know: I was blind but now I see!"

nama: Féyo yémofem yémotayénd fá, "Némé yémon tafrote fefaf? Ndernáye yémon némasawér fene ghékéf?"
english: Then they asked him, "What did he do to you? How did he open your eyes?"

nama: Yémon nuwangoi, "Yéndon té ewaufron fronde a fémofem yau náyárangi. Némat fém ménde em sái káyárangi kor? Té fém wéi ménde em sái kénamndangi yáne waitogh árot?"
english: He answered, "I had told you before and you did not listen. Why do you want to hear again? Do you also want to become his following men?"

nama: Féyo yémofem sotafé si tawitawét yáfaf, a norayayénd, "Fém fai yéné ároene waitogh ár ném! Yénd siéném Mosesene waitogh ár! 29 Yénd mat yéném Ngánján korayau Mosesefaf, wénde yéné ároenemén, yénd yaufifi mat yéném árkandmé fá yénmormén."
english: Then they insulted at him, and said, "You are that this man's following man! We are Moses' following men! 29 We know God spoke to Moses, but about this man, we don't know from where he comes!"

nama: Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Fém náráftam a nanotam yaufi kénjún. Fémon yau so yénmatamete yénd!" Féyo yémofem yutoryénd. Mbérmbére ghékéf kwéfkwéf
english: They answered him, "You were born and grew up in evil. You cannot teach us anything!" Then they drive him out. Spiritual blindness

nama: Yesu náyárai ndené yémofem té yitrongi fá, a njam yinjoi yéné ár, Yesum yémndai, "Té fémon yiyátote Ároene Ambum?"
english: Yesu heard that they had cast him out, and when he found this man, Yesu said to him, "Do you truly approve(believe) the Son of Man?"

nama: Yéné árom yawangoi, "Efe yém fá, ndimbal? Ta kwaufro ménát yéndon so efalo tiyátongén fá."
english: This man answered him, "Who is he, bigman? Tell me so that I can truly approve(believe) him."

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Fémon té téfande fá, a fá yéné féyém emofé fém norayet sénonjo."
english: Yesu answered him, "You have seen him, and he is the one who is talking with you now."

nama: Féyo yéné árom yawangoi, "Yuré, yéndon efalo niyátotan sénonjo," a budme niyai yá sáfrére.
english: Then this man answered him, "Lord, I truly approve(believe) now," and knelt down before Yesu.

nama: Yesu norayai, "Yénd kwéném yéné mbandot ménát moghét, ménát ghékéf kwéfkwéf árém so efandat a fá emofem efandat so káyátongi ghékéf kwéfkwéf."
english: Yesu said, "I came to this world to judge, so that the blind men will/may see and those who see will/may become blind."

nama: Ámb Farasi ár efe tamorwén yémafé yiyárayénd fá snorayai yéné a namotayénd, "Némé fété yénd ghékéf kwéfkwéf yéném ndenáyo?"
english: Some Farasi men who were with them hear him say this and asked, "Are we blind too?"

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, "Njam fém tamorwén ghékéf kwéfkwéf, fém yau so tékmangé kértayan yaufimén, wénde fém mé norayati ndené fémofem fété efandati, féfene kérté mé so yém."
english: Yesu answered them, "If you were blind, you.p would not put punishment about sin, but you.p still say that you still see, your punishment still is."

nama: Yesum tawaufrotau yéné rengerenge si, wénde yémofem yau térsawét némé yémo korayau. Yesu mer sif wanjengégh ár
english: Yesu told them this parable, but they did not carry/understand what he said. Yesu the good watching man

nama: Wéikor mé kété mwighan afalogh témorwén Ju árfé ménamén yéné simén. 20 Tárfár ndené wéi korayawét, "Fá siyém yaufi mbérmbérafé yém! Fá siyém onon! Némat fémofem yiyáretati fá?"
english: Again there was a division of thought among Ju people because of these talks. 20 Many people said like that again, "He is with a evil spirit(evil spirit possessed)! He is a crazy! Why you.pl listen to him?"

nama: Wénde ámb korayawét, "Mato ár wét sái yaufi mbérmbérafé yém yau ndené so noraye! Ndernáye yaufi mbérmbéram so mer tayátongé ghékéf kwéfkwéf ár?" Yesu té yékenayénd
english: But other people said, "You.p must know the man with a evil spirit could not talk like this! How could a evil spirit can make blind people good?" They rejeted Yesu

nama: Wéi Ju árém kor ekafayénd wím ménát Yesue laighét. 32 Yesum emndai fá, "Yéndon tawafrotan tárfár meryam féfene sáfrére árké Afam enramai wafroghét; árké ásáfoghmén wíme so wafiyátotati?"
english: The Ju people again picked up stones to throw Yesu. 32 Yesu said to them, "I did many good things in your presence which the Father gave me to do; for which work are you.p going to stone me?"

nama: Fá nowangoyénd, "Yau yénd ménde yéném yéndfem wíme sái nénamndam ménamén méinyotio mer wafroghyammén, wénde ménamén fene wutmanghofnar si! Fém ném ár fifi, wénde fémyo náyátote nde Ngánján kar ném!"
english: They answered, "[It is] not we are going to stone because of all of good things/deeds, but because of your without respecting talk(blasphemy)! You are only a body(man), but you yourself claim to be God!"

nama: Wéikor Yesu yéta yerayénd, wénde Yesu néngfénmai yéfene ngángata.
english: Again they tried to seize Yesu, but Yesu escaped from their hands.

nama: A Yesu wéikor néférmai Joden wanje kétán Joném ár ánde tawalitotau, a kété témorangérwén. 41 Tárfár ár tanmorwén yáfaf a korayawét yéfenjo kénjúnro, "Joném ámb ufarogh yam yau ewafrotam, wénde méinyotio yammén té korayau yéné ároenemén siyém efalo." 42 Tárfár árém kété efalo yiyátoyénd Yesu.
english: And Yesu crossed the Joden again river to where Jon baptized, and there he stayed. 41 Many people came to him and said to each other, "Jon never did a special workings(miracles), but everything he had said about this man is true." 42 Many people there truly approved(believed) in him.

nama: Njam fá náyárai yéné, Yesu norayai, "Yéné enjne siyém yau ménát krot. Yau, yéné siyém Ngánjánene ndimbal kwayaghat yém ménát Ngánjánene Ambum so yéngwiotat yéné kénjúmé."
english: When he heard this, Yesu said, "This sickness will not to be death. No, it is for God's big light(glory) so that God's Son will be lifted through this. 5 Yesu loved Mata and her little sister and Lajarus. 6 But when he heard that Lajarus was sick, he still stayed that place for two more days. 7 Then he said to his following men, "Let us go back to Judia."

nama: Fá korayangi, "Watamegh ár, tekofnar efghon kété Ju árém fém wíme wafiyátoghét némafngoyénd a wéi kétán fém nangote?"
english: They said, "Teacher, on short time ago there the Ju people tried to stone you and again to [there] you are going back?"

nama: Yánjo waitogh árém yawangoyénd, "Yuré, fá njam kémégh yékém, fá so mer káyátongé." 13 Yesu korayau yáne kérmén, wénde yáne waitogh ár kéma kemnawét fifie kéméghmén kar korayau.
english: His following men answered him, "Lord, if he is sleeping, he will become good." 13 Yesu spoke of his death, but his following men thought an idea about bodily(natural) sleep he might speak.

nama: Yénémamén yémon kor ewaufroi mbarkándaye, "Lajarus fété kér tém, 15 a féfe téfnan yénd áuwéghan wém yénd yau kété kés kwém, ménát fémofem so efalo tiyátongi. Wénde so kuwanongém yénd yáfaf."
english: That's why he told them again straightly, "Lajarus has died, 15 and for your.pl reason(sake) I am in happiness I was not there, in order that you may truly approve(believe). But let us go to him."

nama: Féyo Tomas efe yémndetat Didimas fá korayangé ámb waitogh árfefaf, "Yénd so kuwanongém, yénd wéi yémafé Yesufé kér so yéném." Yesu siyém anogh a ghérsé
english: Then Tomas who is called Didimas he said to the other discipes, "We will go, we may die with him Yesu." Yesu is the ressurection and the life

nama: Mata norayai Yesuefaf, "Yuré, fém yéna njam kénmorangérwén tane ghakér yau so kér témorwén. 22 Wénde yénd mat wém ndené sénonjo Ngánjánam so kémaramangé fém némat kómnenda."
english: Mata said to Yesu, "Lord, if you were here my brother would not have died. 22 But I know that now God will give you what you ask."

nama: Yesum korayangé yáfaf, "Fene ghakér wéi so kanongé."
english: Yesu said to him/her, "Your brother will rise again." 24 Mata answered him, "I know he will rise again on the last day." 25 Yesu said to him/her, "I am the rising and the life. For him who truly approves(believes) in me will be alive even though he potentially died, 26 and whoever lives and truly approves(believes) in me he will not die. Do you truly approve(believe) this?"

nama: Matam yawangoi, "Néméwét, Yuré, yéndo efalo niyátotan ndené fém ném Keriso, Ngánjánene ambum, efe té yénmorwén yéné mband maratot.
english: Mata answered him, "Yes, Lord, I truly approve(believe) you that you are Keriso, God's Son, who has come to this world.

nama: Yéné soramé fá njam norayai yéné, fá nénangoi a yéngmotayéng yánngén Meri téndot a korayangé, "Watamegh ár yéna yém a fém nénémndete."
english: After this when she said this, he went back and called her small sister Meri outside and said, "Teacher is here and he is calling you."

nama: Njam Meri yéné sifayé nufaryéng ánde Yesu témorwén a yinjoi fá, fá nuyai yáne kafkafot a korayangé, "Yuré, fém yéna njam kénmorangérwén, tane ghakér yau so kér témorwén."
english: When Meri arrived this place where Yesu was and found him, she fell to his feet and said, "Lord, if you were here, my brother would not die."

nama: Njam Yesum yinjoi fá yeyan, a Ju ár yémafé efe enmormén fá wéi ndenéyameyo kendawét, Yesu kénjkam ghérghérsisayam yifoi tikfan. 34 Yémo emotai, "Ánde fémofem mband yaramayénd?" Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Kénaf a téfanda, Yuré."
english: When Yesu saw her weeping, and Ju people who came with her they also in the same way weeping, he felt deep sadness in the heart. 34 He asked them, "Where have you make land(buried him)?" They answered him, "Come and see, Lord."

nama: Yesu ye nufngoi. 36 Féyo Ju ár norayayénd, "Téfandangi nderé uwégh tuwete fá!"
english: Yesu started crying. 36 Then Ju people said, "See how much he loved him!"

nama: Wénde ámb korayawét, "Yémo ghékéf kwéfkwéf ár mer táyátote. Némamén yau Lajarus yanjaryéng kérta?" Yesum yanoi Lajarus kétándmé kérta
english: But other people were saying, "He made the blind become good. Why he not protect Lajarus from dying?" Yesu raised Lajarus from the dead

nama: Yesu kénjkam ghérghérsisayam yifoi tikfan, nénaflai mbéwéfaf. Yékw témorwén a wím yéfayoyénd sésafnen. 39 Fá korayangé, "Titrembongi yéné wím." Mata, kér téfnárane mérés norayai, "Yuré, sénonjo yaufi wim so yém, ménamén fá té náyáto 4 efogh."
english: Yesu felt deep sadness in the heart, came to the grave. It was a hole and stone covered on the door. 39 He said, "Take this stone away." Mata dead person's sister said, "Lord, now bad smell will be, because he has been 4 days."

nama: Wénde Yesu norayai, "Yéndon ewaufrotamén fémon so yéfande Ngánjánene ndimbal kwayaghé njam fémon efalo tiyáto."
english: But Yesu said, "What I told you [that] you will see God's strong light(big light) if you truly approve(believe)."

nama: Yénémamén yémofem yitrémboyénd wím. Féyo Yesu néwewoi tukét a korayangé, "Afé, yéndon kánjo némarametan fémon yénd té wiyáré. 42 Yénd mat wém ndené fémon túmén wiyárete yénd, wénde yénd yéné néngorayan árfe téfnan swakai yéna, ménát yémofem so efalo yiyátotat ndené fémon yénd wénmáfáretam."
english: This is why they took the stone away. Then Yesu looked up and said, "Father, I give thanks you have heard me. 42 I know that you always hear me, but I am saying this for the people are standing here, so that they may truly approve(believe) that you sent me."

nama: Njam fá norayai yéné, Yesu nutnai ndimbal keye, "Lajarus, kéntor!" 44 Kér téfnár néntoryéng, yáne ngángé a kafkaf mbéwé sáláme fiyaréghkaf tamorwén a sáláme umbéghkaf sénkoyamé warengéghare. Yesu norayai yéfefaf, "Tafenangi mbéwé sáláme a tumyongi álighét." Kwankwane mwighé wafrogh Yesue ngiot
english: When he said this, Yesu shouted with a loud voice, "Lajarus, come out!" 44 Dead person came out, his hands and feet were wrapped with grave clothes and with clothes tied around the head. Yesu said to them, "Untie grave clothes and let him walk." The secret thought made(plan) to kill Yesu

nama: Yénémamén tárfár Ju ár efe té enmormén yafoghét Meriefaf, a wéi tafandawét némé Yesum tawafrotau, efalo yiyátoyénd fá. 46 Wénde ámb ár engmormén Farasi árfefaf a tawaufrotawét némé Yesum tawafrotau. 47 Féyo limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a Farasi árém yanmoyénd Ju sénko árfene áumengégh.
english: For this many Ju people who had came to visit Meri, and had seen what Yesu did, truly approved(believed) in him. 46 But some people went to Farasi men and told them what Yesu did. 47 Then the leading sacrifice burning people(high priests) and Farasi men called a Ju head men' gathering(meeting).

nama: Yéndfem njam mé yéngéumyotam engwafrota yéné yam, méinyotio árém fá so efalo yiyátotat, a wéi Rom ár so eném ewasérmbotat téfene wáwefnogh méngo a téfene yu."
english: If we continue let him to do this things, all the people will truly approve(believe) him, and then Rom people will come destroy our worshipping house and our place(nation)

nama: Ámb ár yétkwén Kayafas, efe témorwén limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár yéné yunjéfan, norayai yéfefaf, "Fém mafina em yénémén! 50 Fém mat yau em ndené ámbiro ár sái kér yém árét, ménaye ndené yau so méinyotio Ju ár nawaghne."
english: A man name Kayafas, who was leading burning sacrifice men in that year, said to them, "You don't know about it! 50 You don't know that it is good for one man to die for the people, by that all Ju people will not be destroyed."

nama: Yesu yénémamén kor yau marataye tiotau Ju árfefafmé. Wénde fá naweghai a nuwanoi kétán tesen yétkwén Efaraim, árké témorwén fanfne yu kaka, ánde fá tamorangérwén yánjo waitogh árfé.
english: Because of this Yesu didn't openly walk among Ju people. But he retreated and went to town name Efaraim, which close to the desert, where they stayed with his following men.

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Téfrangongi fá yambiayo! Yémon té tamnde yéné mer wimafé wékwér yéné efghot tane mband raméghfaf. 8 Fém túmén so em yauyau árfé, wénde yénd yau kor so wém féfefaf."
english: Yesu answered him, "Leave her alone! She keep this special smelling liquid for the day of my making land(burial). 8 You always will be with the poor, but I will not always be with you."

nama: Yénamayo efghon ndimbal ár mérén efe té enmormén Waingégh témndot náyárayénd nde Yesu yéném Jerusalemét. 13 Yémofem tangérsawét nginar árau, a néngwanoyénd yá wanfégh, ngutnawét, "Áuwégh Ngánjáne! Frengéghkaf fá yém efe yéném Yurane yétkwénan! Frengéghkaf yém warsagh ár Israilmén!"
english: The next day the large crowd who had come for Passover festival heard that Yesu was coming to Jerusalem. 13 They took palm leaves, and went out to meet him, shouting, "Praise to God! Blessed is he who comes in the name of the Lord! Blessed is the ruling man(king) of Israil!"

nama: Yesum tinjongé totér ndonki a nafayoi kété, ndené fété Buk si kés yéfarotaménd,
english: Yesu found a young donkey and sat on there, as the Buk(scripture)s were written,

nama: "Yau férfér em, ndimbal yu Jaion{v{ ...f* {v{12.15 Jaion Yéné siyém Jerusalem ! kéretangi, féfene warsagh ár yéném, yénfayong totér ndonki tukén."{w{ ...f* {w{12.15 Jekaria 9:9
english: "Don't be afraid, big place(city) of Jaion{q{ ...f* {q{12.15 Jaion This is Jerusalem ! See, your.p the ruling man(king) is coming, is sitting on the young donkey."

nama: Yesuene waitogh ár yau mat náyátoyénd méinyotio yénémamén yéné efghon. Wénde fá mat náyátoyénd soramé Yesu témorwén ndimbal kwayaghafé. Féyo fá mat táf náyátoyénd ndené ámb árom té efarotam yéné yammén Bukan.
english: Yesu's following men did not understand all this at that time. They understood only after Yesu was with big light(glory). Then they remembered that someone had written these things about him in the Bible.

nama: Ámb Grikmén ár kété tamorwén yéfe kénjún efe engmormén wáwefnoghét téméndfaf. 21 Fá enmormén Filifefaf, efe témorwén kétamamén Betsaida Galili yuwon, fá norayayénd, "Ndimbal, yénd ménde yéném sái tinjongém Yesu." 22 Filif yéngmormén taufrongé Endrue, Endru a Filif nénwaneyayénd tauférend Yesue.
english: Some Grik people were there among those who went to worship at the feast. 21 They came to Filif, who was from Betsaida in Galili region, they said to him, "Bigman, we want to see Yesu." 22 Filif went and told Endru, Endru and Filif came.dual, told.dual Yesu.

nama: Sénonjo tane tikéf uwérsoghan yém, a némé so yénd norayan? Afé, kwanjar yénd yéné efoghta? Yau, mé yéné téfnan yénd wénmormén yéné efghot. 28 Afé, yuyota fenjo yétkwén!"
english: Now my heart is in trouble, and what will I say? Father, save me from this day. No, for this reason I came for this day. 28 Father, lift up(glorified) your name!"

nama: Ár mérén kété efe tamorwén, náyáretaménd a norayayénd ndené aruruke tém; ámb norayayénd njafar si résagh árom séno yénémndete fá.
english: The crowd that was there, heard and said that it was a thunder; other people said a man carrying heavenly message must have spoken to him.

nama: Ár mérén norayayénd, "Yénd té náyárayém Buk sita ndené Keriso so nakete tuot. Némamén fém noraye Ároene Ambum fété so yuyotat? Efe yém yéné Ároene Ambum?"
english: The crowd said, "We had heard from the Scripture that Keriso will live forever. Why do you say they will lift the Son of Man up? Who is this Son of Man?"

nama: Yéné téfnan yémofem yau efalo yiyátoyénd, ménamén Aisayam wéi té korayau:
english: For this reason they did not truly approve(believe) him because Aisaya had also said:

nama: "Yuram kwéfkwéf eyátoi yéfene ghékéf a tikéf táikér wéi ndenáyo, ménát fá yau so néretat yéfenjo ghékfe, yau so mat náyátotat yéfenjo tikfan, yau so nawengotat a yéndon sái mer eyátotan fá."
english: "The Lord made their eyes blinded and hardened their heart again like that, in order that they will not see with their eyes, will not know in their hearts, will not turn and I would make them good."

nama: Aisaya norayai yéné ménamén yémon yinjoi Yesuene ndimbal kwayaghé a korayau yánemén.
english: Aisaya said this because he saw Yesu's strong light(big light) and spoke of him.

nama: Wénde sénko ár kénjún tárfáram efalo yiyátoyénd Yesu. Wénde ménamén Farasi árfenemén yau yémofem kafrotawét yéfenjo ndimbal mwighamén férfér téfnan ménamén mété táf tautonawét áumengégh méngota, 43 ménamén yémofem áuwégh térsawét árta mindefifi yau Ngánjáneta.
english: But many head men truly approved(believed) in Yesu. But because of Farasi men they did not report about their big mind(faith) for fear because they take them out from the meeting house(meeting house), 43 because they took praise from men so much not from God.

nama: Yesu norayai marat kéme, "Njam árom efalo kwiyátongé yénd, yémon yau yéndro efalo wiyátote, wénde fá wéi emon yénd wénmáfáretam. 45 Njam emo wefanda yénd, yémo yéfande fá emo yénd wénmáfáretam. 46 Yénd té wénmormén kwayaghé yéné mbandot, ménát emo njam efalo wiyátota fá yau so yém kwéfitayan.
english: Yesu said with an loud voices, "When a man truly approves(believes) in me, he does not truly approve(believe) only me, but he also truly approve(believe) who sent me. 45 When he looks at me, he sees him who sent me. 46 I have came [as]a light to this world, so that whoever truly approves(believes) in me he will not be in the darkness.

nama: Kaka témorwén Waingégh téménd. Yesu mat náyátoi ndené efogh té nawer yáyot yéné mband marat frangoghét a angoghét Yárefaf. Yémon tauwetau yánjo waitogh ár yéné mband maratan, yémon tauwetau fá mindefifi kétánotio yatoghfaf.
english: The passover feast was close. Yesu knew that the day has come for him to leave this world and to go back to his Father. He loved his followers in this world, he loved them very much to the end.

nama: Fá yénmormén Saimon Fitafaf, emo yémndai fá, "Yuré, fémon tane kafkaf so waumbne? Yénd yau ménde wém"
english: He came to Saimon Fitè, who told him, "Lord, do you wash my feet? I don't want."

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Sénonjo fémon yau yáyamngo yéndo némé yafrotan, wénde soramé fém mat so káyáto."
english: Yesu answered him, "Now you do not know what I am doing, but later you will know"

nama: Fité norayai, "Yau, fémon yaufifi so waumbne tane kafkaf, yau sénonjo o tuot!" Yesum yawangoi, "Yéndon yau njam némaumbnan fene kafkaf, fém tane waitogh ár yau so ném."
english: Fitè said, "Never, you will not wash my feet not now or forever." Yesu answered him, "If I do not wash your feet, you will not be my follower."

nama: Saimon Fitam yawangoi, "Féyo, Yuré, yau mé tane kafkafro wénde tane ngángé a tane sénko ndenéyameyo."
english: Saimon Fitè answered him, "Then, Lord, not only my feet but my hands and my head like that."

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Efe té kumbnat mé yéfene kafkafro umbarghét em; yéfene méinyotio fifi siyém njúnnjúnofnar. Fém njúnnjúnofnar em wénde yau fém méinyotio." 11 Fá norayai ndené ménamén fá mat náyátoi emo so sén téramangai fá, a yéné téfnan fá norayai méinyotio njúnnjúnofnar tamorwén wénde ámbiro yau.
english: Yesu answered him, "Those who had been washed only their feet need to be washed; their whole body is without dirt(clean). You are clean but not all of you." 11 Hhe said that because he knew who would give teeth(betray) him, and for this reason he said all people were clean but not one.

nama: Yénd yau norayan méinyotio féfenemén, yénd mat wém efe yéndon ekafayén. Wénde yéné ménát yém Buk si efalo sái káyátongé, 'Fá emafé tane féskaf flawé feném, fá yém tane sén téfnár.'
english: I am not talk about all of you.p, I know whom I have chosen. But in order to become true this Scripture, 'He who eats my food, he is my man who give teeth(betrayer).'

nama: Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe sénonjo frondeyo soramé nufrota, ménát njam nufrota, fémofem so efalo kwiyátongi ndené Yénd yéné fwém efe Yénd wém. 20 Yéndon féfe ewaufrotan efalo: emon njam tumyongé ár efe yéndon yéngwáfáretan kumyongé yénd; a emo njam kumyongé yénd tumyongé fá emo yénd wénmáfáretam."
english: I am telling you.p now before it happens, in order that when it happens, you will truly approve(believe) me that I am who I am. 20 I tell you the truth: whoever receives a man who I send receives me; and whoever receives me receives him who sent me."

nama: Soramé Yesu njam norayai yéné si, fá mbérmbéran nawayamngoi a norayai yánjo waitogh árfefaf, "Yéndon féfe ewaufrotan efalo, ámb féfene árom sén so kwéramangé."
english: After when Yesu said this talk, he was trubled in sprit and said to his followers, "I tell you the truth, one of your man will give teeth(betray) me."

nama: Yáne waitogh ár afandagh nufngoyénd fáro fáro, ménamén fá mafina tamorwén efe Yesum tésérmbnau. 23 Ámb yánjo waitogh ár efe Yesum tuwetau témorangérwén Yesue kaka. 24 Saimon Fitam ngángaye yaunyai a norayai yéné waitogh ároefaf, "Témota fá árké ár yémon yésérmbne?"
english: His following men started looking at each other, because they did not know whom Yesu spoke. 23 One of his follower whom Yesu loved was close to Yesu. 24 Saimon Fitè motioned with hands and said to this follower, "Ask him which man do he speak?"

nama: Féyo yéné waitogh ár néngamghai Yesuefaf, yémon yémndai Yesu, "Yuré, efe yéné ár yém?"
english: Then this following man leaned to Yesu, he told Yesu, "Lord, who is this man?"

nama: Tane ambumtértér, yénd fémafé so yéna yéném tekofnaye. Fémofem so wéronjati, a sénonjo yéndon emndetan fém, némé yéndon tamndetan Ju ár: Ándan yénd wiota, fém kétán yau so eyota.
english: My children, I will be here with you for a while. You.p will seek me, and I tell you what I told the Ju people: Where I am going, you cannot go there.

nama: Totér nák ewaraman féfe, euwetati ámb ár, ndené fété yéndon euwetamén fém, yénémamén fém náuwetati fémro fémro. 35 Yénayan méinyotio ár mat so kamndangi ndené fém sem tane waitogh ár, fém njam náuwetati fémro fémro.
english: The new law/command I give you, love other people, just as I love you, therefore you love each other. 35 In this all people will know that you are my followers, if you love each other.

nama: Saimon Fitam yémotai fá, "Yuré, fém ándan niota?" Yesum yawangoi, "Ándan yénd wiote, fémo yau so kwénmaito sénonjo, wénde soramé so néngwaitote."
english: Saimon Fitè asked him, "Lord, where are you going?" Yesu answered him, "Where I am going, you cannot follow me today, but later you will follow."

nama: Fitam yémotai, "Yuré, némamén yéndon yau so néngmaitotan fém sénonjo? Yénd afrengéghkaf wém feyot kérot."
english: Fitè asked him, "Lord, why I cannot follow you now? I'm ready to die for you."

nama: Wénde Yesum yawangoi, "Fém so efalo tayot kér ném? Efaloe yéndo némndetan fe, fémon yénd fronde so kwékenang nambinotmé, soramé ghakér kowi kutnangé!"
english: But Yesu answered him, "You really will die for me? With true I tell you, firstly you will deny me three times, later the chicken will shout!"

nama: Tomasém yémndai fá, "Yuré, yénd mafina yéném ándan fém nuwanote, ndernáye yénd mat so yéném end?"
english: Thomas said to him, "Lord, we don't know where you are going, how can we know the way?"

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Yénd wém end a efalo a ghérsé. Yau tayofnaye ámb ár so yéngém Afafaf, mé ta kénjúmaro. 7 Njam fémofem yénd té wayamngoyénd, fémofem ndenéyameyo so tayamngongi tane Afé. Yénamé sénonjo fém mat em fá a té yinjongi."
english: Yesu answered him, "I am the way and the truth and the life. Without me no one can go to the Father, only through me. 7 If you have known me, you will know in the same way my Father. From now you know him and have seen him."

nama: Filif norayai, "Yuré, téfeyot ténmauyafo Afé a yénd yénanotro ménde yéném."
english: Filif said, "Lord, show us the Father and only this we want."

nama: Judas (yau Judas Iskariot) norayai, "Yuré, fém fémyo némamén so nauyafote téfefafro wénde yau mband maratfaf?"
english: Judas(not Judas Iskariot) said, "Lord, why will you show yourself only to us but not to the world?"

nama: Njam Wáutárégh ár yéném, efe yéndon so yénmáfáretan kétamé Afata, Efaloene Njánján Mbérmbér efe so yéném Afata, fá so néngafrote tanemén. 27 Fém wéi ndenéyameyo so néngafrotati tanemén, ménamén yéndfé fém té téném rényéghta.
english: When the Helper comes, whom I will send to you.p from the Father, God Spirit of truth who will come form the Father, he will report(testify) about me. 27 You.p also in the same way must report about me, because you.p have been with me from the beginning.

nama: Soramé Yesu norayai yéné, fá néretai njafarot a norayai:
english: After Yesu said this, he looked up to the sky/heaven and said:

nama: "Afé! Yénd ménde wém fá efe waramai ta so em yéndfé kété yénd ánde wém, a so yéfandat tane ndimbal kwayaghé, yéné ndimbal kwayaghé fémon árké té waramai ménamén fémon yénd uwetam, soramé yu yafrotam.
english: Father! I want those whom you gave me will be with me there where I am, and they will see my big light(glory), this big light(glory) which you have given me because you loved me, before the world was made.

nama: Njam yémon yifoi Ngánjánafé orayégh, Yesuf nuwanoyénd yánjo waitogh árfé kéférmetawét Kidron tétkafe. Kétamé karfan témorwén olif wén ndaufaf, fá a yánjo waitogh ár engmormén kétán.
english: When he finished talking with God, Yesu went with his followers going across Kidron creek. In the other side was a olif treegarden, he and his followers went there.

nama: Yesu, mat témorwén méinyotio némé so kufrotau yáfaf, néngaflai a emotai fá, "Efe fémofem yénronjati?"
english: Yesu, knowing all what was going to happen to him, went up and asked them, "Who are you.p looking for?"

nama: Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Yesu Najaretmén." Yesu norayai, "Yénd féu Wém."
english: They answered him, "Yesu of Najaret." Yesu said, "I Am."

nama: Táf njam Yesu norayai, "Ndené Yénd fété Wém," fá táf kwémbkwémbe nangoyénd a nuyáyénd mbandot.
english: When Yesu said, "(That) I Am," they moved back and fell down to the ground.

nama: Wéikor Yesum emotai, "Efe fémofem yénronjati?
english: Again Yesu asked them, "Who are you looking for?"

nama: Saimon Fité a ámb yánjo waitogh ár yéngwaiteyayénd Yesu. Limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár mat témorwén yéné Yesuene waitogh ároenemén, féyo fá engérmén Yesufé kénjút kétán limánégh ghéngén wárogh ároene méngo sifayat, 16 wénde Fité mé takayongérwén téndon sésafnefaf, wénde ámb Yesuene waitogh ár efe limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár mat témorwén, fá nénangoi, témndangé mérés efe témorwén sésafne wanjengégh ár, a yényawai Fité kénjút.
english: Saimon Fitè and another follower followed.dual Yesu. This leading burning sacrifice men knew this Yesu's following man, so he went with Yesu into leading burning sacrifice men's house yard, 16 but Fitè still waited outside at the door, but the other Yesu's following man who the leading burning sacrifice man knew, he came back, told the girl who was the door keeper, and brought Fitè in.

nama: Mérés efe témorwén sésafnefaf yémon yémotai Fité, "Fém ámb yéné ném yáne waitogh ár, efalo fété ném?" Wénde Fitam yawangoi, "Yénd yau."
english: The girl who was at the door she asked Fitè, "You are one of his following men, true you are?" But Fitè answered him, "I am not."

nama: Krufér témorwén, faiofnar ásáfogh ár a wáwefnogh méngo wanjengégh ár nokayoyénd fés téndomé árké yétayaménd afaloghét. Fité fá takayogérwén kafalau fés árenjén. Limánégh ghéngén wárogh árom témotau Yesu
english: It was cold, workers and the worshipping house guards stood on the side of the fire which they tried to keep warm. Fitè himself stood warming by the charcoal fire. The leading burning sacrifice men asked Yesu

nama: Yénamayo, limánégh ghéngén wárogh árom yémotai Yesu yánjo waitogh ármén a yánjo watameghmén.
english: Next, the leading burning sacrifice man asked Yesu about his following men and about his teaching.

nama: Njam norayai yéné, ámb wáwefnogh méngo wanjengégh ár efe takayongérwén yá kaka ngángaye yésmai sáfan a norayai, "Fém yau táf noraya limánégh ghéngén wárogh ároe yéné ende."
english: When he said this, one of the worshipping house guard who stood close to him hit him on the face and said, "You should not speak to the leading burning sacrifice man in that way."

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Yénd njam té norayayén mámáfie, mé koraya ánde yém mámáfi. Wénde táf yénd njam té norayayén efaloe, némamén fémon wesem yénd?"
english: Yesu answered him, "If I have said wrongly, just say where is the wrong. But if I have said truly, why did you hit me?"

nama: Féyo Anasém yéngwafnamoi Yesu umbéghkaf Kayafasefaf limánégh ghéngén wárogh ároefaf. Fitam yékenai Yesu wéikor
english: Then Anas sent Yesu bound to Kayafas the leading burning sacrifice man. Fitè's denied again

nama: Njamandio Saimon Fité takayongérwén fésén kafalau, fá yémotayénd, "Fém mété ném ámb yáne waitogh ár." Fá nawanyotai a norayai, "Yénd yau."
english: While Saimon Fitè was standing warming by the fire, they asked him, "You must also be one of his follower." He denied and said, "I am not."

nama: Ámb ghéngén wárogh ároene faiofnar ásáfogh ár, yá mérén endene téngan Fitam yanfai, yémon yémotai fá, "Némé yéndon yau fém ewinjeyayén yémafé kété ndawan?" 27 Wéikor Fité nawanyotayéng, yéné efoghféneféneyan ghakér kowi táf nutnayéng. Yesu Failete sáfrére
english: One of leading burning sacrifice men's without.payment working men(servants), the family of whose ear Fitè cut off, he asked him, "What I did not see.dual you with him there in the garden?" 27 Again Fitè denied, at these time the rooster cried out. Yesu before Failet

nama: Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Fá yau njam témorwén yaufiyam wafrogh ár, yéndfem yau táf so téramangayém féfefaf."
english: They answered him, "If he was not a wrong doer, we would not hand him over to you."

nama: Failet korayangé, "Téngwasrongi fémofemyo a yémotati féfenjo náke."
english: Failet said, "Take him yourselves and ask him by your law. "

nama: Yéné kufrotau ménamén Yesu némé si korayau ndernáye kér so témorwén.
english: This fulfilled what Yesu spoke how he will die.

nama: Failet táf néngangoi méngo kénjút, yanmoi yáfafétio Yesu a témotangé, "Némé fém warsagh ár ném Ju árfene?"
english: Failet went back into the house, called Yesu to himself and asked him, "Are you the ruling man(king) of the Ju people?"

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Némé yéné ámogh si fe tambén yéném, o té ámb árém kafrotat tanemén?"
english: Yesu asked him, "What this asking talk came from you, or did other people report about me?"

nama: Failetém yawangoi, "Yénd yau wém Jumén. Fene áryo a yéfene limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár yémofem nénramangi tafaf. Némé fémon tafrote?"
english: Failet answered him, "I am not a Ju man. Your own people and your chief burning sacrifice men they handed you to me. What did you do?"

nama: Yesu norayai, "Tane limángégh sifayé siyém yéné mband maratmén yau yém. Njam témorwén, tane faiofnar ásáfogh árém so kásmetawét a kwambetawét yénd kétamé Ju árfene weréghta. Wénde sénonjo tane limánégh sifayé siyém ámb yumén yém."
