english: Yesu said, "My reigning place is not of this world. If it was, my without.payment working men(servants) would fight and prevent me from Ju people arrest. But now my reigning place is of another place."

nama: Failet norayai, "Féyo, fém ném warsagh ár, féyotaro?" Yesum yawangoi, "Fém ném mbarkánd ndené kés noraya yénd fété wém warsagh ár. Mbarkándaye, yéné téfnan yénd náráftamén a wénmormén yéné mband maratot sái kafrotawén efalomén. Méinyotio efaloe tambénta ár efe em náyáretat tafaf."
english: Failet said, "So, you are the ruling man(king), really?" Yesu answered him, "You are straight as you say that I am the ruling man(king). Rightly, for this reason I was born came to this world to report about the truth. All those are from the truth listen to me."

nama: Failetém yémotai, "Némé yém efalo?"
english: Failet asked him, "what is truth?"

nama: Wénde yéné siyém féfenjo túmén yam tayot ménát yéndon sái téngutorén féfefaf ámbiro kwéfkwéf méngo ár yéné Ju árfene awafarogh Waingégh efogh. Fém ménde té em yéndon sái tutorén warsagh ár Ju árfene?"
english: But this is your own custom for me in order that I will take out to you.p one darkness house man(prisoner) this Ju people's Passover day. Do you want I am going to take out the ruling man(king) of the Ju people?

nama: Yémofem keye yawangoyénd, "Yau fá, wénde Barabas!" Barabas témorwén usérmbogh téfnár.
english: They answered him loudly, "Not him, but Barabas!" Barabas was a thief.

nama: Njam sénko ghéngén wárogh ár a wáwefnogh méngo wanjengégh árém yinjoyénd Yesu, fá nutnayénd, "Ténamndangi wafatarégh wénan! Ténamndangi wafatarégh wénan!" Wénde Failetém ewawangoi, "Fémofem téngwasrongi a téngwamangi. Ndené tayot, yéndon yau yinjon ámb mámáfi árkémamén fai so tanangé yémon."
english: When the leading sacrifice burning people(high priests) and the worshipping house guards saw Yesu, they shouted, "Nail on the cross! Nail on the cross!" But Failet answered them, "You take him and hang him. As for me, I didn't find any badness which he should get a payment/charge."

nama: Ju ár yawangoyénd, "Téfefaf yéna nák yém, a yéné nákan fá so kér yém, ménamén fá kawarsau ndené fá kar témorwén Ngánjánene Ambum."
english: The Ju people replied, "To us here is a law, and in this law he should die, because he claimed that he was God's Son."

nama: Yesum yawangoi, "Fefaf yau so témorwén yéné wafté ta waingéghét ndemamén kémaramangai fe njafarta. Yénémaménnde fá emo yénd wéram fefaf, yáne yaufiyamam yáinde fene yaufiyam."
english: Yesu answered him, "You would not have this power to overcome me unless he(God) gave them to you.s from heaven. Therefore he who handed me to you, his sin surpasses your sin."

nama: Féyo yénamé Failetém yéta utorghét térametau Yesu, wénde Ju ár ménjtaye mé kutnawét, "Njam fémon téngéumyo yéné ár nguwanongé, fém yau so fútar ném ndimbal warsagh ár Kaisarene. Árké ár efe nawarsat ndené fá sái em warsagh ár yékarotat Kaisar."
english: Then form there Failet tried to make take Yesu out, but the Ju people still continually shouting, "If you let this man go, you will not be a friend of big the ruling man(king) Kaisar! Which people who claim that they are the ruling man(king) oppose Kaisar!"

nama: Wénde fá nutnayénd, "Tésmetangi! Tésmetangi! Ténamndangi wafatarégh wénan!" Failetém emotai, "Némé yéndon so yénamndan féfene warsagh ár wafatarégh wénan? Sénko ghéngén wárogh árém yawangoyénd, "Téfene ámb yau yém warsagh ár wénde Kaisarro!"
english: But they shouted, "Kill him! Kill him! Nail him on the cross!" Failet asked them, "What I will nail the ruling man(king) on the cross?" The leading sacrifice burning people(high priests) answered him, "To us are no other ruling man(king) but only Kaisar!"

nama: Ambinomén Failetém yéngwafamai yéfefaf ménát wafatarégh wénan namghét. Wamégh
english: Finally Failet handed him over to them in order to be nail on the cross. The nailing

nama: Téngérsau yánjo wafatarégh wén, yéné sifayat yémndetat sénko sot sifayé, yéné Ibru árfene sie árké yémndetat Golgota. 18 Kété yémofem yénamndaménd Yesu wafatarégh wénan. Yémofem ekmeyayénd ámb sómbio ár wafatarégh wénan Yesue kaka. Fá tárwén Yesue téndota a Yesu yéfe néndkéfan.
english: He was carrying his own cross, to this place called the Skull, (this is Ibru language which is called "Golgota." 18 There they nailed Yesu on the cross. They put two other men on crosses near to Yesu. They were on each side of him and Yesu was between them.

nama: Failetém ewawangoi, "Némé yéndon téfarotan, yéndon yéné fété téfarotan."
english: Failet answered him, "What I have written, I must have written."

nama: A njam fiyaram yénamndaménd wafatarégh wénan Yesu, yémofem yéfitraryénd sáláme a efaloyénd fo mérne kénjún a ámbiroero nawaftamend fiyaré. Yémofem yéné yafrotaménd a féyo yémofem yanayénd tombé sáláme árkéméné tawongérwén kénjún a yinjoyénd ndené sáláme namofnar témorwén tárfár karfan, wénde yéné yafrotaménd ámbiro karéfta kétamé tuk kétán yu.
english: And when the soldiers nailed Yesu to the cross, they removed the clothes and divided them into four groups and each soldier got one. They did that and then they got the long cloth worn inside and saw that cloth was not sewn from many pieces, but it was done from one piece from the top to the down.

nama: Fá norayayénd yéfe kénjúnro, "Yau so tétirarngém, yénd so nambnam dais kembne a nafandam emo so tanangé." Yéné nufrotam ménát si so efalo káyátongai árké noraye, "Yémofem kawaftawét tane sáláme yéfenjo kénjúnro a dais kembne kambnawét tane sálámeyot."{x{ ...f* {x{19.24 Sams 22:18 Féyo yéné fété fiyaram tafrotawét.
english: They said among themselves, "We will not tear it, we will play dice game and see who will get it." This happened in order that it will become true which says, "They divided my garment among themselves and played dais game for my clothing." So like this the soldiers did.

nama: Yéné soramé, Yesu mat náyátoi ndené yémo té ásáfogh yifo. A ménát sái Buk si efalo káyátongé, fá norayai, "Yénd nuam wéramete." 29 Kété témorwén ghafté wéri nu{y{ ...f* {y{19.29 ghafté wéri nu Mt, Mk, Lk checked it again
english: After this, Yesu knew that he had finished the work. And in order to make the Scripture become true, Yesu said, "I am thirsty." 29 There laid a jar of sour alcohol; then they made a sponge there they soaked it and with a stick of Isof tree lifted it to Yesu lips. 30 When he drank this alcohol, Yesu said, "It is finished!" With that talk he bowed his head and died.

nama: Wénde Meri mé takayongérwén téndo mbéwata ye kendau. Njam mé kendau, fá néngáwefnoi fandaghét mbéwéfaf 12 a ewinjeyai sómbio njafar si résagh ár kafe ngarot sáláme umaneghkaf, tárwén kété Yesuene fifi ánde té tékmangérwén, ámb sénko tambén ámb kafkaf tambén.
english: But Meri still stood outside the tomb crying. When she was still crying, she bent over looked into the tomb 12 and saw two men carrying heavenly message(angels) dressed in white, they.dual were there where Yesu's body had been laid, the other sat the head and the other at the feet.

nama: Yémofem yémotangeyayénd, "Amaf, némamén fém nende?"
english: They.dual asked her, "Woman, why are you crying?"

nama: Yénamé, fá nawengoi a yinjoi Yesu takayongérwén kété, wénde yémo kor yau yáyamngoi ndené Yesu témorwén.
english: From there, she turned around and saw Yesu there, but still she did not know that it was Yesu.

nama: Fá korayangé, "Amaf, némamén fém nende? Efe fémo yéronje?" Fá kéma kemnau nde ndau téfnár kar témorwén, fá norayai, "Ndimbal, táf fémon njam fá té yéngwan, kwaufro ánde fémon yékém fá a yéndo so ténmanan."
english: He said, "Woman, why are you crying? Whom are you looking for?" She taught that it might be a farmer, she said, "Bigman, if you have taken him away, tell me where you have put him and I will bring him."

nama: Yesum témndangé fá, "Meri." Fá nawengoi Yesue tambén a norayai Ju árfene sie, "Raboni!" Yáne fifi watamegh ár.
english: Yesu said to her, "Meri." She turned to Yesu and said in Ju people's language, "Raboni!"(it means teaching man)

nama: Yesu norayai, "Yau mé wereta yénd, ménamén yénd yau mé narmbon Afafaf. Nguwano tane mérnafefaf a tawaufro, 'Yénd armboghét nufngon kétán tane Afafaf a fene Afafaf, tane Ngánjánefaf a fene Ngánjánefaf."
english: Yesu said, "Do not hold me, because I am not still ascending to the Father. Go to my group(brothers) and tell them, 'I am beginning to ascend to my Father and your Father, to my God and your God.'"

nama: Meri Makdalin yéngmormén a tawaufrongé Yesuene waitogh árét, "Yéndon té yinjon Yuré!" a yémon tawaufrotau yéfe yéné némé korayau Yesu yáfaf. Yesu nufaryéng yánjo waitogh árfefaf
english: Meri Makdalin went and told Yesu's following men, "I have seen the Lord!" and she told what Yesu had said to her. Yesu arrived/appeared to his following men

nama: Tomasém témndangé Yesu, "Tane Yuré a tane Ngánján!"
english: Tomas told Yesu, "My Lord and my God!"

nama: Féyo Yesum témndangé Tomas, "Ménamén fémon té winjo yénd, fémon yénémamén efalo wiyáto, frengéghkaf em fá emofem yau wéfandat wénde ndimbal mwighaye mé efalo wiyátotat."
english: Then Yesu told Tomas, "Because you have seen me, this is why you truly approve(believe) me, blessed are those who do not see me but by big mind(faith) they truly approve(believe) me."

nama: Yesum ámb tárfár ufrogh yam tawafrotau njam yánjo waitogh árfé tamorwén, árké yau ekai yéné Bukan. 31 Wénde yéné faroghmén em ménát fémofem so efalo yiyátoti ndené Yesu fété yém Keriso, Ngánjánene Ambum, a efalo njam yiyátotati, féfene so yém ghérsé yáne yétkwénan.
english: Yesu did other many surprising things while his following men were with him, which I did not record them in this book. 31 But these writing are in order that you may truly approve(believe) that Yesu is Keriso, God's son, and if you truly approve(believe) him, you may have life in his name.

nama: Tándái akwan, Yesu nokayoi arakaf téndofaf, wénde yánjo waitogh árém yau yáyámngoyénd ndené Yesu témorwén.
english: Early in the morning, Yesu stood on the shore, but his following men did not know that it was Yesu.

nama: Fá nénutnai yéfefaf, "Fútaréf, féfene wagif ámb té ewam? Yémofem yénmawangoyénd, "Yau."
english: He called out to them, "Friends, do you any fish you catch?" They answered him, "No."

nama: Fá korayangé, "Titangi féfenjo net boutoene tambénta a so tarnyangi ámb wagif." Njam yafrotaménd, fá féyotarofnar tamorwén net okaughét boutot waflighét ménamén minde tárfár wagif numetaménd.
english: He said, "Throw your net on the straight side of the bout and you will catch some fish." When they did, they were unable to pull the net into the bout because they caught so many fish.

nama: Njam yémofem ewifoyénd njamke néne, Yesu norayai Saimon Fitafaf, "Saimon Jonene ambum, fene uwégham tayot té ewainde yéné ámb waitogh árfene uwégh tayot?" Fá norayai, "Néméwét, Yuré, fém mat ném ndené yéndon némuwetan fém." Yesu korayangé, "Emanjna tane sif tosé."
english: When they finished eating food, Yesu said to Saimon Fitè, "Saimon Jon's son, do your loving me surpass these other following men loving me?" He said, "Yes, Lord, you know that I love you." Yesu said, "Feed my lambs."

nama: Wéikor Yesu korayangé, "Saimon Jonene ambum, fémon efalo té wuwete yénd? Yémon yawangoi, "Néméwét, Yuré, fém mat ném ndené yéndon némuwetan." Yesum témndangé, "Ewanjeta kor tane sif."
english: Again Yesu said, "Saimon Jon's son, do you truly love me?" He answered him, "Yes, Lord, you know that I love you." Yesu answered him, "Take care of my sheep."

nama: Nambiomén Yesum témndangé fá, "Saimon Jonene ambum, fémon efalo té wuwete yénd?" Fité ndémkefé yéfghetam ménamén Yesum yémotai fá nambinotma, "Té wuwete yénd?" Fá korayangé, "Yuré, fém mat ném méinyotio yam; fém mat ném yéndon némuwetan fém."
english: The third time Yesu said to him, "Saimon Jon's son, do you truly love me?" Fitè felt pain because Yesu asked him third time, "Do you love me?" He said, "Lord you know everythings; you know I love you."

nama: Fité nawengoi a yinjoi Yesuene waitogh ár efe Yesum tuwetau tanwaitowéng fá. Yéné fá témorwén efe néngamghai Yesuefaf kété férégh njamke néneyan a té norayai, "Yuré, emo so sén néramete fém?" 21 Njam Fitam yinjoi fá, yémon kamotangé, "Yuré, ndernáye wét fá?"
english: Fitè turned and show Yesu's following man whom Yesu loved following them. (This was he who leaned to Yesu there at the meal and had said, "Lord, who will give teeth(betray) you?) 21 When Fitè saw him, he asked, "Lord, how about him?"

nama: Yéné Yesuene waitogh ár témorwén efe kafrotau yénémamén a emo téfarotau. Yénd mat yéném ndené yáne afrogh siyém efalo.
english: This Yesu's following man was who told about this and who wrote them. We know that his report is true.

nama: Yesum tangwafrotau tárfár yam wéi ndenáyo, njam ményotio yammén téfarotawét, kété yau so témorwén féyotarofnar sifayé yéné mband maratan ménát sái Buk takmetawét
english: Yesu did many things likewise, if everything they would have written, there would not be enough spaces in the earth to put the books.

nama: Féyo njam fá nafángoyénd Yesufé, yémofem yémotayénd fá, "Yuré, fém féyotaro ném yéné efghon Israil yu sái yérameta wéikor?"
english: So when they met with Yesu, they asked him, "Lord, are you able to built again country of Israil in that day?"

nama: Yémo emndai fá, "Yéné féfeyot yau mat efogh o efoghféneféne em, wénde Ngánjánro mat yém. 8 Wénde fémofem so tawinjongi wafté táf Ngánján Mbérmbér njam yéném féfefaf, a fém so em tane si ghékéf fandagh ár Jerusalem kénjún, méinyotio Judian a Samarian a kétánotio mband marat árkamé yiyato."
english: He said to them, "These are not for you.p to know the days and times, but only God knows. 8 But you.p will receive the power when the God Spirit comes to you.p; and you.p will be my watching people with eyes in Jerusalem, in all of Judia and Samaria, and to the ends of the earth."

nama: Yéné soramé fá njam yéné si norayai, fá táf nuwanoi yéfene méinyotio ghékfanro, njafar kwamkwamam yéngwamoi yéfene ghékéfta.
english: After this when he said this talk, he left them in all their eyes, and a cloud hid him from their eyes.

nama: Yéné efghon Fité nokayoi 120 efalo yátogh ár mérén kénjún 16 a norayai, "Fútaréf, Buk si so nufrote árkéméné Ngánján Mbérmbér korayau fronde Deifidene mbírmbírta némé korayau Judasenemén, efe náyátoyéng wambégh ár yéfeyot emofem Yesu yerayénd, 17 Judas ámb tém téfene kénjún a si waitogh ár."
english: In that day Fitè stood among 120 the approving truth people 16 and said, "Friends, the Scripture must be happened which God Spirit spoke before from Deifid's lips what he said about Judas, who became the guide for those who held Yesu, 17 Judas was one of ours and saying talk man(preacher)."

nama: Judasém mani ewanai yaufi ásáfoghmén, yémon yanayéng mband, kété numai yáne fifi néfnoi marataye a yáne ghérghér nétoryénd. 19 Méinyotio ár Jerusalemén náyárayénd yénémamén, féyo yémofem yéné sifayé témndetawét yéfenjo sie Akeldama, yáne fifi siyém "Férék sifayé."
english: Judas received money for the evil work, he bought a field, there he hung himself his body and burst widely and his intestines went out. 19 Everyone in Jerusalem heard about this, so they called this place in their language Akeldama, its meaning is, Place of Blood.

nama: Fité norayai, "Fété yékai Sams bukan, 'Yáne sifayé so yém fanfnero, efe yau so yémor yáne sifayan,' a 'Ámb árom téngwanangé yáne limánégh sifayé.'
english: Fitè said, "It is already written in the Book of Sams, 'May his place be only clear, no one who will live his place,' and May other man take his leading place."

nama: Yénémamén so fété tékafangém ámb ár efe yéndfé té téném méinyotio efghon njam Yuré Yesufé yénd tényotau, 22 kétamé yéné efghon Joném njam nue yálitotam Yesu kétánotio fá néngwanoi téfe tambén. Ámbiro so kénamndangé ghékéf fandagh ár yéndfé Yesuene anoghmén."
english: Therefore someone will be picked who had been with us all the days when we were moving with the Lord Yesu, 22 from this day when Jon baptized Yesu until he went from us. One must become a watching man with us about Yesu's rising."

nama: Wénde ámb árém tawértawét a emndayénd, "Yémofem tánetat totér wéri nu." Fitam si táitotau ár mérnat
english: But some men made fun of them and said, "They drank new alcohol." Fitè preached to the crowd

nama: "Ngánján noraye, 'Sénonjo kerker efghon, yéndo so téngwasurén tane Mbérmbér méinyotio árfefaf, a féfene ambum a mérésmérés so nafrotat Ngánjánene si, a féfene totér árém ghékéf waingégh yam so efandat, a féfene ákif onjo so ekém.
english: God says. 'Now in the last days, I will pour my Spirit to all people, and your sons and daughters will tell God's talk, and your young men see eye passover things, your old men will have dreams.

nama: Wénde tane faiofnar ásáfogh árfet, ár a amaf, yéndon so téngwasurén tane Mbérmbér yéné efghon, fá so nafrotat Ngánjánene si.
english: But to my without.payment working people, men and women, I will pour my Spirit in those days, they will tell God's talk.

nama: Yéndon so sélngwélafé yam ewauyafotan njafaran a ufarogh yam mband mbanmbanan, férék, fés a sénjté kwam.
english: I will show special workings(miracles) in the heaven surprising things on the earth below, blood, fire and thick smoke.

nama: Efogh so kawengongé kwéfitat a ghérare so kawengongé férkot yéné soramé Yurane efogh yéném ndimbal a ndimbal kwayaghafé.
english: The sun will turn to darkness and the moon will turn to blood after this Lord's day comes with big and strong light(glory).

nama: A méinyotio ár efe kómnendangi Yurane yétkwénan, fá so kawanjarngi.'
english: And every people who ask on the name of the Lord, they will be saved.'

nama: Féyo tane tikéf siyém nasnete a tane kánké náuwete, tane fifi so ndenéyameyo nene kamnangan,
english: Then my heart is glad and my tongue rejoices, my body in the same way will rest in hope,

nama: ménamén fémo yau so kwéfrango kér árfé, o tumyo fene njúnnjúnofnar ár sái nornda mbéwé méngon.
english: because you will not leave me with dead people, or allow your without.dust(holy) man to rot in grave house.

nama: Fém mat té náyátoi tafaf ghérsé endmén, fémo yénd so kwafo ménaye áuwéghe fene sáfrére.'
english: You had made known to me the paths of life, you will fill me with joy in front of you.'

nama: kétánotio yéndo so tákman fene mék téfnár fene kafkaf mbanmbanan."'
english: until I will make your enemies under your feet."

nama: "Féyo méinyotio Israil ár mat kamndangi ndené fémofem yéné Yesu té ténamndati wafatarégh wénan, wénde Ngánjánam té yiyátoi Yuré a Keriso."
english: "So let all Israil know that you nailed this Yesu on the cross, but God had approved him Lord and Keriso."

nama: Njam árém Fité yiyárayénd yéné si snorayai, fá táf nuyáyénd tikfan a norayayénd Fitafaf a ámb Yesuene muyafé árfefaf, "Fútaréf, némé yéndfem so ewafrotam?"
english: When people heard Fitè said this, that time they fell down in the heart and said to Fitè and the other men with Yesu's authority(apostles), "Friends, what shall we do?"

nama: Fitam tárfár sie tawawéngsotau fá, a yémon tamndetau, "Fém kawanjarngi yéné yaufi saté árta." 41 Fá emofem yáne si waitogh yumyoyénd walitogh ewafngoi, a táf 3,000 ár farun nafayoyénd yéné efghon. Efalo yátogh árfene áumengégh
english: Fitè warned them with many talks, and he said, "You.p save from this wicked generation." 41 Those who accepted his preaching talk began to be baptized, and that time 3,000 people were added ontop in that day. The meeting of believers

nama: Kémbogh si soramé, yémofem engéumieyayénd. Yémofem ámb yau end ewinjoyénd ndernáye so fá tékrátan takmeyayénd, ménamén méinyotio árém Ngánján tuwetawét ménamén némé nufrotam. 22 Yéné ár efe Ngánjánam mer yiyátoi 40 yunjéf té yáindai. Efalo yátogh árfene Ngánjánafé orayégh
english: After stopping talk, they let them go. They could not find any way how to put guilty(to punish) them, because all the people were praising God for what had happened. 22 The man who became good was forty years old. The believers' talking with God

nama: Mbandmén warsagh ár kafrendawét ngiot a limángégh ár náumendat mérne Yurafé ásméghét a wéi yémafé Keriso.'
english: The ruling men(kings) of the earth prepared for battle and head men gathered together for fighting [against] the Lord and also with him Keriso.'"

nama: Soramé fá Ngánjánjafé koraiwét, yéné sifayan ánde kafángotawét kété kásámbnetau. Féyo fá Ngánján Mbérmbéram ewafoi a Ngánjánene si táitotawét férférofnar. Efalo yátogh árém tafalotawét yéfenjo rokar
english: After they talked with God, that place where they were meeting was shaken. So the God Spirit filled them and they spoke the talk of God without.fear. The approving truth people were distributing their own things(possessoins)

nama: Josef, Lefi mérénmén kétamamén Sáifres, efe Yesuene muyafé ár tanmotawét Banabas, yáne yétkwénone fifi siyém "Wawéngsogh ár ambum," 37 yéramai yánjo mband maniot a yékmai mani Yesuene muyafé árfene kafkafot.
english: Josef, belong to a Lefi tribe from Saifres, who men with Yesu's authority(apostles) called Banabas, his name's meaning is "Son of Encouragement,'" 37 gave his field for [making] the money and put it to the men with Yesu's authority(apostles)' feet.

nama: Ámb ár yétkwén Ananias, yátnofé tárwén Safairafé, yémofem mband yérameyayénd maniot. 2 Yémon ámb mani ewerai yandio, a yatén mat témorwén méinyotio yénémamén, a wénde enwanai ámbro a ekmai Yesuene muyafé árfene kafkafot.
english: A man name Ananias, with his wife Safaira, they sold land for money. 2 He kept some for himself, and his wife knew all about it, but he brought only some and put it at the men with Yesu's authority(apostles)' feet.

nama: Njam Ananias náyárai yéné si, fá táf fété nuyai krotio. A ndimbal férféram ewanai méinyotio efe náyárayénd némé yam nufrotam. 6 Féyo totér ár nénuwanoyénd yáne fifi yéfinaménd, a yéngwanayénd a mband yaramayénd.
english: When Ananias heard this talk, he immediately fell down and died. And big fear held all who heard what had happened. 6 Then young men came and wrapped his body, and carried it and they made land(buried).

nama: Nambio efoghféneféne soramé yáne amaf yénmormén, yau mat náyátoi némé nufrotam. 8 Fitam amaf yémotai, "Ta kwaufro, yéné fai fiyém fém a Ananias yéné mbandmén sewaneyayénd?" Amafom yawangoi, "A, yéné fai fété yém."
english: Three hours later his wife came, she didn't know what happened. 8 Fitè asked woman, "Tell me, is this payment you and Ananias received for the land? Woman said, "Yes, that is the payment."

nama: Fité norayai amafoefaf, "Némamén fémofem yéné mwighé kemarét Yurane Mbérmbér ufoghét? Kéretaǃ Yéné totér ár emofem fene ár tiyatotat kété ewakai méngo sésafneyan, a fém yémofem ndenéyameyo so nérsat."
english: Fitè said to woman, "Why did you.think this mind to put Lord's Spirit for trial? Listen! That young men who buried your husband there stand in the door of house, and they will also carry you." 10 At once woman fell down at his feet and died. Then those young men entered in and found deadbody, carried her and buried her with her husband. 11 Big fear held all Yesu's family(church) and all who heard about what happened. The men with Yesu's authority made good(healed) many people

nama: Táf njam akw yéfawéryéng fá nélawayénd wáwefnogh méngo sifayat, ndernáye té njafar si résagh árom emndai, a ár watamegh ewafngoyénd.
english: When morning started(At daybreak) they entered into the worshipping house, how a man carrying heavenly message(angel) had told them, and began to teach the people.

nama: Yáne si ewanayénd yémofem. Yémofem emotayénd Yesuene muyafé ár kénjút ényawéghét a fá fémogh ewafngoyénd. Féyo yémofem emndayénd fá yau so norayat Yesuene yétkwénan, a fá tangéumyend a nguwanongi.
english: They took his talk. They called the men with Yesu's authority(apostles) to enter inside and began to whip. Then they said to them not to say in the name of Yesu, and they allowed and they go.

nama: Yesuene muyafé árém yéfrangoyénd Ju sénko árfene áumengégh áuwéghafé ménamén fá Yesuene yétkwén téfnan tékrátan tamorwén. 42 Méinyotio efghon wáwefnogh méngo sifayan a méngomé, fá yau nékmboyénd watameghan a mer si waitoghan Yesu Kerisoenemén.
english: The men with Yesu's authority(apostles) left the Ju head people's meeting(Sanedrin) with joy because the name of Yesu was the reason for their suffering. 42 Every day in the worshipping house courts and house to house, they didn't stop teaching and preaching good talk about Yesu Keriso.

nama: Féyo Ngánjánene si marat náyátoyéng. Efalo yátogh ár Jerusalemén wékeye tárfár káyátotawét, a ndenéyameyo tárfár ghéngén wárogh ár námyoyénd áyárghét kétán ndimbal mwighafaf. Stifen yerayénd
english: So the talk of God became wide. Believers in Jerusalem became many quickly, and also many burning sacrifice men(priests) obeyed to the big mind(faith). They held Stifèn

nama: Yémofem kwankwane ewaferyénd ámb ár ndené siot, "Yéndfem té yiyárayém Stifen yaufi si korayau Mosesefaf a Ngánjánefaf."
english: They secretly chose some men to say that, "We have heard Stifèn said wicked talk against Moses and God."

nama: Méinyotio efe tamorangérwén Ju árfene sénko árfene áumengéghan Stifen yémofem téfandawét yáne sáf náyátoi ndenanit njafar si résagh árnit.
english: All who were sitting in the Ju people's head men meeting they looked Stifen [that] his face became like of a man carrying heavenly message.

nama: Féyo limánégh ghéngén wárogh árom yémotai Stifen, "Yéné wátaranégh efalo em?"
english: Then the leading burning sacrifice man asked Stifèn, "Are these complaints true?"

nama: "Jeikofene ambumam waramnjagh yafngoyénd yéfenngén Josef, yémofem fá yéramayénd Ijifét faiofnar ásáfogh ár. Wénde Ngánjánafé fá tárwén 10 a Ngánjánam tambetau fá kétándmé méinyotio yánjo kértata. Farawa Ijifmén warsagh árom méndefé téfandau Josef ménamén Ngánjánam yaramai káfeté mwighé, yéné téfnan Farawam yémndai Ijif yu limánéghét a méinyotio yáne méngo.
english: Jeikof's sons started being jealous of their yonger brother Josef, they gave/sold him to Ijif as without.payment working man (slave). But He was with God 10 and God helped him from all his troubles. Farawa, the ruling man(king) of Ijif liked Josef because God gave him wisdom, in this reason Farawa ordered him to rule Ijif and all his household(palace).

nama: "Yéné efghon Moses náráftam a Ngánjánene ghékfan fá kéretau mer ambum. Nambio ghérare kénjún yémon tarawenau yárefane méngon. 21 Njam yémon yénmutoryéng, Farawane mérsom yérnyai yandio ambumot. 22 Moses méinyotio káfeté mwighé yatametaménd Ijif árém a témorwén wafté kér ro sian a wafroghan.
english: At that time Moses was born and he looked a good child in God's eyes. In three months he was cared for in his father's house. 21 When he was put outside, Farawa's daughtor adopted him her son. 22 Moses was taught all the wisdom by Ijif people and he was really powerful in talk and action.

nama: "Féyo Yuram yémndai, 'Tafitrar fenjo sandol, yéné sifayé ánde fém némakai siyém njúnnjúnofnar mband. 34 Yéndon té téfandan tane árfene tékrát Ijifén tekfifi. Yénd té kénáyáretan yéfene ye ke a yéné téfnan yénd néneworén yéfe wanjarghét. Sénonjo kuwano, yéndon so kémangon Ijifét.'
english: Then the Lord said to him, 'Take off your sandols, this place where you are standing is without.dust(holy) ground. 34 I have seen my people's suffering in Ijif in a long time. I have heard their crying sound and in this reason I came down to rescue them. Now go, I will send you to Ijif.

nama: "Wénde téfene ákif yau námyoyénd wafroghét a yémofem yékenayénd a fá ménde tamorwén Ijifét angoghét.
english: But our ancestors didn't obey him and they rejected him and wanted to return to Ijif.

nama: "Yémofem yémndayénd Aron, 'Téfe ténmawafrota némbne ngánján efe so yém téfene limánégh ár. Ménamén yéné ár Moses emo yénmutoryéng yénd Ijifta, yénd mat yau yéném némé nufrotam yáfafǃ'
english: They told Aron, 'Make us small gods who will be our head man. Because this man Moses who brought us out of Ijif, we don't know what has happened to him.'

nama: Fémofem té térsati Molek mewangoene némbne farai méngo a féfenjo ngánján Réfan kénd, árké mewangoe fémofem tawefnotati. Féyo yéndon so tawitrombon kétán Babilonét.'
english: You have taken up the small canvas house of idol Molek and your god of star Rèfan, which idoles you worshipped. So I will remove/send you into exile to Babilon.

nama: "Wénde Minde tukén Ngánján yau yémor ár wafroghmén méngon. Ndené Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár noraye,
english: "But the Most High God does not live in houses built by human. As God's man who make know(prophet) says,

nama: "'Yuré noraye, 'Njafar siyém tane limánégh ámnjogh sifayé, a yéné mband siyém tane kafkaf enaghfaf. Fém féyotarofnar em méngo sái yérametati tayot. Yénd méndefnar wém tane enagh sifayat.
english: "'The Lord says, "Heaven is my sitting place, and this land is my footstool. You are not able to built my house. I don't need my resting place.

nama: Tane ngángayam ewafrotam méinyotio rokar.'
english: My hands have made all the things.'

nama: Féyo Yémofem ngángaye ewamoyénd téngan a kutnawét tukén, méinyotio ár nénguférmoyénd yáfaf, 58 tutonawét tesenta a wíme tafiyátotawét. Yéné efghon ghékéf fandagh árém yéfenjo farun sáláme tafitérnawét a totér ambum Solene kafkaf mbanmbanan takmetawét.
english: Then they put [their] hands over [their] ears and shouted loudly, every people rushed at him, 58 led him out of the town, and throw stones him. In this day the eye watching men(witnesses) took off their own outside clothes and put them at the feet of a young man Sol.

nama: Sol namyoi stifén tésmetawét kérotio. Yesuene mérén ngimén niroryénd
english: Sol approved of their killing Stifèn. Because of persecution of Yesu's family(church) they scatterd

nama: Ngánján férférafé árém Stifen yiyatotaménd mbandan a ghérghérsisé tamorwén minde. 3 Wénde Solém yiroréng Yesuene mérén. Fá téngmorwén méngot a ámb méngot, ár a amaf, taweretau a talawetau kwéfkwéf méngot. Filif Samaria kénjún
english: God fearing men buried Stifèn in the land and were very sad. 3 But Sol was destroying the Yesu's family(church). He went from house to other house, he caught men and women, held them and put into darkness house. Filif in Samaria

nama: Njam Saimoném yinjoi nde Ngánján Mbérmbér té yumyoyénd táf Yesuene muyafé árém ngángé efayeyayénd yéfefaf, yémon mani ewauyafeyai, 19 ndené siafé, "Kwaramend yéné wafté ménát endefefaf yéndon téu efayotan tane ngángé so Ngánján Mbémbér ndenáyo yumyotatǃ"
english: When Saimon saw that they received the God Spirit when men with Yesu's authority(apostles) laid their hands on people, he offered them.d money, 19 with talk that, "Give me this power so that anyone I lay my hands on people will also receive the God Spirit!"

nama: Saimoném yawangoi, "Orayégh kufngo Yurafaf tanemén ménát némé fém noraye yau so nufrote tafaf."
english: Saimon answered him, "Start to talk with God to the Lord for me so that what you said will not happen to me.

nama: Yéné soramé fá Yurane si kafrowét, Fité a Jon nangeyayénd Jerusalemét, mer si taitowét tárfár Samaria méngotuamé. Filif a Etiofiyamén ár
english: After they.d told Lord's talk, Fitè and Jon went back to Jerusalem, preaching the good talk through many villages of Samaria. Filif and Etiofia man

nama: Féyo Filif táf néngenngoi osafene roagh kitarafaf a yiyárayéng ár taftau Aisaya Ngánjánene mat yátogh ároene buk. Filifém yémotai, "Fém mat té náyátote némamén fémon yafte?"
english: Then Filif ran up to carriot and heard the man reading a book of Aisaya the God's man who make know(prophet). Filif asked him, "Do you understand what you are reading?"

nama: Fá norayai, "Yénd ndernáye mat so káyáton, táfandro ámb árom njam ta wawafena?" Féyo yéné téfnan yémon yumyoi Filif armboghét yémafé ámnjoghét.
english: He said, "How can I know, unless some man explains it to me?" So in this reason he allowed Filif to come up and to sit with him.

nama: Yéné Buk saté siyém yémo taftau, "Fá télimndawét sifnit kétán ngifaf, a sif tosanit síf néfégh téfnároene sáfrére siofnar, yémon yau yáne mbírmbír yasawéryéng.
english: This part(passage) of Scripture he was reading, "They led him like a sheep to killing, and as a lamb before the fleece cutting people without-saying, he did not open his mouth.

nama: Fá yewonaménd a yanayénd yáne mbarkánd. Fá ambumofnar yémormén, féyo efe yau so noraye yáne ákiambumafenemén. Ménamén yáne ghérsé té yanayénd yéné mbandta."
english: They put him down and took his straight/justice away. He was without.children, so no one can speak of his descendants. Because his life was taken from the land."

nama: Árom yémotai Filif, "Ta kwaufro, endenemén Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár norayai, yánjomén o ámb ároenemén?" 35 Féyo Filifém waitogh yawafngoi yéné Aisayane Buk satayan a yaufroi mer si Yesuenemén.
english: The man asked Filif, "Tell me, who is the God's man who make know(prophet) talking, about himself or other man?" 35 So Filif began to preach with that passage of Scripture of Aisaya and told him the good talk about Yesu.

nama: Njamandio fá tangérwén endmé, fá nufareyayénd nufaf a árom norayai, "Kéreta, nu siyém. Yénd ménde wém walitoghét." 37 {b{ ...f* {b{8.37 Ámb matyam ár néngemnat: yéné simén si té yém yéna ámb si, wénde tárfár matyam ár yau nemnat. Yéné si siyém, "Filif norayai yáfaf, 'Njam fémo efalo yiyátota Yesu fene kénjúe, fém so táf némalitotan.' Yémo yawangoi, 'Yéndo efalo yiyátotan ndené Yesu Keriso siyém Ngánjánene Ambum.'"
english: As they.d travelled along the road, they.d reached to some water and the man said, "Look, water is. I'd like to be baptized"{r{ ...f* {r{8.37 Some knowledge men think this: another part of this talk is here in this verse, but many knowledge men think not. This talk is, "Filif said to him, 'If you believe Yesu with all your heart, I can baptize you.' He answered, 'I believe that Yesu Keriso is the Son of God.'

nama: Sol namotai, "Yuré, efe fém ném?"
english: Sol asked, "Lord, who are you?"

nama: Sénonjo kokai a kuwano ndimbal tesenot, a ár kété yém yémon so kénémndangé némé so fémon yafrote."
english: Now get up and go into the city, and there is a man he will tell what you must do."

nama: Damaskosén kété témorwén waitogh ár yétkwén Ananias. Yuram yémotai ghékéf waingéghe, "Ananiasǃ" Yémon yawangoi, "Wai, Yuré."
english: In Damaskos there was a following man name Ananias. The Lord called to him in a eye passover thing, "Ananias!" He answered him, "Yes, Lord."

nama: Yuram yémndai, "Kuwano Judasene méngot Mbarkánd Endmé a kamota Tarsusmén ár yétkwén Sol, fá Ngánjánafé oraighan yém. 12 Ghékéf waingéghe yémon téfandau ár yétkwén Ananias ténmorwén yáfaf a ngángé efayoi a yáne ghékéf nasawéryénd a nawafarnjaménd wéikor."
english: The Lord told him, "Go to the Judas' house on Straight streets and asked for a man from Tarsus name Sol, there he is in talking with God. 12 In a eye passover thing he saw a man name Ananias came to him and [his]put hands and his [Sol's]eyes opened and got sight again."

nama: Ananiasém yawangoi, "Yuré, yéndon káyáretawén tárfár si yéné ároenemén ménamén yémon tékrát tawarametau fene árfet Jerusalemén. 14 A fá téném yénan si muyafé limánégh ghéngén wárogh ároe tambén ménát yéfe werghét méinyotio efe norayat fene yétkwénan."
english: Ananias answered him, "Lord, I've heard many talk about this man because he gave the pains to your people in Jerusalem. 14 And he came here with authority from the leading burning sacrifice man in order to arrest them all who says your name."

nama: Wénde Yuré norayai Ananiasefaf, "Kuwanoǃ Yéné ár siyém tane waferéghkaf ménát tane si résaghét Téndo árét a yéfene warsagh ár a Israilmén ár. 16 Yéndon so yauyafotan yáyot nderé mámáfi yémon so yáyarete tane yétkwén téfnan."
english: But the Lord said to Ananias, "Go! This man is my chosen to carry my talk to the Side people and their ruling men(kings) and to the people of Israil. 16 I will show him how bad he must feel for my name's sake."

nama: Tárfár efogh soramé, ámb Ju árém mwighé táitotawét Sole ngiot, 24 wénde Sol mat náyátoi yéfene mwighé. Efogh sémbár fá kumnjotawét tesen sésafnen Sole ngiot. 25 Wénde yánjo waitogh árém yanayénd Sol sémbáran a ndimbal yáfe tewonawét tesen áráke sémta.
english: After many days, some of Ju people made plans to kill Sol, 24 but Sol learned of their thought/plan. Day and night they watched on the city gates to kill Sol. 25 But his following people took him at night and lowered Sol with a big basket from back of the town fence(wall).

nama: Féyo Yesuene mérén yénamé Judia, Galili yu a Samaria, yémofem tayamnetawét krufrát yéné efghon. Ngánján Mbérmbéram tawáutánau muyafé sái kamndangayénd, ár tárfár káyátotawét a Yurane férférafé tamorangérwén. Enias a Dorkas
english: Then the Yesu's family(church) throughout Judia, Galili region and Samaria, they enjoyed the peace in that time. There were strengh and encouragement of the God Spirit, many people added and lived with the fear of the Lord. Enias and Dorkas

nama: Fitaf néngwanoyénd yémafé, a njam fá nufaryénd, fá néngarmboi méngo kénjút. Méinyotio kwiram yarendayénd fá, ye kendawét a tauyafongi sáláme a ámb sáláme Dorkasém árké enamndam njam yémafé mé ghérsé tamorwén.
english: Fitè returned with them, and when he arrived, they took him up into the house. All the widows surrounded him, crying and showing him clothes and other clothing which Dorkas made while she was still alive with them.

nama: Koneliasém yinjoi férférafé a yémotai, "Némé yém, Yuré?"
english: Konelias saw him in fear and asked him, "What is this, Lord?"

nama: Sénonjo ár tawáfáreta Jofa tesenot ár yétkwén Saimon yá wangoghét efe ámb yétkwén yanmotat Fité. 6 Fá tamorarwén Saimonfé, wérár ghéngan watorégh árofé, endene méngo arakaf téndon témorwén."
english: Now send men to Jofa city to bring back a man name Saimon who people call other name Fitè. 6 He is staying with Saimon, a leather maker with animal skin(tanner), whose house is by the sea."

nama: Njam njafar si résagh ár efe korayau yáfaf néngolindai, Koneliasém ewanmeyai yáne sómbio faiofnar ásáfogh ár a Ngánján férférafé fiyaré. 8 Koneliasém si ewaufrotam yéfeyot méinyotio némé kufrotau yáfaf a soramé engwáfáretai fá Jofa tesenot. Fitam yéfandam ghékéf waingégh yam
english: When the man carrying heavenly message(angel) who spoke to him disappeared, Konelias called his two without.payment working men(servants) and a God fearing soldier. 8 Konelias told them all what happened to him and sent them off to Jofa city. Fitè saw eye passover thing(a vision)

nama: Fitam yawangoi, "Yau, Yuré. Yéndo yaufifi enetamén tayot ufi yém."
english: Fitè answered him, "No, Lord. I never eat somethings to bad to me."

nama: Ngánján norayai yáfaf wéikor ndené, "Yau. Fémo so enete. Yau noraya ndené mámáfi em némé Ngánjánam ewafrota mer."
english: God spoke to him again that, "No. You should eat it. Don't say that bad what God has made them good."

nama: Yéné yam nufrotam nambinotma, a táf fété yéné sáláme yénamayo nangoi njafarot.
english: These things happened three times, and suddenly this clothe went back into heaven.

nama: Njam Fité mé katambnau ghékéf waingéghoene fifimén, ár engwáfáretam Koneliasém fá namotayénd ánde Saimonene méngo yém a nékmboyénd méngo sésafnefaf. 18 Fá namotayénd, "Yéna wan téfnár yém yáne yétkwén Saimon Fité?"
english: When Fitè was still confusing about the meaning of the eye passover thing(vision), the man sent by Konelias they asked where Saimon's house was and stopped at the gate of house. 18 They called, "Is there a guest here his name of Saimon Fitè?"

nama: Njam Fité mé kemnau yéné ghékéf waingéghmén, Ngánján Mbérmbéram yémndai, "Saimon, nambio árém fém néronjat. 20 Féyo kokai a kewor. Yau nautémnda yémafé álighét, ménamén yéndon tanwáfáretan fá."
english: While Fitè was still thinking about the eye passover thing, the God Spirit said to him, "Saimon, three men are looking for you. 20 So get up and go down. Don't hesitate to go with them, because I have sent them."

nama: Fité néneworyéng a yéné ár emndai, "Yénd yéné fwém fémofem efe yéronjati. Némamén fém taném?"
english: Fitè came down and said to this men, "I am the man who you are looking for. Why have you come?"

nama: "Yémofem té yanangi Ngánján Mbérmbér ndené fété yéndfem. Árké árom yau so takmbongé nu walitoghét." 48 Yénémaménnde yémon emndai fá fété so ewalitote Yesu Kerisoene yétkwénan. Féyo yémofem yamnendayénd Fité ámnjoghét yémafé nambio efghotro.
english: "They had received the God Spirit just as we did. No one can stop them from being baptized with water." 48 Therefore told them be baptized in the name of Yesu Keriso. Then they asked Fitè to stay with them for a three/few days.

nama: Yesuene muyafé ár a efalo yátogh árém Judia yuwomé náyárayénd ndené Téndo árém ndenéyameyo yanangi Ngánjánene si. 2 Njam Fité néngwanoyéng Jerusalemét, Ju efalo yátogh árém tanangotawét fá 3 a norayai, "Fém tangém Téndo árfene méngot a yémafé tánetati njamke."
english: The men with Yesu's authority(apostles) and the approving truth people thoughout Judia region heard that the Side people also received the talk of God. 2 When Fitè went back to Jerusalem, Ju approving truth people rebuked him 3 and said, "You.s went to the house of Side people and ate food with them."

nama: "Yénd nuwangoyén, 'Yau, Yuré. Njúnnjúnafé a fenjfenjafé wérár yau nélawai tane sénfnet.'
english: I answered, "No, Lord. With dirty and with dust animal has not entered my mouth."

nama: "Ngánján norayai kétamé njafarta wéikor, 'Yau. Fémo so enete. Yau noraya ndené mámáfi em némé Ngánjánam ewafrota mer.' 10 Yéné yam kufrotau nambinotma, a yéné sáláme yénamayo nangoi njafarot wéikor.
english: God said from heaven again, "No. You should eat it. Do not say what God has made them good." 10 This happened three times, and that clothes went up to heaven again.

nama: Njam fá náyárayénd yénémamén, fá nékmboyénd éwigh a Ngánjánro tuwetawét, korayawét, "Féyo Ngánjánam mwighé ewaramai Téndo árét yaufita awengoghét ghérsat." Yesuene mérén Antiok tesenan
english: When they heard this, they stopped objecting [and]only praising God, said, "So then God gave thought to the Side people to turn away from sins to life." The Yesu's family(church) in Antiok city

nama: Féyo Banabas nuwanoyéng kétán Tarsus tesenot Sole ronjaghét, 26 a yémon njam yinjoi Sol, Banabasém yénmasroi fá kétán Antiok tesenot. Ámbiro méinyo yunjéf, Banabas a Sol tafángowét Yesuene mérén a tawatamewét tárfár ár. Waitogh ár tawanmotawét árém frondefifi Kerisoene ár Antiok tesenan.
english: Then Banabas went to Tarsus city to look for Sol, 26 and when he found Sol, Banabas brought him to Antiok city. For a whole year, Banabas and Sol met with Yesu's family(church) and taught many people. People called the following men first as Keriso's People(Christian)at Antiok city.

nama: Féyo Fité kwéfkwéf méngon télawangérwén, wénde Yesuene mérén ndimbal kéráye oraighan Ngánjánefaf tamorwén yánemén.
english: So they put Fitè into darkness house, but the Yesu's family(church) was really big talking with God for him.

nama: Fité mwighat nangoi a norayai, "Sénonjo mat náyáton atambaréghofnar nde Yuram ténmáfárete njafar si résagh ár ta wanjarghét kétándmé Erodene ngángata a kétándmé méinyotio Ju árfene kamnangta."
english: Fitè came back to his senses and said, Now I know without a doubt that the Lord has sent his man carrying heavenly message to rescue to me from Erod's hands and from every Ju people's hope."

nama: Yémofem témndangi, "Fe mwighayam némauwéinde!" Njam fá mé kafrotau ndené efalo fété yém, fá norayayénd, "Mété táf njafar si résagh ár yém yá wáutárghét."
english: They told her, "Your mind is tricking you." When she kept talking that it is true, they said, "It must be a man carrying heavenly message(angel) for helping him."

nama: Wénde Fité ménjtaye mé káutanau. Njam yémofem sésafne yésawéryénd a yinjoyénd Fité, fá sélngwél emormén. 17 Fitam ngángaye engwaunyai métar a tawawalinjotau ndernáye Yuram yénmutoryéng kwéfkwéf méngota. Fá norayai, "Tawaufrongi Jems a ámb fútarét yénémamén." A féyo fá táf nuwanoi ámb yuwot.
english: But Fitè kept on knocking. When they opened the door and saw Fitè, they were amazed. 17 Fitè motioned with hand for them to be quiet down and described them how the Lord had brought him out of darkness house. He said, "Tell Jems Yesu's younger brother and the other friends about this." And then he went to another place.

nama: Ámb akwan kété ndimbal atambarégh témorwén fiyarafefaf némé nufrotam Fitafaf. 19 Soramé Erodém yéta ronjagh yafngoi wénde yau yinjoi Fité, yémon mogh ghékéf fayogh ár ewafngoi a krot takmetau. Erod kér yémormén
english: The next morning there was big counfusion among the soldiers what had happened to Fitè. 19 Later Erod tried to start to find Fitè but did not see him, he started to ask/court to the guards and put them to death. Erod was died

nama: Erod nékw témorwén Taire a Sidon Yumén árfefaf, yénémamén fá nuwanoyénd mérne Erode fandaghét. Fronde yémofem yamnendayénd Blastus, Erodene méngo wanjéngégh sénko ár ménát yéfe wáutárghét. Féyo fá nuwanoyénd Erodefaf a yamnendayénd yau so ménjtaye tékmbotau njamkemén ménamén túmén Taire a Sidon Yu tarsawét njamke warsagh ár Erodene ndimbal yuta.
english: He was angry to the people of Taire and Sidon country, so they went together to see Erod. Firstly they asked Blastus, the chief of guard of Erod's house in order to help them. Then they went to Erod and asked not keep on stopping food because the country of Taire and Sidon always were taking food from the ruling man Erod's country.

nama: Wénde Ngánjánene si mulmulafé kanotau a marat káyátotau.
english: But the talk of God grew with healthy and became wide.

nama: Njam Banabas a Sol yéfenjo ásáfogh yifeyayénd, fá kénangowét kétándmé Jerusalemta kétán Antiokét yémafé Jon Mak.
english: When Barabas and Sol had finished their.d work, they returned from Jerusalem to Antiok with Jon Mak.

nama: Njam Rom fiyarafene sénko árom yinjoi némé kufrotau, fá sélngwél yémormén Ngánjánene si watameghan, yémon táf efalo yiyátoi Yuré. Fol a Banabasfem mer si taitowét Antiok tesenan Fisidia ndimbal yuwon
english: When the Rom soldiers' head man saw what had happened, he was amazed at the teaching of the God's talk, he truly approved(believed) in the Lord. Fol and Banabas preached them good news at Antiok city in Fisidia big area(district)

nama: "Yéndfem ewaufrotam féfe mer si, Ngánjánam némé nénorayam unyéghofnar si téfene ákifefaf 33 Ngánjánam té tawafrote téfeyot, yéfene ákiambumat, ménaye Yesu kés yanoi. Ndené fété kés yékai yénamayo Sams bukan, "'Fém ném tane Ambum, sénonjo yénd nénáyáton fene Afé.'
english: We tell you.p the good talk, what God said without lying talk(promise) to our ancestors 33 God has done(fulfilled)for us, for their descendants, by raising up Yesu. As it is written in the second Sams buk, 'You are my Son, today I have become your Father.'

nama: Ngánjánam fá yanoi kérta, yénémamén yau so nornde, némé noraye yéné sian, "'Yéndon so tawaraman njúnnjúnofnar a efalo frengégh némé té nénorayam Deifidefaf.'
english: God raised him from death, then will not be decayed, what he said in this talk, "I will give the without.dust(holy) and true blessing what had said to Deifid."

nama: Ámb Sams bukan yéné yékai, "'Fémon yau so tumyo fenjo Njúnnjúnofnar Ambum kérkfot.'
english: In another Sams buk it is written, "You will not allow your Without.dust Son to be rotten."

nama: "Njam Deifidém Ngánjánene ásáfogh tawafrotau yánjo ár satafaf, fá táf kémégh nakmai, fá esareyayénd yákifé a yáne fifi norndam. 37 Wénde ámbiro ár efe Ngánjánam yanoi kérta yau norndam.
english: "When Deifid did God's work to his generation, he died, he was buried with his ancestors and his body spoiled. 37 But the one man who God raised from death did not be spoiled.

nama: "'Fém Ngánján karogh ár, sunsunan kér so em, némamén yéndon so ewafrotan ámb yam féfene efghon fémofem efalo yau so eyátotati, ndemamén ámb árom so kémaufrongé feyot.'"
english: " You people [who are]rejecting God, will die in wondering , because I will do something in your days [that] you would not truly approve(believe), even though someone will tell you."

nama: Njamandio Fol a Banabasfem téfrangowét Ju árfene áumengégh méngo, árém eumieyayénd fá kor ámb Safatot siot. 43 Njam ár mérén kófarnawét, tárfár Ju ár a Téndo árém ewáiteyayénd Fol a Banabas, efe korayawét yémafé a ewamnendangeyayénd fá ménát mé sái engérnyang Ngánjánene ngárám kénjún.
english: As Fol and Banabas left the Ju people's meeting house, the people invited them.d to speak again on the next Safat. 43 When crowds was spreading, many of Ju people and outside men followed Fol and Banabas, who talked with them and urged them to stay in the grace of God.

nama: Njam Téndo árém náyárayénd yéné si, fá áuwéghan tamorwén a kánjo tarametawét Yurane simén; a efe méinyotio ewaferyéng tuot ghérsat efalo yiyátoyénd.
english: When the Side people heard this talk, they were in joy and gave thanks the Lord for the talk; and all who [God] chose for eternal life truly approved(believed)."

nama: Féyo ámb efalo yátogh ár efe tawafnyangérwén Farasi mérénmén nokayoi a tamndangé, "Téndo ár so fété ghéngan enfetat ndenáye Mosesene nákam kés noraye."
english: Then some of approving truth people who belonged to Farasi group stood up and said, "The Side people must be cut skin(circumcised) just as the law of Moses said."

nama: 'Yéné soramé yénd so nénangotan, a kor so yafarnjan Deifidene méngotu. Yéndon kor so yérametan wasérmboghkaf yém, a yéndon so kor yafrotan,
english: "After this I will go back and restore the kingdom of Deifid. I will build again its ruins, and I will make it again,

nama: ménát méinyotio árém so yéronjat Yuré, so tanéfghangé Téndo ár emofem tane yétkwén so yuyotat, Yuré noraye, emo ewafrote yéné yam
english: so that all the people will seek the Lord, including Side people who lift up my name, the Lord says, who made these things

nama: tándái árkéméné mat náyátoyénd.'
english: which they knew long times ago.

nama: Ngánján Mbérmbér a yénd efalo té yiyátongém ndené yéndfem yau so kérté ewarametam táikér yame wénde mé nambio yamero: 29 Fém so nafrangotati kétándmé njamke árkéméné mewang sifayamén em, férékta, férék eréghofnar wérárta a téndo walta. Merfifi yém yéné yamta kékmbongi. Yénaro fai."
english: The God Spirit and we have agreed that we will not give difficult things but only few things: 29 You must leave from food which was from Idols' place, from blood, and from animal/meat without bleeding blood, from outside sex(sex out of marriage). It is good you.p stop these things. That's all.

nama: Yénd ndimbal boute tényotau Troasta kétán Samotrasét, a ámb efghon néngufaryém Neafolisét. 12 Kétamé yénd néngwanoyém kétán Filifi, Rom mwighafé yu a limánégh tesen Makedonia ndimbal yuwot. Kété yénmorangérmén tárfár efogh.
english: We traveled by big boat(ship) from Troas to Samotras, and the next day arrived to Neafolis. 12 From there we went to Filifi, a Roman with mind(important) area and ruling city of that big area of Makedonia. We stayed there many days.

nama: Sémbár néndkéfan Fol a Sailes Ngánjánjafé korayawét a wagh kermangwét Ngánjánefaf, a ámb ár kwéfkwéf méngon talawangérwén táyárwét waghan. 26 Sunsune ndimbal sokrereyam kwéfkwéf méngo sérasér esámbnetam. Táf fété méinyotio kwéfkwéf méngo sésafne kasaunawét, a méinyotio árfene sein naferyénd.
english: In midnight Fol and Sailès were paraying and singing to God, and other [who] were in darkness house listened song. 26 Suddenly big earthquake shook the posts of the darkness house. At once all the darkness house doors were opened and every people's chains fell off.

nama: Kwéfkwéf méngo wanjengégh ár nanoi, a njam néngretai kwéfkwéf méngo sésafne sauréghkaf tamorwén, fá witmafé sénté naifaye akunyéghét féf nufngoi krotio ménamén fá kéma kemnau nde kwéfkwéf méngo ár kar té nétoryénd. 28 Wénde Fol nutnai, "Yau nawaghna fémyoǃ Yénd méinyotio yéna mé yénémǃ"
english: The darkness house guarding man woke up, and when he saw the darkness house doors open, he drew this sword and about to kill himself because he thought the darkness house men(prisoners) might have escaped. 28 But Fol shouted, "Don't spoil yourself! We are all still here!"

nama: Kwéfkwéf méngo wanjengégh ár néngutnai kwayaghat a soramé ewawanayénd kwayaghé, néngénngoi kwéfkwéf méngo kénjút a nénguyai ngerngerafé Fol a Sailesfene sáfrére. 30 Féyo yémon enutoreyai kénjúta a emotangeyai, "Ndimbal, yéndon némé so yafrotan awanjarghét?"
english: The darkness house guarding man called for lights and after they brought right, he ran into the darkness house and fell down with trembling before Fol and Sailès. 30 Then he brought them.d out and asked, "Bigmen, what must I do to be saved?"

nama: Wénde Folém korayangé ásáfogh árfefaf: "Yémofem yénd ténsémét marataye moghofnar yuwon, ndemamén yénd yénre Rom yumén ár, a yénmiménd kwéfkwéf méngo kénjút. Sénonjo yénd yémofem métare yénmutorend? Yauǃ Fá fáyo táf kénaflangi a téngémnjend yénd."
english: But Fol said to the working people: "They beat us.d pubicly without a court/trail, even though we.d are Roman citizens, and threw us into darkness house. Now do they want to go out us quietly? No! They themselves must come and let us.d out."

nama: Njam Ju ár mat náyátoyénd Tesalonika kénjún ndené Folém táitotau Ngánjánene si Bereyan, ámb ár wéi kétán néngwanoyénd a amrorégh yérnyayénd ár mérén tawanjmetawét.
english: When Ju people in Tesalonika learned that Fol was preaching the talk of God in Berea, some people also went there and started arguing crowds and were congusing them.

nama: Táf fété efalo yátogh árém Fol yáfáretaménd arakaf tambén, wénde Saileséf Timotifé tamorarwén Bereyan. 15 Njam yéné árém yénémnjaménd Fol Atenét, Fol norayai yéfefaf ndené, "Sailes a Timoti tafaf táf enre wékeye." Féyo táf néngwanoyénd. Folém mer si táitotau Aten kénjún
english: At once the approving truth people sent Fol to the sea area, but Sailès and Timoti stayed in Berea. 15 When those people escort Fol to Aten, Fol said to them that, "Sailès and Timoti should join us quickly." Then they left. Fol preached good news in Aten

nama: Féyo Folém yéngéfrangoi Ju árfene áumengégh méngo a néngaflai kaka méngot, Taitus Jéstusene méngot efe témorwén Ngánján wáwefnogh ár. 8 Krisfus, Ju árfene áumengégh méngo limánégh ár, a yánjo mérnam Yuré efalo yiyátoyénd a tárfár Korintmén ár efe káyáretawét, efalo yiyátoyénd a nuwan ewalitotam.
english: Then Fol left the Ju people's meeting house and went to next house, to Taitus Jèstus' house who was a worshipper of God. 8 Krisfus, the head man of Ju people's the meeting house, and his family truly approved(believed) in the Lord and many of Korint people who heard him, truly approved(believed) and we baptized them.

nama: Njam Galio témorwén gafana Akaya ndimbal yumén, ámb Ju ár nafghayénd Fole kékmboghét a yénmasroyénd moghét. 13 Yémofem yémndayénd, "Yéné árom elimnde ár Ngánján wáwefnoghét yéné ende téfene nák eráfne."
english: When Galio became governor of Akaya big area, some Ju people got together to stop Fol and brought him to the court. 13 They said, "This man is leading the people to worship God in different way in this way he broke our law."

nama: Ámb efogh ámnjogh soramé, Antiokta kétamé Fol néngwanoi yéné yuwomé karendau Galasia yu a Frigia yu, muyé tawarametau méinyotio waitogh árét. |nmx_215wbt - Paul journey 3 [bwf-light] @en_v4.tif|col||© 2025 Wycliffe Bible Translators, Inc.|Folene nambiomén áligh (Acts 18.23—21.17)|18.23—21.17
english: After staying some days, Fol walked from Antiok around the region of Galatia area and Frigia area, gave strength to all the following men.

nama: Njam Afolos témorwén Korint tesenan, Fol tiotau mband tunamé kétán Efesos tesen néngufaryéng. Kété yémon ewinjoi ámb waitogh ár 2 a yémon emotai, "Fémofem Ngánján Mbérmbér té yanayénd njam fémofem efalo yiyátoyénd Yesu?" Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Yau, yénd yau náyárayém ndené yéna yém Ngánján Mbérmbér."
english: While Afolos was in Korint city, Fol walked through the bank/interior and he arrived at Efesos city. There he found some following men 2 and he asked them, "Did you.p receive the God Spirit when you truly approved(believed) Yesu?" They answered him, "No, we did not hear that there is a God Spirit."

nama: Féyo Folém emotai, "Endene walitogh fémofem yanayénd?" Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Jonene nu walitogh."
english: So Fol asked them, "What baptism did you.p receive?" They answered him, "Jon's Baptism."

nama: Ngánjánam yéramai Fole wafté sélngwélafé ásáfoghét. 12 Árém muku o sáláme Folém árké tiyánjangai tafayotawét enjne téfnárefaf, táf mer káyátotawét a yaufi mbérmbér kitérmbotawét.
english: God gave Fol the power to do special workings(miracles). 12 People put handkerchiefs or clothes that Fol touched to the sick people, they became good and evil spirits were going out.

nama: Méinyotio yéné yam njam kufrotau soramé, Folém mwighé yaitotam yafoghét Makedonia a Akaya a Jerusalemét. Fol norayai, "Yénandmé yénd so kuwanon kétán Rom." 22 Féyo yémon ewáfáreméng yáne sómbio wáutárégh ár, Timoti a Erastus, kétán Makedoniat, wénde fá mé témorangérwén Esian. Kérté Efesos kénjún
english: After all this had happened, Fol decided to go to Makedonia and Akaya and Jerusalem. Fol said, "After that I must go to Rom." 22 So he sent his two helpers, Timoti and Erastus, to Makedonia, but he stayed more in Esia. Trouble in Efesos

nama: Njam Folém si ewifoi, fá méinyotio budme neitaménd Ngánjánafé orayéghét. 37 Féyo táf yémofem yengamafé yambnayénd a Fol tésnetawét. 38 Fá áuwéghofnar tamorwén ménamén Fol árké norayai ndené ámb káye tane sáf yau so kor yéfandati. Féyo yémofem engémnjoyénd ndimbal boutfaf.
english: When Fol finished talk, they all knelt and talked with God. 37 Then they hugged with weeping and kissed Fol. 38 They were without joy because which Fol said that later you.p will not see my face again. Then they accompanied him to the big boat(ship).

nama: Yéné soramé, yénd nafrendamém a néngwanoyém Jerusalemét. 16 Ámb waitogh ár kétamamén Kaisaria yénngmaitoyénd a yénngémnjoyénd kétán Nasonene méngot ánde yénd so ténmorangérwén kété. Fá témorwén Saifrusmén ár a ámb fronde waitogh ár. Fol nufaryéng Jerusalemét
english: After this, we prepared and went to Jerusalem. 16 Some of the following men from Kaisaria followed us and took us to the house of Nason, where we were to stay there. He was a man from Saifros and one of the early/first following men. Fol arrived at Jerusalem

nama: Njam yénd néngufaryém Jerusalemét, efalo yátogh árém yénmumyoyénd yénd áuwéghafé. 18 Ámb efghon Fol a ámb ár néngaflayém kétán Jemsefaf, méinyotio sénko ár kété tamorwén. 19 Folém áuwégh si ewaramai a tawaufrotau méinyotio yam némé Ngánjánam tafrotau Téndo árfefaf yáne ásáfoghan.
english: When we arrive at Jerusalem, the belivers welcomed us with joy. 18 The next day Fol and other people went to Jems, and all the head people were there. 19 Fol greeted them and told everything what God had done to the Side people in his work.

nama: Ámb efghon Foléf engmormén ámb árfé a yémofem yafrotaménd yéné téméndmén yam ndernáye témorwén wányányéghmén. Yéné soramé, fá néngwanoi wáwefnogh méngo sifayat a tamndetau ghéngén wárogh ár, "Kétán árké efghot so em sái kénamndangi njúnnjúnofnar yam so kefongé, yéndfem so enérsam ghéngén yénat." Fol yerayénd
english: The next day Fol went with the men and they did what was spoken for washing. After they did that, he went to the worshipping house area and told the man who burn the sacrifice(priest), "When the amount of days for becoming without.dust are finished, we will bring sacrifices for that." They held Fol

nama: Njam Fol ménjághétro témorwén kétán fiyarafene sifayat, yémo témotangé fiyaré ndimbal sénko ár, "Féyotaro yénd so korayangén ámb si fefaf?"
english: When the soldiers were about to take Fol into the soldier's place, he asked the soldiers' big head man(commander), "May I say something to you?"

nama: Fém yéné ném Ijifmén ár emo yérnyai awifarégh nambétio elimai 4,000 fiyaré kétán fanfne sifayat?"
english: Are you the Ijif man who led arguing recently [and] led 4,000 soldiers into the desert?"

nama: Folém yawangoi, "Yau, yénd yau! yénd swém Ju ár, kété náráftamén Tarsus tesenan, árké yém mer marataye matkaf tesen Silisia kénjún. Féyotaro yénd so kwumyo yéné árfefaf siot."
english: Fol answered him, "No, I am not! I am a Ju man, there I was born in Tarsus city, which is famous city in Silisia. Please let me speak to these people."

nama: Fiyaré ndimbal sénko árom yumyoi siyot, Fol nokayoi ratayan a ekmboi ár. Fá njam métar náyátoyénd, fá korayangé yéfefaf Ibru sie.
english: The soldiers' big head man allowed him to talk, Fol stood on the steps and stop/make silent people. When they became quiet, he spoke to them in Ibru language

nama: Njam yémofem yiyárayénd Fol korayau Ibru sie, fá métar namndayénd.
english: When they heard Fol speak to them in Ibru language, they became quiet.

nama: "Ámb efogh sotan, njam kaka yéngyátoyén Damaskos, sélngwéle njafarmén ndimbal kwayaghayam wélálái yénd. 7 Yénd nuyáyén mbandot a náyárayén kém a norayai tafaf ndené, 'Solǃ Solǃ Fémo némamén yénd wésmete?'
english: One day about noon, when I was getting close to Damaskos, suddenly strong light from heaven shone around me. 7 I fell to the ground and heard a voice and said to me that, 'Sol! Sol! Why are you hitting me?'

nama: "Yénd namotayén, 'Fém efe ném, Yuré?'
english: I asked, "Who are you, Lord?"

nama: Tane mérnam yinjoyénd kwayaghé, wénde yémofem yau yáyámngoyénd yáne kém efe korayau tafaf.
english: My companions saw the light, but they did not understand his voice who was speaking to me.

nama: "Yéndon yémotayén, 'Némé so yéndon yafrotan, Yuré?'
english: I asked him, "What shall I do, Lord?"

nama: Tane mérnam kwémnjawét Damaskos kénjút, ménamén ndimbal kwayaghayam ghékéf kwéfkwéf wiyátoi.
english: My groups/companions led me by the hand to Damaskos, because strong light had me blind.

nama: "Ár yétkwén Ananias yénmormén ta fandaghét. Fá témorwén Ngánján wáwefnogh ár a ndimbal kéráye tutémndawét Ju árém efe méinyotio kété tamorangérwén. 13 Fá nokayoi ta kaka korayangé, 'Fútar Sol, kéretaǃ' Táf fété néretayén yinjoyén Ananias.
english: A man name Ananias came to see me. He was God worshipper and highly respected by the Ju people who were all living there. 13 He stood close me and said, 'Brother Sol, see!' At once I saw [and] found Ananias!

nama: "Yéné soramé yénd néngangoyén Jerusalemét a Ngánjánafé koraiwém wáwefnogh méngon. Yéndon yinjoyén ghékéf waingégh yam 18 a Yuram kwémndetau, 'Wékeye kuwano Jerusalem téfrango ménamén yémofem yau so tumyongi fene afrogh si tanemén.'
english: After this I went back to Jerusalem, I was talking with God in the worshipping house. I saw a eye passover thing 18 and the Lord said me, "Quickly go & leave Jerusalem because they will not accept your reporting/testifying talk about me.'

nama: "Féyo Yuré norayai tafaf, 'Kuwano, yéndon so némáfáretan fém nayu yuwot kétán Téndo árfefaf.'" Fol naufaryéng yénd swém Rommén ár
english: Then the Lord said to me, "Go, I will send you far away to the Side people." Fol reported I am a Rom man

nama: Ár mérnam kor merkéráye káyáretawét Folefaf kétánotio njam fá norayai téndo árfenemén. Yémofem kém euyoyénd nékwan a kutnawét, "Yéné ár titérmbongi yéné yutaǃ Fá yau féyotaro yém mé ghérsé sái yémǃ"
english: The crowd were listening carefully to Fol until (when) he spoke about Side people. Then they raised voices with angry and shouted, "Remove this man from this land! He is not fit to live!"

nama: Njam fiyaré sénko ár náyárai yéné si, fá naflai kétán fiyaré ndimbal sénko ároefaf a yémndai, "Yau yafrota yéné yam yéné árofefaf. Yéné ár siyém Rommén ár."
english: When the soldiers' head man heard this talk, he went to the soldiers' big head man(commander), asked him, "Do not do this to this man. This man is a Roman citizen."

nama: Fiyaré ndimbal sénko ár néngaflai Folefaf a yémotai, "Kwaufro ta, fém fété ném Rommén ár?" Folém yawangoi, "A, yénd fété wém."
english: The soldiers' big head man(commander) went to Fol and asked him, "Tell me, are you really a Roman citizen?" Fole answered him, "Yes, I am really."

nama: Féyo fiyaré ndimbal sénko ár norayai, "Yéndo ndimbal mani té ekman so kamndangé Rommén ár." Folém yawangoi, "Wénde yénd náráftamén Rommén árot."
english: Then the soldiers' big head man(commander) said, "I paid a lot of money for becoming Rom people." Fol answered him, "But I was born as a Roman citizen."

nama: Fiyaré efe ngiot a ámoghétro femormén Folefaf, táf fété yau yafrotaménd. Fiyaré ndimbal sénko ár férféram yifoi, ménamén yémon emndai yánjo ár Fole umbghét, wénde Fol témorwén Rommén ár. Fol yakai Ju sénko árfene áumengégh sáfrére
english: Soldiers who were about to whip and to ask Fol, at once they didn't do it. The soldiers' big head man was afraid, because he told his men to bind Fol, but Fol was a Roman citizen. Fol stood before Ju head men's meeting

nama: Ámb efghon, fiyaré ndimbal sénko árom téronjau téfén némamén Fol tékarotawét Ju árém. Féyo ámb efghon fiyaré ndimbal sénko árom Folene sein yaferyéng. Fá wéi emndai limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a méinyotio Ju sénko ár áumengéghét. Yémon yéngémnjoi Fol a Ju sénko árfene sáfrére nokayoi. |CN02020B.tif|col||© 1996 David C Cook. Used by permission.|Foléf korayawét Ju árfene limánégh árfé (Acts 22.30)|23.30
english: The next day, the soldiers' big head man were looking for the reason why the Ju rejected Fol. So the next day the soldiers' big head man take the chains off Fol. He also said to/ordered the leading sacrifice burning people(high priests) and whole Ju head men to gather. He brought Fol and had him stand before Ju head men.

nama: Efe tawakayongérwén Fole kaka norayayénd, "Fémon yasalite Ngánjánene limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár!"
english: Those who were standing near Fol said, "You are insulting God's leading burning sacrifice men!"

nama: Folém ewawangoi, "Fútaréf, yénd yau mat kwémorwén ndené fá siyém limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár. Ménamén si ndené yékai, 'Yaufi si yau norayati féfenjo limánégh ároefaf.'"
english: Fol answered them, "Friends, I didn't know that he was leading burning sacrifice men. Because it is written, 'Don't speak evil to your leading man.'"

nama: Fol mat náyátoi ndené ámb ár tamorwén Saduki ár a ámb Farasi ár, fá néngutnayéng ár mérnafefaf, "Tane fútaréf, yénd swém Farasi ár, Farasi árfene ambum. Yénd wakayong ufoghamé ménamén tane méghmégh kérta anoghmén."
english: Fol realized that some men were Saduki men and other people Farasi men, he shouted to the people, "My brothers, I am Farasi man, the son of a Farasi man. I stand on trial because of my hope of the resrrection of the dead.

nama: Njam fá norayai yéné si, Farasi ár a Saduki ár nafaloyénd a éwigh yérnyayénd. 8 Ménamén Saduki ár korayawét ndené kér ár yau so nanotat ghérsat, yémofem efalo yau tiyátotawét ndené njafar si résagh ár a mbérmbér kété em. Wénde Farasi árém efalo tiyátotawét méinyotio yéné yam.
english: When he said this talk, Farasi men and Saduki men were divided and started to argument. 8 Because Saduki men say that dead people will not rise from death to life, they don't truly approve(believe) that there are men carrying heavenly message(angels) and spirits. But Farasi men truly approve(believe) all these things.

nama: Yéné sémbáran Yuré nokayoi kaka Folefaf a yémndai, "Férfér yau némǃ Ndené fété kés noraye tanemén Jerusalem kénjún, ndenéyameyo tanemén so wéi nafrote kété Romén." Yémofem mwighé téfaronawét Fole ngiot
english: That night the Lord stood near to Fol and said, "Don't be afraid! As you have told about me in Jerusalem, you also speak there in Rom about me. They planned to kill Fol

nama: Wénde njam Fole yánjafam náyárai ndernáye Ju ár mwighé kémnawét yá ngiot, fá táf néngaflai fiyarafene sifayat a Fole yaufroi.
english: But when Fol's nephew(sitster's son) heard how Ju people had decided to kill him, he went to the soldier's place(fortress) and told Fol.

nama: Féyo Folém yémotai ámb fiyaré sénko ár a témndangé, "Téngwasro yéné totér ár kétán fiyaré ndimbal sénko ároefaf, ménamén yáfaf ámb si em yá waufroghét."
english: Then Fol called one of the soldiers' head man and said, "Take this young man to soldiers' big head man, because he has some talk to tell him."

nama: Féyo yémo yéngémnjoi fiyaré ndimbal sénko ároefaf. Fiyaré sénko árom témotangé, "Fol, kwéfkwéf méngo árom wémnde. Fá ténmasro yéné totér ambum fefaf, ménamén yáfaf ámb si em fe sái kémaufrongé."
english: So he took him to the soldiers' big head man. The soldiers' head man asked, "Fol, the darkness house man(prisoner), spoke to me. He asked me to bring this young man to you, because he has some talk to tell you."

nama: Fiyaré ndimbal sénko árom yéngwasroi totér ár téndot ménát ár yau so káyárangayénd a témotangé, "Fene ménde némé yém kwaufro?"
english: The soldiers' big head man took the young man beside so that people could not to hear and asked, "What do you want to tell me?"

nama: Fiyaré ndimbal sénko árom yémndai totér ár, "Yau taufro ende ndené fémo té waufro yéné ta." Féyo yémo yéngwatembai totér ár. Fiyaré sénko árom yáfáretam Fol kétán Kaisariat
english: The soldiers' big head man said to young man, "Don't tell anyone that you have told this to me." Then he sent the young man away. Soldiers' leader sends Fol to Kaisaria

nama: Yémon emotangeyayai yánjo sómbio fiyaré sénko ár a emndeyai, "Takafend 200 fiyaré, 70 os wérse ár a 200 námb táikér ár so kuwanongi Kaisariat 9 aklok sénonjo sémbár. 24 Ámb os taramend Fole ménát fá merro so néngérse gafana Feliksefaf."
english: He called two of his soldiers' head men and told them, "Pick 200 soldiers and 70 horse riding men and 200 bow strong people(spearmen) to go Kaisaria at 9 tonight. 24 Privide some horses for Fol so that he may be taken safely to Governor Felix."

nama: Yémo yéné férén yéfarotam ndené,
english: He wrote this letter like that,

nama: Klaudius Lisias, Kétán fene utmanégh yétkwén Gafana Feliks, Áuwégh yém.
english: Klaudius Lisias, To your honorable name Governor Felix, Greetings.

nama: Ámb Ju ár nufnyayénd wátaranégh kénjút, fá norayayénd ndené méinyotio yam Tétulusém árké noyarai efalo yém. Fol nawamarote fáyo
english: The other Ju people joined in the complaint, he told that everything Tètulus said was true. Fol defended for himself

nama: Sómbio yunjéf soramé, Forsius Festus nosoi Gafana Feliksene sifayan. Wénde ménamén Feliks ménde témorwén Ju árfene ménde sái tawawafrotau, yémo yéfrangoi Fol kwéfkwéf méngon.
english: After two years, Forsius Festus replaced/succeeded Feliks's as governor. But because Feliks wanted to do Ju people's desire, he left Fol in darkness house.

nama: Féyo Fol fáyo nawamarotai, "Yéndon yau ámb mámáfi tafrotan kétán Ju árfene nákfaf o wáwefnogh méngofaf o Rom tuk warsagh ár Kaisarefaf."
english: Then Fol defended himself, "I haven't done any wrong to Ju people's law or against the worshipping house or Rom high ruling man Kaisar."

nama: Festus ménde témorwén Ju ár sái áuwéghét taméindau, Folefaf norayai, "Fém ménde té ném álighét Jerusalemét a sái némakai tane sáfrére yéné wátaranéghan?"
english: Festus wanted to make Ju people happy, he asked Fol, "Are you willing to go to Jerusalem and stand before me there on these complaints?"

nama: Festus yánjo árfé korayawét, yéné soramé fá norayai Folefaf, "Fém té norayai, 'Kaisarém so náyárete tane mogh.' Yénémaménnde, fém so kuwano Rom tuk warsagh ár Kaisarefaf!" Festusém yaufroi warsagh ár Agrifai Folenemén
english: Festus talked with his people and then he said to Fol, "You.s have said, 'Kaisar will hear my court.' Therefore, you.s will go to Rom high ruling man Kaisar!" Festus told the ruling man(king) Agrifa about Fol

nama: Féyo Agrifa norayai Festusefaf, "Yéndon so yiyáretan fá némé si njam noraya." Yémon yawangoi, "Káye fémo so yiyárete." Fol noraye Agrifafaf
english: Then Agrifa said to Festus, "I will listen to him what he is saying." He answered him, "Tomorrow you will listen to him." Fol apeaks to Agrifa

nama: "Warsagh ár Agrifa, yénd áuwéghafé wém fe sáfrére sénonjo táf yéndon norayan awamarogh si méinyotio Ju árfene wánangoghmén, 3 ménamén fém mer mat ném ndernáye Ju ár emor a yéfene fénatayam. Féyo fém náyáreta tafaf métare!
english: "King Agrifa, I am glad before you.s today as I make defence against all complaints of all the Ju people, 3 because you know well about how Ju people live and their different doing. So you listen to me patiently!

nama: "Féyo yéndon yémotayén, 'Efe fém ném, Yuré?'
english: Then I asked him, "Who are you, Lord?"

nama: Njam Folém mé korayau, Festusém nutnai, "Fol, fém onon ném! Fenjo ndimbal otamegham néméinde ononot!"
english: While Fol was still speaking, Festus shouted, "Fol, you are crazy. Your big learning caused you crazy!"

nama: Féyo Agrifa norayai Folefaf, "Fém ndené nemne yéné tekofnare fémon so kwiyáto wékeye yénd ndené fété efalo yátogh ár?"
english: Then Agrifa said to Fol, "Do you think in a not.long(short time) you can make me quickly a truly approve man(believer)?"

nama: Folém yawangoi, "Ténjfi o tombé kéráye, tane orayégh Ngánjánefaf feyot a méinyotio emofem wiyáretat yénd sénonjo so kénamndangi efalo yátogh ár ndené yénd swém, wénde yénd yau ménde wém fém sái kamndangi kwéfkwéf méngo ár ndené yénd."
english: Fol answered, "Short or long time, my talking with God for you and all who are listening to me today may become truly approve people(believers) like I am, but I do not want you to become darkness people(prisoners) like me."

nama: Warsagh ár, gafana, Bernis a méinyotio efe tamorangérwén yémafé fá nokayoyénd. 31 Soramé yémofem yéfrangoyénd a fá nufngoyénd si yéfe kénjúnro, "Yéné árom némé yau tafrote némndafi árkémamén krot so tékmangi o kwéfkwéf méngot tényawangi."
english: The ruling man(king), the governor, Bernis and all who was with them stood up. 31 After they left and they began saying among themselves, "This man is not doing anything that put do death or putting into darkness house."

nama: Agrifa norayai Festusefaf, "Njam yéné ár yau té norayai Kaisarefaf ménát sái káyáretau yane si, féyo yéndfem so téngwurtongém."
english: Agrifa said to Festus, "If this man had not spoken to Kaisar to hear his talk, then we could take him out."

nama: Fauréghétro témorwén Folém ewamnendai njamke nénet, a emndai, "14 efogh fém té tam mámé mwighé a ámb njamke yau tánetati. 34 Yéndon ewamnendan fém, féyo, njamke tánetangi, ghérsé sái mé em. Yéné yafrotati a fém so mer em."
english: Just before dawn Fol asked them to eat food, and said. He said to them, "For 14 days you have been so worried and you haven't eaten food. 34 I ask you, then, eat food, your so you will live. Do this and you will be fine."

nama: Njam yénd merro nufaryém, yéndfem yáyamngoyém fér yétkwén Malta. 2 Fér ár efe tákmangérwén yémofem yénmumyoyénd mere a fútar náyátoyém. Yémofem fés yétayaménd a yénmumyoyénd yénd méinyotio ménamén nu kafamndau a kurférmén.
english: When we safely arrived, we learned the island name Malta. 2 The island people who were living they accepted well and became friend. They made a fire and accepted us all because it was raining and cold.

nama: Yémofem yawangoyénd, "Yéndfem ámb yau némé férén ewinjoyém Judiamén fenemén. Ámb yau téfene ár efe enmormén kétándmé nafroyénd o norayayénd yaufi si fenemén. 22 Wénde yénd ménde yéném áyárghét fene si némé em, ménamén yénd mat yéném árém norayat yaufi si marataye yéné totér mérénmén."
english: They answered him, "We have not any letters from Judia about you. None of our people who have come from there has reported or said anything bad talk about you. 22 But we want to hear your.s talk what you have, because we knew people are saying bad things about this new group widely."

nama: "'Kuwano yéné árfefaf a koraya, "Fém so náyáretati wénde mat yau so náyátotati. Fémofem so yéfandati wénde yau so tayamngongi.
english: "Go to this people and say, "You will be hearing but never understand. You will look but you never recognize.

nama: Ménamén yéné árfene tikéf té nénamndai táikér, yémofem táikér yéfandat áyárghét, a yémofem yéfenjo ghékéf té eumbértongi. Féyo mété táf yau néretat yéfenjo ghékfe, a yau náyáretat yéfenjo téngane, a efalo yau yiyátotat yéfenjo tikfe a kawengongi ménát yéndon so mer táyáton fá."'"
english: Because this people's heart has become stubborn, they became hard hearing [with their ears], and they have closed their eyes. So they might not see with their eyes, and couldn't hear with their ears, and they couldn't truly approve(believe) with their heart and turn so that I would heal them.

nama: Yénémaménnde yénd Fol ménde wém fém mat so em Ngánjánene wanjarégh té yéngramai kétán Téndo árfefaf, a fá so náyáretat! 29 {c{ ...f* {c{28.29 Yau siménj
english: Therefore I Fol, want you know that God's salvation has been given/offered to the Side people, and they will listen!

nama: Sómbio yunjéf Fol yémorangérmén kété yáne mani faimén méngon a taumyotau fá efe tanmormén yá fandaghét. 31 Yémo tawaufrotau Ngánján limánéghmén a tawatametau Yuré Yesu Kerisoenemén férférofnar a emo yau tékmbongai.
english: For two years Fol stayed there his lenting house and accepted them who came to see him. 31 He was telling about the ruling of God and taught about the Lord Yesu Keriso without fear and no one stopped him.

nama: Fol, Yesu Kerisoene faiofnar ásáfogh ár, nénamndai Yesuene muyafé ár a fénataye náyátoi Ngánjánene mer si waitoghét.
english: Fol, a without.payment working man(servant) of Keriso Yesu, became a man with Yesu's authority(apostle) and become defferently to preach God's good talk.

nama: A yéndon yéfarotan méinyotio féfeyot kétán efe em Romén efe euwete Ngánjánam a namndetat yáne njúnnjúnofnar ár. Ngárám a krufrát féfeyot Ngánjáneta téfene Afé a kétamé Yuré Yesu Keriso. Folene ménde yafoghét Romét
english: And I am writing to all of you.p to whom are in Rom whom God loves and became{u{ ...f* {u{1.7 became whom he called and you became his without.dust(holy) people: Grace and peace to you.p from God our Father and from the Lord Yesu Keriso. Fol's longing to visit Rom

nama: Yéné téfnan, Ngánjánam eramai kétán wáiwáiafé ménde yam wafroghét. Yéfene amafam yengoyénd árfé kémégh yam kétán amafro kémégh yamfaf. 27 Ndené yameyo árém yéfrangoyénd amafafé kémégh yam a nufngoyénd ár ghakér ro yam fárofáro. Ár wáiwáiafé yam nefngoyénd fárofáro, a yanayénd fai yéfenjo yaufimén.
english: Because of this, God gave them for doing shameful desires. Their women changed sleeping with men into women sleeping with women. 27 In the same way the men left sleeping with woman and started men sleeping with men each other. Men started shameful things with each other, and received penalty for their sins.

nama: Némé yénd so norayan yénamé? Yénd merro yéném? Yaufifi! Yénd té efalo nauyafongém ndené Ju ár a Téndo ár ndenaro em méinyotio yaufi mbanmbanan. 10 Ndené fété kés yéfarotaménd: Ámb efe yau mbarkánd yém, ámbiro ámb yau;
english: What will we say about this? Are we well? Never! We have truly shown that Ju people and Side people same are all under sin. 10 As it is written: “No one is straight, not even one;

nama: efe ámb yau yém emo mat yiyátoté yau ámb emo yéronje Ngánján.
english: No one understands no one is looking for God.

nama: Méinyotio té kangotat fá té nénafghangi nénáyátongi fifiofnar, efe yau yém ámbiro emo ewafrote mer, yau ámbiro ámb yém.
english: All have turned away, they have combined and became without.meaning, there is no one who does good, not even one.

nama: Yéfene kémngaféne sem ásauréghkaf mbéwé. Yéfene mbírmbíram yafrote unyégh. Yéfene si sem ndenanit kamban rarégh.
english: Their throats are open graves. Their lips do lie. Their talk is like snake bite.

nama: Yéfene sénféne siyém waghanégh a njérmat si afoghare.
english: Their mouths are full of cursing and bitterness.

nama: Yéfene kafkaf wékeye em ár ngiot.
english: Their feet are quick to kill people.

nama: Awirorghafé a usérmboghafé eyota,
