english: They walk with ruining and with destroying,

nama: krufrát ghérsé fá mafina em.
english: life of peace they do not know.

nama: Kété yau yém Ngánján férfér yéfene ghékfan."
english: There is no fear of God in their eyes.”

nama: "Frengéghkaf fá em endefene yaufiyam tawalindangé, endefene yaufiyam rautoghkaf em.
english: “Blessed are those whose sins he(God) washed, whose sins are covered.

nama: Frengéghkaf yéné ár yém endene yaufiyam Yuram so yau ewawafte yéfefaf!"
english: Blessed is this man whose sin the Lord will never count against them.”

nama: Yéndon yéné mbanmban yafrotamén méinyotio efoghta ménamén yéné yém táikér matot. Fronde fémofem té taumyotawét féfenjo fifi kafe ménát tamorwén yaufiyamoene faiofnar ásáfogh ár, fém yaufiyamotro tamorangérwén. Wénde sénonjo fém táf karamangi mbarkándoene faiofnar ásáfogh árot ménát wafroghét yéné árké yém njúnnjúnofnar.
english: I am using this picture from everyday life because it is hard to understand. Previously, you.p have allowed your.p body parts to be without.payment working men(servants) of sin, you lived for sin. But now you must give yourselves as without.payment working men(servants) of straight thing to do that which is without.dirty(holy).

nama: Féyo, ámb ár mé té noraya, 'Yéné fifi ndené yém ámb meram yénérsam kér féfefaf.' Yaufifi! Yaufiyamam yénérsam kér tayot. Yaufiyam Ngánjánene mer nákan nauyafotam ndené yénd kwémorwén kértafé. Yéné téfnan, yéndfem yéfandam ndené yaufiyam fété yém minde mámáfi. Ngánjánene mer nák kénjúmé yaufiyam násáfotam minde yaufiot.
english: So, someone might say, ‘This means that something good brought death to you.p.’ Never! Sin brought death to me. Sin used God's good law to show that I was in trouble(guilty). Because of that, we can see that sin is really bad. Through God's good law sin works for very evil.

nama: Emo so yénfalote yénd kétamé Kerisoene uwéghta? Féyotaro táikéryam o kérté yamam o ngiyam o siogh o firoyam o kér kakayam o witmafé sénté náifé? 36 Ndené Buk si noraye, "Fene téfnan yéndfem kér yéfandam méinyotio efghon; yénd ndenéyame yéném sif ngiot tawafngongi."
english: Who can separate us from the love of Keriso? Can trouble or hardship or striking or hunger or nakedness or close to death or sharp knife with both side(sword)? 36 As the scripture say, “For your.p sake we see the death every day; we are like sheep start to be killed.”

nama: Yéné fifi yém ndené yau em mé fifie ambum kétamé fifie ákita efe emndetat Ngánjánene ambum, wénde yáne efalo áki ambum fá em efe náráftat yáne unyéghofnar sian. 9 Yéné yém némé Ngánján unyéghofnar si norayai Ebraamefaf, "Kété kaféghmén efghon yénd so wéném, a Sara so yém ambumafé."
english: This means that they are not bodily children from bodily descendants who are called Godʼs children, but his true descendants are born through his without.lying talk(promise). 9 This is what God said without.lying talk(promise) to Abraham, “At the chosen time I will come, and Sara will have a son.”

nama: Ndernáye so norayam? Némé Ngánján yau yém mbarkánd? Yaufifi. 15 Ménamén fá té norayai Mosesefaf, "Tane mer yam so yém yáfaf endefaf mer yam yém, a tane ghérghérsisé so yém yáfaf endefaf ghérghérsisé yém."
english: What shall we say? Is God not straight? Never! 15 Because he says to Moses, “My good thing will be to him on whom I have good thing, and my mercy will be to him on whom I have mercy.”

nama: 'Ngánján té norayai yéfefaf, 'Fém yau em tane ár.' Yéné sifayanyo ánde fá norayai ndené, árém so sénonjo emndetat fá "Ngánjánene ambumtértér, efe túmén so em ghérsé."'
english: ‘God had said to them, “You.p are not my people.” In that place where he said that, people will now call them “Children of God, who always lives.” ’

nama: Aisaya kutnau Israil ár téfnan: "Ndemamén Israil ár em tárfár ndenanit mirinit arakaf téndon, mé nambio árro so kunjarngi;
english: Aisaya shouted out concerning Israil people: “Though the Israil peoples are many like the sand of the seashore, only few people will be saved.

nama: Yuré Ngánjánam so tifongé yánjo ásáfogh wékeye. Yémo té tawawéngsote yánjo ár némé yémo so ewafrote. A yémo so tékratan tákmangé fá féyotio.'
english: The Lord God will finish his work quickly. He has warned his people what he will do. And he will put them in suffering completely.’

nama: Ndené fété Aisaya ndernáye norayai tándái, "Yau njam wafté kér ro Yuram ténéfrangongai yénd nambio, yénd so ténmalindangai ndenanit Sodom yénd so ténmalindangai ndenanit Gomora." Ndimbal mwighafnar Israil ár
english: Just as Aisaya said long time ago, “If the Lord Almighty had not left us some, we would be destroyed like Sodom, we would be destroyed like Gomora.” Israil peopleʼs without big mind(faith)

nama: Wénde Israilmén ár yau mat tamorwén? Néméwét, fronde Moses korayau, "Yéndon so táyáton waramnjagh ár ménamén ármén efe yau em tane ár. Yéndon so eméindan nékwafé ménamén ármén efe yau em mat tanemén."
english: But did Israil people not understand? Yes, first Moses says, ‘I will make you.p jealous people because of people who are not my people. I will cause you.p angry because of people who don't know me.

nama: Wéi soramé Aisaya marataye norayai, "Yénd yémofem winjoyénd yéné árém emofem yénd yau kwénronjawét; yénd nauyafoyén yéndio yéfefaf efe yau kamotawét tanemén."
english: Also later Aisaya widely says, “They found me those people who were not looking for me; I showed myself to those who were not asking for me.”

nama: Wénde Israil árfenemén yémon norayai, "Méinyotio efghon yéndon tane ngángé tasafotan yéfefaf, wénde fá yau káyáretat tafaf a kamronam yéndfé."
english: But about Israil people he says, “In all day I strecthed my hands to them but they did not hear me and argue with me."

nama: Deifid noraye, "Yéfene njamke kitaré so kénamndangé ndénndén a urér. Yéfene frengégham yéfune yéfeyot usérmbogh, a so tawanangi yémofem némat ménde em.
english: Deifid says: “May their eating table become a long trap and a trap. May their blessings produce them to confuse, and they will receive they want.

nama: Yéfene ghékéf so kwéfkwéf náyátotat ménát fá yau so néretat, a yéfene sémsot so ewáwefno tuot!" Israil árfene kenagh yau yém ambino
english: May their eyes become dark so that they cannot see, and their backs be bent forever.” All Israil people's rejection is not forever.

nama: Táf fémo njam taram fronde féskaf flawé karéf Ngánjáne, féyo méinyotio féskaf flawé so yém Ngánjáne. Táf wén sérémb njam em Ngánjáne, féyo kafekefe wéi so em Ngánjáne.
english: If you give the first piece of cooked flawé(bread) to God, then all the bread will be to God. If the roots of a tree belong to God, then the branches will also be God's.

nama: A yéndon so yafrotan yéné árnyégh yémafé njam yéndon ewawitan yéfene yaufiyam."
english: And I will make this covenant with them when I take away their sins.”

nama: O, nderé merfifi Ngánján yém téfene! Nderé kénjkam em yáne káfeté mwighé a matyam! Nderé táikér yém téfeyot mat yiyátongém yáne mwighé farorégh a yáne end! 34 "Efe ámb mat yém Yurane mwighé? Efe ámb yém yáne mwighé wáutárégh ár?
english: Oh, how really good is God to us! How deep are his wisdom and knowledge! How hard to us become knowledge(understand) his decisions and his way! 34 “Who knows the mind of the Lord? Who is able to be his mind helping man?

nama: Emo ámb némé yaram Ngánjáne, ménát Ngánjánam sái fai taramangé?
english: Who has ever given anything to God, so that God will give payment?”

nama: Yá tambén a yáne kénjúmé a yáyotro méinyotio rokar em. Yáyotro so yém ndimbal yétkwén tuot! Efalo.
english: From him and through him and only for him are all things. Only for him be the big name(glory) forever! Amen.

nama: Efrendati fá emofem némusérmbotat fém. Frengéghro tawaram yau tawafalngo. 15 Náuwétati yémafé efe náuwetat, a nendati yémafé efe nendat. 16 Emor ámbiro mwighaye méinyotio árfé. Yau tuktuk yéngfandé, wénde yéné árfé táf nawareindati efe em yuwon ghérsafé. Yau nemnati fém mat kar em méinyotio.
english: Bless those who persecute you.p. Give only blessing and do not curse. 15 Rejoice with those who rejoice, and weep with those who weep. 16 Live by one mind all the people. Do not be proud, but must associate with people of low life(humble). Don't think you.p know it all.

nama: Wénde ewafrotati yéné yam ndenáye Buk si noraye, "Féfene mék téfnár njam siogh em, emanjnati njamkeye. Njam nuam erameta, tawaramangi nu yéfe nénet, a fá so wáiwáiyam eramete ménamén némé yam té tafrotat féfefaf."
english: But do these things as the Buk(scripture) says: “If your.p enemies are hungry, feed them with food. If they are thirsty, give them a water for drink, and he will give them shame what they have done to you.p .”

nama: Yau taumyongi yaufiyamam sái fene ghérsé tawainde, wénde tawaindangi yaufiyam meryam wafroghe.
english: Don't allow evil thing conquer your life, but conquer evil thing by doing good things.

nama: Yau táf árfene wafángogh mani{d{ ...f* {d{13.8 wafángogh mani what is meaning? ekmang féfefef, yanaro túmén fai so yém sái euwetati féfe kénjún, {e{ ...f* {e{13.8 Yau táf árfene wafángogh mani ekmang féfefef, yanaro túmén fai so yém sái euwetati féfe kénjún, need be BT and check the meaning.
english: Must not put people's pay backmpney to you.p, let no debt remain outstanding, only this continuing debt to love each other, because people who love other friends has become true(fulfilled) the law. 9 The law, “Do not commit adultery,” “Do not kill the people. Do not steal. Do not take people's things by mind. Other law might go this, all are summed up in this one law, “Love your.s friend as yourself.” 10 Love does not produce bad to a friend. Therefore in love law become true(fulfill).

nama: Néméwét, yéndfem méinyotio so yarametam wangogh téfenjomén yáyot Ngánjáne.
english: Yes, we will all give an account of ourselves to God.

nama: Wéikor ndené noraye, "Náuwétati, fém Téndo ár, Ngánjánene árfé!"
english: Again, it says, “Rejoice, you.p Side people, with God's people.”

nama: A wéikor, "Yarsati Yuré, méinyotio fémofem Téndo árém, Yuyotati fá, fém méinyotio ár."
english: And again, “Praise the Lord, all you.p Side people. Praise him, all you people.”

nama: A wéikor, Aisaya noraye, "Ámb ár kétamé Jesiene mérénta so kénamndangé waftafé, efe so kokayongé sái elimnda méinyotio mband marat, Téndo ár so em méghmégh yáfaf."
english: And again, Aisaya says, “One man from Jesi's family will became with power, one who will arise to rule over all the nations; the Side people will hope to him.”

nama: Méghméghafé Ngánjánam so ewafote méinyotio áuwéghe a krufrát ménamén fémofem yiyátotati fá, ménát fém so afoghare em méghméghan Ngánján Mbérmbér waftayan. Folene misi ásáfogh Téndo árfeyot
english: May the God of hope fill you.p with all joy and peace because you.p trust in him, so that you.p may overflow with hope by the power of the God Spirit. Fol the minister to the Side people

nama: Áuwégh tawaraménd Frisila a Akwila, tane mérne ásáfogh ár Keriso Yesuene kénjún. 4 Yémofem ekmetat yéfenjo ghérsé ta wanjarégh téfnan. Yénd erametan kanjo si yéfefaf, yau yéndro, wénde méinyotio Téndo árfene Yesuene mérén wéi. 5 Áuwégh wéi si tawaramangi Yesuene mérnot sái náumendat yéfene méngon.
english: Give greetings to Frisila and Akwila, my fellow workers in the Keriso Yesu. 4 They put their lives behalf to help me. I give thank talk to them, not only I, but all the outside man's Yesu's families(churches) as well. 5 Give greetings also to the Yesu's family(church) that meet in their house.

nama: Áuwégh si taramangi Merie, efe kásáfote mindefifi féfeyot. 7 Áuwégh si tawaraménd yéfe Andronikus a Junias, tane sómbio mérénmén emofé yéndfé mérne tényawangérwén kwéfkwéf méngon. Fá ámb em utmanéghafé Yesuene muyafé ár kénjún, a fá frondeyo tamorwén Keriso kénjún yénd soramé.
english: Give greetings to Meri, who has worked so hard for you.p. 7 Give greetings also to Andronikus and Junias, my two relatives who were in darkness house with me. They are highly respected among the men with Yesu's authority(apostles), and they first came into Keriso I did after.

nama: Áuwégh si taramangi Ámbliatuse, efe yéndon yuwetan Yurane kénjún. 9 Áuwégh si taramangi Urbanuse, téfene mérne ásáfogh ár Kerisoene kénjún, a tane áuwéghafé fútar Stákis. 10 Áuwégh si taramangi Afelese, mer ár efe yém efalo yátoghkaf Kerisoene kénjún. Áuwégh si tawaramangi yéfe efe em Arostobulusene méngon. 11 Áuwégh si taramangi Erodion, tane mérénmén. Áuwégh si tawaramangi yéfe efe em Narkisusene méngon efe em Yurane kénjún.
english: Give greetings to Ámbliatus, whom I love in the Lord. 9 Give greetings also to Urbanus, our co-worker in Keriso, and to my loving friend Stákis. 10 Give greetings to Afeles, a good man who is approved in Keriso. Give greetings to those who are in the family of Aristobulus. 11 Give greetings to Erodion, my realtive. Give greeting to them who are in the family of Narkisus who are in the Lord.

nama: Áuwégh si tawaraménd yéfe Trifena a Trifosa, yéné amaf efe mindefifi kásáfotat Yurane kénjún. Áuwégh si taramangi tane áuwéghafé fútare Fersis, ámb amaf efe mindefifi kásáfotau Yurane kénjún. 13 Áuwégh si taramangi Rufuse, yékafayénd Yurane kénjún, a yáne amé, efe témorwén tayot amanit wéi. 14 Áuwégh si taramangi Asinkrituse, Flegon, Ermas, Fatrobas, Ermas, a yéfene mérén kés em yémafé. 15 Áuwégh so taramangi Filologus, Julia, Nereus a yáne mérés, a Olimfas a méinyotio Yurane ár kés em yémafé.
english: Give greetings to Trifena and Trifosa, these women who work in the Lord. Give greeting to my loving friend Fersis, another woman who worked very hard in the Lord. 13 Give greetings to Rufus, chosen in the Lord, and to his mother, who has been a mother to me, too. 14 Give greetings to Asinkritus, Flegon, Ermes, Fatrobas, Ermas, and all the other friends who are with them. 15 Give greetings to Filologus and Julia, to Nereus and his sister, an to Olimfas and to all of Lord's people who are with them.

nama: Áuwégh tawaramangi féfe kénjún ménaye njúnnjúnofnar sénéghégh. Méinyotio efalo yátogh árfene Yesuene mérnam yénan engwawatembangi yéfene áuwégh si.
english: Give greeting one another with a without.dust(holy) kiss. All Yesu's families(churches) of believers here send you.p their greetings.

nama: Timoti, yéndfé mérne ásáfogh ár, engwawatemb yánjo áuwégh si féfeyot, ndenáyo wéi yémofem Lukius, Jason a Sosifata, tane mérnam.
english: Timoti, my co-worker, sends you.p his greetings, as do Lukius, Jason, and Sosifata, my relative.

nama: Yénd, Tertius, emo yéfarotam yéné férén ménat Fol, áuwégh si ewarametan Yurane kénjún.
english: I, Tertius, who wrote down this letter for Fol, give greeting to you.p in the Lord.

nama: Gaius, endene waráuwéghan yénd a méinyotio Yesuene mérén yéna náuwétam, yémon engwawatemb yánjo áuwégh si. Erastus, efe yém ndimbal tesenan mani wanjángégh ár, a téfene fútar Kuartus engwatembangi féfeyot yéfene áuwégh si. 24 Téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene ngárám so yém méinyotio féfefaf. Efalo.
english: Gaius, whose hospitality I and whole Yesu's family(church) here enjoy, sends you.p his greetings. Erastus, who is the city's manager of money(treasurer), and our friend Kuartus send you.p their greetings. 24 May our Lord Yesu Keriso's grace be with all of you.p. Amen.

nama: Mé yáfafetro káfeté Ngánjánefaf so yém ndimbal kwayaghé tuot yáne kénjúmé Yesu Keriso! Efalo.
english: To the only wise God will be big light(glory) forever through Yesu Keriso! Amen.

nama: Yéné férén siyém kétándmé Fol, efe té yémotayéng sái yém Keriso Yesuene muyafé ár Ngánjánene méndeyan, a kétándmé téfene fútar Sostenes,
english: This letter is from Fol, who was called to be a a man with Keriso Yesu's authority(apostle) by the will of God, and from our friend(brother) Sostenes,

nama: Yéndon yéfarotan yéné férén kétán Ngánjánene Yesuene mérnot Korint kénjún, yéfefaf efe efghayéng Keriso Yesu kénjún a efe té emotayéng yáne njúnnjúnofnar ár sái em mérne yémafé méinyotio árfé, emofem yáwefnotat téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoe, yéfene Yuré a téfene.
english: I am writing this letter to the Yesu's family(church) of God in Korint, to all who are called to be his without.dust(holy) people with all the people, who worship our Lord Yesu Keriso, their Lord and ours.

nama: So Ngánján téfene Afam a Yuré Yesu Kerisom tawaramangé féfe ngárám a krufrát. Frengégh Keriso kénjún
english: May God our Father and the Lord Yesu Keriso give to you.p grace and peace. Blessings in Keriso

nama: Ánde wét káfeté mwighé ár yém? Ánde wét nák watamegh ár yém? Ánde wét matyam kér ro éwigh ár yém yéné mband maratan? Ngánjánam té yuyafoyéng yéné mbandoene káfeté mwighé siyém fifiofnar!
english: Where is the man with wisdom? Where is the teaching man of the law? Where it is arguing man with full of knowledge in this world? God has shown this world's wisdom is without.meaning!

nama: Efaloe fém mat em ndené fém Ngánjánene wáwefnogh méngo em a Ngánjánene Mbérmbér yémor féfene kénjún! 17 Ngánjánam so tirorngé fá emon tirorngé yáne wáwefnogh méngo. Ménamén Ngánjánene wáwefnogh méngo siyém njúnnjúnofnar, a fém fémyo em yáne wáwefnogh méngo.
english: Surely you.p know that you.p are God's worshipping house and that God's Spirit lives in you.p! 17 God will destroy anyone who destroys God's worshipping house. Because God's worshipping house is without.dust(holy), and you.p yourselves are his worshipping house.

nama: Tane ásáfogh yau yém sái norayan efe Yesuene mérén kénjún yau em. Ngánjánam mogh so yafrote yéfefaf. Wénde yau mogh yafrotati fenjo mérénmén árfefaf. 13 Ndené fété Buk si noraye, "Tawitrombongi yaufiyamafé ár fenjo mérénta."
english: My work is not to saying who are not inside of Yesu's family(church). God will do judgment them. But you.p should not do judgment the people of your group. 13 As the scripture says, “Remove the evil person from your group.”

nama: Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe yéné yau wáfaregh yém, wénde mé mwigharo yém. 7 Yénd nemnan méinyotio fém kar ndené yam yénd kés wém. Wénde ámbiroámbiro féne fénataye fok Ngánjánam árké té yéramai yá, ámb ároe ámb fok, ámb ároe yéné.
english: I tell you.p this not as an order, but simply as a thinking. 7 I think all of you.p were as I am. But each one has a special gift which God had given to him, one person one gift, another one that gift.

nama: Sénonjo, yénd norayan aweréghofnar árfefaf a kwirafefaf, mer nérete féfeyot miya engérnyang ámnjoghan féfembia ndené fété yénd swém. 9 Wénde njam yau fém nawamarotati, féyo mer yém téu naweretati, yau táf mwighayan nuitati.
english: Now, I say to the unmarried people and to the widows, it looks good for you.p to continue to live by yourselves as I do. 9 But if you.p cannot control yourselves, so it is good to marry, should not fall down in thought.

nama: Awerégh árét táfaf yéna sotafé si em árkéméné tanjoyo yau em wénde Yurane. Yátén yau so kafalongé yánjarta. 11 Wénde téu téfrangongé, fá so yémor strewar ámnjogh o kawafarotangé fá yánjarefaf. A yánjarém yau so tatembangé yatén.
english: For married people I have a strong talk(command) which is not my own but the Lord's. A wife must not seperate from her husband. 11 But if she divorces, she must remain single or be reconciled to her husband. And a husband must not send away his wife.

nama: Ámb si némé fémofem yafarotaménd aweréghofnar árfenemén. Yénd wafaréghofnar wém Yurata, wénde yéndon yarametan tane mwigharo, ménamén yáne ghérghérsisayan Yuram yénd té wiyátoi efe nafrotan efalo si.
english: Another talk what you.p wrote about unmarried people. I do not have a command from the Lord, because in his mercy Lord made me become one who proclaim true talk.

nama: Yénd norayan yéné ménamén yénd ménde wém féfe wáutárghét. Yéndon yau kémbogh yénérsan féfefaf. Wénde yénd ménde wém fémofem sái yafrotati némé yém mbarkánd a utmanéghafé, a sái fémyo karamangi méinyotio Yurane ásáfoghét ékmboghofnaye.
english: I am saying this because I want to help you.p. I am not carrying stopping on you.p. Instead, I want you.p to do what is straight and respectful, and to give yourselves completely to the Lord's work without any stopping.

nama: Sénonjo yénd so norayan ménamén njamke raméghmén mewangfaf.
english: Now I am going to speak about food offered to idols.

nama: Fá efe nemnat ndené fá mat em nauyafote ndené fla efalo yau mat em ndené fété fá so mat em. 3 Wénde njam ár uweta Ngánján, féyo Ngánján efaloe mat yém yéné ár.
english: Those who think they know shows they really don't know as they ought to know. 3 But a man loves God, then God indeed knows that man.

nama: Yénd yuwek ár wém. Yénd Yesuene muyafé ár wém. Yéndon té yinjoyén Yesu téfene Yuré. A fém em tane ásáfogh mbwe Yurai. 2 Táf ámb árém yau njam kumyongi yénd ndené fété Yesuene muyafé ár, yénd mé fété wém féfeyot! Ménamén fém em tane fagharéghkaf em yénd wém Yesuene muyafé ár.
english: I am a free man. I am a man with Yesu's authority(apostle). I have seen Yesu our Lord. And you.p are the fruit of my work for the Lord. 2 Even if other people do not accept me as a man with Yesu's authority(apostle), surely I am to you.p! Because you.p are the seal(note: when people close the house of yam put the mud on the string to show that nobody will unclose the bark.) that I am a man with Yesu's authority(apostle).

nama: Méinyotio yéné yam kufrotawét yéfefaf ndené matyamot téfeyot, a yéfarotaménd matot téfeyot efe yénmor yéné efoghon mbandoene yatogh wifoghétro yam.
english: All these things happened to them as knowldges for us, and were written down as a warning for us who live at the day of the end of the world.

nama: Féyo fá ndené norayat."Yénd féyotaro yéném méinyotio yam wafroghét, " Yéné siyém efalo yém, wénde yau méinyotio yam em wáutáréghafé. 24 Efe yau so náronje yéfenjo merot, wénde náronja ámb árfene merot.
english: So they say, “We are allowed to do everything.” That is true, but not everything is helpful. 24 No one should seek their own good, but the good of other people.

nama: Fém sem yuwek em némndafi téu enetati wérár fenjen maket téraréghmén, yau némndafimén namotati, ménamén féfenjo mwighé. 26 Buk si noraye ndené, "Yéné mband marat a méinyotio rokar yéné kénjún sem mé Yuranero em."
english: You.p are free to eat anything sold in the meat market, without asking anything, because of your conscience. 26 Scripture says that, “The earth and everything in it belong to the Lord.”

nama: Táf yéndon kánjo yarametan Ngánjáne ménamén tane njamkemén, némamén wét ámb árém waruindat yénd ménamén njamkemén árkémamén yéndon kánjo yarametan?
english: If I give thanks to God for my food, why should anyone criticize me about food because of something I give thanks?”

nama: Wufénmametati tafaf ndené fété yénd nufénmetan Kerisoefaf. Wafarégh sénko wáwefnogh kénjún
english: Imitate me just as I imitate Keriso. Covering the head in worship

nama: Tane fútaréf, sénonjo mwighé ménamén fokmén Ngánján Mbérmbéroeta.
english: My friends, now concerning about the gifts from the God Spirit.

nama: Sénonjo yéné nambioro nafrangongi: ndimbal mwighé, méghmégh, a uwégh. Wénde minde ndimbalfifi siyém uwégh.
english: Now these three remain: big mind(faith), hope and love. But the very big of these is love.

nama: Yéndon kánjo Ngánjáne yarametan némé yénd norayan kankaye yáinde fémofem méinyotio némé ewafrotati. 19 Wénde yéndon so tawaferén Yesuene mérén wáwefnoghan yénd norayan 5 si ménát eném so tanangi kwayaghaye ménát ámb ár watameghét, yau tárfár 10,000 si kanké sie árkéméné ámb árém yau yérsat kwayaghé.
english: I give thanks to God what I speak in tongues surpasses what all of you.p do. 19 But I choose in Yesu's family(church) worship I speak five talks that can be understood clearly to teach other people, don't speak ten thousand of talks in tongues which other people cannot understand.

nama: Fém yau so em ndenanit ambumtértér féfene mwighayan. Aem ndenanit ambumtértér yaufimén, wénde. anoghkaf ár aem káfeté mwighamén. 21 Buk si noraye, "Yuré norayai, Ámb árfene kanké sie yénd so norayan tane árfefaf, Yénd so norayan dábi árfene mbírmbíre, wénde nde yémofem yénd yau so wiyáretat."
english: My friends, do not be like children in your thinking. Be like children about evil, but be grown up about wisdom. 21 In the Scriptures says, “The Lord says, by other people's tongues I will speak to my people. and I will speak through lips of foreigners, but they will not listen to me.”

nama: Féyo fok kankaye si orayégh siyém efalo yátoghét yém efalo yátoghofnar árfet, yau efalo yátogh árfet, fok Ngánjánene si wafroghmén siyém efalo yátoghét yém efalo yátogh árfet, yau efalo yátoghofnar árfet.
english: So the gift of speaking in tongues is proof for truly without.approving people(unbelievers), not for truly approving people(believers), while the gift of proclaiming God's talk is proof for truly approving people, not for truly without.approving people.

nama: Féyo, tane fútaréf, yafarenati Ngánjánene si wafroghét, wénde yau kékmbongi kanké orayégh. 40 Méinyotio yam miya ewafrotati merkéraye a mbarkándero.
english: So, my friends, seek to proclaim God's talk, but do not stop the speaking in tongues. 40 Everything must be done in a proper and straightly.

nama: Yau nawawérsotati fém: "Mámáfi mérnam ewaghnat mer wafroghyam." 34 Féfenjo mbarkánd mwighét kénangongi a kékmbongi féfenjo yaufita. Yénd norayan yéné ndené fém wáiwái aem ménamén ámb fém mafina em Ngánján. Anoghmén fifi
english: Do not be fooled. “Bad groups ruin good character.” 34 Come back to your straight minds and stop your sinful ways. I say this to your shame that some of you.p do not know God. The resurrection body

nama: Méinyotio fifi sem yau ámbiro sáfot em. Árfene sewam ámb sáf fifi, wérárafene fénatayo, menafene fénatayo a wagifafene fénatayo.
english: All bodies is not all the same kind of body. Human beings have one kind of body, animals different, birds different, and fish different.

nama: A kété em njafarmén fifi a mbandmén fifi. Merafé yam njafarmén fifi sem fénatayo a kétándmé mbandmén fifi sem fénatayo merafé yam. 41 Efogh siyém yánjo merafé yam, ghérare fénatayo merafé yam, a kénd sem fénatayo merafé yam.Kété em fénaté sáfot merafé yam kéndan
english: And there are heavenly bodies and earthly bodies. The beauty that belongs to heavenly bodies is different from the beauty that belongs to earthly bodies. 41 The sun has its own beauty, the moon different beauty, and the stars a different beauty. Stars are different kinds of beauty.

nama: "Kér! Fene waingégh ánde yém? Kér! Fene wafté ánde yém ngiot?"
english: “Death! Where is your victory? Death! Where is your power to kill?”

nama: Kéram yérse yánjo wafté ngiot kétándmé yaufita, a yaufiyam yérse yánjo wafté kétándmé Ngánjánene nákta. 57 Wénde Ngánjáne kánjo yarametat emo yénmaramet téfe waingégh muyé téfene Yuré Yesu Keriso kénjúmé!
english: Death carry his power to kill from sin, and sin carry his power from the law of God. 57 But give thanks to God who gives us the victory through our Lord Yesu Keriso.

nama: Yénémaménnde, tane tikfafé fútaréf, kokayongi taikrataye a ndernder. Mia em túmén ásáfoghan Yurai, ménamén fém mat em ndené Yurane kénjún fifiofnar ásáfogh yau so násáfotati.
english: Therefore, my friends, stand strongly and immovable. Always give yourselves to the work of the Lord, because you.p know that nothing you do in the Lord is not without.meaning.

nama: Yénd so wémor yénan Efesos kénjún kétánotio Fentikos efogh kawerangé. 9 Yéné siyém ndimbal sésafne té nasawér tayot ásáfoghét, a karogh ár wéi sem tárfár em.
english: I will stay here in Efesos until the day of Fentecost comes. 9 There is a big door has open to me for working, and there are many opponents.

nama: Njam Timoti yéném, fia nemne ndené té wumyongi féfe kénjút, ménamén fá siyém Yurai násáfote, ndené fété yénd swém. 11 Árké árom yau so yékarote fá, wénde fémofem mé ténmáutánangi yáne álighan krufráte, ménát fá so nénangote tafaf. Ménamén yénd nawanjetan yáyot ámb Yesuene efalo yátogh árfé.
english: If Timoti comes, be think that he makes him welcome among you, because he is working for the Lord, just as I am. 11 No one should despise him, but you.p must help him continue his trip in peace, so that he will come back to me. Because I am waiting for him back with the other truly approving people(believers).

nama: Sénonjo fútar Afolosenemén: yéndo taikratye yawéngsotan fá féfe yafoghét ámb efalo yátogh árfé. Fá méndefnar tamorwén álighét sénonjo, wénde fá so yéngém njam kété yém féneféne. Soramamén si
english: Now about friend Afolos: I strongly urged him to go to you.p with the other friends. He was quite unwilling to go now, but he will go when he has the opportunity. Final words

nama: Mwighé sauréghkaf aem, kokayongi taikrataye ndimbal mwighé kénjún, miya ndernder ewakai, miya táikér em. 14 Ewafrotati méinyotio féfenjo ásáfogh uwégh kénjún.
english: Be alert, stand strongly in the big mind(faith), stand not shaking, be strong. 14 Do all your work in love.

nama: Fém mat em Stefanas a yáne mérén. Fá em fronde efalo yátogh ár Akaya yumén a naramayénd Ngánjánene árét ásáfoghét. Yéndon ewamnendan fém, tane fútaréf 16 ménát sái namyotati ndené árfefaf a méinyotio árfefaf efe nufeindat yéné ásáfoghét a násáfotat yénayan.
english: My friends, you know about Stefanas and his family. They are the first truly approving man(believer) in Akaya region and have given themselves to the work for God's people. I beg you.p, 16 to submit to such people and to every people who joins in this work and work in this.

nama: Yénd áuwéghan wém yéfene wáfareghmén Stefanas, Fotunatus, a Akaikus, ménamén yémofem té ténmafrotat yéné wafrogh féfene yukéra. 18 Yémofem tane mwighé ásneghét yanoyénd a féfene ndenáyo. Fémofem sái tawayamngongi ndené ár.
english: I am happy about the coming of Stefanas, Fotunatus, and Akaikus, because they have made up for your absence. 18 They have cheered me up a yours also. You must know such men.

nama: Yéné Yesuene mérén Esia yuwan enwawatembangi féfe yéfene áuwégh. Akwila a Frisila a Yesuene mérén árké nafángotat yéfenjo méngon engwawatembangi efalo yátogh árfene áuwégh. 20 Méinyotio fútarém yéné sem engwawatembangi áuwégh. Nafángotati fútarafé ásneghafé.
english: This Yesu's families(churches) in the province of Esia send you.p their greetings. Aquila and Frisila and the Yesu's family(church) that meets in their house send the greetings of truly approving man(believers). 20 All the friends here send greetings. Meet friends with kissing.

nama: Tanjo ngángaye yéndon yéné yafarotan: Áuwégh Foleta.
english: With my own hand I write this: Greetings from Fol.

nama: Emon njam yau uwetat Yuré so yém wafalngogh yáne! Marana ta, yáne fifi, téfene Yuré, Kénaf!
english: Whoever does not love the Lord will be curse on him! Marana ta, its meaning, our Lord, come!

nama: Yuré Yesuene ngárám so yém féfefaf.
english: The grace of the Lord Yesu will be with you.p.

nama: Tane uwégh so yém féfefaf méinyotio Keriso Yesu kénjún.
english: My love will be with you.p all in Keriso Yesu.

nama: Yéné férén siyém Foleta, Keriso Yesuene muyafé ár Ngánjánene méndeyan, a kétándmé téfene fútar Timoti, Yéndon yéfarotan kétán Ngánjánene Yesuene mérnot Korint kénjún, a kétán Ngánjánene árfefaf Akaya yuwomé.
english: This letter is from Fol, a man with Yesu's authority(apostle) of Keriso Yesu by God's will, and from our friendr Timoti. I am writing to the Yesu's family(church) of God in Korint, and to all God's people throughout Akaya region.

nama: So Ngánján téfene Afé a Yuré Yesu Keriso yéramet féfe ngárám a krufrát. Folém yaramete kánjo Ngánjáne
english: May God our Father and the Lord Yesu Keriso give you.p grace and peace. Fol gives thanks to God

nama: Fútaréf, yéndfem mat eyátotam fém kértamén yénd sténmorwén Esia yuwan. Yéné kérté téfayongérwén téfefaf tamorwén ndimbalfifi a yénd mwighayan nuyángém téfene ghérsamén.{i{ ...f* {i{1.8 yénd mwighayan nuyángém téfene ghérsamén. need to BT
english: Friends, we want to know you.p of the trouble we had in the province of Esia. The troubles laid upon us were so big heavy and 9 We thought that we were almost died. But this happened so that we should not rely ourselves, but only on God, who raises dead men. 10 He save us from very bad death, and will save us. We have placed our hope in him that he will save us again. 11 and you.p are continally helping us by means of talking with God for us. It will be answered that the many talking with God for us, and God will bless us and many people will raise their voices to God in thanksgiving for us. Fol's decision again

nama: A féyo Yuré Méinyotio Wafté Afoghare noraye, "Fémofem so tafrangongi fá a kafalongi fémyo kétándmé yéfe tambén. Yau eyanjati némé em mámáfi, a yéndon so taumyon fém.
english: And so the Lord All Mighty says, “You must leave them and separate yourselves from them. Have nothing to do with what is bad, and I will accept you.p.

nama: Yénd so wém Féferafé, a fém so kamndangi tane ambum a mérésmérés."
english: I will be a your Father, and you.p will be my sons and daughters.”

nama: Tane tikfafé fútaréf, ménamén yéné unyéghofnar si eramai téfefaf, yéndio nawainam kétándmé méinyotio yam némé ewafrotam fifi a mbérmbér njúnnjúnafé, a so yéném njúnnjúnofnar ménáyan sái yénmor Ngánján férfér kénjún. Folene áuwégh
english: My dear friends, because these without.lying talks(promises) have been given us, let us wash ourselves from everything that makes body or soul with.dust, and let us be completely without.dust(holy) by living in fear of God. Folʼs Joy

nama: Féyo yéndon yéfarotamén yéné férén féfe, yéné yau témorwén yéné téfnan emo tafrote mámáfi o emo yafrotam mámáfi. Wénde yéndon efarotamén safén yékmayén féfe, Ngánjánene sáfrére, ndernáye kénjkam féfene aramégh yém téfeyot fifi. 13 Yéné téfnan yénd yénmawéngsotayéng.
english: So I wrote that letter to you.p, it was not because of the one who did wrong or the one who was wronged. Instead, I wrote it to make clear to you.p in God's sight, how deep your.p devotion to us really is. 13 That is why we were encouraged.

nama: Yénd wéi nawarawenam yau táf nawatarna ménamén yéné marataye raméghmén. 21 Yénd nawarawenam sái yafrotam némé mbarkánd yém, yau mé Yurane ghékfanro, wénde ámb árfene ghékfan wéi.
english: We are very careful not to stir up any complaints about this generous gift. 21 We are careful to do what is straight, not only in the sight of the Lord, but also in the sight of other people.

nama: Wénde ndené Buk si noraye, "Efe ménde yém tuktukot so tuktuk yéfande némé Ngánjánam ewafrote." 18 Efe efalo mer yém? Yéné yau yém ár efe nemna merro fáyo. Yéné yém ár efe Yuré nemne merro yánemén.
english: But as the scripture says, “Whoever wants to boast must boast what the Lord has done.” 18 Who is really good? It is not the person who thinks good himself. It is the person that the Lord thinks good about him.

nama: Ambinomén, tane fútaréf, yawo! Náuwetati! Nanotati sotafé. Náyáretati tane wawanjagh si. Miya em ámbiro mwighayan a krufrát emor. A Ngánjánene uwégh a krufrát so mé yém féfefaf.
english: Finally my friends, good-bye! Rejoice! Grow to maturity. Listen to my enocouraging talk. Agree with one another and live in peace. And the God of love and peace will be with you.p.

nama: Áuwéghafé nafángotati féfe kénjún ásneghafé krufráte.
english: Greet one another with the kiss of peace.

nama: Méinyotio Ngánjánene árém yéna enwawatembangi yéfenjo áuwégh.
english: All Godʼs people here send their greetings.

nama: Yuré Yesu Kerisoene ngárám, Ngánjánene uwégh a Ngánján Mbérmbéroene awarnyégh mé so yém féfefaf méinyotio.
english: May the grace of the Lord Yesu Keriso, and the love of God, and the fellowship of the God Spirit be with you.p all.

nama: Yéné férén siyém ta tambén, Fol. Yénd wémotai ménát Yesuene muyafé árot. Yéné ásáfogh siyém yau yénmormén kétándmé ár mérénta o ároene si muyata, wénde kétamé Yesu Keriso a Afé Ngánján, emo Yesu yanoi kérta. 2 Yénd a tane fútar yénmatembangém yéné férén féfefaf, Yesuene mérén Galasia yuwomé.
english: This letter is from me, Fol. I was called to be(lit. he called me)for the man who has Yesu's authority. This work does not come from people group or man's authority, but from Yesu Keriso and the Father God, who raised Yesu from the death. 2 I and my friends send this letter to the you.p, Yesu's family(church) through Galatia region.

nama: Yénd njam norayan yéné yammén, yéndon yau áuwéghét eméindan ár, wénde Ngánjánro yéndo áuwéhgét yéméindan. Njam yéndon ár áuwéghétro eméindan, féyo yénd yau so wém Kerisoene faiofnar ásáfogh ár. Ndernáye Fol namndai Yesuene muyafé ár
english: When I say these things, I am not trying to make people happy, but only God I am trying to please. If I only wanted to try to make people happy, then I will not be without.payment working man(servant) of Keriso. How Fol became a Yesu strong man

nama: Tane fútaréf, yénd ménde wém fém sái mat em ndené yéné mer si árké yéndo yaitotan yau ár wafroghmén yém. 12 Yéndon yau yanayén árta, o emo yau yénd watametam. Yesu Keriso fáyo nauyafoi tafaf.
english: My friends, I want you.p to know that this good talk which I preached is not made by man. 12 I did not receive it from man, or none taught me. Yesu Keriso himself showed it to me.

nama: Njam yénd néretayén ndené yémofem yau yaitotat mer sioene efalo end, yénd norayan Fitafaf méinyotio ár sáfrére, "Fém ném Ju ár, wéndende fém kénmor ndenanit Téndo árnit, yau ndené Ju árnit. Ndernáye wéi fémon ewáfárete Téndo ár sái emor Ju árfene túmén yame?"
english: When I looked that they were not following the truth way of the good talk, I spoke to Fitè in face of all the people, “You.s are a Ju man, but you live like a Side people, not like a Ju people. How do you command Side people to live like Ju always doing(customs)?”

nama: Kerisom té efalo yényátoyéng yuwek. Sénonjo kamndangi fém yuwek, a yau wéikor kaumbangi nákoene faiofnar sifayat.
english: Keriso has truly set us free. Now you must become free, and don't tie up again in without.payment working to the law

nama: Fifioene wafroghyam safén em: yaufi walyam, wáiwáiyafé yam, yuwek wal, 20 mewang wáwefnogh, ghar, méndménd, amrorégh, waramnjagh, nékwro, a yandro yémanjone, ásnanégh, afalogh, 21 karogh, wériyam, yaufi téménd, a ámb mé kés engém. Yéndon ewawéngsotan sénonjo, ndené kés ewawéngsotamén fronde: emofem ewafrotat yéné yam Ngánjánam yau so tawaramangé Ngánjánene limánégh.
english: The bodily desires are clearly shown: evil sexual relationship, shameful thing, free sexual relationship, 20 worshipping idols, sorcery, hatred, argument, jealousy, only angerness, selfish, dispute, division, 21 envy, drunkenness, evil feasts, and some more. I am encouraging you.p now, as I have encouraged you.p at first: to whom are doing these things God will not give the kingdom of God.

nama: Sénonjo yénandmé, yau emo táf kérté warameta, ménamén yéndo ersan tane fifiyan Yesuene mbor.
english: From now on, let no one give me problem, because I carry on my body the marks of Yesu.

nama: Yuré Yesu Kerisoene ngárám so yém féfene mbérmbérfaf, tane efalo fútaréf. Efalo.
english: The grace of our Lord Yesu Keriso will be with your.p spirit, my true friends. Amen.

nama: Yénd wém Fol, Keriso Yesuene muyafé ár efe yém Ngánjánene méndeyan. Yéndon yéfarotan yéné férén féfefaf, Ngánjánene njúnnjúnofnar árfefaf Efesos kénjún, efe em ndimbal mwighafé Keriso Yesue kénjún.
english: I am Fol, man with Keriso Yesu's authority(apostle) who is in God's will. I am writing this letter to you, God's without.dust(holy) people in Efesos, who are with big mind(faithful) in Keriso Yesu.

nama: Ngánján téfene Afé a Yuré Yesu Kerisom so tawaramangé féfe ngárám a krufrát. Ngánjánam té ewafrote téfeyot mer yam Keriso kénjún
english: God our Father and the Lord Yesu Keriso will give you.p grace and peace. God had done good things for us in Keriso

nama: Méinyotio yam nufrotat Ngánjánene mwighé faroréghan a méndeyan. Kerisoe kénjún Ngánjánam yénmaferyéng yánjo árot yánjo méndeyan. Yéné témorwén némé yémon mwighé yafrotam kétándmé rényéghan, 12 ménát ndené yénd yénmormén fronde ekmayém téfene méghmégh Keriso kénjún, yénd mété yéném Ngánjánene ndimbal yétkwén uyoghét!
english: All things happened according to God's plan and will. In Keriso God chose us to be his people by his will. It was what he had decided from the beginning, 12 so that we were the first to put our hope in Keriso, we might be the one to lift up God's big name.

nama: Yuyotam Ngánján. Yáne wafté násáfote téfene kénjún. Yéné waftayam ewainde téfene matyam. Yéné wafté árkéméné nemnam a yamnendam yau so taindangé Ngánjánene wafté. 21 Yuyotam Ngánján ndimbalkéraye Yesuene mérnan a wéi Keriso Yesuene kénjún méinyotio ár sata kénjúmé, tuot! Efalo.
english: Praise God. His power works in our inside. That power surpasses our knowledge. The power which we think and ask him [to do] does not surpass God's power. 21 Praise God very much in Yesu's family(church) and in Keriso Yesu through all generations, forever! Amen.

nama: Yénd ámbiroámbiroam té ewanayém tambén fénatayero Kerisoeta. 8 Ndené Buk si noraye, "Fá njam tukét nénguyoi, yémon engwasroi tárfár ár efe yémon té eumbai, yémon ewarametam tambén yáne árét."
english: Each one has received different gift from Keriso. 8 As the Buk(scripture) says, “When he went up, he took many people whom he had tied, he gave gifts to his people.”

nama: Fém Ngánjánene tikfafé ambumtértér em, fémofem so fété ewafrotati ndené Ngánjánam kés ewafrote. 2 Féfene ghérsé ayélimnda uwégham, ndené fété Kerisom yénmuwetam yénd a yéramai yánjo ghérsé téfeyot nénamndai méndefé wimafé ghéngén ramégh Ngánjánene áuwéghafé.
english: You.p are God's heartful children, you.p must do like God does. 2 Must be your.p life led by love, just as Keriso loved us and gave his life for us as a sweet-smelling sacrifice offered with God's pleasure.

nama: Yénémaménnde, kor so fété em ménamén ndernáye fém emor. Yau emor ndenanit káfetafnar árnit, wénde káfeté árnit. 16 Ewafrotati merkéráye méinyotio ásáfogh féfene kés em, ménamén yéné sem yaufi efogh. 17 Yau aem fifiofnar, fété so mat náyátotati Yurane ménde némé yém féfe wafroghét.
english: Therefore be careful how you live. Don't live like without.wisdom people, but as wise people. 16 Do carefully all the work that you.p have, because these are evil days. 17 Don't be without.meaning, [but] understand what the Lord wants you.p to do.

nama: Náyáretati féfe kénjún ménamén fémofem yutémndati Keriso ndené fété féfene Yuré.
english: Listen one another because you.p honor Keriso as your Lord.

nama: Ambumtértér, eyáretati féfene afaf a amaf Yurane kénjún, yéné siyém mbarkánd. 2 Yéné siyém fronde nák unyéghofnar siafé "Eutémanwé fenjo afé a amé 3 ménát feyot merro so yéngém, a fémon so yayamnete tombé ghérsé ámnjogh mbandan."
english: Children, obey your.p fathers and mothers in the Lord, [for] this is straight. 2 This is the first law with a without.lying talk(promise), “Respect your.s father and mother 3 so that it will go well for you.s, and you.s may enjoy long life staying in the land.”

nama: Afaf a amaf, yau eusérmbotati féfene ambumtértér yéné yame árké yamam so eméindat nékwot. Wénde ewanotati Yurane watameghe a wawéngsoghe. Faiofnar ásáfogh ár a yuraf
english: Fathers and mothers, do not mistreat your.p children in this way as to cause them angry. But raise them with teaching and encouragement of the Lord. Without.payment working men(slaves) and masters

nama: Yuraf, ndenéyameyo nawarawenati féfenjo faiofnar ásáfogh árfefaf a yau eusérmbotati. Nawafarotati ndené fém a féfene faiofnar ásáfogh árfé ámbiro Yuré ewam njafaran, emo yau yuyafote witmaro ménde yam a mogh. Méinyotio Ngánjánene asmégh rokar
english: Masters, in the same way save guard yourselves from your.p without.payment working men(slaves) and do not threaten them. Remember that you.p and your.p without.payment working men(slaves) have the same Lord in heaven, who do not see only some part and judges. The whole fighting tools of God

nama: Tukikus yém téfene tikfafé fútar a Yurane ndimbal mwighé kér ro faiofnar ásáfogh ár. Yémon so ewaufrote méinyotio si tanemén, ménát mat so em yéndon némé yafrotan a yénd ndernáye wém. 22 Yéné téfnan yéndon yénmáfáretan fá féfefaf, ndené fém mat so em yénd ndernáye yéném, a ndené fém so ewawéngsote.
english: Tukikus is our heartful friend and faithful without.payment working man(servant) in the Lord. He will tell you all talks about me, so that you.p will know what I am doing and how I am. 22 In this reason I am sending him to you.p, so that you will know how we are, and that he will encourage you.p.

nama: Ngánján Afam a Yuré Yesu Kerisom méinyotio efalo yátogh árfet so tawaramangé krufrát a uwégh ndimbal mwighafé. 24 Ngánjánene ngárám so yém méinyotio yéfefaf emofem yuwetat téfene Yuré Yesu Keriso kérofnar uwéghe.
english: God the Father and the Lord Yesu Keriso will give to all truly approving people(belivers) peace and love with big mind(faith). 24 God's grace will be to all those who love our Lord Yesu Keriso with without.dying love.

nama: Yénd wém Fol, Timoti a yénd yénre Keriso Yesuene faiofnar ásáfogh téfnár. Yénd, Fol, yéfarotan yéné férén kétán méinyotio Ngánjánene njúnnjúnofnar ár Yesu Keriso kénjún kété Filifi, mérne yémafé Yesuene mérnafene sénko árfé a ndikun.
english: I am Fol, Timoti and I are the without.payment working men(servants) of Keriso Yesu, I, Fol, write this letter to all God's without.dust people in Yesu Keriso at Filifi, together with Yesu's family(church)'s head people and deacons.

nama: Ngánján téfene Afé a Yuré Yesu Kerisom so ewaramete ngárám a krufrát féfeyot. Folém kánjo yaramai Ngánjáne efalo yátogh árfenemén Filifiyan
english: God our Father and the Lord Yesu Keriso will give grace and peace to you.p. Fol thanks giving to God for the believers at Filifi

nama: Yéné yém mbarkánd ménamén yénd nemnan yéné ende ménamén méinyotio féfenemén, ménamén fém em tane tikfan. Fém em Ngánjánene ngáráman yéndfé njam yénd wém umbéghkaf seine o yamarotan a efalo yiyátotan mer si. 8 Ngánján mat yém ndernáye yénd náronjan méinyotio féfenemén ménáye Yesu Kerisoene uwéghe.
english: This is straight that I think this way all about you.p, because you.p are in my heart. You.p are in God's grace with me when I am tied with chains or defending and confirming the good talk. 8 God knows how I long for all of you.p with love of Yesu Keriso.

nama: Féfene yam wafrogh ndenéyameyo fiya tam Keriso Yesuene:
english: Your.p doing way should be like Keriso Yesu's:

nama: Keriso témorwén efalofifi Ngánján, wénde fá yau kaneghau fáyo ménát ámbrérero sái tárwén Ngánjánafé.
english: Keriso was truly God, but he didn't force himself to be equal with God.

nama: Wénde yémo yénéfrangoi yánjo sifayé Ngánjánefaf a nénamndai fáyo yauyau. Fá té náráftam sái témorwén ár a nénamndai ndenanit faiofnar ásáfogh téfnár.
english: But he left his place to God, and became himself poor. He had being born to be a man and became like a without.payment working man(servant).

nama: Fá nénamndai árfifi a témorwén yuwan ghérsafé, yémo taitotatau Ngánjánene ménde ndemamén kér tésérmbnau, fá kér yémormén wafatarégh wénan.
english: He became human and he was with lowly life, he obeyed God's will even though it meant death, he died on a cross.

nama: Féyo Ngánjánam yaramai Kerisoe tukénfifi sifayé a yaramai yétkwén árkéménayém ndimbalfifi, yéné yétkwénam ewainde ámb méinyotio yétkwén.
english: Then God gave Keriso the very high place and gave him a name which is very big, that name surpasses all other names.

nama: Yénémamén, Yesuene yétkwénoe méinyotio ár so budéme yawefnetat, efe em njafaran, mbandan, a mbandoene mbanmbanan,
english: So, for the name of Yesu every people will worship with knee, who are in heaven, on earth and beneath the earth,

nama: a méinyotio kankayam so yémndetat, "Yesu Keriso siyém Yuré!" ménát Afé Ngánjánene minde ndimbalot. Natremngotati ndenanit kénd kwayaghé mband maratan
english: and all the tongues will say, "Yesu Keriso is Lord!" for the very bigness of God the Father. Shine like lights of star in the world

nama: Méinyotio efe yénd yéném mbérmbére anoghkaf fai kemnangém yéné ende wéi. A njam fémofem nemnati fénatayero yéné yammén, Ngánjánam so ekmete safén féfeyot. 16 Wénde yéndfem fiya mé táitotangém efalo si árkéméné Ngánjánjam té yénmaramai.
english: All of us who are spiritually grown up should think this way too. And if you.p think differently about these things, God will put them clear to you.p. 16 But we should continue to follow the true talk which God had given us.

nama: Yénémaménnde, tane fútaréf, fém yéndon efe euwetan a karonjan fandaghét, tane áuwégh a ákiki, yakai taikrataye Yurane kénjún yéné endén.
english: Therefore, my friends, you.p whom I love and long to see, my joy and crown, stand strongly in the Lord in this way.

nama: Téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene ngárám so yém féfefaf méinyotio. Efalo.
english: The grace of our Lord Yesu Keriso be with you.p all. Amen.

nama: Yénd wém Fol, Keriso Yesuene muyafé ár Ngánjánene méndeyan, Timoti téfene fútarfé yénre.
english: I am Fol, a man who is with Keriso Yesu's authority(apostle) in the will of God, and Timoti our friend is with me.

nama: Yéndfem yéfarowam yéné férén kétán Ngánjánene njúnnjúnofnar árfefaf Kolosia kénjún, efe em téfene ndimbal mwighafé fútar Kerisoene kénjún: Téfene Afé Ngánjánam so tawaramangé ngárám a krufrát féfeyot. Folém kánjo si tarametau Ngánjáne Kolosia efalo yátogh árfenemén
english: We.d write this letter to Godʼs without.dust(holy) people in Kolosia, who are our friends with big mind(faith) in Keriso. Our father God will give grace and peace to you.p. Fol gives thank to God about true approving men(believers) in Kolosia

nama: Fémofem té yanayénd Keriso Yesu ndené fété Yuré. Yénémaménnde, ménjtaye aemor yáne kénjún. 7 Sérémb yéghkaf aem a erametati féfenjo ghérsé yáne kénjún, muyé résagh ndimbal mwighayan ndernáye fém té enwatametamén, a túmén aem kánjo ramégh ár.
english: You.p have received Keriso Yesu as Lord. Therefore, continue to live in him. 7 Be planted root and built up your.p life in him, get strength in the big mind(faith) how I taught you.p, and always be thankful people.

nama: Kor aem emo yau táf elimnda ménaye unyéghe a fifiofnar watameghe, árké em árfene wafroghmén a yéné mband maratmén wénde yau yéné eném Kerisoe tambén.
english: Watch out no one leads you.p by lying and without.meaning teaching, which are from man's made and from this world but this does not come from Keriso.

nama: Amaf, náyáretati féfenjo árfefaf, yénéfai fémofem tawafrotangi ndené fété efalo yátogh ár.
english: Wives, listen to your.p husbands, you.p should do this as approving truth people(believers).

nama: Ár, euwetati féfenjo amaf a yau táf tékrát em yéfefaf.
english: Husbands, love your.p wives and do not make them suffer.

nama: Ambum, eyáretati féfene afaf a amaf méinyotio efghon, yénayan náuwete Yuré.
english: Children, listen to your.p fathers and mothers in all the days, in this pleases the Lord.

nama: Afaf a amaf, yau nékwot eméindati ambumtértér, o fá so kuwembangi.
english: Fathers and mothers, do not make children angry, or they will be discouraged.

nama: Yuré, ewawafrotati féfenjo faiofnar ásáfogh árét mbarkándaye a ámbrérero, ménamén fém mat em ndené féfene Yuré wéi kété yém njafaran. Wéikor waufarogh yam
english: Owners, do your.p without.payment working men(slaves) with straight and fair, because you.p know that you.p also have a Lord in heaven. Further telling things

nama: Soramé fémofem yaftati yéné férén, mat aem ndené yaftati wéi Laodikia Yesuene mérnan. Yéné efghonyo, yaftati tane férén efalo yátogh árét Laodikia yuwon yémofem so tawawatembangi féfe.
english: After you.p read this letter, you.p must know that it is also read in the Yesu's family(church) at Laodikea. At the same time, read my letter to the approving truth people(believers) in Laodikea place they will send it to you.p.

nama: Taufrongi Akifuse: "Sia tifongé yéné ásáfogh árké Yuram yéramai fe."
english: Tell Akifus: “Finish that work which Lord give you.s.”

nama: Yénd, Fol, yéfarotan yéné ásneghafé si tanjo ngángaye. Wafarotati Ngánjánafé orayégh tayot njam yénd wém kwéfkwéf méngon. Ngárám so yém féfefaf.
english: I, Fol, write this greeting talk in my own hand. Remember to pray for me while I am in the darkness house. Grace be with you.p.

nama: Yéné férén siyém yéfeta Fol, Sailes a Timoti. Yéndfem yéfarotam yéné kétán Tesalonika árfefaf efe em Afé Ngánján a Yuré Yesu Keriso kénjún. So ngárám a krufrát yém féfeyot. Kánjo ramégh yéfeyot Tesalonika árfeyot ndimbal mwighamén
english: This letter is from them Fol, Sailès and Timoti. We are writing this to Tesalonika people who is in the Father God and the Lord Yesu Keriso. May Grace and peace be for you.p. Thanksgiving for them Tesalonika people's big mind(faith)

nama: Fútaréf, wifoghan yéndfem ewatametamém ndernáye fém so emor ménát Ngánján áuwéghét sái yéméindati, ndené fété fém kés emor. Sénonjo yéndfem ewamnendam fém a ewendam fém Yuré Yesuene yétkwénan ménát sái yafrotati túmén. 2 Ménamén fém mat em némé yéndfem ewatametamém fém ménaye Yuré Yesuene muyaye.
english: Friends, finally we taught you.p how to live in order to make God joy, as already you.p are living. Now we ask you.p and urge you.p in the name of the Lord Yesu to do continually. 2 For you.p know what we taught you.p by the power of the Lord Yesu.

nama: Fútaréf, utémndati fá efe em féfene limánégh ár Yurane ásáfogh kénjún. Fá minde násáfotat féfene kénjún a ewarametat mbérmbére wamarogh. 13 Ewauyafotati ndimbal utmanégh a uwégh ménamén yéfene ásáfoghmén. Krufrát ghérsaye aemor.
english: Friends, respect those who are your.p leading menin the Lord's work. They work hard among you.p and give you spiritual guidance. 13 Show them big respect and love because of their work. Live in peace.

nama: Fútaréf, yéndfem ewamnendam fém so ewendam efe em imángéghofnar. So ewawéngsotam efe férfér em. So ewáutánam efe em njangénnjangén. Métar aem méinyotio árfé. 15 Ndené yaufie yau so néwangotati, wénde túmén mer ewafrotati ámb árét a méinyotio árét.
english: Friends, we beg you.p to warn who are without.moving(idly). Encourage you.p who are afraid. Help those who are weak. Be patient with every people. 15 Don't pay back with wrong, but always do good to other people and to every people.

nama: Túmén áuwéghan aem. 17 Ngánjánafé orayégh túmén. 18 Kánjo si kér ro aem méinyotio yaman, ménamén yéné siyém Ngánjánene ménde féfeyot Keriso Yesu kénjún.
english: Always be in joy. 17 Talk with God always. 18 Be thankful in all things, because this is God's will for you.p in Keriso Yesu.

nama: Yau yékmbotati Ngánján Mbérmbéroene fés. 20 Yau ekenati ufrogh yammén si, 21 wénde ufoghan ekmetati méinyotio némé korayau, naweretati yéné sian árké mer yém, 22 ekenati méinyotio yaufi yam.
english: Don't extinguish the fire of the God Spirit. 20 Do not deny inspired talks, 21 but put in the test everything that is said; hold this talk which is good, 22 reject all evil things.

nama: So Ngánjánam emo ténmaramangé téfe krufrát táyátongé fém njúnnjúnofnar méinyotio yaman. So ewarawene féfene mbérmbér, mwighé a fifi téfnofnar táf téfene Yuré Yesu Keriso yáne angoghan. 24 Ngánjánam so ewafrote yéné yam, ménamén Ngánján emo fém emotai siyém ndimbal mwighé kér ro.
english: May the God who gives us peace make you.p without.dust(holy) in every way. May your.p spirit, mind and body be kept without.blame at the coming of our Lord Yesu Keriso. 24 God will do this thing, because God who called you.p is full of big mind(faithful).

nama: Fútaréf, Ngánjánafé norayati téfeyot. 26 Áuwégh enguyafotati méinyotio fútar uweghe. 27 Yéndon ewamnendan fém Yurane yétkwénan yéné férén wafghét méinyotio fútarfefaf.
english: Friends, talk with God for us. 26 Greet all friends with the love. 27 I urge you.p by the name of the Lord to read this letter to all friends.

nama: Téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene ngárám so yém féfefaf.
english: The grace of our Lord Yesu Keriso be with you.p.

nama: Yéné férén siyém yéfeta Fol, Sailes a Timoti. Yéndfem yéfarotam yéné kétán Yesuene mérénfaf Tesalonika kénjún téfene Afé Ngánján a Yuré Yesu Keriso kénjún:
english: This letter is from them Fol, Sailès and Timoti. We are writing to the Yesu's family(church) in Tesalonika in our Father God and the Lord Yesu Keriso:

nama: So Afé Ngánjánam a Yuré Yesu Kerisom tawaramangé ngárám a krufrát féfeyot. Kánjo ramégh a orayégh Ngánjánefaf
english: May the Father God and the Lord Yesu Keriso give you.p grace and peace. Thanksgiving and talking with God

nama: Tane fútaréf, méinyotio yéné aem mwighayan, taikre ewakai a kawerangi taikrataye yénayan méinyotio yéndfem némé tawatametam fém si afroghe a férne.
english: My friends, be all these in mind, stand firm and hold fast on what we taught you by preaching and by letter.

nama: So téfene Yuré Yesu Keriso a Ngánján téfene Afé, emo yénmuwetam yénd a yáne ngáráme yénmaramai tuot akegh wáutárégh a mer méghmégh, 17 ewamarotati féfenjo tikéf a so ewaramete muyé méinyotio meryam kénjún fémofem némé ewafrotati a norayati.
english: May our Lord Yesu Keriso and God our Father, who loved us and by his grace gave us eternal living help and a good hope, 17 comfort your.p heart and give power in every good thing what you.p do and say.

nama: Kor efandati yéné ár efe nakenat áyárghét némé yénd norayam téfene férnan. Nayu kéráye aem yéfe tambén ménát fá so wáiwáiam tawifongé. 15 Yau efandati ndené fene mék téfnár em, wénde ewawéngsotati ndené fété efalo yátogh ár em. Folene ambinomén ásneghafé si
english: See those people careful who refuse to obey what we say in our letter. Stay away from them so that they will be full of shame. 15 Don't see them as enemies are, but warn them as men who truly approve(believers) are. Fol's final greeting talk

nama: So krufrát Yuram yémonyo túmén ewaramete féfe yánjo krufrát méinyotio efghon a méinyotio yam kénjún. So Yuré yém féfefaf méinyotio.
english: May the Lord of peace himself give you.p his peace at all times and in every situation. The Lord be with you.p all.

nama: Yéna yém tane ásneghafé si árké yém tane ngángé faroghmén. Folém, yéndo túmén yéné ténjfi férén táf efarotan kerkeran méinyotio férnan ménát yéné yam so efalo wiyátote ndené yéné férén ta tambén fété eném.
english: Here is my greeting talk which is in my own handwriting. Fol, I used to write simple writing when I write in the end of all letter in order to prove that this letter came from me.

nama: Téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene ngárám so yém méinyotio féfeyot.
english: May the grace of our Lord Yesu Keriso be with you.p all.

nama: Yénd wém Fol, Keriso Yesuene muyafé ár, wafaretai téfene Wanjarégh ár Ngánjánam a Keriso Yesum téfene méghmégh,
english: I am Fol, a man with Yesu's authority(apostle) of Keriso Yesu, our Savior God and Keriso Yesu our hope sent.

nama: Yéndo yéfarotam kétán Timoti, tane efalo ambum ndimbal mwighé kénjún: Afé Ngánjánam a Keriso Yesu téfene Yuram so ewaramete ngárám, ghérghérsisé a krufrát. Unyégh watameghmén
english: I am writing to Timoti, my true son in the big mind(faith). The Father God and Keriso Yesu our Lord will give grace, mercy, and peace. About false teaching

nama: Dikun ndenáyo aem mer wafroghyamafé aem efalofifi; yémofem yau so enetat wéri nu mindefifi o em nité manian. 9 Fá so nawéretat efalo sian ndimbal mwighamén ménáyafé kwayaghé emaréghafé. 10 Fá fété aeufotat fronde, a féyo njam yémofem taindangi ufogh yam, fá so násáfotat.
english: Dikuns must also have a good action and be sincere; they must not drink too much alcohol or be greedy for money. 9 They should hold to the true talk of the big mind(faith) with a bright conscience. 10 They should test them first, and then if they pass the testing thing, they will work.

nama: Yau yusérmbota bulu, wénde noraya utmanégh ende ndené fété fene afé kar yém. Ewarena totér ambum ndenáye fenjo fútar em, 2 buluausé ndenáye amaf kar em, a totér amaf ndené fene mérés kar em, ménaye méinyotio mere.
english: Do not rebuke an old man, but say with respectful way to him as if he were your.s father. Treat the young men as your.s own friends/brothers, 2 the old women as mothers might be, and the young women as sisters might be, with all good.

nama: Yau tafény ámb kwiré kwirafene yétkwénfaf téfandro fá njam yém 60 yunjéf, a fá ayém ámbirotaro ár awerégh ár 10 a árém témndetat yémon tawafrote meryam: amaf emo tawanote yánjo ambumtértér, mere taumyote wan téfnár yáne méngon, tawafrote métar ásáfogh ámb efalo yátogh árét, tawáutáne ár kértayan, a naramai fáyo kétán mer ásáfoghfaf.
english: Do not add any widow to the name of widows unless she is over sixty years of age, and she must have been married only once 10 and people said she is doing good things: a woman who brought up her children well, received strangers well in her home, did humble works for other approving truth people, helped people in trouble, and gave herself to doing good.

nama: Yau nuro so yénete, wénde némbne wéri nu so téneta ndené fété murémuré ménamén fém túmén enjne ném.
english: Do not drink water only, but take a little alcohol as a medicine since you.s are sick so often.

nama: Ámb árfene yaufiyam em méinyo fandagh safén, a yéfene yaufiyam engém fronde moghfaf, wénde ámb árfene yaufiyam fandaghét em soramé. 25 Ndené yameyo mer wafroghyam fandaghét em mé safénro, a ndenáyo yéné árké yau em safénro yau so atnoghe em.
english: The sins of some people are obvious to see, and their sins go ahead to judgment; but the sins of other people are seen only later. 25 In the same way good deeds are obviously seen, and even those that are not so obvious cannot be hidden.

nama: Emo njam ewatameta fénatayo si a yau natemnda efalo sifaf téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene a watameghfaf téfene ngánján ghérsamén 4 fá sem tuktuk ár em a mat yau em yénémamén. Fá sem wasnengégh mwighafé éwighét a amrorghét simén, a yéné yamam yénérse waramnjagh, asénanégh, yaufi si orayégh, mé fayogh, 5 a túmén éwigh yam eném kétándmé yéné árta endefene mer mwighé yau násáfotat a endefaf yau efalo em. Fá nemnat ndené ngánján ghérsé yame kar yém wemár.
english: Whoever teaches a different talk and does not suit to the true talk of our Lord Yesu Keriso and with the teaching of our godly life(religion) 4 they are boasting people and don't know about anything. They have an unhealthy desire to argue and quarrel about talks, and this thing brings on jealousy, disputes, saying bad talks(insults), suspicions, 5 and constant arguments come from those people whose good minds do not work and to whom are not true. They think that religion is a way to become rich.

nama: Timoti, ewarawena némé té eraman fene ngángat. Nawarawena fifiofnar a mwighafnar amroréghta némé unyéghe ámb ár norayat ndené, "Matyam" 21 Ámb ár norayat té yanangém, wénde yénayoene fifi yémofem té téláitat ndimbal mwighane end. Ngánjánene ngárám so yém féfefaf méinyotio.
english: Timoti, guard what I gave them to your.s hand. Avoid the without.meaning and foolish arguments of what some people wrongly call “Knowledge.” 21 Some have said to possess it, but those meaning they have lost the way of big mind(faith). God's grace be with you.p all.

nama: Yénd wém Fol, Keriso Yesuene muyafé ár Ngánjánene méndeyan wénmafaretam unyéghofnar ghérsé si afroghét árké yém Keriso Yesue kénjún,
english: I am Fol, a man with Yesu's authority(apostle) of Keriso Yesu by God's will, sent to proclaim the did without.lying talk(promise) life which is in Keriso Yesu,

nama: Kétán Timoti, tane tikfafé ambum: Afé Ngánján a Keriso Yesu téfene Yuram so kémaramangé ngárám, ghérghérsisé, a krufrát. Kánjo ramégh a wawéngsogh yam
english: To Timoti, my heartful son: May the Father God and Keriso Yesu our Lord give you.s grace, mercy, and peace. Thanksgiving and Encouragement

nama: Ngánjánam té waferyéng yénd ndené fété Yesuene muyafé ár a watamegh ár ménát mer si waitoghét, 12 féyo yéné téfnan ndené yénd wém tékratan yéné yammén. Wénde yénd mé táikér mwighafé wém, ménamén yénd mat wém yéndon efe efalo yiyátotan, a yénd mé mat wém ndené fá féyotaro yém yémon so warawene némé yémon té yiyátoi tayot kétánotio Yesuene angoghot.
english: God has appointed me as a man with Yesu's authority(apostle) and teaching man to proclaim the good talk, 12 so for this reason that I am in suffering these things. But I am still full of strong mind, because I know whom I have trusted, and I know well that he is able to guard until that day what he has entrusted to me until Yesu's return.

nama: Taikrataye nawereta efalo sian ndené yéndon kés kématametan, ndené fété kés kénmaufarotan fe ménát waitoghét, a kawer taikrataye ndimbal mwighayan a uwéghan Keriso Yesu kénjún. 14 Ngánján Mbérmbér wafté kénjúmé, efe yémor téfe kénjún, ewarawena yéné meryam árké té eramayén feyot.
english: Hold firmly to the true talks that I taught you.s, as I show for you.s to follow, and remain strong in the big mind(faith) and love in Keriso Yesu. 14 Through the power of the God Spirit, who lives in us, keep this good things which I have given to you.s.

nama: Tane ambum, muyafé aném ngárám kénjún árké yém Keriso Yesu kénjún. 2 Tawanang watamegh si ndené fémon kés kwiyárete si waitoghan tárfár ghékéf fandagh ár sáfrére, a engéumyotan fá kétán ndimbal mwighé kér ro árfefaf, emofem wéi so engwatametat ámb ár.
english: My son, be strong in the grace which is in Keriso Yesu. 2 Take the teaching talk that you.s heard me in preaching in the presence of many watching men, and entrust them to faithful people, who will also be able to teach other people.

nama: Yéné si siyém efalo: "Njam yénd té kér téném yémafé, yénd so ndenáyo naketam yémafé.
english: This talk is true: “If we have died with him, we will also live with him.

nama: Njam yénd mé yénngérnyang métaran, yénd mé so ndenáyo limánéghan yéném yémafé. Njam yéndfem tékenangém fá, yémo ndenáyo so ténkenangé yénd.
english: If we continue to endure, we will also rule with him. If we deny him, he will also deny us.

nama: Njam yénd yau ndimbal mwighé kér ro yéném, fá mé yakai ndimbal mwighé kér ro, ménamén fáyo yau so nawawinde. Efalo yátoghkaf ásáfogh ár
english: If we are not faithful, he keeps standing faithful, because he cannot deceive himself.” An approved worker

nama: Nawafarota ndené kété so yéngém táikér kwéf kerker efghon. 2 Ár so kénamndangi yandro manjorégh, nité, awarsagh kér ro, tuktuk, wasáligh, áyáréghofnar yéfene afaf a amafefaf, kánjo siofnar, njúnnjúnafé, 3 yau uwégh, yau yaufiyam tawawalindangi, warunyégh, awamaréghofnar, tékratro, so méndméndat yéfandat mer; 4 sén ramégh, mwighafnar yam wafrogh, minde tuktukan, uwégh so yém fifi méndeyan minde wénde yau uwégh Ngánjáne 5 so em ngánján ghérsafé árnit, wénde yékenat yáne efalo wafté. Nayu aem yéfe tambén.
english: Remember that there will be hard times in the last days. 2 People will be selfish, greedy, boastful, and proud, insulted, disobedient to their parents, without thank talk, and with.dirty(unholy), 3 without love, not to forget bad things(unforgiving), gossips, without self-control, and fierce; they will hate the good; 4 betraying(lit. "making teeth"), doing without thinking, and very proud, love in body desire strongly but not love God; 5 will be like a religious people, but reject its real power. Keep away from them.

nama: Aleksenda tot téfén ásáfogh ár yénd yémon tárfár ende kwaghne. Yuram so taramangé yáne fai ndené fété némé yémo té tafrote. 15 Aya kor anawarawena yánemén fémyo, ménamén yémon tékarotau mindefifi téfene si.
english: Aleksandè the working man with steal spoiled me by many ways. The Lord will give his reward to him according to what he has done. 15 Be on your.s guard against him yourself, because he was so much opposed to our talk.

nama: Yuré so yém fene mbérmbéran. Ngánjánene ngárám so yém féfefaf méinyotio.
english: The Lord will be in your.s spirit. God's grace will be with you.s all.

nama: Yéné férén siyém kétamé Fol, Ngánjánene faiofnar ásáfogh ár a Yesu Kerisoene muyafé ár.
english: This letter from Fol, a without.payment worker of God and a man who has the authority(apostle) of Yesu Keriso.

nama: árké yém téfén méghmégh tuot ghérsat. Ngánján, efe yau nuinde, unyéghofnar si yénémndai fronde ufroghan. 3 A yáne waferégh efghon yémon safot yékmai yáne si kénjún. Yéné yékmai tafaf, a yéndo táitotawén ndené fété Ngánján téfene Wanjarégh árom té norayai.
english: which is based on the hope for eternal life. God, who does not lie, said without lying talk(promised) before in creation. 3 And at his chosen time he put it clearly in his talk. He put this to me, and I preached it as God our Savior had said.

nama: Yéndon férén yéngfarotan fefaf, Taitus, tane efalo ambum ndimbal mwighayan téfene árké yénmam. Ngárám a krufrát so yém kétándmé Ngánján Afé a Keriso Yesu téfene Wanjarégh ár. Taitus násáfotam kété Kreten
english: I am writing the letter to you.s, Taitus, my true son in the big mind(faith) which we share. Grace and peace will be from God the Father and Keriso Yesu our Savior. Taitus works there in Krete

nama: Faiofnar ásáfogh ár so fété em áyárégh ár yéfenjo yurafefaf a remngogh ár méinyotio yaman. Yémofem yau so ewawangotat yéfenjo yurafet 10 o yau so oro nufrotat. Wénde fá táf nauyafotat ndené fá mer a efalo yátogh kér ro em, ménamén yéfene mer yammén, méinyotio árém so yuyafotat ndimbal utmanégh Ngánjánene watameghmén téfene Wanjarégh ár.
english: Without.payment working men(slaves) should be to obeying people to their owners and pleasing men in all things. They must not talk back to their owners 10 or not steal. But they must show that they are good and faithful. And because of their good behavior, everyone will show great respect for the teaching about God our Savior.

nama: Ewatameta yéné yam a yafrota fenjo méinyotio muyaye ménát wawéngsoghét a mbarkánd yátoghét fenjo ár. Árké árom yau so nérete yuwot fefaf.
english: Teach these things and do with your.s full authority to encourage and to make straight your.s people. Let none of them look down on you.s.

nama: Méinyotio efe em yéna yéndfé kasnetangi fém. Tasnetangi téfene fútaréf ndimbal mwighaye. Ngánjánene ngárám so yém féfefaf méinyotio.
english: All who are here with me greet you.s. Greet to our friends in the big mind(faith). God's grace will be with you.p all.

nama: Yéné férén siyém kétamé yénd, Fol. Yénd wém kwéfkwéf méngon ménamén yénd násáfotan Keriso Yesue. Téfene fútar Timoti yéna yém yéndfé.
english: This letter is from me, Fol. I am in the darkness house because I serve Keriso Yesu. Our friend Timoti is here with me.

nama: a yáfaf Afiya téfene mérés, yáfaf Akifus téfene fiyaré, a wéi Yesuene mérén árfefaf efe náumendat fene méngon:
english: and to him Afia our sister, and Akifus our soldier, and also to the Yesu's family(church) people who gather in your.s house:

nama: Ngárám a krufrát so yém feyot téfene Afé Ngánjáneta a Yuré Yesu Keriso. Folene kánjo ramégh a Ngánjánafé orayégh
english: Grace and peace will be to you.s from our Father God and the Lord Yesu Keriso. Fol's thanksgiving and talking with God

nama: Áuwégh si féfeyot kétamé Efafras, yéndfé emafé yényaweyayénd kwéfkwéf méngon Keriso Yesuene téfnan, 24 a kétamé Mak, Aristakus, Demas a Luk, tane mérne ásáfogh ár.
english: Greeting talk to you.p from Efafras, who is in darkness house with me for the sake of Keriso Yesu, 24 and from Mak, Aristakus, Demas and Luk, my fellow workers.

nama: Ngárám so yém téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene féfefaf méinyotio.
english: May the grace of our Lord Yesu Keriso be with you.p all.

nama: Ngánjánam yau yémndai ámb njafar si résagh ár, "Fém ném tane Ambum; sénonjo yénd té nénamndan fene Afé"? o wéikor, "Yénd so wém yáne Afé, a fá so yém tane Ambum"?
english: God never said this to any man carrying heavenly message, “You are my Son; today I have become your.p Father”? or again “I will be his Father, and he will be my Son”?

nama: A wéikor, táf Ngánjánam njam ténramangé yánjo fronde sénko Ambum yénan mbandot, fá noraye, "Méinyotio Ngánjánene njafar si résagh árém so yáwefnotat!"
english: And again, when God brings his own firstborn Son into the world, he says, “Let all Godʼs men carrying heavenly message(angels) worship him.”

nama: Ngánján noraye njafar si résagh árfenemén ndené yéné, "Yémo eyátote yánjo njafar si résagh ár ndené mbormbornit, a yánjo faiofnar ásáfogh ár fés kánkékánkénit, "
english: God says about the men carrying heavenly message(angels) like this, “He makes his own the men carrying heavenly message(angels) like winds, and his without.payment workers(servants) like flames of fire.”

nama: Wénde Ambummén fá noraye, "Fene limánégh ámnjogh sifayé, o Ngánján, so nakete tuot. a fémon so yélimnde Ngánján limánégh mbarkánd wétuafé
english: But about the Son he says, “Your.s respectful sitting chair(throne), O God, will last forever; and you.s will be led God's kingdom with a walking stick of justice.

nama: Fémo té yuwetam mbarkánd yam a méndméndat yéfandam yaufi yam, yénémaménnde, O Ngánján, fene Ngánjánam, té néfagharyéng fém, a yéméindai fene yékwén nénamndai ndimbal a fémo yayarai ndimbal áuwégh. Fene yétkwénam ewainde méinyotio fene fútarfene.
english: You.s have loved straightness and hated wickedness, therefore, o God, your.s God, poured oil in you.s and caused your name to become great and you.s feel grat happines. by anointing you.s with the oil of joy.”

nama: Fá wéi noraye, "Ufroghan, Yuré, fémo yékmai mband maratoene téfén a njafar em fene ngángé ásáfoghmén.
english: He also says, “In the creation, Lord, you.s laid the foundations of the earth, and the heavens are the work of your.s hands.

nama: Njafar a mband so kolindangi, wénde fém so nakete, njafar a mband so méinyotio kényáyátongi tándáwár sálámenit.
english: The heaven and the earth will perish, but you.s will remain, the heaven and the earth will all become like old clothes.

nama: Fémo so ekéne fá ndenanit ángégh, sálámenit fá so tawengo. Wénde fém ném ndenaro, a fene yunjéf yau so kefongi."
english: You.s will roll them like a rope, like clothes you.s will change them. But you.s are the same, and your.s years will not end.”

nama: Yau Ngánján ámb norayai njafar si résagh árfefaf, wénde yánjo Ambumoefaf, "Kámnjo tane tambén ngángata kétánotio yéndon tákman fene mék téfnár fene kafkaf mbanmbanan"
english: God never said to any of the men carrying heavenly message(angels), but to his Son, “Sit at my right hand until I put your.s enemies under your.s feet”

nama: Wénde méinyotio njafar si résagh ár sem mé faiofnar ásáfogh ár. Fá sem mbérmbér eném kétamé Ngánjáne tambén ménát wáutárghét yéfeyot emofem so tawanangi wanjarégh.
english: But all the men carrying heavenly message(angels) are only without.payment workers. They are spirits came from God to help for those who will receive salvation.

nama: Ngánjánam yau ekmai njafar si résagh ár ménát sái yélimndat soramé yu árké yéném-árké mband maratmén yénd norayam. 6 Wénde ámb sifayan Buk si kénjún noraye: "O Ngánján, némé ár em fém snemne yéfenemén, o ndené ároene ambum fémo sái yarawena?
english: God has not placed the men carrying heavenly message(angels) as rulers over the new world to come—the world of which we speak. 6 But in some place in the Scriptures say: “O God, what are men you.s are thinking of them, or a son of man that you.s care for him?

nama: Fémo yékmai fá njafar si résagh árfene yuwan tekofnarot. A fémo utémnde a yaramai yá ndimbal kwayaghaye.
english: You.s put him under the men carrying heavenly message(angels) for a while. And you.s honoured him and gave him with big light(glory)

nama: Fémo ekmai méinyotio rokar yáne wafté mbanmbanan."
english: You.s put everything under his power.”

nama: Wénde yéndfem yéfandam Yesu. Ngánjánam tekofnarot yiyátoi Yesu yuwan njafar si résagh árfeta. Sénonjo yéfandam ndené Ngánjánam té yaram Yesue ndimbal kwayaghé a utmanégh ménamén yánjo kéran tékrát yéfandam, ménát Ngánjánene ngáráme yémo so tufongai kér méinyotio árét.
english: But we see Yesu. God mad Yesu lower from the men carrying heavenly message(angels) for a while. And now we see that God gave to Yesu big light(glory) and honor because of his death he suffered, so that through God's grace he should taste death for every people.

nama: Yéné mé mbarkánd témorwén ndené Ngánján, endeyot a emo yafrotam méinyotio rokar, so enérse yánjo tárfár ambum ndimbal kwayaghat Yesuene tékrát kénjúmé. Ngánjánam yiyátoi Yesu féwénféwénofnar limánégh ár, efe féyotaro yém sái enérsa fá wanjaréghét.
english: It was only straight that God, for whom and who made everything, should bring his many children into big light(glory) through the suffering of Yesu. God made Yesu a without.flaw leading man, who is enough to bring them into salvation.

nama: Sénonjo Yesu a fá efe eyátote njúnnjúnofnar ewam ámbiro Afé. Yénémamén Yesu yau yém wáiwáiyafé sái emndeta fá yáne fútar. 12 Fá norayai Ngánjánefaf, "Yéndon so marat tiyáton fene mer yétkwén yéfeyot tane árét; Yéndon so némuyotan fém fene méinyotio ár kénjúmé.
english: Now Yesu and those whom he makes without.dust(holy) have the one Father. That's why Yesu is not ashamed to call them his friends. 12 He says to God, “I will make wide your.s good name to them my people; I will praise you.s among all your.s people.”

nama: Fá wéi norayai, "Yéndon so efalo yiyátotan fá." A yéné sieyo fá norayai, "Yéna yénd wém mérne yémafé ambumtértér Ngánjánam árké waramai ta."
english: He also says, “I will trust him.” And he says with this talk, “Here I am with the children which God has given me.”

nama: Yénémamén Ngánján Mbérmbér noraye, "Sénonjo fém njam náyáretati yáne kém,
english: So the God Spirit says, “Today when you.p hear his voice,

nama: yau eyátotati táikér féfenjo tikéf yá tambén, ndené Israil skufrotawét njam yau káyáretawét, njam yémofem tufotawét Ngánjánene métar kété fanfne yuwon.
english: do not make harden your.p heart against him, as Israil did when they did not listen, when they test God's patience there in the clear place(desert),

nama: Ánde féfene ákiam kwufotawét yénd ndemamén yémofem téfandawét némé yéndon tafrotawén yéné 40 yunjfan.
english: Where your.p ancestors tested me even though they saw what I did for 40 years.

nama: Yéné téfnan yénd kwémorwén nékw yéné ár sátafaf; a yénd korayawén, 'Yéfene tikéf sem túmén nayu, a fá yau mat náyátongi tane end.'
english: In this reason I was angry with that generation; and I said, ‘Their hearts are always far away, and they did not know my ways.'

nama: Tane nékwan yéndo tafrotan unyéghofnar si, "Fá yau so kényawangi tane enagh sifayat."
english: In my anger I made a without.lying talk(promise), "They will never enter my resting place.”

nama: Ámb sifayan fá té noraye ménamén 7 efoghmén Ngánjánene si kénjún: "Yéné 7 efghon Ngánján nenam kétamé méinyotio yánjo ásáfoghta." 5 A wéikor ámb si ménjan fá noraye, "Fá yau so kélawangi tane enaghfaf."
english: In some place he has spoken about 7 day in God's talks: “On 7 day God rested from all his works.” 5 And again in other passage he says, “They will never enter my rest.”

nama: Ndené yameyo, Keriso yau kawarmbotau fáyo ménát sái kénamndangai limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár. Wénde Ngánjánam yémndai fá, "Fém ném tane Ambum, sénonjo efghon yénd té nénamndan fene Afé."
english: In the same way, Keriso did not honor himself in order to become a leading burning sacrifice men. But God said to him, “You.s are my Son; today I have become your.p Father."

nama: Fá wéi noraye ámb sifayan, "Fém ném ghéngén wárogh ár tuot ndené Melkisedek."
english: He also said in another place, “You.s are burning sacrifice man forever, like Melkisedek.”

nama: Mband árkéménayam yénete nu afaméghmén táf njam nuite kétán a árkéménayam efune mbwe fifiotio yéfeyot endefeyot eitaménd, yéné siyém Ngánjánene frengégh yém. 8 Wénde mband árkéménayam yéfune wétwét a yus téfnat, siyém fifiofnar. Ngánjánam so tekofnar tafalngongé yéné mband. Soramé so nakérne fésén.
