english: Land which drinks in the rain when often falls on it and which produces a crop useful to those for whom it is farmed, this is God's blessing. 8 But land which produces thorns and weeds, it is without.meaning. God will very soon speak against that ground. Later it will burn on fire.

nama: Ngánjánam té ewitérmboi tándáwár nák ménamén ghéngén wároghmén, ménamén yéné nák namndai muyafnar, féyo yéné féyotarofnar témorwén téfe wáutárghét. 19 Nákam yau yiyátoi féwénféwénofnar. A sénonjo mer méghmégham té néusénam yéné kénjúmé árkéménáyan yénd yéném kaka Ngánjánefaf.
english: God has destroyed an old law, because that law became powerless, so it was unable to help us. 19 The law never made without.flaw. And now a good hope has been provided through this which we come near to God.

nama: Kété wéi yém Ngánjánene sotafé si. Kété yau em ndené sotafé si njam ámb ár eyátoyéng ghéngén wárogh ár. 21 Wénde Yesu namndai ghéngén wárogh ár sotafé sie njam Ngánján noraye yáfaf, "Yuram té yafrotam sotafé si a yau so térafarngé yánjo unyéghofnar si: 'Fém ném ghéngén wárogh ár tuot.'"
english: There is also God's strong talk(oath). There was no such strong talk(oath) when the other people become burning sacrifice men. 21 But Yesu became a burning sacrifice man by a strong talk(oath) when God said to him, “The Lord has made his strong talk(oath) and will not break his without.lying talk(promise): ‘You.s are burning sacrifice men forever.’ ”

nama: Ménamén Ngánjánene sotafé simén, Yesu yéné féyém emo yafrotam mer árnyégh sái kufrotau.
english: Because of God's strong talk(oath), Yesu is the one who causes a better covenant to be fulfilled.

nama: Yéné siyém si téfén: Téfene té yém Limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár, efe námnjoi limánégh ámnjogh sifayan kété njafaran kétamé Ngánjánene tambén ngángata. 2 Fá násáfote ndené fété limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár Minde Njúnnjúnofnar sifayan, efalo farai méngon árkéméné yérametam Yuram, yau ár ngángayam.
english: This is the foundation of the talk point: We have a High burning sacrifice man, who sits down in the table of high honor in there heaven at God's right hand. 2 He serves as leading burning sacrifice man in the Most Without.dust Place, in the real canves house which Lord built, not by human hands.

nama: Njam fronde árnyégh témorwén téfnofnar, kété wéi yau so témorwén ámb ménde ménát yénamayomén árnyégh sái tasongai yáne sifayan. 8 Wénde Ngánjánam yémonyo yinjoi téfén yánjo árfefaf a norayai: "Yuré noraye, 'Efogh so yéném, njam yéndon so yérametan totér árnyégh yémafé Israil árfé a Judamén árfé.
english: If the first covenant had been faultless, there would have been no need for a second covenant to replace its place. 8 But God himself saw fault with his people, and said, “The Lord says, 'The days are coming, when I will make a new covenant with the people of Israil and with the people of Juda.

nama: Yéné árnyégh yau so ndené yém yéndon sirametamén yéfene ákiafé njam yéndon tarsawén fá ngángaye a elimayén kétamé Ijif mbandta. Fá yau kawéretawét ndimbal mwighaye kétán tane árnyéghfaf, féyo yéndon ewawengoyén tane sém yéfeyot.
english: This covenant will not be like the covenant that I made with their ancestors when I took them by the hand and led them out of Ijif. They didn't hold faithfully to my covenant so I turned my back on them.

nama: Wénde yéné siyém totér árnyégh yéndon so yafrotan yémafé Israil árfé yéné efghon, noraye Yuré: Yéndon so ekmetan tane nák yéfene mwighayan a efarotan yéfene tikfan. Yénd so wém yéfene Ngánján, a fá so em tane ár.
english: But this is new covenant I will make with the people of Israil in that days, says the Lord: I will put my laws in their minds and write them on their hearts. I will be their God, and they will be my people.

nama: A yémofem yau so ewatametat yéfe fútaréf, yau so yémofem ewatametat yéfenjo mérén, néngorayat, 'Fém fai mat tam Yuré.' Ménamén méinyotio ár kétamé némbnar kétán ndimbal so mat em tanemén.
english: And they will not teach their friends, they will not teach their family, saying, ‘You.p should know the Lord.’ Because every people from small to big will know about me.

nama: Yénd so kwawalindangé yéfene yaufi, a yéndon yau so ewawafarotan yéfene yaufi."
english: I will forget their sins and I will never remember their sins.”

nama: Njam Ngánján noraye totér árnyéghmén, Ngánjánam té yiyátoi frondemén árnyégh tándáwár, a némndafi árkéméné kamndangé tándáwár so tekofnaye kolindangé.
english: When God speaks of a new covenant, God has made the first covenant old, and anything which is becoming old like that will not.far disappear.

nama: Yénémamén Yesu yéné féyém emo so yéfrende totér árnyégh yémafé Ngánján a ár, ménát méinyotio efe eumyote so ersat tuot rokar Ngánjánam némat mat eyátoi fá ménamén Keriso kér yémormén ménát sái yuwek táyátongai kétamé yaufiyamoene faita yémofem árké tawafrotawét fronde árnyégh mbanmbanan.
english: So Yesu is the one who will settle new covenant between God and people, so that all who are invited can receive the eternal things for what God did without.lying talk(promise) them because Keriso died to make free them from sins' payment which they did under the first covenant.

nama: Yéné téfnan Keriso njam yénmormén mbandot, norayai Ngánjánefaf: "Fém méndefnar ném wérár ghéngén a ramégh yam, wénde fémo té waramai ta fifi ménát raméghét.
english: In this reason when Keriso came into the world, he said to God: “You.s did not want animal sacrifices and giving things(offerings), but you.s have given me body to offer.

nama: Fém yau kénremngotau ménáyan njam wérár kaneghawét ghéngén kitarayan o ámb ramégh yam yaufiyammén.
english: You.s were not pleased with animals burned on the sacrificing table(latar) or with other offering for sin.

nama: Féyo yénd norayayén, "Kéreta, yénd té kwéném sái yafrotan fene ménde, o Ngánján ndené fété kés yéfarotaménd tanemén kété Ngánjánene sian.
english: Then I said, ‘Look, I have come to do your.s will, O God just as it is written about me there in the God's talk.

nama: Ngánján Mbérmbér wéi noraye yénémamén. Ndené noraye:
english: The God Spirit also says this. For he says:

nama: "Njam efogh kawerangé, yéndon so yafrotan árnyégh yémafé, yéndon so efarotan tanjo nák kété yéfene mwighayan a tikéfan
english: “When time reaches, I will make an covenat with them. I will write my laws there on their minds and hearts.

nama: Féyo yénd so kwawalindangé ménamén yéfene yaufiyammén a yau so ewafarotan yéfene yaufi wafroghyam."
english: Then I will forget about their sins and will not remember their evil doings."

nama: Njam yaufiyam té tawalindangé, kété wéi yau yém sái erametat ghéngén. Ke kétán awamaroghét
english: And when he forgets sins, there is no more to offer sacrifice. A Call to persevere

nama: Fém so em métar, ménát fémofem so mé yéngwafrotati Ngánjánene ménde. Féyo fémofem so tawanangi méinyotio némat yémo té néngorayai. 37 Mé tekofnaye, Fá efe yéném so yéném a yau so yale."
english: You.p need to be patient, so that you.p will continue to do the will of God. Then you.p will receive all what he has said.

nama: Wénde tane mbarkánd ár so emor ndimbal mwighaye. A njam fá kangongi, yénd yau so náuwétan yéfefaf.
english: “But my straight men will live by big mind(faith). And if they turn back, I will not be pleased with them.

nama: Wénde yénd yau ndené yéném efe nangotat férfére a Ngánjánam tékratan tankmangé. Wénde yénd yéném ár emofem mé efalo yiyátotat Ngánján, a féyo, téfene ghérsé so em wanjarégh Ngánjánafé.
english: But we do not be like those who turn back in fear and God put in pain us. But we are people who continue to trust God, and so, our lives are safe with God.

nama: Ndimbal mwighé yém táikér mwighé ndené némat yénd méghmégh yéném yéné so nufrote, yénmaramete téfén rokarmén yéndfem árké yau efandam. 2 Ngánjánam yéramai yánjo efalo yátogh kétán árét tándái efghon ménamén yéfene ndimbal mwighamén.
english: The big mind(faith) is confidence that what we hope for will happen, it gives us root/proof about things which we cannot see. 2 God gave his real approval to people in old days because of their big mind(faith).

nama: Ménaye ndimbal mwighaye yénd mat náyátotam ndené méinyotio mband marat kufrotau kété Ngánjánene sie, ménát némé yéndfem sénonjo efandam yau enmormén kétamé árké rokar té efandam.
english: By big mind(faith) we understand that entire world was formed by God's talk, so that what we now see did not come from anything that we can be seen.

nama: A Abelém tafrotawéng ghéngén ramégh Ngánjáne fá efalo tiyátotau. Táfandio, yáne ghéngén ramégham yáindai yáné Keinene ghéngén ramégh a témorwén merfifi. Ngánján témorwén áuwéghafé yáfaf a yáne ramégh yammén a ndemamén Abel sénonjo yém kér téfnár, yáne ndimbal mwighé mé noraye téfefaf.
english: And Abel was making an offering to God he truly approved(believed). At the same time, his offering sacrifice surpassed his older brother Kein's offering sacrifice and was very good. God was pleased with him and his gifts and even though Abel is now dead, his big mind(faith) still speaks to us.

nama: Ndimbal mwighaye ndené Noam yérametam bout sái tawanjarngai yánjo mérén kétamé kéférta. Yémon tiyáretau Ngánján, emo tawéngsotau fá ménamén ámb yammén árké yau nufrotam tándái. Ménaye yánjo ndimbal mwighaye Ngánjánam yafalngoi méinyotio mband marat a nénamndai Noa mbarkánd Ngánjánene ghékfan.
english: By big mind(faith) that Noa built a boat to save his family from the flood. He obeyed God, who warned him about something which had never happened in the past(before). By his big mind(faith) God condemned all the world and made Noa straight in God's sight.

nama: Ndimbal mwighaye ndené Aisekém efrendangeyai yánjo sómbio ambum, Jeikof a Esau, yáne témorwén táikér mwighé kétán némé Ngánjánam so tafrotau kété táf soramayan.
english: By big mind(faith) that Aisek blessed his two sons, Jeikof and Esau, he had confidence in what God would do in the future.

nama: Ndimbal mwighaye ndené Jeikof, njam fá témorwén bulu a nufngoi krot, efrendayéng fénatayero Josefene ambum. Fá namghai yánjo wétuan a Ngánjáne yáwefnoi.
english: By big mind(faith) that Jeikof, when he was old and dying, blessed each of Josef's sons. He leaned his walking stick and worshipped God.

nama: Ndimbal mwighaye ndené Josef, njam kaka témorwén krot, mwighé taikre norayai Israil ár tanéutorngai kétamé Ijifta. A fá témorwén féyotaro yénémamén ndené yémo tamndetau fá ménát sái társawét yáne sot yémofem njam fá kuwanongayénd.
english: By big mind(faith) that Josef, when he was about to die, said confidently the Israil people take out of Ijif. And he was so sure of it that he commanded them to carry his bones when they leave.

nama: Ndimbal mwighaye Moses yárefafem yátmafé yétneyayénd nambio ghérare yánjoyo mérnam njam fá náráftam. Yémofem yinjeyayénd fá témorwén mer ambum, a fá yau tarwén férfér warsagh ároene wafroghyammén.
english: By big mind(faith) Moses's parents hid him three months by his family when he was born. They.d saw he was a good child, and they were not afraid of the ruling man(king)'s commandment.

nama: Ndimbal mwighaye Israil ár tayotau yénamé Férkat Arakafamé ndenanit fá kar tamorwén ghérnat mbandan. Wénde njam Ijif árém tawaitotawét, fá semormén méinyotio kolitotawét.
english: By big mind(faith) that the people of Israil went right through the Red Sea as if on dry land. But when the Ijift people followed, they were all drowned.

nama: Yéné ár tamorwén méinyotio efalo ménamén yéfene ndimbal mwighamén, wénde ámb árom yau yanai némat Ngánjánam té unyéghofnar si norayai, 40 ménamén Ngánjánam té yéfaronam ámb merfifi mwighé téfeyot, ménát mé yéndfé njam yéném so fá táf káyátongi féwénféwénofnar.
english: These people were all real because of their big mind(faith), yet none of them received what God said without.lying talk, 40 because God had planned something better thinking for us, so that only with us they would be without.flaw(perfect).

nama: Ménamén Yuram téfél ewaramete yéné ár yémon seuwete, a yémon tékratan ekmete fá yémo seumyote ndené yáne ambum."
english: Because the Lord discipled those people he loves, and he punishes them whom he accepts as his son.”

nama: Yénémaménnde, ndémbérndérmbérafé ngángé muyafé táyátongi a féfene njangén budém. 13 Ewafrotati mbarkánd end féfene kafkafot, ménát aknyégh ár yau so eknyang, wénde so mer káyátongi. Ke ménát áyárghét Ngánjánefaf
english: Therefore, become strong your.p tired hands and your weak knees. 13 Make straight paths for your.p feet, so that the lame will not fall, but they will become good. A call to listen to God

nama: Yénémaménnde, yénd so yéném kánjo ramégh ár, ménamén téfene yém warsagh ároene yu árkéménayam yau so yésambnete, yéndfem fai táwefnotangém Ngánjáne yéné ende árkéménayam yéremngote fá utmanéghafé a férférafé, 29 ménamén téfene Ngánján syém ndenanit fés emo yéngwakerne rokar méinyotio.
english: Therefore, let us come thanks giving people, because we have a king's nation that cannot be shaken, we should worship God in this way that satisfy him with respect and fear, 29 for our God is like a fire who burns things all.

nama: Yénémamén yénd norayam táikér mwighaye, "Yuré siyém tane wáutárégh ár, féyo yénd yau so férfér wém. Némé so árém yafrotat tafaf?"
english: So we say with confidence, “The Lord is my helper, so I will not be afraid. What can people do to me?”

nama: Yau ewawalinda yéfenemén féfene limánégh ár, emofem tawatametat fém Ngánjánene si. Nawafarotati ndernáye sáfot ghérsé fá tanmorangérwén a mato a ewam ndimbal mwighé ndené yéfene tawamorwén. 8 Yesu Keriso mé ndenaro yém, káye, sénonjo, a tuot.
english: Don't forget about them your.p leading men, who taught you.p the talk of God. Remember what kind of lives they lived and try to have big mind(faith) that they have. 8 Yesu Keriso is the same, yesterday, today and forever.

nama: Yénémamén yéndfem so túmén ewatetam Ngánjánefaf áuwégh wangogh ghéngén Yesue kénjúmé, árké yém ramégh mbírmbíram yéramete ndené yémndetat fá yém Yuré. 16 Wénde yau ewawalinda mer yam wafrogh a sái nawáutánati fémro kénjún, ménamén yéné féyém ghéngén árkéménayam yéméindat Ngánján áuwéghét.
english: Therefore Let us always offer praise to God as our sacrifice through Jesus, which is the offering presented by lips that confess he is Lord. 16 But do not forget to do good anf help one another, because these are the sacrifice which please God.

nama: Eutémndati a eyáretati féfene limánégh ár, yémofem féfene ghérsé efandat Ngánjánene téfnan. Ngánjánam so efande yéfene ásáfogh nde té tafrotat mere. Féyo eutémndati, fá so áuwéghafé em Ngánjánene ásáfoghan. Yau táf yaufi si norayati yéfefaf, ménamén yéné yam yau so ewáutánat.
english: Respect your leaders and obey them. They watch over your lives on God's behalf. God will check to see if they have done their work well. So respect them, they will be happy in the God's work. Do not say bad things against them, because that will never help you.

nama: Ngánjánafé norayati téfeyot, yénd mat yéném ndené téfene mwighé siyém kwayaghayan a ménde yéném ménát sái yénmor utmanéghafé méinyotio ende. 19 Yénd ménde wém féfene Ngánjánafé orayégh mé sénonjo ménát yénd so nénangotan féfefaf wékeye.
english: Talk with God(pray) for us, we know that our minde is in light and desire to live honorably in every way. 19 I need your.p talking with God right now so that I can come back to you.p quickly.

nama: Tane fútaréf, yéndon té téfarotan mé ténjfi fefé ménát féfe wawéngsoghét, a yéndon ewamnendan fém ménát kwaramangi kaka áyárégh némé yénd té norayangén.
english: My friends, I have written only a short letter to encourage you.p, and I beg you.p to pay close attention to hear what I have said.

nama: Yénd ménde wém fém sái mat kamndangi ndené téfene fútar Timoti té yutorngi kétamé kwéfkwéf méngota. Njam fá kufarngé wékeye, yéndfé mérne so yénre táf féfe fandaghét.
english: I want you.p to know that they has released our friend Timoti from darkness house. If he arrives quickly, I will come with him to see you.p.

nama: Esnetati méinyotio féfenjo limánégh ár a méinyotio Yurane ár. Efe em kétamamén Italia engwatembangi ásneghafé si féfeyot.
english: Kiss/Greet all your.p leading men and all the Lordʼs people. Who are from Italia send [their] greeting talk to you.p.

nama: Ngánjánene ngárám so yém féfefaf méinyotio.
english: May God's grace be with you.p all.

nama: Yénd wém Jems, Ngánjánene faiofnar ásáfogh ár a Yuré Yesu Kerisoene: Yéndo yéfarotan kétán 12 mérnat efe nofarnaménd mband maratan. Ásneghafé! Ufogh a utarégh yam
english: I am Jems, a without.payment working man of God and of the Lord Yesu Keriso: I am writing to 12 groups who scattered among world. Greetings! Trial and temptation

nama: Wénde ámb ár so korayangé, "Fefaf yém ndimbal mwighé, tafaf yém wafroghyam."
english: But someone will say, “You.s have big mind(faith), I am deeds.”

nama: Fémofem efalo yiyátotati ndené yénayém ámbiro Ngánján? Mer! Ndené yame yaufi mbérmbéram efalo yiyátotat a néwérsotat férférafé.
english: Do you.p truly approve(believe) that there is only one God? Good! In the same way the evil spirit truly approve(believe) and tremble with fear.

nama: Ndené endeyo, Raab, árfé awanégh téfnár yiyátoi mbarkánd yénayan némé yémo yafrotam njam yémo eumyoi ayamégh téfnár a engwatembai fá fénaté endmé. 26 Ndené fété fifi kés yém mbérmbérofnar kérwén, yénémamén ndimbal mwighé wafroghyamofnar wéi yém kérwén.
english: In the same way, Raab, the prostitute considered straight for what she did when she allowed to the spies and sent them off in a different way? 26 As the body without the spirit is dead, so also big mind(faith) without actions is dead.

nama: Árém so ewarawenat méinyotio fénatafénaté wérár, men, kamban, wagif. 8 Wénde yau árké árom so yarawene kanké. Yéné siyém wamaroghofnar yaufi, áfoghare férndén.
english: People can control all kinds of animals, birds, snakes and fish. 8 But no person can control the tongue. This is a uncontrollable evil, full of poison.

nama: Wénde káfeté mwighé árké yéném kétamé njafarta yém fronde yém njúnnjúnofnar; krufrát wafrogh, merafé yam, amyoghar, afoghare ghérghérsisé a mer mbwe, yau ámb árfaro afrengégh a unyéghofnar. 18 Krufrát wafrogh ár emofem eitat krufrátoene mbwe yéférnat mbarkánd ghérsé.
english: But the wisdom which comes from heaven is first of all pure; peace making, gentle, submissive, full of mercy and good fruit, no perfering only some people(favoritism) and no lying. 18 Peacemakers who plant the seeds of peace harvest straight life.

nama: Wénde yémo yénmaramete téfe mindefifi ngárám. Yéné téfnan Buk si noraye: "Ngánjánam ekarote tuktuk ár wénde yuyafote ménde yéfe yuwan árét."
english: But he gives us more grace. That is why Scripture says: “God opposes proud people but shows favor them to humble people.”

nama: Yéné tukén méinyotio, tane fútar, yau táf olaghofnar si norayati njafare o mband maratoe o ámb rokare. Méinyotio féfene siot sái ewam nekambe "O" o "Yau, " a féyo fém yau so eném Ngánjánene mogh mbanmbanan.
english: Above all, my friends, do not say without.changing talk(swear) by heaven or by earth or by anything else. All your.p saying is a simple “Yes” or “No,” and then you.p will not come under God's judgement.

nama: Yénémaménnde eufanati féfenjo yaufiyam féfenjo kénjún a Ngánjánafé norayati féfenjo kénjún ménát fém so mer káyátongi. Mbarkánd ároene Ngánjánafé orayégh siyém wafté kér ro a féyotaro yém ámb ár wáutárghét.
english: Therefore confess your.p sins to each other and talk with God for each other so that you.p may become good. The talking with God of a straight person is powerful and is able to help others.

nama: Yénd wém Fité, Yesu Kerisoene muyafé ár.
english: I am Fitè, a man with Yesu's authority(apostle) of Yesu Keriso,

nama: Afé Ngánján mat témorwén a ekafai frondeyo, a Ngánján Mbérmbéram té eyátoi fém njúnnjúnofnar. Féyo fémofem té yiyáretati Yesu Keriso a yáné férkam eumbaryéng fém. Ngárám a krufrát so yém féfene méinyoe. Áuwégh Ngánjáneyot ghérsamén méghmégh
english: The Father God knew and chose in the firstly, a God Spirit has made you without.dust. So, you have heard Yesu Keriso and his blood washed you.p. May grace and peace be yours fully. Praise to God for a living hope

nama: wénde Yurane si so nakete tuot." Yéné si fiyém árké té táitotawét féfefaf.
english: but the talk of the Lord lives forever.” This talk is which they preached to you.p.

nama: Yénémaménnde, nékmbotati méinyotio yaufita, yau unyégh o wasogh o waramnjagh o wasáligh si. 2 Aem totér áráfégh fasrinit efe em siogh mbérmbére nono wékwérot, ménát njam enetati fém so nanotati a kawanjarngi, 3 sénonjo fémofem té yérnongi ndené Yuré siyém mer.
english: Therefore, stop all evil, no lying or tricking or jealousy or insulting talk. 2 Be like newborn babies who are thirsty for the spiritual milk, so that when you.p drink it you.p may grow up and be saved, 3 now you.p have tasted that the Lord is good.

nama: Yéné wím siyém merfifi féfeyot emofem efalo yiyátotat, wénde árét emofem yau efalo yiyátotat: "Wím méngo ramégh árém árké yékenayénd té nénamndé téndo wím, "
english: This stone is of big value for you.p who truly approve(believe), but for those who do not truly approve(believe): “The stone which the builders rejected has become the cornerstone"

nama: wéi, Buk si noraye, "Wím árkéménayam eméinde ár ménát eunoghét, mbaré yéné árkéménayam eméinde ár uighét." Fá neunotat ménamén fá yau náyáretat si, yéné siyém Ngánjánene ménde yém yéfeyot.
english: also, Buk(scripture) says, “The stone that make people to be stumble, the rock that will make them fall.” They stumbled because they did not truly approve(believe) the talk, this is God's will for them.

nama: Fém ár kor fété so emor féfenjo amafafé mer ende. Fém táf em mer féfene amaffaf a ewáutánati amaf. Nawafarotati ndené fá yau em kor muyafé. Nawafarotati ndené fémofem té yanangi efalo ghérsé Ngánjánta, ménamén fá mer yém. Eutémndati amaf. Féyo Ngánjánam so ewawangote féfene Ngánjánafé orayégh. Tékrat ménamén meryam wafroghmén
english: You.p husbands must also live in a good way with your wives. You.p should be kind to your.p wife and help her. Remember that she is not as strong as you.p are. Remember that you have received true life from God, because he is good. Respect her. Then God will answer your talking with God. Suffering for doing good

nama: Fá táf kawengongi yaufita a ewafrotat mer. Yémofem táf yéronjat krufrát a yaitotat yéné.
english: They must turn from evil and do good. They must seek peace and follow this.

nama: Ménamén Yuram yéfande némé mbarkánd árém yafrotat. Fá yiyárete mbarkánd ár njam fá Ngánjánafé norayét. Wénde fá tengo kétamé emofem ewafrotat yaufi yam."
english: Because the Lord sees what straight people do. He listens to straight people when they talk with God. But he turns away from them who do bad things."

nama: Yénémaménnde, fá efe em tékratan ménáyan Ngánjánene méndeyan so karamangi fáyo kétán yéfene ndimbal mwighé kér ro Wafrogh ároefaf a mé so engém meryam wafroghan.
english: Therefore, those who are in suffering according to Godʼs will should give themselves to their faithful Creator and continue to do good.

nama: Totér ambum, ndené endeyo, namyotati yéfefafmé efe em sénko ár. Méinyotio fém, nawamanetati fémyo yuwan ghérsaye, ménamén Buk si noraye, "Ngánjánam ekene tuktuk ár wénde yuyafote ménde yéfeyot efe em yuwan ghérsafé."
english: Young men, in the same way, submit yourselves who are head people. All of you.p, clothe yourselves with humility, because the Buk(scripture) says, “God opposes proud people but show favor them who are humble.”

nama: Yénémamén, yuwan náyátotati fémyo Ngánjánene ndimbal ngángé mbanmbanan, táf yémo so tauyongé fém tukét yánjo mer efghon. 7 Taramangi méinyotio féfene mwighé wawérsogh Ngánjánefaf ménamén yémon ewambete fém.
english: Therefore, be humble yourselves under Godʼs mighty hand, that he will lift you.p up in his own good time. 7 Give all your.p worries to God because he cares for you.p.

nama: Awamarogh a ghékéf sénté. Féfene mék téfnár Sáifér noférkawete awánangoghafé ndenanit ndimbal munjan fus nérete ménát ámb ár sái yasérmbota. 9 Yékenati fá, kokayongi taikrataye ndimbal mwighé kénjún, ménamén fém mat em efalo yátogh ár mérén mband maratan eyota yéné tékrat yamamayo.
english: Be alert and be on watch. Your.p enemy Sáifèr roams around like a roaring big wild cat(lion) looking for someone to destroy. 9 Resist him, standing firm in the big mind(faith), because you.p know that the family of approving truth people in the world is going through this kind of sufferings.

nama: A Ngánján méinyotio ngárámmén, emo emotai kétán tuot ndimbal kwayaghafaf Kerisoene kénjún, yéné soramé fém té tam tékratan tekofnar, so yémonyo kor táyátongé mer a muyafé. Fém so ewakai taikre a mbénmbénate. 11 Yáfaf em wafté tuot. Efalo. Kerkermén ásneghafé si
english: And the God of all grace, who called you.p to his eternal big light(glory) in Keriso, after this you.p have been in suffering a little while, will make you.p well again and strong. You.p will stand firm and steadfast. 11 To him be the power forever. Amen. Final greeting talk

nama: Sailesene wáutárghe, efe yéndon yiyátotan ndené ndimbal mwighafé fútar, yéndon té tafarotan féfeyot némbnare férén, tawawanjan fém a kéngorayan ndené yéné siyém Ngánjánene efalo ngárám. Kokayongi taikrataye yénayan.
english: With the help of Sailes, whom I regard as a faithful friend, I have written to you.p short letter, encouraging you.p and saying that this is the God's true grace. Stand firm in this.

nama: Ásneghafé si kétamé efalo yátogh árfeta kété Babilonén, fá em Ngánjánene kaféghmén ár, Mak efe yém ndenanit tane ambum, engwatemb yánjo ásnegh si wéi. 14 Kasnetangi fémro fémro ménaye uwéghafé ásneghe. Krufrat so yém méinyotio féfefaf efe em Kerisoene kénjún.
english: Greeting talk from approving truth people in Babilon, they are chosen people of God, Mak who is like my son, sends his greeting talks also. 14 Greet one another with a kiss of love. May peace to all of you.p who are in Keriso.

nama: Yéné férén siyém kétamé Saimon Fité, Yesu Kerisoene faiofnar ásáfogh ár a muyafé ár. Yéndo yéfarotan féfefaf emofem téfene Ngánjánene a Wanjarégh ár Yesu Kerisoene mbarkánd kénjúmé té ewanayénd ndimbal mwighé merfifi ndené téfene:
english: This letter is from Saimon Fitè, a worker and man who has Yesu's authority(apostle) of Yesu Keriso. I am writing to you.p who through the straightness of our God and Savior Yesu Keriso have received a big mind(faith) as precious as ours:

nama: Ngárám a krufrát so yém féfefaf afoghare Ngánjánene a téfene Yuré Yesuene matyam kénjúmé. Ngánjánam yénkafai yandio
english: May grace and peace be yours in full through knowledge of God and of our Lord Yesu. God chose us as his own

nama: Yénémaménnde, tane fútar, násáfotati taikrataye ménát so efalo tiyátongi féfene wanmogh a waferégh. Njam fémofem ewafrotati yéné yam, fém yau so kuyangi, 11 a fémofem so tanangi wemár umyogh téfene Yurafaf a Wanjarégh ár Yesu Kerisoene akegh Ngánján limánéghfaf. Ufrogh si Bukan
english: Therefore, my friends, work hard to confirm your.p calling and choosing/election. If you.p do these things, you.p will never fall away, 11 and you.p will receive a rich welcome into the eternal kingdom of our Lord and Savior Yesu Keriso. Prophecy in Buk(scripture)

nama: Wénde njafar si résagh árém ewaindat yéné ár a em minde tukén a waftafé, yémofem yau tamndetawét yaufi si Yurane sáfrére. 12 Wénde yéné unyégh watamegh ár sem ndenanit kéghat wérár ménát werghét a krot. Fá nénwangotat tékrate fá árkéméné mafina em. Fá so kolindangi ndenanit kéghat wérár.
english: But the men carrying heavenly message(angels) surpass these men and are very high up and great power, but they do not say bad talk to them before the Lord. 12 But these false teaching men are like wild animals [born] to be captured and killed. They pay them back with suffering which they do not know. They will be destroyed like wild animals,

nama: Wénde Yurane efogh so yéném ndenanit oro téfnár. Njafar so nolindat ukefé. Fésam so yasérmbote méinyotio rokar. Mband marat a méinyotio rokar némé árém ewafrotat so kolindangi.
english: But the day of the Lord will come like a thief. The heavens will disappear with a roar. Fire will destroy whole things. The earth and everythings that people have made will disappear.

nama: Tikfafé ambumtértér, yéndon yéfarotan féfefaf ménamén féfene yaufiyam té tawalindangé Kerisoene kénjúmé.
english: Heartful children, I am writing to you.p because your.p sins are forgot/forgiven through Keriso. 13 Fathers, I am writing to you.p because you.p have known him who is from the beginning. Young men, I am writing to you.p because you.p have overcome the evil one.

nama: Tikfafé ambumtértér, yéndon yéfarotan féfefaf ménamén fém mat té náyátongi Afé. Afaf, yéndon yéfarotan féfefaf ménamén fémofem mat té yiyátongi fá efe yém kétamé rényégh. Totér ambum, yéndon yéfarotan féfefaf ménamén fém em muyafé, a Ngánjánene si yékmang féfefaf, a fémofem té yáindangi yaufi ár. Yau yuwetati mband marat
english: Heartful children, I am writing to you.p because you.p know the Father. Fathers, I am writing to you.p because you.p have known him who is from the beginning. Young men, I am writing to you.p because you.p are strong, and God's talk lives in you.p, and you have overcome the evil one. Don't love the world

nama: Wénde féfefaf té Ngánján Mbérmbér yasuryéng Kerisom, a féyo méinyotio fém mat em efalo. 21 Yéndon yéfarotan féfefaf, yau ménamén fém mafina em efalo wénde ménamén fém mat em ndené unyégh si yau yéném efalota.
english: But Keriso have the God Spirit poured out on you.p, and so all of you.p know the truth. 21 I am writing to you.p, not because you.p don't know the truth but because you.p know that false talk does not come from truth.

nama: A efe yém unyégh ár? Fá efe noraye ndené Yesu yau yém Keriso, ndené ár fem unyégh keriso. Yémofem té yékenangi Yárefé a Ambum. 23 Emofem yékarotat Ambum, wéi yékarotat Yárefé, wénde emofem yumyotat Ambum, ndenéyameyo yumyotat Yárefé.
english: And who is the liar? He who says that Yesu is not Keriso, such people are false keriso. They have denied his Father and the Son. 23 Who reject the Son, also reject his Father, but who accept the Son, also accept his Father.

nama: Mé a nemnati ménamén si fémofem árké nénáyárayénd fronde, a fém so em túmén ámbiro féfene tikfan yémafé Ambumofé a Yárefafé. 25 Ambumom té unyéghofnar si norayai téfefaf: tuot ghérsé.
english: Keep on thinking about the talk which you.p first heard, and you.p will always be one on your.p heart with the Son and with his Father. 25 The Son has told without.lying talk(promise) us: eternal life.

nama: Tikfafé ambumtértér, sénonjo mé aem yáne kénjún, ménát fá njam kufarngé, yénd so yéném féyotaro a wáiwáiofnar yánerére yáne angoghan. 29 Fém njam mat em ndené fá yém mbarkánd, fém mat em ndené méinyotio árém emofem ewafrotat némé em mbarkánd té náráftayénd yáfaf.
english: Heartful children, now continue to be in him, so that when he appears, we may be confident and get without.shame before him at his coming. 29 If you.p know that he is straight, you.p know that every people who do what is straight has been born of him.

nama: Yéné fiyém watamegh fémofem árké náyárayénd kétamé rényégh: Yénd so náuwetam téfenjo kénjún. 12 Yau ndené em Kein efe témorwén yaufi ároe tambén a yésmetam yánngén. Némamén yémo yésmetam krotio fá? Ménamén yam Keiném tawafrotau tamorwén mámáfi, a yam yanngnom tawafrotau tamorwén mer.
english: This is the teaching which you.p heard from the beginning: We must love each other. 12 Don't be like Kein who was from the evil one and killed his younger brother. Why did he kill him? Because the things Kein did were bad, and things his younger brother did were good.

nama: Tikfafé fútaréf, njam Ngánjánam yénmuwetam yénd mindefifi wéi ndenéyameyo so náuwetam téfenjo kénjún. 12 Ámb árom yau yinjoi Ngánján, wénde njam yénd náuwetam téfenjo kénjún, Ngánján yémor téfefaf, a yáne uwégh káyátongé féwénféwénofnar téfefaf.
english: Heartful friends, if God loved us as much we also should love each other. 12 Nobody has seen God, but if we love each other, God lives in us, and his love is making without.flaw(perfect) in us.

nama: Yénd mat yéném ndené yénd yénmor Ngánjánene kénjún a fá yémor téfene kénjún, ménamén yémo té yénmaramai téfe yánjo Mbérmbér. 14 Yéndfem té yinjoyém a so néngafrotam ndené Yárefam yénmáfáretam yánjo Ambum ménát sái témorwén Wanjarégh ár mband maratoe.
english: We know that we live in God and he lives in us, because he gave us his Spirit. 14 We have seen and can testify that the Father sent his Son to be the Savior of the world.

nama: Efe njam néngoraya ndené Yesu siyém Ngánjánene Ambum yényau Ngánján yáne kénjún, a yéné ár yényau Ngánjánene kénjún. 16 A yénd mat yéném uwégh Ngánjánene árké yém téfeyot, a yéndfem efalo yiyátotam yéné uwégh.
english: Whoever says that Yesu is the Son of God have God living in him, and that person lives in God. 16 And we know the love which God has for us, and we trust that love.

nama: Yéné fiyém ndenáye so yéndfem euwetam ámb ár méinyotio tikfe. Féyo, yénd so yéném férférofnar yéné efghon Ngánjánam njam so emote méinyotio ár. Yénd mat so yéném ndené Ngánjánam yau so tékratan ténékmangé yénd. Yénd mat yéném yéné ménamén yénd ténmor yéné mband maratan yéné ende Yesu ndernaye témorangérwén. 18 Ánde Ngánjánene uwégh yém, kété yau yém férfér, ménamén Ngánjánene féwénféwénofnar uwégham titérmbongé férfér. Féyo uwégh yau náyáto féwénféwénofnar yéné ároefaf efe yém férfér, ménamén férféram so tékmangé tékratan.
english: That is how we are able to love other people with all heart. Then, we will not be afraid on the day when God will judge all people. We can be sure that God will not punish us. We know this because we have lived in this world in the way that Yesu lived. 18 Where God's love is, there is no fear, because God's without.flaw love drives out fear. So then, love has not been made without.flaw(perfect) in anyone who is afraid, because fear put them into punishment.

nama: Yéné férén siyém kétamé Jon, sénko ár.,
english: This letter is from Jon, the head man.

nama: ménamén efalo, árké yém téfefaf a so yém yéndfé tuot.
english: because of the truth, which lives us and will be with us forever.

nama: Ngárám, ghérghérsisé a krufrát árké yéném kétamé Afé Ngánjáneta a kétamé Yesu Keriso yáne Ambum so yéném yéndfé efe yém efaloyan a uwéghan.
english: Grace, mercy and peace which comes from the Father God and from Yesu Keriso his Son will be with us who lives in the truth and love.

nama: Tane em tárfár faroghét féfeyot, wénde yénd méndefnar wém fene farogh fefayan, wénde yénd méghmégh wém ménát féfe fandaghét a sái norayam fémafé sáfero, ménát téfene áuwégh so yém wifoghkaf.
english: I have much to write to you.p, but I do not want to write on the paper with pen, but I hope to see you.p and talk with you.p face to face, so that our joy may be complete.

nama: Fene kaféghmén mérésoene ambumtértér enwatembangi féfe yéfenjo ásnegh si.
english: The children of your.s chosen sister send their greeting talk.

nama: Yéné férén siyém kétamé Jon, sénko ár. Yéndo yéfarotan kétán tane tikfafé fútar Gaius, efe yéndon yuwetan efaloe.
english: This letter is from Jon, the head man. I am writing to my heartful friend Gaius, whom I truly love.

nama: Tafaf em tárfár ménát afroghét féfeyot, wénde yénd méndefnar wém sái yéfarotan fene fefayan. 14 Yénd méghmégh wém ménát sái tawinjon fém wékeye, a yénd so norayam sáfero.
english: I have much to tell you.p, but I don't want to write it in a letter with pen. 14 I hope to see you.s quickly, and we will say face to face.

nama: So yém Ngánjánene krufrát fefaf. Fene fútarfem yénan nénmawatembangi yéfene ásnegh si. Tawaramangi tane ásnegh si fénatayero téfene fútarfet.
english: May God's peace be with you.s. Your.s friends here send you.s their greeting talk. Give my greet talk to all our friends personally.

nama: Yéné férén siyém kétamé Juda tambén, Yesu Kerisoene faiofnar ásáfogh ár a yém Jemse yánngén. Yéndo yéfarotan yéfe méinyotio efe ekafai Ngánjánam, efe emor Ngánján Afane uwéghan a Yesu Kerisoene waraweréghan.
english: This letter is from Judas, a worker of Yesu Keriso and the younger brother of Jems. I am writing to them all who God has chosen you.p, who live in the love of God the Father and the protection of Yesu Keriso.

nama: Féfefaf so yém mindefifi Ngánjánene ghérghérsisé, krufrát a uwégh. Unyégh watamegh téfnár
english: To you.p will be more and more God's mercy, peace, and love. False teaching men

nama: Tane tikfafé fútaréf, yénd minde ménde wém sái yéfarotan féfefaf ménamén wanjarégh árké yéndfem yéfalotam, yénd njam ménde wém faroghét féfeyot ménát wawéngsoghét sái násmétati ndimbal mwighat ambinotaro a méinyotio árét Ngánjánam árké yéramai. 4 Ámb ár té kwankwane nényawangi féfene mérnan. Tándái Ngánjánene mat yátogh árém té yéfarotaménd yéné árfenemén efe so moghan em kértafé. Fá em asénanégh ár Ngánjánafé a té tengotat téfene Ngánjánene ngárám ménát sái emor yaufiyam ghérsaye. Fá wéi ndenáyo nakenat ménát sái tumyongi Yesu Keriso, téfene fáro Ndimbal a Yuré.
english: My heartful friends, I really wanted to write you.p about salvation which we share, when I wanted to write to you.p to encourage you.p to fight on for the big mind(faith) once and for all the people which God has given. 4 Some people have scretly entered in your group. Long ago the God's man who make know(prophet) have written about these people who will be judged guilty. They are opponent with God and have changed the grace of our God to live sinful life. They also refuse to accept Yesu Keriso, our only Master and Lord.

nama: Yéné so yém yaufififi yéfeyot! Yémofem té yaitoyénd Keinene end, a fá té naramangi fáyo ménát wafroghét yaufi némé Balamém tawafrotau mani téfnan. Fá té kásmetawét Ngánjánafé, ndené Kora skufrotau. Féyo fá so tawalindangé.
english: This will be very bad for them! They have followed Kein's way, and they have given themselves to do the wrong what Balam did for money. They have fought with God, just as Kora did. So he(God) will destroy them.

nama: Enok témorwén 7mén ár saté Edéme soramé, a fá té korayau yéfenemén yéné árfenemén njam norayai, "Kéretangi! Yuré yéném tausen a tausen njafarmén njúnnjúnofnar si résagh árfé 15 ménát sái emota méinyotio ár. Yémo so tékrátan tákmangé méinyotio yéné ngánjánofnar ár ménamén méinyotio yaufiyam yémofem árké tawafrotawét. Yuram efalo so tékrátan tákmangé yéné ngánjánofnar yaufi ár ménamén méinyotio yaufi si árké korayawét yáfaf.
english: Enok was the 7th generation after Edèm, and he was talking about these people when he said: "Look! The Lord is coming with thousands and thousands of without.dust(holy) men carrying heavenly message(angels) 15 to judge every people. He will punish all those ungodly people for all the evil things which they have done. The Lord will surely punish those ungodly sinners because of every evil talks which they have said against him."

nama: Yéné ár nawatarnat a efayotat ámb ár; engwafrotat yaufiyam fá ándan ménde em wafroghét; fá nawauyotat yéfenjoménro a yémofem yuwan eyátotat ámb ár ménát sái ewarsat némat fá ménde em. Matot a wafroghét
english: These people complain and blame other people; they do the evil things where they want to do; they boast about themselves and they became other people low to get what they want. Warnings and Instructions

nama: Tikfafé fútaréf, mé a narmbotati fémyo féfene mindefifi njúnnjúnofnar ndimbal mwighayan, ndené fété Ngánján Mbérmbéram sái ewáutána oraighét Ngánjánafé, 21 a kawerangi fémyo kété Ngánjánene uwéghan, njamandio fém nawanjetati téfene Yuré Yesu Kerisoene ghérghérsisat sái tawaramangé féfe tuot ghérsé.
english: Heartful friends, keep raising yourselves on your most without.dust(holy) big mind(faith), as the God Spirit helps you.p to talk with God, 21 and keep yourselves there in God's love, while you.p wait for the mercy of our Lord Yesu Keriso to give you.p eternal life.

nama: Engéuyafotati ghérghérsisé ámb árét fá efe natambnat; 23 enéfnanati ámb ár kétamé fésta, a ewanjanati fá; euyafotati ghérghérsisé férférafé ámb árét, engkarotati yéfene sáláme árké em njúnnjúnafé yaufiyammén. Yuwetam Ngánján
english: Show mercy on some people those who have doubts; 23 take out other people from fire, and save them; show mercy with fear to other people, hating their clothes which are dirty from sin. Praise God

nama: Yéné férén siyém Jone tambén tafarotau kétán 7 Yesuene mérén kénjút kété Esia marat yuwon.
english: This letter is from Jon into the 7 Yesu's families(churches) there in province of Esia.

nama: a kétamé Yesu Kerisoe tambén, efe yém ndimbal mwighé kér ro fandagh ár yéné yammén, fronde efe nanoi kérta a efe yém mband maratmén warsagh árfene limánégh ár.
english: and from Yesu Keriso, who is faithful watching man to these things, the first who rised from death and who is ruler of the ruling men(kings) of the world.

nama: a emo yényátoi yénd sái yéném Ngánján limánéghan a ghéngén wárogh ár ménát sái yutémndam Ngánján Yárefé. Yáfaf so yém ndimbal kwayaghé a wafté tuot! Efalo.
english: and who made us to become a part God's kingdom and burning sacrifice men(priests) to honor for God his Father. To him will be big light(glory) and power forever! Amen.

nama: "Kéretangi, fá nénangote njafar kwamkwamafé! Méinyotio árém so yéfandat, emofem fimbe yékunyayénd, a méinyotio ár mband maratan so tafarngé yeyam yáne téfnan. So fété nufrote! Efalo.
english: "Look, he is coming with the clouds! Everyone will see him, those who pierced with spear him, and all peoples on the world will cover with tears because of him. It will be happened! Amen.

nama: Yuré Ngánján noraye, "Yénd wém fronde a soramé, efe yém, efe témorwén, a efe so yéném, Méinyotio tukén waftafé." Ndenanit témorwén Ároene Ambum
english: The Lord God says, "I am first and last, who is, who was, and who will come, the With all high power(Almighty)." It was like the Son of Men

nama: Yéfarota yéné férén kétán njafar si résagh ároefaf Efesos Yesuene mérén kénjún:
english: Write this letter to the man carrying heavenly message of the Yesu's family(church) in Efesos:

nama: Árké ár ménde em áyárghét, táf náyáretat Ngánján Mbérmbéroefaf, a yérsat ndernáye Ngánján Mbérmbér noraye Yesuene mérnafefaf. Yéné ár efe njam nawaindat so yémofem enetat kétamé ghérsé akegh wénta árké yém Ngánjánene sariafé limánéghan. Kétán Yesuene mérén Sémirna kénjún
english: Which people want to hear, listen to God Spirit, and carry how God Spirit says to the Yesu's families(churches). Those people who win will eat from the tree of life which is in God's beautiful ruling(the paradise of God). To Sèmirna Yesu's family(church)

nama: Yéfarota yéné férén kétán njafar si résagh ároefaf Sémirna Yesuene mérén kénjún:
english: Write this letter to the man carrying heavenly message of the Yesu's family(church) in Sèmirna:

nama: Árké ár efe njam ménde em áyárghét, so náyáretat némé Ngánján Mbérmbér noraye Yesuene mérénfaf. Efe njam em nawaindat yau so yasérmbote yénamayo kéram. Kétán Yesuene mérén Fegamam kénjún
english: Which people want to hear, listen what God Spirit says to the Yesu's family(church). These who win will not be destroyed by second death. To the Yesu's family(church) in Fegamam

nama: Yéfarota yéné férén kétán njafar si résagh ároefaf Fégamam Yesuene mérén kénjún:
english: "Write this letter to the man carrying heavenly message of the Yesu's family(church) in Fegamam:

nama: Yénd mat wém ndené fém emor yéné ndimbal tesenan ánde Sáiféroene limánégh ámnjogh sifayé yém. Wénde fém mé táikér tawakai tafaf a fém yau nékmbotati ta efalo yátoghan táf njam Antifas, tane ndimbal mwighé kér ro fandagh ár, krot yékmayénd féfene ndimbal tesen ánde Sáifér yémor.
english: I know that you.p live in the city where Sáifèr has his sitting table. But you.p are still standing strongly to me and you.p are not stopping believing in me during when Antifas, my faithful watching man, was killed in your.p city where Sáifèr lives.

nama: Árké ár efe ménde em áyárghét, so náyáretat ndernáye Ngánján Mbérmbér noraye Yesuene mérénfaf. Méinyotio efe njam nawaindat so enetat féskaf flawé árké té engétnoi njafaran. A yéndon so ewarametan fénatayero kwayaghé wím a yéné wíman so ekai totér yétkwén árkéméné ámb ár yau mat so yém mé fáro emo tanangé. Kétán Yesuene mérén Taiatira kénjún
english: Which people want to hear, listen how the God Spirit says to the Yesu's families(churches). All the people who win will eat bread which has been hidden in heaven. And I will give you.p white stone and on that stone will write new name which no one knows except the one who recieves it. To the Yesu's family(church) in Taiatira

nama: Yéfarota yéné férén kétán njafar si résagh ároefaf Taiatira Yesuene mérén kénjún:
english: Write this letter to the man carrying heavenly message(angel) of the Yesu's family(church) in Taiatira:

nama: Yéfarota yéné férén kétán njafar si résagh ároefaf Sadis Yesuene mérén kénjún:
english: Write this letter to man carrying heavenly message of the Yesu's family(church) in Sadis:

nama: Yéfarota yéné férén kétán njafar si résagh ároefaf Filadelfia Yesuene mérén kénjút:
english: Write this letter to the man carrying heavenly message of the Yesu's family(church) in filadelfia:

nama: Yéfarota yéné férén kétán njafar si résagh ároefaf Laodikia Yesuene mérén kénjún:
english: Write this letter to the man carrying heavenly message of the Yesu's family(church) in Laodikia:

nama: Yéndon so eumyotan méinyotio ár efe njam nawindat ménát sái yénmor yéndfé tane kitarayan, ndené fété yénd wémormén waingégh téfnár a namnjeyayém tane Afafé yáne limánégh ámnjogh sifayan. 22 Fá efe yém ténganafé, so fété náyárete némé Ngánján Mbérmbér noraye Yesuene mérénfaf.
english: I will invite all the people who win so that they sit with me in my ruling sitting place, just as I have become winner and I sat with my Father on his ruling sitting place. 22 Whoever has ears, must listen to what God Spirit says to the Yesu's families(churches).

nama: Njam yéné akegh ghérsafé rokaram yuyotat a utémndat a kánjo yarametat yáyot efe yémor limánégh ámnjogh sifayan a efe nakete tuot, 10 yéné 24 sénko ár táf budme kiangi a yáwefnotat yá efe nakete tuot a yémofem táf tákmangi yéfenjo ákiki limánégh ámnjogh sifayé frondeta a norayat,
english: When those living things praise and honor ang give thanks to him who sits on the ruling sitting place and who live forever, 10 those 24 head people kneel down and worship him who live forever and they put their crowns in front of the ruling sitting place and say,

nama: "O Yuré téfene Ngánján, fém ném féyotaro sái yérsa ndimbal kwayaghé o utmanégh a wafté, ménamén fémo ewafrotam méinyotio rokar, a fene méndeyan naketat a kufrotawét."
english: " O Lord our God, you.s are enough to take big light(glory) and honor and power, because you.s created all things, and by your.s will they were created and existed."

nama: A fémofem fá té táyátotati Ngánjánene limángégh a yáne ghéngén wárogh ár a fá so em limánégh ár mband maratan."
english: And you.p have made them to be a God's ruling and its burning sacrifice men(priests) and they will be ruler on earth."

nama: A yéndon táyáretawén méinyotio ghérsafé rokar njafaran a mband maratan a mband marat mbanmbanan a arakafan, yémofem wéi wagh taufanawét: "Frengégh a utmanégh a ndimbal kwayaghé a wafté yáne yém efe yémor limánégh ámnjogh sifayan a yáyot wéi Sif tosé efe yém tuot!"
english: And I heard every living things in heaven and on earth and under the earth and on the sea, they were singing again: "Blessing and honor and big light(glory) and power belong to the one who sits on the ruling sitting place and to the Lamb forever!"

nama: A wéi 4 akegh ghérsafé rokar norayayénd, "Efalo!" A wéi 24 sénko ár nuyáyénd a yáwefnoyénd Ngánjáne a Sif tosae.
english: And again the 4 living things said, "Amen!" And again 24 head people fell down and worshipped God and to the Lamb.

nama: Njam yénd kéretawén Sif tosam yésawéryéng fronde 7mén manéghkaf yam bukan. Féyo ámb akegh ghérsafé rokar néngutnai yéné ke ndenanit árurkenit, "Kénaf!" 2 Yénd néngretayén tukét a yinjoyén kwayaghé os. Os résagh árém teretau namb, a yémo yanai ákiki. Fá kérsau ménát sái kawaindau ásméghan fáro.
english: When I saw the Lamb opened the first of the 7 seals on the book. Then one thing shouted this voice like thunder, "Come!" 2 I was looking up and saw a white horse. Horse rider held a bow, and he received a crown. He rode out in order to win himself in fighting.

nama: Kétamé Judane mérénta 12,000 manéghkaf yam yérue eramayénd, kétamé Réubenene mérénta 12,000, kétamé Gadene mérénta 12,000,
english: From the tribe of Juda 12,000 were marked with the seal, from the tribe of Rèuben 12,000, from the tribe of Gad12,000,

nama: kétamé Ásarene mérénta 12,000, kétamé Naftaliene mérénta 12,000, kétamé Ménasene mérénta 12,000,
english: from the tribe of Ásar12,000, from the tribe of Naftali 12,000, from the tribe of Manase 12,000,

nama: kétamé Simionene mérénta 12,000, kétamé Lefiene mérénta 12,000, kétamé Isakarene mérénta 12,000,
english: from the tribe of Simion 12,000, from the tribe of Lefi 12,000, from the tribe of Aisak 12,000,

nama: kétamé Jebulunene mérénta 12,000, kétamé Josefene mérénta 12,000, kétamé Benjaminene mérénta 12,000. Ndimbal ár mérén
english: from the tribe of Jebulun 12,000, from the tribe of Josef 12,000, from the tribe of Benjamin 12,000, The big crowd

nama: Méinyotio njafar si résagh ár tawakayongérwén yarendayénd limánégh ámnjogh sifayé a sénko ár a 4 akegh ghérsafé rokar. Fá sénkoe kuitawét limánégh ámnjogh sifayarére a táwefnotawét Ngánjáne, 12 korayawét: "Efalo! Uwégh a ndimbal kwayaghé a káfeté mwighé a kánjo a utmanégh a wafté a muyé yém téfene Ngánjáne kétánotio tuot! Efalo!"
english: All the men carrying heavenly message(angels) were standing surrounded the ruling sitting place and head people and the 4 living things. They fell down on their head in front of ruling sitting place and worshipped God, 12 saying: "Amen! Praise and big light(glory) and wisdom and thanks and honor and power and strength be to our God forever! Amen!"

nama: Féyo ámb sénko árom wémotai, "Yéné kwayaghé sálámefé sem efe em, a árkamé fá enmormén?"
english: Then one of the head people asked me, "Who is these people with white cloth, and where do they come from?"

nama: Yéndon yawangoyén, "Ndimbal, fém mat ném." A fá korayangé, "Yéné em efe tamorwén ndimbal kértayan; yémofem té taumbnawét yéfenjo sáláme a eyátoyénd kwayaghé Sif tosane férkan.
english: I answered him, "Sir, you.s know." And he said, "These are people who had a big trouble; they they have washed their cloth and made them white in the blood of the Lamb.

nama: Yénémamén, fá yéné fem Ngánjánene limánégh ámnjogh sifayarére a yémofem yáwefnotat yáyot efogh a sémbár yánjo wáwefnogh méngo kénjún; a fá efe yémor limánégh ámnjogh sifayan so em yémafé mérne.
english: Therefore, they are the one before the ruling sitting place of God and they worship him day and night in his worshipping house; and he who sits on the ruling sitting place will be with them.

nama: Yau wéikor so siogham fá eramete yau wéi so fá nu siogham eramete. Efogh waftayam yau so elále, fá yau so ewakérne.
english: They will hunger no more, and thirst no more; The sun will not beat down on them, will not burn them.

nama: Ménamén Sif tosé efe yémor limánégh ámnjogh sifayé kaka so mé ewanjete ndenanit sif wanjengégh ár. Yémon so elimnde kétán akegh wérér nufaf. A Ngánjánam so tawawányányongé méinyotio yengam kétamé yéfene ghékéfta.
english: Beacuse the Lamb who stays near the ruling sitting place will continually care for them like a sheep watching man. He will lead them to the living spring water. And God will wipe away every tear from their eyes."

nama: Njam yémo yésawéryéng 7mén manéghkaf, métar náyátoi njafaran séno ámbiro efoghféneféne mbarmbar. 2 A yéndon ewinjoyén 7 njafar si résagh ár tawakayongérwén Ngánjánerére, a yéfe ewaramayéng 7 sufér.
english: When he opened the 7th seal, it became silent in heaven about half an hour. 2 And I saw the 7 men carrying heavenly message(angels) standing before God, and he gave them 7 trumpets.

nama: Féyo 7 njafar si résagh ár nafrendaménd sufér waufghét.
english: Then the 7 men carrying heavenly message(angels) prepared to blow the trumpet.

nama: Fronde njafar si résagh árom yaufetai yánjo sufér, a nu mbwe a fés wanjméghkaf férkafé enwitam mbandot. Ámbiro nambiomén mband marat nakérnam, a ámbiro nambiomén wén kakérnawét a yus méinyotio nefoi.
english: The first man carrying heavenly message blew his trumpet, and hail(water seed) and fire mixed with blood poured down on the earth. A third of the earth was burned up, and a third of the trees were burned, and all the grass finished.

nama: Féyo yénamayo njafar si résagh árom yaufetai yánjo sufér, a ámb rokar ndenanit mband tunakéf fésafé yitam arakafot. Ámbiro nambiomén arakaf nawengoi férkot, 9 a ámbiro nambiomén akegh rokar arakafan eramngotam, a ámbiro nambiomén bout ewasérmbotam.
english: Then the second man carrying heavenly message blew his trumpet, and something like buring mountain was thrown into the sea. A third of the sea was turned into blood, 9 and a third of living things in the sea died, and a third of the bout were destroyed.

nama: 4mén njafar si résagh árom yaufetai yánjo sufér. Ámbiro nambiomén efogh yiroryéng a ámbiro nambiomén ghérare, a ámbiro nambiomén kénd kés em, ménát yéfene ámbiro nambiomén kwayaghé nénamndayénd kwéfité; ámbiro nambiomén efogh témorwén kwayaghafnar a ámbiro nambiomén sémbár witmaro wéi ndenáyo.
english: The 4th man carrying heavenly message blew his trumpet. A third of the sun was struck and a third of the moon, and a third of the stars, so that thier one third light turned dark; a third of the day was without light, and a third of the night also.

nama: Féyo yénd néngretayén tukét, a yéndo yiyárayén ámbiro ndikáké kutnau ndimbal keye njamandio kanefetau tukmé njafaran, "Férférafé! Férférafé! Férférafé méinyotio ár efe emor yéné mband maratan, ménamén sufér kemén árké ámb nambio njafar si résagh árém so ewaufetat!"
english: Then I looked up, and I heard an eagle shouting in a loud while it was flying in the sky, "Scared! Scraed! Scared to all the people who live on this earth, because of the trumpet sound which the other three men carrying heavenly message(angels) will blow!"

nama: Fronde férférafé yam té kawainde, wénde ámb sómbio férférafé yam mé ere ufroghét.
english: The first frightening thing has passed, but two other frightening things are yet to come.

nama: Féyo kém árké náyárayén yéndon kétamé njafarta nénorayai tafaf wéikor, "Nguwano, téngwan sauréghkaf buk árkéméné yéfai njafar si résagh ároene ngángayan efe yakai arakafan a mbandan."
english: Then the voice which I heard from heaven spoke to me again, "Go, take the open book which is in the hand of the man carrying heavenly message(angel) who is standing on the sea an on the land."

nama: Ár efe em yéné mband maratmén so erametat ramégh yéfenjo kénjún a téménd sái yafrotat, ménamén sómbio Ngánjánene mat yátogh árfene kérmén emofem takméwét ár kértayan.
english: The people who are of the earth will give presents to each other and will make a feast, because of two God's man who make know(prophet)'s death whose.d brought suffering upon people.

nama: Yénamayo férférafé yam té nawaindé, wénde nambiomén férférafé yam yéném tekofnaye. 7mén sufér ke
english: The second scaring thing is passed, but the third scaring thing is coming not.far! The 7th trumpet

nama: Mband marat ár mérén nékw té tam fefaf, wénde sénonjo fene nékw efogh té nufar. Yéné efogh té nawer sái emota kér ár a fai ewarameta fenjo ásáfogh téfnárat, fémo so fai ewaramete fenjo faiofnar ásáfogh árét Ngánjánene mat yátogh árét a efalo yátogh ár a méinyotio emofem yéfandat fene yétkwén férférafé, kétamé némbnar kétán ndimbal, a fémon so ewasérmbote méinyotio fá emofem tasérmbotat mband marat."
english: The people of the earth were angry to you.s, but now your.s anger day has come. This time has come for judging the dead, and for giving payments your.s workers the God's people who make know(prophets) and truly approving men(believers) and all who fear your.s name, from small to big, and you.s will destroy those who destroy the earth.”

nama: Féyo njafaran Ngánjánene wáwefnogh méngo nasawéryéng, a yáne Nák Boks safénro téfandawét yáne wáwefnogh méngo kénjún. Féyo kété témorwén toyé karametawét, árurke kásmetawét a karoghawét, nu mbwefé ndimbal mbormbor, a sokrere.
english: Then in heaven God's worshipping house was opened, and his Law Box was seen in his worshipping house. Then there were flashes of lightning, thunder crashed and roared, a heavy wind with water seed(hail), and earthquake.

nama: Ndimbal sélngwélafé yam nufaryéng njafaran: amaf efogh umaneghkaf témorwén, ménáyafé ghérare témorwén yáne kafkaf mbanmbanan a 12 kéndafé ákiki téfayongérwén yáne sénkoyan. 2 Amaf témorwén ambum suafé a tékrát téfandau áráfghét.
english: A big surprising thing(sign) appeared in heaven: a woman clothed with the sun, with the moon under her feet and a crown of 12 stars on her head. 2 She was pregnant and she has pains to give birth.

nama: Yéna yém káfeté mwighé. Efe yém mwighé kér ro so yafene yéné wafégh ndimbal gásiane, ménamén yéné siyém ároenemén waferégh a yáne waférghét siyém 666.
english: This is wisdom. Whoever is intelligent can figure out the number of the big crocodile, because this is people's number and its number is 666.

nama: Yénamayo njafar si résagh árom yáitoi a korayau, 'Té nuyai! Té nuyai ndimbal Babilon, emon táyátote méinyotio ár mband maratan ténetat yáne wéri nu ménaye amafoene yaufi wal yame!"
english: A second man carrying heavenly message followed it(the first one) and said, “She has fallen! Great Babilon has fallen, who made all peoples in earth drink her alcohol by her immorality!”

nama: Yéné siyém ménát yém awamarogh yéfeyot Ngánjánene árét, emofem ewaitotat Ngánjánene nák a ewakai ndimbal mwighé kér ro Yesuefaf.
english: This is to be endurance for them God's people, those who follow God's laws and stand faithful to Yesu.

nama: Féyo yénd náyárayén kém njafarta kénorayau, "Efarota: Frengéghkaf fá em yéné kér téfnár efe kér em Yurane kénjún kétánotio sénonjo. Ngánján Mbérmbér noraye, "Néméwét! Fá so nenat yéfenjo ásáfoghta, ménamén yéfenjo wafroghyamam so ewaitote fá." Mband maratoene wau yu
english: Then I heard a voice from heaven saying, “Write it: Blessed are those who die in the Lord from now on!” God Spirit says, “Yes! They will rest from their work, because their deeds will follow them.” The harvest of the earth

nama: Ámb njafar si résagh ár néntoryéng wáwefnogh méngota njafaran, a yáne wéi témorwén sénté náifé.
english: Another man carrying heavenly message came out of the worshipping house in heaven, and he also had a sharp knife.

nama: Emofem yau so férférafé néfandat, Yuré a so yénérsat ndimbal kwayaghé fene yétkwénfaf? Ménamén mé fémro ném njúnnjúnofnar. Méinyotio ndimbal yu so eném fe wáwefnoghét ménamén fene mbarkánd yam fémon némé tawafrote té mat káyátotat.
english: Who will not fear you.s, Lord, and bring big light(glory) to your.s name? Because you.s alone are without.dust(holy). All nations will come to worship you.s, because your.s straight deeds what you.s did have made been known."

nama: Féyo yéndo yiyárayén ndimbal kém korayau kétamé wáwefnogh méngota 7 njafar si résagh árfefaf: "Tangém tawasunangi 7 dis Ngánjánene nékw mband maratan!"
english: Then I heard a loud voice speaking from the worshipping house to the 7 men carrying heavenly message(angels): “Go [and] pour out the 7 bowls of God's anger on the earth!”

nama: Fronde njafar si résagh ár yéngmormén a yasuryéng yánjo dis mbandot, a mafulafé a ndémkefé fénend atyarégh nufngoyénd yéné árfefafmé efe tamorwén ndimbal gásiane mborafé a táwefnotat yáne mbanmbanoe.
english: The first man carrying heavenly message went and poured out his bowl on the land, terrible and painful sores started appearing on those people who had the mark of the big crocodile and on those who had worshiped its image.

nama: Yénamayo njafar si résagh árom yasuryéng yánjo dis arakafot. Nawengoi arakaf kér ároene féréknit, méinyotio ghérsafé rokar arakafan kér emormén.
english: The second man carrying heavenly message poured out his bowl onto the sea. The sea became like the blood of a dead person, every living things in the sea died.

nama: Nambiomén njafar si résagh árom yasuryéng yánjo dis wanjeyamé a wérér nuamé, a méinyotio nawengoyénd férkot. 5 A yéndo yiyárayén njafar si résagh ár efe témorwén waftafé méinyotio nufaf korayau, "Fém fété ném mbarkánd yéné tékrát yammén, O Njúnnjúnofnar ár, efe ném a efe túmén témorwén!
english: The third man carrying heavenly message poured out his bowl on the rivers and the springs of water, and all turned into blood. 5 And I heard the man carrying heavenly message who has power to every waters say, “You.s are straight in these punishments, O Without.dust One, you.s who are and who always were!

nama: Fene njúnnjúnofnar ár a fene mat yátogh ár té esmetaménd krotio a yéfene férék té tasunawét mbandan. Féyo fémo té ewaramai yéfene ngi téfnárat férék nénet. Yéné fiyém yéfene fai."
english: They killed your.s without.dust(holy) people and the God's people who make know(prophets) and poured out their blood on the land. Then you.s have given blood to their killers to drink. It is their reward!”

nama: A yénd náyárayén si kétamé ghéngén wárogh kitarata kénorayau, "Néméwét, Yuré Ngánján Méinyotio wafté! Fene tékrát kéméghét siyém efalo yém a mbarkánd!"
english: And I heard a talk from the table for burning sacrifice saying, “Yes, Lord God Almighty! Your.s punishments are true and straight!”

nama: 4mén njafar si résagh árom yasuryéng yánjo dis efoghfaf, téméindau minde waftat ménát ár sái tawakérnau yéné fese. 9 Ár tawakérnau yéné ndimbal efogh waftayam, a yémofem tafalngotawét Ngánjánene yétkwén, emo enwáfárete yéné férférafé kérté yam. Wénde fá yau kawengotawét yaufiyam wafroghta a tuyafotawét yáyot ndimbal kwayaghé.
english: The 4th man carrying heavenly message poured out his bowl on the sun, and it make strong power to burn people with that fire. 9 The people were burned by the fierce heat, and they cursed the name of God, who sent these fearful suffering things. But they would not turn from doing sins and praise his big light(glory).

nama: Féyo 5mén njafar si résagh árom yasuryéng yánjo dis ndimbal gásiane limánégh ámnjogh sifayan, a yáne ndimbal yu yafaryéng kwéfitayam. Árém kánké tarnawét yéfenjoyo ndémkemén, 11 a tafalngotawét Ngánján njafarmén ménamén yéfene ndémkemén a fénendmén, wénde fá kakenawét awengowét yéné yaufita némé tawafrotawét mé yémofem.
english: The 5th man carrying heavenly message poured out his bowl on the ruling sitting place of the big crocodile, and its nation fell over darkness. People bit their tongues because of their pain, 11 and they cursed the God of heaven for their pains and sores, but they denied to turn from these sin what they continually did.

nama: "Káyárangi, yénd so wéném oro téfnárnit! Frengéghkaf fá yém efe mé néréte ewarawene yánjo sáláme, ménát fá yau so yéngém firo a waiwaiafé."
english: "Listen, I am coming like a thief! Blessed is he who is watching and keeping his cloth, so that he will not go naked and shamefully!”

nama: Féyo yémofem eumendayénd warsagh ár méinyotio yéné sifayat árké Ibru sie yémndetat Amagedon.
english: Then they gathered the ruling men(kings) together in this place which in Ibru talk is called Amagedon.

nama: Yéné amaf fémo árké té yinjo ghékéf waingéghe yufarote ndimbal tesen árkéménéyam elimnde mband maratmén warsagh ár.
english: That woman which you.p saw in a eye passover thing(vision) represents the big city that rules over the ruling men(kings) of the earth.”

nama: Féyo yéndo wéi ámb si kém náyárayén njafarot, kénorayau, "Kéntonangi yéné amafoe tambén, tane ár, ménát fém yau so nufeindati yáne yaufiyamot, ménát fém yau so tawanangé yéné amafoene tékrát yamam!
english: Then I heard another voice came from heaven, saying, “Come out of that woman, my people, so that you.p must not involve in her sins, so that you.p must not receive any of her punishment!

nama: Ménamén yéné amafoene yaufiyam té kafayotat farufaru njafarot, a Ngánjánam té yawafarota yáne yaufiyam.
english: Because this woman's sins have been piled up to heaven, and God has remembered her sins.

nama: Yafrotati yéné yam ndernáye yéné amafom té tawafrote ámb ár. Taramangi yá férghe tékrát yáne méinyotio yaufiyammén. Yémo taméindau ár tárfár kérté yamot yáne kafusi nénean, féyo yawafrotati ndenéyameyo sómbinotmé tárfár kérté yándio.
english: Do to her as she has done to others. Pay her back double for her all sins. She caused people to drink many troubles from her cup, so make her drink twice as many troubles for herself!

nama: Taramangi yá minde kérté a ye ndené ndimbal kwayaghé a ngonjél yémo té ewaramai yáfaftio. Ménamén yémon té mé ténémndetau: Yénd wémor warsagh amaf kitarayan ndené warsagh amaf! Yénd yau wém séfarékw amaf, yénd yau mat so wém ye!
english: Give her strong suffering and crying as the big light(glory) and treasure she has given herself. Because she keeps telling herself: ‘I sit in ruling woman(queen)'s ruling sitting place as a ruling woman(queen)! I am no widow, I will not know crying!’

nama: Yénémaménnde, ámb efghon yáne férférafé kérté yam so kufarngé yáfaf- kér, ye a káukáu. Fá so yakérne fésam, ménamén waftafé yém Yuré Ngánján, emo yéné amaf so tékmangé tékrátan.
english: Therefore, in one day her fearful suffering things will appear to her— death, crying, and famine. Fire will burn her, because the Lord God, who judges her, is powerful.”

nama: Rokar térarégh ár mband maratmén so nendat a ye nawerametat yánemén, ménamén árké árom yau yéfene rokar so ewarse manie wéikor, 12 rokar ndené gol, silfé, méndefé wím, a ndindi, mer sáláme, ndéndák ngarot sáláme, áfrát sáláme, férék ngarot sáláme méinyotio fénataye mer wimafé wén a méinyotio fénataye rokar aiforimén, tukén mani kér ro wén, bronj, tot téfén, a mabulmén; 13 sinamon, wanjmengégh rokar a mer wimafé rokar, mir a mer wimafé wékwér, a wéri nu a olif wénmén wékwér, féskaf flawé a flawé mbwe, kau a sif, os a os résaghmén, faiofnar ásáfogh ár a árfene ghérsé.
english: The seller of things(merchants) of the earth will cry and mourn for her, because no one buys their goods anymore, 12 things like gold, silver, precious stones, and pearls, good cloth, purple cloth, soft cloth(silk), red cloth; all kinds of good smell's woods and all kinds of objects made of aibori, expensive wood, bronze, iron, and marble; 13 sinamon, seasoning, good smelling things(incense), mir(myrrh) and good smelling liquid(frankincense), wine and olive oil, flour and wheat, cattle and sheep, horses and chariots, without.payment working men(slaves) and people. 14 They will say, “All the good things which you.p longed to get are gone, and all your.p things and shining things are gone, and you.p will never find them!” 15 The merchants, who exchanged these things and luxurious things with money and weath made from the woman, will stand far off, because they are afraid of her suffering. They will cry and mourn, 16 and say, “How terrible! How terrible, the big city! She was clothed in fine purple and red cloth, and cover herself with gold, precious stones, and pearls! 17 And in one hour all good things from this city are gone”

nama: Wénde fém, o njafar, náuwétati yáne kérkéfmén! Fém wéi ndenáyo náuwétati, efalo yátogh ár a Yesuene muyafé ár a Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár! Ménamén kerkeran Ngánjánam té moghan yékém féfene téfnan.
english: But you.p, oh heaven, rejoice over her death! You also rejoice, approving truth people(believers) and the men with Yesu's authority(apostles) and God's people who make know(prophets)! Because in the last God has put her court for you.p!

nama: Yéné tesenan Ngánjánene mat yátogh árfene a Ngánjánene njúnnjúnofnar ároene férék té ewinjoyénd, a méinyotio efe esmetaménd yéné mband maratan.
english: In the city the blood of God's people who make know(prophets) and of God's without.dust people was found, and of all who have been killed on this world.

nama: Yéné soramé yéndon tiyáretawén ámb rokar ndenanit ár mérén yénau narne njafaran, kutnawét, "Ngánján yuyotam! Wanjarégh a ndimbal kwayaghé a wafté yém téfene Ngánjánene!
english: After this I heard something like the roar of a large crowd of people in heaven, shouting, “Praise God! Salvation and big light(glory) and power is of our God!

nama: Efalo a mbarkánd yém yáne mogh yam! Yémo té yafalngo yéné yaufi wal amaf emo tasérmbote mband marat yáne yaufi wal yame. Yémo té fai yawango yéné amafoe yáne árfene kér téfnan."
english: True and straight is his judgment! He has condemned this prostitute who was corrupting the earth by her immorality. He has paid back to this woman in the reason of death of his people.”

nama: Wéikor fá kutnawét, "Ngánján yuyotam! Fés kwam kuyotau yéné ndimbal tesenta tuotot!"
english: Again they shouted, “Praise God! The smoke from this city goes up forever!”

nama: 24 sénko ár a 4 akegh ghérsafé rokar nuyáyénd a táwefnotawét Ngánjáne, efe témorangérwén limánégh ámnjogh sifayan. A kutnawét "Néméwét, Ngánján yuwetam!"
english: The 24 head people and the 4 living things fell down and worshiped God, who was seated on the ruling sitting place. And they cried, “Amen! Praise God!”

nama: Wéikor si yénmormén limánégh ámnjogh sifayé tambén, korayau, "Yuyotam téfene Ngánján, méinyotio fém yáne faiofnar ásáfogh ár, fém emofem férférafé yéfandati, méinyotio némbnar kétán ndimbal!"
english: Again a talk came from the ruling sitting place, saying, “Praise our God, all you.p his without.payment working people, you.p who fear him all big and small!"

nama: Féyo yéndon yiyárayén ke ndenanit ár tárfár yénau nutnat, ndenanit nu wérér rárákenit a ndimbal árurke yénau kutnangé, "Ngánján yuwetam! Ménamén Yuré Ngánján Méinyotio waftafé limánéghan yém!
english: Then I heard sound like a crowd's shouting, like the sound of a roaring waterfall and like loud peals of thunder, “Praise God! Because the Lord, our Almighty God reigns!

nama: Yénd so náuwétam a áuwéghafé yéném a yarametam yá ndimbal kwayaghé! Ménamén áwérégh yam té nufar Sif tosafé, a yáne amaf té kafrende fáyo.
english: Let us rejoice and be glad and give him big light(glory)! Because the wedding with the Lamb has come, and his bride has prepared herself.

nama: Mer sáláme, kwayaghé a njúnnjúnofnar, yaramayénd yáyot awoghét." Ménamén mer sálámeyam eufarote Ngánjánene árfene meryam wafrogh.
english: Fine cloth, bright and clean, was given to her to wear." Because the cloth shows for the good deeds of God's people.

nama: Féyo njafar si résagh ár norayai tafaf, "Efarota: Frengéghkaf fá em efe té taumyongi Sif tosane áwérégh téméndfaf." A wéikor wémndai, "Yéné sem efalofifi si em Ngánjánene."
english: Then the man carrying heavenly message said to me, “Write this: Blessed are those who have been invited to the wedding feast of the Lamb.” And he said to me again, “These are the true talks of God.”

nama: Yénamé yénd nuyáyén yáne kafkafot yá wáwefnoghét, wénde fá norayai tafaf, "Yau yéné yafrota! Yénd mé faiofnar ásáfogh ár yénre fémafé a ámb efalo yátogh árfé, méinyotio fá efe nawéretat efalo yátoghfaf Yesum ewafote fá. Yáwefnota Ngánjáne!" Ménamén afrogh Yesuenemén siyém Ngánjánene mat yátoghmén Mbérmbére yém." Résagh ár yéfai kwayaghé osan
english: Then I fell down at his feet to worship him, but he said to me, “Don't do this! I am only a worker together with you.s and with other approving truth people, all those who hold to the approving truth Yesu revealed. Worship God!” Because the testimony to Yesu is God Spirit of approving truth. The rider sit on the white horse

nama: Féyo yéndon yinjoyén njafar si résagh ár takayongérwén efghan, efe nutnai ndimbal keye méinyotio menafefaf árké nanefetat njafaran, "Taném, kénáumendangi méinyotio Ngánjánene ndimbal témndot, 18 ménát fémofem so yéngnetati warsagh árfene fenjen, fiyarafene sénko árfene, a fiyarafene, os a yéfene résagh árfene, a méinyotio árfene fenjen, faiofnar ásáfogh ár a yuwek ár, némbnar ár kétán ndimbal!"
english: Then I saw a man carrying heavenly message standing on the sun, who shouted in a loud voice to all the birds flying in the sky: “Come, gather together for God's big feast, 18 so that you.p may eat the flesh of ruling men(kings), of soldiers heading people, and of soldiers, of horses and of their riders, and the flesh of all people, without.payment working men(servants) and free men, small men to big men!”

nama: Yéndon ewinjoyén limánégh ámnjogh sifayé, yéné ár kété tamorangérwén endefet té wafrogh muyé ewaramayénd mogh kéméghét. A yéndon ewinjoyén yéné árfene mbérmbér efe té esmetaménd Yesuenemén afrogh téfnan a ménamén Ngánjánene simén. Yémofem yau táwefnotawét ndimbal gásiai o yáne mbanmbanoe a wéi yau ewanayénd yáne mbor yéfene sáf sotan o yéfene ngángayan. Fá nénamndayénd ghérsat a télimndawét Kerisofé 1,000 yunjéf. 5 (Ámb kér téfnár yau nanotaménd ghérsat kétánotio kor 1,000 yunjéf yiyato.) Yéné fiyém fronde anogh kérta. 6 Áuwéghafé a njúnnjúnofnar fá yéné fem efe sái kérta nanotat fronde anoghan. Yénamayo kér siyém waftafé yau yém yéfefaf, wénde fá so em Ngánjánene ghéngén wárogh ár a wéi Kerisoene a so yélimndat yémafé 1,000 yunjéf. Sáifér yáindayénd
english: Then I saw ruling sitting places, and those who sat on them were given the power to judge. And I saw the spirits of those who had been killed because of their testimony about Yesu and because of the talk of God. They had not worshiped the big crocodile or its image, nor had they received the mark of the big crocodile on their foreheads or their hands. They came to life and reigned with Keriso for 1,000 years. 5 (The rest of the dead people did not come to life until 1,000 years were over.) This is the first raising of the dead. 6 Blessed and without.dust(holy) are those who are included in this first raising of the dead. The second death has no power over them, but they shall be burning sacrifice men(priests) of God and of Keriso also and they will rule with him for 1,000 years. They defeated Sáifèr

nama: "Kor aem! Yénd nénangotan tekofnar! Tane fai sem tafaf em a yéndon so ewarametan fénatayero ménamén némé yémofem té tawafrotat. 13 Yénd wém Alfa a Omega, Fronde a Soramé, Rényégh a Wifogh.
english: "Watch out! I am coming not.far! My reward is with me, and I will give to each one according to what they have done. 13 I am the Alfa and the Omega, the First and the Last, the Beginning and the End.”

nama: "Yéndo, Yesum, té yéngwáfáretamén tane njafar si résagh ár sái kafrotau yéné yammén méinyotio Yesuene mérnamé. Yénd wém Deifidene Ákimén, a kwayaghé Akw Kénd."

nama: Ngánján Mbérmbér a awerégh mérés noraye, "Taném!" A tumyo fá efe náyárete noraye, "Taném!" Efe njam nuam nérameta, fá so kénaflangé, a efe njam ménde yém, faiofnaye yémo ghérsé wérér nu so tanangé.
english: The God Spirit and the bride say, “Come!” And let the one who hears say, “Come!” Let the one who is thirsty come, and let the one who wishes, take the water of life without payment.

nama: Fá efe nafrote yéné yammén noraye, "Néméwét, yénd nénangotan wékeye." Efalo. Kéném, Yuré Yesu.

nama: Yuré Yesuene ngárám so yém méinyotio Ngánjánene árfé. Efalo.
